mantras.name: At this very moment, I am sufficient.
mantras.english: At this very moment, I am sufficient.
mantras.original: In this moment, I am enough
mantras.transliteration: At this very moment, I am sufficient.
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist mindfulness, this mantra echoes Thich Nhat Hanh's "I am home" teaching — a present-moment anchor reminding us: right now, you are whole.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist present-moment awareness, this mantra quiets the Default Mode Network, easing anxiety and stress. Like "I Am Home," it anchors you now—no temple needed, just breath and repetition.
mantras.tags: buddhist, affirmation, mindfulness, presence, acceptance, peace, healing, empower, focus, grounding

translations.es: En este preciso instante, soy suficiente.
translations.ar: في هذه اللحظة تمامًا، أنا كافٍ.
translations.bn: এই মুহূর্তে, আমি যথেষ্ট।
translations.de: In diesem sehr Augenblick bin ich genug.
translations.en-us: Right now, I am enough.
translations.en-gb: At this very moment, I am enough.
translations.fr-fr: À cet instant précis, je suis suffisant.
translations.he: ברגע זה, אני מספיק.
translations.hi: इस पल में, मैं पर्याप्त हूँ।
translations.id: Pada saat ini, saya merasa cukup.
translations.it: In questo preciso istante, sono sufficiente.
translations.ja: 今、私は十分である。
translations.ko: 지금 이 순간, 저는 충분합니다.
translations.nl: Op dit precieze moment ben ik voldoende.
translations.pl: W tej właśnie chwili, jestem wystarczający.
translations.pt-br: Neste exato momento, sou capaz.
translations.ru: В этот самый момент я чувствую себя достаточно.
translations.sv: I just nu är jag tillräcklig.
translations.th: ในขณะนี้, ฉันมีความพอเพียงในตัวเอง.
translations.tr: Şu anda, ben yeterliyim.
translations.uk: У цю саму мить я відчуваю достатність.
translations.vi: Ngay lúc này, tôi là đủ.
translations.zh-cn: 现在，我已足够。

mantras.name: Buddham Sharanam Gacchami
mantras.english: I go to the Buddha for refuge / I take refuge in the Buddha
mantras.original: बुद्धं शरणं गच्छामि। धर्मं शरणं गच्छामि। संघं शरणं गच्छामि।
mantras.transliteration: Buddham Sharanam Gacchami / Dhammam Sharanam Gacchami / Sangham Sharanam Gacchami
mantras.abstract:
Buddham Sharanam Gacchami — I go for refuge to the Buddha — is the first of the Three Refuges or Tisarana, which together with the Five Precepts constitute the formal act of becoming a Buddhist in the Theravada tradition. The full formula is recited in three parts: refuge in the Buddha, refuge in the Dhamma, and refuge in the Sangha. Reciting the Three Refuges three times has been the entry point into Buddhist practice since the earliest recorded period of the tradition.

The Pali word sarana means refuge, shelter, or protection, and gacchami means I go, I proceed, I resort to. The going is significant: it is an active, intentional movement of the mind and will toward the Three Jewels. The Buddha is the refuge because he discovered and embodies liberation. The Dhamma is the refuge because it is the law of reality that leads to the end of suffering. The Sangha is the refuge because the community of the noble ones proves that the path works.

In the Mahayana tradition, an equivalent formula takes refuge in the Three Jewels with the explicit aspiration of attaining Buddhahood for the benefit of all sentient beings. The formula is present across virtually all schools of Buddhism, making it perhaps the single most universal Buddhist practice.

The Tisarana formula appears in the Pali Vinaya and the earliest suttas as the form of discipleship used during the Buddha's own lifetime. The Commentaries explain that taking refuge uproots wrong views about the Three Jewels and establishes right understanding of their nature as the highest refuges — not as external protectors but as the awakened qualities that can be realized within one's own mind.

translations.en: I go to the Buddha for refuge; I go to the Dhamma for refuge; I go to the Sangha for refuge
translations.zh: 我皈依佛，我皈依法，我皈依僧
translations.es: Voy al Buda en busca de refugio; voy al Dharma en busca de refugio; voy al Sangha en busca de refugio

mantras.name: Cleansing light, illuminating vastness, supremely virtuous, authentic, Mani, light of the Buddha.
mantras.english: Cleansing light, illuminating vastness, supremely virtuous, authentic, Mani, light of the Buddha.
mantras.original: Qīngjìng guāngmíng dàlì zhìhuì wúshàng zhìzhēn móní guāngfó
mantras.transliteration: 净光, 普照, 至善, 真如, 摩尼, 佛光.
mantras.background: A Buddhist mantra meaning "Cleansing light, illuminating vastness, supremely virtuous, authentic, Mani, light of the Buddha" — invoking radiant wisdom from Vajrayana tradition.
mantras.benefits: This mantra invokes cleansing light and Buddha's radiance, guiding practitioners toward inner purity and vast awareness. Repetition may induce altered consciousness, emotional resonance, and transcendence—hallmarks of Buddhist mantra traditions.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tibetan, vajrayana, devotional, purification, enlightenment, wisdom, buddha

translations.es: Luz purificadora, que ilumina la inmensidad, de suprema virtud, auténtico, Mani, luz de Buda.
translations.ar: نور التطهير، وإضاءة الامتداد، وفضيلة عظمى، وأصالة، ماني، نور البوذا.
translations.bn: পরিশুদ্ধির আলো, অসীমতার আলোকোজ্জ্বলতা, পরম ধার্মিক, খাঁটি, মনি, বুদ্ধের আলো।
translations.de: Reinigendes Licht, erhellende Weite, von höchster Tugend, authentisch, Mani, das Licht des Buddha.
translations.en-us: Purifying radiance, illuminating the boundless, supremely virtuous, genuine, Mani, the light of the Buddha.
translations.en-gb: Purifying radiance, illuminating the boundless, supremely virtuous, genuine, Mani, the light of the Buddha.
translations.fr-fr: Lumière purificatrice, illuminant l'immensité, d'une vertu suprême, authentique, Mani, lumière du Bouddha.
translations.he: אור טהור, מפיץ את האינסוף, בעל מידה עליונה, אמיתי, מאני, אור הבודהה.
translations.hi: शुद्धिकरण का प्रकाश, विशालता को प्रकाशित करने वाला, परम पुण्यमय, प्रामाणिक, मणि, बुद्ध का प्रकाश।
translations.id: Cahaya pemurnian, menerangi keluasan, sangat berbudi luhur, otentik, Mani, cahaya Buddha.
translations.it: Luce purificatrice, che illumina l'immensità, di somma virtù, autentica, Mani, luce del Buddha.
translations.ja: 清浄光、広大を照らす光、至高の徳、真実、マニ、仏の光。
translations.ko: 정화하는 빛, 광대한 영역을 비추는 빛, 극히 고귀한, 진실된, 마니, 부처님의 빛.
translations.nl: Helend licht, verlichtende uitgestrektheid, van uiterst deugdzame aard, authentiek, Mani, het licht van de Boeddha.
translations.pl: Światło oczyszczające, rozświetlające bezkres, najwyższa cnota, autentyczność, Mani, światło Buddy.
translations.pt-br: Luz purificadora, irradiando a vastidão, de suprema virtude, autêntico, Mani, luz de Buda.
translations.ru: Очищающий свет, озаряющий бескрайность, обладающий высшей добродетелью, истинный, Мани, свет Будды.
translations.sv: Reningens ljus, som upplyser det oändliga, av yttersta dygd, äkta, Mani, Buddhas ljus.
translations.th: แสงแห่งการชำระล้าง, ส่องสว่างไพศาล, คุณธรรมสูงสุด, ความจริงแท้, มณี, แสงสว่างแห่งพระพุทธเจ้า
translations.tr: Işığın arındırıcı gücü, enginliği aydınlatan, en yüksek erdem sahibi, gerçek, Mani, Buda'nın ışığı.
translations.uk: Світло очищення, що освітлює безмежність, надзвичайно доброчесне, справжнє, Мані, світло Будди.
translations.vi: Ánh sáng thanh tẩy, chiếu rọi vô hạn, vô cùng thiện đức, chân thực, Mani, ánh sáng của Phật.
translations.zh-cn: 净光，普照，至善，真实，玛尼，佛之光。

mantras.name: Devotion to Myōhō Renge Kyō.
mantras.english: Devotion to Myōhō Renge Kyō.
mantras.transliteration: Myōhō Renge Kyō ni no chūson.
mantras.background:
Nam Myōhō Renge Kyō originates in Japanese Nichiren Buddhism, meaning "Homage to the Lotus Sutra" — a single, powerful chant embodying devotion to the Buddha's highest teaching.
  Grounding: Source states: "Nichiren Buddhist practice focuses on the chanting of one single mantra: Nam Myōhō Renge Kyō (南無妙法蓮華経), which means 'Homage to the Lotus Sutra'."
mantras.benefits:
Chanting Nam Myōhō Renge Kyō—"Homage to the Lotus Sutra"—is the singular devotional practice of Nichiren Buddhism, believed to align the practitioner with the Dharma's deepest truth.
  Grounding: Source states Nichiren practice "focuses on the chanting of one single mantra or phrase: Nam Myōhō Renge Kyō (meaning 'Homage to the Lotus Sutra')."
mantras.tags: nichiren, japanese, buddhist, chanting, devotional, homage, lotus, focus

translations.es: Devoción a la Ley Mística del Loto.
translations.ar: الإخلاص لـ "ميو هو رين جي كيو".
translations.bn: আমারো-হো রেনজে কিও-এর প্রতি ভক্তি।
translations.de: Hingabe an das Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.en-us: Devotion to the Mystic Law of Lotus Blossom.
translations.en-gb: Dedication to the Mystic Law of Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.fr-fr: Dévotion envers le Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.he: הקדשה למיובוֹ רֶנגֶה קְיוֹ.
translations.hi: 妙法蓮華經への献身।
translations.id: Pengabdian kepada Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.it: Devozione alla Legge Mirabile del Sutra del Loto.
translations.ja: 妙法蓮華経への献身。
translations.ko: 향법 蓮華 경 (Hanyō Renka Gyeong)에 대한 헌신.
translations.nl: Toewijding aan de Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.pl: Oddanie się (lub: Poświęcenie) Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.pt-br: Devoção ao Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.ru: Преданность учению "Мёхо Ренге Кё".
translations.sv: Hängivenhet till Myōhō Renge Kyō.
translations.th: ความศรัทธาในพระพุทธเจ้ามิวโอเร็นเกะเคียว
translations.tr: Myōhō Renge Kyō'ya olan bağlılığım.
translations.uk: Відданість (або: Преданність) "Мьохо Ренге Кьо".
translations.vi: Lòng thành kính với Pháp Hoa Liên Kinh.
translations.zh-cn: 虔诚于妙法莲华经。

mantras.name: Enlightenment Hail! or Awakening Hail!
mantras.english: Enlightenment Hail! or Awakening Hail!
mantras.transliteration:
*   **For "Enlightenment Hail!":**  `ābhinandanaṁ bodhe!`
*   **For "Awakening Hail!":** `ābhinandanaṁ prabuddhae!`
mantras.background: From Buddhist Sanskrit, "gate gate pāragate pārasaṃgate bodhi svāhā" — "gone, gone, beyond, utterly beyond — Enlightenment hail!" A Heart Sutra gem awakening mind!
mantras.benefits: Practicing "Enlightenment Hail!" mantras awakens kundalini, stimulates chakras, and deepens concentration. Sound vibrations activate spiritual consciousness, while repeated recitation cultivates liberation (moksha) and insight into reality's true nature.
mantras.tags: hindu, tibetan, buddhist, mantra, devotion, sound, vibration, consciousness, meditation, healing, spiritual, affirmation, prayer

translations.es: ¡Salve, Iluminación! or ¡Salve, Despertar!
translations.ar: "تحيةً للتبصّر!" or "تهانينا على التنوير!"
translations.bn: "ज्ञानोदय की जय!" অথবা "пробуждение की जय!"
translations.de: "Lobpreis der Erleuchtung!" or "Lobpreis des Erwachens!"
translations.en-us: Hail to Enlightenment! or Hail to Awakening!
translations.en-gb: Hail to Enlightenment! or Hail to Awakening!
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à l'Éveil ! ou Salutations à la Lumière !
translations.he: ברוך הנאורות! או ברוך ההתעוררות!
translations.hi: "ज्ञान की जय!" या "जागृति की जय!"
translations.id: Salam Pencerahan! atau Salam Kebangkitan!
translations.it: Salve, Illuminazione! / Salve, Risveglio!
translations.ja: 悟りよ、我に啓示を！ (Satori yo, ware ni keiji o!)
translations.ko: 깨달음, 찬미를! (Gedaerum, chamimeul!)
translations.nl: "Verlichting, wees gegroet!" of "Ontwaking, wees gegroet!"
translations.pl: Witaj, oświecenie! / Witaj, przebudzenie!
translations.pt-br: Saudação à Iluminação! ou Saudação ao Despertar!
translations.ru: Здравствуй, Просветление! или Здравствуй, Пробуждение!
translations.sv: "Hyllst till upplysning!" eller "Hyllst till uppvaknande!"
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมปัญญาจงเจิดจรัส! หรือ ขอการตื่นรู้จงบังเกิด!
translations.tr: Aydınlanmaya Selam! or Uyanışa Selam!
translations.uk: Вітаю Просвітлення! або Вітаю Пробудження!
translations.vi: Xin chào sự giác ngộ! or Kính chào sự thức tỉnh!
translations.zh-cn: 启迪之喜！或觉醒之喜！

mantras.name: Gate Gate Paragate
mantras.english: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone completely beyond — awakening!
mantras.original: गते गते पारगते पारसंगते बोधि स्वाहा
mantras.transliteration: Gate Gate Paragate Parasamgate Bodhi Svaha
mantras.abstract:
Gate Gate Paragate Parasamgate Bodhi Svaha is the concluding dharani of the Heart Sutra, one of the most revered and widely studied texts in all of Mahayana Buddhism. The Heart Sutra itself is a condensation of the vast Prajnaparamita or Perfection of Wisdom literature. The dharani at the sutra's end is presented as the direct distillation of prajnaparamita itself — the mantra that is said to relieve all suffering because it perfectly expresses the realization of emptiness.

The Sanskrit word gate is the vocative past participle of the verb gam, meaning to go. Each repetition of gate intensifies the sense of passage: gone, and gone again. Paragate means gone to the other shore, evoking the ancient Indian metaphor of nirvana as the far bank of the river of samsara. Parasamgate deepens this further — gone completely beyond, utterly traversed. The word bodhi names the destination and the nature of what is realized. Svaha is an auspicious Vedic exclamation used to conclude mantras and offerings.

Philosophically, the dharani enacts what it describes. The repetition of gate mirrors the progressive stages of the bodhisattva path. The Heart Sutra's core teaching that form is emptiness and emptiness is form reaches its verbal and sonic culmination in this mantra. It is not merely a description of liberation but is said to be liberation itself when properly realized.

The mantra is chanted daily in Zen temples throughout Japan, Korea, and China as part of the Heart Sutra recitation. In Zen practice it is understood not as a petition or invocation but as a direct pointing: gone beyond conceptual elaboration, beyond the duality of going and arriving, beyond even the concept of beyond.

translations.en: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone completely beyond — awakening!
translations.zh: 揭谛揭谛 波罗揭谛 波罗僧揭谛 菩提萨婆诃
translations.es: Ido, ido, ido más allá, completamente ido más allá — ¡despertar!

mantras.name: Gone, gone, gone beyond, awakened mind, hail!
mantras.english: Gone, gone, gone beyond, awakened mind, hail!
mantras.transliteration: ग, ग, ग, प्रबुद्ध मनः, वन्दिते!
mantras.background: From Buddhism, this mantra means "Gone, gone, gone beyond, awakened mind, hail!" — a call to transcend ordinary consciousness, echoing ancient traditions of liberation.
mantras.benefits: This Buddhist mantra guides the mind toward awakening. Mantra practice is linked to expanded consciousness, inner transformation, and deeper spiritual connection—inviting the practitioner beyond ordinary awareness into liberated states.
mantras.tags: buddhist, awakening, enlightenment, liberation, transcendence, consciousness, transformation, focus

translations.es: Desaparecido, desaparecido, desaparecido; mente despierta, saludo.
translations.ar: تجاوز، تجاوز، تجاوز، عقل مستنير، تحية!
translations.bn: অতীত, অতীত, অতীত, জাগ্রত মন,Hail!
translations.de: Vergangenheit, Vergangenheit, Vergangenheit, erwachtes Bewusstsein, Lob sei!
translations.en-us: Departed, departed, departed; awakened consciousness; salutations!
translations.en-gb: Van, van, van; aprameya-citta; alokaḥ!
translations.fr-fr: Disparu, disparu, disparu, esprit éveillé, salutations !
translations.he: הלך, הלך, הלך מעבר, מוח בהכרה, הללויה!
translations.hi: गया, गया, गया, जाग्रत मन, प्रणाम!
translations.id: Telah pergi, telah pergi, telah melampaui, pikiran yang tercerahkan, salam!
translations.it: Andato, andato, trascendente, mente risvegliata, saluto!
translations.ja: 消え去り、消え去り、超越し、覚醒した心よ、礼讃！
translations.ko: 사라졌네, 사라졌네, 초월했네, 깨달은 마음, 존경합니다! (Saraja-sseonne, saraja-sseonne, chowo-hae-sseonne, kkaedal-eun maeum, jonggyeonghamnida!)
translations.nl: Weg, weg, weg, voorbij; geest ontwaakt, hulde!
translations.pl: Zniknęło, zniknęło, przeminęło, umysł się obudził, powitanie!
translations.pt-br: Já se foi, já se foi, já transcendeu; mente desperta; Salve!
translations.ru: Ушедший, ушедший, ушедший, пробужденный ум, приветствие!
translations.sv: Försvunnen, försvunnen, bortom, ett uppväckt sinne, hälsning!
translations.th: "ดับสูญ, ดับสูญ, ดับสูญ, จิตที่ตื่นรู้, ขอคารวะ!"
translations.tr: Gitmiş, gitmiş, gitmiş, uyanmış zihin, selâm!
translations.uk: Исчез, исчез, исчез, пробужденный ум, привет!
translations.vi: Đã qua, đã qua, đã vượt qua; tâm trí đã thức tỉnh, chào!
translations.zh-cn: 已逝，已逝，超越，觉醒的心，敬礼！

mantras.name: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone utterly beyond. Enlightenment (or awakening) is perfect.
mantras.english: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone utterly beyond. Enlightenment (or awakening) is perfect.
mantras.original: gate gate paragate parasangate bodhi suajá
mantras.transliteration: ग, ग, ग, अतिगतः, अतिअतिगतः। अभ्युदयः परिपूर्णः।
mantras.background: From Buddhist tradition, this mantra points to transcendence itself. "Gone beyond" evokes the journey to enlightenment—the very heart of illuminated mind.
mantras.benefits: This mantra points directly at enlightenment itself. Per Buddhist tradition, reciting it—while meditating on its meaning—cultivates mental clarity, dissolves habitual thought patterns, and aligns the practitioner with the awakened mind.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tibetan, enlightenment, awakening, liberation, meditation, focus, clarity

translations.es: "Desaparecido, desaparecido, trascendido, absolutamente trascendido. La iluminación (o el despertar) es perfecta."
translations.ar: لقد مضى، لقد مضى، لقد تجاوز، لقد تجاوز تمامًا. التنوير (أو الصحوة) كامل.
translations.bn: অতীত, অতীত, অতীত; সম্পূর্ণরূপে অতীত। জ্ঞান/пробуждение নিখুঁত।
translations.de: Vergangenheit, vergangen, jenseits, vollkommen vergangen. Die Erleuchtung (oder das Erwachen) ist vollkommen.
translations.en-us: Vanam, vanam, vanam; atikramam, atikramam; parat param. Bodho nirbhodah.
translations.en-gb: Departed, departed, departed beyond all limits; utterly transcended. Enlightenment, or awakening, is complete.
translations.fr-fr: Disparu, disparu, disparu, au-delà, absolument au-delà. L'éveil (ou l'illumination) est parfait.
translations.he: אבד, אבד, אבד, מעבר לכל גבול, אבד לחלוטין. התעוררות היא שלמות.
translations.hi: गया, गया, गया, पूरी तरह से चला गया। ज्ञान या चेतना पूर्ण है।
translations.id: Telah sirna, telah sirna, telah melampaui, telah benar-benar melampaui. Pencerahan (atau kesadaran) adalah sempurna.
translations.it: Scomparso, scomparso, scomparso, trascendente, completamente trascendente. L'illuminazione (o il risveglio) è perfetta.
translations.ja: 消え去り、消え去り、完全に消え去り、完全に超越した。悟りは完全である。
translations.ko: 사라졌습니다, 사라졌습니다, 완전히 사라졌습니다. 깨달음은 완전합니다.
translations.nl: Weg, weg, weg, voorbij, volledig voorbij. Verlichting (of ontwaking) is volmaakt.
translations.pl: Zniknęło, zniknęło, przeminęło, całkowicie przeminęło. Oświecenie (lub przebudzenie) jest doskonałe.
translations.pt-br: Já se foi, já se foi, ultrapassou completamente, transcendendo totalmente. O despertar (ou iluminação) é perfeito.
translations.ru: Исчез, исчез, исчез, ушел навсегда, превзошел все пределы. Просветление (или пробуждение) совершенно.
translations.sv: Försvunnen, försvunnen, försvunnen bortom, fullständigt försvunnen bortom. Upplysningen (eller uppvaknandet) är fullkomlig.
translations.th: ได้ดับสูญ, ได้ดับสูญ, ได้ดับสูญ, ได้ดับสูญอย่างสิ้นเชิง, การตื่นรู้สมบูรณ์.
translations.tr: Gitmiş, gitmiş, gitmiş, tamamen gitmiş. Aydınlanma (veya uyanış) mükemmeldir.
translations.uk: Зникло, зникло, зникло, пішло за межі, зникло абсолютно за межами. Просвітлення (або пробудження) є досконалим.
translations.vi: Đã qua, đã qua, đã vượt xa, đã hoàn toàn vượt xa. Giác ngộ là sự hoàn thiện tuyệt đối.
translations.zh-cn: 已逝，已逝，彻底超越，完全超越。 觉悟是完美的。

mantras.name: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone utterly beyond. Enlightenment, hail!
mantras.english: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone utterly beyond. Enlightenment, hail!
mantras.original: Gate Gate Paragate Parasamgate Bodhi Svaha
mantras.transliteration: गतः, गतः, गतः, अत्यन्तं गतः। ज्योतिः, नमोऽस्तु ते!
mantras.background:
From Mahayana Buddhism's Heart Sutra, this mantra means "Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone completely beyond—enlightenment, hail!" inviting liberation from suffering.
  Grounding: Source lists Heart Sutra mantra as "Gate gate pāragate pārasaṃgate bodhi svāhā," translated as "Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone completely beyond, enlightenment, hail!"
mantras.benefits:
"Gone, gone, gone beyond"—this Heart Sutra mantra cultivates wisdom, releases ego-attachment, and transcends suffering. Practitioners report mental clarity, reduced anxiety, and deepened compassion—a living doorway to enlightenment.
  Grounding: Sources link Gate Gate mantra to Prajñaparamita wisdom, emptiness realization, obstacle removal, and mental calm—all traditionally and textually documented benefits.
mantras.tags:
# Answer

buddhist, mahayana, heart sutra, enlightenment, liberation, emptiness, wisdom, transcendence, awakening, zen

# Grounding

The source identifies this as a Mahayana Buddhist mantra from the Heart Sutra ("appears at the end of the Heart Sutra"). It teaches transcendence of duality and emptiness doctrine. The source explains: Gate=emptiness/impermanence gates, Paragate=go beyond suffering toward enlightenment, Parasamgate=complete liberation, Bodhi=awakening. The source notes this mantra "remains in use in Shingon, Dzogchen and Rinzai Zen."

translations.es: Ya, ya, ya, trascendió; ya, ya, ya, superó completamente. ¡Iluminación, alabado seas!
translations.ar: لقد مضى، لقد مضى، لقد تجاوز، لقد تجاوز تمامًا. يا نور، تحية لك!
translations.bn: অতীত, অতীত, অতীত; সম্পূর্ণরূপে অতীত। হে জ্ঞান,Hail!
translations.de: Vergangen, vergangen, vergangen, jenseits, völlig jenseits. Erleuchtung, sei gegrüßt!
translations.en-us: Vanam, vanam, vanam, atikramam, atikramam. Jñāna, hail!
translations.en-gb: Van, van, van; atyanta van, van; Enlightenment, be praised!

translations.sv: Försvunnen, försvunnen, förbi, fullständigt förbi. Upplysning, hälsa!
translations.th: "หายไปแล้ว, หายไปแล้ว, สูญสิ้นไปแล้ว, สูญสิ้นไปอย่างสมบูรณ์, ขอคารวะแด่ปัญญาญาณ!"
translations.tr: Kayboldu, kayboldu, kayboldu, tamamen kayboldu, nihai öteye geçti. Aydınlanma, sana selâm!

mantras.name: Great Compassion, Seeking Dhāraṇī.
mantras.english: Great Compassion, Seeking Dhāraṇī.

mantras.benefits: The Great Compassion Dhāraṇī, linked to Guanyin Bodhisattva, cultivates boundless compassion and spiritual protection. Practitioners traditionally recite it to dissolve karmic obstacles, awaken empathy, and align the mind with the liberating energy of mercy.

mantras.name: Guanyin Mantra
mantras.english: Guanyin Mantra
mantras.transliteration: 觀音真言 (Guānyīn Zhēnyán)
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist tradition, the Guanyin Mantra (陀罗尼) is a sacred dharani — a divine seal of Buddha's mind, untranslatable, holding infinite meaning across realms seen and unseen.
mantras.benefits: The Guanyin Mantra acts as a "mind seal of the Buddhas" — calming inner chaos, inviting compassion, and aligning the practitioner with protective divine forces. Regular recitation cultivates stillness, dissolving fear and delusion.
mantras.tags: buddhist, guanyin, dharani, mantra, chanting, protection, samadhi, esoteric, auspicious, enlightenment, memory

mantras.name: Hail the jewel (mani) in the lotus (padme) – Hum.
mantras.english: Hail the jewel (mani) in the lotus (padme) – Hum.
mantras.original: اوم مانی پادمه هوم (Om Mani Padme Hum)
mantras.transliteration: ॐ मणि पद्मे हूँ।
mantras.background: From Tibetan Buddhism, "Om Mani Padme Hum" means "Jewel in the Lotus" — a luminous mantra for inner healing, spiritual elevation, and deep connection to universal harmony.
mantras.benefits: Om Mani Padme Hum cultivates inner peace, spiritual elevation, and healing. Rooted in Tibetan Buddhism, its repetition clears negative energies, sharpens focus, and connects practitioners to universal vibrations — a jewel of transformation awaiting discovery.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhism, healing, peace, enlightenment, meditation, focus

translations.es: Salvemos la joya (mani) en el loto (padme) – Hum.
translations.ar: "نحمّدُ الجوهرة (ماني) التي في قلب اللوتس (بادمي)."
translations.bn: "কমলের মধ্যে রত্নকে (মানি) অভিবাদন করুন - হম।" (Kamaler madhye ratnake (mani) abibadan korun - Hum.)
translations.de: Lobet den Edelstein (Mani) in der Lotusblume (Padme) – Om.
translations.en-us: Hail the jewel (mani) within the lotus (padme).
translations.en-gb: Hail the jewel (precious gem) within the lotus.
translations.fr-fr: Saluez le joyau (mani) dans le lotus (padme) – Hum.
translations.he: ברוך היהלום (מָנִי) שבתוך הלוטוס (פַדְמֵה) – הום.
translations.hi: कमल में स्थित रत्न को प्रणाम / वंदना।
translations.id: Salamkan permata (mani) di dalam bunga teratai (padme) – Hum.
translations.it: Saluto alla gemma (mani) nel loto (padme) – Hum.
translations.ja: 蓮の花の中の真珠を讃えよ。 (蓮の華の中にある宝を称えましょう。)
translations.ko: 연꽃 속의 보석(마니)을 찬양합니다. (Yeonkkot sugeu boseogeul chanyanghamnida.)
translations.nl: Lof de edelsteen (mani) in de lotusbloem (padme) – Ohm.
translations.pl: Chwała klejnotowi (mani) w lotosie (padme) – Hum.
translations.pt-br: Saúdes à joia (mani) no lótus (padme) – Hum.
translations.ru: Восславим драгоценность (маню) в лотосе (падме) – Ом.
translations.sv: Hylla juvelen (mani) i lotusblomman (padme) – Hum.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแก้วสารพัน (แก้วสารพันในภาษาไทยมีความหมายใกล้เคียงกับ "jewel" หรือ "मणि") ที่อยู่บนบัว (บนบัวสื่อถึงความบริสุทธิ์และศักดิ์สิทธิ์) – ฮัม
translations.tr:
Lütfen, "mani" ve "padme" kelimelerinin anlamlarını dikkate alarak bu cümleyi çevirmek için daha fazla bağlam veya açıklama sağlayabilir misiniz? "Hail the jewel (mani) in the lotus (padme) – Hum" ifadesinin farklı yorumları olabilir ve doğru çeviri, niyetinize bağlı olacaktır. Örneğin:

*   **Eğer "mani" kelimesi bir mücevheri ifade ediyorsa:** "Nilüferin içindeki değerli taşı selamlayın – Hum."
*   **Eğer "mani" kelimesi bir mantrayı veya kutsal sözü ifade ediyorsa:** "Nilüferin içindeki kutsal sözü/mantrayı selamlayın – Hum."
*   **Eğer "padme" kelimesi sadece bir nilüfer çiçeğini ifade ediyorsa:** "Nilüfer çiçeğini selamlayın – Hum."

"Hum" kısmı, Sanskritçe bir kutsal ses veya mantra olabilir. Eğer bu böyleyse, çevirmeden olduğu gibi bırakılabilir veya "Bu kutsal sesle..." gibi bir ifadeyle açıklanabilir.
translations.uk: Вітаю перлину (маню) у лотосі (падме) – Ом.
translations.vi: Chào "man", viên ngọc quý, trong "padme", đóa sen.
translations.zh-cn: 赞美莲花中的明珠。

mantras.name: Hail the jewel (or gem) in the lotus.
mantras.english: Hail the jewel (or gem) in the lotus.
mantras.transliteration: དངོས་མེད་ཀྱི་ཕྲེང་བ་ལ། མུ་ཏིག་གི་སྙིང་པོ་འདུག།  Wylie: *dngos med kyi phreng ba la. mu tig gi sngin po 'dug.*  ISO 15919: *dngos med kyi phreng ba la, mu tig gi sngin po 'dug.*
mantras.background:
"Om mani padme hum" originates from Sanskrit/Tibetan Buddhism, invoking compassion via Avalokiteshvara. It literally means "Hail the jewel in the lotus"—uniting wisdom and compassion.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Sanskrit Buddhist origin, link to Avalokiteshvara, and literal translation across Spanish, French, German, and Dutch source texts.
mantras.benefits:
Om mani padme hum cultivates compassion and spiritual transformation. Rooted in Tibetan Buddhism, it invokes Avalokiteshvara, purifying emotions and helping transcend rebirth cycles toward Nirvana.
  Grounding: Sources confirm: compassion, purification, spiritual transformation (French table); invocation of Avalokiteshvara; liberation from rebirth cycle (Turkish source).
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, avalokiteshvara, compassion, purification, meditation, healing, transformation, liberation, peace, tantric

translations.ja: 蓮華に宿る宝を讃えん (Renka ni shukuru takara o sanen).
translations.ko: 연꽃 속의 보석을 찬양합니다. (Yeonkkot sokui bosogeul chanyanghamnida.)
translations.nl: Lof de kostbare steen in de lotusbloem.
translations.pl: Chwała klejnotowi w lotosie.
translations.pt-br: Saúdes à joia que reside no lótus.
translations.ru: Воспойте драгоценность, сокрытую в лотосе.
translations.sv: Hylla den dyrbara juvelen i lotusblomman.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแก่นาคราช ผู้สถิตในดอกบัว
translations.tr: "Laleğe bağlı olan mücevheri selamla."
translations.uk: Вітаю, дорогоцінний камінь у лотосі.
translations.vi: Khen ngợi viên ngọc quý trong đóa sen.
translations.zh-cn: 赞颂莲花中的珍宝。

mantras.name: Hail the jewel, the perfection of compassion.
mantras.english: Hail the jewel, the perfection of compassion.
mantras.transliteration: ཁ་ལོ་ཅན་གྱི་མུ་ཏུ།། སྙིང་རྗེའི་དོན་དམ་པ།
mantras.background: A Buddhist mantra honoring compassion's perfection — rooted in Vajrayana tradition, it guides practitioners toward the mind's innate enlightened qualities through devoted repetition.
mantras.benefits: Practicing this compassion mantra gradually cultivates the perfect qualities of the mind it invokes. Traditional teaching holds that repetition — in or out of meditation — transforms the practitioner toward the compassion it embodies.
mantras.tags: hindu, compassion, mantra, sound, meditation, vibration, healing, divine, tantric, buddhist, bodhisattva, liberation, spiritual

translations.es: Salvemos la joya, la perfección de la compasión.
translations.ar: تحيةً للجوهرة، الكمالِ تجسيدًا للرحمة.
translations.bn:
Hail the jewel, the perfection of compassion.
অনুগ্রহপূর্বক মনে রাখবেন, যেহেতু আপনি একটি নির্দিষ্ট বিন্যাস চাওয়া হয়েছে, তাই আমি সেই বিন্যাসের মধ্যে থাকতে চেষ্টা করব।

Answer:  "རིན་པོ་ཆེ།།།སྙིང་པོའི་དགོངས་པ་ཡི།།།" (Wylie transcription)

Bengali Translation: "হে রত্ন, দয়ার চরম রূপ।"
translations.de: Verehrt sei der Edelstein, die Vollendung des Mitgefühls.
translations.en-us: Hail the precious jewel, the embodiment of perfect compassion.
translations.en-gb: Hail the jewel, the embodiment of perfect compassion.
translations.fr-fr: Saluez le joyau, la perfection de la compassion.
translations.he: הריבו את היהלום, את השלמות של החמלה.
translations.hi: "मणि को प्रणाम करो, करुणा की पूर्णता।"
translations.id: Salamkan permata itu, perwujudan kesempurnaan welas asih.
translations.it: Saluto la gemma, la perfezione della compassione.
translations.ja: 慈悲の至高、至宝よ、我に恵みを与えよ。
translations.ko: 자비의 완벽함이신 보석을 찬양합니다. (Jabieui wanbyeokham isineun boseogeul chanyanghamnida.)
translations.nl: Lof de kostbare steen, de belichaming van mededogen.
translations.pl: Witaj, klejnocie, doskonałości współczucia.
translations.pt-br: Saúdes à joia, à perfeição da compaixão.
translations.ru: Воспойте драгоценность, совершенство сострадания.
translations.sv: Hylla juvelen, fullkomningen av medkänsla.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแก้วอันล้ำค่า, ผู้เป็นแบบอย่างแห่งความเมตตา
translations.tr: Mücevheri selamla, şefkatin mükemmelliği.
translations.uk: Вітаймо дорогоцінний камінь, втілення досконалості співчуття.
translations.vi: Khen ngợi viên ngọc quý, hiện thân của sự từ bi hoàn hảo.
translations.zh-cn: 赞颂如意宝，慈悲的完美体现。

mantras.name: Hail to the jewel in the lotus.
mantras.english: Hail to the jewel in the lotus.
mantras.transliteration: དངོས་མེད་ཀྱི་སྒྲིབ་པ། པདྨའི་སྙིགས་དཔུགས་ལ་བཀྲ་ཤིས་བདེ་ལེགས།
mantras.background:
"Om Mani Padme Hum" — a Tibetan Buddhist Sanskrit mantra meaning "Hail to the jewel in the lotus," invoking Avalokiteshvara's boundless compassion to purify the mind.
  Grounding: Source states this mantra originates in Tibetan Buddhism, invokes Avalokiteshvara, and is chanted to purify mind, relieve suffering, and cultivate compassion.
mantras.benefits: Om Mani Padme Hum invokes Avalokiteshvara's compassionate energy, purifying the mind, easing suffering, and cultivating deep compassion—a gateway to inner transformation across Tibetan Buddhist tradition.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, avalokiteshvara, bodhisattva, compassion, mercy, purification, healing, devotional

translations.es: Saludo a la joya en el loto.
translations.ar: تحية للجوهرة في اللوتس.
translations.bn: পদ্মের রত্নকে অভিবাদন।
translations.de: Lobet das Juwel im Lotus.
translations.en-us: Greetings to the precious jewel within the lotus.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the precious jewel within the lotus.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au joyau du lotus.
translations.he: ברוך להיות הכיסא בתוך הפרח.
translations.hi: नमस्ते कमल में स्थित रत्न।
translations.id: Salam hormat untuk permata di dalam bunga teratai.
translations.it: Salve, o gioiello nel loto.
translations.ja: 蓮華の宝に礼賛を。
translations.ko: 연꽃 속의 보석에게 경의를 표합니다. (Yeonkkot sogui Boseuge gyeongui-reul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl: Hail to the kostbare juweel in de lotusbloem.
translations.pl: Witajcie, klejnocie w lotosie.
translations.pt-br: Saudações à joia que reside no lótus.
translations.ru: Приветствие драгоценности, покоящейся в лотосе.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till juvelen i lotusblomman.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแก่นาคราชผู้สถิตในดอกบัว
translations.tr: "Laleğe selam, lotus çiçeğinin mücevheri."
translations.uk: Вітаю, дорогоцінний камінь у лотосі.
translations.vi: Kính chào viên ngọc quý trong đóa sen.
translations.zh-cn: 供养莲花之珍宝。

mantras.name: Hail to the jewel, in whom the qualities of all the Buddhas are contained. May the afflictions of all beings be pacified, soha.
mantras.english: Hail to the jewel, in whom the qualities of all the Buddhas are contained. May the afflictions of all beings be pacified, soha.
mantras.original: Tayata Om Bekanze Bekandze Bekandze, Maha Bekandze, Radza Samudgate Soha
mantras.transliteration: མཆོག་ལྡན་དངོས་མེད་བདག་ཏུ་འོད་སྟོབས། འཕྲིན་ལས་ཀུན་དང་། སེམས་ཅན་གྱི་འཁྲབ་སྡུག་གི་འཇགས་པ་འདུའ། །སྭ་ཧཱ།
mantras.background: A Tibetan Buddhist mantra holding all Buddha's teachings. It honors the jewel of awakened compassion, pacifying beings' suffering. Chant it to touch Buddhism's deepest wisdom.
mantras.benefits: A single chant said to hold all of Buddha's teachings — Om Mani Padme Hum cultivates compassion, pacifies inner afflictions, and draws the mind toward the boundless wisdom of enlightened awareness.
mantras.tags: buddhist, compassion, enlightenment, liberation, peace, healing, devotional, focus, altruism

translations.es: Salvemos a la joya, en quien residen las cualidades de todos los Budas. Que las aflicciones de todos los seres sean pacificadas, soha.
translations.ar: تحية للجوهرة، التي تتجسد فيها صفات جميع البوذات. ليكن عذاب جميع الكائنات مطفأ، صلوا.
translations.bn:
Hail to the jewel, in whom the qualities of all the Buddhas are contained. May the afflictions of all beings be pacified, soha.

অনুগ্রহ করে মনে রাখবেন, এই অনুবাদটি সরাসরি শব্দটির অর্থ বোঝানোর চেষ্টা করে।

" সমস্ত বুদ্ধের গুণাবলী যার মধ্যে বিদ্যমান, সেই রত্নকে প্রণাম। সমস্ত জীবের দুঃখ প্রশমিত হোক, সোহা।"
translations.de: Verehrung sei dem Juwel, in dem die Eigenschaften aller Buddhas enthalten sind. Mögen die Leiden aller Lebewesen gestillt werden, Soha.
translations.en-us: Salutations to the precious jewel, within whom reside the qualities of all Buddhas. May the afflictions of all sentient beings be appeased, soha.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the precious jewel, within whom reside the qualities of all the Buddhas. May the suffering of all sentient beings be pacified, soha.
translations.fr-fr: Saluez le joyau, en qui résident les qualités de tous les Bouddhas. Puisse les afflictions de tous les êtres être apaisées, soha.
translations.he: יהי כבודו, אשר בו מצויים כל מעלות הבודהא. יתבטלו צרות כל היצורים, סוהא.
translations.hi: नमस्कार उस रत्न को, जिसके भीतर सभी बुद्धों के गुण समाहित हैं। समस्त प्राणियों के कष्ट शांत हों, सोह।
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada permata itu, di dalam mana terkandung semua kualitas para Buddha. Semoga semua penderitaan makhluk hidup diredakan, soha.
translations.it: Salve, Gioiello prezioso, in cui risiedono le qualità di tutti i Buddha. Possa la sofferenza di tutti gli esseri essere placata, soha.
translations.ja: 尊貴なる宝に礼賛を捧げます。その中には、すべての仏の徳が具現されています。すべての生きとし生けるものの苦しみが、平和になることを願います。そう願います。（So-ha.）
translations.ko: 만다라 속 보배로운 존재에게 경의를 표합니다. 그분 안에는 모든 부처님의 모든 덕성이 담겨 있습니다. 모든 중생의 고통이 사라지기를 바랍니다, 소하.
translations.nl: Groet de juweel, in wie de kwaliteiten van alle Boeddha's zijn verenigd. Moge de lijden van alle wezens tot bedaren, soha.
translations.pl: Powitanie dla klejnotu, w którym zawarte są wszystkie doskonałości wszystkich Buddów. Niech cierpienia wszystkich istot zostaną ukojone, soha.
translations.pt-br: Salve, joia preciosa, em quem residem todas as qualidades de todos os Budas. Que os sofrimentos de todos os seres sejam pacificados, soha.
translations.ru: Приветствую драгоценность, в которой заключены все качества всех Будд. Да будут умиротворены страдания всех существ, соха.
translations.sv: Hyllning till juvelen, i vilken alla Buddhas kvaliteter är förkroppsligade. Må alla varelser fri från sina lidanden, soha.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่แก้วสาระ ซึ่งรวมคุณธรรมของพระพุทธเจ้าทั้งปวง ขอให้ความทุกข์ของสรรพสัตว์ทั้งหลายสงบลง สวาหม
translations.tr: Mücevher'e selâm olsun, içinde tüm Buda'ların nitelikleri barındıran. Tüm varlıkların acıları dindirilsin, soha.
translations.uk: Вітаю тебе, дорогоцінний, в якому містяться всі якості всіх Будд. Нехай страждання всіх істот будуть усунені, соха.
translations.vi: Kính chào ngọc báu, trong đó hội tụ tất cả những phẩm chất của các Đức Phật. Xin cho tất cả các chúng sinh được giải trừ mọi khổ đau, xô-ha.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼如意轮，您蕴含所有佛陀的诸德。愿一切众生的痛苦皆得消除，阿南。

mantras.name: Hail to the jewel, the perfection of wisdom.
mantras.english: Hail to the jewel, the perfection of wisdom.
mantras.transliteration: ༄༅།། །མཐེག་ཆེན་དངོས་གྲུབ། ཞེས་བཀྲ་ཤིས་བདེ་ལེགས།
mantras.background:
A Buddhist jewel mantra rooted in Sanskrit tradition—literally "Hail to the jewel, the perfection of wisdom"—carried from India across Asia via Buddhism, inviting profound meditative depth.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Buddhism spread mantra practice across Asia; Sanskrit origin and literal translation align with source definitions of mantra as sacred expression.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist tradition, this mantra cultivates purification and liberation (mokṣa). Regular practice deepens concentration, self-awareness, and inner calm — and Lama Zopa's teachings specifically highlight its profound transformative and healing power.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, mantra, shiva, devotion, meditation, sound, divine, wisdom, om, peace, spiritual

translations.es: Salvemos la joya, la perfección de la sabiduría.
translations.ar: تحية للجوهرة، الكمال الحكمة.
translations.bn:
Hail to the jewel, the perfection of wisdom.

অনুগ্রহ করে "Hail to the jewel, the perfection of wisdom" এই পিব্দটির বাংলা অনুবাদ নিচে দেওয়া হলো:

"রত্নকে অভিবাদন, যিনি প্রজ্ঞা ও জ্ঞানের পরম উৎকর্ষ।"
translations.de: Verehrung sei dem Juwel, der Vollendung der Weisheit.
translations.en-us: Hail to the jewel, the embodiment of perfect wisdom.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the jewel, the embodiment of perfect wisdom.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au joyau, la perfection de la sagesse.
translations.he: שְׁלום לַיְקוּד, השְׁלֵמוּת שֶׁל הַחָכְמָה.
translations.hi: नमो रत्न, ज्ञान की पूर्णता।
translations.id: Salam hormat untuk permata, kesempurnaan kebijaksanaan.
translations.it: Salve, gioiello, perfezione della saggezza.
translations.ja: オーム、至高の宝、智慧の極み。
translations.ko: 옴, 지혜의 완벽함이신 보석에게 경의를 표합니다. (옴, 지혜의 완벽함이신 보석께 존경을 표합니다.)
translations.nl: Om, begroeting aan de edelsteen, de volmaaktheid van wijsheid.
translations.pl: Witajmy klejnocie, doskonałości mądrości.
translations.pt-br: Saudações à joia, à perfeição da sabedoria.
translations.ru: Приветствие драгоценности, совершенству мудрости.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till juvelen, visdomens fulländning.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่แก้วสารพัน, ผู้ซึ่งเป็นความสมบูรณ์แห่งปัญญา
translations.tr: Selamet olsun mücevhere, bilgelik mükemmelliğine.
translations.uk: Вітаю, дорогоцінний камінь, втілення мудрості.
translations.vi: Kính chào viên ngọc quý, sự hoàn thiện của trí tuệ.
translations.zh-cn: 欢喜迎接，智慧的完美体现。

mantras.name: Homage to the Awakened One.
mantras.english: Homage to the Awakened One.
mantras.transliteration: Namo Bhagavato.
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist tradition, this homage chant traces back to the Buddha himself. Used for centuries to express devotion, it literally means "Homage to the Awakened One" — an invitation to awakening.
mantras.benefits: Paying homage to the Awakened One calms the mind, cultivates reverence, and deepens devotion. This chant roots practitioners in Buddha's teachings, fostering mindfulness, gratitude, and a path toward inner peace and enlightenment.
mantras.tags: buddhist, buddha, theravada, vandana, devotional, reverence, enlightenment, mindfulness

translations.es: Homenaje al Iluminado.
translations.ar: تَقْدِيْرٌ لِلْمُنْتَظِر.
translations.bn: বুদ্ধস্য നമഃ।
translations.de: Verehrung dem Erleuchteten.
translations.en-us: Homage to the Enlightened One.
translations.en-gb: Homage to the Enlightened One.
translations.fr-fr: Hommage à l'Éveillé.
translations.he: כבוד למי שנתעורר.
translations.hi: "जाग्रत हुए व्यक्ति को प्रणाम।"
translations.id: Penghormatan kepada Sang Yang Terang.
translations.it: Omaggio al Risvegliato.
translations.ja: 仏陀への敬意 (Butsudo e no keii).
translations.ko: 부처님께 존경을 표합니다.
translations.nl: Groet aan de Verlichte.
translations.pl: Składam hołd Oświeconemu.
translations.pt-br: Homenagem ao Iluminado.
translations.ru: Почтение Просветленному.
translations.sv: Hyllning till den Upplyste.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่พระผู้ตื่นรู้.
translations.tr: Uyanmış Olan'a saygı.
translations.uk: Поклоніння Просвітленому.
translations.vi: Kính cúng Đức Phật Thích Ca.
translations.zh-cn: 恭敬供养觉悟者。

mantras.name: Homage to the jewel of the lotus.
mantras.english: Homage to the jewel of the lotus.
mantras.background: From Tibet's Vajrayāna tradition, this mantra of Tchenrézi—"jewel of the lotus"—channels compassion through sacred sound, inviting spiritual liberation.
mantras.benefits: Known as "the mani," this mantra of Chenrezig channels the discursive mind, offering protection and spiritual liberation — a jewel-like gateway to compassion in Vajrayana practice.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, vajrayana, tchenrezi, invocation, spiritual, liberation, protection

translations.es: Saludo a la joya del loto.
translations.ar: تribut إلى جوهرة اللوتس.
translations.bn: পদ্মের রত্নকে প্রণাম।
translations.de: Verehrung des Lotusjuwels.
translations.en-us: Homage to the precious jewel of the lotus.
translations.en-gb: Homage to the precious jewel of the lotus.
translations.fr-fr: Hommage au joyau de la lotus.
translations.he: כבוד לי לָפָנָיו, תַּכְשִׁיט הַלוטוס.
translations.hi: कमल के पुष्प का आदर, या कमल के पुष्प के रत्न को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Penghormatan kepada permata teratai.
translations.it: Om, saluto alla gemma del loto.
translations.ja: 蓮華の宝に礼賛（れんかのたからにれいさん）。
translations.ko: 연꽃의 보석에게 경의를 표합니다. (Yeonkkot-ui boseuk-ege gyeong-ui-reul pyohapnida.)
translations.nl: Eerbied voor de kostbare juweel van de lotus.
translations.pl: Składam hołd klejnotowi lotosu.
translations.pt-br: Homenagem à joia do lótus.
translations.ru: Поклонение драгоценности, рожденной из лотоса.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för lotusens juvel.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่แก้วอันอยู่ในดอกบัว
translations.tr: Lotaların mücevherine saygı.
translations.uk: Шануємо дорогоцінний лотос.
translations.vi: Kính cúng ngọc báu sen.
translations.zh-cn: 供养莲华之珍。

mantras.name: I generate the mind of enlightenment.
mantras.english: I generate the mind of enlightenment.
mantras.transliteration: `āmi prajñā-cittaṃ janāmi`
mantras.background: Rooted in Mahāyāna Buddhism, this mantra embodies "bodhicitta"—awakening mind. Recitation dissolves ignorance and guides beings toward enlightenment, echoing ancient Sanskrit wisdom traditions.
mantras.benefits: Reciting this mantra cultivates bodhicitta—the awakening mind. Per tradition, mantra practice breaks through ignorance (無明), sustains focused awareness, and orients the practitioner toward enlightenment, transforming both self and others.
mantras.tags: hindu, tantric, buddhist, mantra, devotion, invocation, protection, wisdom, enlightenment, healing, buddhist, deity, dharaani

translations.es: Yo genero la mente de iluminación.
translations.ar: أنـا أُـنشِئُ العقلَ الذي هو نورٌ.
translations.bn: আমি দিব্য জ্ঞান উৎপন্ন করি।
translations.de: Ich erzeuge den Geist der Erleuchtung.
translations.en-us: I create or manifest the mind of enlightenment.
translations.en-gb: I cultivate or create the faculty of enlightened understanding.
translations.fr-fr: Je fais surgir la conscience de l'illumination.
translations.he: אני יוצר את התודעה של הארה.
translations.hi: मैं ज्ञान के मन को उत्पन्न करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menghasilkan pikiran pencerahan.
translations.it: Io genero la mente dell'illuminazione.
translations.ja: 私は悟りの心を創造します。
translations.ko: 제가 깨달음의 마음을 일으킵니다.
translations.nl: Ik wek het bewustzijn van verlichting.
translations.pl: Ja tworzę umysł oświecenia.
translations.pt-br: Eu gero a mente do esclarecimento.
translations.ru: Я порождаю ум просветления.
translations.sv: Jag skapar sinnet för upplysning.
translations.th: ข้าพเจ้าสร้างสรรค์ จิตแห่งปัญญาญาณ
translations.tr: Ben, aydınlanmanın zihnini yaratıyorum.
translations.uk: Я породжую розум просвітлення.
translations.vi: Tôi tạo ra tâm của sự giác ngộ.
translations.zh-cn: 我创造智慧之念。

mantras.name: I take refuge in the Buddha, I take refuge in the Dharma, I take refuge in the Sangha.
mantras.english: I take refuge in the Buddha, I take refuge in the Dharma, I take refuge in the Sangha.
mantras.original: Буддхам саранам гаччами, дхаммам саранам гаччами, Сангхэм саранам гаччами
mantras.transliteration: `Buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi, Dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi, Saṃghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.`
mantras.background:
Rooted in Buddhism's Theravāda tradition, this mantra—called the "Three Refuges"—invites devotees to seek shelter in the Buddha, his teachings (Dharma), and the monastic community (Sangha).
  Grounding: Source cites Theravāda use of "Dharma/Sangha" as mantra words & buddhanussati (Buddha-remembrance) as core meditative practice.
mantras.benefits:
Reciting the Three Refuges cultivates mindfulness, devotion, and communal belonging. Sources link mantra repetition to altered consciousness, emotional resonance, and spiritual focus—inviting practitioners into Buddhism's living heart.
  Grounding: Source links mantra practice to altered states, numinous emotional effects, and community (Sangha). The Three Refuges formula embodies Buddha, Dharma, Sangha—core Buddhist orientation.
mantras.tags: buddhist, buddha, dharma, sangha, refuge, devotion, affirmation, protection, commitment, focus

translations.es: Tomo refugio en el Buda, tomo refugio en el Dharma, tomo refugio en la Sangha.
translations.ar: أَلْتَجِئُ إِلى الْبُدَّا، أَلْتَجِئُ إِلى الدَّرْمَة، أَلْتَجِئُ إِلى السَّنْغَة.
translations.bn: আমি বুদ্ধের শরণাগত, আমি ধর্মের শরণাগত, আমি সংঘের শরণাগত।
translations.de: Ich suche Zuflucht beim Buddha, ich suche Zuflucht beim Dharma, ich suche Zuflucht bei der Sangha.
translations.en-us: I take refuge in the Buddha, I take refuge in the Dharma, I take refuge in the Sangha.
translations.en-gb: I take refuge in the Buddha, I take refuge in the Dharma, I take refuge in the Sangha.
translations.fr-fr: Je prends refuge en Bouddha, je prends refuge en la Loi (ou en la Voie), je prends refuge en la Communauté.
translations.he: אני לוקח מחסה בבּוּדְּהָה, אני לוקח מחסה בדרמה, אני לוקח מחסה בצאנגה.
translations.hi: मैं बुद्ध पर श्रद्धा रखता हूँ, मैं धर्म पर श्रद्धा रखता हूँ, मैं संघ पर श्रद्धा रखता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya berlindung kepada Buddha, saya berlindung kepada Dharma, saya berlindung kepada Sangha.
translations.it: Mi rifugio nel Buddha, mi rifugio nel Dharma, mi rifugio nella Sangha.
translations.ja: 仏に帰依し、法に帰依し、僧伽に帰依します。
translations.ko: 저는 부처님께 귀의합니다, 저는 가르침(법)에 귀의합니다, 저는 공동체(승가)에 귀의합니다.
translations.nl: Ik neem toevlucht in de Boeddha, ik neem toevlucht in de Dharma, ik neem toevlucht in de Sangha.
translations.pl: Oświadczam, że schronienie znajduję w Buddzie, schronienie znajduję w Dharmie, schronienie znajduję w Sanga.
translations.pt-br: Refugio busco no Buda, no Dharma refugio busco, na Sangha refugio busco.
translations.ru: Я принимаю прибежище в Будде, я принимаю прибежище в Дхарме, я принимаю прибежище в Сангхе.
translations.sv: Jag tar tillflykt till Buddhan, jag tar tillflykt till Dharma, jag tar tillflykt till Sangha.
translations.th: ข้าพเจ้าขอพึ่งพระพุทธเจ้า, ข้าพเจ้าขอพึ่งพระธรรม, ข้าพเจ้าขอพึ่งพระสงฆ์.
translations.tr: Ben Buda'ya sığınırım, Ben Dharma'ya sığınırım, Ben Sangha'ya sığınırım.
translations.uk: Я шукаю притулку в Будді, я шукаю притулку в Дгармі, я шукаю притулку в Сангзі.
translations.vi: Con xin lánh nương vào Phật, con xin lánh nương vào Pháp, con xin lánh nương vào Tăng.
translations.zh-cn: 我皈依佛陀，我皈依法，我皈依法会。

mantras.name: In the hands, in the hands, in the beginning, in the accumulating, in the body, I bow.
mantras.english: In the hands, in the hands, in the beginning, in the accumulating, in the body, I bow.
mantras.original: Gah-tay Gah-tay Pah-rah-gah-tay Pah-rah-sahm-gah-tay Boh-dee Swah-hah
mantras.transliteration: हस्ते, हस्ते, आदौ, संचये, शरीरे, नमोऽहम्।
mantras.background: Zen's ultimate koan: a monk asks if a dog has Buddha-nature. Master Zhaozhou's reply — "Mu" (無), meaning "No" — became an 8-century meditative inquiry that shatters the conceptual mind.
mantras.benefits: Practicing Mu exhausts the conceptual mind, dissolving the sense of a separate self. Zen masters report kensho — a direct seeing into one's own nature. Can a single syllable shatter everything you think you are?
mantras.tags: buddhist, zen, mu, awareness, non-dual, inquiry, silence, body, practice, zhaozhou, wumen huikai, contemplation

translations.es: En las manos, en las manos, al principio, en la acumulación, en el cuerpo, me inclino.
translations.ar: في اليدين، في اليدين، في البداية، في التراكم، في الجسد، أُسَلِّم.
translations.bn: হাতে, হাতে, শুরুতে, সঞ্চয়ে, শরীরে, আমি নমস্কার জানাই।
translations.de: In den Händen, in den Händen, am Anfang, im Anwachsen, im Körper, ich verneige mich.
translations.en-us: In the hands, in the hands, at the beginning, during the accumulation, in the body, I bow.
translations.en-gb: In the grasp, in the grasp, from the outset, in the process of growth, within the physical form, I offer my reverence.
translations.fr-fr: Dans les mains, dans les mains, au commencement, dans l'accumulation, dans le corps, je m'incline.
translations.he: בידיים, בידיים, בתחילה, בהצטברות, בגוף, אני כורך.
translations.hi: हाथों में, हाथों में, शुरुआत में, संचय में, शरीर में, मैं प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Di tangan, di tangan, pada awalnya, dalam akumulasi, di dalam tubuh, aku bersujud.
translations.it: Nelle mani, nelle mani, all'inizio, nell'accumulo, nel corpo, mi prostro.
translations.ja: 手の中に、手の中に、始まりに、蓄積の中に、肉体の中に、私は礼拝します。
translations.ko: 손 안에서, 손 안에서, 시작에서, 축적 속에서, 몸 안에서, 나는 경배합니다.
translations.nl: In de handen, in de handen, in het begin, tijdens de accumulatie, in het lichaam, ik buig.
translations.pl: W dłoniach, w dłoniach, na początku, w akumulacji, w ciele, ja się kłaniam.
translations.pt-br: Nas mãos, nas mãos, no princípio, na acumulação, no corpo, eu me prostro.
translations.ru: В руках, в руках, в начале, в накоплении, в теле, я склоняюсь.
translations.sv: I händerna, i händerna, i början, i ackumuleringen, i kroppen, jag böjer mig.
translations.th: ในมือ, ในมือ, ในช่วงเริ่มต้น, ในช่วงการสะสม, ในร่างกาย, ข้าขอคำนับ
translations.tr: Eller içinde, eller içinde, başlangıçta, birikimde, bedende, ben eğiliyorum.
translations.uk: В руках, в руках, в начале, в накоплении, в теле, я склоняюсь.
translations.vi: Trong lòng bàn tay, trong lòng bàn tay, từ đầu, trong quá trình tích lũy, trong cơ thể, tôi cúi lạy.
translations.zh-cn: 在手掌中，在手掌中，在开始时，在积累中，在身体中，我致敬。

mantras.name: Mantra for Eradicating Sins through the Seven Buddhas.
mantras.english: Mantra for Eradicating Sins through the Seven Buddhas.
mantras.transliteration: 唵 娑婆盧 咒 汝 娑婆盧 咒 悉陀夜 娑婆盧 咒 悉陀夜 娑婆盧 咒 菩提夜 娑婆盧 咒 菩提夜 娑婆盧 咒 婆盧 奇 帝 娑婆盧 咒 奇 帝 唵 悉陀優 娑婆盧 咒 悉陀優 唵 摩訶悉陀 娑婆盧 咒 悉陀夜 娑婆盧 咒 悉陀夜 娑婆盧 咒 菩提夜 娑婆盧 咒 菩提夜 娑婆盧 咒 婆盧 奇 帝 娑婆盧 咒 奇 帝 唵 悉陀優 娑婆盧 咒 悉陀優 唵 摩訶悉陀 娑婆盧 咒
mantras.background: The 七佛灭罪真言 (Mantra of Seven Buddhas Eradicating Sins) is a Buddhist dharani rooted in Chinese Buddhist tradition, invoking seven Buddhas to purify karmic wrongdoings.
mantras.benefits: The Seven Buddhas' Sin-Eradicating Mantra (七佛灭罪真言) is traditionally held to dissolve karmic burdens, offering practitioners psychological relief from guilt and spiritual renewal—a timeless Buddhist path to inner purification and liberation.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mahayana, dharani, karma, purification, liberation, buddhas, chinese

translations.es: Mantra para la erradicación de los pecados a través de los Siete Budas.
translations.ar: تعويذة لإزالة الذنوب عن طريق السبعة بوداس.
translations.bn: সাতজন বুদ্ধের মন্ত্র, যা সাতজন বুদ্ধের মাধ্যমে পাপ দূর করে।
translations.de: Das Mantra zur Beseitigung von Sünden durch die sieben Buddhas.
translations.en-us: Mantra for Purifying Sins through the Power of the Seven Buddhas.
translations.en-gb: Mantra for the Eradication of Sins, Recited Through the Seven Buddhas.
translations.fr-fr: Formule sacrée pour l'éradication des péchés, récitée en l'honneur des Sept Bouddhas.
translations.he: מנטרה להכחדת חטאים באמצעות שבעה בודהות.
translations.hi: सात बुद्धों के माध्यम से पापों को मिटाने का मंत्र।
translations.id: Mantra untuk Menghilangkan Dosa Melalui Tujuh Buddha.
translations.it: Mantratto per l'espiazione dei peccati attraverso i Sette Buddha.
translations.ja: 消除罪業的七佛真言 (Chíxiāo zuìyè de qī Fó zhēnyán)
translations.ko: 일곱 부처님을 통한 죄를 정화하는 주문.
translations.nl: Het mantra voor het uitroeien van zonden door de Zeven Boeddha's.
translations.pl: Mantrę, która przez siedmiu Buddów ma na celu unicestwienie grzechów.
translations.pt-br: Mantra para a Erradicação dos Pecados através dos Sete Budas.
translations.ru: Мантра для искупления грехов посредством Семи Будд.
translations.sv: Mantrat för att utrota synder genom de sju Buddhorna.
translations.th: คาถาสำหรับขจัดบาปกรรมโดยใช้พระพุทธเจ็ดพระองค์
translations.tr: Yedi Buda aracılığıyla Günahları Ortadan Kaldıran Mantra.
translations.uk: Мантра для очищення від гріхів за допомогою Семи Будд.
translations.vi: Châm ngữ để thanh trừ tội lỗi thông qua Bảy Đức Phật.
translations.zh-cn: 通过七佛消除罪业的真言。

mantras.name: Mantra of Great Compassion
mantras.english: Mantra of Great Compassion
mantras.transliteration: 唵 嘛呢 叭咪 吽
mantras.background: The 大悲咒 (Great Compassion Mantra) is a Buddhist dharani linked to Guanyin Bodhisattva (观自在菩萨). Its name means "Great Compassion" — invoking boundless mercy at the heart of Mahayana practice.
mantras.benefits: The Mantra of Great Compassion (大悲咒), linked to Guanyin Bodhisattva, is traditionally revered for purifying karma, cultivating boundless compassion, and offering protection. Its rhythmic recitation stills the mind, drawing practitioners into a tradition of mercy that has captivated millions.
mantras.tags: buddhist, dharani, mantra, compassion, merit, recitation

translations.es: Mantra de la Gran Compasión.
translations.ar: دعاء العطف الأعظم
translations.bn: মহামায়া স্তোত্র
translations.de: Das Mantra des großen Mitgefühls.
translations.en-us: The English translation of "Mantra of Great Compassion" is "Mantra of Immeasurable Compassion" or "Mantra of Boundless Compassion."
translations.en-gb: Mantra of Profound Compassion
translations.fr-fr: Le mantra de la Grande Compassion.
translations.he: מנטרה של חמלה עילאית.
translations.hi: महान करुणा का मंत्र.
translations.id: Mantra Kasih Sayang Agung
translations.it: Mantra della Grande Compassione.
translations.ja: 大慈悲真言 (Dà cíbēi zhēnyán)
translations.ko: 대자비 진언 (大慈悲 眞言)
translations.nl: Het mantram van de Grote Mededogen.
translations.pl: Mantrę Wielkiego Miłosierdzia.
translations.pt-br: Mantra da Grande Compaixão.
translations.ru: Мантра Великого Сострадания.
translations.sv: "Mantra för den stora medkänsla"
translations.th: คาถาแห่งความเมตตาอันยิ่งใหญ่
translations.tr: Büyük Şefkat Mantrası
translations.uk: Мантра Великого співчуття.
translations.vi: Châm ngữ Đại Bi.
translations.zh-cn: 大慈悲真言

mantras.name: May I be peaceful and free from suffering.
mantras.english: May I be peaceful and free from suffering.
mantras.original: May I be peaceful and free from suffering
mantras.transliteration: Mei yī bèi pínghéng hé zìyóu yú tòngkǔ.
mantras.background: From Buddhist Metta (loving-kindness) tradition, this phrase—"May I be peaceful and free from suffering"—is a compassion mantra directing goodwill inward before radiating it to all beings.
mantras.benefits:
Rooted in Metta (loving-kindness) meditation, this phrase cultivates unconditional compassion, beginning with self-acceptance and expanding outward. Research links the practice to improved emotional regulation and reduced stress—dissolving barriers between self and others.
  Grounding: Source describes Metta meditation using these exact phrases, expanding compassion systematically. Science confirms emotional regulation and stress reduction benefits from mantra meditation practice.
mantras.tags: metta, loving-kindness, compassion, affirmation, peace, acceptance, suffering, liberation

translations.es: "Que pueda ser pacífico y libre de sufrimiento."
translations.ar: لِنَجِدِ السَّلامَ وَنَخْلَصْ مِنَ العَذابِ.
translations.bn: আমি যেন শান্ত হই এবং দুঃখ থেকে মুক্ত থাকি।
translations.de: Möge ich friedlich sein und frei von Leid.
translations.en-us: May I find peace and be free from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May I be peaceful and free from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse-je être en paix et libéré de toute souffrance.
translations.he: אשמח אם אוכל לחוות שלום ושחרור מסבל.
translations.hi: मैं शांतिपूर्ण होऊं और दुःख से मुक्त होऊं।
translations.id: Semoga saya dapat kedamaian dan terbebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: "Possa io essere in pace e libero dalla sofferenza."
translations.ja: 平穏であり、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 평화를 얻고 고통에서 벗어나기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Moge ik vrede kennen en vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Niechaj będę spokojny i wolny od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: "Que eu possa encontrar a paz e estar livre do sofrimento."
translations.ru: Пусть я буду в мире и свободен от страданий.
translations.sv: Må jag vara fridfull och fri från lidande.
translations.th: ขอให้ข้าพเจ้ามีความสงบ และปราศจากความทุกข์.
translations.tr: Huzur içinde olabilir ve acıdan uzak olabilirim.
translations.uk: Нехай я буду спокійний і вільний від страждань.
translations.vi: Xin cho con được an yên và giải thoát khỏi mọi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我内心平静，远离痛苦。

mantras.name: May all aspirations be fulfilled effortlessly.
mantras.english: May all aspirations be fulfilled effortlessly.
mantras.transliteration: 愿诸愿皆得圆满，无作。
mantras.background: Buddhist dharani (陀罗尼): sacred syllables carrying boundless meaning, acting as divine passwords — only Buddhas fully grasp their depth, yet all beings respond.
mantras.benefits: Mantra practice cultivates inner stillness by bypassing analytical thought, allowing the mind to enter samadhi. Chanting sacred syllables—understood by spirits and buddhas alike—invokes protection, dissolves obstacles, and awakens effortless fulfillment.
mantras.tags: buddhist, dharani, mantra, recitation, protection, secret, ritual, fulfillment, tantric

translations.es: Que todas las aspiraciones se cumplan sin esfuerzo.
translations.ar: ليكن كل الطموحات مُحقَّقة بسهولة.
translations.bn: সব আকাঙ্ক্ষা সহজে পূরণ হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wünsche mühelos in Erfüllung gehen.
translations.en-us: May all one's wishes and ambitions be effortlessly realized.
translations.en-gb: May all one's hopes and ambitions be realised with ease.
translations.fr-fr: Que tous les désirs se réalisent sans effort.
translations.he: יִמָלֵא כל משאלה בקלות.
translations.hi: सभी अभिलाषाएँ आसानी से पूरी हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua cita-cita terpenuhi dengan mudah.
translations.it: Possa ogni desiderio realizzarsi con facilità.
translations.ja: すべての願いが、容易に成就しますように。
translations.ko: 모든 소망이 아무런 어려움 없이 이루어지기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle verlangens moeiteloos in vervulling gaan.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie pragnienia spełniają się bez wysiłku.
translations.pt-br: Que todas as aspirações sejam realizadas com facilidade e sem esforço.
translations.ru: Пусть все желания исполнятся легко и без усилий.
translations.sv: Må alla önskningar uppfyllas utan ansträngning.
translations.th: ขอให้ความปรารถนาทั้งหมดเป็นจริงได้โดยง่าย
translations.tr: Tüm arzuların kolaylıkla gerçekleşmesi dileğiyle.
translations.uk: Нехай усі прагнення здійсняться легко та безперешкодно.
translations.vi: Xin chúc mọi ước nguyện đều thành tựu một cách dễ dàng.
translations.zh-cn: 愿所有愿望都能轻松实现。

mantras.name: May all be auspicious.
mantras.english: May all be auspicious.
mantras.transliteration: *māṅ sarvaṃ śubham syāt*
mantras.background: From Vajrayana Buddhism, "May all be auspicious" reflects mantras as symbolic gateways to reality—chanted aloud or silently to unite body, speech, and mind in awakening.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om Mani Padme Hum awakens compassion (anukampa) within, connecting the practitioner to Avalokiteshvara's boundless empathy. Voice, body, and mind unite, transforming daily life into a path of awakened awareness.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, compassion, bodhisattva, om mani padme hum, visualization, mantra, devotional, tantric, awakening, dharani, symbolic

translations.es: Que todo sea auspicioso.
translations.ar: لِيَكُنْ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مُؤَثِّرًا بِالخَيْرِ.
translations.bn: সব শুভ হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Dinge wohlgesinnt sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings be prosperous.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience well-being and good fortune.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tout être propice.
translations.he: יְהִי כָל טוֹב.
translations.hi: सब शुभ हो।
translations.id: Semoga semua menjadi baik.
translations.it: Possa tutto essere propizio.
translations.ja: 全てのものが吉でありますように。
translations.ko: 모든 것이 길하게 되기를.
translations.nl: Moge alles voorspoedig zijn.
translations.pl: Niech wszystko będzie pomyślne.
translations.pt-br: Que tudo seja auspicioso.
translations.ru: Пусть всё будет благоприятным.
translations.sv: Måtte allt vara välsignat.
translations.th: ขอให้ทุกสิ่งเป็นมงคล
translations.tr: Hepsi için iyi olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай все буде благословенним.
translations.vi: Xin cho mọi điều đều tốt đẹp và may mắn.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切皆吉祥。

mantras.name: May all be fulfilled. May all be auspicious.
mantras.english: May all be fulfilled. May all be auspicious.
mantras.original: सर्वेषां पूर्नं भवतु । सर्वेषां मड्गलं भवतु ॥
mantras.transliteration: सबका कल्याण हो। सब कुछ मंगलमय हो।
mantras.background: This Sanskrit blessing—"May all be fulfilled. May all be auspicious"—echoes Tibetan Buddhist mantra traditions, where sacred sound unites body, speech, and mind to awaken compassion and wisdom in all beings.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in the tradition where mantras embody compassion and wisdom, this universal blessing cultivates selfless goodwill, uniting body, speech, and mind toward collective flourishing and inner peace.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, mantra, bodhisattva, compassion, wisdom, visualization, sound, purification, transformation, faith, tantric, auspicious

translations.es: Que todo se cumpla. Que todo sea auspicioso.
translations.ar: ليكن كل شيء مكتملًا. ليكن كل شيء مباركًا.
translations.bn: सभी की मनोकामनाएं पूरी हों। सभी में शुभता हो।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wünsche erfüllt werden. Mögen alle Dinge von Glückseligkeit erfüllt sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings find fulfillment. May all be blessed with auspiciousness.
translations.en-gb: May all desires be fulfilled. May all endeavors be blessed with auspiciousness.
translations.fr-fr: Que tout soit accompli. Que tout soit propice et béni.
translations.he: יִמָלֵא כָל, יִהְיֶה הַכֹּל מְבָרָךְ.
translations.hi: "सदा सबकी मनोकामना पूरी हो। सदा सब कुछ शुभ हो।"
translations.id: Semoga semua terpenuhi. Semoga semua menjadi baik.
translations.it: Possa tutto realizzarsi. Possa tutto essere propizio.
translations.ja: 皆が満ち足りん。皆が吉とならん。
translations.ko: 모든 것이 성취되기를 바랍니다. 모든 것이 길조이기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Moge alles vervuld worden. Moge alles gunstig zijn.
translations.pl: Niech wszystko się spełni. Niech wszystko będzie pomyślne.
translations.pt-br: Que tudo seja realizado. Que tudo seja auspicioso.
translations.ru: Пусть все исполнится. Пусть всё будет благословенным.
translations.sv: Måtte allt uppfyllas. Måtte allt vara välsignat.
translations.th: ขอให้ทุกสิ่งสมหวัง ขอให้ทุกสิ่งเป็นมงคล
translations.tr: Hepsi gerçekleşsin. Hepsi uğurlu olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай все здійсниться. Нехай все буде благословенним.
translations.vi: Xin chúc mọi điều thành tựu. Xin chúc mọi sự tốt lành.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切皆得圆满。 愿一切皆蒙福。

mantras.name: May all beings be well, may all beings be happy, may all beings be peaceful, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.english: May all beings be well, may all beings be happy, may all beings be peaceful, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratīṣṭhaiḥ sukhi bhavantu, mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratīṣṭhaiḥ prasanna bhavantu, mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratīṣṭhaiḥ śānti bhavantu, mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratīṣṭhaiḥ dukkhātmāgata bhavantu.`
mantras.background: A Buddhist loving-kindness prayer, this metta mantra literally wishes all beings wellness and peace — rooted in compassion and purification of negative energy.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist compassion practice, this Metta phrase cultivates boundless goodwill toward all beings. Sources link such mantras to stress reduction, mental calm, and energetic harmony — both within oneself and in communal practice. Its universal embrace invites profound inner transformation.
mantras.tags: peace, well-being, compassion, liberation, affirmation, harmony, healing

translations.es: "Que todos los seres estén bien, que todos los seres sean felices, que todos los seres gocen de paz, que todos los seres estén libres del sufrimiento."
translations.ar: لَيْكُنْ سَعَادَةٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات، وَلَيْكُنْ سَلامٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات، وَلَيْكُنْ عافِيَةٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات، وَلَيْكُنْ خَلَاصٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات مِنَ الشَّقاء.
translations.bn: সব প্রাণী মঙ্গল হোক, সব প্রাণী সুখী হোক, সব প্রাণী শান্ত হোক, সব প্রাণী দুঃখ থেকে মুক্ত হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen wohlbehalten sein, mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein, mögen alle Wesen friedlich sein, mögen alle Wesen frei von Leid sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings be at ease, may all beings be joyful, may all beings experience tranquility, may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience well-being, may all beings experience happiness, may all beings experience peace, may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être bien, puisse tous les êtres être heureux, puisse tous les êtres être en paix, puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la souffrance.
translations.he: יהי כל יצור טוב, יהי כל יצור שמח, יהי כל יצור שלם, יהי כל יצור חופשי מכל צער.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों, सभी प्राणी आनंदित हों, सभी प्राणी शांत हों, सभी प्राणी दुःख से मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk baik, semoga semua makhluk bahagia, semoga semua makhluk memiliki kedamaian, semoga semua makhluk terbebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: "Possano tutti gli esseri essere nel benessere, possano tutti gli esseri essere felici, possano tutti gli esseri essere in pace, possano tutti gli esseri essere liberi dalla sofferenza."
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、安らかでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸せでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、平和でありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 기쁨을 얻기를, 모든 존재들이 평화롭기를, 모든 존재들이 고통에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren, moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn, moge alle wezens vrede vinden, moge alle wezens vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe, niech wszystkie istoty będą zdrówne, niech wszystkie istoty znajdą pokój, niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres estejam bem, que todos os seres estejam felizes, que todos os seres estejam em paz, que todos os seres estejam livres do sofrimento.
translations.ru: Да будут все существа благополучными, да будут все существа счастливыми, да будут все существа в мире, да будут все существа свободны от страданий.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser vara väl, måtte alla varelser vara lyckliga, måtte alla varelser vara fridfulla, måtte alla varelser vara fria från lidande.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความเบิกบาน, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสงบ, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พ้นจากความทุกข์.
translations.tr: Tüm varlıkların iyiliğini, mutluluğunu, huzurunu ve acıdan kurtuluşunu dileyelim.
translations.uk: Нехай усі істоти будуть благополучними, нехай усі істоти будуть щасливими, нехай усі істоти будуть спокійними, нехай усі істоти будуть вільними від страждань.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được an lành, được hạnh phúc, được bình yên, và giải thoát khỏi mọi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生安乐，愿一切众生快乐，愿一切众生平静，愿一切众生离苦。

mantras.name: May all beings be well. May all beings find peace.
mantras.english: May all beings be well. May all beings find peace.
mantras.transliteration: "May sabhi jīv sukhī hūँ. May sabhi jīv shānti prapt karēँ."
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist compassion traditions, this phrase echoes mantras like Maitri — "loving-kindness." It reflects the bodhisattva ideal: awakening all beings through sound, intention, and universal peace.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist compassion (karuṇā), this mantra cultivates maitri—loving-kindness—engaging body, speech, and mind. Regular recitation, as Vajrayāna teaches, harmonizes the psycho-physical system, awakening boundless empathy.
mantras.tags: hindu, buddhist, tibetan, mantra, devotion, affirmation, sound, spiritual, peace, mantra, deity, protection

translations.es: "Que todos los seres estén bien. Que todos los seres encuentren la paz."
translations.ar: لَيْسَلْمَ جَمِيعُ الْكَائِنَاتِ. لِيَجِدَ جَمِيعُ الْكَائِنَاتِ السَّلاَمَ.
translations.bn: सभी प्राणी कल्याण हों। सभी प्राणी शांति प्राप्त करें।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen wohlbehalten sein. Mögen alle Wesen Frieden finden.
translations.en-us: May all beings experience well-being. May all beings attain peace.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience well-being. May all beings attain peace.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être bien. Puisse tous les êtres trouver la paix.
translations.he: יְהִי שָׁלוֹם עַל כָּל הַיְּצוּרוֹת. יְהִי שֶׁקֶט לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों। सभी प्राणी शांत हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup sejahtera. Semoga semua makhluk hidup menemukan kedamaian.
translations.it: "Possa ogni essere essere in salute. Possa ogni essere trovare la pace."
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、安らかでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、平和を得ますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를. 모든 존재들이 평화를 찾기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren. Moge alle wezens vrede vinden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe. Niech wszystkie istoty znajdą pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres estejam bem. Que todos os seres encontrem a paz.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа будут благополучными. Пусть все существа обретут мир.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser må bra. Må alla varelser finna frid.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสงบ
translations.tr: Tüm varlıkların iyiliği olsun. Tüm varlıkların huzur bulması dileğiyle.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть у доброті. Нехай усі живі істоти знайдуть мир.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được an lành. Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh tìm được sự bình an.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆安乐。愿一切众生皆得安宁。

mantras.name: May all beings see what is auspicious.
mantras.english: May all beings see what is auspicious.
mantras.transliteration: May sabhi jeevon auspicious dikhein.
mantras.background: Rooted in Sanskrit, "mantra" means "tool of thought." This auspicious wish connects to Hindu & Buddhist sound-vibration traditions where chanting manifests cosmic truth.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in the compassionate bodhisattva ideal, this mantra cultivates an outward orientation of goodwill. Sources link mantras to thought-forms of compassion and wisdom, engaging body, speech, and mind to awaken practitioners to reality's auspicious nature.
mantras.tags: hindu, buddhist, mantra, tibetan, compassion, auspicious, affirmation, divine, sound, visualization, faith, spiritual

translations.es: Que todos los seres perciban lo que es auspicioso.
translations.ar: ليَرَ جميع المخلوقات ما هو مبارك.
translations.bn: सभी प्राणियों को शुभ का दर्शन हो।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen das sehen, was wohlgefällig ist.
translations.en-us: May all beings perceive that which is favorable and propitious.
translations.en-gb: May all beings witness that which is propitious.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres contempler ce qui est propice.
translations.he: יהי כל יצור ויראה את הטוב והמבורך.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणियों को शुभ का दर्शन हो।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk melihat apa yang baik dan membawa keberuntungan.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere vedere ciò che è propizio.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、吉なるものを見出すように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 길조를 보기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens zien wat gunstig is.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty zobaczą to, co jest pomyślne.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres vejam o que é auspicioso.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа увидят то, что является благоприятным.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser få se det som är välgörande/lyckobringande.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงได้เห็นสิ่งที่เป็นมงคล
translations.tr: Hep varlıkların, iyi ve uğurlu olanı görmesini dileyelim.
translations.uk: Нехай усі істоти бачать те, що є добрим і благочестивим.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả các sinh vật đều thấy được những điều tốt đẹp.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生都能看到吉祥。

mantras.name: Mu
mantras.english: No / Nothing / Does not have / The gateless gate
mantras.transliteration: Mu (Japanese) / Wu (Chinese)
mantras.abstract:
Mu is at once the simplest and most demanding practice in the Zen tradition. It originates from the famous koan recorded in the Gateless Gate (Mumonkan), compiled by the Chinese master Wumen Huikai in 1228. A monk asks the master Zhaozhou: Does a dog have Buddha-nature? Zhaozhou answers: Mu — No, or Does-not-have. This single syllable became the most widely assigned koan in the Rinzai school of Zen, and its investigation has occupied Zen practitioners for nearly eight centuries.

The challenge of Mu is that it cannot be resolved through conceptual analysis. One cannot think one's way to Mu's answer, because the koan is designed to exhaust conceptual mind entirely. The teacher will reject every intellectual interpretation and send the practitioner back to sit with Mu until the separation between the one asking and the question being asked collapses. What remains when that collapse occurs is called kensho or satori — a direct seeing into one's own nature.

The method of working with Mu involves holding the syllable continuously in awareness during sitting meditation, during walking meditation, and eventually during all activities of daily life. Practitioners are instructed not to analyze or intellectualize but to become Mu — to let the inquiry fill the body and mind until the usual sense of a separate self asking a question dissolves.

Wumen Huikai's commentary says: Concentrate your whole body — its 360 bones and joints, its 84,000 pores — into this question, What is Mu? Carry it continuously day and night. Mu is an anti-mantra, a practice that uses sound and inquiry to shatter the very conceptual structures that conventional mantras might reinforce, pointing directly to the wordless ground of awareness.

translations.en: No / Does not have / The gateless gate
translations.zh: 無
translations.es: No / No tiene / Sin puerta

mantras.name: Namo Amituofo
mantras.english: Homage to Amitabha Buddha / I take refuge in Amitabha Buddha
mantras.transliteration: Namo Amituofo (Chinese) / Namo Amitabhaya Buddhaya (Sanskrit)
mantras.abstract:
Namo Amituofo is the primary practice of Pure Land Buddhism, one of the most widely practiced forms of Buddhism in East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, Korea, and Vietnam. The practice centers on Amitabha Buddha, the Buddha of Infinite Light and Infinite Life who presides over the Western Pure Land, known as Sukhavati or the Land of Bliss. According to the foundational Pure Land sutras, Amitabha made forty-eight great vows while a bodhisattva, the eighteenth of which promises that any being who recites his name with sincere faith will be reborn in his Pure Land at death.

The Chinese rendering Amituofo is a phonetic transliteration of the Sanskrit Amitabha combined with Buddha. Namo derives from the Sanskrit namas, meaning bow to or homage to, and signals an act of refuge and devotion. Together the phrase constitutes a complete act of taking refuge in the Three Jewels through the particular doorway of Amitabha's compassionate vow.

Pure Land practice spans a wide spectrum of approaches. At one end is the scholastic and meditative interpretation in which recitation of the name is combined with visualization of the Pure Land and deep meditation on the nature of mind. At the other end is the radical other-power approach of the Japanese master Shinran, who taught that a single sincere utterance of Namu Amida Butsu is sufficient for liberation.

The deepest expressions of Pure Land practice involve a sophisticated understanding of non-dual awareness: the practitioner who truly takes refuge in Amitabha realizes that Amitabha's mind and one's own pure mind are not ultimately separate.

translations.en: Homage to Amitabha Buddha
translations.zh: 南无阿弥陀佛
translations.es: Homenaje al Buda Amitabha

mantras.name: Namo Tassa Bhagavato Arahato Samma Sambuddhassa
mantras.english: Homage to the Blessed One, the Worthy One, the Fully Enlightened One
mantras.transliteration: Namo Tassa Bhagavato Arahato Samma Sambuddhassa
mantras.abstract:
Namo Tassa Bhagavato Arahato Samma Sambuddhassa is the traditional homage formula recited at the opening of virtually every Theravada Buddhist ceremony, meditation sitting, chanting session, and Dhamma discourse throughout the Pali-speaking Buddhist world. It is the first verse of the Theravada liturgy and serves as a formal act of taking refuge in the Buddha, establishing the intention and orientation of all practice that follows.

Each term in the formula carries precise doctrinal weight. Bhagavato means the Blessed One — one endowed with all auspicious qualities. Arahato means the Worthy One — one who has destroyed all the taints of sensual desire, becoming, and ignorance. Samma Sambuddhassa means the Fully Self-Enlightened One — one who has realized the Four Noble Truths and the path to liberation entirely through his own investigation.

In Theravada practice, the recitation of this formula three times before any spiritual activity is understood to create a powerful act of merit and to orient the mind toward the qualities that the Buddha represents. The recitation is considered a form of contemplation: reflecting on the Buddha's qualities is itself a meditation subject, known as Buddhanusmrti or recollection of the Buddha.

The formula is found throughout the Pali canon and has been recited continuously in Theravada communities from Sri Lanka, Burma, Thailand, Laos, and Cambodia for over two thousand years. Monks chant it before and after sermons, laypeople recite it before meditation, and it is the first Pali phrase learned by children in Buddhist households.

translations.en: Homage to the Blessed One, the Worthy One, the Fully Enlightened One
