translations.es: Om, que la hermosa naturaleza sea purificada, que la esencia bella de todas las dharmas (caminos/deberes justos) sea purificada; que yo sea purificado.
translations.ar: "أوم، طُهر الطبيعة الجميلة، طُهر جوهر جميع الـ "دharma" (السُبل/الواجبات الصالحة)، طُهرت أنا."
translations.bn: ওম, হে সুন্দর প্রকৃতির, তুমি পবিত্র হও; হে সকল ধর্মের সুন্দর সারমর্ম, তুমি পবিত্র হও; হে আমার, তুমি পবিত্র হও।
translations.de: Om, möge die wunderschöne Natur gereinigt werden, möge die wunderschöne Essenz aller Dharmas (rechtschaffenen Pfade/Pflichten) gereinigt werden; möge ich gereinigt werden.
translations.en-us: "Om. May the beautiful nature be purified. May the beautiful essence of all righteous paths and duties be purified. May I be purified."
translations.en-gb: Om, may the beautiful nature be purified, may the beautiful essence of all righteous paths and duties be purified; may I myself be purified.
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse la nature magnifique être purifiée, puisse l'essence sublime de toutes les dharmas (vertus, devoirs) être purifiée ; puisse moi-même être purifié.
translations.he: אום, יתטהר הטבע היפה, תתטהר המהות היפה של כל הדרמות (דרכים/חובות צדק); אשאר אני טהור.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे! सुंदर प्रकृति, तेरा शुद्धिकरण हो; समस्त धर्मों के सुंदर सार का शुद्धिकरण हो; मेरा शुद्धिकरण हो।
translations.id: Om, semoga alam yang indah dimurnikan, semoga esensi indah dari semua dharma (jalan/kewajiban yang benar) dimurnikan; semoga aku dimurnikan.
translations.it: Om, possa la natura splendida essere purificata, possa l'essenza sublime di tutti i *dharma* (principi etici/doveri) essere purificata; possa io essere purificato.
translations.ja: オーム、美しい自然が清められますように、すべての法（善行、道徳）の本質が清められますように、私が清められますように。
translations.ko: 옴, 아름다운 자연이 정화되기를, 모든 ธรรม (정의로운 길/의무)의 아름다운 본질이 정화되기를, 그리고 제가 정화되기를.
translations.nl: Om, moge de prachtige natuur worden gereinigd, moge de prachtige essentie van alle dharma's (rechtvaardige paden/plichten) worden gereinigd; moge ikzelf worden gereinigd.
translations.pl: Om, niech piękna natura zostanie oczyszczona, niech piękna esencja wszystkich dharm (prawych ścieżek/obowiązków) zostanie oczyszczona; niech ja zostanę oczyszczony.
translations.pt-br: Om, que a natureza exuberante seja purificada, que a essência bela de todos os dharmas (caminhos/deveres justos) seja purificada; que eu seja purificado.
translations.ru: Ом, да будет очищена прекрасная природа, да будет очищен прекрасный смысл всех дхарм (праведных путей/обязанностей); да буду очищен я.
translations.sv: Om, må den vackra naturen renas, må den vackra essensen av alla därma (rättfärdiga vägar/plikter) renas; må jag renas.
translations.th: ขอให้ธรรมชาติอันงดงามได้รับการชำระล้าง ขอให้แก่นแท้ของธรรมะทั้งปวงได้รับการชำระล้าง ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าได้รับการชำระล้าง
translations.tr: Om, güzel doğanın arınması, tüm dharmaların (etik yollar/görevler) güzel özünün arınması, benim arınmam için.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай прекрасна природа буде очищена, нехай прекрасна сутність усіх дха́рм (шляхетних шляхів/боргів) буде очищена; нехай буду очищений я.
translations.vi: Om, xin cho bản chất tươi đẹp của tự nhiên được thanh lọc, xin cho bản chất cao quý của mọi đạo lý (dharmas) được thanh lọc; xin cho tôi được thanh lọc.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，愿美好的自然世界得到净化；愿所有正法的精髓得到净化；愿我自身得到净化。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the all-powerful, radiant Vairocana, the Great Seal. May the lotus of wisdom burst into flames and radiate. Hūṃ.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the all-powerful, radiant Vairocana, the Great Seal. May the lotus of wisdom burst into flames and radiate. Hūṃ.
mantras.original: Om̐ Amogha Vairocana Mahāmudrā Maṇipadma Jvalapravartāya Hūṃ
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, saṁskāraḥ vairocanāya, mahā-mudrāya, prajñā-padma eva jvalanaṁ kuryāt, praṇālayaḥ. hūṃ.
mantras.background: A Mahayana Buddhist mantra invoking Vairocana—the radiant cosmic Buddha. Rooted in Shingon and Zen traditions, it calls wisdom's lotus to ignite and blaze.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Vairocana—the all-pervading cosmic Buddha—this Shingon mantra is said to eliminate ignorance and radiate wisdom. Kūkai taught that reciting it connects the practitioner's mind to Buddha's enlightened speech, realizing "Suchness here and now."
mantras.tags: shingon, vairocana, tantric, esoteric, enlightenment, wisdom, illumination, invocation, consecration, transformation, empowerment

translations.es: Om, saludo al todopoderoso y radiante Vairocana, el Gran Sello. Que el loto de la sabiduría se encienda en llamas y irradie. Hūṃ.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لـ "فايوروكانا" العظيم، ذي القوة المطلقة والإشراق، "الختم الأعظم".  فلتتفتح زهرة الحكمة وتشتعل، وتنشر إشعاعها.  هوم."
translations.bn: ওঁ, सर्वशक्तिमान, তেজस्वी বৈরোগ্রণকে, মহামুদ্রাকে প্রণাম। হে মহান, জ্ঞানচক্র যেন আগুনের শিখা হয়ে জ্বলে ওঠে এবং আলো ছড়ায়। হূྃ।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung dem allmächtigen, strahlenden Vairocana, dem Großen Siegel. Möge die Lotusblume der Weisheit in Flammen aufgehen und strahlen. Hūṃ.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the all-powerful, radiant Vairocana, the Great Seal. May the lotus of wisdom blossom and radiate. Hūṃ."
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Vairocana, the all-powerful, radiant Great Illuminator. May the lotus of wisdom blossom and shine forth. Hūṃ.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations au Vairocana, le Tout-Puissant, le Rayonnant, le Grand Sceau. Que le lotus de la sagesse s'embrase et rayonne. Hūṃ.
translations.he: הוֹם, שבחים לא-ויירוקנה, הכל-יכול, המאיר, החותם הגדול. יאיר פרח הלotus של החוכמה ויפיץ את אורו. הום.
translations.hi: ॐ, सर्वशक्तिमान, तेजस्वी, महान वैरोचन, 'महान मुद्रा' को प्रणाम। हे ज्ञान के कमल, प्रज्वलित होकर प्रकाश फैलाओ। हूं।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Vairocana yang Maha Kuasa, bercahaya, dan merupakan Mahamantra. Semoga bunga lotus kebijaksanaan meledak menjadi api dan bersinar. Hūṃ.
translations.it: Om, saluto al potentissimo e radioso Vairocana, il Grande Sigillo. Possa il loto della saggezza fiorire in fiamme e irradiare. Hūṃ.
translations.ja: オーム。全能、輝けるヴィローカナ仏、大日如来へ、礼。智慧の蓮華が炎のように開花し、光を放つように。フーム。
translations.ko: 옴, 모든 힘과 광채를 가진, 위대한 대승의 화광여래(毘盧遮那如來)께 경의를 표합니다. 지혜의 연꽃이 불타오르며 빛을 발하게 하소서. 훔.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan de almachtige, stralende Vairocana, de Grote Zegel. Moge de lotus van wijsheid in vlammen opgaan en stralen. Hūṃ.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla wszechmocnego, promiennego Vairocany, Wielkiego Pieczęci. Niech lotos mądrości zapłonie i rozpromieni się. Hūṃ.
translations.pt-br: Om, salvação àquele que possui todo o poder, ao radiante Vairocana, o Grande Selo. Que o lótus da sabedoria floresça em chamas e irradie. Hūṃ.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия всемогущему, сияющему Вайрочане, Великому Сарвабхуте. Да раскрывается лотос мудрости в пламени и излучает свет. Хум.
translations.sv: Om, vördnad till den allsmäktige, strålande Vairocana, det Stora Sigillet. Mått visdomens lotus brista i lågor och utstråla. Hūṃ.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่ไวโรจนะ ผู้ทรงอำนาจและสว่างไสว ผู้เป็นดวงประธาน ขอให้ดอกบัวแห่งปัญญาลุกโชนและเปล่งประกายออกมา หึม
translations.tr: Om, kudretli, ışıldayan Vairocana'ya, Büyük Mühür'e selam olsun. Bilgeliğin lotus çiçeği alevlenip ışık yayılsın. Hūṃ.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия всемогущему, сияющему Вайрочане, Великому Завету. Дайте же лотосу мудрости вспыхнуть пламенем и излучать свет. Хум.
translations.vi: Om, lời nguyện kính dâng vị Đại Quang Minh Vairocana, Đấng Niên Giáp. Xin hoa sen trí tuệ bừng nở và tỏa sáng. Hūṃ.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向至高无上、光辉照耀的毗卢遮那佛，大日如来，致敬。愿智慧之莲盛开，如火焰般绽放，并散发光芒。吽。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the immortal; Hum, the essence of existence; Phaṭ, be accomplished.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the immortal; Hum, the essence of existence; Phaṭ, be accomplished.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, salutation to the immortal; hum, the essence of existence; phaṭ, be accomplished.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic-Tantric tradition, this mantra unites Om (primordial sound), amṛta (immortal nectar), Hūṃ (Shiva's awakening force), and Phaṭ (Vedic strike-power) into one fierce, transformative invocation.
mantras.benefits: This mantra unites Om's calming vagal resonance with Hum's awakening force and Phaṭ's obstacle-breaking power — blending stillness, vitality, and decisive accomplishment into one transformative practice.
mantras.tags: om, vedic, tantric, primordial-sound, essence, wrathful, obstacle-subduing, accomplishment, power, purification, esoteric, protection

translations.es: Om, saludo al ser inmortal; Hum, la esencia de la existencia; Phaṭ, ¡que se cumpla!
translations.ar: "أوم، التحية للخلود؛ هوم، جوهر الوجود؛ فات، ليكن الأمر مكتملًا."
translations.bn: ॐ, অমর সত্ত্বকে प्रणाम; हुं, অস্তিত্বের সার; फट्, সিদ্ধ হোক।
translations.de: Om, Heil sei dem Unsterblichen; Hum, sei die Essenz des Seins; Phaṭ, möge es vollendet werden.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the eternal; Hum, the essence of being; Phaṭ, may it be accomplished."
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the eternal one; Hum, the essence of being; Phaṭ, may it be accomplished.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à l'être immortel ; Hum, l'essence même de l'existence ; Phaṭ, qu'il advienne.
translations.he: אָה, מברכים את הנצח; הוּם, מהות הקיום; פַט, תהיה השלמה.
translations.hi: ॐ, अमर को नमस्कार; हुं, अस्तित्व का सार; फट, पूर्ण हो।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada yang abadi; Hum, esensi keberadaan; Phaṭ, semoga terwujud.
translations.it: Om, saluto all'immortale; Hum, l'essenza dell'esistenza; Phaṭ, che sia compiuto.
translations.ja: オーム、不滅なるものへの敬意を表します。フーム、存在の本質です。パット、成就させられますように。
translations.ko: 옴, 불멸의 존재에게 경의를 표합니다. 훔, 존재의 본질입니다. 파트, 성취되소서.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan de onsterfelijke; Hum, de essentie van het bestaan; Phaṭ, moge het volbracht worden.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia nieśmiertelności; Hum, esencja bytu; Phaṭ, niech się stanie.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudação ao eterno; Hum, a essência da existência; Phaṭ, que se realize.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия бессмертному; Хум, сущность бытия; Пат, да будет исполнено.
translations.sv: Om, hälsning till den odödliga; Hum, existensens essens; Phaṭ, må det fullbordas.
translations.th: ออม, ข้าขอคารวะแด่ผู้เป็นอมตะ; ฮัม, สาระแห่งการมีอยู่; ภาฐ, ขอให้สำเร็จ.
translations.tr: Om, ölümsüzliğe saygılar; Hum, varoluşun özü; Phaṭ, gerçekleşsin.
translations.uk: Ом, вітання безсмертному; Хум, сутність існування; Фаṭ, нехай буде здійснено.
translations.vi: ॐ, lời chào kính cẩn dâng lên vị bất tử;  Humphreys, bản chất của sự tồn tại; Phát, xin hãy thành tựu.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向永恒之灵致敬； ஹம்，是存在之精华； फाट्，愿其成就。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the sage, the great sage, the Shakya sage.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the sage, the great sage, the Shakya sage.
mantras.original: Oṃ muni muni mahāmuni śākyamuni svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, namo 'munaye, mahāmunaye, śākyamunaye.
mantras.background: A Buddhist mantra honoring Shakyamuni Buddha, meaning "Om wise one, wise one, greatly wise one, wise one of the Shakyans, Hail!" — an ancient call to awakened wisdom.
mantras.benefits:
Chanting this mantra invokes the wisdom of Shakyamuni Buddha. The rhythmic "muni muni mahamuni" cultivates mental clarity and inner stillness, while the sacred Om anchors the mind — releasing thoughts and awakening meditative depth.
  Grounding: Sources link Om to deep meditative states and mind-release; Shakyamuni mantra meaning "wise one" connects to Buddhist wisdom tradition per source text.
mantras.tags: buddhist, shakyamuni, meditation, chanting, devotional, wisdom, focus, relaxation

translations.es: Om, saludo al sabio, al gran sabio, al sabio Shākya.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية للحكيم، للحكيم العظيم، للحكيم شاكيا."
translations.bn: ওঁ, ঋষির উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণাম, মহান ঋষির উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণাম, শাক্য ঋষির উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung dem Weisen, dem großen Weisen, dem Shakya-Weisen.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the wise one, the great wise one, the Shakya wise one."
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the wise one, the eminent wise one, the Shakya wise one.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations au sage, au grand sage, au sage Shakya.
translations.he: אָם, ברכות לחכם, לחכם הגדול, לחכם השאקיה.
translations.hi: ॐ, ऋषी को प्रणाम, महान ऋषी को प्रणाम, शाक्य ऋषी को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada sang bijak, sang bijak agung, sang bijak dari keluarga Shakya.
translations.it: Om, saluto al saggio, al grande saggio, al saggio Shakya.
translations.ja: オーム、賢者へ、偉大なる賢者へ、釈迦の賢者へ、礼を捧げます。 (Ōmu, kensha e, idaina kensha e, Shakka no kensha e, rei o hatagemasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 현자에 경의를 표합니다. 위대한 현자, 얍야 가문의 현자에게 경의를 표합니다. (Om, hyeonja-e gyeong-i-reul pyohamnida. Wigedan hyeonja, 얍야 gama-ui hyeonja-e gyeong-i-reul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl: Om, groet de wijze, de grote wijze, de wijze uit de Shakya-stam.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia mędrcowi, wielkiemu mędrcowi, mędrcowi z klanu Shakya.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudação ao sábio, ao grande sábio, ao sábio Shākya.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия мудрому, великому мудрому, мудрому из рода Шакьев.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till den vise, den store vise, den Shakya-vise.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจากบัณฑิต, บัณฑิตผู้ยิ่งใหญ่, บัณฑิตแห่งตระกูลศากย.
translations.tr: Om, bilgeye, büyük bilgeye, Şakya bilgeye selam olsun.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия мудрому, великому мудрому, мудрому из рода Шакьев.
translations.vi: Om, Kính chào vị trí giả, vị trí giả vĩ đại, vị trí giả thuộc dòng họ Shakya.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向智者，伟大的智者，沙க்கிய智者，致敬。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the sage, the great sage, the Shakyamuni, svaha.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the sage, the great sage, the Shakyamuni, svaha.
mantras.original: Om̐ muni muni mahāmuni śākyamuni svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, saṁbrāhmaṇe, mahā-saṁbrāhmaṇe, śākyamunaye, svāhā.
mantras.background:
A Mahayana Buddhist mantra honoring Shakyamuni, the historical Buddha. "Om, muni muni mahāmuni śākyamuni svāhā" — "Om, sage, sage, great sage, Shakyamuni, so be it!"
  Grounding: Source lists "Shakyamuni Buddha's Mantra: Om̐ muni muni mahāmuni śākyamuni svāhā" under Mahayana Buddhist mantras, confirming tradition and literal meaning.
mantras.benefits:
Invoking Shakyamuni Buddha, this mantra connects practitioners to the historical Buddha's enlightened mind. Rooted in Mahayana tradition, it cultivates wisdom, focus, and refuge in the Buddha's awakened presence through sacred repetition.
  Grounding: Source lists "Om muni muni mahāmuni śākyamuni svāhā" as Shakyamuni Buddha's mantra in Mahayana Buddhism; mantra practice cultivates connection with deity's meditative power per Mañjuśrīmūlakalpa.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mahayana, tibetan, shakyamuni, homage, devotional, remembrance, seed-mantra

translations.es: Om, saludo al sabio, al gran sabio, a Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.ar: "أوم، التحية للحكيم، العظيم، شاكيا موني، سواه."
translations.bn: ওঁ, ঋষিগণের উদ্দেশ্যে प्रणाम, মহান ঋষি, শাক্যমুনি, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung dem Weisen, dem großen Weisen, Shakyamuni, Svaha.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to the sage, the great sage, to Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the wise one, the great wise one, to Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations au sage, au grand sage, à Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.he: ॐ, ברכה לחכם, לחכם הגדול, לשאקיהמוני, הושט.
translations.hi: ॐ, ऋषी को प्रणाम, महान ऋषी को प्रणाम, शाक्यमुनि को प्रणाम, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada sang bijak, sang bijak agung, Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.it: Om, saluto al saggio, al grande saggio, a Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.ja: オーム、賢者に礼、偉大な賢者、釈迦牟尼に、スワハ。
translations.ko: 옴, 현자에 경의를, 위대한 현자에 경의를, 샤캬무니에게 경의를, 스바하.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan de wijze, de grote wijze, aan Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla mędrca, wielkiego mędrca, dla Szakjamuniego, svaha.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações ao sábio, ao grande sábio, a Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия мудрому, великому мудрому, Шакьямуни, сохам.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till vismannen, den store vismannen, Shakyamuni, svaha.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจากบัณฑิต, บัณฑิตผู้ยิ่งใหญ่, ศากยบุตร, สวาหะ
translations.tr: "Om, bilgine saygılar, büyük bilge, Şakyamuni, hu."
translations.uk: Ом, шанування мудрому, великому мудрому, Шак'ямуні, сваха.
translations.vi: Om, kính chào vị trí giả, vị trí giả vĩ đại, Đức Phật Thích Ca, svaha.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向智者，伟大的智者，向释迦牟尼佛，合十。

mantras.name: Om, the immeasurable, Amita, boundless, and Buddha, the awakened one.
mantras.english: Om, the immeasurable, Amita, boundless, and Buddha, the awakened one.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, असीम, अमित, and बुद्ध, the awakened one.
mantras.background: From Buddhist tradition, "Namo Amitabha Buddhaya" venerates Amitabha — the Buddha of infinite light. Chanting connects practitioners to boundless compassion, awakening wisdom within.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Namo Amitabha Buddhaya" invokes boundless light and compassion, helping practitioners cultivate inner peace, focus, and a heartfelt connection to liberation — drawing the mind toward openness and awakening.
mantras.tags: buddhist, amitabha, devotion, compassion, wisdom, enlightenment, liberation, awakening, rebirth

translations.es: Om, lo inmensurable; Amita, lo ilimitado; y Buda, el iluminado.
translations.ar: أوم، الذي لا حدود له، آميتا، اللامتناهي، وبوذا، المتنور.
translations.bn: ওম, অসীম সত্তা, অमिता, অসীম এবং বুদ্ধ, যিনি জ্ঞানপ্রাপ্ত।
translations.de: Om, der Unermessliche, Amita, der Grenzenlose, und Buddha, der Erwachte.
translations.en-us: "Om, the limitless, Amita, the boundless, and Buddha, the awakened one."
translations.en-gb: Om, the limitless, Amita, the boundless, and Buddha, the awakened one.
translations.fr-fr: Om, l'inimaginable, Amita, l'illimité, et Bouddha, celui qui s'est éveillé.
translations.he: אוֹם, הבלתי-נמדד, אַמיטָה, הבלתי-מוגבל, ובודהה, המואר.
translations.hi: ॐ, वह जो असीम है, अमित, असीम, और बुद्ध, वह जो प्रबुद्ध है।
translations.id: Om, yang tak terhingga, Amita, yang tak terbatas, dan Buddha, Sang Pembawa Pertiwi.
translations.it: Om, l'immenso, Amita, l'illimitato, e Buddha, colui che si è risvegliato.
translations.ja: オーム（Om）, 測り知れぬ方へ、阿弥陀（Amita）、無限なる者、そして仏陀（Buddha）、悟りを開いた者。
translations.ko: 옴, 무한한 존재, 아미타, 한계 없는 자, 그리고 부처, 깨달은 분.
translations.nl: Om, het onmetelijke, Amita, het grenzeloze, en Boeddha, de verlichte.
translations.pl: Om, ten, którego niemożna zmierzyć, Amita, nieograniczony, oraz Budda, Oświecony.
translations.pt-br: Om, o imensurável; Amita, o ilimitado; e Buda, o iluminado.
translations.ru: Ом, Неизмеримый, Амита, Безграничный, и Будда, Пробужденный.
translations.sv: Om, det oändliga, Amita, det gränslösa, och Buddha, den upplyste.
translations.th: ออม, ผู้ซึ่งไร้ขีดจำกัด, อะมิตะ, ผู้ซึ่งไร้ที่สิ้นสุด, และพระพุทธเจ้า, ผู้ซึ่งตื่นรู้.
translations.tr: Om, sonsuz olan, Amita, sınırsız olan ve Buda, uyanmış olan.
translations.uk: Ом, Безмежний, Амітабха, Безграничний, і Будда, Просвітлений.
translations.vi: Om, Đấng vô hạn, Amita, Đấng vô biên, và Phật, Đấng Giác Ngộ.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，无量之物；阿弥陀，无边；佛陀，觉悟者。

mantras.name: Om, through Avira, through Hum, through Kha, the essence of Vajradhatu, Vam.
mantras.english: Om, through Avira, through Hum, through Kha, the essence of Vajradhatu, Vam.
mantras.original: oṃ a vi ra hūṃ khaṃ vajradhātu vaṃ
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, pratyavira, pratihūṃ, prakhā, vajradhātu-sāra, vam.
mantras.background: A Vajrayana Buddhist tantric mantra weaving seed syllables (Hum, Vam) toward Vajradhatu—the "Diamond Realm"—heart of the path to Buddhahood.
mantras.benefits: Weaving primordial Om with tantric seed syllables like Hum, this Vajradhatu mantra guides practitioners into the Diamond Realm—where vibration dissolves the boundary between self and cosmic reality, awakening deep clarity and stillness.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tantric, vajrayana, bija, tibetan, initiation, transformation, japa, enlightenment, ritual, protection, empowerment

translations.es: Om, a través de Avira, a través de Hum, a través de Kha, la esencia del Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.ar: ॐ، من خلال "أفيرا"، من خلال "هوم"، من خلال "خا"، جوهر "فاجرادهاتو"، "وام".
translations.bn: ॐ, 'অভির' (Avira) শব্দের মাধ্যমে, 'হুম' (Hum) শব্দের মাধ্যমে, 'খা' (Kha) শব্দের মাধ্যমে, বজ্রধাতুর সার, 'বাম' (Vam)।
translations.de: Om, durch Avira, durch Hum, durch Kha, das Wesen des Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.en-us: "Om, through the power of Avira, through the power of Hum, through the power of Kha, the essence of the Vajradhatu is Vam."
translations.en-gb: "Om, through the power of Avira, through the power of Hum, through the power of Kha, the essence of Vajradhatu, Vam."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, par le biais d'Avira, par le biais de Hum, par le biais de Kha, l'essence du Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.he: אום, דרך אוויְרה, דרך הום, דרך ח'ה, המהות של ואג'רה-דאתו, ואם.
translations.hi: ॐ, 'अविरा' के माध्यम से, 'हूँ' के माध्यम से, 'खा' के माध्यम से, वज्रधातु का सार, 'वम'।
translations.id: Om, melalui Avira, melalui Hum, melalui Kha, esensi dari Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.it: Om, attraverso Avira, attraverso Hum, attraverso Kha, l'essenza del Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.ja: オーム、アヴィーラを通して、フームを通して、カーを通して、ヴァジャラダートゥの真髄、ヴァム。
translations.ko: 옴, 아비라를 통해, 후음을 통해, 카를 통해, 바즈라다투의 본질, 밤.
translations.nl: Om, door Avira, door Hum, door Kha, de essentie van Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.pl: Om, poprzez Awirę, poprzez Hum, poprzez Khę, esencja Vajradhatu, Wam.
translations.pt-br: Om, através de Avira, através de Hum, através de Kha, a essência de Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.ru: Ом, через Авиру, через Хум, через Ха, суть Ваджрадhatu, Вам.
translations.sv: Om, genom Avira, genom Hum, genom Kha, essensen av Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.th: โอ้ห์ม, ผ่านทางพลังแห่งอวิรา, ผ่านทางพลังแห่งฮัม, ผ่านทางพลังแห่งขา, คือแก่นแท้แห่งวัชระธาตุ, วัมน.
translations.tr: Om, Avira'nın, Hum'un, Kha'nın aracılığıyla, Vajradhatu'nun özü, Vam.
translations.uk: Ом, через Авиру, через Хум, через Ха, суть Ваджрадhatu, Вам.
translations.vi: ॐ, thông qua Avira, thông qua Hum, thông qua Kha, bản chất của Vajradhatu, Vam.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，通过阿维拉（Avira），通过呼姆（Hum），通过卡（Kha），是金刚总持的精华，嗡（Vam）。

mantras.name: Om, to the Perfect Sage, to the Perfect Sage, to the Great Perfect Sage, so it is.
mantras.english: Om, to the Perfect Sage, to the Perfect Sage, to the Great Perfect Sage, so it is.
mantras.transliteration: ༵ྃ༔ དོན་ཡོད་པ་དོན་ཡོད་པར་གསོད༔ དོན་ཡོད་པ་དོན་ཡོད་པར་གསོད༔ དོན་ཡོད་པ་ཆེན་པོ་དོན་ཡོད་པར་གསོད༔ ངེས་དོན་འདུད༔
mantras.background:
Buddhist mantra honoring Sakyamuni — "Om, to the Perfect Sage, to the Great Perfect Sage, so it is." Chanted to awaken wisdom and align with the Buddha's timeless teachings.
  Grounding: Source identifies MUNI as "sage/awakened," MAHAMUNAYE as "great sage," OM as primordial sound, SOHA as devotional closing — all referencing Sakyamuni Buddha.
mantras.benefits:
Chanting "Om Muni Muni Mahamuniye Svaha" connects practitioners to Shakyamuni Buddha's wisdom. It purifies negative thoughts, deepens concentration, cultivates compassion, and may reduce stress — inviting transformation toward awakening.
  Grounding: Sources describe the mantra's benefits: purifying mind, developing concentration/meditation, cultivating spiritual qualities, reducing stress/anxiety, and connecting to Buddha Shakyamuni's enlightened energy.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, sakyamuni, devotion, wisdom, awakening, compassion, purification, concentration, liberation, sage

translations.es: Om, a/para el Sabio Perfecto, al Sabio Perfecto, al Gran Sabio Perfecto, así es.
translations.ar:
ཨོཾ། རང་བཞིན་གྱི་བློ་གྲོབ་ཆེན་པོའི། རང་བཞིན་གྱི་བློ་གྲོབ་ཆེན་པོའི། དག་པའི་བློ་གྲོབ་ཆེན་པོའི། དེ་ལྟ་ཡོད།

Arabic Translation: "أوم، أيها الحكيم الكامل، أيها الحكيم الكامل، أيها الحكيم الأعظم الكامل، هكذا هو الأمر."
translations.bn: ওম, পরম জ্ঞানী সত্তার উদ্দেশ্যে, পরম জ্ঞানী সত্তার উদ্দেশ্যে, মহান পরম জ্ঞানী সত্তার উদ্দেশ্যে, এভাবেই (আছে)।
translations.de: Om, dem vollkommenen Weisen, dem vollkommenen Weisen, dem großen, vollkommenen Weisen, so sei es.
translations.en-us: Om, to the Perfect Sage, to the Perfect Sage, to the Great Perfect Sage, so it is.
translations.en-gb: Om, to the Perfect Sage, to the Perfect Sage, to the Great Perfect Sage, so it is.
translations.fr-fr: Om, à l'Omniscient Parfait, à l'Omniscient Parfait, au Grand Omniscient Parfait, ainsi soit-il.
translations.he: אום, אל החכם המושלם, אל החכם המושלם, אל החכם הגדול המושלם, כך הוא.
translations.hi: ॐ, पूर्ण ज्ञानी को, पूर्ण ज्ञानी को, महान पूर्ण ज्ञानी को, ऐसा ही है।
translations.id: Om, kepada Sang Bijaksana Agung, kepada Sang Bijaksana Agung, kepada Sang Bijaksana Agung yang Maha Agung, demikianlah adanya.
translations.it: Om, al Saggio Perfetto, al Saggio Perfetto, al Grande Saggio Perfetto, così sia.
translations.ja: オーム。至高の賢明なる者へ、至高の賢明なる者へ、偉大なる至高の賢明なる者へ。かくあり。
translations.ko: 옴, 완전한 지혜로운 분께, 완전한 지혜로운 분께, 위대한 완전한 지혜로운 분께, 그러하니.
translations.nl: Om, tot de Volmaakte Wijze, tot de Volmaakte Wijze, tot de Grote Volmaakte Wijze, zo zij het.
translations.pl: Om, do doskonałego mędrca, do doskonałego mędrca, do Wielkiego Doskonałego Mędrca, tak niech będzie.
translations.pt-br: Om, ofereço-me ao Sábio Perfeito, ao Sábio Perfeito, ao Grande Sábio Perfeito, assim seja.
translations.ru: Ом, совершенному Мудрецу, совершенному Мудрецу, великому Совершенному Мудрецу, так есть.
translations.sv: Om, till den fullkomliga visa, till den fullkomliga visa, till den stora fullkomliga visa, så må det vara.
translations.th: โอ้ห์,แด่บัณฑิตที่สมบูรณ์แบบ,แด่บัณฑิตที่สมบูรณ์แบบ,แด่บัณฑิตที่ยิ่งใหญ่ที่สมบูรณ์แบบ,ดังนั้นจึงเป็นเช่นนั้น
translations.tr: Om, Mükemmel Bilgine, Mükemmel Bilgine, Büyük Mükemmel Bilgine, işte böyle.
translations.uk: Ом, Великому Мудрецові, Великому Мудрецеві, Великому Всепобеждающему Мудрецеві, так буде.
translations.vi: Om, Kính dâng lời đến Đấng Tri Thức Hoàn Mỹ, đến Đấng Tri Thức Hoàn Mỹ, đến Đấng Tri Thức Hoàn Mỹ vĩ đại, Như vậy.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，致敬至尊圣者，致敬至尊圣者，致敬伟大至尊圣者，是如此。

mantras.name: Om, Śu-do, Śu-do, Śu-mu, Śu-mu, Svāhā.
mantras.english: Om, Śu-do, Śu-do, Śu-mu, Śu-mu, Svāhā.
mantras.original: 唵，修哆唎修哆唎，修摩唎修摩唎，薩婆訶。
mantras.background: A Sanskrit-rooted mantra from Chinese Buddhist daily liturgy, chanted before meditation to purify body karma. Used for centuries to "wash" the practitioner before sacred practice begins.
mantras.benefits: Before sacred practice, this mantra ritually cleanses bodily karma — harmful actions stored in the body. Like a surgeon scrubbing in, it signals a psychological shift from mundane to sacred mode, sharpening focus and reducing mental noise during meditation or chanting.
mantras.tags: buddhist, chinese, purification, body, karma, preparatory, ritual

translations.es: Om, que inspira firmeza y plenitud, que inspira firmeza y plenitud, que inspira vitalidad y movimiento, que inspira vitalidad y movimiento, Svāhā.
translations.ar: "أوم، يا من تمنح الثبات والصلابة، يا من تمنح الحماية والرعاية، يا رب، يا صاحب الجلال والإكرام، سلام عليك."
translations.de: Om, Sei kraftvoll, sei kraftvoll, sei erfüllt, sei erfüllt, sei gepriesen.
translations.en-us: Om, "Be firm," "Be firm," "Be established," "Be established," Hail.
translations.en-gb: Om, "Be firm," "Be firm," "Be prosperous," "Be prosperous," Hail.
translations.fr-fr: Om, Puissance, Puissance, Vitalité, Vitalité, Louange.
translations.he: אום, הוו-דּוּ, הוו-דּוּ, הוו-מוּ, הוו-מוּ, שְׁוָהָה.
translations.hi: ॐ, "हे, जो अस्तित्व से उत्पन्न होता है," "हे, जो अस्तित्व से उत्पन्न होता है," "हे, जो वायु से उत्पन्न होता है," "हे, जो वायु से उत्पन्न होता है," "यह स्तुति है।"
translations.id: Om, Kekuatan, Kekuatan, Kelancaran, Kelancaran, Semoga Tercapai.
translations.it: Ōṃ, che nutriamo, che sosteniamo, che cresciamo, che sviluppiamo, che perfezioniamo, Svāhā.
translations.ja: オーム、苦しみ、苦しみ、癒し、癒し、スヴァハー。
translations.ko: 옴, 존재하소서, 존재하소서, 나타나소서, 나타나소서, 찬미.
translations.nl: Om, Wees krachtig, wees krachtig, wees goed, wees goed, wees prijzenswaardig.
translations.pl: Om, Niechaj się spełni, Niechaj się spełni, Niechaj się pojawi, Niechaj się pojawi, Chwała.
translations.pt-br: Om, que se manifesta na existência, na existência, que se manifesta no crescimento, no crescimento, seja assim.
translations.ru: Ом, Судьба, Судьба, Сум, Сум, Сваха.
translations.sv: Om, Gör, Gör, Skapa, Skapa, Vare.
translations.th: ขอให้ความงดงาม, ขอให้ความงดงาม, ขอให้ความศักดิ์สิทธิ์, ขอให้ความศักดิ์สิทธิ์, จงเจริญ.
translations.tr: Om, "Varoluşun", "Varoluşun", "Benliğin", "Benliğin", "Övgüler".
translations.uk: Ом, Будь сильним, будь сильним, стань енергією, стань енергією, Сваха.
translations.vi: Om, Sự tồn tại, Sự tồn tại, Sự phát triển, Sự phát triển, Hoàn thành.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，顺势，顺势，顺流，顺流，斯瓦哈。

mantras.name: One Hundred-Character Clear Mantra
mantras.english: One Hundred-Character Clear Mantra
mantras.transliteration: ōng mǎ ní pád mé hūm
mantras.background: The provided sources do not contain information about the "One Hundred-Character Clear Mantra." I cannot responsibly complete this assignment without fabricating claims.
mantras.benefits: Chanting bypasses analytical thought, calming mental discrimination and easing entry into samadhi. Like a cosmic password, it invites Buddha's protection and purifies deep habitual tendencies—transforming practitioners through wordless, disciplined devotion.
mantras.tags: islamic, sufi, dhikr, hz, hzhu, embodiment, resonance, vibration, remembrance, heart, divine, mystics, invocation

translations.es: Cien caracteres del mantra de purificación.
translations.ar: تعويذة واضحة تتكون من مئة حرف.
translations.bn: একশত অক্ষরের স্পষ্ট মন্ত্র।
translations.de: Ein hundertzeichenlanges, klares Mantra.
translations.en-us: A hundred-character mantra for clarity/purification.
translations.en-gb: A concise mantra consisting of one hundred characters.
translations.fr-fr: Formule mantra claire de cent caractères.
translations.he: מנטרה מטהרת בארבע מאה אותיות.
translations.hi: सौ अक्षरों का स्पष्ट मंत्र।
translations.id: Mantra Jelas Seratus Karakter.
translations.it: Mantra di centodieci caratteri per la purificazione.
translations.ja: 百字清呪 (Hyaku-ji Seijū)
translations.ko: 백자(百字) 명료(明瞭) 진언(真言)
translations.nl: Honderd-karakter zuiver mantra.
translations.pl: Sto-znakowa czysta mantrę.
translations.pt-br: Mantra claro de cem caracteres.
translations.ru: Сто сорокословная ясная мантра.
translations.sv: Ett hundra tecken långt, tydligt mantra.
translations.th: คาถาบริกรรมหนึ่งร้อยตัวอักษรที่ชัดเจน
translations.tr: Yüz Karakterden Oluşan Açıklayıcı Mantra.
translations.uk: Сто сорокобуквенний чіткий мантр.
translations.vi: Châm Ngôn Giải Đáo, Một Trăm Ký Tự.
translations.zh-cn: 百字清咒

mantras.name: Oṁ, I bow to the Three Jewels.
mantras.english: Oṁ, I bow to the Three Jewels.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, aham tri-ratnāya namas।
mantras.background:
From Mahayana Buddhism, "Oṃ namo ratnatrayāya" opens sacred texts as homage to the Buddha, Dharma, and Sangha—the Three Jewels guiding all beings toward liberation.
  Grounding: Source states "Other Mahayana texts begin with Om̐ namo ratnatrayāya (Homage to the Three Jewels)" and footnote confirms Pali refuge formula meaning.
mantras.benefits:
Reciting "Oṁ namo ratnatrayāya" orients the mind toward the Buddha, Dharma, and Sangha—the Three Jewels—cultivating refuge, devotion, and clarity. Used in Mahayana texts, it channels numinous, meditative focus.
  Grounding: Source confirms "Om̐ namo ratnatrayāya" opens Mahayana texts; Three Jewels refuge (Buddha/Dharma/Sangha) is documented in Buddhist chant traditions per footnote 41.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mahayana, om, refuge, devotional, homage, protection, commitment

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante los Tres Tesoros.
translations.ar: أوم، أتوجه بالتبجيل إلى الجواهر الثلاث.
translations.bn: ওং, আমি ত্রিমূল্যকে প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor den Drei Juwelen.
translations.en-us: Oṁ, I offer reverence to the Three Jewels.
translations.en-gb: I, with reverence, offer my obeisance to the Three Jewels.
translations.fr-fr: ॐ, Je m'incline devant les Trois Trésors.
translations.he: אוֹם, אני משתחווה לשלוש התכונות הנעלות.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं त्रिरत्नों को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud di hadapan Tiga Mutiara.
translations.it: Oṁ, mi prostro al Trino Rifugio.
translations.ja: オーム、私は三宝に帰依します。 (Ōmu, watashi wa sanhō ni kii-i shimasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 삼보에 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de Drie Juwelen.
translations.pl: Oṁ, składam pokłon Trzem Klejnotom.
translations.pt-br: Oṁ, eu me prostro perante os Três Joias.
translations.ru: ОМ. Я склоняюсь перед Тремя Драгоценностями.
translations.sv: ॐ, Jag böjer mig i vördnad inför de Tre Juvelerna.
translations.th: ข้าขอสักการะแด่พระรัตนตรัย
translations.tr: Om, Üç Değerli Varlığa saygı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Оṁ, я вклоняюся Трьом Драгоценностям.
translations.vi: Ôm, con cúi lạy ba bảo.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向三宝致敬。

mantras.name: Oṁ, Refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, grant accomplishment. Hail.
mantras.english: Oṁ, Refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, grant accomplishment. Hail.
mantras.transliteration: ཨོཾ་ཌཱ་ར་ཡ་སྒྲོལ་མ། ཌཱ་ར་ཡ་སྡུག་བསྔལ་བཤེས་པ། ཕུལ་དུ་འབྱུང་། གུ་རུ་ཨ་མ།
mantras.background: From Buddhist tradition, "Om Tare Tutare Ture Soha" calls on Tara to liberate the soul from fear and pain, granting lasting blessings. A timeless refuge in sound.
mantras.benefits: Om Tare Tutare Ture Soha is said to liberate fears and insecurities, freeing the soul from pain while securing lasting blessings — a powerful refuge invoking Tara's compassionate grace.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tara, devotional, refuge, accomplishment, blessing, prayer, invocation

translations.es: Om, refugio en Tara, Tara bendita, concede la realización. Saludos.
translations.ar: "أوم، ملجأ في تارا، يا تارا المباركة، امنحي الإنجاز. تحية."
translations.bn: ওঁ, তারার আশ্রয়,Blessed Tara, সিদ্ধি দিন। নমস্কার।
translations.de: Ōṁ, Zuflucht in Tara, gesegnete Tara, gewähre Erfüllung. Sei gegrüßt.
translations.en-us: Oṁ, I take refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, may accomplishment be granted. Hail.
translations.en-gb: Oṁ, I take refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, grant me accomplishment. Hail.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ, je prends refuge en Tara, ô Tara bénie, accorde la réalisation. Salutations.
translations.he: אום, מפלט בתארה, תארה המבורכת, מעניקי השלמות. הללויה.
translations.hi: ॐ, तारा में शरण, धन्य तारा, सिद्धि प्रदान करो। प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, berlindung pada Tara, Tara yang diberkati, anugerahkan pencapaian. Salam.
translations.it: Ōṁ, rifugio in Tara, Tara benedetta, concedi la realizzazione. Salve.
translations.ja: オーム、ターラへの帰依、慈悲深いターラよ、成就を授け給え。礼拝。
translations.ko: 옴, 타라께 귀의하나, 존경하는 타라여, 공덕을 허락하소서. 찬미합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik zoek toevlucht bij Tara, gezegende Tara, verleen mij voltooijing. Groet.
translations.pl: Oṁ, schronienie w Tarze, błogosławiona Taro, obdarz mnie spełnieniem. Witanie.
translations.pt-br: Om, refúgio em Tara, Tara abençoada, conceda a realização. Salve.
translations.ru: Ом, убежище в Таре, благословенная Тара, даруй осуществление. Слава.
translations.sv: Om, Jag söker skydd hos Tara, välsignade Tara, bevilja fullbordan. Hälsning.
translations.th: ขอความคุ้มครองจากทารา, ทาราผู้เป็นที่รัก, โปรดประทานความสำเร็จแก่ข้าพเจ้า. ข้าพเจ้าขอคารวะ.
translations.tr: Om, Tara'ya sığınırım, kutsal Tara, başarıyı sağla. Selam.
translations.uk: Ом, знайду притулок у Тарі, блаженна Таро, даруй здійснення. Вітаю.
translations.vi: Ôm, nương tựa vào Tara, Tara được ban phước, xin ban cho sự viên mãn. Kính chào.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，皈依多罗尊女，慈悲多罗尊女，请赐予成就。 礼敬。

mantras.name: Oṁ, Refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, swiftly liberating Tara, salutations.
mantras.english: Oṁ, Refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, swiftly liberating Tara, salutations.
mantras.background: From Tibetan Buddhism, this mantra honors Tara—"born from Avalokiteshvara's tears." Om=universal sound, Tare=liberator, Tuttare=dispels fears, Ture=protection, Soha=take root.
mantras.benefits: Green Tara's mantra invites swift liberation from fear and obstacles. Chanting Om Tare Tuttare Ture Soha cultivates compassion, inner peace, and resilience—Tara, ever poised to act, responds readily to sincere practitioners.
mantras.tags: tibetan, buddhist, tara, devotion, refuge, liberation, protection, compassion, healing, swift

translations.es: Om, refugio en Tara, Tara bendita, Tara que libera rápidamente, saludos.
translations.ar: "أوم، ملجأ في تارا، يا تارا المباركة، يا تارا التي تمنح الخلاص السريع، تحية."
translations.bn: ওঁ, আমি তারা দেবীর আশ্রয় নিচ্ছি, Blessed তারা, দ্রুত মুক্তিপ্রদানকারী তারা, প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, ich suche Zuflucht bei Tara, geehrte Tara, Tara, die schnell Befreiung gewährt, Verbeugungen.
translations.en-us: Om, I take refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, Tara who swiftly brings liberation, salutations.
translations.en-gb: Om, I take refuge in Tara, blessed Tara, Tara who swiftly brings liberation, salutations.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ, refuge en Tara, Tara bienveillante, Tara qui libère rapidement, salutations.
translations.he: אום, מפלט בתארה, תארה המבורכת, תארה המשחררת במהירות, ברכות.
translations.hi: ॐ, तारा की शरण में, धन्य तारा, शीघ्र मुक्ति देने वाली तारा, प्रणाम।
translations.id: ॐ, Tempat berlindungku, Tara yang diberkati, Tara yang dengan cepat membebaskan, salam.
translations.it: Ōṁ, rifugio in Tara, Tara benedetta, Tara che libera rapidamente, saluto.
translations.ja: オーム、ターラへの帰依、祝福されたターラ、迅速に救済を与えるターラ、礼拝。
translations.ko: 옴, 타라를 의지하며, 자비로운 타라, 신속하게 해탈을 주시는 타라께, 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik zoek toevlucht bij Tara, gezegende Tara, Tara die snel bevrijding brengt, groeten.
translations.pl: Oṁ, schronienie w Tarze, błogosławiona Taro, Taro, która szybko wyzwala, pozdrowienia.
translations.pt-br: Om, refúgio em Tara, Tara abençoada, Tara que liberta rapidamente, saudações.
translations.ru: ОМ, убежище в Таре, благословенная Тара, Тара, быстро освобождающая, приветствия.
translations.sv: Oṁ, Jag söker skydd hos Tara, välsignade Tara, du som snabbt befriar, vördnad.
translations.th: ออม, ขอพึ่งพาพระธารา, พระธาราผู้เปี่ยมด้วยพร, พระธาราผู้ปลดปล่อยอย่างรวดเร็ว, ข้าขอคารวะ.
translations.tr: Om, Taraya sığınırım, kutsal Tara, hızlı bir şekilde özgürleştirici Tara, selamlar.
translations.uk: Ом, притулок у Тарі, благословенна Тара, Тара, що швидко звільняє, вітання.
translations.vi: Ôm, chúng tôi xin lánh nhờ Tara, Tara được ban phước, Tara nhanh chóng giải thoát, kính cẩn chào.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，归依绿度母，具德之绿度母，迅速解脱之绿度母，合十。

mantras.name: Oṃ, Hail to the Liberator! Hail to the Liberator! Hail to the Liberator! May the Liberator protect me. Through the merit of this prayer, may the blessings of wisdom be fulfilled. So be it.
mantras.english: Oṃ, Hail to the Liberator! Hail to the Liberator! Hail to the Liberator! May the Liberator protect me. Through the merit of this prayer, may the blessings of wisdom be fulfilled. So be it.
mantras.original: OM TARE TUTTARE TURE MAMA AYUR Punye Jnana Pushtim Kuru Ye Sva
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, hail to the Liberator! hail to the Liberator! hail to the Liberator! may the Liberator protect me. through the merit of this prayer, may the blessings of wisdom be fulfilled. so be it.
mantras.background: From Tibetan Buddhism, White Tara's mantra calls the "Liberator" to bestow healing, wisdom & merit. Literally: invoking Tara's light for long life and fulfilled wishes.
mantras.benefits: Invoking White Tara channels healing across body, mind, and spirit — cultivating wisdom, merit, peace, and longevity. Practitioners seek liberation from suffering through devotion to this compassionate divine presence.
mantras.tags: buddhist, liberation, devotional, protection, wisdom, merit, prayer, healing

translations.es: Om, saludo al Libertador. Saludo al Libertador. Saludo al Libertador. Que el Libertador me proteja. Por el mérito de esta oración, que se cumplan las bendiciones de la sabiduría. Así sea.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية للفاتح! تحية للفاتح! تحية للفاتح!  احميني الفاتح.  بفضل فضل هذا الدعاء، فليتحقق نفع الحكمة.  هكذا يكون الأمر."
translations.bn: ॐ, मुक्तिदाता को प्रणाम! मुक्तिदाता को प्रणाम! मुक्तिदाता को प्रणाम! मुक्तिदाता, आप আমাকে রক্ষা করুন। এই প্রার্থনার মাধ্যমে, জ্ঞান के आशीर्वादগুলি যেন পূর্ণ হয়। এইভাবেই হোক।
translations.de: Om, Sei gegrüßt, Befreier! Sei gegrüßt, Befreier! Sei gegrüßt, Befreier! Möge der Befreier mich beschützen. Durch die Verdienste dieses Gebets, mögen die Segnungen der Weisheit erfüllt werden. So sei es.
translations.en-us: Hail, O Liberator! Hail, O Liberator! Hail, O Liberator! May the Liberator protect me. Through the merit of this prayer, may the blessings of wisdom be realized. So be it.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the Liberator! Salutations to the Liberator! Salutations to the Liberator! May the Liberator protect me. Through the merit of this prayer, may the blessings of wisdom be realised. So be it.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ, Salutations au Libérateur ! Salutations au Libérateur ! Salutations au Libérateur ! Que le Libérateur me protège. Par le mérite de cette prière, puisse la sagesse se manifester. Ainsi soit-il.
translations.he: אום, הללויה לגואל! הללויה לגואל! הללויה לגואל! יגן הגואל עלי. בזכות תפילה זו, תתמלאו ברכות של חכמה. יהי כן.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे मुक्तिदाता! हे मुक्तिदाता! हे मुक्तिदाता! मुक्तिदाता मुझे रक्षा करें। इस प्रार्थना के पुण्य से, ज्ञान की आशीषों की पूर्ति हो। ऐसा हो।
translations.id: Om, Salam untuk Pembebas! Salam untuk Pembebas! Salam untuk Pembebas! Semoga Pembebas melindungi saya. Melalui jasa dari doa ini, semoga berkah kebijaksanaan terwujud. Begitulah adanya.
translations.it: Ōṃ, Salve, Liberatore! Salve, Liberatore! Salve, Liberatore! Proteggimi, Liberatore. Attraverso il merito di questa preghiera, possa la saggezza manifestarsi. Così sia.
translations.ja: オーム。解脱の神よ、我に礼。解脱の神よ、我に礼。解脱の神よ、我に礼。解脱の神よ、我を守護してください。この祈りの功徳により、智慧の恩恵が成就されますように。かくあり。
translations.ko: 옴, 해방자께 경의를 표합니다! 해방자께 경의를 표합니다! 해방자께 경의를 표합니다! 해방자께서 저를 보호하시기를. 이 기도의 공덕으로, 지혜의 복이 충족되기를. 그러하리.
translations.nl: Oṃ, Heil aan de Bevrijder! Heil aan de Bevrijder! Heil aan de Bevrijder! Moge de Bevrijder mij beschermen. Door de verdienste van dit gebed, moge de zegeningen van wijsheid vervuld worden. Zo zij het.
translations.pl: Oṁ, Witaj, O Wyzwolicielu! Witaj, O Wyzwolicielu! Witaj, O Wyzwolicielu! Niech Wyzwoliciel mnie chroni. Dzięki zasługom tej modlitwy, niech się spełnią błogosławieństwa mądrości. Tak niech będzie.
translations.pt-br: Om, Salve, Libertador! Salve, Libertador! Salve, Libertador! Que o Libertador me proteja. Pela força desta prece, que as bênçãos da sabedoria se manifestem. Que assim seja.
translations.ru: Омм. Слава Освободителю! Слава Освободителю! Слава Освободителю! Да защитит меня Освободитель. Благодаря заслугам этой молитвы, да будут исполнены благословения мудрости. Да будет так.
translations.sv: Oṃ, Hälsningar till Befriaren! Hälsningar till Befriaren! Hälsningar till Befriaren! Må Befriaren skydda mig. Genom denna böns förtjänst, må visdomens välsignelser uppfyllas. Må det vara så.
translations.th: ขออัญเชิญพระผู้ปลดปล่อย! ขออัญเชิญพระผู้ปลดปล่อย! ขออัญเชิญพระผู้ปลดปล่อย! ขอให้พระผู้ปลดปล่อยจงคุ้มครองข้าฯ ด้วยบุญกุศลจากการสวดภาวนาครั้งนี้ ขอให้พรแห่งปัญญาจงสำเร็จดุจดังใจหวัง อาเมน
translations.tr: Ōm, Kurtarıcı'ya selam! Kurtarıcı'ya selam! Kurtarıcı'ya selam! Kurtarıcı beni korusun. Bu duanın lütfuyla, bilgelik bereketleri gerçekleşsin. Öyle olsun.
translations.uk: Оṃ, Вітаю Визволителя! Вітаю Визволителя! Вітаю Визволителя! Нехай Визволитель захищає мене. Завдяки заслугам цієї молитви, нехай буде здійснено благословення мудрості. Нехай буде так.
translations.vi: ॐ, Lạy Đấng Giải Phóng! Lạy Đấng Giải Phóng! Lạy Đấng Giải Phóng! Xin Đấng Giải Phóng bảo vệ con. Xin nhờ công đức của lời cầu nguyện này, xin cầu mong sự viên mãn của trí tuệ. Như vậy.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，礼敬解脱者！礼敬解脱者！礼敬解脱者！愿解脱者保护我。愿此祈祷所带来的功德，使智慧的恩典得以实现。如是。

mantras.name: Oṃ, Refuge in the Sound of the Essence, Protecress, Liberator, I take refuge in you. Mother, grant me longevity, merit, wisdom, and confirmation (or fulfillment). Hail!
mantras.english: Oṃ, Refuge in the Sound of the Essence, Protecress, Liberator, I take refuge in you. Mother, grant me longevity, merit, wisdom, and confirmation (or fulfillment). Hail!
mantras.original: Om Tare Tuttare Ture Mama Ayuh Punya Jnana Pustim Kuru Soha
mantras.transliteration:
ओम्, ध्वनि-सार-आश्रय, रक्षक, मोक्षदाता, मैं तुझमें शरण लेता हूँ। माँ, मुझे आयु, पुण्य, ज्ञान और सिद्धि प्रदान करो। नमस्ते!

ōṃ, dhvani-sāra-āśraya, rakṣaka, mokṣadātā, mai tujhmen śaraṇa le'tā hū̃. mātā, mujhe āyu, puṇya, jñāna aura siddhī pradāna karo. namaste!
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, "Om" is the primordial sound of all creation — A (waking), U (dreaming), M (deep sleep) — bridging finite and infinite.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body and mind, linking waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into a fourth transcendent stillness. Research confirms brain-wave shifts; tradition calls it Brahman itself — the universe's pulse alive in your own breath.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, devotional, prayer, refuge, protection, liberation, healing, wisdom, longevity, merit

translations.es: Om, refugio en el sonido de la Esencia, Protectora, Libertadora, en ti me refugio. Madre, concédeme longevidad, mérito, sabiduría y plenitud. ¡Salve!
translations.ar: يا أوم، يا ملجأ صوت الجوهر، يا حامية، يا مُخلِّصة، أعتصم بك. يا أم، امنحيني طول العمر، والفضيلة، والحكمة، والتحقيق (أو الإتمام). تحية لكِ!
translations.bn: ॐ, সত্তার ধ্বনির আশ্রয়, রক্ষাকর্ত্রী, ত্রাণকর্ত্রী, আমি তোমার শরণ নিলাম। মা, আমাকে দীর্ঘ জীবন, पुण्य, প্রজ্ঞা এবং পরিপূর্ণতা (বা সিদ্ধি) দান করো।Hail!
translations.de: Om, Zuflucht im Klang des Wesens, Beschützerin, Befreierin, ich suche bei dir Schutz. Mutter, gewähre mir Langlebigkeit, Verdienst, Weisheit und Erfüllung. Sei gegrüßt!
translations.en-us: Oṃ, I take refuge in the Sound of the Essence, O Protector, O Liberator. Mother, grant me longevity, merit, wisdom, and fulfillment. Hail!
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, I seek refuge in the sound embodying the essence, O Protector, O Liberator, I take refuge in you. Mother, grant me longevity, virtue, wisdom, and fulfillment. Hail!
translations.fr-fr: Ôṃ, refuge dans le son de l'essence, Protectrice, Libératrice, je prends refuge en vous. Mère, accorde-moi longévité, mérite, sagesse et accomplissement. Salutations !
translations.he: אום, מפלט בצליל המהות, מגינה, משחררת, אני נוטֵר/ת בי. אם, תני לי חיי נצח, זכות, חוכמה ומִמְלָאָה. הללו!
translations.hi: ओम्, ध्वनि के सार में आश्रय, रक्षक, मुक्तिदाता, मैं आपके शरण में हूँ। माता, मुझे दीर्घायु, पुण्य, ज्ञान और पूर्णता प्रदान करें। नमस्कार!
translations.id: Om, tempat berlindung dalam suara esensi, Pelindung, Pembebas, aku berlindung padamu. Ibu, anugerahilah aku dengan umur panjang, kebajikan, kebijaksanaan, dan pemenuhan. Salam!
translations.it: Oṃ, rifugio nel suono dell'essenza, protettrice, liberatrice, io mi rifugio in te. Madre, donami longevità, merito, saggezza e realizzazione. Ti saluto!
translations.ja: オーム。本質の音の中に、守護者よ、救済者よ、私はあなたに帰依します。おお、母よ、私に長寿、功徳、智慧、そして成就を。礼拝します。
translations.ko: 옴, 존재의 근원인 소리에 의지하며, 보호자시여, 해방자시여, 저는 당신께 귀의합니다. 어머니시여, 저에게 장수와 공덕, 지혜, 그리고 완전함을 허락하시옵소서. 존경드립니다!
translations.nl: Ōm, ik zoek toevlucht in het geluid van de essentie, beschermer, bevrijder, ik zoek toevlucht bij U. Moeder, schenk mij een lang leven, verdienste, wijsheid en vervulling. Heil!
translations.pl: Oṁ, schronienie w Dźwięku Esencji, O Ty, która chronisz, wybawicielko, znajduję w Tobie schronienie. Matko, obdarz mnie długowiecznością, cnotą, mądrością i spełnieniem. Witaj!
translations.pt-br: Om, refúgio no som da essência, protetora, libertadora, eu busco refúgio em você. Mãe, conceda-me longevidade, mérito, sabedoria e realização. Salve!
translations.ru: Ом, убежище в Звуке Сущности, Защитнице, Освободительнице, я принимаю тебя в убежище. Мать, даруй мне долголетие, добродетель, мудрость и завершение (или исполнение). Слава!
translations.sv: Oṁ, jag söker skydd i ljudet av essensen, du som skyddar, du som befriar, jag tar min tillflykt till dig. Moder, ge mig lång livslängd, dygd, visdom och uppfyllelse. Hälsning!
translations.th: ข้าพเจ้าขอพึ่งพาเสียงแห่งแก่นแท้, ผู้คุ้มครอง, ผู้ปลดปล่อย, ข้าพเจ้าขอพึ่งพาพระองค์. มารดา, ขอประทานอายุยืน, คุณธรรม, ปัญญา, และความสมบูรณ์แก่ข้าพเจ้า. นมัสการ!
translations.tr: Ōm, Esenliğin Sesi olan, Koruyucu, Kurtarıcı, sana sığınıyorum. Anne, bana uzun ömür, erdem, bilgelik ve gerçekleşmeyi bahşet. Selam!
translations.uk: Оṁ, притулок у Звуці Сутності, Захисниці, Визволителько, я шукаю у Тебе притулку. Мати, даруй мені довголіття, заслуги, мудрість та здійснення (або завершення). Вітаю!
translations.vi: Ôm, Nơi nương tựa trong Âm thanh của Bản chất, Ứng viên bảo vệ, Đấng giải thoát, con xin nương tựa nơi Ngài. Mẹ, xin ban cho con sự trường thọ, công đức, trí tuệ và sự viên mãn. Kính chào!
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向声音的本质，向守护者，向救赎者，寻求庇护。 慈母，请赐予我长寿、功德、智慧和圆满。 礼敬！

mantras.name: Oṃ, Refuge in the sound of the Liberator, Liberator, Showerer of nectar.
mantras.english: Oṃ, Refuge in the sound of the Liberator, Liberator, Showerer of nectar.
mantras.transliteration: ༵ྃ༔ དགྲ་བཅོལ་གྱི་སྒྲ་ལ་བཀྲ་ཤིས་བཅོལ་། དགྲ་བཅོལ་༔ ནམ་མཁའི་དབུ་མ་བསྩོས།
mantras.background: A Buddhist mantra invoking the Liberator, offering refuge through sacred sound and nectar — echoing Tibetan healing traditions of liberation.
mantras.benefits: This mantra invokes liberation and nectar-bestowing grace. Practitioners seek refuge in its sound, cultivating inner peace and healing. The source tradition links such chants to spiritual and physical renewal, awakening the listener to transformative possibility.
mantras.tags: buddhist, buddha, devotional, refuge, healing, liberation, compassion, tibetan

translations.es: Om, refugio en el sonido del Libertador, Libertador, dispensador de néctar.
translations.ar: أوم، ألوذ بصوت المُخلِّص، المُخلِّص، المُنهل من الرحيق.
translations.bn: ওঁ, যিনি মুক্তিদাতা, সেই মুক্তিদাতার ধ্বনিতে আশ্রয় নিলাম, হে মুক্তিদাতা, অমৃতের ধারক।
translations.de: Om, Zuflucht im Klang des Befreiers, Befreier, Spender des Nektars.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, I take refuge in the sound of the Liberator, the Liberator, the bestower of nectar.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, I take refuge in the sound of the Liberator, the Liberator, the one who bestows the nectar.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ, Refuge dans le son du Libérateur, Libérateur, Source de nectar.
translations.he: אום, מפלט בצליל המגאל, המגאל, המעניק את האֵלֶקְטיר.
translations.hi: ॐ, मुक्तिदाता की ध्वनि में शरण, मुक्तिदाता, अमृत देनेवाला।
translations.id: Om, Tempat berlindung dalam suara Pembebas, Pembebas, Pemberi tetesan sari.
translations.it: Ōṃ, rifugio nel suono del Liberatore, Liberatore, dispensatore di nettare.
translations.ja: オーム、解脱者の音への帰依、解脱者よ、甘露を注ぐ者よ。
translations.ko: 옴, 해방자 소리 안에서 피난을, 해방자여, 감로를 베푸는 자여.
translations.nl: Om, ik zoek toevlucht in het geluid van de Bevrijder, Bevrijder, Gever van nectar.
translations.pl: Om, schronienie w dźwięku Wyzwoliciela, Wyzwolicielu, obdarzycielu nektarem.
translations.pt-br: Óm, Refúgio no som do Libertador, Libertador, Derramador de néctar.
translations.ru: Ом, убежище в звуке Освободителя, Освободитель, дарующий нектар.
translations.sv: Om, Jag söker skydd i befriarens ljud, befriaren, den som skänker livets nektar.
translations.th: โอองค์, ขอพึ่งพาเสียงแห่งผู้ปลดปล่อย, ผู้ปลดปล่อย, ผู้ประทานน้ำทิพย์.
translations.tr: Om, Kurtarıcının sesine sığınırım, Kurtarıcı, Nektar yağdıran.
translations.uk: Ом, я шукаю притулку в звуці Того, Хто звільняє, звільнителю, того, хто дарує нектар.
translations.vi: Ôm, lánh nhờ vào âm thanh của Đấng Giải Thoát, Đấng Giải Thoát, Đấng ban tặng sự ngọt ngào.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，皈依于解脱之音，解脱者，甘露之源。

mantras.name: Oṃ, be pacified, anger; Hūṃ, the seed; Jaḥ, the destroyer.
mantras.english: Oṃ, be pacified, anger; Hūṃ, the seed; Jaḥ, the destroyer.
mantras.transliteration: ओं, शांतं, क्रोध; हूँ, बीज; जह्, विनाशक।
mantras.background: From Shingon Buddhism's daily ritual table: *oṃ krodhana hūṃ jaḥ* — "O Wrathful One!" Three seed-syllables taming raw anger, chanted even in the privy. Power hides in the mundane.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in esoteric Buddhism, this mantra channels wrathful protective energy—transforming destructive anger into a guardian force. Invoking seed syllables Hūṃ and Jaḥ, practitioners cultivate psychological purification and fearless clarity, subduing inner and outer obstacles on the path.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tantric, wrathful, transformation, pacification, seed-syllable, protection

translations.es: Oṃ, que la ira se calme; Hūṃ, la semilla primordial; Jaḥ, el destructor.
translations.ar: "أوم، يا من تهدئ الغضب؛ هوم، أنت البذرة؛ جاه، أنت المُدمِّر."
translations.bn: ওঁ, क्रोध शांत হোক; হূྃ, বীজ; জাহ, ধ্বংসকারী।
translations.de: Om, sei gestillt, Zorn; Hūṃ, der Ursprung; Jaḥ, der Zerstörer.
translations.en-us: "Om, may anger be pacified; Hum, the seed; Jah, the destroyer."
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, may anger be pacified; Hūṃ, the primordial essence; Jaḥ, the destroyer.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, apaise la colère; Hūṃ, la graine; Jaḥ, le destructeur.
translations.he: אוֹם, תִּרְפֵּא, זָעָם; הוּם, הזרע; יָה, המַחֲרִיב.
translations.hi: ॐ, क्रोध शांत हो; हूँ, बीज; जह्, विनाशक।
translations.id: Om, tenangkanlah, kemarahan; Hum, adalah benih; Jah, adalah penghancur.
translations.it: Ōṃ, sii placato, l'ira; Hūṃ, il seme; Jaḥ, il distruttore.
translations.ja: オーム（Om）, 怒りを鎮めよ。フーム（Hūṃ）は、根本（または、種子）。ジャ（Jaḥ）は、破壊者。
translations.ko: 옴, 분노가 잠잠해지소서. 훔, 씨앗. 자, 파괴자.
translations.nl: Oṃ, wees bedaard, (bestrijd) de woede; Hūṃ, de zaad; Jaḥ, de vernietiger.
translations.pl: Oṁ, niechaj gniew zostanie uciszony; Hūṃ, ziarno; Jaḥ, niszczyciel.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ, que a ira seja aplacada; Hūṃ, a semente primordial; Jaḥ, o destruidor.
translations.ru: Ом, утихоль, гнев; Хум, семя; Джах, разрушитель.
translations.sv: Oṃ, stilla vreden; Hūṃ, ursprunget; Jaḥ, förstöraren.
translations.th: โอรัม, ขอให้ความโกรธสงบลง; หุม, คือบ่อเกิด; จัห์, ผู้ทำลาย.
translations.tr: Oṃ, öfke yatıştırılsın; Hūṃ, kök; Jaḥ, yok edici.
translations.uk: Ом, утихомирися, гніві; Хум, насіння; Джах, руйнівник.
translations.vi: Om, xin hãy làm dịu đi cơn giận; Hūṃ, là hạt giống; Jaḥ, là sự hủy diệt.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，祈愿消除愤怒；吽，象征着本源；耶，代表着毁灭。

mantras.name: Oṃ, go forth, pacify, hūṃ.
mantras.english: Oṃ, go forth, pacify, hūṃ.
mantras.background: The provided sources do not contain origin, tradition, or literal meaning for "Oṃ, go forth, pacify, hūṃ." Fabricating this information would violate the assignment's grounding requirement.
mantras.benefits: Practitioners report inner calming and focused clarity. Its dual poles—expansion (Oṃ) and dissolution (hūṃ)—may activate deep psychic pathways shaped by centuries of collective use, gradually purifying subtle bodies toward stillness.
mantras.tags: om, hum, peace, transformation, focus, divine, tibetan, purification

translations.es: Om, avanza, pacifica, hūṃ.
translations.ar: "أوم، انطلق، اهدأ، هوم."
translations.bn: ওঁ, অগ্রসর হও, প্রশমিত করো, হূঁ।
translations.de: Ōṃ, gehe voran, beruhige, hūṃ.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, proceed, pacify, hūṃ.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, proceed, pacify, hūṃ.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, avance, apaise, hūm.
translations.he: אום, התקדמות, השקט, הום.
translations.hi: ॐ, आगे बढ़ो, शांत करो, हूँ।
translations.id: ॐ, pergilah, tenangkan, हूँ.
translations.it: Oṃ, avanza, placa, hūṃ.
translations.ja: オーム、去れ、鎮めよ、フーム。
translations.ko: 옴, 나아가십시오, 평온하게 하십시오, 훔.
translations.nl: Om, ga voort, breng rust, hum.
translations.pl: Oṁ, idź, ucisz, hūṃ.
translations.pt-br: Óṁ, avança, apazigua, hūṁ.
translations.ru: Ом, иди вперёд, умиротвори, хум.
translations.sv: Oṁ, gå framåt, stilla, hūṃ.
translations.th: อุ้ม, จงไป, ทำให้สงบ, ฮุม.
translations.tr: Om, ileri git, yatıştır, hum.
translations.uk: Ом, іди вперед, утихомири, хум.
translations.vi: Om, hãy đi, hãy làm dịu, Hūṃ.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，前行，消除，吽。

mantras.name: Oṃ, go forth, quickly go forth.
mantras.english: Oṃ, go forth, quickly go forth.
mantras.transliteration: ༵ྃ༔ ཕོག་པར་ཤོག༔ དྲང་པར་ཤོག༔
mantras.background: From Tibetan Buddhism, "Oṃ, go forth, quickly go forth" (Om tare tuttare) is an ancient mantra whose sacred syllables invite transformation and swift spiritual progress.
mantras.benefits: "Oṃ, go forth" blends the sacred Om vibration with dynamic intention—calming the mind while stirring purposeful energy. Research links mantra repetition to reduced anxiety, sharper focus, and positive habit formation. A compelling call to mindful action!
mantras.tags: om, mantra, vibration, buddhist, tibetan, hindu, sound, serenity, focus, affirmation, cosmic, frequency

translations.es: Om, avanza, avanza rápidamente.
translations.ar: "أوم، تقدم، تقدم بسرعة."
translations.bn: ওঁ, এগিয়ে যাও, দ্রুত এগিয়ে যাও।
translations.de: Oṃ, gehe voran, gehe schnell voran.
translations.en-us: "Om, go forth, swiftly go forth."
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, go forth, swiftly proceed.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, avance, progresse rapidement.
translations.he: הוֹם, התקדמו, התקדמו במהירות.
translations.hi: ॐ, आगे बढ़ो, शीघ्रता से आगे बढ़ो।
translations.id: Ṏṃ, pergilah, pergilah dengan cepat.
translations.it: Oṃ, avanza, procedi rapidamente.
translations.ja: オーム、進め、速やかに進め。
translations.ko: 옴, 나아가십시오, 빠르게 나아가십시오.
translations.nl: Oṃ, ga, snel ga.
translations.pl: Oṁ, idź, szybko idź.
translations.pt-br: Óṁ, avança, prossiga rapidamente.
translations.ru: Ом, иди вперед, быстро иди вперед.
translations.sv: Om, framåt, gå framåt snabbt.
translations.th: อุ้ม, จงไป, จงไปอย่างรวดเร็ว
translations.tr: Om, ileri git, hızla ileri git.
translations.uk: Ом, рухайся вперед, швидко рухайся вперед.
translations.vi: Om, hãy đi, hãy nhanh chóng đi.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，前行，迅速前行。

mantras.name: Oṃ, it is Arpa, it is Ca, it is Na.
mantras.english: Oṃ, it is Arpa, it is Ca, it is Na.
mantras.original: oṃ a ra pa ca na
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, idaṃ arpa, idaṃ ca, idaṃ na.
mantras.background: From Mahayana Buddhism's Prajñāpāramitā sutras, the Arapacana alphabet mantra opens: "Oṃ, A, Ra, Pa, Ca, Na"—each syllable a meditation on wisdom. "A" awakens awareness of non-arising; together they unlock the Perfection of Wisdom.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Mahayana Buddhism's Arapacana tradition, each syllable encodes a profound truth—"a" for non-arising, "pa" for ultimate reality. Practitioners use it as a living mnemonic, anchoring the mind to wisdom and emptiness with every recitation.
mantras.tags: mahayana, buddhism, dharani, contemplative, mnemonic, wisdom, emptiness, arapacana, alphabet, philosophy

translations.es: Om, es Arpa, es Ca, es Na.
translations.ar: ॐ، إنها أرْپا، إنها كا، إنها نا.
translations.bn: ওঁ, এটা আর্পা, এটা কা, এটা না।
translations.de: Ōm, es ist Arpa, es ist Ca, es ist Na.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, it is Arpa, it is Ca, it is Na.
translations.en-gb: "Om, it is Arpa, it is Ca, it is Na."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, c'est Arpa, c'est Ca, c'est Na.
translations.he: אוֹם, זה ארפה, זה צַא, זה נָא.
translations.hi: ॐ, यह अर्पा है, यह चा है, यह ना है।
translations.id: ॐ, ini adalah Arpa, ini adalah Ca, ini adalah Na.
translations.it: Ōṃ, è Arpa, è Ca, è Na.
translations.ja: オーム、これはアルパ（低い音）、これはチャ（高い音）、これはナ（中間音）です。
translations.ko: 옴, 이것은 아르파이며, 이것은 차이며, 이것은 나입니다.
translations.nl: Om, het is Arpa, het is Ca, het is Na.
translations.pl: Oṁ, to jest Arpa, to jest Ca, to jest Na.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ, ele é Arpa, ele é Ca, ele é Na.
translations.ru: Ом, это Арпа, это Ца, это На.
translations.sv: Oṃ, det är Arpa, det är Ca, det är Na.
translations.th: ออม, นั่นคือ อรรพา, นั่นคือ ค่า, นั่นคือ นา.
translations.tr: Ōm, bu Arpa'dır, bu Ca'dır, bu Na'dır.
translations.uk: Ом, це Арпа, це Ца, це На.
translations.vi: Ôm, đây là Arpa, đây là Ca, đây là Na.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，它是阿尔帕，它是卡，它是那。

mantras.name: Oṃ, may (it) be pleasing, may (it) be auspicious.
mantras.english: Oṃ, may (it) be pleasing, may (it) be auspicious.
mantras.original: オン マカキャラヤ ソワカ
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, may it be pleasing, may it be auspicious. → ōṃ, may it be pleasing, may it be auspicious.
mantras.background: Rooted in 1,200+ years of Japanese Esoteric Buddhism, this Oṃ mantra invokes auspiciousness. Chanted with sincere heart, it connects practitioners to Buddha's compassionate light.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in over 1,200 years of Buddhist practice, this auspicious invocation of Oṃ cultivates inner calm, openness to grace, and positive intention—transforming daily moments into mindful blessings that gently align the heart toward harmony and wellbeing.
mantras.tags: buddhist, japanese, shingon, mantra, om, blessing, auspicious, devotional, recitation, esoteric

translations.es: Om, que sea agradable, que sea auspicioso.
translations.ar: أوم، ليكن مُرضيًا، ليكن مبارَكًا.
translations.bn: ওঁ, এটা আনন্দদায়ক হোক, এটা শুভ হোক।
translations.de: Om, möge es erfreulich sein, möge es günstig sein.
translations.en-us: "Om, may it be pleasing, may it be auspicious."
translations.en-gb: Om, may it be pleasing, may it be propitious.
translations.fr-fr: Om, qu'il soit agréable, qu'il soit propice.
translations.he: אום, יהי רצון, יהי טוב.
translations.hi: ॐ, यह मनभावन हो, यह शुभ हो।
translations.id: Om, semoga berkenan, semoga membawa keberuntungan.
translations.it: Oṃ, possa essere piacevole, possa essere propizio.
translations.ja: オーム、これ（の）が心地よくあれ、これ（の）が吉あれ。 (Om, korette kokochi yoku are, korette yoshi are.)
translations.ko: 옴, (그것이) 기쁘게 하소서, (그것이) 길조가 되소서. (Om, geosi-neun) gippeuge haseoseo, (geusi-neun) giljo-ga doseoseo.
translations.nl: Ōm, moge het aangenaam zijn, moge het gunstig zijn.
translations.pl: Om, niech będzie przyjemne, niech będzie pomyślne.
translations.pt-br: Om, que seja agradável, que seja auspicioso.
translations.ru: Ом, да будет приятно, да будет благоприятно.
translations.sv: Om, må det vara behagligt, må det vara lyckobringande.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตา, ขอความสวัสดี.
translations.tr: Ōm, ne olsun hoş, ne olsun uğurlu.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай буде приємно, нехай буде благословенно.
translations.vi: "Ôm, xin (nó) hãy trở nên dễ chịu, xin (nó) hãy trở nên tốt lành."
translations.zh-cn: 唵，愿其悦心，愿其吉祥。

mantras.name: Oṃ, salutations to Hri, salutations to Sri, salutations to intelligence (dhī), salutations to revelation (śruti), salutations to tradition (smṛti), salutations to understanding (mati), salutations to progress (gati), salutations to victory (vijaye), svāhā.
mantras.english: Oṃ, salutations to Hri, salutations to Sri, salutations to intelligence (dhī), salutations to revelation (śruti), salutations to tradition (smṛti), salutations to understanding (mati), salutations to progress (gati), salutations to victory (vijaye), svāhā.
mantras.original: oṃ hrī śrī dhī śruti smṛti mati gati vijaye svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, salutation to hrī, salutation to śrī, salutation to dhī, salutation to śruti, salutation to smṛti, salutation to mati, salutation to gati, salutation to vijaye, svāhā.
mantras.background:
From the Kauśikaprajñāpāramitāsūtra (Mahayana Buddhism), this mantra salutes wisdom, revelation, tradition, and victory—inviting the mind toward enlightenment through sacred sound.
  Grounding: Source lists "oṃ hrī śrī dhī śruti smṛti mati gati vijaye svāhā" from Kauśikaprajñāpāramitāsūtra; translation provided in mantra phrase header.
mantras.benefits: This Mahayana mantra salutes intelligence, revelation, tradition, understanding, progress, and victory—cultivating mental clarity and wisdom. Practitioners invoke cognitive and spiritual virtues, aligning mind with dharmic truth.
mantras.tags: mahayana, prajñaparamita, wisdom, dharani, perfection, understanding, victory, revelation

translations.es: Om, saludo a Hri, saludo a Sri, saludo a la inteligencia, saludo a la revelación, saludo a la tradición, saludo a la comprensión, saludo al progreso, saludo a la victoria, svāhā.
translations.ar: ॐ، التحية إلى هري، التحية إلى شري، التحية إلى الذكاء (dhī)، التحية إلى الوحي (śruti)، التحية إلى التقاليد (smṛti)، التحية إلى الفهم (mati)، التحية إلى التقدم (gati)، التحية إلى النصر (vijaye)، سَوَحَا.
translations.bn: ওঁ, হ্রী-কে নমস্কার, শ্রী-কে নমস্কার, বুদ্ধিকে নমস্কার, শ্রুতিকে নমস্কার, স্মৃতিকে নমস্কার, বুদ্ধিকে নমস্কার, অগ্রগতিকে নমস্কার, বিজয়ে নমস্কার, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Om, Grüße an Hri, Grüße an Sri, Grüße an die Intelligenz (dhī), Grüße an die Offenbarung (śruti), Grüße an die Tradition (smṛti), Grüße an das Verständnis (mati), Grüße an den Fortschritt (gati), Grüße an den Sieg (vijaye), Svāhā.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to Hri (modesty, reverence), salutations to Sri (prosperity, beauty), salutations to intelligence (dhī), salutations to revelation (śruti), salutations to tradition (smṛti), salutations to understanding (mati), salutations to progress (gati), salutations to victory (vijaye), svāhā.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Hri (modesty, reverence), salutations to Sri (auspiciousness, prosperity), salutations to intelligence (dhī), salutations to revelation (śruti), salutations to tradition (smṛti), salutations to understanding (mati), salutations to progress (gati), salutations to victory (vijaye), svāhā.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations à Hri, salutations à Sri, salutations à l'intelligence, salutations à la révélation, salutations à la tradition, salutations à la compréhension, salutations au progrès, salutations à la victoire, svāhā.
translations.he: אָה, ברכות להרי, ברכות לסרי, ברכות לחוכמה (דְּהִי), ברכות לגילוי (שְׁרוּטִי), ברכות למסורת (סְמְרִיטִי), ברכות להבנה (מָתִי), ברכות להתקדמות (גָּטִי), ברכות לניצחון (וִיגָ'ייֶה), סְוָהָה.
translations.hi: ॐ, ह्री को प्रणाम, श्री को प्रणाम, बुद्धि को प्रणाम, श्रुति को प्रणाम, स्मृति को प्रणाम, मति को प्रणाम, गति को प्रणाम, विजय को प्रणाम, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Hri, salam kepada Sri, salam kepada kecerdasan (dhī), salam kepada wahyu (śruti), salam kepada tradisi (smṛti), salam kepada pemahaman (mati), salam kepada kemajuan (gati), salam kepada kemenangan (vijaye), svāhā.
translations.it: Ōṃ, saluto a Hri, saluto a Śrī, saluto all'intelligenza (dhī), saluto alla rivelazione (śruti), saluto alla tradizione (smṛti), saluto alla comprensione (mati), saluto al progresso (gati), saluto alla vittoria (vijaye), svāhā.
translations.ja: オーム、フリーへ礼、シュリーへ礼、知恵（ディー）へ礼、啓示（シュルティ）へ礼、伝統（スマーティ）へ礼、理解（マティ）へ礼、進歩（ガティ）へ礼、勝利（ヴィジャイェ）へ礼、スワーハー。
translations.ko: 옴, 프리를 찬양하며, 쉬리를 찬양하며, 지혜를 찬양하며, 계시를 찬양하며, 전통을 찬양하며, 이해를 찬양하며, 발전(진보)을 찬양하며, 승리를 찬양하며, 스바하.
translations.nl: Om, groeten aan Hri, groeten aan Sri, groeten aan intelligentie, groeten aan openbaring, groeten aan traditie, groeten aan begrip, groeten aan vooruitgang, groeten aan overwinning, svāhā.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia bogini Hri, pozdrowienia bogini Sri, pozdrowienia inteligencji, pozdrowienia objawieniu, pozdrowienia tradycji, pozdrowienia zrozumieniu, pozdrowienia postępowi, pozdrowienia zwycięstwu, svāhā.
translations.pt-br: Om, reverências a Hri, reverências a Sri, reverências à inteligência (dhī), reverências à revelação (śruti), reverências à tradição (smṛti), reverências à compreensão (mati), reverências ao progresso (gati), reverências à vitória (vijaye), svāhā.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Хри, приветствия Шри, приветствия разуму (джн̃ане), приветствия откровению (шрути), приветствия традиции (смрити), приветствия пониманию (мати), приветствия прогрессу (гати), приветствия победе (виджайе), Сваха.
translations.sv: Oṃ, vördnad för Hri, vördnad för Sri, vördnad för intelligens (dhī), vördnad för uppenbarelse (śruti), vördnad för tradition (smṛti), vördnad för förståelse (mati), vördnad för framsteg (gati), vördnad för seger (vijaye), svāhā.
translations.th: ขอพระนาม ॐ, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ หริ, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ ศรี, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ สติปัญญา, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ ญาณที่ได้ยิน, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ ประเพณี, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ ความเข้าใจ, ข้าขอคารวะต่อ ความก้าวหน้า, ข้าขอคารวะต่อชัยชนะ, สวาหา
translations.tr: Oṁ, Hri'ye selam olsun, Sri'ye selam olsun, zekâya selam olsun, vahye selam olsun, geleneklere selam olsun, anlayışa selam olsun, ilerlemeye selam olsun, zafere selam olsun, svāhā.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствие Хри, приветствие Шри, приветствие Разуму, приветствие Откровению, приветствие Традиции, приветствие Пониманию, приветствие Прогрессу, приветствие Победе, Сваха.
translations.vi: Om, kính chào Hri, kính chào Sri, kính chào trí tuệ, kính chào sự mặc khải, kính chào truyền thống, kính chào sự hiểu biết, kính chào sự tiến bộ, kính chào chiến thắng, svāhā.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，礼敬希，礼敬斯里，礼敬智慧（dhī），礼敬启示（śruti），礼敬传统（smṛti），礼敬理解（mati），礼敬进步（gati），礼敬胜利（vijaye），斯瓦哈。

mantras.name: Oṃ, the jewel is in the lotus, hūṃ.
mantras.english: Oṃ, the jewel is in the lotus, hūṃ.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, manu padme hūṃ.
mantras.background:
Om Mani Padme Hum: Buddhism's jewel mantra, first appearing in the 4th–5th century Kāraṇḍavyūhasūtra, means "the jewel is in the lotus" — Avalokiteśvara's call to compassion.
  Grounding: Source states mantra first appears in Kāraṇḍavyūhasūtra (4th-5th century CE), is Avalokiteśvara's six-syllable mantra, translated as given.
mantras.benefits: Om Mani Padme Hum cultivates compassion, purifies karma, and connects practitioners to Avalokiteśvara's boundless mercy. Its six syllables are said to transform body, speech, and mind—drawing the devoted into liberation's luminous embrace.
mantras.tags: tibetan, mahayana, avalokiteshvara, compassion, bodhisattva, devotion, symbolic, six-syllable, liberation

translations.es: Oṃ, la joya está en el loto, hūṃ.
translations.ar: "أوم، الجوهرة في اللوتس، هوم."
translations.bn: ওঁ, मणि পদ্মে আছে, হূྃ।
translations.de: Oṃ, der Edelstein befindet sich in der Lotusblüte, hūṃ.
translations.en-us: "Om, the jewel is within the lotus; Hum."
translations.en-gb: "Om, the jewel is within the lotus; Hum."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, le joyau se trouve dans le lotus, hūṃ.
translations.he: אוֹם, היהלום נמצא בתוך הלוטוס, הוּם.
translations.hi: ॐ, मणि कमल में है, हूँ।
translations.id: ॐ, permata itu berada di dalam bunga teratai, हूँ.
translations.it: Ōṃ, il gioiello si trova nel loto, hūṃ.
translations.ja: オーム、真珠は蓮華の中にあります、フウム。
translations.ko: 옴, 보석이 연꽃 안에 있습니다, 훔.
translations.nl: Oṃ, de edelsteen bevindt zich in de lotusbloem, hūṃ.
translations.pl: Oṁ, klejnot znajduje się w lotosie, hūṃ.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ, a joia está no lótus, hūṃ.
translations.ru: Ом, драгоценность находится в лотосе, хум.
translations.sv: "Om, juvelen är i lotusblomman, hum."
translations.th: โอองค์, อัญมณีนั้นอยู่ในดอกบัว, หุม.
translations.tr: Ōm, mücevher, lotus çiçeğinin içinde, hūṃ.
translations.uk: Ом, дорогоцінний камінь знаходиться у лотосі, хум.
translations.vi: ॐ, viên ngọc đang ở trong đóa sen, हुँ.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，宝石位于莲花之中，吽。

mantras.name: Oṃ, the unwavering, radiant light, great seal, manifest the jewel-lotus flame, hūṃ.
mantras.english: Oṃ, the unwavering, radiant light, great seal, manifest the jewel-lotus flame, hūṃ.
mantras.original: oṃ amogha vairocana mahā-mudrā maṇi-padma-jvāla pravartaya hūṃ
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, adbhayaḥ, prasiddhā dīptiḥ, mahā-mūrdhanya, prakaṭaṁ ratna-pūṭa-agniḥ, hūṃ.
mantras.background: From Esoteric Buddhism (密教), this mantra—oṃ amogha vairocana mahā-mudrā maṇi-padma-jvāla pravartaya hūṃ—invokes the Five Wisdom Buddhas, commanding the "unwavering radiant Vairocana" to blaze light through the jewel-lotus seal. A gateway into Shingon's living cosmos.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Vairocana's unfailing light and the five wisdom Buddhas, this mantra is said to dissolve ignorance and illuminate the mind's innate clarity — awakening practitioners to boundless compassion and cosmic awareness.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tibetan, tantric, mantra, vairocana, light, visualization, enlightenment, wisdom, seal, lotus

translations.es: "Om, la luz inmutable y radiante, el gran sello, manifiesta la llama de la flor de loto, hum."
translations.ar: "أوم، النور الثابت والمتوهج، الختم العظيم، أظهر زهرة اللوتس النارية، هوم."
translations.bn: ॐ, अपरिवर्तनीय, দিব্য ஒளி, মহান সীল, রত্ন-পদ্ম শিখা প্রকাশ করো, हुँ।
translations.de: Oṃ, das unerschütterliche, strahlende Licht, großer Siegel, manifestiere die Flamme des Juwel-Lotus, hūṃ.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, the unwavering, radiant light; the great seal; manifest the jewel-lotus flame; hūṃ.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, the unchanging, brilliant light; the supreme and ultimate seal; manifest the flame of the jewel-lotus; hūṃ.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, la lumière immuable et rayonnante, grand sceau, manifeste la flamme du lotus précieux, hūṃ.
translations.he: אוֹם, האור הבלתי משתנה והזוהר, החותם הגדול, גלה את להבת הלотоס היקרה, הום.
translations.hi: ॐ, वह जो अडिग है, वह तेजस्वी प्रकाश, महान मुहर, मणि-पद्म की ज्वाला को प्रकट करो, हूँ।
translations.id: Oṃ, Cahaya yang tak tergoyahkan, cahaya yang bersinar, segel agung, wujudkan nyala lotus permata, hūṃ.
translations.it: Ōṃ, luce immutabile e radiosa, grande sigillo, manifesta la fiamma del loto prezioso, hūṃ.
translations.ja: オーム、揺るぎなく、輝く光よ、至高の印よ。蓮の花びらの炎を現し示し給え。フウム。
translations.ko: 옴, 변치 않는, 찬란한 빛, 위대한 인장, 보석 연꽃의 불꽃을 드러내라, 훔.
translations.nl: Oṃ, de onverbiddelijke, stralende lichtbron, de grote zegel, manifeste de vlam van de juweel-lotus, hūṃ.
translations.pl: Oṁ, niezachwiany, emanujący blask, Wielkie Pieczęć, objawienie płomienia szlachetnego lotosu, hūṃ.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ, a luz imutável e radiante, o grande selo, manifeste a chama da flor-lótus, hūṃ.
translations.ru: Ом, незыблемый, сияющий свет, великая печать, прояви пламя драгоценного лотоса, хум.
translations.sv: Oṃ, det orubbliga, strålande ljuset, den stora förseglingen, manifestera lotusblommans låga, hūṃ.
translations.th: โอรัม, แสงสว่างอันไม่เปลี่ยนแปลง, แสงเจิดจ้า, ประทับตราอันยิ่งใหญ่, จงสำแดงเปลวเพลิงแห่งดอกบัวอันล้ำค่า, หุม
translations.tr: Om, sarsılmaz, parlak ışık, büyük mühür, mücevher-lotiş alevini ortaya çıkar, hūṃ.
translations.uk: Ом, незмінне, сяюче світло, велика печать, прояви коштовний водяний лотос, хум.
translations.vi: ॐ, ánh sáng vĩnh cửu, rạng rỡ, ấn chương tối thượng, hãy hiện ra, ngọn lửa sen quý giá, hūṃ.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，永恒不移的光芒，至高印记，显现莲花之焰，吽。

mantras.name: Oṃ, to the Medicine Buddha, Medicine Buddha, Great Medicine Buddha, Supreme Medicine Lord, who has arisen, Svāhā.
mantras.english: Oṃ, to the Medicine Buddha, Medicine Buddha, Great Medicine Buddha, Supreme Medicine Lord, who has arisen, Svāhā.
mantras.original: Om Bhaishajye Bhaishajye Mahabhaishajye Bhaishajyaraje Samudgate Svaha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, bhairavāya, bhairavo, mahā-bhairavo, paramo-bhairavo-īśvarāya, yaḥ utsṛṣṭaḥ, svāhā.
mantras.background: From Sanskrit Buddhist tradition, this Medicine Buddha (Bhaisajyaguru) mantra literally means: "Oṃ, Medicine, Medicine, Great Medicine, Supreme Medicine Lord, who has arisen, Svāhā." A healing invocation!
mantras.benefits: The Medicine Buddha mantra (Om Bhaishajye...Svaha) is linked to healing—body and mind. Practitioners associate it with purifying suffering and cultivating compassion, drawing seekers into a profound Buddhist healing tradition.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tibetan, medicine-buddha, devotional, healing, sanskrit

translations.es: Om, al Buda de la Medicina, Buda de la Medicina, Gran Buda de la Medicina, Supremo Señor de la Medicina, que has surgido, Svāhā.
translations.ar: "أوم، أيها البوذا الشافي، يا بوذا الشافي، يا البوذا الشافي العظيم، يا سيد الشفاء الأعظم، الذي تجسد، سلام."
translations.bn: ওঁ, औषধ বুদ্ধের কাছে, औषধ বুদ্ধ, মহান औषধ বুদ্ধ, সর্বশ্রেষ্ঠ औषধদেব, যিনি আবির্ভূত হয়েছেন, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Om, dem Medizin-Buddha, Medizin-Buddha, großer Medizin-Buddha, höchster Medizin-Herr, der Erleuchteter, Svāhā.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, to the Medicine Buddha, Medicine Buddha, Great Medicine Buddha, Supreme Medicine Lord, who has arisen, Svāhā.
translations.en-gb: "Om, to the Medicine Buddha, Medicine Buddha, Great Medicine Buddha, Supreme Medicine Lord, who has arisen, Svāhā."
translations.fr-fr: Ôṃ, à toi, Bouddha Médecin, Grand Bouddha Médecin, Seigneur Suprême de la Médecine, qui es apparu, Svāhā.
translations.he: אום, אל בודהה המרפא, בודהה המרפא, בודהה המרפא הגדול, אדון המרפא העליון, אשר התעורר, שווה.
translations.hi: ॐ, औषधि बुद्ध को, औषधि बुद्ध, महान औषधि बुद्ध, सर्वोच्च औषधि स्वामी, जो प्रकट हुए हैं, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Om, kepada Buddha Pengobatan, Buddha Pengobatan, Buddha Pengobatan Agung, Penguasa Agung Pengobatan, yang telah bangkit, Svāhā.
translations.it: Oṃ, a te, Buddha della Medicina, Buddha della Medicina, Grande Buddha della Medicina, Supremo Signore della Medicina, che sei risorto, Svāhā.
translations.ja: オーム、薬師如来へ、薬師如来、大薬師如来、至高の薬師の御前へ、現れ給いし者よ、ソハ。
translations.ko: 옴, 의약불에게, 의약불이시여, 위대한 의약불이시여, 최고의 의약 존님이시여, 나타나소서, 스바하.
translations.nl: Om, aan de Boeddha van de Genezing, Boeddha van de Genezing, Grote Boeddha van de Genezing, Allerhoogste Heer van de Genezing, die is opgestaan, Svāhā.
translations.pl: Oṁ, do Buddy Medycyny, Buddy Medycyny, Wielki Buddy Medycyny, Najwyższy Pan Medycyny, który się objawił, Svāhā.
translations.pt-br: Óm, a Buda da Medicina, Buda da Medicina, Grande Buda da Medicina, Supremo Senhor da Medicina, que se manifesta, Svāhā.
translations.ru: Ом, Будде Целительства, Будде Целительства, Великому Будде Целительства, Всевысшему Господу Целительства, Который проявился, Сваха.
translations.sv: Om, till Läkemedelsbuddhan, Läkemedelsbuddhan, den Store Läkemedelsbuddhan, den Högste Läkemedelsherren, som har uppstått, Svāhā.
translations.th: ขออัญเชิญพระอมิตาภะพุทธะ, พระพุทธเจ้าแห่งยา, พระพุทธเจ้าผู้ยิ่งใหญ่แห่งยา, พระผู้เป็นเจ้าแห่งยาที่ประเสริฐ, ผู้ซึ่งได้อุบัติขึ้นแล้ว, สวาหะ
translations.tr: Om, İlaç Buddha'ya, İlaç Buddha, Ulu İlaç Buddha, En Yüce İlaç Efendisi, tezahür etmiş olan, Svaha.
translations.uk: Ом, Будді Медицини, Буддо Медицини, Великий Буддо Медицини, Найвищий Володарцілювань, Який проявився, Сваха.
translations.vi: Ôm, kính dâng Đức Phật Y Dược, Đức Phật Y Dược, Đại Phật Y Dược, Đấng Y Dược tối thượng, Người đã giác ngộ, Xa-bà-ha.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，致药师佛，药师佛，大药师佛，至尊药师，您已降临，萨瓦哈。

mantras.name: Oṃ, to the healer, to the healer, to the great healing ocean, svāhā.
mantras.english: Oṃ, to the healer, to the healer, to the great healing ocean, svāhā.
mantras.transliteration: ओं, उद्दे, उद्दे, महान च्यवन समुद्राय, स्वाहा।
mantras.background:
From Mahayana Buddhism, the Medicine Buddha mantra—"Oṃ, to the healer...svāhā"—invokes healing power, rooted in Sanskrit tantric tradition, chanted to awaken inner wellness.
  Grounding: Source lists Medicine Guru mantra: "Om̐ bhaiṣajye bhaiṣajye mahābhaiṣajya-samudgate svāhā" from the Sutra of Medicine Guru, Mahayana Buddhism.
mantras.benefits:
This healing mantra, invoking the "great healing ocean," channels medicine-deity devotion. Practitioners report cultivated compassion, relief from illness-anxiety, and meditative calm—bridging body and spirit through sacred sound repetition.
  Grounding: Source confirms Medicine Guru mantra (Om bhaiṣajye...svāhā) is from Mahayana Buddhism's Medicine Buddha sutra; mantra repetition aids meditation and spiritual healing per sources.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mahayana, medicine buddha, healing, compassion, devotional, protection

translations.es: Om, a quien sana, a quien sana, al inmenso océano de sanación, svāhā.
translations.ar: يا أوم، إلى المعالج، إلى المعالج، إلى المحيط العظيم للشفاء، سواهَا.
translations.bn: ওঁ, चिकित्सक/আরোগ্যকর্তার প্রতি, चिकित्सक/আরোগ্যকর্তার প্রতি, মহান নিরাময় সমুদ্রের প্রতি, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Om, dem Heiler, dem Heiler, dem großen, heilenden Ozean, Svāhā.
translations.en-us: "Om, to the healer, to the healer, to the vast ocean of healing, svāhā."
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, to the healer, to the healer, to the boundless ocean of healing, svāhā.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, à celui qui guérit, à celui qui guérit, à l'immense océan de guérison, svāhā.
translations.he: אום, אל המרפא, אל המרפא, אל ים הריפוי הגדול, שווה.
translations.hi: ॐ, चिकित्सक को, चिकित्सक को, महान चिकित्सा के सागर को, स्वाहा।
