translations.id: Om, kepada penyembuh, kepada penyembuh, kepada lautan penyembuhan yang agung, svāhā.
translations.it: Oṃ, al guaritore, al guaritore, all'immenso oceano di guarigione, svāhā.
translations.ja: オーム、癒し手へ、癒し手へ、偉大な癒しの海へ、スヴァハー。
translations.ko: 옴, 치유자에게, 치유자에게, 위대한 치유의 바다에게, 스바하.
translations.nl: Om, aan de genezer, aan de genezer, aan de grote oceaan van genezing, svāhā.
translations.pl: Om, do uzdrowiciela, do uzdrowiciela, do wielkiego oceanu uzdrowienia, swāhā.
translations.pt-br: Óm, ao curador, ao curador, ao vasto oceano de cura, svāhā.
translations.ru: Ом, целителю, целителю, великому океану исцеления, сваха.
translations.sv: Om, till läkaren, till läkaren, till den stora läkande kraften, svāhā.
translations.th: ขอต่อพระผู้รักษา, ขอต่อพระผู้รักษา, ขอต่อมหาสมุทรแห่งการรักษา, สวาหะ.
translations.tr: Om, iyileştiriciye, iyileştiriciye, büyük şifa okyanusuna, hu.
translations.uk: Ом, цілителю, цілителю, великому океане зцілення, сваха.
translations.vi: Om, kính dâng đến người chữa lành, đến người chữa lành, đến đại dương chữa lành vô tận, svāhā.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，献给治愈者，献给治愈者，献给伟大的治愈之海，斯瓦哈。

mantras.name: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. May there be amazement. Svāhā.
mantras.english: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. May there be amazement. Svāhā.
mantras.original: oṃ ha ha ha vismaye svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ॐ. हः. हः. हः. may there be amazement. स्वाहा.
mantras.background:
From Japanese Shingon Buddhism, this mantra belongs to Jizō Bosatsu (Ksitigarbha). "Oṃ Ha Ha Ha" evokes amazement; "Svāhā" seals the offering. Ancient sounds, timeless wonder.
  Grounding: Source lists Jizō mantra as "oṃ ha ha ha vismaye svāhā"; vismaye means amazement; svāhā is a Vedic offering-seal used across Hindu/Buddhist traditions.
mantras.benefits: "Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. May there be amazement. Svāhā." — the mantra of Kṣitigarbha — awakens wonder and openness. Svāhā seals intention; laughter syllables dissolve ego-tension, inviting transcendence through joyful amazement.
mantras.tags: shingon, japanese, buddhist, bodhisattva, mantra, jizo, meditation, esoteric, mahayana, amazement, chanting, tantric

translations.es: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Que haya asombro. Svāhā.
translations.ar: "أوم. ها. ها. ها. ليكن الدهشة. سَوَها."
translations.bn: ওঁ। হা। হা। হা। বিস্ময় থাকুক। স্বাহা।
translations.de: Om. Ja. Ja. Ja. Möge es Staunen hervorrufen. Svāhā.
translations.en-us: Om. Ha. Ha. Ha. May there be wonder. Svāhā.
translations.en-gb: Om. Ha. Ha. Ha. May there be wonder. Svāhā.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm. Ha. Ha. Ha. Qu'il y ait émerveillement. Svāhā.
translations.he: אום. הא. הא. הא. יהי פליאה. סוואה.
translations.hi: ॐ। हां। हां। हां। आश्चर्य हो। स्वाहा।
translations.id: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Semoga timbul kekaguman. Svāhā.
translations.it: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Possa esserci stupore. Svāhā.
translations.ja: オーム。ハー。ハー。ハー。驚きがありますように。スヴァハー。
translations.ko: 옴. 하. 하. 하. 놀라움이 있기를. 스바하.
translations.nl: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Moge er verwondering zijn. Svāhā.
translations.pl: Oṁ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Niech nastąpi zdumienie. Svāhā.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Que haja admiração. Svāhā.
translations.ru: Ом. Ха. Ха. Ха. Пусть будет изумление. Сваха.
translations.sv: Oṃ. Ha. Ha. Ha. Må det uppstå förundran. Svāhā.
translations.th: โอรัม ขอให้เกิดความอัศจรรย์ สวาหะ
translations.tr: Om. Ha. Ha. Ha. Şaşkınlık olsun. Svāhā.
translations.uk: Ом. Ха. Ха. Ха. Нехай буде подив. Сваха.
translations.vi: Ôm. Ha. Ha. Ha. Xin có sự ngạc nhiên. Svāhā.
translations.zh-cn: 唵。 洒。 洒。 洒。 愿有惊叹。 斯瓦哈。

mantras.name: Salutations to Vajrapani, Hum.
mantras.english: Salutations to Vajrapani, Hum.
mantras.transliteration: `Vajrapāṇiḥ, Hum.`
mantras.background: Vajrayana Buddhist mantra honoring bodhisattva Vajrapani. "Hūṃ" is a bija (seed) syllable. Mantras are "manifestations of Buddhas and bodhisattvas," making recitation a direct encounter with sacred power.
mantras.benefits: In Vajrayana tradition, tantric mantras like this one are considered manifestations of bodhisattvas themselves. Recitation is said to "eliminate ignorance," cultivate focused awareness, and draw the practitioner into direct contact with enlightened energy.
mantras.tags: buddhist, vajrapani, vajrayana, tibetan, seed mantra, deity, invocation, tantric, transformation, protection, empower

translations.es: Saludos a Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.ar: تحية لـ "فاجراباني"، "هوم".
translations.bn: বজ্রपाणि দেবতাকে প্রণাম, হুম্।
translations.de: "Verbeugung vor Vajrapani, Hum."
translations.en-us: "Homage to Vajrapani, Hum."
translations.en-gb: Salutations to Vajrapani, the sound 'Hum'.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.he: ברכות לוַגְ'רָפָּנִי, הוּם.
translations.hi: वज्रपाणि को नमस्कार, हूँ।
translations.id: Salam kepada Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.it: Saluti a Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.ja: ヴァジャラパニに礼賛を捧げます。ハム。
translations.ko: 만트라의 의미를 살려 번역하면 다음과 같습니다: "금강저를 든 손, 훔." 또는 "비자라바니에게 경의를 표합니다, 훔."
translations.nl: Groet aan Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.pl: Pozdrowienia dla Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.ru: Приветствие Ваджрапани, Хум.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่วชรปาณี, หึม
translations.tr: Vajrapani'ye saygı, Hum.
translations.uk: Вітаю Ваджрапані, Хум.
translations.vi: Kính chào Vajrapani, Hum.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼金刚手菩萨，嗡。

mantras.name: Salutations to all Buddhas in the primordial constellation, Svaha.
mantras.english: Salutations to all Buddhas in the primordial constellation, Svaha.
mantras.transliteration: `Salutations to all Buddhas in the primordial constellation, svāhā.`
mantras.background:
From Vajrayana Buddhism, this mantra honors all Buddhas across the 28 lunar constellations (nakṣatra). "Namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ...nakṣatra svāhā" invites cosmic alignment through sacred sound.
  Grounding: Source tables show identical structure: "namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ [constellation] nakṣatra svāhā" = "Salutations to all Buddhas in [constellation]. Svaha."
mantras.benefits: Rooted in the nakṣatra mantra tradition, this practice invokes all Buddhas through the primordial constellations, aiming to shatter ignorance (avidyā) and purify the mind. Sources describe such mantras as dissolving karmic obscurations and cultivating deep mental unification, drawing practitioners toward awakening.
mantras.tags: buddhist, esoteric, tantric, devotional, cosmic, celestial, japanese, veneration

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas en la constelación primordial, Svaha.
translations.ar: التحية لجميع البوذا في المجموعة النجمية البدائية، سَڤاهَا.
translations.bn: आदিকালের সমস্ত বুদ্ধர்களுக்கு, নমস্কার, সোহা।
translations.de: "Ich vernehme die Ehrung aller Buddhas in der ursprünglichen Sternenkonstellation. Sei es so."
translations.en-us: Greetings to all the Buddhas residing within the primordial cosmic expanse, Svaha.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to all Buddhas within the original cosmic arrangement, Svaha.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas de la constellation primordiale, Svaha.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודדים במערך הכוכבים הקדום, סוואה.
translations.hi: नमस्कार सभी बुद्धों को, जो आदिम नक्षत्र में स्थित हैं, स्वाधा।
translations.id: Salam bagi semua Buddha dalam gugusan bintang purba, Svaha.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha nella costellazione primordiale, Svaha.
translations.ja: 原始の星雲に宿るすべての仏々へ、合掌。
translations.ko: 모든 원시 우주의 불(佛)들에게, 아라파따. (모든 원시 우주의 부처님들께, 아라파따.)
translations.nl: Groeten aan alle Boeddha's in de oeroude constellatie, Svaha.
translations.pl: Składamy hołd wszystkim Buddhom w pierwotnym konstelacji, Svaha.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas na constelação primordial, Svaha.
translations.ru: Приветствия всем Буддам в изначальном созвездии, Соха.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor i den uråldriga stjärnbilden, Svaha.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่พระพุทธเจ้าทั้งปวงในกลุ่มดาวดั้งเดิม ขอความสวัสดีแก่ (ทั้งหมด).
translations.tr: İlkel takımyıldızdaki tüm Buda'lara selamlar, Svaha.
translations.uk: Вітаю всіх Будд у первісному сузір'ї, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các Đức Phật trong chòm sao nguyên thủy, Svaha.
translations.zh-cn: 恭敬礼赞所有在太初星辰中的佛陀，阿悉。

mantras.name: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the Abhijit Nakshatra, svāhā.
mantras.english: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the Abhijit Nakshatra, svāhā.
mantras.transliteration: salutation to all buddhas, to the abhījit nakṣatra, svāhā.
mantras.background:
From Buddhist mantra tradition, this salutation invokes all Buddhas and the Abhijit Nakshatra (a lunar mansion/star), sealed with svāhā—a Vedic offering cry absorbed into Buddhism, bridging cosmic stars and enlightened beings.
  Grounding: Source shows svāhā as Vedic-origin term; namaḥ samanta-buddhānāṃ formula (saluting all Buddhas) appears repeatedly; nakshatra mantras listed under planetary/stellar mantra section.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist mantra tradition, this invocation of all Buddhas alongside the Abhijit ("victorious") Nakshatra channels cosmic and awakened energies. The sources note such mantras destroy ignorance and afflictions, guiding practitioners toward clarity and liberation—drawing celestial and enlightened forces into alignment.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mantra, esoteric, tantric, devotional, invocation, celestial, ritual

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas, a la constelación Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.ar: التحية لجميع البوذات، وتحية لنجمة "أبهيجيت"، سلام.
translations.bn: সমস্ত বুদ্ধদের এবং অভিজিৎ নক্ষত্রের উদ্দেশ্যে, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Grüße an alle Buddhas, an die Nakshatra Abhijit, Svāhā.
translations.en-us: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the auspicious star Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.en-gb: Greetings and salutations to all Buddhas, to the auspicious star Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas, à la constellation Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודדים, למערכת הכוכבים אבהיג'יט, שְׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: सभी बुद्धों को नमस्कार, अभिजीत नक्षत्र को नमस्कार, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada semua Buddha, kepada rasi bintang Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha, alla costellazione di Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.ja: すべての仏陀へ、そしてアビジットの星へ、サヴァーハ。
translations.ko: 모든 부처님과 아비지트 별자리에 경의를 표합니다. 스바하. (모든 불타님과 아비지트 별자리에 존경을 표합니다. 스바하.)
translations.nl: Groet aan alle Boeddha's, aan de constellatie Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.pl: Składam hołd wszystkim Buddhom, konstelacji Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas, à constelação Abhijit, svāhā.
translations.ru: Поклонение всем Буддам, созвездию Абхиджит, санскрит: "сваха".
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor, till den lyckobringande stjärnbilden Abhijit, *svāhā*.
translations.th: คำบูชาแด่พระพุทธเจ้าทั้งหมด, แด่วาโยคะ อภิจิต, ขอความสวัสดีจงมี.
translations.tr: Tüm Buda'lara, Abhijit Nakşatra'sına saygılar, *svāhā*.
translations.uk: Вітання всім Буддам, зоряному утворенню Абхіджит, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các vị Phật, kính chào chòm sao Abhijit, Om svāhā.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼所有佛陀，敬礼阿碧吉星宿，斯瓦哈 (Jìnglǐ suǒyǒu fótuó, jìnglǐ Ābìjí xīngxiù, sīwǎhā.)

mantras.name: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Revati, svāhā.
mantras.english: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Revati, svāhā.
mantras.transliteration: `Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Revati, svāhā.`
mantras.background:
From Buddhist tantric tradition, this mantra salutes all Buddhas and the lunar constellation Revati (レーヴァティー), ending with svāhā—a Vedic offering cry. Celestial and cosmic, it bridges star-worship and awakening.
  Grounding: Source lists nakṣatra (constellation) mantras with "namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ" formula + svāhā, rooted in Buddhist-Vedic synthesis of celestial veneration.
mantras.benefits: This mantra unites cosmic and Buddhist devotion, invoking all Buddhas alongside the star Revati. Practitioners may cultivate clarity, release afflictions, and align with celestial protection—drawing the mind toward awakening through sacred sound.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mahayana, tantric, buddha, nakshatra, devotional, svāhā, blessing, ritual

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas, a la constelación de Revati, svāhā.
translations.ar: تحية لجميع البوذا، وتحية لتجمع النجوم ريفاتي، سلام.
translations.bn: সমস্ত বুদ্ধদের এবং রেવતી নক্ষত্রের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Grüße an alle Buddhas, an die Sternenkonstellation Revati, Svāhā.
translations.en-us: "Homage to all Buddhas, to the constellation Revati, svāhā."
translations.en-gb: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Revati, so be it.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas, à la constellation de Revati, svāhā.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודהות, למערכת הכוכבים רֵוָתִי, סוֹהָה.
translations.hi: सभी बुद्धों को प्रणाम, रेवती नक्षत्र को प्रणाम, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada semua Buddha, kepada rasi bintang Revati, svāhā.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha, alla costellazione di Revati, svāhā.
translations.ja: すべての仏陀へ、レヴァティ星団へ、svāhā（または、敬意を表して）。
translations.ko: 모든 부처님과 레바티 별자리에 경의를 표합니다. 스바하.
translations.nl: Groeten aan alle Boeddha's, aan de sterrengroep Revati, svāhā.
translations.pl: Składam hołd wszystkim Buddhom, konstelacji Revati, svāhā.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas, à constelação de Revati, svāhā.
translations.ru: Приветствия всем Буддам, созвездию Рохини, Сваха.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor, till stjärnbilden Revati, svāhā.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่พระพุทธเจ้าทั้งปวง, แด่กลุ่มดาวเรวัต, สวาหะ
translations.tr: Tüm Budalara, Revati takımyıldızına selamlar, *svāhā*.
translations.uk: Вітаю всіх Будд, сузір'я Реваті, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các Đức Phật, kính chào chòm sao Revati, "Svāhā".
translations.zh-cn: 恭敬礼所有佛陀，恭敬礼瑞提星宿，萨瓦诃。

mantras.name: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Vishakha, svaha.
mantras.english: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Vishakha, svaha.
mantras.transliteration: `Salutations to all Buddhas, to the constellation Vishakha, svāhā.`
mantras.background:
From Buddhist Sanskrit tradition, "namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ viśākhā nakṣatra svāhā" salutes all Buddhas and the star Vishakha — weaving cosmos and enlightenment into one sacred breath.
  Grounding: Source lists nakṣatra mantras with "namaḥ samanta-buddhānāṃ [constellation] nakṣatra svāhā" pattern, meaning salutation to all Buddhas + named star + svāhā offering.
mantras.benefits: This mantra—saluting all Buddhas alongside the cosmic constellation Vishakha—cultivates a sense of universal connection. Traditional Buddhist mantra practice associates such formulas with protection, good fortune, and alignment with cosmic order, drawing the practitioner toward liberation.
mantras.tags: buddhism, shingon, mantra, nakshatra, vishakha, devotional, blessing, astrological, lunar, esoteric

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas, a la constelación Vishakha, svaha.
translations.ar: تحية لجميع البوذات، وتحية لتجمع النجوم فيشاكا، آمين.
translations.bn: সমস্ত বুদ্ধদের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, বিশাখা নক্ষত্রের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Grüße an alle Buddhas, an die Sternenkonstellation Vishakha, Seid gegrüßt (oder: möge es gelingen).
translations.en-us: Greetings to all Buddhas, to the constellation Vishakha, hail.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to all Buddhas, to the constellation Vishakha, so be it.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas, à la constellation Vishakha, svaha.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודדים, למערכת הכוכבים וישאקה, הויה.
translations.hi: सभी बुद्धों को प्रणाम, नक्षत्र विशखा को प्रणाम, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam kepada semua Buddha, kepada gugusan bintang Vishakha, svaha.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha, alla costellazione di Vishakha, svaha.
translations.ja: すべての仏々へ、ヴィシャカー座の星々へ、ソワカ。
translations.ko: 모든 부처님과 비샥하 별자리에 경의를 표합니다. 사바하. (모든 불도님과 비샥하 별자리에 존경을 표합니다. 사바하.)
translations.nl: Groeten aan alle Boeddha's, aan de sterrengroep Vishakha, svaha.
translations.pl: Składam hołd wszystkim Buddhom, konstelacji Vishakha, svaha.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas, à constelação de Vishakha, svaha.
translations.ru: Поклоны всем Буддам, созвездию Вишакха, ом.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor, till stjärnbilden Vishakha, svaha.
translations.th: คำบูชาแด่พระพุทธเจ้าทั้งปวง, แด่กลุ่มดาววิสาขะ, สวาหะ
translations.tr: Tüm Buda'lara, Vishakha takımyıldızına saygılar, "svaha".
translations.uk: Вітаю всіх Будд, сузір'я Вішакха, сохам.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các Đức Phật, kính chào chòm sao Vishakha, *svaha*.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼所有佛陀，敬礼维沙卡星宿，萨瓦诃。

mantras.name: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the star Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
mantras.english: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the star Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
mantras.transliteration: *Salutations to all Buddhas, to the star Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.*
mantras.background:
From Buddhist esoteric tradition, this mantra salutes all Buddhas and the star Pūrva-āṣādha, closing with Svāhā—a Vedic offering cry absorbed into Buddhist ritual, bridging cosmic and stellar devotion.
  Grounding: Source lists star-deity mantras (nakṣatra) with "svāhā" closings, and describes Buddhist absorption of Vedic mantra traditions including celestial invocations.
mantras.benefits: Invoking all Buddhas and the nakṣatra Pūrva-āṣādha, this mantra bridges cosmic and enlightened forces. Svāhā seals the offering, channeling stellar energy to dissolve ignorance and afflictions, awakening clarity of mind.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tantric, mantra, invocation, devotional, buddha, blessing, astrological

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas, a la estrella Pūrva-āṣādha. Svāhā.
translations.ar: التحية لجميع البوذات، ولفلك "بورفا آشادا"، سلام.
translations.bn: সমস্ত বুদ্ধদের উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণতি, পূর্ব আশাদ নক্ষত্রের উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণতি, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Grüße an alle Buddhas, an den Stern Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
translations.en-us: Greetings to all Buddhas; homage to the star Pūrva-āṣādha; Svāhā.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to all Buddhas, to the star Pūrva-āṣādha. Hail.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas, à l'étoile Pūrva-āṣādha. Ainsi soit-il.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודדים, לכוכב פורווה-אשאדה, שווה.
translations.hi: सभी बुद्धों को नमस्कार, पूर्वा-आषाढ़ नक्षत्र को नमस्कार, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada semua Buddha, kepada bintang Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha, alla stella Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
translations.ja: すべての仏陀へ、プルヴァ・アーシャダー星へ、スヴァーハー。
translations.ko: 모든 부처님과 푸르바 아샤다 별에게 경의를 표합니다. 스바하.
translations.nl: Groet aan alle Boeddha's, aan de ster Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
translations.pl: Składam hołd wszystkim Buddhom, gwieździe Pūrva-āṣādha. Niech tak będzie.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas, à estrela Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
translations.ru: Поклонение всем Буддам, звезде Пурва-ашадхе, Сваха.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor, till stjärnbilden Pūrva-āṣādha. Svāhā.
translations.th: คำบูชาแด่พระพุทธทั้งหมด, แดวดาราฤกษ์ "ปุรวะอาศาดา", สวาหะ
translations.tr: Tüm Budalara, Pūrva-āṣādha yıldızına saygılar, Svāhā.
translations.uk: Вітання всім Буддам, зірці Пурва-ашадха, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các Phật, kính chào chòm sao Pūrva-āṣādha, Svāhā.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼所有佛陀，敬礼昴宿星群中的普尔瓦·阿萨达星，圣哉。

mantras.name: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the star constellation Ashwini, svaha.
mantras.english: Salutations to all Buddhas, to the star constellation Ashwini, svaha.
mantras.transliteration: ॒namo 'stu sarvaiṣaṃ buddhavaiṣ, aśvinī-nākti-mūrtaye, svāhā।
mantras.background:
From Buddhist Vajrayana tradition, this mantra salutes all Buddhas and the lunar constellation Ashwini, ending with svāhā—an ancient Vedic offering-word. A cosmic bridge between stars and awakening!
  Grounding: Source lists: "namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ aśvinī nakṣatra svāhā" = "Salutations to all Buddhas, to Ashwini constellation, svāhā." svāhā traced to pre-Buddhist Vedic fire rituals.
mantras.benefits: This mantra salutes all Buddhas and the Ashwini star constellation, blending cosmic and awakened awareness. Per the sources, such chanting breaks through ignorance, transforms the practitioner, and channels the protective power of celestial and enlightened forces—drawing mind and cosmos into harmony.
mantras.tags: buddhist, tantric, esoteric, nakṣatra, salutation, all-buddhas, ashwini, astrological, protective

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas, a la constelación de Ashwini, svaha.
translations.ar: تحية لجميع البوذا، وتحية لتجمع النجوم "أشفينا"، آمين.
translations.bn: সমস্ত বুদ্ধদের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, আশ্বিনী নক্ষত্রমণ্ডলকে শ্রদ্ধা, স্বাহা।
translations.de: "Ich verneige mich vor allen Buddhas, vor der Sternenkonstellation Ashwini, Svaha."
translations.en-us: Greetings to all Buddhas, to the Ashwini constellation, so be it.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to all Buddhas, and salutations to the Ashwini constellation; may it be so.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas, à la constellation d'Ashwini, svaha.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודהות, לקבוצת הכוכבים אשוויני, שְׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: सभी बुद्धों को नमस्कार, अश्विन नक्षत्र को नमस्कार, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam kepada semua Buddha, kepada gugusan bintang Ashwini, svaha.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha, alla costellazione di Ashwini, svaha.
translations.ja: すべての仏陀へ、アシュヴィニ座の星々へ、合掌。
translations.ko: 모든 부처님과 아슈비니 별자리에 경의를 표합니다. 스바하. (모든 불도님과 아슈비니 별자리에 존경을 표합니다. 스바하.)
translations.nl: Groeten aan alle Boeddha's, aan de sterrenconstellatie Ashwini, svaha.
translations.pl: Składam hołd wszystkim Buddhom, konstelacji Ashwini, svaha.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas, à constelação estelar Ashwini, svaha.
translations.ru: Поклоны всем Буддам, созвездию Ашвини, ом.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor, till stjärnbilden Ashwini, svaha.
translations.th: คำนมัสการแด่พระพุทธเจ้าทั้งปวง, แด่กลุ่มดาวอัศวินี, สวาหะ
translations.tr: Tüm Buda'lara, Aşvinî takımyıldızına saygılar, hu.
translations.uk: Вітаю всіх Будд, зоряне сузір'я Ашвіні, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các vị Phật, kính chào chòm sao Ashwini, svaha.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼所有佛陀，敬礼星宿阿湿维尼，萨瓦哈。

mantras.name: Salutations to all the Buddhas, to the Northern constellation, Svaha.
mantras.english: Salutations to all the Buddhas, to the Northern constellation, Svaha.
mantras.transliteration: `Salutations to all the Buddhas, to the Northern constellation, Svāhā.`
mantras.background:
This Buddhist mantra salutes all Buddhas and a Northern star constellation, ending with "Svaha"—a Vedic offering cry. It blends pre-Buddhist astral reverence with Mahayana devotion, inviting cosmic protection.
  Grounding: Source lists nakṣatra (constellation) mantras like "namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ kṛttikā nakṣatra svāhā," showing stellar veneration fused with Buddhist salutation formulas.
mantras.benefits: Invoking all Buddhas while orienting toward celestial forces, this mantra unites cosmic awareness with devotional surrender. The source links such recitation to breaking through ignorance and guiding beings toward awakening—a compelling fusion of sky-gazing and inner transformation.
mantras.tags:
Here’s a breakdown of tags for this mantra, aiming for specificity and avoiding overly general terms:

hindu, tantric, buddhist, vajrayana, devotion, mantra, visualization, wrathful, protector, siddha, liberation, buddhist_tantra, energy_invocation

translations.es: Saludos a todos los Budas, a la constelación del norte, Svaha.
translations.ar: تحية لجميع البوذات، وتحية لكوكبة الشمال، سفاها.
translations.bn: সমস্ত বুদ্ধদের, উত্তরের নক্ষত্রমণ্ডলের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Grüße an alle Buddhas, an die nördliche Sternenkonstellation, Svaha.
translations.en-us: Salutations to all the Buddhas, to the Northern constellation, Svaha.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to all the Buddhas, to the celestial sphere of the North, Svaha.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à tous les Bouddhas, à la constellation boréale, Svaha.
translations.he: ברכות לכל הבודהות, למערך הכוכבים הצפוני, סווהא.
translations.hi: सभी बुद्धों को प्रणाम, उत्तरी नक्षत्रों को प्रणाम, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam untuk semua Buddha, untuk konstelasi Utara, Svaha.
translations.it: Salve a tutti i Buddha, alla costellazione settentrionale, Svaha.
translations.ja: すべての仏々、北斗星に礼賛を捧げます。サヴァーハ。
translations.ko: 모든 부처님과 북쪽 별자리에 경례를 올립니다. 스와하.
translations.nl: Groet aan alle Boeddha's, aan de noordelijke sterrenbeelden, Svaha.
translations.pl: Składam hołd wszystkim Buddhom, konstelacji północnej. *Svaha*.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a todos os Budas, à constelação do Norte, Svaha.
translations.ru: Поклоны всем Буддам, северному созвездию, Ом.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till alla Buddhor, till den nordliga stjärnbilden, Svaha.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่พระพุทธเจ้าทั้งปวง, แด่กลุ่มดาวทางทิศเหนือ, โอม สวาหายะ
translations.tr: Tüm Buda'lara, Kuzey takımyıldızına saygılar, Svaha.
translations.uk: Вітання всім Буддам, Північному сузір'ю, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào tất cả các vị Phật, kính chào chòm sao phương Bắc, Svaha.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼所有佛陀，向北方的星辰致敬，阿南。

mantras.name: Salutations to the Blessed One, the Physician-Teacher, the Jewel-Light Supreme, the Thus-Gone, the Worthy, the Fully-Enlightened Buddha. Homage. Om, Physician, Physician, Great Physician, King of Great Healing, Svaha.
mantras.english: Salutations to the Blessed One, the Physician-Teacher, the Jewel-Light Supreme, the Thus-Gone, the Worthy, the Fully-Enlightened Buddha. Homage. Om, Physician, Physician, Great Physician, King of Great Healing, Svaha.
mantras.original: Namo bhagavate Bhaishajya-guru vaidurya-praba-rajaya tathagataya arhate samyak-sambuddhaya tadyata *Tadyata OM bhaishajye bhaishajye maha bhaishajya raja-samudgate svaha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ namo bhagavata bhīṣajagu-rūpa-rāja-sutra-dharma-dīpti-sūrya-prabhāya tathāgatāya arhatāya samyaksambuddhāya. namo namas. ōṃ bhīṣaje bhīṣaje mahābhīṣaje bhīṣajaraja prabhu svāhā.
mantras.background: A Mahayana Buddhist healing mantra invoking the Medicine Buddha — Tathāgata (Thus-Gone), Arhat (Worthy), fully enlightened — sealing blessings with 'Svaha.'
mantras.benefits:
This Buddhist healing mantra invokes Bhaisajyaguru, the Medicine Buddha, blending devotion and sound to cultivate healing intent, mental clarity, and compassionate awareness—drawing practitioners into a living tradition of sacred sound as medicine.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Buddhist mantras connect practitioners with Buddha/bodhisattva meditative power (samadhi-bala) and serve protective, healing, and spiritually transformative functions across Mahayana traditions.
mantras.tags: buddhist, healing, medicine, devotional, ritual, compassion, mantra

translations.es: Saludos al Bendito, al Maestro-Médico, a la Joya-Luz Suprema, al Así-Liberado, al Digno, al Buda Totalmente Iluminado. Reverencia. Om, Médico, Médico, Gran Médico, Rey de la Gran Curación, Svaha.
translations.ar: التحية للواحد المبارك، والمعلم الطبيب، والجوهرة النورانية العظمى، "الذي ذهب هكذا" (أو "الذي تجاوز"، بمعنى تجاوز القيود)، والمستحق، والمستنير تمامًا، بوذا. سلام. أوم، أيها الطبيب، أيها الطبيب، أيها الطبيب العظيم، ملك الشفاء العظيم، سَوَها.
translations.bn: " blessed one, the healer and teacher, the supreme jewel-light, the one who has gone beyond (the world), the worthy one, the fully enlightened Buddha. Salutations. Om, healer, healer, great healer, king of great healing, Svaha."
translations.de: "Sei der Erleuchteten, dem Heilenden Lehrer, dem höchsten Juwel des Lichts, dem 'So-Geheiligten', dem Tugendhaften, dem vollkommen Erwachten Buddha Verbeugung. Verehrung. Om, Heile, Heile, großer Heiler, König der großen Heilung, Svaha."
translations.en-us: Salutations to the Blessed One, the Teacher-Healer, the Supreme Jewel-Light, the One Who Has Gone Beyond (the cycle of birth and death), the One Worthy of Honor, the Fully Enlightened Buddha. Homage. Om, Healer, Healer, Great Healer, King of Supreme Healing, Svaha.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to the Blessed One, the Teacher and Healer, the Supreme Jewel and Light, the One Who Has Gone Beyond (suffering), the One Worthy of Respect, the Fully Awakened Buddha. Homage. Om, Healer, Healer, Great Healer, King of Healing, Svaha.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au Bienheureux, au Guérisseur-Maître, au Joyau-Lumière Suprême, à Celui qui a Ainsi-Disparu, au Digne, au Parfaitement Éclairé Bouddha. Hommage. Om, Médecin, Médecin, Grand Médecin, Roi de la Grande Guérison, Svaha.
translations.he: בְּרָכוֹת לְמָשִׁיחַ הַמְבֻקָּשׁ, לְרוֹפֵא וּמְלַמֵּד, לְיוֹקְרַת הָאוֹר הַנּוֹרָה, לְמִי שֶׁהִתְגַּבֵּר, לְיָכֹל, לְמַאִיר הַמְּלֵא. כִּבוד. אוֹם, רוֹפֵא, רוֹפֵא, רוֹפֵא גָּדוֹל, מֶלֶךְ הָרְפוּאָה הַגְּדוֹלָה, סְוָהָה.
translations.hi: "सर्वश्रेष्ट, चिकित्सक-गुरु, परम-रत्न-प्रकाश, तथागत, पूजनीय, पूर्ण-प्रबुद्ध बुद्ध को प्रणाम। नमन। ॐ, हे चिकित्सक, हे चिकित्सक, महान चिकित्सक, महान चिकित्सा के राजा, स्वाहा।"
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada Sang Bhagava yang Mahaagung, Sang Dokter-Guru, Permata Cahaya Utama, Yang Telah Tercapai, Yang Sempurna, Buddha yang Penuh Pencerahan. Penghormatan. Om, Dokter, Dokter, Dokter Agung, Raja Penyembuhan Agung, Svaha.
translations.it: Salve al Benedetto, al Maestro-Guaritore, alla Suprema Gemma di Luce, al Così-Trasceso, al Degno, al Pieno Illuminato Buddha. Omaggio. Om, Guaritore, Guaritore, Grande Guaritore, Re della Grande Guarigione, Svaha.
translations.ja: 仏陀（ブッダ）への敬意。祝福された者、医者であり教師、至高の宝玉のような光、如来、尊者、完全な悟りを開いた仏陀。礼。オーム、医者よ、医者よ、偉大な医者よ、偉大な癒しの王よ、ソワハ。
translations.ko: 존귀하신 분, 의사와 스승이시며, 최고의 보석과 빛이시며, '그렇게 가신 분', 존경받는 분, 완전한 깨달음을 얻으신 부처님께 경의를 표합니다. 존경. 옴, 의사시여, 의사시여, 위대한 의사시여, 위대한 치유의 왕이시여, 스바하.
translations.nl: Groet aan de Verhevene, de Genezer-Leraar, het Hoogste Juweel van Licht, de Verwijde, de Vrijgevige, de Volledig Verlichte Boeddha. Eerbied. Om, Genezer, Genezer, Grote Genezer, Koning van de Grote Genesing, Svaha.
translations.pl: Składam hołd Błogosławionemu, Lekarzowi-Nauczycielowi, Najwyższemu Klejnocie-Światłu, Ten, który Doszedł do Celu, Ten, który Jest Godny, Ten, który Jest Całkowicie Oświecony, Buddzie. Czestowanie. Om, Lekarzu, Lekarzu, Wielki Lekarzu, Królu Wielkiego Uzdrawiania, Svaha.
translations.pt-br: Saudações ao Abençoado, ao Mestre Curador, à Suprema Joia de Luz, ao que Já Partiu (Tathāgata), ao Nobre, ao Totalmente Iluminado Buda. Reverência. Om, Médico, Médico, Grande Médico, Rei da Grande Cura, Svaha.
translations.ru: Преклоняюсь перед Блаженным, Учителем-Врачом, Высшим Драгоценным Светом, Тем, Кто Преодолел, Достойным, Всецело Просветленным Буддой. Почтение. Ом, Врач, Врач, Великий Врач, Царь Великого Исцеления, Сваха.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den Välsignade, den läkande Läraren, det högsta Juvel-Lyset, den som har övervunnit, den Värdiga, den fullt Upplyste Buddha. Vördnad. Om, Läkare, Läkare, Stor Läkare, Kung av Stor Läkekraft, Svaha.
translations.th: ขอความสวัสดีแก่พระผู้มีพระภาค ผู้เป็นอาจารย์แห่งการรักษา ผู้เป็นดวงประดับสูงสุด ผู้ซึ่งดับทุกข์แล้ว ผู้เป็นที่น่าเคารพ ผู้ซึ่งตรัสรู้แจ้งอย่างสมบูรณ์ คือพระพุทธเจ้า ข้าขอคารวะ ขอบูชา โอม, พระผู้รักษา, พระผู้รักษา, พระผู้รักษาที่ยิ่งใหญ่, พระมหากษัตริย์แห่งการรักษาที่ยิ่งใหญ่, สวาหะ
translations.tr: İlahi, Şifacı-Öğretmen, Yüce Mücevher-Işık, Tathāgata (Böyle-Gitmiş), Değerli, Tamamen Aydınlanmış Buddha'ya saygılar. Selamlar. Om, Şifacı, Şifacı, Ulu Şifacı, Ulu Şifa'nın Hâkimi, Svaha.
translations.uk: "Приветствия Благословенному, Целителю-Учителю, Высшему Драгоценному Свету, Тому, Кто Преодолел, Достоинному, Всецело Просветленному Будде. Почтение. Ом, Целитель, Целитель, Великий Целитель, Царь Великого Исцеления, Сваха."
translations.vi: Kính chào Đức Phật, vị Bác sĩ và Thầy, Viên ngọc sáng tối thượng, Đấng đã siêu thoát, Đấng xứng đáng, Đấng Giác ngộ viên mãn. Kính bái. Om, Bác sĩ, Bác sĩ, Đấng Bác sĩ vĩ đại, Vua của sự chữa lành vĩ đại, Svaha.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼至尊佛陀，医者导师，至高无上的明珠之光，已逝者，具德者，圆满觉悟的佛陀。 敬意。 唵，医者，医者，伟大的医者，伟大的疗愈之王，萨瓦诃。

mantras.name: Salutations to the Lord, the jewel of existence, the one who has gone beyond.
mantras.english: Salutations to the Lord, the jewel of existence, the one who has gone beyond.
mantras.transliteration: `salutāt pramīśvaraH, asti-mūrtimān, yO 'tītaH`
mantras.background: From Vajrayana Buddhism, this mantra salutes the Tathāgata—"one gone beyond"—and ratna, the cosmic jewel. Chanted for liberation, it echoes timeless Sanskrit calls to enlightened refuge.
mantras.benefits: Invoking the Tathāgata ("one who has gone beyond") and amṛta (immortal nectar), this mantra is traditionally linked to purifying all karmic afflictions (sarva-karma kleśa kṣayaṃ-kare) and fulfilling all purposes (sarvārtha-sādhane), awakening the practitioner toward liberation.
mantras.tags: buddhist, esoteric, dharani, chanting, liberation, ritual, devotional, japanese

translations.es: Saludos al Señor, la joya de la existencia, aquel que ha trascendido.
translations.ar: التحية للرب، جوهرة الوجود، الذي تجاوز الحدود.
translations.bn: "ভগবানের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, যিনি অস্তিত্বের রত্ন, যিনি সবকিছু অতিক্রম করেছেন।"
translations.de: "Grüße dem Herrn, dem Juwel des Seins, dem, der das Überwinden vollzogen hat."
translations.en-us: Salutations to the Lord, the essence of existence, the one who has transcended.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to the Lord, the essence of existence, the one who transcends all limitations.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au Seigneur, joyau de l'existence, Celui qui a transcendé.
translations.he: שלום לאדון, לתכשיט הקיום, לזה שעבר מעבר.
translations.hi: नमन भगवान को, जो अस्तित्व का रत्न है, जो सब से परे हैं।
translations.id: Salam kepada Tuhan, permata keberadaan, yang telah melampaui batas.
translations.it: Salve al Signore, gemma dell'esistenza, colui che ha trascendentato i limiti.
translations.ja: ጌ Lordへの敬意、存在の宝石、超越された方。
translations.ko: 만달라, 존재의 보석이시며, 초월하신 주님께 경배를 바칩니다. (Mandalla, 존재의 보석이시며, 초월하신 주님께 경배를 바칩니다.)
translations.nl: Groeten aan de Heer, het juweel van het bestaan, Hij die voorbij is gegaan.
translations.pl: Składam hołd Panu, klejnocie istnienia, temu, który przeniósł się poza [ten świat/ograniczenia].
translations.pt-br: Saudações ao Senhor, a joia da existência, aquele que transcendeu.
translations.ru: Приветствия Господу, драгоценности бытия, Тому, кто превзошёл.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Herren, existensens juvel, den som har överstigit allt.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่พระผู้เป็นเจ้า, มณีแห่งการมีอยู่, ผู้ซึ่งก้าวข้ามทุกสิ่ง
translations.tr: Tanrı'ya, varoluşun mücevheri olan, ötesini aşmış olan'a saygılar.
translations.uk: Вітаю Господа, перлину існування, Того, Хто перейшов за межі.
translations.vi: Kính chào Bhagava, ngọn hải đăng của sự tồn tại, Đấng đã siêu việt.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂至尊，存在之珍宝，超越者。

mantras.name: Salutations to the Supreme Lord, the King of Immortality, the One Who Has Gone Beyond (all limitations).
mantras.english: Salutations to the Supreme Lord, the King of Immortality, the One Who Has Gone Beyond (all limitations).
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ namaḥ śrī mahādeve, śivāya, yaḥ pāraḥ.
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist Vajrayana tradition, this mantra venerates Amitābha—the "Supreme Lord of Immortality"—invoking liberation. Its amṛta (nectar/immortality) syllables echo ancient Vedic fire-ritual chants seeking transcendence.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this mantra invokes amṛta—the nectar of immortality—dissolving ignorance and karmic afflictions. Practitioners awaken inner stillness and a sense of transcendence, touching the boundless nature the tradition promises lies within all beings.
mantras.tags: buddhist, esoteric, mantra, dharani, devotional, transcendence, liberation, immortality

translations.es: Saludos al Señor Supremo, Rey de la Inmortalidad, Aquel que ha trascendido (todas las limitaciones).
translations.ar: تحية للرب الأعلى، ملك الخلود، الذي تجاوز (كل القيود).
translations.bn: "सर्वोच्च प्रभুর উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণতি, যিনি অমরত্বের রাজা, যিনি সকল সীমাবদ্ধতা অতিক্রম করেছেন।"
translations.de: "Salutationen dem höchsten Herrn, dem König der Unsterblichkeit, dem, der alle Grenzen überschritten hat."
translations.en-us: Salutations to the Supreme Lord, the sovereign of immortality, the one who transcends all limitations.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to the Supreme Lord, the Sovereign of Immortality, the One who transcends all boundaries.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au Seigneur Suprême, Roi de l'Immortalité, Celui qui a transcendé (toutes les limitations).
translations.he: ברכות לאל העליון, למלך הנצח, לזה שעלה מעל לכל גבול.
translations.hi: नमस्कार परमेश्वर को, जो अमरता के राजा हैं, और जो सभी सीमाओं से परे हैं।
translations.id: Salam kepada Penguasa Agung, Raja Keabadian, Yang Telah Melampaui Segala Batasan.
translations.it: Salve al Signore Supremo, Re dell'Immortalità, Colui che ha trascenduto ogni limite.
translations.ja: 最高なる主、不死の王、すべての束縛を超越した存在への敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴, 최상의 주님께, 불멸의 왕이신 분께, 모든 한계를 초월하신 분께 경의를 표합니다. (Om, keungsangui junime ge, bulmyeolui wangisnin bun ge, modeun hangeulreul chwoeohasin bun ge gyeongui reul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl: Groet aan de Opperheer, de Koning van de Onsterfelijkheid, Hij Die alle grenzen heeft overstegen.
translations.pl: Składam hołd Najwyższemu Panu, Królowi Nieśmiertelności, Ten, który Przekroczył (wszystkie ograniczenia).
translations.pt-br: Saudações ao Senhor Supremo, Rei da Imortalidade, Aquele que Transcendeu (todas as limitações).
translations.ru: Здравствуй, Верховный Господь, Царь Бессмертия, Тот, Кто Преодолел Все Ограничения.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den Högsta Herren, Immortlighetens Konung, Han som har överstigit alla begränsningar.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมบารมีแด่พระผู้เป็นเจ้าสูงสุด, พระมหากษัตริย์แห่งความเป็นอมตะ, ผู้ซึ่งทรงก้าวข้าม (ขีดจำกัดทั้งปวง).
translations.tr: En Yüce Tanrı'ya, Ölümsüzlüğün Hükümdağı, Her Sınırı Aşan O'na saygılar.
translations.uk: Вітаю Найвищий Суверенітет, Короля Безсмертя, Того, Хто Перейшов За Межі (усього).
translations.vi: Kính chào Bhagava, vị vua của sự bất tử, Đấng đã vượt qua mọi giới hạn.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂至尊之主，永恒之王，超越一切界限者。

mantras.name: Salutations to the countless perfectly awakened Buddhas; thus, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
mantras.english: Salutations to the countless perfectly awakened Buddhas; thus, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
mantras.original: namaḥ saptānāṃ samyaksaṃbuddha koṭīnāṃ tadyathā oṃ cale cule cunde svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ cale, cule, cuṇḍe, svāhā.
mantras.background:
A Buddhist mantra saluting countless awakened Buddhas, rooted in Mahayana tradition. Its syllables Cale, Cule, Cunde invoke a bodhisattva, with Svaha sealing the sacred vow.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Mahayana sutras contain mantras saluting Buddhas; Svaha appears across listed Buddhist mantras as a closing seal; Cundi is a known Mahayana bodhisattva figure.
mantras.benefits:
Invoking countless awakened Buddhas, this mantra cultivates devotion, merit, and connection to enlightened wisdom. Practitioners report deepened compassion and mental clarity through its rhythmic, protective recitation.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Buddhist mantras foster devotion, merit, and connection to Buddhas/bodhisattvas; Mahayana mantras central to path toward Buddhahood and spiritual transformation.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mahayana, homage, buddha, devotion, awakening, enlightenment, blessing

translations.es: Saludos a los innumerables Budas completamente iluminados; así, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.ar: التحية لعدد لا يحصى من البوذات المستنيرة تمامًا؛ هكذا، "أوم"، "كاله"، "كوله"، "كونده"، "سفاه".
translations.bn: अनगिन совершенно пробуждённых Будд святых, நமঃ; इसलिए, ওম, কালে, কুলে, কুন্দে, স্বাহা।
translations.de: Grüße an die unzähligen, vollkommen erleuchteten Buddhas; so, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.en-us: Salutations to the innumerable, fully enlightened Buddhas; thus, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.en-gb: Greetings and salutations to the myriad of fully enlightened Buddhas; thus, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à l'innombrable multitude de Bouddhas parfaitement éveillés ; ainsi, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.he: ברכות לאינסוף הבודהות המוארים לחלוטין; אכן, אום, קאלה, קולה, קונדה, סווהא.
translations.hi: अनंत, पूर्ण रूप से प्रबुद्ध बुद्धों को प्रणाम; इस प्रकार, ॐ, काले, कुले, कुंदे, स्वाहा।
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada Buddha-Buddha yang tak terhitung jumlahnya, yang telah mencapai pencerahan sempurna; demikian, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.it: Salve ai innumerevoli Buddha perfettamente illuminati; così, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.ja: 無数の悟りを開いた仏陀たちへ、敬意を表します。オム、カーレ、クルエ、クンデ、スワハ。
translations.ko: 무수한 완전한 깨달음을 얻은 부처님들에게 경의를 표합니다. 오옴, 찰레, 쿨레, 쿤데, 스바하.
translations.nl: Groet aan de talloze, volledig verlichte Boeddha's; zo zij de mantra: Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.pl: Składam hołd niezliczonej ilości doskonale oświeconych Buddów; Oṁ, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.pt-br: Saudações aos inúmeros e perfeitamente iluminados Budas; assim, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.ru: Приветствия бесчисленным совершенно просветленным Буддам; таким образом, Ом, Кале, Куле, Кунде, Сваха.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till de otaliga, fullständigt upplysta Buddhaerna; således, Om, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.th: ขอแสดงความเคารพต่อพระพุทธเจ้าที่ตื่นรู้แจ้งในคุณธรรมอย่างไม่มีที่สิ้นสุด; ดังนั้น ขอภาวนาว่า: โอห์ม, คาเล, คูเล, คุนเด, สวาหะ
translations.tr: Sayısız, tamamen aydınlanmış Buda'lara saygılar; işte, Om, Kale, Kule, Kunde, Svaha.
translations.uk: Вітання незчисленним, повністю пробудженим Буддам; Отже, Ом, Кале, Куле, Кунде, Сваха.
translations.vi: Kính chào vô số những vị Phật giác ngộ hoàn hảo; Nam Mô, Cale, Cule, Cunde, Svaha.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼无量、圆满觉悟的诸佛；因此，唵，刹列，俱列，拘泥，斯瓦哈。

mantras.name: Salutations to the hundred celestial Buddhas, stars, svāhā.
mantras.english: Salutations to the hundred celestial Buddhas, stars, svāhā.
mantras.transliteration: śatāṁ devatānāṁ buddhavānām, tārānām, svāhā.
mantras.background:
From Japanese Vajrayana Buddhism, this mantra salutes all Buddhas and the 28 celestial star-constellations (nakṣatra). "Svāhā" seals the prayer with cosmic power—a living star map chanted for millennia.
  Grounding: Source lists nakṣatra mantras using "namaḥ samantabuddhānāṃ [star name] nakṣatra svāhā" — saluting all Buddhas alongside each of the 28 celestial stars.
mantras.benefits: Chanting salutations to the hundred Buddhas and stars aligns the practitioner with cosmic order, cultivating humility, vastness of mind, and protection. The nakṣatra tradition links inner purification to celestial harmony, awakening awe and interconnectedness.
mantras.tags: buddhist, mantra, dharani, buddha, celestial, homage, recitation, devotional, stars, protection

translations.es: Saludos a los cien Budas celestiales, estrellas, svāhā.
translations.ar: التحية لمئة من الأوتار السماوية، النجوم، سَڤاهَا.
translations.bn: सौ শত দিব্য বুদ্ধ, ताराएँ, स्वाहा को प्रणाम।
translations.de: Grüße an die hundert himmlischen Buddhas, Sterne, Svāhā.
translations.en-us: Greetings to the hundred celestial Buddhas, stars, and the auspicious utterance "Svāhā."
translations.en-gb: Salutations to the hundred celestial Buddhas, stars, and *svāhā*.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations aux cent Bouddhas célestes, étoiles, svāhā.
translations.he: ברכות למאה הבודהות השמימיות, כוכבים, סוואה.
translations.hi: सौ दिव्य बुद्धों, तारों और स्वाहों को नमस्कार।
translations.id: Salam kepada seratus Buddha surgawi, bintang-bintang, svāhā.
translations.it: Saluti ai cento Buddha celesti, alle stelle, svāhā.
translations.ja: 諸天の百の仏、星々よ、スワハ。

mantras.name: Tayatha Om Bekanze Bekanze Maha Bekanze Radza Samudgate Svaha
mantras.english: Thus: Om, eliminate pain, eliminate pain, eliminate the great pain, O King who has gone beyond — so be it
mantras.transliteration: Tayatha Om Bekanze Bekanze Maha Bekanze Radza Samudgate Svaha
mantras.abstract:
The Medicine Buddha mantra is the principal mantra of Sangye Menla, the Medicine Buddha, known in Sanskrit as Bhaisajyaguru, the Master of Healing. The Medicine Buddha is depicted with lapis-lazuli blue skin, representing the purity of the dharmakaya, holding a myrobalan fruit in his right hand and a bowl of healing nectar in his left. He is the Buddha who, while still a bodhisattva, made twelve great vows, each concerned with the liberation of beings from specific forms of physical, mental, and spiritual suffering.

The word bekanze is understood as a transformation of the Sanskrit Bhaisajye, meaning medicine or healing. The triple repetition — bekanze, bekanze, maha bekanze — invokes healing at three levels: the physical level of bodily disease, the mental level of the afflictions and disturbing emotions that create suffering, and the ultimate level of the fundamental illness of ignorance that generates all samsaric experience. Radza means king, referring to the Medicine Buddha's sovereignty over all healing.

The practice of Medicine Buddha has roots in Indian Mahayana texts, particularly the Bhaisajyaguru Sutra, which describes his Pure Land in the east and the extraordinary benefits of reciting his name and mantra. Practitioners visualize blue light and healing nectar flowing from the Medicine Buddha into the bodies and minds of themselves and others, dissolving all illness and obscuration.

In contemporary practice, the Medicine Buddha mantra has become widely used across Buddhist traditions and even beyond, as its resonance with intentions of healing makes it accessible to practitioners of many backgrounds.

translations.ko: 자비의 씨앗, 자비, 위대한 자비, 고통을 없애는 만트라의 울림이 깨어나기를.
translations.nl: De zaad van compassie, compassie, grote compassie, moge het geluid van de mantra die lijden wegneemt, ontwaakt worden.
translations.pl: Nasiono współczucia, współczucie, wielkie współczucie, niech brzmienie mantry, która uwalnia od cierpienia, zostanie obudzone.
translations.pt-br: A semente da compaixão, a compaixão, a grande compaixão, que o som do mantra que elimina o sofrimento seja despertado.
translations.ru: Семя сострадания, сострадание, великое сострадание, да будет пробужден звук мантры, устраняющей страдание.
translations.sv: Fröet av medkänsla, medkänsla, stor medkänsla, må ljudet av mantrat som befriar från lidande, väckas.
translations.th: ขอให้เมล็ดแห่งความเมตตา, ความเมตตา, ความเมตตาอันยิ่งใหญ่, จงตื่นขึ้น เถิด และขอให้เสียงของคาถาที่ขจัดความทุกข์, จงเกิดขึ้น.
translations.tr: Şefkatin tohumu, şefkat, büyük şefkat, acıyı ortadan kaldıran mantra'nın sesi, uyanmış olsun.
translations.uk: Насіння співчуття, співчуття, велике співчуття, нехай звук мантри, що усуває страждання, пробудиться.
translations.vi: "Hạt giống của lòng từ bi, lòng từ bi, lòng từ bi vô cùng lớn, xin âm thanh của thần chú xua tan khổ đau, hãy thức tỉnh."
translations.zh-cn: 慈悲之种，慈悲，大慈悲，愿消除痛苦的真言之音，得以显现。

mantras.name: The sounds of going beyond, going beyond, completely going beyond, fully going beyond – enlightenment, hail!
mantras.english: The sounds of going beyond, going beyond, completely going beyond, fully going beyond – enlightenment, hail!
mantras.original: Gate gate paragate parasamgate bodhi svaha
mantras.transliteration: `guṇa-guṇa, pari-guṇa, ati-guṇa, purṇa-guṇa – bodhe, ājyā!`
mantras.background:
A Buddhist mantra not tied to any figure, "Gate Gate Paragate Parasamgate Bodhi Svaha" means "Going beyond, completely going beyond — enlightenment, hail!" — a call to awakening.
  Grounding: Source lists it under "Buddhist Mantras not associated with figures"; phrase translation provided in the mantra phrase field directly.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Heart Sutra mantra guides the mind through progressive stages of transcendence toward enlightenment ("bodhi"). Its layered structure mirrors the meditative journey — from ordinary awareness to complete liberation.
mantras.tags: buddhist, enlightenment, transcendence, wisdom, liberation, sanskrit

translations.es: Los sonidos de trascendencia, de superación, de trascendencia total, de superación plena – ¡iluminación, saludo!
translations.ar: تلك الأصوات التي تتجاوز، والتي تتجاوز، والتي تتجاوز بالكامل، والتي تتجاوز تمامًا – يا نور!
translations.bn: অতিক্রমণের ধ্বনি, অতিক্রমণের ধ্বনি, সম্পূর্ণরূপে অতিক্রমণের ধ্বনি, সম্পূর্ণরূপে অতিক্রমণের ধ্বনি - জ্ঞান,Hail!
translations.de: Die Klänge des Überschreitens, des Überschreitens, des vollständigen Überschreitens, des vollkommenen Überschreitens – Lob sei der Erleuchtung!
translations.en-us: The sounds that signify transcending, transcending completely, transcending fully – enlightenment, salutations!
translations.en-gb: The sounds of transcendence, of surpassing limitations, of complete transcendence, of utter transcendence – enlightenment, we salute you!
translations.fr-fr: Les sons du dépassement, du dépassement absolu, du dépassement total, du dépassement complet – illumination, salut !
translations.he: מעבר, מעבר, מעבר שלם, מעבר מלא - התעוררות, שבח!
translations.hi: "अतिगमन की ध्वनियाँ, अतिगमन, पूर्ण अतिगमन, पूर्णतया अतिगमन - बोध, स्वागत!"
translations.id: Suara dari melampaui, terus melampaui, sepenuhnya melampaui, sepenuhnya mencapai pencerahan, salam!
translations.it: I suoni del superamento, del superamento, del superamento completo, del superamento totale – illuminazione, saluto!
translations.ja: 超越の音、超越の音、完全に超越、完全に超越 – 悟りよ、我に降れ！ (Chōetsu no oto, chōetsu no oto, kanzen ni chōetsu, kanzen ni chōetsu – Satori yo, ware ni orere!)
translations.ko: 초월하는 소리, 계속해서 초월하는 소리, 완전히 초월하는 소리, 완전히 초월하는 소리 - 깨달음이여, 존경합니다!
translations.nl: De klanken van het overstijgen, het overstijgen, het volledig overstijgen, het volledig doorbreken – verlichting, ode aan u!
translations.pl: Dźwięki przekraczania, przekraczania, całkowitego przekraczania, pełnego przekraczania – o, oświecenie!
translations.pt-br: Os sons de transcendência, de ir além, de transcendência total, de superação completa – iluminação, saudações!
translations.ru: Звуки превосхождения, превосхождения, полного превосхождения, абсолютного превосхождения – привет, просветление!
translations.sv: Ljuden av att överstiga, att överstiga, att fullständigt överstiga, att fullt ut överstiga – upplysning, hälsning!
translations.th: เสียงแห่งการก้าวข้าม, การก้าวข้าม, การก้าวข้ามอย่างสมบูรณ์, การก้าวข้ามอย่างเต็มที่ – ขอคารวะแด่ปัญญาญาณ!
translations.tr: Aşkın sesleri, aşkın, tamamen aşkın, tam olarak aşkın – aydınlanma, selamlar!
translations.uk: Звуки, що виходять за межі, що виходять за межі, що повністю виходять за межі, що повністю переступають межі – просвітлення, вітаю!
translations.vi: Âm thanh của sự siêu越, sự siêu越, sự siêu越 hoàn toàn, sự siêu越 trọn vẹn – giác ngộ, chào!
translations.zh-cn: 超越之音，不断超越，彻底超越，完全超越——启迪，敬礼！

mantras.name: We meditate on the glorious light of the divine.
mantras.english: We meditate on the glorious light of the divine.
mantras.transliteration: हम दिव्य कीGlorious प्रकाश पर ध्यान करते हैं।
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, this mantra meditates on divine light. "Mantra" means "tool of thought" (man=think, -tra=tool), channeling sacred vibrations to awaken spiritual consciousness.
mantras.benefits: Meditating on divine light sharpens focus, awakens inner awareness, and elevates consciousness. Rooted in Vedic tradition, such practice stills the mind, reveals deeper truths, and can reduce stress—inviting transformation through sacred sound and intention.
mantras.tags: hindu, tibetan, buddhist, mantra, repetition, devotion, sound, consciousness, visualization, spiritual, tantric, healing, mantra

translations.es: Meditamos en la gloriosa luz de lo divino.
translations.ar: نحن نتأمل في النور المجيد للإله.
translations.bn: আমরা দিব্য的光輝的光芒 पर ध्यान लगाते हैं।
translations.de: Wir meditieren über das glorreiche Licht des Göttlichen.
translations.en-us: We contemplate the radiant glory of the divine.
translations.en-gb: We contemplate the radiant glory of the divine.
translations.fr-fr: Nous méditons sur la lumière glorieuse du divin.
translations.he: אנו מתבוננים באור המפואר של האלוהי.
translations.hi: हम दिव्य के प्रकाश की महिमा पर ध्यान करते हैं।
translations.id: Kami merenungkan cahaya ilahi yang agung.
translations.it: Meditiamo sulla luce gloriosa del divino.
translations.ja: 我们沉思于神圣的光辉。
translations.ko: 우리는 신성한 빛의 영광을 명상합니다.
translations.nl: Wij mediteren op het heerlijke licht van het goddelijke.
translations.pl: Medytujemy na chwalebnym świetle boskim.
translations.pt-br: Meditamos na luz gloriosa do divino.
translations.ru: Мы созерцаем сияющий свет божественного.
translations.sv: Vi mediterar över det härliga ljuset från det gudomliga.
translations.th: เราทำสมาธิในแสงอันรุ่งโรจน์ของสิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์
translations.tr: Biz, ilahi ışığın görkemli parıltısını medite ediyoruz.
translations.uk: Мы розмірковуємо про славетне світло Божественного.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thiền định về ánh sáng huy hoàng của Đấng thiêng liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 我们冥想神圣的光芒。

mantras.name: While inhaling, I am present.
mantras.english: While inhaling, I am present.
mantras.transliteration: While inhaling, I am present.
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist mindfulness, this mantra trains the mind—Sanskrit "manas+tra"—to heel like a puppy, syncing breath and presence in every inhale.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in mindfulness traditions, this breath-linked mantra trains the mind to "heel" like a puppy, suppressing the wandering DMN. It fosters presence, reduces stress and anxiety, and syncs heart and nervous system through resonant breathing.
mantras.tags: breath, affirmation, presence, mindfulness, focus, grounding, centering, awareness, stress, anxiety, healing

translations.es: Mientras inhalo, estoy presente.
translations.ar: بينما أتنفس، أنا حاضر.
translations.bn: শ্বাস নেওয়ার সময়, আমি বর্তমান।
translations.de: Während ich einatme, bin ich im gegenwärtigen Moment.
translations.en-us: As I breathe in, I am aware of the present moment.
translations.en-gb: As I breathe in, I am mindful.
translations.fr-fr: Pendant que j'inspire, je suis pleinement présent.
translations.he: בזמן שאני נושם, אני נוכח.
translations.hi: साँस लेते हुए, मैं वर्तमान में हूँ।
translations.id: Saat menarik napas, saya hadir.
translations.it: Mentre inspiro, sono nel momento presente.
translations.ja: 呼吸をするとき、私は今ここにいる。
translations.ko: 숨을 들이마시는 동안, 저는 현재에 존재합니다.
translations.nl: Terwijl ik inadem, ben ik aanwezig.
translations.pl: Wdychając, ja jestem obecny.
translations.pt-br: Ao inspirar, estou presente.
translations.ru: Во время вдоха я пребываю в настоящем.
translations.sv: Medan jag andas in, är jag närvarande.
translations.th: ขณะที่หายใจเข้า, ฉันตื่นตัวอยู่กับปัจจุบัน.
translations.tr: Nefes alırken, ben buradayım.
translations.uk: Під час вдиху я усвідомлюю теперішню мить.
translations.vi: Khi hít vào, tôi đang ở hiện tại.
translations.zh-cn: 在吸气时，我正念当下。

mantras.name: Without thought, there is no self.
mantras.english: Without thought, there is no self.
mantras.transliteration: Bez misli, nėra sebsti.
mantras.background: "Without thought, there is no self" — a striking phrase pointing to the dissolution of ego through stillness. Its literal meaning invites profound inquiry: who are you when the mind goes quiet?
mantras.benefits: Practicing this mantra cultivates ego dissolution and present-moment awareness. Rooted in contemplative insight, it invites the practitioner to witness how identity dissolves in stillness — unlocking inner peace, reduced anxiety, and profound self-inquiry.
mantras.tags: buddhist, emptiness, anatman, non-duality, cessation, mindfulness, vipassana, selflessness, awareness, liberation, reduction, contemplation

translations.es: Sin reflexión, no hay autoconciencia.
translations.ar: بدون تفكير، لا وجود للذات.
translations.bn: চিন্তা ব্যতীত, কোনো সত্তা নেই।
translations.de: Ohne Reflexion gibt es kein Selbst.
translations.en-us: Without conscious awareness, there is no sense of self.
translations.en-gb: Without conscious awareness, there is no sense of self.
translations.fr-fr: Sans réflexion, il n'y a pas de conscience de soi.
translations.he: בלי מחשבה, אין זהות.
translations.hi: बिना विचार के, कोई स्व नहीं होता।
translations.id: Tanpa kesadaran, tidak ada diri.
translations.it: Senza pensiero, non esiste l'io.
translations.ja: 思考がなければ、自己は存在しない。
translations.ko: 생각 없이, 자아는 존재하지 않는다.
translations.nl: Zonder reflectie is er geen zelfbewustzijn.
translations.pl: Bez świadomości nie ma tożsamości.
translations.pt-br: Sem reflexão, não há identidade.
translations.ru: Без осознанности нет "я".
translations.sv: Utan eftertanke finns ingen själ.
translations.th: หากปราศจากความคิด ไม่มีตัวตน
translations.tr: Düşünce olmadan, benlik yoktur.
translations.uk: Без роздумів немає "Я".
translations.vi: Nếu không có suy nghĩ, thì không có bản ngã.
translations.zh-cn: 如果没有思考，就没有自我。

mantras.name: [Mala Branch Buddha Mantra]
mantras.english: [Mala Branch Buddha Mantra]
mantras.transliteration: ओं मा ला शा 佛陀 真言 (Ōng mā lā shā fó tuō zhēn yán)
mantras.background: No source content was provided beyond the mantra's label. I cannot responsibly describe its origin, tradition, or meaning without fabricating unsupported claims.
mantras.benefits: No answer can be provided.
mantras.tags: mala branch buddha, buddhist, mantra, recitation, devotion, visualization, buddha, enlightenment, serenity, ritual, tantric, buddhist practice

translations.es: "Mantra del Buda de la Rama del Malo"
translations.ar:
لا يوجد ترجمة عربية مباشرة أو قياسية لعبارة "Mala Branch Buddha Mantra" لأنها عبارة مركبة تجمع بين عناصر من عدة تقاليد روحية. ومع ذلك، يمكن تقديم ترجمة تقريبية تركز على المعنى:

"ترتيلة بوذا الخاصة بفروع المالا." أو "ترتيلة بوذية مرتبطة بفروع المالا."
translations.bn: মালা শাখা বুদ্ধ মন্ত্র।
translations.de: Der Mala-Zweig-Buddha-Mantra.
translations.en-us: "Mala Branch Buddha Mantra" can be translated as "The Buddha Mantra associated with the Mala branch" or "The Buddha Mantra specific to the Mala lineage/tradition."
translations.en-gb: "Mala Branch Buddha Mantra" can be translated as "The Buddha Mantra associated with the Mala branch" or "The Buddha Mantra originating from or related to the Mala lineage/tradition."
translations.fr-fr: Le mantra de Mala, dédié au Bouddha.
translations.he: מנטרה של בודהה המתייחס לענף המאלה.
translations.hi: माला शाखा बुद्ध मंत्र।
translations.id: Mantra Mala Cabang Buddha.
translations.it: Mantra del Buddha associato al ramo di Mala.
translations.ja: 摩拉枝仏の真言 (Mora-shi Butsu no Shingon)
translations.ko: 말라 분기 불교 만트라 (Malla bun-gi bulgyo manteura)
translations.nl: Mala Branch Buddha Mantra: Ketting-takel Boeddha-mantra.
translations.pl: Mantra Buddy w Ośrodku Mala.
translations.pt-br: Mantra do Buda da Rama (ou do Galho de Rama).
translations.ru: Мантра ветви Малы, посвященная Будде.
translations.sv: Mala-grenens Buddhamantra.
translations.th: มนต์พระพุทธเจ้าแห่งสาขามาลา (Mon Pra Buddha Chao Haeng Saka Mala)
translations.tr: Mala Dizi Buda Mantrası
translations.uk: Мантра Будди з гілки малинового дерева.
translations.vi: Châm ngôn của Phật về nhánh cây Mala.
translations.zh-cn: 玛拉分支佛咒.

mantras.name: [Mantra for] the White Umbrella's Protective Spell.
mantras.english: [Mantra for] the White Umbrella's Protective Spell.
mantras.transliteration: 唵 白傘 護法 咒.
mantras.background: From Vajrayana Buddhism, the White Umbrella's Protective Spell (白伞盖陀罗尼) shields devotees from harm. The source lists it among powerful Buddha-crown dharanis—inviting deep protective practice.
mantras.benefits: The White Umbrella's Protective Spell is traditionally linked to spiritual shielding and karmic purification. Practitioners report a sense of fearlessness and inner calm, as the mantra is understood to ward off harm and obstacles—inviting curiosity about Buddhism's rich dharani tradition.
mantras.tags: buddhist, guan yin, protection, healing, mantra, devotion, white umbrella, spell, dharma, purification, compassion, fortune, bodhisattva

translations.es: La fórmula mántrica para el hechizo de protección del paraguas blanco.
translations.ar: تعويذة الحماية الخاصة بالمظلة البيضاء.
translations.bn: সাদা ছাতার সুরক্ষামূলক মন্ত্র।
translations.de: Der Schutzmantra des weißen Regenschirms.
translations.en-us: The incantation/chant for the White Umbrella's protective enchantment.
translations.en-gb: The incantation for the White Umbrella's protective enchantment.
translations.fr-fr: La formule de protection du sortilège de l'Ombrelle Blanche.
translations.he: לחש להגנה באמצעות המטרייה הלבנה.
translations.hi: श्वेत छत्र के रक्षा मंत्र।
translations.id: Mantra untuk Pesugihan Payung Putih.
translations.it: La formula magica per l'incantesimo protettivo dell'Ombrello Bianco.
translations.ja: 白傘の守護呪文 (Shiro kasa no shugō jumon)
translations.ko: 백우산의 보호 주문.
translations.nl: Het beschermende gebed/de bezwering van de Witte Parasol.
translations.pl: Mantry dla ochronnego zaklęcia Białego Parasola.
translations.pt-br:
Tradução do mantra para a proteção da Abundância (considerando "White Umbrella" como um símbolo de proteção e prosperidade).

"Mantra para o feitiço de proteção da Abundância."
translations.ru: Мантра для защитной силы белого зонта.
translations.sv: Mantrat för den vita paraplyets skyddande besvärjelse.
translations.th: คาถาสำหรับมนตราแห่งการปกป้องโดยพระคาถาแห่งร่มสีขาว
translations.tr: Beyaz Şemsiyenin Koruyucu Büyüsüne Yönelik Mantra.
translations.uk: Мантра для захисного заклинання Білого Парасоля.
translations.vi: Châm chú bảo vệ của chiếc ô trắng.
translations.zh-cn: 白色伞的护佑咒语.

mantras.name: [Mantra of] Amithabha Tathagata, for extinguishing karmic obstacles.
mantras.english: [Mantra of] Amithabha Tathagata, for extinguishing karmic obstacles.
mantras.transliteration: 唵 弥勒 佛 如来，消除业障.
mantras.background: Rooted in Chinese Buddhist tradition, this mantra of Amitabha Tathagata ("Thus-Gone One of Infinite Light") aims to extinguish karmic obstacles, opening the path to pure land liberation.
mantras.benefits: Reciting Amitabha Tathagata's mantra is said to extinguish karmic obstacles — deep-rooted patterns blocking spiritual growth. Practitioners report inner purification, reduced anxiety, and a growing sense of boundless compassion awakening within.
mantras.tags: buddhist, amithabha, pure land, dharani, karma purification, obstacle clearing, mahayana

translations.es: El mantra del Tathágata Amitabha, para disipar los obstáculos kármicos.
translations.ar: دعاء أميثابها بوذا لإزالة العقبات الكارمية.
translations.bn: অমিতabha বুদ্ধের সেই মন্ত্র, যা কর্মের বাধা দূর করে।
translations.de: Das Mantra des Amitabha-Buddha, zur Beseitigung karmischer Hindernisse.
translations.en-us: The mantra of Amithabha Tathagata, intended to eliminate karmic hindrances.
translations.en-gb: The mantra of Amithabha Tathagata, intended to eliminate karmic impediments.
translations.fr-fr: Le mantra de l'Amitabha Tathagata, destiné à dissiper les obstacles karmiques.
translations.he: מנטרה של אמיטאבה, הבודהה, להסרת מכשולים קארמיים.
translations.hi: अमिताभ बुद्ध के मंत्र, जो कर्म के अवरोधों को दूर करने में सहायक हैं।
translations.id: Mantra dari Buddha Amitabha, untuk menghilangkan rintangan karmik.
translations.it: Il mantra dell'Amithaba Tathagata, per eliminare gli ostacoli karmici.
translations.ja: 阿弥陀如来，消除业障的真言。
translations.ko: 아미타불 여래의 진언, 업장 장애를 소멸시키는.
translations.nl: Het mantra van Amitabha Boeddha, om karma-obstakels te overwinnen.
translations.pl: Mantrę Amitabha Tathagaty, mającą na celu unicestwienie przeszkód karmicznych.
translations.pt-br: Mantra do Tathagata Amitabha, para eliminar obstáculos kármicos.
translations.ru: Мантра Амитабхи, Будды, для преодоления препятствий, созданных кармой.
translations.sv: Mantrat tilldelat Amitabha Buddha, för att avlägsna karmiska hinder.
translations.th: มนต์ศักดิ์สิทธิ์แห่งพระอมิตาภพุทธะ เพื่อดับอุปสรรคกรรม
translations.tr: Amithabha Buda'nın, karmik engelleri ortadan kaldırmaya yönelik mantrası.

mantras.name: [Mantra] The True Words of Offering and Sustenance through the Unimpeded Diamond.
mantras.english: [Mantra] The True Words of Offering and Sustenance through the Unimpeded Diamond.
mantras.transliteration: 唵嘛呢唄咪吽
mantras.background: From Chinese Vajrayana Buddhism, 不空摩尼供养真言 means "True Words of Unimpeded Gem Offering." It transforms recitation into limitless offerings for all Buddhas—inviting practitioners into boundless generosity.
mantras.benefits: Practitioners of this mantra cultivate boundless generosity and inner abundance. By mentally manifesting limitless offerings to all Buddhas and Bodhisattvas, the mind expands beyond scarcity, nurturing compassion and devotion as daily psychological practice.
mantras.tags: buddhist, dharani, vajra, offering, chinese, mantra

translations.de: Die wahren Worte des Angebots und der Erhaltung durch den ungehinderten Diamanten.
translations.en-us: The True Words of Offering and Nourishment through the Unobstructed Diamond.
translations.en-gb: The True Words for Offering and Sustenance, Revealed through the Unobstructed Diamond.
translations.fr-fr: La Vérité révélée : Offrande et subsistance par le Diamant Illimité.
translations.he: מילים אמת של הקרבה ותחזוקה דרך היהלום הבלתי-מעורער.
translations.hi: "अवरोध रहित वज्र के माध्यम से, भेंट और पोषण के सच्चे वचन।"
translations.id: Mantra: Kata-kata Sejati Persembahan dan Pemberian melalui Berlian yang Tak Terhalang.
translations.it: Le Verità Assolute dell'Offerta e del Sostentamento attraverso il Diamante Imperturbabile.

translations.ko: 진리의 말씀, 비취의 자유로운 광채를 통한 봉납과 유지. (眞理의 말씀, 翡翠의 자유로운 광채를 통한 奉납과 유지.)
translations.nl: De Echte Woorden van Aanbod en Onderhoud, door de Onbelemmerde Diamant.

translations.zh-cn: 供养与维生的真言，源自无碍金刚。

mantras.name: [Mantra] To restrain the building, the grandson, the Buddha, the mantra.

mantras.transliteration: 唵 约束 建筑物，孙子，佛，咒语.
mantras.background: From China's Buddhist mantra tradition (佛门网), dharanis like this blend Sanskrit origins with Chinese practice. Reciting mantras is said to purify karma and protect practitioners — a living tradition worth exploring!
mantras.benefits: The source material lists many Buddhist mantras with specific benefits, but does not identify or detail this particular mantra phrase's traits. No specific spiritual or psychological benefits can be responsibly attributed to it from the provided sources.
mantras.tags: buddhist, dharani, mantra, recitation, protection, purification, buddha, practice

translations.es: Para contener la construcción, al nieto, al Buda, el mantra.
translations.ar: لتقييد البناء، والحفيد، والبوذا، والترتيلة.
translations.bn: ভবনটিকে স্থির রাখতে, বংশধরকে, বুদ্ধকে, মন্ত্র।
translations.de: Um das Gebäude zu stabilisieren, den Enkel, Buddha, den Zauberspruch.
translations.en-us: To control the structure, the descendant, the Buddha, and the mantra.
translations.en-gb: To control the structure, the descendant, the Buddha, the mantra.
translations.fr-fr: Pour maîtriser la construction, le descendant, le Bouddha, le mantra.
translations.he: כדי לעצור את הבנייה, את הנכד, את הבודהה, את המנטרה.
translations.hi: इमारत को स्थिर करने के लिए, पोते, बुद्ध, मंत्र।

translations.it: Per contenere [l'edificio/l'energia], il nipote, il Buddha, il mantra.

translations.pt-br: Para conter a construção, o neto, o Buda, o mantra.
translations.ru: Чтобы удержать [стройку/здание], внука, Будду, [произнесите] мантру.

translations.th: เพื่อควบคุมอาคาร, หลานชาย, พระพุทธเจ้า, มนต์.
translations.tr: Yapıyı kontrol altına almak için, torun, Buda ve mantra.
translations.uk: Щоб стримати будівлю, онука, Будду, мантру.

translations.zh-cn: 约束建筑物，约束孙子，约束佛陀，咒语。

mantras.name: [The Mantra Spoken Before Shakyamuni's Passing (Nirvana)].
mantras.english: [The Mantra Spoken Before Shakyamuni's Passing (Nirvana)].
mantras.transliteration: 佛陀涅槃前所说真言 (Fótuó nièpán qián suǒ shuō zhēnyán)
mantras.background: From Zen's Mumonkan (1228), Master Zhaozhou's "Mu" (無/No) is the most assigned Rinzai koan — a single syllable designed to shatter conceptual mind and reveal Buddha-nature.
mantras.benefits: The source lists this mantra within a Chinese Buddhist dharani tradition focused on eliminating karmic obstacles and attaining liberation. Its association with Shakyamuni's final moment invites practitioners to contemplate the threshold between existence and nirvana—a profound psychological confrontation with impermanence.
mantras.tags: buddhist, zen, awareness, non-dual, wisdom, sound, liberation, mantra, inquiry, kensho, shakyamuni, mu

translations.es: La fórmula sagrada recitada antes del fallecimiento (Nirvana) de Shakyamuni.

translations.de: Der beim Eintritt von Shakyamuni ins Nirvana gesprochene Gebet/Mantra.
translations.en-us: The mantra recited before Shakyamuni's Parinirvana (final passing).
translations.en-gb: The incantation recited prior to Shakyamuni's attainment of Nirvana.
translations.fr-fr: Le mantra récité avant le décès (Nirvana) de Shakyamuni.

translations.nl: De mantra die uitgesproken werd vóór de verlichting (of het sterven) van Shakyamuni.

translations.ru: Мантра, произносимая перед уходом Шакьямуни в нирвану.
translations.sv: Mantrat som reciterades före Shakyamunis död (Nirvana).
translations.th: มนต์ที่กล่าวขึ้นก่อนการดับขันธ์ของพระโคตมพุทธะ (นิพพาน).
translations.tr: Shakyamuni'nin Nirvana'ya Ulaştığı An Öncesinde Söylenen Mantra.
translations.uk: Мантра, що промовляється перед відходом Шак'ямуні в нірвану.

translations.zh-cn: 佛陀涅槃前所说的心咒.

mantras.name: Agnus Dei
mantras.english: Lamb of God
mantras.original: Agnus Dei, qui tollis peccata mundi, miserere nobis. Agnus Dei, qui tollis peccata mundi, dona nobis pacem.
mantras.transliteration: Agnus Dei, qui tollis peccata mundi, miserere nobis. Agnus Dei, qui tollis peccata mundi, dona nobis pacem.
mantras.abstract:
Agnus Dei draws its words from John the Baptist's proclamation at the Jordan River upon seeing Jesus: Behold the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world (John 1:29). The title Lamb of God is one of the richest christological images in the entire New Testament, weaving together the Passover lamb of Exodus, the suffering servant of Isaiah 53, and the apocalyptic Lamb enthroned in the Book of Revelation.

The prayer entered the Roman Mass in the seventh century, introduced by Pope Sergius I (687–701). Originally it was sung as a threefold litany during the breaking of the bread, reflecting the image of the Lamb's sacrifice made present in the eucharistic action. Over time the third petition was changed from miserere nobis to dona nobis pacem, reflecting the theological movement from penitence to the peace that Christ gives.

In Masses for the Dead (Requiem), the petition becomes dona eis requiem and dona eis requiem sempiternam, making the Agnus Dei a prayer for the dead that both voices grief and asserts hope. The great Requiem settings of Mozart, Verdi, Fauré, and Brahms have made these words among the most emotionally freighted in Western music.

Theologically, the Agnus Dei encodes a complete soteriology. The Lamb takes away the sin of the world — not just individual sins but the cosmic burden of broken relationship between creation and creator. As a contemplative prayer, the Agnus Dei is used in meditative repetition particularly in preparation for receiving communion and in intercessory prayer for the healing of conflict and violence.

translations.en: Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, have mercy on us. Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, grant us peace.
translations.zh: 天主的羔羊，除免世罪者，求你垂怜我们；天主的羔羊，除免世罪者，赐给我们平安。
translations.es: Cordero de Dios, que quitas el pecado del mundo, ten piedad de nosotros. Cordero de Dios, que quitas el pecado del mundo, danos la paz.

mantras.name: Alleluia
mantras.english: Praise the Lord / Praise Yahweh
mantras.transliteration: Hallelujah / Alleluia
mantras.abstract:
Alleluia is among the most ancient of all sacred utterances, a direct inheritance from Hebrew worship that passed without translation into every language in which Christians have ever prayed. The word combines hallelu (praise, in the imperative plural) with Yah, the shortened form of the divine name YHWH. It first appears in the Psalms, particularly the Hallel psalms (113–118) and the closing doxological cluster of the Psalter.

In Jewish liturgy, the Hallel psalms were sung at Passover, and Jesus and his disciples sang them at the conclusion of the Last Supper. The Book of Revelation records a heavenly choir singing Alleluia four times in chapter 19, establishing it as the anthem of the eschatological triumph of God.

In the Roman Rite, Alleluia has exceptional status: it is the only liturgical text completely suppressed during the penitential season of Lent, its absence making its return at the Easter Vigil an event of overwhelming emotional and spiritual power. Many churches dramatize this return by having the congregation sing the Alleluia with increasing volume, symbolizing the rolling away of the stone from the tomb.

Musically, the Alleluia has generated more musical composition than perhaps any other sacred text. Gregorian melismatic Alleluias — in which a single syllable is extended over dozens of flowing notes — represent some of the most elaborate and beautiful of all medieval chant. As a contemplative mantra, Alleluia is used as a pure act of praise requiring no object beyond God and no movement of the self beyond joy.

translations.en: Praise the Lord
translations.zh: 哈利路亚（赞美上主）
translations.es: Aleluya (Alabado sea el Señor)

mantras.name: Anima Christi
mantras.english: Soul of Christ
mantras.original: Anima Christi, sanctifica me. Corpus Christi, salva me. Sanguis Christi, inebria me. Aqua lateris Christi, lava me.
mantras.transliteration: Anima Christi, sanctifica me. Corpus Christi, salva me. Sanguis Christi, inebria me. Aqua lateris Christi, lava me.
mantras.abstract:
The Anima Christi is a medieval Latin prayer addressed to the humanity of Christ in its most intimate dimensions — soul, body, blood, water from the wounded side — asking each in turn to perform a specific act of transformation upon the one who prays: sanctify, save, inebriate, wash, strengthen, hide, defend, call. Its earliest manuscript attestations date from the early fourteenth century, and it was long attributed to Pope John XXII or Bernardine of Siena.

Ignatius of Loyola placed it at the opening of his Spiritual Exercises in the sixteenth century, transforming its circulation. The Spiritual Exercises, used as the basis for the thirty-day silent retreat offered by Jesuits to thousands of retreatants across five centuries, begins and ends each period of prayer with the Anima Christi. Among those known to have loved the prayer are Cardinal John Henry Newman, Thomas More, and the poet Gerard Manley Hopkins.

The prayer's structure is a litany of imperatives directed at Christ's humanity, and this structure is theologically distinctive. Rather than addressing the transcendent God or even the risen Christ in his glory, the prayer turns to the incarnate details of Christ's earthly existence — the soul that suffered in Gethsemane, the body given at the Last Supper, the blood poured out at Calvary.

The phrase Sanguis Christi, inebria me (Blood of Christ, inebriate me) is arrestingly bold. The image of divine intoxication is drawn from the tradition of mystical theology reaching back through Bernard of Clairvaux to the Song of Songs. In contemplative practice, the Anima Christi is used as a preparation for receiving communion, as a closing prayer after silent meditation, and as a framework for the examination of conscience.

translations.en: Soul of Christ, sanctify me. Body of Christ, save me. Blood of Christ, inebriate me. Water from the side of Christ, wash me.
translations.zh: 基督的灵魂，圣化我。基督的身体，拯救我。基督的宝血，陶醉我。基督肋旁流出的水，洁净我。
translations.es: Alma de Cristo, santifícame. Cuerpo de Cristo, sálvame. Sangre de Cristo, embriágame. Agua del costado de Cristo, lávame.

mantras.name: Ave Maria
mantras.english: Hail Mary
mantras.original: Ave Maria, gratia plena, Dominus tecum. Benedicta tu in mulieribus, et benedictus fructus ventris tui, Iesus.
mantras.transliteration: Ave Maria, gratia plena, Dominus tecum. Benedicta tu in mulieribus, et benedictus fructus ventris tui, Iesus.
mantras.abstract:
The Ave Maria is the most frequently prayed Marian prayer in Christian history and one of the most recognizable sacred texts in world culture. Its first part is woven directly from the Gospel of Luke: the angel Gabriel's greeting to Mary and Elizabeth's greeting at the Visitation. The second part, the petition Sancta Maria, Mater Dei, developed gradually in the medieval period and was officially standardized in the Roman Breviary of 1568.

The prayer's history traces the Church's developing theology of Mary's role in salvation. The title Theotokos (God-bearer, Mother of God) was solemnly defined at the Council of Ephesus in 431 AD and immediately generated a vast flowering of Marian devotion across both East and West. The Ave Maria gathered the scriptural core of that devotion into a brief, repeatable form that the unlettered and the learned alike could carry in the heart.

In the rosary, the prayer that has done more than any other to spread Ave Maria devotion, the Hail Mary is prayed fifty times in sequence — ten repetitions for each of five mysteries of Christ's life — while the mind meditates on scenes of the Gospel. Popes from the Renaissance to the present have recommended the rosary as one of the most powerful forms of contemplative prayer available to ordinary Christians.

Musically, the Ave Maria has inspired settings by composers including Schubert, Gounod, Verdi, and Brahms, becoming one of the most set texts in Western classical music. As a mantra, the Ave Maria is typically prayed with the aid of beads, the rhythmic quality of the Latin creating a natural rocking cadence that many practitioners describe as deeply calming.

translations.en: Hail Mary, full of grace, the Lord is with thee. Blessed art thou among women, and blessed is the fruit of thy womb, Jesus.
translations.zh: 万福玛利亚，你充满圣宠，主与你同在，你在女人中受赞颂，你的亲子耶稣同受赞颂。
translations.es: Dios te salve, María, llena eres de gracia, el Señor es contigo. Bendita tú eres entre todas las mujeres, y bendito es el fruto de tu vientre, Jesús.

translations.de: Für immer, Amen.
translations.en-us: Forever, Amen.
translations.en-gb: Forever, Amen.
translations.fr-fr: Pour toujours, ainsi soit-il.

translations.vi: Mãi mãi, Amen.
