translations.fr-fr: De l'obscurité, conduis-moi vers la lumière ; de la mort, conduis-moi vers l'immortalité.
translations.he: מַעֲמֵק, הַדְרִיכֵנִי לְאוֹר; מִמָּוֶת, הַדְרִיכֵנִי לְתְחִיָּה.
translations.hi: अँधकार से मुझे प्रकाश की ओर ले जाओ; मृत्यु से मुझे अमरता की ओर ले जाओ।
translations.id: Dari kegelapan, tuntunlah aku menuju cahaya; dari kematian, tuntunlah aku menuju keabadian.
translations.it: Dalla tenebra, guidami verso la luce; dalla morte, guidami verso l'immortalità.
translations.ja: 暗闇から光へと、死から不死へと、私を導き給え。
translations.ko: 어둠에서 나를 빛으로 인도하고, 죽음에서 나를 영원한 생명으로 인도하소서.
translations.nl: Uit de duisternis, leid mij naar het licht; van de dood, leid mij naar de onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Z ciemności wywiedź mnie do światła; ze śmierci wywiedź mnie do nieśmiertelności.
translations.pt-br: Do trevas, guia-me para a luz; da morte, guia-me para a imortalidade.
translations.ru: Из тьмы извлеки меня к свету; от смерти направь меня к бессмертию.
translations.sv: Från mörkret, led mig till ljuset; från döden, led mig till odödligheten.
translations.th: จากความมืดมิด นำพาสู่แสงสว่าง จากความตาย นำพาไปสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Karanlıktan beni ışığa, ölümden beni ölümsüzlüğe götür.
translations.uk: Зведи мене з темряви до світла; звільни мене від смерті, веди до безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ bóng tối, dẫn lối tôi đến ánh sáng; từ sự chết, dẫn lối tôi đến sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 从黑暗中引导我走向光明；从死亡中引导我走向永生。

mantras.name: From death, lead me to immortality.
mantras.english: From death, lead me to immortality.
mantras.transliteration: *mṛtyu-bhave jīvan-mukule*
mantras.background: A Vedic cry from the Upanishadic heart — this Hindu mantra pleads for transcendence, echoing the ancient tradition's journey from mortal limits toward eternal liberation.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Vedic tradition, this mantra mirrors Om's essence — bridging finite and infinite consciousness. Like Om's turiya state, it invites transcendence of ordinary awareness, pointing toward the eternal self beyond impermanence.
mantras.tags: hindu, immortality, chakra, invocation, mantra, tibetan, bódhisattva, energy, healing, auspicious, auspicious, spiritual

translations.es: Líbrenos de la muerte y guíanos hacia la inmortalidad.
translations.ar: من الموت، قُدني إلى الخلود.
translations.bn: মৃত্যু থেকে, আমাকে অমরত্বে নিয়ে যাও।
translations.de: Von dem Tod führe mich zur Unsterblichkeit.
translations.en-us: From death, lead me to immortality.
translations.en-gb: From death, lead me to immortality.
translations.fr-fr: Du royaume de la mort, conduis-moi vers l'immortalité.
translations.he: מֵמִיתָה, הַנְחִינִי לְחַיִּים נֵצְחִיִּים.
translations.hi: मृत्यु से मुझे अमरत्व की ओर ले जाओ।
translations.id: Dari kematian, tuntunlah aku menuju keabadian.
translations.it: Dalla morte, guidami verso l'immortalità.
translations.ja: "死から、私を不死へと導いてください。" (Shi kara, watashi o fushū e to michi biite kudasai.)
translations.ko: 죽음에서 벗어나, 나를 영생으로 이끌어 주소서.
translations.nl: Van de dood, leid mij tot de onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Od śmierci, poprowadź mnie do nieśmiertelności.
translations.pt-br: Do da morte, conduze-me à imortalidade.
translations.ru: От смерти поведи меня к бессмертию.
translations.sv: Från döden, led mig till odödligheten.
translations.th: จากความตาย, นำทางฉันสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Ölümden, beni ölümsüzlüğe doğru kıl.
translations.uk: Від смерті, веди мене до безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ sự chết, hãy dẫn dắt tôi đến sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 从死亡中，引导我走向永生。

mantras.name: From death, may I be liberated through immortality.
mantras.english: From death, may I be liberated through immortality.
mantras.transliteration: mṛtyu-bhayaḥ, amṛtatve sati, mukuṭaṃ karomasi.
mantras.background: A Vedic cry for liberation — this ancient Hindu mantra invokes transcendence over death, echoing Shiva's role in dissolution and renewal within the tradition.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om quiets the nervous system, shifts brainwaves toward theta (deep meditative states), and draws the mind toward *turiya* — the transcendent fourth state beyond ordinary consciousness — where stillness and openness arise naturally.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, liberation, immortality, death, devotional, transformation

translations.es: "Que, a través de la inmortalidad, me libere de la muerte."
translations.ar: من الموت، ليكن لي الخلاص من خلال الخلود.
translations.bn: मृत्यु থেকে, পরমordial জীবনের মাধ্যমে আমি মুক্তি লাভ করি।
translations.de: Von dem Tod möge ich durch Unsterblichkeit befreit werden.
translations.en-us: From death, may I attain liberation through immortality.
translations.en-gb: From death, may I attain liberation through immortality.
translations.fr-fr: De la mort, puisse je être libéré par l'immortalité.
translations.he: מִמִּיתָה, יְהִי רִפּוּי בְּחַיִּים נִצְחִיִּים.
translations.hi: मृत्यु से, क्या मैं अमरत्व के माध्यम से मुक्त हो सकता हूँ।
translations.id: Dari kematian, semoga aku terbebaskan melalui keabadian.
translations.it: Dalla morte, possa io essere liberato attraverso l'immortalità.
translations.ja: 死から、私は不死によって解放されるように。 (Shi kara, watashi wa fushū ni yotte kaihō sareru yō ni.)
translations.ko: 죽음을 통해, 나는 영생으로 해방되기를. (Jukeumeul tonghae, naneun yeongseongeuro haebangdoegireul.)
translations.nl: Vanuit de dood, moge ik verlost worden door middel van onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Z śmierci niechaj mnie wyzwoli śmiertelność.
translations.pt-br: Da morte, que eu seja libertado através da imortalidade.
translations.ru: Избавь меня от смерти, даруй бессмертие.
translations.sv: Från döden, må jag bli befriad genom odödlighet.
translations.th: จากความตาย ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าหลุดพ้นไปสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Ölümden, ölümsüzlük yoluyla kurtulayım.
translations.uk: Звільнення від смерті, нехай я досягну через безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ sự chết, xin tôi được giải thoát thông qua sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 从死亡中，愿我通过永生获得解脱。

mantras.name: From illusion, lead me to Reality; from darkness, lead me to Light; from mortality, lead me to Immortality.
mantras.english: From illusion, lead me to Reality; from darkness, lead me to Light; from mortality, lead me to Immortality.
mantras.original: asato ma sad gamaya | tamaso ma jyotir gamaya | mrityor ma amritam gamaya
mantras.transliteration: māyāyāṃ, mama muktiḥ; andhakarāt, mama jyotir; mṛtyuṣā, mama amṛtatva.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic Upanishad tradition, this Hindu mantra guides seekers from illusion to Reality, darkness to Light, mortality to Immortality.
mantras.benefits: This mantra guides the mind from confusion toward clarity and transcendence. Chanting it aligns with the Vedic view that sacred sound bridges the finite and infinite, cultivating liberation and inner light.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, liberation, philosophy, transcendence, enlightenment, advaita, wisdom, divine

translations.es: Desde la ilusión, guíame hacia la Realidad; desde la oscuridad, guíame hacia la Luz; desde la mortalidad, guíame hacia la Inmortalidad.
translations.ar: من الوهم، قُدني إلى الواقع؛ من الظلام، قُدني إلى النور؛ من الفناء، قُدني إلى الخلود.
translations.bn: মায়া থেকে আমাকে সত্যের দিকে, অন্ধকার থেকে আলোকে, নশ্বরতা থেকে অমরত্বের দিকে পরিচালিত করো।
translations.de: Aus der Illusion führe mich zur Wirklichkeit; aus der Finsternis führe mich zum Licht; aus der Sterblichkeit führe mich zur Unsterblichkeit.
translations.en-us: From illusion, guide me to Reality; from darkness, guide me to Light; from mortality, guide me to Immortality.
translations.en-gb: From illusion, lead me to Reality; from darkness, lead me to Light; from mortality, lead me to Immortality.
translations.fr-fr: De l'illusion, guide-moi vers la Réalité ; des ténèbres, guide-moi vers la Lumière ; de la mortalité, guide-moi vers l'Immortalité.
translations.he: מֵהֶבְלָה, הַדְרִיכֵנִי לַמֶּאֱמֶת; מֵחֹשֶׁךְ, הַדְרִיכֵנִי לְאוֹר; מִתַּמָּוְתָה, הַדְרִיכֵנִי לְבְרִיּוּת.
translations.hi: माया से सत्य की ओर, अज्ञान से ज्ञान की ओर, मृत्यु से अमरता की ओर ले चलो।
translations.id: Dari ilusi, tuntunlah aku menuju Realitas; dari kegelapan, tuntunlah aku menuju Cahaya; dari kematian, tuntunlah aku menuju Keabadian.
translations.it: Dalla Maya, guidami alla Realtà; dall'oscurità, guidami alla Luce; dalla mortalità, guidami all'immortalità.
translations.ja:
From illusion, lead me to Reality; from darkness, lead me to Light; from mortality, lead me to Immortality.

**真実へ導き、幻想から私を解き放ち、闇から光へと、そして、死から永遠の命へと私を導き給え。**
(Shinjitsu e michibi, gensō kara watashi o tokihanachi, yami kara hikari e to, soshite, shi kara eien no inochi e to watashi o michibiki tamae.)
translations.ko: 마야로부터 나를 진실로 이끌어 주시고, 어둠으로부터 나를 빛으로 이끌어 주시고, 죽음으로부터 나를 영원으로 이끌어 주소서.
translations.nl: Van illusie, leid mij naar de Realiteit; van duisternis, leid mij naar het Licht; van sterfelijkheid, leid mij naar de Onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Od iluzji, poprowadź mnie do Rzeczywistości; od ciemności, poprowadź mnie do Światła; od śmiertelności, poprowadź mnie do Nieśmiertelności.
translations.pt-br: De Maya, guia-me à Realidade; das trevas, guia-me à Luz; da mortalidade, guia-me à Imortalidade.
translations.ru: От иллюзии освободи меня к Реальности; от тьмы приведи меня к Свету; от смертности освободи меня к Бессмертию.
translations.sv: Från illusion, led mig till Verkligheten; från mörker, led mig till Ljuset; från dödlighet, led mig till Odödligheten.
translations.th: จากมายา จงนำพาฉันสู่ความจริง จากความมืด จงนำพาฉันสู่แสงสว่าง จากความตาย จงนำพาฉันสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Mayayı (sapkınlığı) yanıltmadan, Gerçek'e; karanlıktan, Işığa; ölümlülükten, ölümsüzlüğe beni yönelt.
translations.uk: Від ілюзії – до Реальності; від темряви – до Світла; від смертності – до Безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ ảo ảnh, dẫn lối tôi đến Chân lý; từ bóng tối, dẫn lối tôi đến Ánh sáng; từ sự hữu hạn, dẫn lối tôi đến sự bất diệt.
translations.zh-cn: 从幻象中，引导我走向真理；从黑暗中，引导我走向光明；从凡俗中，引导我走向永生。

mantras.name: From non-existence, lead me to the realm of truth; from darkness, lead me to the light; from death, lead me to immortality.
mantras.english: From non-existence, lead me to the realm of truth; from darkness, lead me to the light; from death, lead me to immortality.
mantras.original: asato mā sad-gamaya, tamaso mā jyotir-gamaya, mṛtyor-māmṛtaṃ gamaya
mantras.transliteration: *āno miśya, satyagraame ivahe; tāmo yato, jyotirivahe; maraṇayato, amṛtarivahe.*
mantras.background:
From Bṛhadāraṇyaka Upaniṣad 1.3.28, this ancient Vedic prayer pleads: lead me from unreality to truth, darkness to light, death to immortality — a timeless longing at the heart of Hindu spiritual seeking.
  Grounding: Source cites Bṛhadāraṇyaka Upaniṣad 1.3.28 with exact Sanskrit/transliteration and translation matching the mantra phrase provided.
mantras.benefits:
This Upanishadic prayer guides practitioners from illusion toward truth, darkness toward light, and mortality toward liberation—cultivating clarity, fearlessness, and transcendence through focused longing for ultimate reality.
  Grounding: Sourced from Bṛhadāraṇyaka Upaniṣad 1.3.28; sources note mantras with redemptive intent help cope with the human condition and foster spiritual connection.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, upanishad, liberation, enlightenment, immortality, transcendence, truth, prayer, philosophy

translations.es: Desde la inexistencia, guíame al reino de la verdad; desde la oscuridad, guíame a la luz; desde la muerte, guíame a la inmortalidad.
translations.ar: ليقودني اللاوجود إلى عالم الحق، وليخرجني من الظلام إلى النور، ولينجيني من الموت إلى الخلود.
translations.bn: অস্তিত্বহীনতা থেকে, আমাকে সত্যের রাজ্যে নিয়ে যাও; অন্ধকার থেকে, আমাকে আলোর দিকে নিয়ে যাও; মৃত্যু থেকে, আমাকে অমরত্বের দিকে নিয়ে যাও।
translations.de: "Führe mich aus der Nichtexistenz in das Reich der Wahrheit; führe mich aus der Dunkelheit ins Licht; führe mich aus dem Tod in die Unsterblichkeit."
translations.en-us: From non-being, guide me to the realm of truth; from ignorance, lead me to knowledge; from mortality, lead me to immortality.
translations.en-gb: From non-being, guide me to the realm of truth; from darkness, lead me to the light; from mortality, lead me to immortality.
translations.fr-fr: "Du néant, guide-moi vers le royaume de la vérité ; des ténèbres, guide-moi vers la lumière ; de la mort, guide-moi vers l'immortalité."
translations.he: מַהֲאֲטְמָה, הַנְחִינִי מִמִּבְטָל לִמְלֶכֶת הָאֱמֶת; מַהֲאֲטְמָה, הַנְחִינִי מִחוֹשֶׁךְ לְאוֹר; מַהֲאֲטְמָה, הַנְחִינִי מִמָּוֶת לְנֶצַח.
translations.hi: अस्तित्वहीनता से, मुझे सत्य के क्षेत्र में ले जाओ; अज्ञानता से, मुझे प्रकाश में ले जाओ; मृत्यु से, मुझे अमरता में ले जाओ।
translations.id: Dari ketiadaan, tuntunlah aku menuju wilayah kebenaran; dari kegelapan, tuntunlah aku menuju cahaya; dari kematian, tuntunlah aku menuju keabadian.
translations.it: Dalla non-esistenza, guidami al regno della verità; dall'oscurità, guidami alla luce; dalla morte, guidami all'immortalità.
translations.ja:
無から真実の領域へ導き、闇から光へと、そして死から不死へと導き給え。
(Mu kara shinjitsu no ryouiku e michibiki, yami kara hikari e to, soshite shi kara fushisei e to michibiki tamai.)
translations.ko: 무(無)에서 진실의 영역으로, 어둠에서 빛으로, 죽음에서 영생으로 나를 이끌어 주소서.
translations.nl: Vanuit het niets, leid mij naar het rijk van de waarheid; van de duisternis, leid mij naar het licht; van de dood, leid mij naar de onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Od niebytu, poprowadź mnie do królestwa prawdy; od ciemności, poprowadź mnie do światła; od śmierci, poprowadź mnie do nieśmiertelności.
translations.pt-br: Do não-ser, conduze-me ao reino da verdade; da escuridão, guia-me para a luz; da morte, leva-me à imortalidade.
translations.ru: Из небытия, приведи меня в обитель истины; из тьмы, приведи меня к свету; из смерти, приведи меня к бессмертию.
translations.sv: Från icke-varande, led mig till sannhetens rike; från mörker, led mig till ljuset; från döden, led mig till odödligheten.
translations.th: จากความว่างเปล่า จงนำทางฉันสู่ดินแดนแห่งความจริง จากความมืด จงนำทางฉันสู่แสงสว่าง จากความตาย จงนำทางฉันสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Yokluktan, beni gerçekliğin diyarına; karanlıktan, beni ışığa; ölümden, beni ölümsüzlüğe yönelt.
translations.uk: Від небуття веди мене до царства істини; від темряви веди мене до світла; від смерті веди мене до безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ trạng thái vô tồn, xin dẫn lối tôi đến cõi chân lý; từ bóng tối, xin dẫn lối tôi đến ánh sáng; từ sự chết, xin dẫn lối tôi đến sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 从虚无中，引导我至真理之境；从黑暗中，引导我至光明；从死亡中，引导我至永生。

mantras.name: From the auspicious constellation, Om, may [she/it] be woven.
mantras.english: From the auspicious constellation, Om, may [she/it] be woven.
mantras.original: おん あみりた ていせいから うん
mantras.transliteration: Oṃ, [name/pronoun], tsu-mu.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic India, "Om" (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation — A, U, M weaving waking, dream, and deep sleep into one sacred syllable.
mantras.benefits: Om grounds the practitioner in the universe's deepest vibration—calming the nervous system, expanding awareness across waking, dreaming, and transcendent states, and opening a doorway to the silence where all creation begins.
mantras.tags: hindu, primordial sound, om, vedic, mantra, sound healing, relaxation, unity, consciousness, vibration, pranava, meditation

translations.es: Desde la auspiciosa constelación, Om, que [ella/ello] sea tejido/tejida.
translations.ar: من برج النجوم الميمون، يا "أوم"، لتُحاك [هي/إنه].
translations.bn: শুভ নক্ষত্র থেকে, ওম, এর মধ্যে [সে/এটি] বোনা হোক।
translations.de: Aus der glückverheißenden Konstellation, Om, möge [sie/es] verwoben werden.
translations.en-us: From the auspicious constellation, may [she/it] be woven into existence through the sacred sound of Om.
translations.en-gb: From the blessed constellation, Om, may [she/it] be created/manifested/formed.
translations.fr-fr: De la constellation auspiciueuse, Om, qu'elle soit tissée.
translations.he: מתוך הכוכבים המזל, אום, תתארוג [היא/הוא].
translations.hi: शुभ नक्षत्रों से, 'ओम' के माध्यम से, [वह/यह] बुना जाए।
translations.id: Dari konstelasi yang membawa keberuntungan, Om, semoga [dia/itu] ditenun.
translations.it: Dalla auspiciosa costellazione, Om, possa [lei/esso] essere tessuto/intrecciato.
translations.ja: 幸運をもたらす星々から、オムの力によって、[彼女/それ]が織りなされるように。
translations.ko: 길조로운 별자리로부터, 옴(Om)을 통해, [그녀/그것]이 엮이기를.
translations.nl: Van de gunstige constellatie, Om, moge [zij/het] geweven worden.
translations.pl: Z błogosławionego konstelacji, Om, niech [ona/ono] zostanie utkana.
translations.pt-br: Da auspiciosa constelação, Om, que [ela/isso] seja tecido/entrelaçado.
translations.ru: Из благословенного созвездия, Ом, да будет [она/оно] соткана.
translations.sv: Från den lyckosamma stjärnbilden, Om, må [hon/den] vävas samman.
translations.th: จากกลุ่มดาวมงคล, ขอให้ [เธอ/มัน] ถูกถักทอด้วยพลังแห่ง "โอม".
translations.tr: Kelebekler gibi zarif, uğurlu bir düzenlemeden, 'Om' ile, [o/bu] örülsün.
translations.uk: З благословенного сузір'я, Ом, нехай [вона/воно] буде сплетена.
translations.vi: Từ chòm sao tốt lành, từ "Om", xin [cô/nó] hãy được tạo nên.
translations.zh-cn: 从吉祥的星象中，唵，愿其被编织。

mantras.name: From the essence of sugarcane, may the auspicious and nourishing sugar arise.
mantras.english: From the essence of sugarcane, may the auspicious and nourishing sugar arise.
mantras.transliteration: iṣṭa-sāra-ikṣu, saṁskṛtika-āṁśā, śubha-rathāṁ, pōṣa-rathāṁ, śarkarā.
mantras.background: From Vedic ritual bathing rites, this Sanskrit mantra invokes sugar born of sugarcane—pure, nourishing, auspicious—offered to the divine in sacred panchamrita ceremony.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Hindu ritual bathing (puja), this mantra invokes sweetness, auspiciousness (shubham), and divine nourishment (pushtida). Its chanting is said to remove spiritual impurities (malapaharika), cultivating inner purity and devotional presence.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, puja, abhisheka, ritual, purification, nourishment, devotional, offering, auspicious

translations.es: Desde la esencia de la caña de azúcar, que surja el azúcar, auspicioso y nutritivo.
translations.ar: من جوهر قصب السكر، ليكن السكر المبارك والمغذّي.
translations.bn: আখ গাছের মূল থেকে, পবিত্র এবং পুষ্টিকর চিনি উৎপন্ন হোক।
translations.de: Aus dem Wesen des Zuckerrohrs möge der wohlwollende und nährende Zucker entstehen.
translations.en-us: From the essence of sugarcane, may auspicious and nourishing sugar be produced.
translations.en-gb: From the very essence of sugarcane, may the auspicious and wholesome sweetness be produced.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse le sucre, source de bienfaits et de nutrition, émaner de l'essence même de la canne à sucre.
translations.he: ממהות קנה הסוכר, יתעורר הסוכר המבורך והמזין.
translations.hi: गन्ने के सार से, शुभ और पौष्टिक शर्करा का उत्पन्न होना हो।
translations.id: Dari sari pati tebu, semoga gula yang membawa keberuntungan dan nutrisi muncul.
translations.it: Dalla sostanza stessa della canna da zucchero, possa sorgere lo zucchero, auspicioso e nutriente.
translations.ja: サトウキビの本質より、吉祥で滋養のある砂糖が生まれますように。
translations.ko: 사탕수수의 본질에서, 길하고 영양가 있는 사탕이 나오기를. (Satangsuseuui bonjil-eseo, gilhago yeongyangga itneun satangi naowigi.)
translations.nl: Uit de essentie van de suikerriet, moge het gunstige en voedende suiker ontstaan.
translations.pl: Z esencji trzciny cukrowej, niech powstanie cukier, będący źródłem błogosławieństwa i odżywienia.
translations.pt-br: Da essência da cana-de-açúcar, que o açúcar auspicioso e nutritivo surja.
translations.ru: Из самой сути сахарного тростника, дабы возникла благословенная и питательная сладость.
translations.sv: Från sockerrörs essens, må det välgörande och näringsrika sockret uppstå.
translations.th: จากแก่นสารของอ้อย ขอให้เกิดน้ำตาลที่เป็นสิริมงคลและให้คุณค่า
translations.tr: Hindistan şeker kamışının özünden, uğurlu ve besleyici şekerin doğması.
translations.uk: З сутності цукрової тростини, нехай виникне благотворна та поживна цукрова речовина.
translations.vi: Từ tinh chất của cây mía, xin cho đường ngọt lành, giàu dinh dưỡng được sinh ra.
translations.zh-cn: 从甘蔗的精华中，愿吉祥而滋养的糖出现。

mantras.name: From the fullness, taking the fullness, fullness remains.
mantras.english: From the fullness, taking the fullness, fullness remains.
mantras.transliteration: `pūrṇāt puṁ, puṁ ādatte, puṁ śiśyate`
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation — A, U, M — waking, dreaming, deep sleep, and the silence beyond.
mantras.benefits: Om bridges waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into transcendent stillness. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward theta states, while tradition equates it with Brahman—absolute reality. One syllable, infinite depth.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, yoga, pranava, brahman, chanting, meditation, consciousness, theta, creation, relaxation

translations.es: De la plenitud, tomando la plenitud, la plenitud permanece.
translations.ar: من الكمال، أخذًا من الكمال، يبقى الكمال.
translations.bn: " fullness" (पूर्णता) থেকে " fullness" (পূর্ণতা) নেওয়া হলে, " fullness" (পূর্ণতা) অবশিষ্ট থাকে।
translations.de: Aus der Fülle wird die Fülle genommen, und die Fülle bleibt bestehen.
translations.en-us: From the fullness, taking from the fullness, the fullness remains.
translations.en-gb: From the fullness, taking a portion of the fullness, the fullness remains.
translations.fr-fr: De la plénitude, en prenant la plénitude, la plénitude demeure.
translations.he: מן השלמות, לוקחים שלמות, השלמות נשארת.
translations.hi: पूर्णता से, पूर्णता लेकर, पूर्णता बनी रहती है।
translations.id: Dari keutuhan, mengambil keutuhan, keutuhan tetap ada.
translations.it: Dalla pienezza, prendendo la pienezza, la pienezza rimane.
translations.ja: 全体から全体を取り除いても、全体は残る。(Zentai kara zentai o torinoitemo, zentai wa nokoru.)
translations.ko: 존재의 완전함에서, 완전함을 취하고, 완전함은 그대로 남는다. (Jonjaeui wanjeonhameseo, wanjeonhameul chwigo, wanjeonheun geudaero namneunda.)
translations.nl: Uit de overvloed, neem je de overvloed, de overvloed blijft.
translations.pl: Z pełni, biorąc pełnię, pełnia pozostaje.
translations.pt-br: Da plenitude, retirando-se a plenitude, a plenitude permanece.
translations.ru: Из полноты, беря полноту, полнота остаётся.
translations.sv: Från fullheten, genom att ta fullheten, förblir fullheten.
translations.th: จากความสมบูรณ์, เมื่อนำเอาความสมบูรณ์ออกไป, ความสมบูรณ์ยังคงอยู่.
translations.tr: Tamamlıktan, tamamı alarak, tamam kalır.
translations.uk: З повноти, беручи повноту, повнота залишається.
translations.vi: Từ sự viên mãn, lấy đi sự viên mãn, sự viên mãn vẫn còn.
translations.zh-cn: 从充盈中获取充盈，充盈仍然存在。

mantras.name: From the liberation of death, may I attain immortality.
mantras.english: From the liberation of death, may I attain immortality.
mantras.transliteration: mṛtyuḥ-pari-mocane, amṛtatvam āpnoti.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic Hindu tradition, this ancient chant seeks transcendence over death — echoing the Upanishadic quest for the infinite beyond the finite.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om stills mind and body, inducing theta brain waves linked to deep meditation. It guides practitioners through waking, dreaming, and sleep toward turiya—the transcendent state beyond ordinary existence, hinting at deathless awareness.
mantras.tags: hindu, immortality, death, liberation, vedic, mantra, prayer, gratitude, transformation, spiritual, sound, cosmology

translations.es: "Alcanzando la liberación de la muerte, que yo alcance la inmortalidad."
translations.ar: من التحرر من الموت، ليتحقق لي الخلود.
translations.bn: মৃত্যুর বন্ধন থেকে, আমি অমরত্ব লাভ করি যেন।
translations.de: Von der Befreiung vom Tod, möge ich Unsterblichkeit erlangen.
translations.en-us: From the freedom that comes with overcoming death, may I attain immortality.
translations.en-gb: From the liberation that comes with the end of death, may I attain immortality.
translations.fr-fr: De la libération de la mort, puisse-je atteindre l'immortalité.
translations.he: מִשִּׁחרור מִמּות, יִהְיֶה בִּישְׁמֶרֶת נֶצֶח.
translations.hi: मृत्युमुक्तिः, मम अमरत्वम् लभतु।
translations.id: Dari pembebasan dari kematian, semoga saya mencapai keabadian.
translations.it: Dalla liberazione dalla morte, possa io raggiungere l'immortalità.
translations.ja: 死からの解脱を得て、私が不死を達成する。 (Shi kara no kaitsetsu o ete, watashi ga fushi o tassei suru.)
translations.ko: 죽음으로부터의 해방을 통해, 제가 영원불멸을 얻기를.
translations.nl: Van de bevrijding van de dood, moge ik onsterfelijkheid bereiken.
translations.pl: Od wyzwolenia spod panowania śmierci, niech osiągnę nieśmiertelność.
translations.pt-br: Do rompimento com a morte, que eu alcance a imortalidade.
translations.ru: От освобождения от смерти, дабы я достиг бессмертия.
translations.sv: Från befrielsen från döden, må jag uppnå odödlighet.
translations.th: จากการหลุดพ้นจากความตาย ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าบรรลุถึงความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Ölümden kurtuluşla, ölümsüzlüğe ulaşmayı dilerim.
translations.uk: Звільнення від смерті, нехай я досягну безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ sự giải thoát khỏi cái chết, xin tôi đạt được sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 从摆脱死亡，愿我获得永生。

mantras.name: From the perfectly ordered Amrita, let there be peace.
mantras.english: From the perfectly ordered Amrita, let there be peace.
mantras.transliteration: Amrita kara, hei wa.
mantras.background: A Vedic peace invocation rooted in India's oral tradition. "Amrita" — nectar of immortality — calls forth shanti (peace) from cosmic order itself.
mantras.benefits:
Chanting this Amrita-rooted mantra invokes inner peace through vibrational resonance. Practitioners report calm, clarity, and transcendence — qualities tied to Sanskrit's sacred phonetic precision and mantra's documented autonomic nervous system effects.
  Grounding: Sources confirm mantras evoke peace, immortality, and spiritual states; Sanskrit phonetics carry inherent resonance effects documented in Vedic and neurological research.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, peace, shanti, prayer, devotional, cosmic, invocation

translations.es: Desde la Amrita, perfectamente ordenada, que haya paz.
translations.ar: من الأمريتا المنظمة تمامًا، ليكن السلام.
translations.bn: নিখুঁতভাবে সুবিন্যস্ত অমৃত থেকে, শান্তি আসুক।
translations.de: Aus dem vollkommen geordneten Amrita, möge es Frieden geben.
translations.en-us: From the perfectly ordered Amrita, may there be peace.
translations.en-gb: From the perfectly ordered Amrita, may there be peace.
translations.fr-fr: De l'Amrita, parfait et ordonné, qu'il y ait la paix.
translations.he: מֵאֲמְרִיטָה הַמְּסֻדֶּרֶת בְּשִׁלְמוּת, תְּהִי שָׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: पूर्णतया व्यवस्थित अमृत से, शांति हो।
translations.id: Dari Amrita yang sempurna, semoga terwujud kedamaian.
translations.it: Dalla perfetta e ordinata Amrita, che ci sia pace.
translations.ja: 完璧に整ったアムリタ（または、無垢な霊液）より、平和がありますように。
translations.ko: 완벽한 질서 속의 암리타로부터, 평화가 있기를.
translations.nl: Van de volmaakt geordende Amrita, moge er vrede zijn.
translations.pl: Z doskonałego i uporządkowanego Amrita, niech zapanuje pokój.
translations.pt-br: Da Amrita, perfeitamente ordenada, que haja paz.
translations.ru: Из совершенно упорядоченной Амриты, да будет мир.
translations.sv: Från det fullkomligt ordnade Amrita, må det finnas frid.
translations.th: จากอัมฤตอันบริสุทธิ์และสมบูรณ์ ขอให้มีสันติสุข
translations.tr: Mükemmel düzeni olan Amrita'dan, huzur olsun.
translations.uk: З абсолютної та впорядкованої Амріти, нехай буде мир.
translations.vi: Từ nguồn Amrita hoàn hảo, xin có hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: 从完美有序的甘露中，愿有和平。

mantras.name: From the unreal, lead me to the real.
mantras.english: From the unreal, lead me to the real.
mantras.transliteration: *Anātmāvad gr̥hṇitva, satyam eva me praśamśayat.*
mantras.background:
From the Brihadaranyaka Upanishad, this Vedic Sanskrit mantra asks the divine to guide the seeker from illusion to truth, darkness to light, and death to immortality — a timeless Hindu prayer.
  Grounding: Source text identifies "Asatoma Sadgamaya" as a Sanskrit mantra from Hindu tradition, translated as "lead me from the unreal to the real."
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Asato Ma Sadgamaya" guides the practitioner from illusion toward truth, darkness toward light, and mortality toward liberation — awakening clarity, inner honesty, and a profound yearning for what is eternally real.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, liberation, enlightenment, truth, transcendence, peace, prayer, philosophy

translations.es: "De lo irreal, guíame hacia lo real."
translations.ar: اهدني من المظنون إلى الحق.
translations.bn: "অমায়িত্ব থেকে আমাকে সত্যের দিকে নিয়ে যাও।"
translations.de: "Führe mich von der Illusion zur Wirklichkeit."
translations.en-us: From the unreal, lead me to the real.
translations.en-gb: From the unreal, lead me to the real.
translations.fr-fr: Du non-réel, guide-moi vers le réel.
translations.he: מֵחֶלֶם, הַנְחֵנִי לַמֶּאֱמֶת.
translations.hi: असत्य से, मुझे सत्य की ओर ले चलो।
translations.id: Dari yang tidak nyata, tuntunlah aku menuju yang nyata.
translations.it: Dalla non-realtà, guidami alla realtà.
translations.ja: 無から、私を真実へ導き給え。 (Muzukara, watashi o shinjitsu e michibikagae.)
translations.ko: 마야에서 실재로 나를 이끌어 주소서. (Maya-eseon siljae-ro nareul ideureo jusoseo.)
translations.nl: Van het onwerkelijke, leid mij tot het werkelijke.
translations.pl: Od nielicznych, doprowadź mnie do prawdziwego.
translations.pt-br: Do ilusório, conduza-me ao real.
translations.ru: Из небытия, поведи меня к реальности.
translations.sv: Från det oäkta, led mig till det sanna.
translations.th: จากสิ่งที่ไม่เป็นจริง, นำทางฉันสู่สิ่งที่เป็นจริง
translations.tr: Asılsızdan, beni gerçeğe kıl.
translations.uk: Из нереального, поведи меня к реальному.
translations.vi: Xin đưa tôi từ vô tri đến chân thực.
translations.zh-cn: 从虚幻中，引导我走向真实。

mantras.name: From the unreal, lead me to the real; from darkness, lead me to light; from death, lead me to immortality.
mantras.english: From the unreal, lead me to the real; from darkness, lead me to light; from death, lead me to immortality.
mantras.original: Asato Ma Sad Gamaya Taso Ma Jyotir Gamaya Mrityor Ma Amritam Gamaya
mantras.background:
From the ancient Brihadaranyaka Upanishad, this Vedic mantra pleads: lead me from unreal→real, darkness→light, death→immortality. A timeless Sanskrit cry for awakening.
  Grounding: Source names it "En sang fra Brihadaranyaka Upanishad, en af de ældste sanskrittekster" and provides the translation directly.
mantras.benefits:
Chanting this Upanishadic mantra guides the mind from illusion to truth, ignorance to wisdom, mortality to liberation — awakening profound inner transformation through sacred sound and intention.
  Grounding: Brihadaranyaka Upanishad source; mantra described as representing "peace and freedom"; chanting shown to reduce anxiety and deepen meditative states per cited research.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pavamana, liberation, truth, enlightenment, peace, freedom, transformation, devotional, guidance

translations.es: "De lo irreal, llévame a lo real; de la oscuridad, llévame a la luz; de la muerte, llévame a la inmortalidad."
translations.ar: "منْ المَظْلُم، قُدْني إلى النُور؛ منْ الموتِ، قُدْني إلى الخُلْد."
translations.bn: असत्यं असि, सत्यं त्वा; तमः तमस्य, प्रकाशं त्वा; मृत्युं मृत्युमेव, अमृतं त्वा।
translations.de: Vom Unrealen, führe mich zum Realen; aus der Finsternis, führe mich ins Licht; vom Tod, führe mich zur Unsterblichkeit.
translations.en-us: From the unreal, lead me to the real; from darkness, lead me to light; from death, lead me to immortality.
translations.en-gb: From the unreal, guide me to the real; from darkness, lead me to light; from death, lead me to immortality.
translations.fr-fr: De l'illusion, conduis-moi vers le réel; des ténèbres, conduis-moi vers la lumière; de la mort, conduis-moi vers l'immortalité.
translations.he: מֵהַאֲמִתּוּת, הַנְחֵנִי לַאֲמִתּוּת; מִחוֹשֶׁךְ, הַנְחֵנִי לְאוֹר; מִמָּוֶת, הַנְחֵנִי לְתְחִיָּה.
translations.hi: असत्य से सत्य की ओर ले चलो; अज्ञान से ज्ञान की ओर ले चलो; मृत्यु से अमरता की ओर ले चलो।
translations.id: Dari ketidaksebenaran, tuntunlah aku menuju kebenaran; dari kegelapan, tuntunlah aku menuju cahaya; dari kematian, tuntunlah aku menuju keabadian.
translations.it: "Dal non-reale, conducimi al reale; dall'oscurità, conducimi alla luce; dalla morte, conducimi all'immortalità."
translations.ja: 無実より我を真実へと導き、闇より光へと導き、死より不死へと導きたまえ。
translations.ko: "현상에서 실재로, 어둠에서 빛으로, 죽음에서 영원으로 나를 이끌어 주소서."
translations.nl: Van het onwerkelijke, leid mij naar het werkelijke; van de duisternis, leid mij naar het licht; van de dood, leid mij naar de onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: "Od nieliczącego się, poprowadź mnie do tego, co prawdziwe; od ciemności, poprowadź mnie do światła; od śmierci, poprowadź mnie do nieśmiertelności."
translations.pt-br: Do irreal, conduze-me ao real; das trevas, conduz-me à luz; da morte, conduz-me à imortalidade.
translations.ru: Из небытия, направь меня к реальности; из тьмы, направь меня к свету; из смерти, направь меня к бессмертию.
translations.sv: Från det oäkta, led mig till det sanna; från mörkret, led mig till ljuset; från döden, led mig till odödligheten.
translations.th: จากความไม่จริง จงนำทางฉันสู่ความจริง จากความมืด จงนำทางฉันสู่แสงสว่าง จากความตาย จงนำทางฉันสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: "Bana, sahteden gerçeğe, karanlıktan aydınlığa, ölümden ölümsüzlüğe yol göster."
translations.uk: От неістинності, веди мене до істинності; від темряви, веди мене до світла; від смерті, веди мене до безсмертя.
translations.vi: Từ sự vô thường, dẫn lối tôi đến với sự chân thực; từ bóng tối, dẫn lối tôi đến với ánh sáng; từ cái chết, dẫn lối tôi đến với sự bất diệt.
translations.zh-cn: 从虚幻中，引导我至真实；从黑暗中，引导我至光明；从死亡中，引导我至永生。

mantras.name: From your grace, the world is perceived as complete; when desires find their support (in you). You, the deity, are manifest before me; salutations to you, O Mother.
mantras.english: From your grace, the world is perceived as complete; when desires find their support (in you). You, the deity, are manifest before me; salutations to you, O Mother.
mantras.original: ॐ यत्प्रसादात् जगत् दृष्टं पूर्णं कामो यदाश्रया। प्रत्यक्षं देवता त्वं मे मातरे नमो नमः।
mantras.transliteration: ॒tvaṃ-ādīnā, jagat-pūrṇa-darśana-mayam; yāvat-icchā-āśraye tu. devatā, tvam eva mama-mukhe; namo-astu, mātṛ.
mantras.background: From Hindu goddess tradition, this mantra salutes the Divine Mother whose grace makes existence whole and fulfills desires — a tender, devotional bow to the sacred feminine.
mantras.benefits: Surrendering to the Divine Mother cultivates wholeness and stills inner longing. This devotional mantra channels grace into emotional balance, clarity, and the profound experience of perceiving the sacred as ever-present.
mantras.tags: hindu, devi, shakti, devotional, grace, blessing, manifestation, completion

translations.es: Desde tu gracia, el mundo se percibe como completo; cuando los deseos encuentran su sustento (en ti). Tú, la deidad, te manifestas ante mí; saludos a ti, oh Madre.
translations.ar: من فضلكِ، يظهر العالم كاملاً؛ عندما تجد الرغبات فيها عونها. أنتِ، يا إلهة، تتجلين أمامي؛ سلام عليكِ يا أم.
translations.bn: আপনার কৃপা থেকে, জগৎকে পরিপূর্ণ হিসেবে উপলব্ধি করা যায়; যখন আকাঙ্ক্ষা তাদের আশ্রয় (আপনার মধ্যে) খুঁজে পায়। হে দেবী, আপনি আমার সামনে প্রকাশিত; আপনাকে প্রণাম জানাই, ও মা।
translations.de: Aus deiner Gnade erscheint die Welt als vollkommen; wenn Wünsche ihren Halt (in dir) finden. Du, die Göttin, manifestierst Dich vor mir; Seid gegrüßt, o Mutter.
translations.en-us: From your grace, the world appears complete; when desires find fulfillment in you. You, the divine being, are manifest before me; salutations to you, O Mother.
translations.en-gb: From your grace, the world appears as a complete and fulfilled entity; when desires find their sustenance and support within you. You, the divine being, are revealed before me; salutations to you, O Mother.
translations.fr-fr: De votre grâce, le monde apparaît comme un tout ; lorsque les désirs trouvent leur accomplissement en vous. Vous, divinité, vous vous manifestez devant moi ; salutations à vous, ô Mère.
translations.he: מטוּבךְ, העולם נתפס כשלם; כאשר משאלות מוצאות את תמיכתן (בך). את, האלה, מתגלה לפניי; ברכות לך, הו אֵם.
translations.hi: आपकी कृपा से, जगत पूर्ण प्रतीत होता है; जब इच्छाएँ अपना आधार (आप में) पाती हैं। हे देवी, आप मेरे समक्ष प्रकट हैं; आपको प्रणाम, हे माँ।
translations.id: Dari kebaikanmu, dunia terasa utuh; ketika keinginan-keinginan menemukan penyangga (dalam dirimu). Engkau, Sang Dewa, menjelmakan diri-Mu di hadapanku; salam untukmu, ya Ibu.
translations.it: Dalla tua grazia, il mondo appare completo; quando i desideri trovano il loro sostegno (in te). Tu, divinità, ti manifesti davanti a me; saluti a te, o Madre.
translations.ja: あなたの慈悲深さによって、世界は完全なものとして認識されます。そして、私の願いがあなたの中に支えを見出すとき、あなたは、神聖なる存在として、私の前に現れます。母よ、あなたに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 당신의 은혜로, 세상은 완전하게 보입니다. 욕망이 당신 안에서 그 기반을 찾을 때, 당신은 신으로서 제 앞에 나타나십니다. 어머니께 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Uit uw genade wordt de wereld ervaren als volkomen; wanneer verlangens hun steun in u vinden. U, de godin, manifesteert U voor mij; groeten aan u, O Moeder.
translations.pl: Z Twojej łaski, świat jawi się jako całość; kiedy pragnienia znajdują swoje oparcie (w Tobie). Ty, Bogini, objawiasz się przede mną; pozdrowienia dla Ciebie, Matko.
translations.pt-br: Da sua graça, o mundo se revela como completo; quando os desejos encontram seu apoio (em você). Você, a divindade, se manifesta diante de mim; saudações a você, ó Mãe.
translations.ru: Из твоей благодати мир воспринимается как целостный; когда желания обретают опору (в тебе). Ты, божество, являешься передо мной; приветствия тебе, О, Мать.
translations.sv: Från din nåd upplevs världen som fullständig; när önskningar finner sin förankring (i dig). Du, gudomligheten, manifesteras framför mig; vördnad till dig, o Moder.
translations.th: จากความเมตตาของท่าน โลกจึงปรากฏแก่ข้าพเจ้าในฐานะที่สมบูรณ์ เมื่อความปรารถนาได้รับการเติมเต็ม (จากท่าน) พระองค์, เทพเจ้า, ได้ปรากฏต่อหน้าข้าพเจ้า ข้าพเจ้าขอถวายความเคารพแด่พระแม่
translations.tr: Lütfünüz sayesinde, dünya bütünlüğü içinde algılanır; arzularınız, Sizde destek bulur. Ey tanrıça, Siz benim önümde tecelli ediyorsunuz; sana saygılar, ey Ana.
translations.uk: З твоєї благодаті світ постає цілісним; коли бажання знаходять свою опору (у Тобі). Ти, Божество, являєшся переді мною; вітаю Тебе, Мати.
translations.vi: Từ ân sủng của Ngài, thế giới hiện ra như một tổng thể hoàn chỉnh; khi những mong muốn tìm thấy nền tảng của chúng (ở Ngài). Ngài, vị thần, hiện diện trước mặt tôi; kính chào Đức Mẹ.
translations.zh-cn: 承蒙您的恩典，世界在我眼中显得完整；当我的愿望在您那里得到满足。 诸神啊，您显现在我面前；向您致敬，伟大的母亲。

mantras.name: Gayatri Mantra
mantras.english: We meditate on the divine light of the Sun; may it illuminate our intellect
mantras.original: ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्
mantras.transliteration: Om Bhur Bhuva Swaha, Tat Savitur Varenyam, Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi, Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat
mantras.abstract:
The Gayatri Mantra is one of the oldest and most revered hymns in the Vedic tradition, originating in the Rigveda (Mandala 3, hymn 62, verse 10), composed by the sage Vishwamitra. It is addressed to Savitri, the solar deity who personifies the life-giving power of the sun. The mantra has been chanted for over three thousand years and is considered the mother of all Vedic mantras, embodying the essence of the Vedas in a single verse.

The three vyahritis — Bhur, Bhuva, and Swaha — represent the three planes of existence: the physical world, the astral or intermediate world, and the celestial world. Together they invoke the totality of creation and situate the practitioner within the cosmic order. This tripartite structure reflects the Vedic understanding that the universe is fundamentally threefold in nature.

The core of the mantra — Tat Savitur Varenyam Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi — is a meditation on the glorious light of the divine sun. The word Bhargo refers not merely to physical sunlight but to the supreme spiritual radiance that dispels ignorance and illuminates consciousness. The sun is understood here as a symbol of Brahman, the ultimate reality, whose light sustains all life and makes all perception possible.

The final line — Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat — is a supplication: may that divine intelligence inspire and direct our intellects toward truth and righteousness. This prayer for right thinking and clarity of mind has made the Gayatri Mantra central to the Brahmacharya initiation ceremony (Upanayana), where it is traditionally whispered into the ear of a young student beginning Vedic studies. Daily recitation at sunrise, noon, and sunset — known as Sandhyavandana — has been a cornerstone of Hindu practice for millennia.

translations.en: Om. O Earth, Atmosphere, and Heaven. We meditate on the glorious splendour of the divine Sun. May that divine light illuminate our intellect and inspire us toward truth.
translations.zh: 嗡。大地、空气、天空。我们冥想神圣太阳的光辉。愿那神圣之光照耀我们的智慧，引导我们走向真理。
translations.es: Om. Oh Tierra, Atmósfera y Cielo. Meditamos en el esplendor glorioso del Sol divino. Que esa luz divina ilumine nuestro intelecto y nos inspire hacia la verdad.

mantras.name: Guru Ram Das, Guru.
mantras.english: Guru Ram Das, Guru.
mantras.transliteration: Guru Rām Dās, Guru.
mantras.background: From Kundalini tradition, "Guru Ram Das Guru" means "the wisdom that comes as a servant of the Infinite" — offering relaxation, protection, and a gateway to boundless knowledge.
mantras.benefits: "Guru Ram Das Guru" evokes wisdom arriving through humble service. Practitioners report emotional release, inner protection, and deep relaxation — an invitation to surrender ego and open to infinite consciousness.
mantras.tags: sikh, guru, devotional, protection, relaxation, wisdom, service, infinite

mantras.english: Hail Krishna, Hail Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hail Hail; Hail Rama, Hail Rama, Rama Rama, Hail Hail.

mantras.background:
From Gaudiya Vaishnavism, this mantra devotedly calls on Krishna & Rama — divine love embodied in sacred sound, inviting liberation through heartfelt chanting.
  Grounding: Source states mantra "Originating from the Gaudiya Vaishnavism tradition," invoking Krishna/Rama, emphasizing bhakti as path to moksha (spiritual liberation).
mantras.benefits: Chanting the Hare Krishna Mahamantra, rooted in Gaudiya Vaishnavism, invokes divine love and joy, fosters unity with the universe, and opens a path toward spiritual liberation (moksha) through pure devotion.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, rama, bhakti, vaishnavism, devotional, chanting, divine-love, joy, moksha, unity

mantras.name: Hail Krishna, Hail Rama.
mantras.english: Hail Krishna, Hail Rama.
mantras.transliteration: हैल कृष्ण, हैल राम।
mantras.background:
From Hindu tradition, "Hare Krishna Hare Rama" — the Mahamantra — hails Vishnu's divine aspects. Krishna & Rama, heroes of the Bhagavad Gita, embody the world's preservation. Chant and awaken!
  Grounding: Source states: "Hare = Hail/Hochlebe, Krishna & Rama = aspects of Vishnu, main figures of Bhagavad Gita, one of Hinduism's most important scriptures."
mantras.benefits:
Chanting "Hare Krishna, Hare Rama" invokes Vishnu's preserving energy. Repeated devotedly, it calms the nervous system, channels scattered energies, and draws the mind toward divine presence — a living pulse of joy across centuries.
  Grounding: Sources link Hare/Krishna/Rama to Vishnu's preserving aspect; mantra repetition is cited for calming nerves, focusing energy, and cultivating inner peace.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, krishna, rama, vishnu, devotion, focus, peace

mantras.original: Hare Kṛṣṇa Hare Kṛṣṇa | Kṛṣṇa Kṛṣṇa Hare Hare | Hare Rāma Hare Rāma | Rāma Rāma Hare Hare
mantras.transliteration: Śrī Krishna, Śrī Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hail, Hail; Śrī Rama, Śrī Rama, Rama Rama, Hail, Hail.
mantras.background: The Hare Krishna Mahā mantra hails Krishna & Rama—avatars of Vishnu. Chanted by ISKCON devotees since 1966, it's considered the simplest way to express divine love.
mantras.benefits: The Hare Krishna Mahā mantra is revered as the simplest way to express divine love toward Krishna. Devotees believe its rhythmic chanting purifies the mind and awakens devotional consciousness.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishnaite, krishna, rama, vishnu, devotional, divine-love, maha-mantra, chanting

mantras.name: Hail Lord Rama, Victory to Lord Rama.
mantras.english: Hail Lord Rama, Victory to Lord Rama.
mantras.transliteration: Hail Lord Rama: जय श्री राम, Victory to Lord Rama: जय श्री राम।
mantras.background: From Hindu bhakti tradition, this mantra hails Lord Rama — a name of God. Chanting it purifies the heart, fosters divine love, and awakens spiritual joy through sacred vibration.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Hail Lord Rama" purifies the heart, calms the mind, and fosters devotion. Within bhakti tradition, it creates sacred vibrational space, inviting joy, surrender, and spiritual awakening through sincere repetition.
mantras.tags: hindu, rama, bhakti, devotional, chanting, purification, love, joy, awakening, peace, divine

mantras.name: Hail Radhe, Hail Radhe.
mantras.english: Hail Radhe, Hail Radhe.
mantras.transliteration: Hail Radhe, Hail Radhe. → हैल राधे, हैल राधे।
mantras.background: "Hail Radhe" is a Bhakti mantra — a sacred devotional cry rooted in India's tradition of heartfelt love and surrender to the Divine, awakening pure devotional longing.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Hail Radhe" is a Bhakti practice that cultivates inner peace, devotional love, and heartfelt surrender. Unlike purely mental disciplines, it speaks directly to the heart, awakening longing and an intimate bond with the Divine.
mantras.tags: bhakti, hindu, radha, devotional, love, surrender, divine, peace, consciousness

mantras.english: Hail Radhe, Hail Shyam, Hail Krishna.

mantras.background: Hail Radhe, Hail Shyam, Hail Krishna — a Kirtan mantra from ancient India, repeating divine names in devotion. Rooted in Sanskrit vibrational tradition, each repetition deepens sacred energy.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Hail Radhe, Hail Shyam, Hail Krishna" is a form of Kirtan — devotional repetition of divine names. This Japa practice calms the nervous system, focuses the mind, and channels spiritual energy through sacred vibration.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, shyam, radha, kirtan, devotional, chant, divine, relaxation

mantras.name: Hail Rama, Hail Rama, Rama Rama, Hail Hail.
mantras.english: Hail Rama, Hail Rama, Rama Rama, Hail Hail.
mantras.original: Hare Rama Hare Rama Rama Rama Hare Hare
mantras.transliteration: hāil rāma, hāil rāma, rāma rāma, hāil hāil.
mantras.background: The Maha Mantra ("Hare Rama, Hare Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare") originates from the Kalishantarana Upanishad, a Sanskrit Vedic text, promising serenity and transcendental purification.
mantras.benefits: The Maha Mantra (Hare Rama) gradually purifies consciousness, restoring sat-cit-ananda—eternal bliss and knowledge. It fosters serenity, mental peace, and spiritual liberation, inviting deep meditative states through sacred vibrational resonance.
mantras.tags: hindu, rama, krishna, vedic, japa, devotional, purification, transcendental, peace, bliss, consciousness, liberation

translations.de: Lobpreisung Ramas, Lobpreisung Ramas, Rama Rama, Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung.
translations.en-us: Hail Rama, Hail Rama, Rama Rama, Hail Hail.
translations.en-gb: Hail Rama, Hail Rama, Rama Rama, Hail Hail.
translations.fr-fr: Louange à Rama, louange à Rama, Rama, Rama, Vive, vive.
translations.he: הַלְלוּ יְהוּדָה, הַלְלוּ יְהוּדָה, יְהוּדָה יְהוּדָה, הללוּ הללוּ.
translations.hi: जय राम, जय राम, राम राम, जय जय।
translations.id: Salam Rama, Salam Rama, Rama Rama, Salam Salam.
translations.it: Salve Rama, Salve Rama, Rama Rama, Salve Salve.
translations.ja: ラマよ、ラマよ、ラマ、讃美、讃美。 (Rama yo, Rama yo, Rama, zanmei, zanmei.)
translations.ko: 라마께 경배, 라마께 경배, 오 라마, 경배 경배.
translations.nl: "O Rama, O Rama, Rama Rama, Lof hem, Lof hem."
translations.pl: Chwała Ramie, Chwała Ramie, Ram, Ram, Chwała, Chwała.
translations.pt-br: Saúdo a Rama, Saúdo a Rama, Rama Rama, Saudações, Saudações.
translations.ru: Хвала Раме, хвала Раме, Рама Рама, приветствую, приветствую.
translations.sv: Lovpris Rama, lovpris Rama, Rama Rama, hyll hyll.
translations.th: ขอพระนามพระราม, ขอพระนามพระราม, พระรามพระราม, ขอพระพรหมจงมี.
translations.tr: Rama'ya selamlar, Rama'ya selamlar, Rama Rama, Selam selam.
translations.uk: Хвала Рамі, Хвала Рамі, Рама, Рама, Слава, Слава.
translations.vi: Xin kính chào Rama, Xin kính chào Rama, Rama Rama, Xin kính chào, Xin kính chào.
translations.zh-cn: 恭敬膜拜罗摩，恭敬膜拜罗摩，罗摩罗摩，万岁万岁。

mantras.name: Hail Rama, Victory to Rama, All Glory to Rama.
mantras.english: Hail Rama, Victory to Rama, All Glory to Rama.
mantras.original: श्री राम जय राम जय जय राम
mantras.transliteration: jai ram, ram humko jai, ram ki jai.
mantras.background: Rooted in Hindu devotion, this Sanskrit mantra glorifies Rama. Sources confirm mantras carry "extraordinary spiritual power" and serve devotion—chanting correctly unlocks transformative spiritual potential.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this devotional Rama mantra aids meditation concentration and channels deep devotion. Sources suggest consistent mantra practice affects specific brain areas, potentially awakening extraordinary perception — inviting the seeker into a profound, transformative spiritual tradition.
mantras.tags: hindu, rama, devotional, affirmation, praise, divine, sacred

translations.es: "¡Salud a Rama, Victoria a Rama, ¡Gloria a Rama!".
translations.ar: "تحية لراما، النصر لراما، المجد كله لراما."
translations.bn: "हे राम, जय राम, सभी की जय राम।"
translations.de: "Heil Rama, Sieg Rama, Ehre sei Rama."
translations.en-us: Hail Rama, Victory to Rama, All Glory to Rama.
translations.en-gb: Hail Rama, Victory to Rama, All Glory to Rama.
translations.fr-fr:
Voici quelques options de traduction, en privilégiant le sens et en évitant la translittération, sauf pour les termes spécifiques :

*   **Option 1 (Simple et directe):** "Gloire à Rama, Victoire à Rama, Toute la gloire à Rama."
*   **Option 2 (Plus emphatique):** "Louange à Rama, Victoire à Rama, Gloire éternelle à Rama."
*   **Option 3 (Avec une nuance de révérence):** "Je rends hommage à Rama, Victoire à Rama, Toute la gloire soit à Rama."
translations.he: יחי רמה, ניצחון לרמה, תהילה לָרמה.
translations.hi: जय राम, राम की जय, सभी की जय हो राम।
translations.id: Salam Rama, Kemenangan untuk Rama, Kemuliaan Bagi Rama.
translations.it: "Gloria a Rama, vittoria a Rama, tutta la gloria a Rama."
translations.ja: ラーマよ、我に恵みを。ラーマに勝利あれ。ラーマに全ての栄光あれ。
translations.ko: 라마께 경배를, 라마의 승리를, 라마께 모든 영광을. (Rama-kke gyeongbaereul, Rama-ui seungrieul, Rama-kke modeun yeonggwangeul.)
translations.nl: "Heil Rama, Hare Rama, Alle glorie aan Rama."
translations.pl: Niechaj będzie chwała Ramie, Niech zwycięstwo będzie z Ramem, Niech cała chwała Ramie.
translations.pt-br: "Salve, Rama, Vitória a Rama, Toda a Glória a Rama."
translations.ru: "Слава Раме! Да будет победа Раме! Слава Раме!"
translations.sv: "Hyllad vare Rama, seger till Rama, all ära till Rama."
translations.th: ขอพระนามพระราม, ขอชัยชนะจงมีแก่พระราม, ขอความรุ่งโรจน์จงมีแก่พระราม
translations.tr: Rama'ya Selamlar, Rama'ya Zafer, Rama'ya Tüm Şan.
translations.uk: Хвала Рамі, Перемога Рамі, Слава Рамі.
translations.vi: Xin chào Rama, Chiến thắng cho Rama, Vinh quang cho Rama.
translations.zh-cn:
*   **Hail Rama:** 膜拜罗摩 (Mó bài Luómó)
*   **Victory to Rama:** 罗摩神胜利 (Luómó shén shènglì)
*   **All Glory to Rama:** 罗摩荣耀永存 (Luómó róngyào yǒngcún)

mantras.name: Hail the jewel (of compassion) in the lotus.
mantras.english: Hail the jewel (of compassion) in the lotus.
mantras.transliteration: hāre ratnaṁ karuṇāya lotusasya.
mantras.background: Tibet's most sacred chant — six syllables invoking Avalokiteśvara, Bodhisattva of compassion, to purify the mind and awaken the heart.
mantras.benefits: Tibetan Buddhism's jewel mantra awakens compassion and purifies the mind. Research links regular recitation to reduced stress and emotional balance—each of the six syllables said to refine body, speech, and mind.

translations.es: Salvemos la joya (de la compasión) en el loto.
translations.ar: "تحيةً للجوهرة (الرحمة) في اللوتس."
translations.bn:
Hail the jewel (of compassion) in the lotus.

অনুগ্রহের সেই অমূল্য রত্নকে, যা পদ্মের মাঝে বিরাজমান, আমরা অভিবাদন জানাই।
translations.de: Lobpreisung sei dem Juwel (der Mitgefühl) in der Lotusblüte.
translations.en-us: "Praise the jewel of compassion residing within the lotus."
translations.en-gb: Hail the jewel of compassion, residing within the lotus.
translations.fr-fr: Saluez le joyau (de la compassion) dans le lotus.
translations.he: ברוך היהלום (של רחמים) בתוך הנרדן.
translations.hi: "कमला में स्थित करुणा का रत्न, तुम्हें प्रणाम।"
translations.id: Salamkan permata (kasih sayang) yang berada di dalam bunga teratai.
translations.it: Saluto alla gemma (di compassione) nel loto.
translations.ja: 蓮華に宿る慈悲の宝を讃えん。 (Renka ni sumaru jihai no takara o saen.)
translations.ko: 연꽃 속의 자비의 보석을 찬미합니다. (Yeonkkot sokui jabuiui Boseogeul chamnimhamnida.)
translations.nl: Lof de edelsteen (van mededogen) in de lotusbloem.
translations.pl: Powitajcie klejnot (współczucia) w lotosie.
translations.pt-br: Saudações à joia (da compaixão) no lótus.
translations.ru: Восславьте драгоценность (сострадания), сокрытую в лотосе.
translations.sv: Hyll den dyrbara (juvelen) i lotusblomman.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแก้วสารพัดนึกแห่งความเมตตา ที่ประดับอยู่บนดอกบัว
translations.tr: "Lütfen, şefkat hazinesini, lotus çiçeğinin içinde selamlayın."
translations.uk: Вітаю дорогоцінний (камінь) співчуття, що розквітає в лотосі.
translations.vi: Kính chào viên ngọc (của lòng trắc ẩn) trong đóa sen.
translations.zh-cn: 赞美莲花中的慈悲之光。

mantras.name: Hail to Rama, hail to Rama, salutations to Rama.
mantras.english: Hail to Rama, hail to Rama, salutations to Rama.
mantras.transliteration: śrīrāmaḥ, śrīrāmaḥ, namo rāma
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic tradition, this mantra honors Rama — a divine hero embodying virtue. Its repetition invites devotion and inner peace, drawing practitioners into an ancient living lineage.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Hail to Rama" invokes devotion, inner calm, and moral clarity—Rama being the embodiment of dharma. Practitioners report reduced anxiety and a deepened sense of righteousness, integrity, and purposeful living.
mantras.tags: rama, hindu, vedic, devotional, salutation, praise, divine

translations.es: Salvemos a Rama, salvemos a Rama, saludos a Rama.
translations.ar: تحية لراما، تحية لراما، سلام لراما.
translations.bn: hail ram, hail ram, ও রামের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।
translations.de: Seid gegrüßt, Rama, seid gegrüßt, Rama, ich verneige mich vor Rama.
translations.en-us: Hail Rama, hail Rama, salutations to Rama.
translations.en-gb: Hail Rama, hail Rama, salutations to Rama.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Rama, salutations à Rama, hommages à Rama.
translations.he: ברוך רמה, ברוך רמה, תפילה לרמה.
translations.hi: "हे राम, हे राम, राम को प्रणाम।"
translations.id: Salam untuk Rama, salam untuk Rama, penghormatan untuk Rama.
translations.it: Salve, Rama, salve, Rama, omaggio a Rama.

translations.ru: Приветствие Раме, приветствие Раме, почтение Раме.
translations.sv: Hej Rama, hej Rama, hälsningar till Rama.
translations.th: ขอพระนามพระราม, ขอพระนามพระราม, ข้าพเจ้าขอคารวะพระราม
translations.tr: Rama'ya selam olsun, Rama'ya selam olsun, Rama'ya saygılar.

translations.zh-cn: 恭敬致敬罗摩，恭敬致敬罗摩，向罗摩致以敬意。

mantras.name: Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer.
mantras.english: Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer.
mantras.original: Har Re Har Har Hare Re Har Har Har Re Har Har Harang
mantras.transliteration: ḥail kara mahādeva, ḥail kara mahādeva, ḥail kara mahādeva, ḥail kara mahādeva, ḥail kara mahādeva.
mantras.background: Rooted in ancient vibrational tradition, "Hail to the Destroyer" invokes transformative power—its vibrations, per Kundalini yoga, cleanse the subconscious and liberate the mind.
mantras.benefits: Repeating this mantra generates vibrations that purify the subconscious and reduce ego — core benefits the tradition attributes to all mantras. Like Sa Ta Na Ma's "death/rebirth" cycle, invoking the Destroyer theme can symbolize inner transformation and release.
mantras.tags: kundalini, mantra, vibration, hindu, kirtan kriya, stress reduction, brain function, harmony, affirmation, yogi bhajan, purification, neuroscientific

translations.es: Salvemos al Destructor, Salvemos al Destructor, Salvemos al Destructor, Salvemos al Destructor, Salvemos al Destructor.

translations.en-us: Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer, Hail to the Destroyer.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au Destructeur, Salutations au Destructeur, Salutations au Destructeur, Salutations au Destructeur, Salutations au Destructeur.
translations.he: הללויה למחריב, הללויה למחריב, הללויה למחריב, הללויה למחריב, הללויה למחריב.
translations.hi: "वंदना विनाशक को, वंदना विनाशक को, वंदना विनाशक को, वंदना विनाशक को, वंदना विनाशक को।"
translations.id: Salam kepada Sang Penghancur, Salam kepada Sang Penghancur, Salam kepada Sang Penghancur, Salam kepada Sang Penghancur, Salam kepada Sang Penghancur.
translations.it: Salve, distruttore, Salve, distruttore, Salve, distruttore, Salve, distruttore, Salve, distruttore.
translations.ja: 破壊者よ、我に礼を。破壊者よ、我に礼を。破壊者よ、我に礼を。破壊者よ、我に礼を。破壊者よ、我に礼を。
translations.ko: 파괴자여, 찬미합니다. 파괴자여, 찬미합니다. 파괴자여, 찬미합니다. 파괴자여, 찬미합니다. 파괴자여, 찬미합니다.
translations.nl: All hail de Vernieler, All hail de Vernieler, All hail de Vernieler, All hail de Vernieler, All hail de Vernieler.

translations.pt-br: Saúdo ao Destruidor, Saúdo ao Destruidor, Saúdo ao Destruidor, Saúdo ao Destruidor, Saúdo ao Destruidor.
translations.ru: Слава Разрушителю, Слава Разрушителю, Слава Разрушителю, Слава Разрушителю, Слава Разрушителю.
translations.sv: Hyllst till Förintaren, Hyllst till Förintaren, Hyllst till Förintaren, Hyllst till Förintaren, Hyllst till Förintaren.
translations.th: ขอคารวะต่อผู้ทำลาย, ขอคารวะต่อผู้ทำลาย, ขอคารวะต่อผู้ทำลาย, ขอคารวะต่อผู้ทำลาย, ขอคารวะต่อผู้ทำลาย
translations.tr: "Yok Edici'ye Selam, Yok Edici'ye Selam, Yok Edici'ye Selam, Yok Edici'ye Selam, Yok Edici'ye Selam."
translations.uk: Вітаю, руйнівниче, Вітаю, руйнівниче, Вітаю, руйнівниче, Вітаю, руйнівниче, Вітаю, руйнівниче.
translations.vi: Kính chào Người Phá hủy, Kính chào Người Phá hủy, Kính chào Người Phá hủy, Kính chào Người Phá hủy, Kính chào Người Phá hủy.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂毁灭者，敬颂毁灭者，敬颂毁灭者，敬颂毁灭者，敬颂毁灭者。

mantras.name: Hail to the Guru, Hail to the Wonderful Guru.
mantras.english: Hail to the Guru, Hail to the Wonderful Guru.
mantras.transliteration: Guru Gati, Guru Gati, Maharaj Guru Gati.
mantras.background: From Sanskrit roots, this mantra honors the Guru—'man' (mind) + 'tra' (mastery). Repeated via mala beads, it channels ancient vibrational wisdom to transform mind and spirit.
mantras.benefits: Honoring the Guru through mantra connects the practitioner to wisdom lineages. Repetition (Japa) with a mala cultivates focus, inner stillness, and devotional resonance, inviting transformative spiritual energy.
mantras.tags: guru, devotional, affirmation, japa, sanskrit, focus, intention, relaxation

translations.es: Salvemos al Gurú, salvemos al maravilloso Gurú.
translations.ar: تحية للغورو، تحية للغورو العظيم.
translations.bn: गुरु को प्रणाम, अद्भुत गुरु को प्रणाम।
translations.de: Lob sei dem Guru, Lob sei dem wunderbaren Guru.
translations.en-us: Hail to the Guru, Hail to the Magnificent Guru.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the Guru, Hail to the Magnificent Teacher.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au Guru, Salutations au Guru merveilleux.
translations.he: ברוך הַגּוּרוּ, ברוך הַגּוּרוּ הנפלא.
translations.hi: "गुरु को प्रणाम, अद्भुत गुरु को प्रणाम।"
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada Guru, Salam hormat kepada Guru yang Agung.
translations.it: Salve, Maestro, Salve, Maestro meraviglioso.
translations.ja: 先生に敬意を表します。素晴らしい先生に敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 스승님께 경의를 표합니다, 훌륭한 스승님께 경의를 표합니다. (Seuseonimkke gyeongui-reul pyohamnida, hu-lyunghan seuseonimkke gyeongui-reul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl:
Hail to the Guru, Hail to the Wonderful Guru.
*   **Vertaling:** "Eer aan de Guru, Eer aan de Wonderlijke Guru."
*   **Alternatieve vertaling (met meer respect):** "Moge er eer zijn aan de Guru, Moge er eer zijn aan de Wonderlijke Guru."
translations.pl: Powitanie Gurua, Powitanie Wspaniałego Gurua.
translations.pt-br: Saudações ao Guru, Saudações ao Guru Maravilhoso.
translations.ru: Приветствую Гуру, приветствую чудесного Гуру.
translations.sv: Hej till Gurun, Hej till den underbara Gurun.
translations.th: กราบพระอาจารย์, กราบพระอาจารย์ผู้เป็นอัศจรรย์
translations.tr: Öğretmenimize saygı, harika Öğretmenimize saygı.
translations.uk: Вітаю Гуру, вітаю Чудового Гуру.
translations.vi: Kính chào Thầy, Kính chào vị Thầy tuyệt vời.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼恩师，敬礼伟大的恩师。

mantras.name: Hail to the benefactor of humanity! Salutations! Om.
mantras.english: Hail to the benefactor of humanity! Salutations! Om.
mantras.original: Aum Namo Janadaye Svaha Namah Aum
mantras.transliteration: `oṃ manuṣyajanasya bhaktā prati, namo namaḥ | oṃ ||`
mantras.background:
From ancient India, "Om" is Hinduism's primordial sound — the vibrational source of all creation. Its syllables A-U-M map waking, dream, and deep sleep states, culminating in sacred silence.
  Grounding: Mandukya Upanishad & Taittiriya Upanishad cited in source; Om as Brahman/Pranava; three states explicitly described in existing entry.
mantras.benefits:
Om, the primordial sound, embodies all states of consciousness. Chanting it resonates through body and mind, inducing calm and deep meditative stillness. Research confirms measurable brainwave shifts, while tradition calls it the vibration of all existence.
  Grounding: Sources cite Mandukya Upanishad's states of consciousness, National Brain Research Centre studies on theta waves, and vagal nerve stimulation from Om's nasal hum.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, om, devotion, prayer, healing, peace, liberation, universal, divine

translations.es: ¡Salve al benefactor de la humanidad! Saludos. Om.
translations.ar: تحية للمُحسِن للبشرية! السلام! ॐ.
translations.bn: নমস্কার! মানবজাতিরBenefactor-কে শ্রদ্ধা জানাই! ওম।
translations.de: "Om. Sei gegrüßt, du Wohltäter der Menschheit! Grüße!"
translations.en-us: Hail to the benefactor of humankind! Greetings! Om.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the benefactor of humankind! Greetings! Om.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations au bienfaiteur de l'humanité ! Honneur ! Om.
translations.he: ברוך הנותן לחמולת האנושות! ברכות! אום.
translations.hi: नमस्कार! मानवता के benefactor को प्रणाम! नमस्कार! ॐ।

translations.es: ¡Salve, energía creativa! ¡Salve, energía sustentadora! ¡Salve, energía transformadora! ¡Salve, energía iluminadora! ¡Salve, manifestación energética!
translations.ar: "تحيةً لكِ، أيّتها الطاقة الإبداعية! تحيةً لكِ، أيّتها الطاقة المستدامة! تحيةً لكِ، أيّتها الطاقة المُحوِّلة! تحيةً لكِ، أيّتها الطاقة المُشعّة! تحيةً لكِ، أيّها التجسيد الحيوي!"
translations.bn: Hail, ওহ, সৃজনশীল শক্তি! Hail, ওহ,sustaining শক্তি! Hail, ওহ,রূপান্তরকারী শক্তি! Hail, ওহ, enlightening শক্তি! Hail, ওহ, প্রাণবন্ত প্রকাশ!
translations.de: "Heil, schöpferische Energie! Heil, erhaltende Energie! Heil, transformative Energie! Heil, erhellende Energie! Heil, energetische Manifestation!"
translations.en-us: Hail, creative power! Hail, sustaining force! Hail, transformative energy! Hail, illuminating light! Hail, vibrant manifestation!
translations.en-gb: Hail, creative force! Hail, sustaining power! Hail, transformative energy! Hail, illuminating radiance! Hail, vibrant manifestation!
translations.fr-fr:
Voici une traduction possible :

"Salutations à l'énergie créatrice ! Salutations à l'énergie nourricière ! Salutations à l'énergie transformatrice ! Salutations à l'énergie illuminatrice ! Salutations à la manifestation énergique !"
translations.he: הַלְלוּ, כוח הבריאה! הַלְלוּ, כוח הקיים! הַלְלוּ, כוח השינוי! הַלְלוּ, כוח הארה! הַלְלוּ, התגלות הכוח!
translations.hi: "वंदन हो, सृजन शक्ति! वंदन हो, पालन शक्ति! वंदन हो, परिवर्तन शक्ति! वंदन हो, प्रकाशमान शक्ति! वंदन हो, ऊर्जा का प्रकटीकरण!"
translations.id: Salam, energi kreatif! Salam, energi pemelihara! Salam, energi transformatif! Salam, energi pencerah! Salam, manifestasi energi!
translations.it: Salve, energia creativa! Salve, energia che sostiene! Salve, energia trasformatrice! Salve, energia illuminante! Salve, manifestazione energetica!
translations.ja: 創造の力よ、我に。維持の力よ、我に。変革の力よ、我に。啓蒙の力よ、我に。活力に満ちた現れよ、我に。
translations.ko: 만트라의 의미를 살린 번역은 다음과 같습니다: "창조적인 에너지여, 찬미합니다! 유지하는 에너지여, 찬미합니다! 변화를 일으키는 에너지여, 찬미합니다! 빛을 밝히는 에너지여, 찬미합니다! 에너지의 현현이여, 찬미합니다!"
translations.nl: Gezegen zij de scheppende energie! Gezegen zij de onderhoudende energie! Gezegen zij de transformerende energie! Gezegen zij de verhelderende energie! Gezegen zij de energieke manifestatie!
translations.pl: Witam, twórczą energię! Witam, podtrzymującą energię! Witam, transformującą energię! Witam, rozświetlającą energię! Witam, energetyczne manifestowanie!
translations.pt-br: Saudações à energia criativa! Saudações à energia sustentadora! Saudações à energia transformadora! Saudações à energia iluminadora! Saudações à manifestação energética!
translations.ru: Здравствуй, созидательная энергия! Здравствуй, поддерживающая энергия! Здравствуй, преобразующая энергия! Здравствуй, озаряющая энергия! Здравствуй, энергическое проявление!

translations.vi: Xin chào, nguồn năng lượng sáng tạo! Xin chào, nguồn năng lượng duy trì! Xin chào, nguồn năng lượng chuyển hóa! Xin chào, nguồn năng lượng khai sáng! Xin chào, sự biểu hiện năng lượng!

translations.es: Saludos, saludos, saludos, saludos, ¡oh, Mukanda!
translations.ar: تحية، تحية، تحية، تحية، أيها الموكندا!
translations.bn: নমস্কার, নমস্কার, নমস্কার, নমস্কার, হে মুকন্দ!
translations.de: Sei gegrüßt, sei gegrüßt, sei gegrüßt, sei gegrüßt, o Mukanda!
translations.en-us: Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Mukanda!
translations.en-gb: Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Mukanda!
translations.fr-fr: Salutations, salutations, salutations, salutations, ô Mukanda !
translations.he: הִלֵּל, הִלֵּל, הִלֵּל, הִלֵּל, ה', מוֹקַנְדָה!
translations.hi: "हे मुकुंद! नमस्कार, नमस्कार, नमस्कार, नमस्कार।"
translations.id: Salam, salam, salam, salam, wahai Mukanda!
translations.it: Salve, salve, salve, salve, o Mukanda!
translations.ja: むかンダよ、讃えん、讃えん、讃えん、讃えん。
translations.ko: 만트라를 외칩니다: "mukanda" (묵간다)!
translations.nl: Gezondheid, gezondheid, gezondheid, gezondheid, o Mukanda!
translations.pl: Witam, witam, witam, witam, o Mukando!
translations.pt-br: Saudações, saudações, saudações, saudações, ó Mukanda!
translations.ru: Здравствуй, здравствуй, здравствуй, здравствуй, о Муканда!
translations.sv: Hyll, hyll, hyll, hyll, o Mukanda!
translations.th: ขอคารวะ, ขอคารวะ, ขอคารวะ, ขอคารวะแด่พระมุขันดา!
translations.tr: Ey Mukanda! Selam, selam, selam, selam.
translations.uk: Вітаю, вітаю, вітаю, вітаю, о Муканде!
translations.vi: Xin chào, xin chào, xin chào, xin chào, hỡi Mukanda!
translations.zh-cn: 赞美您，赞美您，赞美您，赞美您，墨干达！

mantras.name: Hail, the jewel-like one; proceed, proceed, greatly proceed; the essence of wisdom, perfectly manifested.
mantras.english: Hail, the jewel-like one; proceed, proceed, greatly proceed; the essence of wisdom, perfectly manifested.
mantras.original: Tayata Om Bekandze Bekandze Maha Bekandze Radza Samudgate Soha
mantras.transliteration: ག༌ལ་ཏོ། མུ་ཏིའི་དངུལ་གྱིས་བཀྲ་ཤིས་ཤོག། ཕྱིན་པ། ཕྱིན་པ། ཕྱིན་པ། ཡིད་ཀྱི་དོན་དངོས་། དག་དག་གིས་གསལ་བ།
mantras.background: A Buddhist Sanskrit mantra embodying wisdom's journey—"jewel" and "proceed" evoke awakening's path. Like all mantras, it works through vibration and repetition to focus the mind toward liberation.
mantras.benefits: This Buddhist wisdom mantra, invoking jewel-like clarity and the unfolding of insight, cultivates deep meditative focus, inner stillness, and an opening to transcendent wisdom — drawing practitioners toward spiritual awakening through rhythmic repetition.
mantras.tags: devotional, wisdom, manifestation, empowerment, affirmation, praise

translations.es: Salve, joya preciosa; avanza, avanza, avanza con grandeza; la esencia de la sabiduría, perfectamente manifestada.
translations.ar: "تَحيَّى، يا ذو البهاء؛ تقدم، تقدم، تقدم بعظمة؛ جوهر الحكمة، تجلّى تمامًا."
translations.bn: Hail, হে রত্নস্বরূপ!; অগ্রসর হও, অগ্রসর হও, মহানভাবে অগ্রসর হও; প্রজ্ঞা-সত্ত্বা, সম্পূর্ণরূপে প্রকাশিত।
translations.de: "Sei gegrüßt, du Juwel; schreite voran, schreite voran, schreite weit voran; die Essenz der Weisheit, vollkommen offenbart."
translations.en-us: Hail, the precious and radiant being; advance, advance, proceed with great momentum; the very essence of wisdom, perfectly revealed.
translations.en-gb: Hail, the precious and radiant being; advance, proceed, progress greatly; the very essence of wisdom, perfectly revealed.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations, ô être précieux ; avance, progresse, progresse grandement ; l'essence de la sagesse, parfaitement manifestée.
translations.he: שלום לך, אושר נצחי; התקדמ/י, התקדמ/י, התקדמ/י בהדרגה; מהות החוכמה, המתגלה באופן מושלם.
translations.hi: hail, हे रत्न-समान व्यक्ति; आगे बढ़ो, आगे बढ़ो, बहुत आगे बढ़ो; बुद्धि का सार, पूर्ण रूप से प्रगट।
translations.id: Salam, wahai permata; majulah, majulah, majulah dengan hebat; esensi kebijaksanaan, terwujud dengan sempurna.
translations.it: Salve, o preziosissimo; avanza, avanza, procedi abbondantemente; l'essenza della saggezza, perfettamente manifestata.
translations.ja: Hail, 尊貴なる方へ、進み、進み、さらに深く進みなさい。智慧の真髄、完全に顕現します。
translations.ko: 만트라 구절의 한국어 번역은 다음과 같습니다: "오, 보석과 같은 분이시여, 나아가십시오, 나아가십시오, 크게 나아가십시오. 지혜의 본질이 완벽하게 드러나소서."
translations.nl: Hail, o juweelachtige entiteit; ga voort, ga voort, vorder voort; de essentie van wijsheid, volmaakt geopenbaard.
translations.pl: Witaj, o ty, który jesteś jak klejnot; idź, idź, posuwaj się naprzód w wielkim tempie; esencja mądrości, doskonale objawiona.
translations.pt-br: Saudações, ó ser precioso; avança, avança, avança grandemente; a essência da sabedoria, perfeitamente manifesta.
translations.ru: Здравствуй, драгоценный; двигайся, двигайся, продвигайся вперед; сущность мудрости, совершенно проявленная.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den värdefulla; fortsätt, fortsätt, fortsätt framåt; visdomens essens, fullständigt manifesterad.
translations.th: กราบพระรัศมีอันงามสง่า; จงก้าวไป, จงก้าวไป, จงก้าวไปอย่างยิ่งใหญ่; สาระแห่งปัญญา, สำแดงอย่างสมบูรณ์.
translations.tr: Selam, mücevher gibi olan; ilerle, ilerle, büyük bir şekilde ilerle; bilgelik özü, mükemmel bir şekilde tezahür etmiş.
translations.uk: Вітаю, о ти, що сяєш як дорогоцінний камінь; рухайся, рухайся, просувайся вперед з великою силою; сутність мудрості, що втілена в досконалості.
translations.vi: Chào người cao quý, xin tiến bước, hãy tiến bước, hãy tiến xa; Bản chất của trí tuệ, được thể hiện hoàn hảo.
translations.zh-cn: 您好，如同珍宝般的存在；前行吧，继续前行，奋勇前进；智慧的精髓，完美显现。

mantras.name: Hare Krishna Maha Mantra
mantras.english: O Hari, O Krishna, O Rama — I call upon the divine energy and the supreme Lord
mantras.original: हरे कृष्ण हरे कृष्ण कृष्ण कृष्ण हरे हरे। हरे राम हरे राम राम राम हरे हरे।
mantras.transliteration: Hare Krishna Hare Krishna Krishna Krishna Hare Hare, Hare Rama Hare Rama Rama Rama Hare Hare
mantras.abstract:
The Hare Krishna Maha Mantra, composed of sixteen words arranged in a thirty-two syllable sequence, is the supreme mantra of the Gaudiya Vaishnava tradition founded by the saint Chaitanya Mahaprabhu in 16th-century Bengal. Chaitanya is believed by his followers to be a combined avatar of Radha and Krishna who descended to spread the path of devotional love and establish the chanting of the holy names as the primary spiritual practice for the current age, the Kali Yuga.

The three names — Hare, Krishna, and Rama — each carry profound significance. Hare is the vocative form of Hara, a name for Radha, the divine feminine energy or Shakti of the lord. Krishna means the all-attractive one, referring to the supreme personal deity who draws all beings toward himself through love. Rama is interpreted in this tradition as a name of Krishna meaning the source of transcendental pleasure.

Chaitanya and his successors systematized the theology of Bhakti around this mantra. The practice of chanting Hare Krishna on a set of 108-bead japa malas was prescribed as the central daily discipline. Advanced practitioners chant a minimum of sixteen rounds per day.

The mantra reached global prominence through A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada, who founded ISKCON in 1966 and spread the practice throughout the Western world. The mantra's simple call-and-response structure makes it well-suited to congregational singing (Kirtan), and it was famously embraced by George Harrison of the Beatles.

translations.en: O divine energy of the Lord, O all-attractive Krishna, O source of all pleasure Rama — I offer my call and my heart to you.
translations.zh: 哦，主的神圣能量，哦，万物吸引的克里希纳，哦，一切快乐的源泉罗摩——我将我的呼唤和我的心献给你。
translations.es: Oh energía divina del Señor, oh Krishna el todo-atractivo, oh Rama fuente de todo placer — ofrezco mi llamado y mi corazón a ti.

mantras.name: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.
mantras.english: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.
mantras.original: hare krisna, hare krisna, / krisná krisná, hare hare
mantras.transliteration: hare kṛṣṇa, hare kṛṣṇa, kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa, hare haire.
mantras.background: Hare Krishna is a Hindu mantra dedicated to Krishna and Radha. "Hare" invokes divine energy, "Krishna" the deity. Chanted repetitively (japa), it draws the mind toward devotion.
mantras.benefits: The Hare Krishna mantra is dedicated to Krishna, Rama, and Hare (Radha). Its repetition (japa) cultivates mental serenity, spiritual focus, and devotional connection — inviting the practitioner into a living lineage of bhakti.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, radha, devotion, japa, chanting

translations.es:
Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.

Traducción: ¡Oh, Krishna, oh, Krishna, Krishna, oh, Krishna!
translations.ar: يا هاري كريشنا، يا هاري كريشنا، كريشنا كريشنا، يا هاري.
translations.bn: हरे कृष्ण, हरे कृष्ण, कृष्ण कृष्ण, हरे हरे।
translations.de: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare. –  "O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna, O Hare."
translations.en-us: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna Krishna, O Hare.
translations.en-gb: Hail Krishna, Hail Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Chant and glorify.
translations.fr-fr: "Ô Krishna, Ô Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Ô Très Chère."
translations.he: הרי קרישנה, הרי קרישנה, קרישנה קרישנה, הרי הרי.
translations.hi: हे कृष्ण, हे कृष्ण, कृष्ण कृष्ण, हे हरे।
translations.id: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.
translations.it: Krishna, Krishna, o Krishna, o Krishna. Per favore, Krishna, per favore.
translations.ja: ハレ・クリシュナ、ハレ・クリシュナ、クリシュナ・クリシュナ、ハレ・ハレ。
translations.ko: 하레 크리슈나, 하레 크리슈나, 크리슈나 크리슈나, 하레 하레.
translations.nl: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.  Kan worden vertaald als: "O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna Krishna, O Hare."
translations.pl: Hare Kryśno, Hare Kryśno, Kryśno Kryśno, Hare Hare.
translations.pt-br: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.
translations.ru: Хари Кришна, Хари Кришна, Кришна Кришна, Харе Харе.
translations.sv: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.  Kan översättas som: "O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna, O Hare." eller "O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna, O [din barmhärtighet/din nåd]."
translations.th: พระหริศรีขรณา, พระหริศรีขรณา, พระหริศรี, พระหริ, พระหริ.
translations.tr: "Ey Krishna, Ey Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Lütfen/Merhamet et."
translations.uk: Харе Кришна, Харе Кришна, Кришна Кришна, Харе Харе.
translations.vi: "Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare" có thể được dịch sang tiếng Việt như sau: "Hỡi Krishna, hỡi Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hỡi Hare." hoặc, diễn giải một chút để nhấn mạnh ý nghĩa: "Hỡi Krishna, xin hãy ban phước lành, Krishna Krishna, xin hãy ban phước lành."
translations.zh-cn: 摩利 கிருஷ்ணா，摩利 கிருஷ்ணா， கிருஷ்ணா கிருஷ்ணா， 哈利 哈利。

mantras.name: He is the essence of Narasimha; that (is) the truth; I am That.
mantras.english: He is the essence of Narasimha; that (is) the truth; I am That.
mantras.original: Narasimha ta va da so hum
mantras.transliteration: he śaḥ, Narasimhasya sāraḥ; tad eva satyam; aham tad.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedantic devotion, this mantra identifies the practitioner with Narasimha's divine essence — "I am That" — merging self with truth. A powerful bridge between bhakti and Advaita!
mantras.benefits: Merging self with Narasimha's fierce, protective essence, this mantra cultivates fearlessness and non-dual awareness. Affirming "I am That truth" dissolves ego boundaries, inviting transformative courage and inner strength.
mantras.tags: hindu, vishnu, narasimha, vedanta, affirmation, devotional, divine, self-realization, philosophy

translations.es: Él es la esencia de Narasimha; eso es la verdad; yo soy Eso.
translations.ar: هو جوهر نارسيمها؛ هذا هو الحق؛ أنا هو ذلك.
translations.bn: তিনি হলেন নরসিংহের সার; এটাই সত্য; আমি তিনিই।
translations.de: Er ist das Wesen des Narasimha; das ist die Wahrheit; Ich bin das.
translations.en-us: He is the very essence of Narasimha; that is the truth; I am That.
translations.en-gb: He is the very essence of Narasimha; that is the absolute truth; I am That.
translations.fr-fr: Il est l'essence de Narasimha ; c'est la vérité ; Je suis Cela.
translations.he: הוא מהות נרסימה; זהו האמת; אני הוא.
translations.hi: वह नरसिंह का सार है; वह सत्य है; मैं वह हूँ।
translations.id: Dia adalah esensi dari Narasimha; itu adalah kebenaran; Aku adalah Itu.
translations.it: Egli è l'essenza di Narasimha; questo è la verità; io sono Ciò.
translations.ja: 彼はナラシンハの本質そのものであり、それが真実です。そして、私はそれです。
translations.ko: 그는 다르마사성의 본질입니다. 그것이 진리입니다. 나는 그것입니다.
translations.nl: Hij is de essentie van Narasimha; dat is de waarheid; Ik ben Dat.
translations.pl: On jest esencją Narasimhy; to jest prawda; Ja jestem Tym.
translations.pt-br: Ele é a essência de Narasimha; isso é a verdade; Eu Sou Isso.
translations.ru: Он – суть Нарасимхи; это – истина; Я – это.
translations.sv: Han är Narasimhas essens; det är sanningen; Jag är Det.
translations.th: เขาคือแก่นแท้ของนรสิงห์; นั่นคือความจริง; ข้าคือสิ่งนั้น.
translations.tr: O, o Narasimha'nın özüdür; işte bu gerçektir; Ben O'yum.
translations.uk: Він є суттю Нарасімхи; це – істина; Я є Цим.
translations.vi: Ông là bản chất của Narasimha; đó là sự thật; Tôi là đó.
translations.zh-cn: 他是那 Narasimha 的本质；这就是真理；我即是那。

mantras.name: Hum. It represents the seed syllable for the element of air and is often associated with the throat chakra. In some traditions, it is also associated with the Buddha Akshobhya.
mantras.english: Hum. It represents the seed syllable for the element of air and is often associated with the throat chakra. In some traditions, it is also associated with the Buddha Akshobhya.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ हuum.
mantras.background: A seed syllable tied to air and the throat chakra, "Hum" bridges Hindu and Buddhist paths — in some traditions linked to Buddha Akshobhya's transformative energy.
mantras.benefits: Hum awakens the throat chakra — seat of expression and truth. As the seed syllable of air, it is said to clear energetic pathways for authentic voice. In Vajrayana Buddhism, its link to Akshobhya evokes unshakeable mental clarity.
mantras.tags: buddhist, akshobhya, bija, mantra, chakra, throat, air, sound

translations.es: Hum. Representa la sílaba semilla del elemento aire y a menudo se asocia con el chakra de la garganta. En algunas tradiciones, también se asocia con el Buda Akshobhya.
