translations.ar: هم. يمثل هذا المقطع اللفظي الأساسي عنصر الهواء، وغالبًا ما يرتبط بمركز الطاقة الخاص بالحنجرة. وفي بعض التقاليد، يرتبط أيضًا بالبوذا أكشوبيا.
translations.bn: হাম। এটি বায়ু মৌলের বীজ অক্ষর হিসাবে বিবেচিত হয় এবং প্রায়শই এটি কণ্ঠ চক্রের সাথে সম্পর্কিত। কিছু ঐতিহ্য অনুসারে, এটি বুদ্ধ আক্সোব্যহারও সম্পর্কিত।
translations.de: "Hum" repräsentiert die Silbe, die dem Luftelement zugeordnet ist und wird oft mit dem Hals-Chakra in Verbindung gebracht. In einigen Traditionen wird sie auch mit dem Buddha Akshobhya assoziiert.
translations.en-us: Hum. It represents the seed syllable associated with the element of air and is often linked to the throat chakra. In certain traditions, it is also associated with the Buddha Akshobhya.
translations.en-gb: "Hum" represents the seed syllable associated with the element of air and is often linked to the throat chakra. In certain traditions, it is also associated with the Buddha Akshobhya.
translations.fr-fr: "Hum. Ce son représente la syllabe racine associée à l'élément de l'air et est souvent associé au chakra de la gorge. Dans certaines traditions, il est également associé au Bouddha Akshobhya."
translations.he: הֲמ. צליל זה מייצג את ההברה הבסיסית עבור יסוד האוויר, ולעיתים קרובות הוא מקושר לצ'אקרת הגרון. בחלק מהמסורות, הוא מקושר גם לבודהה אקשוביה.
translations.hi: "हम" ध्वनि, जो वायु तत्व का बीज अक्षर है और अक्सर गले के चक्र से जुड़ी होती है। कुछ परंपराओं में, यह बुद्ध अक्षितोर्ये से भी जुड़ी है।
translations.id: "Hum. Bunyi ini melambangkan suku kata dasar untuk elemen udara dan sering dikaitkan dengan pusat energi (cakra) tenggorokan. Dalam beberapa tradisi, bunyi ini juga dikaitkan dengan Buddha Akshobhya."
translations.it: "Hum. Questa sillaba rappresenta il suono primordiale associato all'elemento aria ed è spesso collegata al chakra della gola. In alcune tradizioni, è anche associata al Buddha Akshobhya."
translations.ja: 「ウム」は、風の元素を表す種子音であり、多くの場合、喉のチャクラと関連付けられます。また、いくつかの伝統では、仏陀アクショビャと関連付けられることもあります。
translations.ko: "Hum"은 바람의 원소에 해당하는 비저음이며, 종종 목차크라와 관련이 있습니다. 일부 전통에서는 불타 아크쇼비야와도 관련이 있습니다.
translations.nl: "Hum" vertegenwoordigt de zaadlettergreep voor het element lucht en wordt vaak geassocieerd met het keelchakra. In sommige tradities wordt het ook geassocieerd met de Boeddha Akshobhya.
translations.pl: "Hum" reprezentuje dźwięk pierwotny związany z elementem powietrza i często kojarzony z czakrą gardłową. W niektórych tradycjach jest on również powiązany z Buddą Akshobhyą.
translations.pt-br: Hum. Representa a sílaba primordial associada ao elemento ar e é frequentemente relacionada ao chakra da garganta. Em algumas tradições, também é associada ao Buda Akshobhya.
translations.ru: "Хм. Этот звук является биджмантрой, представляющей элемент воздуха, и часто ассоциируется с чакрой горла. В некоторых традициях он также связывается с Буддой Акшобхьей."
translations.sv: "Hum. Denna stavelse representerar frönsilen för elementet luft och är ofta förknippad med halschakrat. Inom vissa traditioner förknippas den också med Buddha Akshobhya."
translations.th: อุ้ม. มันเป็นพยางค์กำเนิดธาตุลม และมักเกี่ยวข้องกับศูนย์กลางพลังงานแห่งลำคอ ในบางประเพณี มันยังเกี่ยวข้องกับพระพุทธเจ้าอักโชภยะอีกด้วย
translations.tr: "Hum" sesi, havanın temel hecesini temsil eder ve genellikle boğaz çakrası ile ilişkilendirilir. Bazı geleneklerde, aynı zamanda Buda Akshobhya ile de bağlantılıdır.
translations.uk: "Хм. Цей звук є зерновою складовою, що представляє елемент повітря, і часто асоціюється з чакрою горла. У деяких традиціях він також пов'язаний з Буддою Акшобхьєю."
translations.vi: Âm "Hum" đại diện cho âm tiết nguyên tố của không khí và thường liên quan đến trung tâm năng lượng của cổ họng. Trong một số truyền thống, nó cũng liên kết với Phật Akshobhya.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡。这个音节代表着风元素的种子音，通常与喉轮相关联。在某些传统中，它也与佛陀阿悉吉佛有关。

mantras.name: I accomplish enough, I possess enough, I am sufficient.
mantras.english: I accomplish enough, I possess enough, I am sufficient.
mantras.original: I do enough, I have enough, I am enough
mantras.transliteration: I accomplish enough, I possess enough, I am sufficient.
mantras.background: Om (ॐ): Hinduism's primordial sound, older than time itself. The Vedas say this single syllable holds all creation — past, present, and silence beyond.
mantras.benefits: Om chanting shifts the nervous system toward stillness, inducing theta brainwaves linked to deep meditation. Its resonance stimulates the vagus nerve, easing stress. A single sustained Om opens a doorway to transcendent awareness beyond waking life.
mantras.tags: hindu, affirmation, sufficiency, self-acceptance, mantra, repetition, meditation, autonomic, vibration, sound healing, enough, sufficient

translations.es: Logro lo suficiente, poseo lo suficiente, soy suficiente.
translations.ar: أُنجز ما يكفي، أمتلك ما يكفي، أنا كافٍ.
translations.bn: আমি যথেষ্ট অর্জন করি, আমার কাছে যথেষ্ট আছে, আমি পরিপূর্ণ।
translations.de: Ich erreiche genug, ich besitze genug, ich bin ausreichend.
translations.en-us: I achieve enough, I have enough, I am complete.
translations.en-gb: I achieve a satisfactory amount, I have enough resources, I am adequate.
translations.fr-fr: J'accomplis suffisamment, je possède suffisamment, je suis suffisant.
translations.he: אני משיג מספיק, אני מחזיק בכמות מספקת, אני שלם.
translations.hi: मैं पर्याप्त कार्य करता हूँ, मेरे पास पर्याप्त है, मैं आत्मनिर्भर हूँ।
translations.id: Saya mencapai hasil yang memadai, saya memiliki cukup, saya adalah pribadi yang utuh.
translations.it: Raggiungo risultati soddisfacenti, possiedo ciò che mi serve, sono completo.
translations.ja: 私は十分な成果を上げます。私は十分なものを持っています。私は十分です。
translations.ko: 저는 충분히 해냅니다, 저는 충분히 소유하고 있습니다, 저는 충분합니다.
translations.nl: Ik presteer genoeg, ik bezit genoeg, ik ben voldoende.
translations.pl: Osiągam wystarczająco, posiadam wystarczająco, jestem wystarczający/wystarczająca.
translations.pt-br: Eu alcanço o suficiente, eu possuo o suficiente, eu sou suficiente.
translations.ru: Я достигаю достаточного, я обладаю достаточным, я достаточно хорош/достаточна хороша.
translations.sv: Jag åstadkommer tillräckligt, jag besitter tillräckligt, jag är fullt tillräcklig.
translations.th: ฉันทำสิ่งต่างๆ ได้อย่างเพียงพอ, ฉันมีสิ่งต่างๆ อย่างเพียงพอ, ฉันมีความพอดีในตัวเอง
translations.tr: Yeterince başarılıyım, yeterince sahip olduğum şeyler var, ben yeterliyim.
translations.uk: Я досягаю достатнього, я маю достатньо, я є достатньою/достатнім.
translations.vi: Tôi đạt được đủ điều, tôi sở hữu đủ điều, tôi là một người đầy đủ.
translations.zh-cn: 我已经完成了足够的任务，我拥有足够的资源，我已是完整之人。

mantras.name: I am That.
mantras.english: I am That.
mantras.transliteration: Ahaṁ Tat.
mantras.background:
SO HUM (सो ऽहम्) — Sanskrit for "I am That," rooting identity in pure awareness & universal consciousness. A timeless Vedic affirmation connecting self to all existence.
  Grounding: Source states SO HUM means "a statement of being, an affirmation of existence as pure awareness, a connection to the universal consciousness."
mantras.benefits: "I am That" (So Hum) affirms unity with universal consciousness, balances the Root Chakra, and cultivates self-love. Its rhythm mirrors the breath itself, making it a living, effortless meditation.
mantras.tags: hindu, affirmation, breathing, chakra, awareness, grounding, self-realization, contemplation, non-duality, unity

translations.es: Yo soy Aquello.
translations.ar: أنا هو.
translations.bn: আমিই ও।
translations.de: Ich bin das.
translations.en-us: "I am That."
translations.en-gb: I am That.
translations.fr-fr: Je suis Cela.
translations.he: אֲנִי הוּא.
translations.hi: मैं वह हूँ।
translations.id: Aku adalah Itulah.
translations.it: Io sono Ciò.
translations.ja: 私はそれである。
translations.ko: 나는 그것이다.
translations.nl: Ik ben Dat.
translations.pl: Ja jestem Tym.
translations.pt-br: Eu Sou Isso.
translations.ru: Я есть То.
translations.sv: Jag är Det.
translations.th: ข้าคือสิ่งนั้น.
translations.tr: Ben, O'yum.
translations.uk: Я – Це.
translations.vi: Tôi là đó.
translations.zh-cn: 我即是那 (Wǒ jí shì nà.)

mantras.name: I am That." or "That am I.
mantras.english: I am That." or "That am I.
mantras.transliteration: `Aham idam asmi.` or `Idam aham asmi.`
mantras.background: From Sanskrit, "So'ham" ("I am That") echoes Upanishadic Advaita: your breath itself whispers oneness with the cosmos — every inhale, a universe awakening.
mantras.benefits: "'I am That'—a declaration of unity with all existence—invites deep self-inquiry. Regular practice calms mental noise, sharpens concentration, and cultivates inner harmony, connecting you to humanity's oldest spiritual lineages.
mantras.tags: hindu, affirmation, focus, concentration, harmony, energy, philosophy, vibration

translations.es: "Yo soy Eso" o "Eso soy yo".
translations.ar: "أنا هو" or "هو أنا".
translations.bn: আমি সেই।" অথবা "সেটি আমি।"
translations.de: "Ich bin das." oder "Das bin ich."
translations.en-us: "I am That" or "That am I" can be translated as "Aham Tatwam Asi" or "Tatwam Aham Asi." A more accurate translation would be: "I am the Truth" or "The Truth is I."
translations.en-gb: "I am That," or "That am I."
translations.fr-fr: "Je suis Cela." ou "Cela est Moi."
translations.he: אֲנִי הוּא.
translations.id: "Aku adalah Itu." atau "Itu adalah Aku."
translations.it: "Io sono Ciò." oppure "Ciò sono io."
translations.ja: 私はそれである。または、それはいのちである。
translations.ko: "나는 그것이다." 또는 "그것이 나이다."
translations.nl: Ik ben Dat.
translations.pl: Ja Jestem Tym.
translations.pt-br: "Eu Sou Aquilo" ou "Aquilo Sou Eu".
translations.ru: Я есть То. or То есть Я.
translations.sv: Jag är Det.
translations.th: ข้าคือสิ่งนั้น หรือ สิ่งนั้นคือข้า
translations.tr: Ben O'yum.
translations.uk: Я – Це. або Це – Я.
translations.vi: "Tôi là đó." hoặc "Đó là tôi."
translations.zh-cn: 我即是“那”。/ “那”即是我。

mantras.name: I am enlightened, I am complete.
mantras.english: I am enlightened, I am complete.
mantras.original: I am light, I am whole
mantras.transliteration: I am enlightened, I am complete.
mantras.background: Om (ॐ) — the Vedic primordial sound. Ancient Hindu tradition's vibrational source of all creation, meaning simply "the universe itself." Chant it. Feel everything shift.
mantras.benefits: Om's sustained resonance calms the autonomic nervous system, shifts brain waves toward theta (deep meditative) states, and opens practitioners to *turiya* — the transcendent stillness said to underlie all of existence.
mantras.tags: hindu, affirmation, self-realization, mantra, complete, enlightened, vedanta, consciousness, sound healing, vibration, unity, mantra practice

translations.es: Estoy iluminado, estoy completo.
translations.ar: أنا مُستنير، أنا كامل.
translations.bn: আমি আলোকিত হয়েছি, আমি পরিপূর্ণ।
translations.de: Ich bin erleuchtet, ich bin vollendet.
translations.en-us: I have attained enlightenment; I am whole.
translations.en-gb: I am enlightened; I am whole.
translations.fr-fr: Je suis illuminé, je suis accompli.
translations.he: אני מואר, אני שלם.
translations.hi: मैं प्रबुद्ध हूँ, मैं पूर्ण हूँ।
translations.id: Saya tercerahkan, saya telah mencapai kesempurnaan.
translations.it: Sono illuminato, sono completo.
translations.ja: 私は悟りを開きました、私は完全です。
translations.ko: 저는 깨달음을 얻었습니다, 저는 완전합니다.
translations.nl: Ik ben verlicht, ik ben volmaakt.
translations.pl: Jestem oświecony, jestem w pełni.
translations.pt-br: Eu estou iluminado, eu estou completo.
translations.ru: Я просветлён, я полон.
translations.sv: Jag är upplyst, jag är fullständig.
translations.th: ฉันได้รับการตรัสรู้, ฉันสมบูรณ์.
translations.tr: Ben aydınlanmışım, ben bütünlüğe sahibim.
translations.uk: Я просвітлений, я цілісний.
translations.vi: Tôi đã đạt được sự giác ngộ, tôi là một thể hoàn thiện.
translations.zh-cn: 我已觉悟，我已圆满。

mantras.name: I am love; I give love.
mantras.english: I am love; I give love.
mantras.original: I am love, I give love
mantras.transliteration: The provided phrase is already in English. Therefore, no transliteration is needed.
mantras.background: Rooted in Sanskrit as "Aham Prema" — "I am Divine Love" — this mantra taps into an ancient tradition, affirming that love is not sought, but lived from within.
mantras.benefits: "I am love; I give love" roots in the Sanskrit "Aham Prema" (Divine Love). Practice aligns you with love's highest vibration, dissolves self-criticism, deepens connections, and shifts identity from lack to wholeness.
mantras.tags: affirmation, sanskrit, divine, love, healing, universal, self-acceptance, heart, peace, vibration

translations.es: Yo soy amor; yo doy amor.
translations.ar: أنا الحب؛ أنا أُعطي الحب.
translations.bn: আমি ভালোবাসা; আমি ভালোবাসা দিই।
translations.de: Ich bin Liebe; Ich gebe Liebe.
translations.en-us: I embody love; I offer love.
translations.en-gb: I am love; I offer love.
translations.fr-fr: Je suis amour ; je donne de l'amour.
translations.he: אני אהבה; אני נותן/ת אהבה.
translations.hi: मैं प्रेम हूँ; मैं प्रेम देता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya adalah cinta; Saya memberikan cinta.
translations.it: Io sono amore; io do amore.
translations.ja: 私は愛です。私は愛を与えます。
translations.ko: 나는 사랑입니다. 나는 사랑을 베풉니다.
translations.nl: Ik ben liefde; ik geef liefde.
translations.pl: Ja jestem miłością; Ja ofiaruję miłość.
translations.pt-br: Eu sou amor; Eu ofereço amor.
translations.ru: Я – любовь; Я дарю любовь.
translations.sv: Jag är kärlek; jag ger kärlek.
translations.th: ฉันคือความรัก; ฉันมอบความรักให้.
translations.tr: Ben sevgiyim; sevgi veriyorum.
translations.uk: Я є любов; Я дарую любов.
translations.vi: Tôi là tình yêu; Tôi trao đi tình yêu.
translations.zh-cn: 我是爱；我给予爱。

mantras.name: I am not the body, nor is the body mine; I am not life, nor am I ego. I am the form of pure consciousness, bliss, and the essence of Shiva; I am Shiva, I am Shiva.
mantras.english: I am not the body, nor is the body mine; I am not life, nor am I ego. I am the form of pure consciousness, bliss, and the essence of Shiva; I am Shiva, I am Shiva.
mantras.original: नाहम देहो न मे देहो, जीवो नाहं न चाहम्। चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम्
mantras.transliteration: `Aham nātmā, na eva śarīra; śarīra nāyam mama. Aham nātmā, na eva jīva; aham na ahaṃkaraḥ. Aham śuddhasattvasvarūpa, ānanda, śivasarīśvara-sāra; aham Śiva, aham Śiva.`
mantras.background: From Hindu Shaiva tradition, this mantra strips away body, ego, and conditioned identity — affirming pure consciousness, bliss, and Shiva's essence as one's true nature.
mantras.benefits: Releasing identification with body and ego, this mantra cultivates psychological flexibility and inner freedom. Like the uncarved block's return to wholeness, practitioners discover pure awareness beneath conditioned identity.
mantras.tags: taoist, shiva, consciousness, bliss, purity, form, simplicity, awareness, non-identification, release, essence, mindfulness

translations.es: No soy el cuerpo, ni el cuerpo es mío; no soy la vida, ni soy el ego. Soy la forma de la conciencia pura, la dicha, y la esencia de Shiva; soy Shiva, soy Shiva.
translations.ar: لستُ الجسد، ولا الجسد لي؛ لستُ الحياة، ولا أنا الحياة. أنا تجسيد الوعي الخالص، والسعادة، وجوهر شيفا؛ أنا شيفا، أنا شيفا.
translations.bn: আমি শরীর নই, এবং শরীর আমার নয়; আমি জীবন নই, এবং আমি অহং নই। আমি বিশুদ্ধ চেতনা, আনন্দ এবং শিবের সার - এই রূপ। আমি শিব, আমি শিব।
translations.de: Ich bin nicht der Körper, und der Körper ist nicht mein; ich bin nicht das Leben, und ich bin nicht das Ego. Ich bin die Form des reinen Bewusstseins, des Glücks und die Essenz von Shiva; ich bin Shiva, ich bin Shiva.
translations.en-us: I am not the body, nor is the body mine; I am not life, nor am I the ego. I am the embodiment of pure consciousness, bliss, and the essence of Shiva; I am Shiva, I am Shiva.
translations.en-gb: I am not the body; the body is not mine. I am not life; I am not the ego. I am the embodiment of pure consciousness, bliss, and the very essence of Shiva; I am Shiva, I am Shiva.
translations.fr-fr: Je ne suis pas le corps, et le corps n'est pas le mien; je ne suis pas la vie, et je ne suis pas l'ego. Je suis la forme de la conscience pure, du bonheur, et l'essence de Shiva; je suis Shiva, je suis Shiva.
translations.he: אני אינני הגוף, והגוף איננו שלי; אני אינני החיים, וגם אינני האגו. אני צורת התודעה הטהורה, האושר והמהות של שיווה; אני שיווה, אני שיווה.
translations.hi: मैं शरीर नहीं हूँ, और न ही शरीर मेरा है; मैं जीवन नहीं हूँ, और न ही मैं अहंकार हूँ। मैं शुद्ध चेतना, आनंद का स्वरूप हूँ, और शिव का सार हूँ; मैं शिव हूँ, मैं शिव हूँ।
translations.id: Aku bukanlah tubuh, dan tubuh bukanlah milikku; aku bukanlah kehidupan, dan aku bukanlah ego. Aku adalah bentuk dari kesadaran murni, kebahagiaan, dan esensi Shiva; Aku adalah Shiva, Aku adalah Shiva.
translations.it: Non sono il corpo, né il corpo è mio; non sono la vita, né sono l'ego. Sono la forma della pura coscienza, della beatitudine, e l'essenza di Shiva; sono Shiva, sono Shiva.
translations.ja: 私は肉体ではなく、肉体もまた私のものではありません。私は生命でもなく、また自我でもありません。私は純粋な意識、至福の形であり、シヴァの真髄そのものです。私はシヴァです、私はシヴァです。
translations.ko: 나는 몸이 아니며, 몸도 내 것이 아닙니다. 나는 생명이 아니며, 자아도 아닙니다. 나는 순수한 의식, 지복의 형상이며, 시바의 본질입니다. 나는 시바입니다, 나는 시바입니다.
translations.nl: Ik ben niet het lichaam, en het lichaam is niet van mij; ik ben niet het leven, en ik ben niet het ego. Ik ben de vorm van zuiver bewustzijn, zaligheid en de essentie van Shiva; ik ben Shiva, ik ben Shiva.
translations.pl: Ja nie jestem ciałem, ani ciało nie jest moje; ja nie jestem życiem, ani ja nie jestem ego. Ja jestem manifestacją czystej świadomości, błogości i esencją Shivy; Ja jestem Shiva, Ja jestem Shiva.
translations.pt-br: Não sou o corpo, nem o corpo é meu; não sou a vida, nem sou o ego. Sou a forma da pura consciência, da bem-aventurança e a essência de Shiva; Eu sou Shiva, Eu sou Shiva.
translations.ru: Я не есть тело, и тело не есть моё; я не есть жизнь, и я не есть эго. Я есть форма чистого сознания, блаженства и сущность Шивы; я есть Шива, я есть Шива.
translations.sv: Jag är inte kroppen, och kroppen är inte min; jag är inte livet, och jag är inte egot. Jag är formen av ren medvetenhet, salighet, och essensen av Shiva; jag är Shiva, jag är Shiva.
translations.th: ข้ามิใช่ร่างกาย ร่างกายก็ไม่ใช่ของข้า ข้ามิใช่ชีวิต และข้าก็มิใช่ตัวตน ข้าคือรูปธรรมแห่งความรู้แจ้งอันบริสุทธิ์ ความสุข และเป็นสาระสำคัญของพระศิวะ ข้าคือพระศิวะ ข้าคือพระศิวะ
translations.tr: Ben beden değilim, ne de beden benimdir; ben yaşam değilim, ne de ben egoyum. Ben saf bilinç, mutluluk ve Shiva'nın özünün tezahürüyüm; ben Shiva'yım, ben Shiva'yım.
translations.uk: Я не є тілом, і тіло не є моїм; я не є життям, і я не є "я" (его). Я є формою чистої свідомості, блаженства, та суттю Шиви; Я є Шивою, Я є Шивою.
translations.vi: Ta không phải là thân, và thân cũng không phải của ta; ta không phải là sự sống, cũng không phải là cái tôi. Ta là hình thức của ý thức thuần khiết, niềm vui, và bản chất của Shiva; ta là Shiva, ta là Shiva.
translations.zh-cn: 我非肉身，肉身亦非我；我非生命，亦非自我。我是纯粹意识、喜悦的形态，是湿婆的本质；我即湿婆，我即湿婆。

mantras.name: I am not the mind, nor the intellect, nor the ego, nor the consciousness. Not the ears, nor the tongue, nor the nose, nor the eyes. Not the ether, nor the earth, nor the fire, nor the air. I am of the nature of pure consciousness and bliss; I am He, I am He.
mantras.english: I am not the mind, nor the intellect, nor the ego, nor the consciousness. Not the ears, nor the tongue, nor the nose, nor the eyes. Not the ether, nor the earth, nor the fire, nor the air. I am of the nature of pure consciousness and bliss; I am He, I am He.
mantras.original: Mano buddhyahaṅkāra chittāni nāham Na cha śrotra jihve na cha ghrāṇa netre Na cha vyoma bhūmir na tejo na vāyuḥ Chidānanda rūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham
mantras.transliteration: ahaṃ na manas, na buddhiḥ, na ahaṃkāra, na cetanaḥ. na śrotra, na jihvā, na nāsa, na netra. na vyoma, na pṛthvī, na agniḥ, na vāyuḥ. ahaṃ śuddhasattvasvarūpaḥ, ahaṃ ānandaḥ; ahaṃ sa, ahaṃ sa.
mantras.background: From 8th-century Advaita Vedānta, Shankaracharya's Nirvana Shatakam declares: "I am not mind, senses, or elements — I am pure consciousness and bliss. I am Shiva."
mantras.benefits:
Practicing Nirvana Shatakam dissolves false identification with body and mind, cultivating psychological freedom and inner stillness. It guides the seeker toward recognizing pure consciousness as their true nature—liberating and transformative.
  Grounding: Source attributes Nirvana Shatakam to Shankaracharya as self-inquiry meditation detaching from body/mind, revealing identity with pure consciousness and bliss (Advaita Vedānta).
mantras.tags: hindu, advaita, vedanta, shiva, self-inquiry, mantra, liberation, consciousness, non-duality, philosophy

translations.es: No soy la mente, ni el intelecto, ni el ego, ni la consciencia. No soy los oídos, ni la lengua, ni la nariz, ni los ojos. No soy el éter, ni la tierra, ni el fuego, ni el aire. Soy de la naturaleza de la consciencia pura y la dicha; Soy Él, Soy Él.
translations.ar: لستُ العقلَ، ولا الفِكرَ، ولا الأنا، ولا الوعي. لستُ الأذنين، ولا اللسان، ولا الأنف، ولا العينين. لستُ الأثير، ولا الأرض، ولا النار، ولا الهواء. أنا من طبيعة الوعي الخالص والسعادة؛ أنا هو، أنا هو.
translations.bn: আমি মন নই, না বুদ্ধি, না অহংকার, না চেতনা। আমি কান নই, না জিহ্বা, না নাক, না চোখ। আমি আকাশ নই, না পৃথিবী, না আগুন, না বাতাস। আমি শুদ্ধ চেতনা এবং আনন্দের স্বরূপ; আমিই তিনি, আমিই তিনি।
translations.de: Ich bin weder der Geist, noch der Intellekt, noch das Ego, noch das Bewusstsein. Nicht die Ohren, noch die Zunge, noch die Nase, noch die Augen. Nicht der Äther, noch die Erde, noch das Feuer, noch die Luft. Ich bin von der Natur reinen Bewusstseins und Glückseligkeit; Ich bin Er, Ich bin Er.
translations.en-us: I am not the mind, nor the intellect, nor the ego, nor consciousness itself. I am not the ears, nor the tongue, nor the nose, nor the eyes. I am not the ether, nor the earth, nor the fire, nor the air. I am of the nature of pure awareness and bliss; I am That, I am That.
translations.en-gb: I am not the mind, nor the intellect, nor the ego, nor consciousness itself. I am not the ears, nor the tongue, nor the nose, nor the eyes. I am not the ether, nor the earth, nor the fire, nor the air. I am of the nature of pure consciousness and bliss; I am That, I am That.
translations.fr-fr: Je ne suis ni l'esprit, ni l'intellect, ni l'ego, ni la conscience. Je ne suis ni les oreilles, ni la langue, ni le nez, ni les yeux. Je ne suis ni l'éther, ni la terre, ni le feu, ni l'air. Je suis de la nature de la conscience pure et du bonheur ; je suis Lui, je suis Lui.
translations.he: אני איני המוח, וגם לא האינטלקט, וגם לא האגו, וגם לא התודעה. אני איני האוזניים, וגם לא הלשון, וגם לא האף, וגם לא העיניים. אני איני האתר, וגם לא האדמה, וגם לא האש, וגם לא האוויר. אני במהותו של טוהר התודעה והאושר; אני הוא, אני הוא.
translations.hi: मैं मन नहीं हूँ, न बुद्धि, न अहंकार, न चेतना। न मैं कान हूँ, न जीभ, न नाक, न आँखें। न मैं आकाश हूँ, न पृथ्वी, न अग्नि, न वायु। मैं शुद्ध चेतना और आनंद की प्रकृति का हूँ; मैं वह हूँ, मैं वह हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bukanlah pikiran, juga bukan intelek, ataupun ego, atau kesadaran. Bukan telinga, juga bukan lidah, hidung, atau mata. Bukan pula eter, bumi, api, atau udara. Saya adalah dari sifat kesadaran murni dan kebahagiaan; Aku adalah Dia, Aku adalah Dia.
translations.it: Non sono la mente, né l'intelletto, né l'ego, né la coscienza. Non sono le orecchie, né la lingua, né il naso, né gli occhi. Non sono l'etere, né la terra, né il fuoco, né l'aria. Sono della natura della pura coscienza e della beatitudine; io sono Esso, io sono Esso.
translations.ja: 私は心でもなく、知性でもなく、自我でもなく、意識でもない。耳でもなく、舌でもなく、鼻でもなく、目でもない。エーテルでもなく、地でもなく、火でもなく、空気でもない。私は純粋な意識と至福の本質であり、私は彼、私は彼である。
translations.ko: 나는 마음이 아니며, 지혜도 아니며, 자아도 아니며, 의식도 아닙니다. 귀나 혀나 코나 눈도 아닙니다. 에테르나 땅이나 불이나 바람도 아닙니다. 나는 순수한 의식과 행복의 본질이며, 나는 그 자체, 나는 그 자체입니다.
translations.nl: Ik ben niet het denken, noch het intellect, noch het ego, noch het bewustzijn. Niet de oren, noch de tong, noch de neus, noch de ogen. Niet de ether, noch de aarde, noch het vuur, noch de lucht. Ik ben van de aard van puur bewustzijn en zaligheid; Ik ben Hij, Ik ben Hij.
translations.pl: Nie jestem umysłem, ani intelektem, ani ego, ani świadomością. Nie jestem uszami, ani językiem, ani nosem, ani oczami. Nie jestem eterem, ani ziemią, ani ogniem, ani powietrzem. Jestem z natury czystą świadomością i błogością; Jestem Nim, Jestem Nim.
translations.pt-br: Não sou a mente, nem o intelecto, nem o ego, nem a consciência. Não sou os ouvidos, nem a língua, nem o nariz, nem os olhos. Não sou o éter, nem a terra, nem o fogo, nem o ar. Sou da natureza da pura consciência e da bem-aventurança; Sou Ele, Sou Ele.
translations.ru: Я не ум, не интеллект, не эго, не сознание. Я не уши, не язык, не нос, не глаза. Я не эфир, не земля, не огонь, не воздух. Я есть чистая сознательная сущность и блаженство; Я есть Он, Я есть Он.
translations.sv: Jag är varken sinnet, varken intellektet, varken egot, varken medvetandet. Inte öronen, inte tungan, inte näsan, inte ögonen. Inte eter, inte jord, inte eld, inte luft. Jag är av ren medvetenhets och välsignels natur; Jag är Han, Jag är Han.
translations.th: "ข้ามิใช่จิต ไม่ใช่ปัญญา ไม่ใช่ตัวตน ไม่ใช่ความรู้สึกตัว ข้ามิใช่หู ไม่ใช่ลิ้น ไม่ใช่จมูก ไม่ใช่ดวงตา ข้ามิใช่ธาตุอากาศ ไม่ใช่ธาตุดิน ไม่ใช่ไฟ ไม่ใช่ธาตุน้ำ ข้าเป็นสสารแห่งความรู้แจ้งและความสุข ข้าคือพระองค์ ข้าคือพระองค์"
translations.tr: Ben, ne zihnim, ne aklım, ne egom, ne de bilinçliyim. Ne kulaklarım, ne dilim, ne burnum, ne de gözlerim. Ne eter, ne toprak, ne ateş, ne de hava. Ben, saf bilinç ve mutluluğun özüyüm; Ben O'yum, Ben O'yum.
translations.uk: Я не є розумом, не є інтелектом, не є его, не є свідомістю. Я не є вухами, не є язиком, не є носом, не є очима. Я не є ефіром, не є землею, не є вогнем, не є повітрям. Я є сутністю чистої свідомості та блаженства; Я є Він, Я є Він.
translations.vi: Ta không phải là tâm trí, cũng không phải là trí tuệ, cũng không phải là cái tôi, cũng không phải là ý thức. Ta không phải là tai, cũng không phải là lưỡi, cũng không phải là mũi, cũng không phải là mắt. Ta không phải là không gian, cũng không phải là đất, cũng không phải là lửa, cũng không phải là gió. Ta là bản chất thuần khiết của ý thức và niềm vui; Ta là Ngài, Ta là Ngài.
translations.zh-cn: 我非心，非智慧，非自我，非意识。非耳，非舌，非鼻，非眼。非以太，非地，非火，非风。我乃纯粹意识和喜悦的本质；我即是祂，我即是祂。

mantras.name: I am whole; I am complete.
mantras.english: I am whole; I am complete.
mantras.transliteration: Ām hōl; Ām kōmplīt.
mantras.background: A modern affirmation rooted in mindfulness tradition, "I am whole; I am complete" draws on the ancient practice of repeating short, positive phrases to rewire thought and cultivate self-belief.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in affirmation traditions, "I am whole; I am complete" fosters self-belief and emotional resilience. Repeated consistently, it rewires subconscious thought, easing anxiety and cultivating an unshakeable inner wholeness.
mantras.tags: affirmation, positivity, self-confidence, empowerment, self-belief, mindfulness, peace, healing

translations.es: Estoy completo; estoy entero.
translations.ar: أنا كامل؛ أنا مكتمل.
translations.bn: আমি সম্পূর্ণ; আমি পরিপূর্ণ।
translations.de: Ich bin ganz; ich bin vollkommen.
translations.en-us: I am complete; I am entire.
translations.en-gb: I am whole; I am complete.
translations.fr-fr: Je suis entier ; je suis complet.
translations.he: אני שלם; אני שלם.
translations.hi: मैं पूर्ण हूँ; मैं सम्पूर्ण हूँ।
translations.id: Saya utuh; saya sempurna.
translations.it: Sono intero; sono completo.
translations.ja: 私は完全です。私は全体です。
translations.ko: 저는 완전합니다. 저는 충만합니다.
translations.nl: Ik ben heel; Ik ben volmaakt.
translations.pl: Jestem cały; jestem kompletny.
translations.pt-br: Eu sou integral; Eu sou completo.
translations.ru: Я цельный; Я совершенный.
translations.sv: Jag är hel; jag är fullständig.
translations.th: ฉันสมบูรณ์; ฉันเต็มเปี่ยม.
translations.tr: Ben bütünüm; ben tamamım.
translations.uk: Я цілісний; я єдиний.
translations.vi: Tôi là một thể vẹn toàn; Tôi là sự hoàn thiện.
translations.zh-cn: 我是完整的；我已是完整的。

mantras.name: I am with strength / I am in strength.
mantras.english: I am with strength / I am in strength.
mantras.transliteration: אני בעוֹצֵם / אני בְּקוֹרֹב לְעוֹצֵם.
mantras.background: This mantra, meaning "I am with strength / I am in strength," invites the practitioner into an embodied affirmation — declaring unity with inner power itself.
mantras.benefits: "I am with strength / I am in strength" affirms an inner, ever-present power. Repeating such a self-affirming phrase may cultivate resilience, calm, and a sense of grounded identity — inviting deeper exploration of strength-centered mantra traditions.
mantras.tags: affirmation, strength, empowerment, personal, self, resilience, confidence, assertion

translations.es: "Estoy con fuerza" o "Estoy en fortaleza".
translations.ar: أنا بقوة.
translations.bn: আমি শক্তি দিয়ে/আমি শক্তির মধ্যে আছি।
translations.de: Ich bin voller Kraft / Ich bin in meiner Stärke.
translations.en-us: I possess strength / I have strength.
translations.en-gb: I am strong / I possess strength.
translations.fr-fr: Je suis fort / Je suis dans la force.
translations.he: אני בעוֹצְמָה / אני עם עוֹצְמָה.
translations.hi: मैं शक्ति के साथ हूँ / मैं शक्ति में हूँ।
translations.id: Saya memiliki kekuatan / Saya berada dalam kekuatan.
translations.it: Sono pieno di forza / Ho forza dentro di me.
translations.ja: 私は力とともにいます。 (Watashi wa chikara to tomo ni imasu.)
translations.ko: 저는 힘을 가지고 있습니다. (Jeoneun him-eul gajigo itseumnida.)
translations.nl: Ik ben met kracht / Ik ben in kracht.
translations.pl: Jestem silny. / Posiadam siłę.
translations.pt-br: Estou com força / Estou em força.
translations.ru: Я полон сил / Я обладаю силой.
translations.sv: Jag är stark / Jag har styrka.
translations.th: ฉันมีความแข็งแกร่ง / ฉันอยู่ในความแข็งแกร่ง
translations.tr: Ben güçlüyüm. / Güçle içindeyim.
translations.uk: Я з силою / Я в силі.
translations.vi: Tôi có sức mạnh / Tôi tràn đầy sức mạnh.
translations.zh-cn: 我拥有力量。

mantras.name: I bow down to Shankara, to Shankaraacharya, to Kesava, and to Badarayana, the creators of the Sutras and their commentaries, again and again.
mantras.english: I bow down to Shankara, to Shankaraacharya, to Kesava, and to Badarayana, the creators of the Sutras and their commentaries, again and again.
mantras.original: शङ्करं शङ्कराचार्यं केशवं बादरायणं । सूत्रभाष्य कृतौ वंदे भगवंतौ पुनः पुनः
mantras.transliteration: "namo 'stu śaṃkarāya, śaṃkarācāryāya, keśavāya, ca bādarāyanāya, sūtrānāṃ ca tānāṃ vārtikānāṃ pratipāṭyān, punar api."
mantras.background: A Vedantic salutation bowing to Shankara, Kesava & Badarayana — the Sutra-writers. It bridges devotion and Hindu philosophy, inviting seekers into living tradition.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to lineage teachers cultivates humility and devotion. This salutation mantra connects practitioners to Vedantic wisdom, fostering reverence and mental discipline that grounds the mind before deeper study.
mantras.tags: hindu, shankara, sutras, commentary, devotion, vedanta, mantra, praise, auspicious, blessings, mantra_chanting, shaktism, guru

translations.es: Me inclino reverentemente ante Shankara, ante Shankaraacharya, ante Kesava y ante Badarayana, creadores de las Sutras y de sus comentarios, una y otra vez.
translations.ar: أُسَلِّم وأحيي شَنكَرَا، وشَنكَرَاَتشَارْيَا، وكِيشَافَا، وبَادَارَاَيَنَا، مُؤَلِّفِي السُّتْرَات وشُرُوحِها، مرارًا وتكرارًا.
translations.bn: আমি শঙ্কর, শঙ্করাচার্য, কেশব এবং বাদরায়ণকে প্রণাম জানাই, যারা সূত্র এবং তাদের ভাষ্য তৈরি করেছেন, বারংবার।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor Shankara, vor Shankaraacharya, vor Kesava und vor Badarayana, den Schöpfern der Sūtras und ihrer Kommentare, immer wieder.
translations.en-us: I offer my salutations repeatedly to Shankara, to Shankaraacharya, to Kesava, and to Badarayana, the authors of the Sutras and their commentaries.
translations.en-gb: I prostrate before Shankara, Shankaraacharya, Kesava, and Badarayana, the authors of the Sutras and their commentaries, repeatedly.
translations.fr-fr: J'invoque respectueusement Shankara, Shankaraacharya, Kesava et Badarayana, créateurs des Sutras et de leurs commentaires, encore et encore.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לשאנקרה, לשאנקראצ'ריה, לקשבה ולבדראיאנה, יוצרי הסוטרות ופירושיהן, שוב ושוב.
translations.hi: मैं शंकरा, शंकराचार्य, केशव और बादरायण को प्रणाम करता हूँ, जो सूत्र और उनकी टीकाओं के रचयिता हैं, बार-बार।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Shankara, kepada Shankaraacharya, kepada Kesava, dan kepada Badarayana, para pencipta Sutra dan komentarnya, berulang kali.
translations.it: Mi prostro a Shankara, a Shankaraacharya, a Kesava e a Badarayana, i creatori delle Sutra e dei loro commentari, ripetutamente.
translations.ja: シャンカラ、シャンカラチャーチャ、ケシャヴァ、そしてバダラヤナに、私は深く頭を下げます。彼らは、シュートラ（論理体系）とその解説書を創造しました。繰り返し、私は彼らへの敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 샨카라, 샨카라아차랴, 케사바 그리고 바다라야나께 경의를 표합니다. 그분들은 수트라와 그 주석들을 창시하신 분들입니다. 저는 그분들에게 끊임없이 존경을 표합니다. (샨카라, 샨카라아차랴, 케사바 그리고 바다라야나께 존경을 표합니다. 그분들은 수트라와 그에 대한 해설을 만들었습니다. 저는 그분들께 끊임없이 경의를 표합니다.)
translations.nl: Ik buig neder voor Shankara, voor Shankaraacharya, voor Kesava en voor Badarayana, de scheppers van de Sutras en hun commentaren, steeds weer.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Shankarą, przed Shankaracharyą, przed Kesavą i przed Badarayaną, twórcami Sutr i ich komentarzy, raz po raz.
translations.pt-br: Reverencio Shankara, Shankaraacharya, Kesava e Badarayana, criadores dos Sutras e de seus comentários, repetidamente.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед Шанкарой, перед Шанкара-ачарьей, перед Кесавой и перед Бадараяной, создателями Сутр и их комментариев, снова и снова.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig inför Shankara, Shankaraacharya, Kesava och Badarayana, skaparna av Sutrarna och deras kommentarer, om och om igen.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมนมัสการแก่ ฌังการะ, ฌังการะอาชารยะ, เกศวะ, และบาดารายณะ ผู้เป็นผู้สร้างสรรค์สูตรและตำราอธิบายต่างๆ, ซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า
translations.tr: "Şankara, Şankaraacharya, Kesava ve Badarayana'ya, yani Sutra'ları ve yorumlarını yazanlara, tekrar tekrar saygı sunuyorum."
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Шанкарі, Шанкарачарьї, Кесаві та Бадараяні, творцям Сутр і їхніх коментарів, знову і знову.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi đầu kính phục Shankara, Shankaraacharya, Kesava và Badarayana, những người đã sáng tác các Sutra và các bình luận của chúng, lại và lại.
translations.zh-cn: 我向湿婆神（Shankara），向 Shankara 智者（Shankaraacharya），向奎师那（Kesava），以及向巴达拉延（Badarayana）致敬，他们是《经论》及其注释的创作者，我一遍又一遍地向他们致敬。

mantras.name: I bow down to the Lord Vasudeva.
mantras.english: I bow down to the Lord Vasudeva.
mantras.transliteration: namo vṛṣṇi-kula-nandana-vāsudevāya.
mantras.background: From Sanskrit, "OM NAMO BHAGAVATE VASUDEVAYA" means "I bow to Lord Vasudeva." Chanted in yoga & Hindu rites, it purifies the soul — an ageless call across millennia!
mantras.benefits: Chanting "OM NAMO BHAGAVATE VASUDEVAYA" is said to purify the soul from material contaminations, drawing the practitioner toward divine grace (kṛpa) and inner liberation through mastery of the mind.
mantras.tags: hindu, vasudeva, devotional, chanting, purification, yoga, grace

translations.es: Me inclino ante el Señor Vasudeva.
translations.ar: أَتَوَجَّهُ بِالخُضُوعِ لِلرَّبِّ فِشْوَدِيْفَا.
translations.bn: আমি শ্রী বাসুদেবকে প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor dem Herrn Vasudeva.
translations.en-us: I offer my obeisance to Lord Vasudeva.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to Lord Vasudeva.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant le Seigneur Vasudeva.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לאדון ואסודֶבָה.
translations.hi: मैं भगवान् वासुदेव को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Tuhan Vasudeva.
translations.it: Mi prostro al Signore Vasudeva.
translations.ja: 私はヴァスデーヴァ神に敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 저는 바수데바 신에게 경배를 표합니다. (Jeoneun Basudeba sinege gyeongbaereul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl: Ik buig voor Heer Vasudeva.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Panem Vasudevą.
translations.pt-br: Eu me prostro diante do Senhor Vasudeva.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед Господом Васудевой.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för Herren Vasudeva.
translations.th: ข้าพเจ้าน้อมนมัสการพระวศุเทพ.
translations.tr: Ben, Tanrı Vasudeva'ya saygı duyarak eğiliyorum.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Господу Васудеві.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi đầu trước Thượng Đế Vasudeva.
translations.zh-cn: 我向毗湿奴神（或：主）鞠躬。

mantras.name: I bow to Chamunda, who dispels darkness.
mantras.english: I bow to Chamunda, who dispels darkness.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ caruṇḍai namas, yā andhakarāya apagacchati.
mantras.background: Rooted in 13th-century Chinese Zen, "Mu" (無) means "No/Nothing." Master Zhaozhou's single syllable became Rinzai's most potent koan—dissolving the self-seeking mind into pure awareness.
mantras.benefits: Practicing Mu exhausts the conceptual mind, dissolving the sense of a separate self—potentially triggering kensho, a direct insight into one's own nature. Zen masters have used this single syllable for eight centuries to shatter illusion and awaken awareness.
mantras.tags: hindu, chamunda, tantric, devotion, dispelling, darkness, shakti, mantra, ritual, protection, feminine, power

translations.es: Me postro ante Chamunda, quien disipa la oscuridad.
translations.ar: أُسَلِّمُ لِـ"تْشَامُـنْـدَا"، الَّتِي تُزِيلُ الظَّلَامَ.
translations.bn: আমি চামুণ্ডাকে প্রণাম জানাই, যিনি অন্ধকার দূর করেন।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor Chamunda, welche die Dunkelheit vertreibt.
translations.en-us: I bow to Chamunda, who removes darkness.
translations.en-gb: I prostrate before Chamunda, she who dispels darkness.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant Chamunda, celle qui dissipe les ténèbres.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לצאמונדה, המבריחה את החושך.
translations.hi: मैं चामुंडा के चरणों में वंदना करता हूँ, जो अज्ञानता के अंधकार को दूर करती हैं।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Chamunda, yang menghilangkan kegelapan.
translations.it: Mi prostro a Chamunda, che dissolve le tenebre.
translations.ja: 私は、闇を払うチャムンダに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 저는 칠흑의 어둠을 몰아내는 차문다 여신께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor Chamunda, die de duisternis verdrijft.
translations.pl: Składam pokłon Chamundzie, która rozprasza ciemność.
translations.pt-br: Reverencio Chamunda, que dissipa a escuridão.
translations.ru: Я склоняюсь перед Чамундай, которая рассеивает тьму.
translations.sv: Jag bugar för Chamunda, som avlägsnar mörkret.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมนมัสการพระชัมณฑา ผู้ซึ่งขจัดความมืด.
translations.tr: Çamunda'ya saygı sunuyorum, o karanlığı dağıtan.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Чамунді, яка розганяє темряву.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi lạy Chamunda, vị thần xua tan bóng tối.
translations.zh-cn: 我向具有驱散黑暗力量的查文达女神致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to Lord Ganesha, who is the remover of obstacles.
mantras.english: I bow to Lord Ganesha, who is the remover of obstacles.
mantras.transliteration: `namo ganēṣāya, yaḥ nivarataḥ antarāyanām.`
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, this Sanskrit mantra honors Ganesha, the elephant deity. "Namaha" means "I bow," invoking the remover of obstacles to open paths for new beginnings.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to Ganesha clears mental and spiritual obstacles, eases fear, and opens paths to new beginnings. Chanting invites focus, courage, and fresh starts—making it powerful before any new endeavor.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, devotional, clearing, opening, success, prosperity, empower

translations.es: Me inclino ante el Señor Ganesha, que es el destructor de obstáculos.
translations.ar: أُسَلِّمُ إلى اللورد غانيشا، الذي هو كاشف العوائق.
translations.bn: আমি গণেশ দেবতাকে প্রণাম জানাই, যিনি সকল প্রকার বাধা দূর করেন।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor Lord Ganesha, der der Beseitiger von Hindernissen ist.
translations.en-us: I offer my salutations to Lord Ganesha, who is the one who removes obstacles.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to Lord Ganesha, who is the dispeller of impediments.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant le Seigneur Ganesha, qui est le destructeur des obstacles.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לאדון גנשה, המכיל את הסרת המכשולים.
translations.hi: मैं भगवान गणेश को प्रणाम करता हूँ, जो कि सभी बाधाओं को दूर करने वाले हैं।
translations.id: Saya membungkuk kepada Tuhan Ganesha, yang merupakan penghancur segala rintangan.
translations.it: Mi prostro al Signore Ganesha, colui che rimuove gli ostacoli.
translations.ja: 私は、障害を取り除くガネーシャ神に礼を捧げます。
translations.ko: 저는 장애물을 제거하는 주님, 가네샤 신에게 경배합니다. (Jeoneun jangae-mul-eul jeogeo-haneun jusim, Ganesha sing-e gyeongbae-hapnida.)
translations.nl: Ik buig voor Heer Ganesha, die de verwijderaar van obstakels is.
translations.pl: Składam pokłon Lordowi Ganieśi, który jest usunięciem przeszkód.
translations.pt-br: Eu reverencio Lord Ganesha, que é o removedor de obstáculos.
translations.ru: Я склоняюсь перед Господом Ганешей, который является устранителем препятствий.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för Lord Ganesha, som är den som avlägsnar hinder.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาพระพิฆเนศ ผู้ขจัดอุปสรรค
translations.tr: Ben, engellerin gidericisidir, Tanrı Ganesha'ya saygılarını sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Господу Ганеші, який є руйнівником перешкод.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi lạy Bhagava Ganesha, vị thần phá tan mọi trở ngại.
translations.zh-cn: 我向消除障碍的毗湿奴神（Ganesha）致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to the Divine Mother Chandika, invoking Her power.
mantras.english: I bow to the Divine Mother Chandika, invoking Her power.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ cāṇḍikāyai namaḥ, tasyai śaktim āvāpyate.
mantras.background:
From ancient Vedic Hinduism, "Aum Hrim Chandikāyai Namah" means "I bow to Divine Mother Chandika." Repeating Her name awakens prana and draws the devotee into Her sacred power.
  Grounding: Source lists "Aum Hrim Chandikāyai Namah" as a mantra to Devi; mantra means "instrument of thought"; bowing salutation form explained in Hindu mantra section.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to Chandika awakens devotion and inner power. Mantra repetition sharpens concentration, stirs prana, and may shift consciousness toward the divine—drawing the devoted mind from illusion toward liberation.
mantras.tags: hindu, chandika, devi, goddess, devotion, invocation, salutation, tantric, empower, divine

translations.es: Me inclino ante la Madre Divina Chandika, invocando Su poder.
translations.ar: أَتَوَجَّهُ بِخُضُوعٍ إِلَى الأمِّ الإلهية شانديكا، مُستَشْفِعًا بِقُوَّتِهَا.
translations.bn: আমি দেবী চণ্ডিকার Divine Mother-এর পূজা করি, এবং তাঁর শক্তিকে আহ্বান করি।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor der Göttlichen Mutter Chandika und rufe ihre Kraft hervor.
translations.en-us: I prostrate before the Divine Mother Chandika, invoking her power.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the Divine Mother Chandika, invoking her power.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant la Mère Divine Chandika, invoquant Sa puissance.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לאם האלוהית צ'נדיקה, ומזמין את כוחה.
translations.hi: मैं देवी चंडिका को प्रणाम करता हूँ, और उनकी शक्ति को आह्वान करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Dewi Chandika, memohon kekuatan-Nya.
translations.it: Mi prostro alla Divina Madre Chandika, invocandone la potenza.
translations.ja: 私は、至高の女神チャンディカーに敬意を表し、その力を呼び起こします。
translations.ko: 저는 신성한 어머니 찬디카께 경배하며, 그녀의 힘을 불러일으킵니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de Goddelijke Moeder Chandika, en roep haar kracht aan.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Boską Matką Chandiką, wzywając Jej moc.
translations.pt-br: "Eu me prostro diante da Mãe Divina Chandika, invocando Seu poder."
translations.ru: Я склоняюсь перед Божественной Матерью Чандикой, призывая Её силу.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för den gudomliga moder Chandika, och åkallar hennes kraft.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาพระแม่ Chandika ผู้เป็นเทพเจ้า, ขอให้พระองค์ประทานพลัง
translations.tr: İlahi Ana Chandika'ya saygı duyuyorum, O'nun gücünü çağırıyorum.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Божественній Матері Чандіке, закликаючи її силу.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi lạy Mẹ Thần Chandika, cầu xin sức mạnh của Ngài.
translations.zh-cn: 我向至高的女神 Chandika 敬礼，祈求她的力量。

mantras.name: I bow to the Divine Teacher, I bow to the Divine Light.
mantras.english: I bow to the Divine Teacher, I bow to the Divine Light.
mantras.transliteration: मैं दिव्य गुरु को प्रणाम करता हूँ, मैं दिव्य ज्योति को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
mantras.background:
From Kundalini Yoga, "Ong Namo Guru Dev Namo" means "I bow to the Creative Energy; I bow to the Divine Inner Wisdom." It opens intuition and connects to sacred teacher lineage.
  Grounding: Source states it means "mi inchino all'energia creativa...all'infinita coscienza" and is recited at the start of nearly every Kundalini practice.
mantras.benefits:
"Ong Namo Guru Dev Namo" opens inner intuition & divine guidance. It connects practitioners to creative energy, activates protection, and centers the self—making it the sacred opener of nearly every Kundalini Yoga session.
  Grounding: Sources describe it as activating intuition, protection, and inner divine connection; used to begin Kundalini practice per both German and Italian source materials.
mantras.tags: kundalini, guru, devotional, sikh, protection, intuition, opening, reverence

translations.es: Me inclino ante el Divino Maestro, me inclino ante la Divina Luz.
translations.ar: أتضرّع إلى المعلم الإلهي، أتضرّع إلى النور الإلهي.
translations.bn: আমি সেই দিব্য শিক্ষককে প্রণাম জানাই, আমি সেই দিব্য আলোকে প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor dem göttlichen Lehrer, ich verneige mich vor dem göttlichen Licht.
translations.en-us: I prostrate before the Divine Teacher; I prostrate before the Divine Light.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the Divine Teacher; I offer my reverence to the Divine Light.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant le Maître Divin, je m'incline devant la Lumière Divine.
translations.he: אני משתחווה למורה האלוהי, אני משתחווה לאור האלוהי.
translations.hi: मैं दिव्य गुरु को प्रणाम करता हूँ, मैं दिव्य ज्योति को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Guru Ilahi, Saya bersujud kepada Cahaya Ilahi.
translations.it: Mi prostro al Divino Maestro, mi prostro alla Divina Luce.
translations.ja: 私は神聖な教師に敬意を表します。私は神聖な光に敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 저는 신성한 스승께 경배합니다, 저는 신성한 빛께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de Heilige Leraar, ik buig voor het Heilige Licht.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Boskim Nauczycielem, skłaniam się przed Boskim Światłem.
translations.pt-br: Eu me prostro perante o Divino Mestre, eu me prostro perante a Divina Luz.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед Божественным Учителем, Я склоняю голову перед Божественным Светом.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för den gudomliga läraren, jag böjer mig för det gudomliga ljuset.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมน้อมต่อพระอาจารย์ผู้เป็นพระเจ้า, ข้าขอน้อมน้อมต่อแสงสว่างอันศักดิ์สิทธิ์
translations.tr: Ben, İlahi Öğretmen'e saygı duyuyorum, İlahi Işık'a saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Я схиляюся перед Божественним Наставником, Я схиляюся перед Божественним Світлом.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi đầu trước Đấng Thầy thiêng liêng, tôi cúi đầu trước Ánh sáng thiêng liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 我向神圣的导师致敬，我向神圣的光明致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to the Goddess Durga, who is the essence of 'Dum'.
mantras.english: I bow to the Goddess Durga, who is the essence of 'Dum'.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ namaḥ durgāyai, yā 'ḍuṃ' nāma-svarūpaḥ.
mantras.background: From Hindu Bhakti tradition, this mantra bows to Goddess Durga, invoking her sacred seed sound 'Dum' — a devotional cry that opens the heart to divine feminine power.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to Durga through her bija "Dum" cultivates devotion, inner strength, and surrender. Bhakti mantra practice purifies consciousness and awakens heartfelt connection with the Divine.
mantras.tags: hindu, durga, bhakti, devotion, surrender, consciousness, mantra, purification, inner peace, divine, essence, dum

translations.es: Me inclino ante la Diosa Durga, que es la esencia de "Dum".
translations.ar: أُسَلِّمُ إلى الإلهة دورغا، التي هي جوهر "دوم".
translations.bn: আমি দুর্গা দেবীর পূজা করি, যিনি 'ডুম'-এর সার।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor der Göttin Durga, die die Essenz des 'Dum' ist.
translations.en-us: I bow to the Goddess Durga, who embodies the very essence of 'Dum'.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the Goddess Durga, who embodies the very essence of 'Dum'.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant la déesse Durga, qui est l'essence même de "Dum".
translations.he: אני משתחווה לאלה דורגה, שהיא מהות ה'דום'.
translations.hi: मैं देवी दुर्गा को प्रणाम करता हूँ, जो 'डम' के सार स्वरूप हैं।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Dewi Durga, yang merupakan esensi dari 'Dum'.
translations.it: Mi prostro alla Dea Durga, che è l'essenza del 'Dum'.
translations.ja: 私は、至高の女神デュルガーに敬意を表します。彼女は「Dum」という概念の本質そのものです。
translations.ko: 저는 두르가 여신께 경배를 올립니다. 두르가 여신은 '둠(Dum)'의 본질입니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de Godin Durga, die de essentie van 'Dum' is.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Boginią Durge, która jest esencją "Dum".
translations.pt-br: Reverencio a Devi Durga, que é a essência do 'Dum'.
translations.ru: Я склоняюсь перед Богиней Дурга, которая является сущностью понятия "Дум".
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för gudinnan Durga, som är essensen av "Dum".
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาพระแม่ดุรคา ผู้ซึ่งเป็นสสารแห่ง "Dum".
translations.tr: Ben, Durga Tanrıçası'na, 'Dum'un özü olan varlığa saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Богині Дурга, яка є сутністю "Дум".
translations.vi: Tôi cúi lạy Nữ thần Durga, là bản chất của "Dum".
translations.zh-cn: 我向杜尔迦女神致敬，她是“Dum”的精髓。

mantras.name: I bow to the divine, I bow to the teacher.
mantras.english: I bow to the divine, I bow to the teacher.
mantras.transliteration: मैं ईश्वर को प्रणाम करता हूँ, मैं गुरु को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
mantras.tags: hindu, devotional, bhakti, guru, salutation, divine, veneration, affirmation, empower, respect

translations.es: Me inclino ante lo divino, me inclino ante el maestro.
translations.ar: أتضرّع إلى الخالق، أتضرّع إلى المعلم.
translations.bn: আমি দেবতাকে প্রণাম জানাই, আমি শিক্ষককে প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor dem Göttlichen, ich verneige mich vor dem Lehrer.
translations.en-us: I offer my reverence to the divine, I offer my reverence to the teacher.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the divine, and I offer my reverence to the teacher.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant le divin, je m'incline devant le maître.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לאלוהות, אני משתחווה למורה.
translations.hi: मैं दिव्य को प्रणाम करता हूँ, मैं गुरु को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bersujud di hadapan Yang Maha Kuasa, saya bersujud di hadapan guru.
translations.it: Mi prostro al divino, mi prostro all'insegnante.
translations.ja: 神仏に礼拝します。先生に礼拝します。(Shinbutsu ni reihai shimasu. Sensei ni reihai shimasu.)
translations.ko: 저는 신에게 경배합니다. 저는 스승님께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor het goddelijke, ik buig voor de leraar.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed boskością, skłaniam się przed nauczycielem.
translations.pt-br: Reverencio o divino, reverencio o professor.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед божественным, я склоняю голову перед учителем.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig inför det gudomliga, jag böjer mig inför läraren.
translations.th: ข้าขอคำนับต่อสิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์, ข้าขอคำนับต่อครูบาอาจารย์
translations.tr: İlahi'ye saygı duyuyorum, öğretmene saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Я схиляю голову перед божественним, я схиляю голову перед учителем.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi đầu trước đấng thiêng liêng, tôi cúi đầu trước người thầy.
translations.zh-cn: 我向神灵致敬，我向老师致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to the first teacher.
mantras.english: I bow to the first teacher.
mantras.transliteration: `namo adhyāpaka-āyaṃ.`
mantras.background: Rooted in ancient Hindu-Buddhist traditions, this reverence mantra honors the primordial teacher, awakening your connection to universal wisdom through sacred sound vibration.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to the first teacher cultivates humility and inner openness — qualities linked in the sources to mantras as "keys to the divine within," elevating vibration and deepening connection to universal wisdom and lineage.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, shiva, mantra, vibration, energy, healing, wellbeing, sound, illumination, peace, divine

translations.es: Me inclino ante el primer maestro.
translations.ar: أُسَلِّمُ إلى المعلم الأول.
translations.bn: নমস্কার প্রথম শিক্ষককে।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor dem ersten Lehrer.
translations.en-us: I offer my reverence to the first teacher.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the initial instructor.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant le premier enseignant.
translations.he: אני משתחווה למורה הראשון.
translations.hi: मैं प्रथम शिक्षक को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya membungkuk kepada guru pertama.
translations.it: Mi inchino al primo insegnante.
translations.ja: 私は最初の先生に敬意を表します。 (Watashi wa saisho no sensei ni keii o arawashimasu.)
translations.ko: 저는 최초의 스승께 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de eerste leraar.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed pierwszym nauczycielem.
translations.pt-br: Eu reverencio o primeiro professor.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед первым учителем.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för den första läraren.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมนับต่อครูอาจารย์ผู้เป็นคนแรก
translations.tr: İlk öğretmene saygı sunarım.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Першому Вчителеві.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi chào vị giáo viên đầu tiên.
translations.zh-cn: 我向第一位老师致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to the glorious and auspicious Lakshmi.
mantras.english: I bow to the glorious and auspicious Lakshmi.
mantras.transliteration: `namo jvalānte lakṣmyai`
mantras.background: A Sanskrit hymn of praise to Lakshmi, rooted in Hindu mantra tradition—where sacred words, since the Rigveda (2nd millennium BCE), serve as "instruments of thought" to invoke divine blessings.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to Lakshmi through mantra cultivates reverence, abundance consciousness, and inner auspiciousness. As a devotional hymn of praise, its deep meditation on meaning—not mere repetition—awakens spiritual and psychological transformation.
mantras.tags: hindu, lakshmi, devotion, praise, ritual, blessing, auspicious

translations.es: Me inclino ante la gloriosa y auspiciosa Lakshmí.
translations.ar: أُسَلِّمُ إلى اللكشمي، ذاتَ المجدِ والبركة.
translations.bn: আমি সেই glorious এবং auspicious লক্ষ্মীর কাছে মাথা নত করি।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor der glorreichen und günstigen Lakshmi.
translations.en-us: I offer my reverence to the glorious and fortunate Lakshmi.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the glorious and propitious Goddess Lakshmi.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant la glorieuse et propice Lakshmi.
translations.he: אני משתחווה ללשמי, המפוארת והמבורכת.
translations.hi: मैं, महिमामयी और शुभ्र लक्ष्मी को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bersujud kepada Sri Lakshmi yang mulia dan membawa keberuntungan.
translations.it: Mi inchino alla gloriosa e propizia Lakshmi.
translations.ja: 私は、栄光に満ちた、縁起の良いラクシュミーに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 저는 찬란하고 길조로운 락슈미께 경배를 올립니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de glorieuze en gunstige Lakshmi.
translations.pl: Składam pokłon chwalebnej i błogosławionej Lakshmi.
translations.pt-br: Eu me prostro diante da gloriosa e auspiciosa Lakshmi.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед славной и благословенной Лакшми.
translations.sv: Jag bugar mig inför den härliga och välgörande Lakshmi.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมนมัสการพระลักษมี ผู้เป็นที่สรรเสริญและนำมาซึ่งความโชคดี
translations.tr: "Ben, ihtişamlı ve mübarek Lakshmi'ye saygı sunuyorum."
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся славній і благословенній Лакшмі.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi đầu lạy Sri Lakshmi, vị thần mang lại sự thịnh vượng và điềm lành.
translations.zh-cn: 我向荣耀而吉祥的拉克希米女神致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to the radiant Lakshmi.
mantras.english: I bow to the radiant Lakshmi.
mantras.transliteration: `namo devyai lakṣmyai`
mantras.background: Rooted in Hindu devotional tradition, "Om Shrim Shriyei Namaha" — "I bow to the radiant Lakshmi" — is a Sanskrit prayer invoking the goddess of abundance. The source lists it among sacred mantras used as thematic prayers, inviting prosperity and inner radiance through rhythmic chanting.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "I bow to the radiant Lakshmi" (Om Shrim Shriyei Namaha) channels devotion toward abundance. Research shows mantra chanting boosts endorphins, calms the mind, and reduces stress, inviting inner prosperity.
mantras.tags: hindu, lakshmi, devotion, mantra, meditation, chanting, wellbeing, endorphins, vagus, stress, cognitive, spiritual

translations.es: Me postro ante la radiante Lakshmī.
translations.ar: أُسَلِّمُ لِشَاشِي، يا ذاتَ الضياء.
translations.bn: আমি উজ্জ্বল লক্ষ্মীর প্রতি প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor der strahlenden Lakshmi.
translations.en-us: I prostrate before the resplendent Lakshmi.
translations.en-gb: I offer my reverence to the resplendent Lakshmi.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant la Lakshmi resplendissante.
translations.he: אני משתחווה ללקשמי הזוהרת.
translations.hi: मैं तेजस्वी लक्ष्मी को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menyembah Dewi Lakshmi yang bercahaya.
translations.it: Mi prostro alla radiosa Lakshmi.
translations.ja: 私は、輝けるラクシュミーに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 저는 찬란한 락슈미에게 경배를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de stralende Lakshmi.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed promienną Lakshmi.
translations.pt-br: Reverencio a radiante Lakshmi.
translations.ru: Я склоняю голову перед сияющей Лакшми.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för den strålande Lakshmi.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาเทวีลักษมี ผู้เปล่งประกาย
translations.tr: Ben, ışıldayan Lakshmi'e saygı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Я схиляю голову перед сяючою Лакшмі.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi lạy Sri Lakshmi, người tỏa sáng.
translations.zh-cn: 我向光耀的吉祥女神（拉克希米）致敬。

mantras.name: I bow to you, I bow to you, I bow to you, salutations.
mantras.english: I bow to you, I bow to you, I bow to you, salutations.
mantras.transliteration: `namaste, namaste, namaste, namo namaḥ`
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, this mantra salutes Ganesha—remover of obstacles—through repeated bows ("Namo Namah"), invoking wisdom, prosperity, and a path cleared for success.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Namo Namah" cultivates deep humility and devotion, clearing inner obstacles and inviting divine grace. This sacred surrender fosters prosperity, wisdom, and a smooth path forward in all endeavors.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, ganesha, devotional, invocation, reverence, obstacles, prosperity, humility, liberation

translations.es: Me inclino ante ti, me inclino ante ti, me inclino ante ti, saludos.
translations.ar: أتضرع إليك، أتضرع إليك، أتضرع إليك، تحية.
translations.bn: আমি আপনার প্রতি নত করি, আমি আপনার প্রতি নত করি, আমি আপনার প্রতি নত করি, অভিবাদন।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor dir, ich verneige mich vor dir, ich verneige mich vor dir, Grüße.
translations.en-us: I prostrate before you, I prostrate before you, I prostrate before you, greetings.
translations.en-gb: I offer my respects to you, I offer my respects to you, I offer my respects to you, greetings.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant vous, je m'incline devant vous, je m'incline devant vous, salutations.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לך, אני משתחווה לך, אני משתחווה לך, ברכות.
translations.hi: मैं आपको प्रणाम करता हूँ, मैं आपको प्रणाम करता हूँ, मैं आपको प्रणाम करता हूँ, नमस्कार।
translations.id: Saya membungkuk kepada Anda, saya membungkuk kepada Anda, saya membungkuk kepada Anda, salam.
translations.it: Vi inchino, Vi inchino, Vi inchino, saluti.
translations.ja: 私はあなたに敬意を表します、私はあなたに敬意を表します、私はあなたに敬意を表します、ご挨拶申し上げます。 (Watashi wa anata ni keii o arawashimasu, watashi wa anata ni keii o arawashimasu, watashi wa anata ni keii o arawashimasu, go-aisatsu moushiagemasu.)
translations.ko: 저는 당신께 경배합니다, 저는 당신께 경배합니다, 저는 당신께 경배합니다, 존경을 표합니다.
translations.nl: Ik buig voor u, ik buig voor u, ik buig voor u, groeten.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Tobą, skłaniam się przed Tobą, skłaniam się przed Tobą, pozdrowienia.
translations.pt-br: "Eu me prostro a você, eu me prostro a você, eu me prostro a você, saudações."
translations.ru: Я склоняюсь перед вами, я склоняюсь перед вами, я склоняюсь перед вами, приветствую.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för dig, jag böjer mig för dig, jag böjer mig för dig, hälsningar.
translations.th: ข้าขอคารวะท่าน, ข้าขอคารวะท่าน, ข้าขอคารวะท่าน, ขอความสวัสดี
translations.tr: Size saygı duyuyorum, Size saygı duyuyorum, Size saygı duyuyorum, selamlar.
translations.uk: Я схиляюся перед тобою, я схиляюся перед тобою, я схиляюся перед тобою, вітаю.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi chào bạn, tôi cúi chào bạn, tôi cúi chào bạn, kính chào.
translations.zh-cn: 我向您致敬，我向您致敬，我向您致敬，祝福。

mantras.name: I receive, I accept, I welcome.
mantras.english: I receive, I accept, I welcome.
mantras.transliteration: `நான் பெறுகிறேன், நான் ஏற்கிறேன், நான் வரவேற்கிறேன்.`
mantras.background: "I receive, I accept, I welcome" — a modern affirmation mantra rooted in the Hindu tradition where sacred sound vibrations awaken divine energy within the practitioner.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in mantra tradition, receptive phrases cultivate mental clarity (மனத்தெளிவு) and openness—echoing Om's gift of "stillness and openness." Chanting aligns the practitioner with divine flow, dissolving resistance.
mantras.tags: hindu, acceptance, welcome, affirmation, relaxation, sound healing, vibration, consciousness, self-awareness, presence, inner peace, mantra practice

translations.es: Recibo, acepto, doy la bienvenida.
translations.ar: أَتَلَقَّى، أَقْبَلُ، أُقَدِّمُ لِلْحَفَاوَةِ.
translations.bn: আমি গ্রহণ করি, আমি মেনে নিই, আমি স্বাগত জানাই।
translations.de: Ich empfange, ich akzeptiere, ich begrüße.
translations.en-us: I receive, I accept, I welcome.
translations.en-gb: I receive, I accept, I welcome.
translations.fr-fr: Je reçois, j'accepte, j'accueille.
translations.he: אֲנִי מְקַבֵּל, אֲנִי מֵקְבֵּל, אֲנִי מְקַבֵּל בְּשִׂמְחָה.
translations.hi: मैं प्राप्त करता हूँ, मैं स्वीकार करता हूँ, मैं स्वागत करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menerima, saya menyetujui, saya menyambut.
translations.it: Ricevo, accetto, accolgo.
translations.ja:
私は受け取ります、私は受け入れます、私は歓迎します。
(Watashi wa uke torimasu, watashi wa uke iremasu, watashi wa kangei shimasu.)
translations.ko: 저는 받습니다, 저는 받아들입니다, 저는 환영합니다.
translations.nl: Ik ontvang, ik accepteer, ik verwelkom.
translations.pl: Otrūkkiṟēṉ, aṟaikkiṟēṉ, aivattiṟkiṟēṉ.
translations.pt-br: Recebo, aceito, acolho.
translations.ru: Я получаю, я принимаю, я приветствую.
translations.sv: Jag tar emot, jag accepterar, jag välkomnar.
translations.th: ดิฉันได้รับ, ดิฉันยอมรับ, ดิฉันยินดีต้อนรับ
translations.tr: Ben alıyorum, ben kabul ediyorum, ben hoş karşılıyorum.
translations.uk: Я отримую, я приймаю, я вітаю.
translations.vi: Tôi nhận, tôi chấp nhận, tôi chào đón.
translations.zh-cn: 我接受，我欢迎，我迎接。

mantras.name: If you have both hands and a fire in the hearth, you will not lack food.
mantras.english: If you have both hands and a fire in the hearth, you will not lack food.
mantras.original: ஆவஹந்தியும் அடுப்பிலே நெருப்பும் இருந்தால் சாப்பாட்டுக்குப் பஞ்சமில்லை
mantras.transliteration: ṜṜ கைகள் இருந்தால், மேலும் வீட்டில் நெருப்பு இருந்தால், உங்களுக்கு உணவு இல்லாமல் இருக்காது.
mantras.background: From Kerala's oral tradition, chanting Āvahantī deity's mantra shields families from hunger. "If you have both hands and a fire in the hearth, you will not lack food."
mantras.benefits: Chanting the Avahanti deity's mantra with sincere devotion is said to shield an entire family from hunger and scarcity—nurturing both material sustenance and a deep sense of divine protection rooted in Kerala folk tradition.
mantras.tags: kerala, avahanti, hindu, sustenance, household, devotional, protection, abundance

translations.es: Si tienes ambas manos y un fuego encendido en el hogar, no te faltará alimento.
translations.ar: إذا كانت لديك كلتا اليدين و نار مشتعلة في الموقد، فلن تفتقر إلى الطعام.
translations.bn: যদি তোমার দুটি হাত থাকে এবং चूলায় আগুন জ্বলে, তবে তুমি কখনও ক্ষুধার্ত থাকবে না।
translations.de: Wenn du beide Hände hast und ein Feuer im Herd brennt, wirst du keine Nahrungsmittelmangel erleiden.
translations.en-us: If you possess the ability to work with both hands, and you have the means to cook food (a fire in the hearth), you will not suffer from hunger.
translations.en-gb: If you possess both hands and have a fire burning in your hearth, you will not suffer from hunger.
translations.fr-fr: Si vous avez les deux mains et un feu dans la cheminée, vous ne manquerez jamais de nourriture.
translations.he: אם יש לך שתי ידיים ואש בתנור, לא תחסר מזון.
translations.hi: यदि आपके पास दोनों हाथ हैं और घर में चूल्हा जल रहा है, तो आपको भोजन की कमी नहीं होगी।
translations.id: Jika Anda memiliki kedua tangan dan api di perapian, Anda tidak akan kekurangan makanan.
translations.it: Se hai entrambe le mani e un fuoco nel focolare, non mancherai mai di cibo.
translations.ja: 両手があり、暖炉に火があれば、あなたは決して食べ物を欠くことはないでしょう。
translations.ko: 만약 당신이 두 손과 그리고 벽난로에 불이 있다면, 당신은 결코 음식을 부족하게 겪지 않을 것입니다.
translations.nl: Als je beide handen hebt en een vuur in de haard, zul je geen gebrek aan voedsel kennen.
translations.pl: Jeśli masz obie ręce i ogień w kominku, nie zabraknie ci jedzenia.
translations.pt-br: Se você tem ambas as mãos e um fogo no lar, você não faltará comida.
translations.ru: Если у вас есть обе руки и огонь в очаге, вам никогда не придется голодать.
translations.sv: Om du har båda händerna och en eld i spisen, kommer du inte att sakna mat.
translations.th: หากคุณมีทั้งสองมือและมีไฟในเตา คุณจะไม่ขาดแคลนอาหาร
translations.tr: Eğer iki elin varsa ve ocakta ateş varsa, aç kalmayacaksın.
translations.uk: Якщо у вас є обидві руки та вогонь у печі, вам не бракуватиме їжі.
translations.vi: Nếu bạn có cả hai tay và có một bếp lửa, bạn sẽ không bao giờ thiếu thức ăn.
translations.zh-cn: 如果你有双手，并且炉火正在燃烧，你就不会缺乏食物。

mantras.name: It is a powerful and versatile seed syllable (bīja mantra) associated with the Goddess Laksmi, representing cosmic sound and energy. It encapsulates the essence of creation, preservation, and destruction, and is often invoked for spiritual growth, abundance, and divine connection.
mantras.english: It is a powerful and versatile seed syllable (bīja mantra) associated with the Goddess Laksmi, representing cosmic sound and energy. It encapsulates the essence of creation, preservation, and destruction, and is often invoked for spiritual growth, abundance, and divine connection.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ
mantras.background: "Shreem" is a Sanskrit bīja (seed) mantra ~3000 years old, linked to Goddess Lakshmi. Its vibrations invoke abundance, wealth, and divine feminine energy — a timeless cosmic key.
mantras.benefits: Shreem, Lakshmi's bīja mantra, pulses with abundance and divine energy. Chanting it 108 times daily calms the nervous system, deepens spiritual awareness, and opens consciousness to prosperity, inner peace, and sacred connection.
mantras.tags: hindu, lakshmi, bija, wealth, abundance, vedic, devotional, divine

translations.es: Es una sílaba primordial (bīja mantra) poderosa y versátil, asociada con la Diosa Lakshmi, que representa el sonido y la energía cósmicos. Encapsula la esencia de la creación, la preservación y la destrucción, y a menudo se invoca para el crecimiento espiritual, la abundancia y la conexión divina.
translations.ar: إنها مقطع صوتي (بينجا مانترا) قوي ومتعدد الاستخدامات، يرتبط بالإلهة لاكشمي، ويمثل الصوت والطاقة الكونية. إنه يجسد جوهر الخلق والحفظ والتدمير، وغالبًا ما يتم استخدامه للنمو الروحي والوفرة والاتصال الإلهي.
translations.bn: এটি একটি শক্তিশালী এবং বহুমুখী বীজ মন্ত্র (বীজ মন্ত্র), যা দেবী লক্ষ্মীর সাথে সম্পর্কিত এবং এটি মহাজাগতিক শব্দ ও শক্তির প্রতিনিধিত্ব করে। এটি সৃষ্টি, সংরক্ষণ এবং ধ্বংসের সারমর্মকে ধারণ করে এবং প্রায়শই আধ্যাত্মিক উন্নতি, প্রাচুর্য এবং ঐশ্বরিক সংযোগের জন্য এর প্রয়োগ করা হয়।
translations.de: Es ist eine kraftvolle und vielseitige Ur-Silbe (bīja mantra), die mit der Göttin Lakshmi verbunden ist und den kosmischen Klang und die Energie repräsentiert. Sie umfasst die Essenz von Schöpfung, Erhaltung und Zerstörung und wird oft für spirituelles Wachstum, Überfluss und eine göttliche Verbindung beschworen.
translations.en-us: It is a potent and adaptable seed syllable (bīja mantra) linked to the Goddess Lakshmi, embodying cosmic sound and energy. It embodies the fundamental principles of creation, preservation, and dissolution, and is frequently employed to foster spiritual development, prosperity, and a connection with the divine.
translations.en-gb: It is a potent and adaptable seed syllable (bīja mantra) linked to the Goddess Lakshmi, embodying cosmic sound and energy. It encapsulates the fundamental principles of creation, preservation, and dissolution, and is frequently invoked to foster spiritual development, prosperity, and a connection with the divine.
translations.fr-fr: Il s'agit d'une syllabe sacrée (bija mantra) puissante et polyvalente, associée à la déesse Laksmi, représentant le son et l'énergie cosmiques. Elle englobe l'essence de la création, de la préservation et de la destruction, et est souvent invoquée pour la croissance spirituelle, l'abondance et la connexion divine.
translations.he: זוהי צליל-זרע עוצמתי ורב-תכליתי (ביג'ה מנטרה) הקשור לאלה לקשמי, המייצג צליל ואנרגיה קוסמיים. הוא כולל את מהות הבריאה, השימור וההרס, ולעתים קרובות מזכירו לצמיחה רוחנית, שפע וחיבור אלוהי.
translations.hi: यह एक शक्तिशाली और बहुमुखी बीज मंत्र है जो देवी लक्ष्मी से जुड़ा हुआ है, और यह ब्रह्मांडीय ध्वनि और ऊर्जा का प्रतिनिधित्व करता है। यह सृजन, संरक्षण और विनाश के सार को समाहित करता है, और अक्सर इसका उपयोग आध्यात्मिक विकास, समृद्धि और दिव्य संबंध के लिए किया जाता है।
translations.id: Ini adalah suku kata (mantra bija) yang kuat dan serbaguna, yang terkait dengan Dewi Laksmi, mewakili suara dan energi kosmik. Ia merangkum esensi penciptaan, pemeliharaan, dan kehancuran, dan sering dipanggil untuk pertumbuhan spiritual, kelimpahan, dan hubungan dengan yang Ilahi.
translations.it: Si tratta di una sillaba sacra (bīja mantra) potente e versatile, associata alla Dea Laksmi, che rappresenta il suono e l'energia cosmici. Essa incarna l'essenza della creazione, della conservazione e della distruzione, ed è spesso invocata per la crescita spirituale, l'abbondanza e la connessione divina.
translations.ja: これは、女神ラクシュミーと関連付けられた、力強く多才な種子マントラ（ bija mantra ）であり、宇宙の音とエネルギーを象徴しています。それは創造、保存、そして破壊の本質を包含し、しばしば精神的な成長、豊かさ、そして神との繋がりを願って唱えられます。
translations.ko: 그것은 강력하고 다재다능한 비자 만트라(bīja mantra)로, 락슈미 여신과 관련되어 있으며, 우주의 소리와 에너지를 상징합니다. 이는 창조, 보존, 파괴의 본질을 담고 있으며, 종종 영적인 성장, 풍요, 신과의 연결을 위해 사용됩니다.
translations.nl: Het is een krachtige en veelzijdige zaadmantra (bīja mantra), geassocieerd met de godin Lakshmi, die kosmische klank en energie vertegenwoordigt. Het omvat de essentie van schepping, behoud en vernietiging en wordt vaak gebruikt voor spirituele groei, overvloed en een goddelijke verbinding.
translations.pl: Jest to potężna i wszechstronna sylaba-mantra (bīja mantra), związana z Boginią Lakszmi, reprezentująca kosmiczny dźwięk i energię. Uosabia ona esencję stworzenia, zachowania i destrukcji, i jest często wywoływana w celu rozwoju duchowego, obfitości i połączenia z boskością.
translations.pt-br: É uma sílaba primordial (bija mantra) poderosa e versátil, associada à Deusa Lakshmi, representando o som e a energia cósmicos. Ela encapsula a essência da criação, da preservação e da destruição, e é frequentemente invocada para o crescimento espiritual, a abundância e a conexão divina.
translations.ru: Это мощный и универсальный биджа-мантра, связанный с богиней Лакшми, представляющий космический звук и энергию. Он заключает в себе сущность творения, сохранения и разрушения, и часто используется для духовного развития, изобилия и божественного единения.
translations.sv: Det är en kraftfull och mångsidig "bija-mantra" (frö-mantra) förknippad med gudinnan Lakshmi, som representerar kosmiskt ljud och energi. Den fångar essensen av skapelse, bevarande och förstörelse, och används ofta för andlig utveckling, överflöd och en gudomlig förbindelse.
translations.th: เป็นพยางค์ศักดิ์สิทธิ์ (บีจะ มนตรา) ที่ทรงพลังและหลากหลาย ซึ่งเชื่อมโยงกับเทพธิดา ลักษมี เป็นตัวแทนของเสียงและพลังงานจักรวาล พยางค์นี้ครอบคลุมแก่นแท้ของการสร้าง การรักษา และการทำลาย และมักถูกรำลึกถึงเพื่อการเติบโตทางจิตวิญญาณ ความอุดมสมบูรณ์ และการเชื่อมต่อกับสิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์
translations.tr: Bu, tanrıça Lakshmi ile ilişkilendirilmiş, güçlü ve çok yönlü bir tohum sesidir (bija mantra). Kozmik ses ve enerjiyi temsil eder. Yaratılışın, korunmanın ve yıkımın özünü kapsar ve genellikle ruhsal gelişim, bolluk ve ilahi bağlantı için kullanılır.
translations.uk: Це потужний та універсальний силлаб, що є мантрою (біджа-мантра), пов'язаний з Богинею Лакшмі, що представляє собою космічний звук та енергію. Він утілює сутність творіння, збереження та руйнування, і часто використовується для духовного розвитку, достатку та божественного зв'язку.
translations.vi: Đó là một âm tiết (bija mantra) mạnh mẽ và linh hoạt, gắn liền với Nữ thần Lakshmi, đại diện cho âm thanh và năng lượng vũ trụ. Nó chứa đựng bản chất của sự sáng tạo, bảo tồn và hủy diệt, và thường được sử dụng để thúc đẩy sự phát triển tâm linh, sự thịnh vượng và kết nối với cõi thiêng.
translations.zh-cn: 这是一个强大而多功能的种子咒语（bīja mantra），与吉祥天女拉克希米相关联，代表着宇宙的声音和能量。它蕴含了创造、维持和毁灭的精髓，常被用于灵性成长、财富和与神圣的连接。

mantras.name: Jehi Vidhi Hoi Naath Hit Moraa
mantras.english: O Lord, do whatever is for my highest good — I am Your servant
mantras.original: जेहि विधि होई नाथ हित मोरा। करहु सो वेगि दास मैं तोरा॥
mantras.transliteration: Jehi Vidhi Hoi Naath Hit Moraa, Karahu So Vegi Daas Main Toraa
mantras.abstract:
Jehi Vidhi Hoi Naath Hit Moraa — O Lord, do whatever is for my good, do it quickly, for I am your servant — is a verse from the Ramcharitmanas, the devotional retelling of the Ramayana composed by the sixteenth-century saint-poet Goswami Tulsidas. It is one of the most beloved and widely recited couplets in the bhakti (devotional) tradition of northern India, expressing complete surrender of personal will to the divine, combined with the intimate, personal relationship characteristic of Vaishnava devotion.

The verse is placed in the context of a devotee's prayer for divine guidance and intervention, and its power lies in its combination of total surrender ('do whatever is for my good — not what I want, but what is truly beneficial') and urgency ('do it quickly'). This urgency is not impatience toward God but the devotee's recognition of their own helplessness — they know they cannot figure out what is best for themselves, and they ask the Lord not to delay in acting on their behalf.

The identification as 'daas' (servant) is significant. The path of daasya bhakti — devotion through the consciousness of being God's servant — is one of the five principal modes of devotional relationship in Vaishnavism. In this mode, the devotee experiences themselves not as an autonomous agent pursuing their own goals with divine assistance, but as an instrument of the divine will, whose very identity is defined by service to the Lord. This complete dissolution of self-determination into divine service is, paradoxically, described as the highest freedom.

Tulsidas himself was a devotee of Lord Rama, and the Ramcharitmanas is saturated with the mood of this surrender. He writes from direct experience of what it means to release one's cleverness and plans and simply ask the Lord to act. The verse encodes a specific psychological movement: from anxious strategizing ('what should I do?') to open-hearted surrender ('You know best — whatever You will'). This movement, consistently practiced, is what Tulsidas found to be the most reliable path to both inner peace and divine assistance.

As a mantra for daily life, Jehi Vidhi Hoi Naath is particularly valuable at decision points, crossroads, and moments of confusion. Rather than forcing clarity through extended deliberation, the practitioner pauses and offers this verse — acknowledging both their desire for the situation to resolve well and their recognition that the divine perspective transcends their limited understanding. Many practitioners report that this practice regularly produces unexpected solutions and openings that could not have been reached through personal cleverness alone.

translations.en: O Lord, do whatever is for my highest good — quickly — for I am Your servant
translations.zh: 主啊，为我做最有益的事——快快地——因为我是祢的仆人
translations.es: Señor, haz lo que sea para mi mayor bien — rápidamente — porque soy Tu siervo

mantras.name: Lalitha Sahasranama
mantras.english: A thousand names of the Goddess Lalitha — the supreme divine mother
mantras.transliteration: Lalitā Sahasranāma
mantras.abstract:
Lalitha Sahasranama — the Thousand Names of Lalitha — is one of the most sacred texts in the Shakta tradition of Hinduism, found in the Brahmanda Purana in the form of a dialogue between the sage Hayagreeva (the horse-headed avatar of Vishnu, considered the repository of all wisdom) and the sage Agastya. The text consists of 1000 divine names of the Goddess Lalitha Tripura Sundari, each name a complete description of an aspect of the supreme divine feminine. Reciting all 1000 names is considered one of the most powerful acts of Shakta devotion.

Lalitha (meaning 'she who plays' or 'she who is graceful and easy') is one of the names of the goddess Tripura Sundari — 'the beautiful one of the three cities,' representing the integration of all three worlds. She is the highest form of the Goddess in the Sri Vidya tradition of Shakta Tantra, understood as the supreme reality itself in its feminine aspect. The Sahasranama presents her from every possible angle — as creator, sustainer, and destroyer; as the physical universe and as pure consciousness; as the most transcendent and the most intimately near.

The 1000 names are structured in three sections: poorva bhaga (the introduction, establishing the context and the authority of the transmission), the stotra itself (the 1000 names), and uttara bhaga (the conclusion, containing the phala shruti — the benefits of recitation). The stotra moves from descriptions of the Goddess's physical form (beginning with her feet and ascending to her crown) through her cosmological functions, her relationship to the Sri Chakra (the geometric yantra that is her visual form), and her identity with ultimate reality.

Reciting the Lalitha Sahasranama in full — traditionally done on Fridays, during Navratri, or on the practitioner's birthday — is a profound meditative practice that takes approximately 30-45 minutes and encompasses virtually the entire landscape of Shakta theology. Each name is a doorway into a specific aspect of the Goddess's reality. Practitioners describe the cumulative effect as a process of being gradually revealed to: as the names accumulate, the Goddess becomes more real, more present, more specific.

For practitioners who cannot recite all 1000 names, the practice of reciting the first name 'Shri Mata' (the blessed mother) and the last name 'Lalitambika' (the gentle mother) is considered the essence of the entire sahasranama — beginning from recognition of the divine mother's care and ending in her gentle, playful grace. The tradition is living and accessible; even brief contact with the Sahasranama's names is said to purify accumulated karma and orient the soul toward its highest nature.

translations.en: The thousand names of the Goddess Lalitha, the supreme divine mother
translations.zh: 女神拉利塔的千种名号——至高的神圣母亲
translations.es: Los mil nombres de la Diosa Lalitha, la suprema madre divina

mantras.name: Lead me from death to immortality.
mantras.english: Lead me from death to immortality.
mantras.transliteration: मुझे मृत्यु से अमरता की ओर ले चलो।
