mantras.background: From Hindu Vedic tradition, this Upanishadic invocation literally pleads for transcendence of mortality — resonating with Om's turiya: the infinite state beyond waking, dream, and sleep.
mantras.benefits: Drawn from the Vedic Upanishadic tradition, this mantra cultivates transcendence over existential fear. Such practices induce theta-wave brain states and vagal calm, guiding awareness toward turiya—the timeless state dissolving boundaries between finite self and infinite being.
mantras.tags: hindu, tibetan, buddhist, mantra, visualization, meditation, deity, tantric, compassion, transformation, sound, wisdom, shantih

translations.es: Guíame de la muerte a la inmortalidad.
translations.ar: قُدني من الموت إلى الخلود.
translations.bn: मुझे मृत्यु से अमरत्व की ओर ले चलो।
translations.de: Führe mich von dem Tod zur Unsterblichkeit.
translations.en-us: Lead me from the realm of death to the realm of immortality.
translations.en-gb: Lead me from the realm of death to the realm of immortality.
translations.fr-fr: Guidez-moi de la mort vers l'immortalité.
translations.he: הובל אותי מהמוות אל חיי הנצח.
translations.hi: मुझे मृत्यु से अमरत्व की ओर ले चलो।
translations.id: Bimbinglah aku dari kematian menuju keabadian.
translations.it: Conducimi dalla morte all'immortalità.
translations.ja: 私を死から不死へと導いてください。
translations.ko: 인도에서 죽음에서 영원한 삶으로 이끌어 주소서. (Indo-eo-seo jugeum-eoseo yeong-wonhan sal-euro ileo-geo jusoseo.)
translations.nl: Leid mij van de dood naar de onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Poprowadź mnie z śmierci do nieśmiertelności.
translations.pt-br: Guie-me da morte para a imortalidade.
translations.ru: "Преведите меня из состояния смерти в состояние бессмертия."
translations.sv: Leds mig från döden till odödlighet.
translations.th: นำทางฉันจากความตายสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Beni ölümden ölümsüzlüğe kılavuz ol.
translations.uk: Веди мене з смерті до безсмертя.
translations.vi: Dẫn tôi từ cõi chết đến sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 指引我，从死亡走向永生。

mantras.name: Lead me from the unreal to the real; lead me from darkness to light; lead me from death to immortality.
mantras.english: Lead me from the unreal to the real; lead me from darkness to light; lead me from death to immortality.
mantras.original: asato ma sad gamaya tamaso ma jyotir gamaya mrityor ma amritam gamaya
mantras.transliteration:
`āpasya paramparaṃ mām niyac kha,
tmasya paramparaṃ jyotir eva niyac kha,
maraṇasya paramparaṃ mamrtu eva niyac kha.`
mantras.background: From the ancient Brihadaranyaka Upanishad, this Sanskrit mantra calls: lead me from unreal→real, darkness→light, death→immortality. A timeless Vedic path to liberation.
mantras.benefits: From the Brihadaranyaka Upanishad, this mantra guides practitioners from illusion toward truth, ignorance toward clarity, and mortality toward liberation — awakening inner freedom and profound peace.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, upanishadic, liberation, peace, freedom, enlightenment, transformation, philosophy

translations.es: Líbrenos de la ilusión y guíanos hacia la verdad; llévannos de la oscuridad a la luz; guíanos de la muerte a la inmortalidad.
translations.ar: قُدْني من المظاهر الوهمية إلى الحقائق الجلية؛ قُدْني من الظلام إلى النور؛ قُدْني من الموت إلى الخلود.
translations.bn: "আমাকে অজ্ঞান থেকে জ্ঞানের দিকে, অন্ধকার থেকে আলোর দিকে, মৃত্যু থেকে অমরত্বের দিকে পরিচালিত করো।"
translations.de: Führe mich von der Illusion zur Wirklichkeit; führe mich von der Finsternis zum Licht; führe mich vom Tod zur Unsterblichkeit.
translations.en-us: Lead me from the realm of illusion to the realm of reality; lead me from the state of ignorance to the state of enlightenment; lead me from the experience of mortality to the experience of immortality.
translations.en-gb: Lead me from illusion to reality; lead me from ignorance to knowledge; lead me from mortality to immortality.
translations.fr-fr: Conduis-moi de l'illusion vers la réalité ; conduis-moi des ténèbres vers la lumière ; conduis-moi de la mort vers l'immortalité.
translations.he: הובל אותי מהאשליה אל המציאות; הובל אותי מהחושך אל האור; הובל אותי מהמוות אל חיי הנצח.
translations.hi: हे प्रभु, मुझे अज्ञानता से ज्ञान की ओर, अंधकार से प्रकाश की ओर, और मृत्यु से अमरता की ओर ले चलो।
translations.id: Bimbinglah aku dari ketidaksebenaran menuju kebenaran; bimbinglah aku dari kegelapan menuju cahaya; bimbinglah aku dari kematian menuju keabadian.
translations.it: Conducimi dall'illusione alla realtà; conducimi dall'oscurità alla luce; conducimi dalla morte all'immortalità.
translations.ja: 「私を、虚偽から真実へと、闇から光へと、死から不死へと導き給え。」
translations.ko: 오옴, 나를 마야에서 진실로, 어둠에서 빛으로, 죽음에서 영원으로 이끌어 주소서. (Om, nara-reul maya-eseo jinsil-ro, eodum-eseo bicheuro, jugeum-eseo yeongwon-euro ideul-eo jusoseo.)
translations.nl: Leid mij van de illusie naar de werkelijkheid; leid mij van de duisternis naar het licht; leid mij van de dood naar de onsterfelijkheid.
translations.pl: Poprowadź mnie z kłamstwa w prawdę; poprowadź mnie z ciemności w światło; poprowadź mnie ze śmierci w nieśmiertelność.
translations.pt-br: "Leva-me da ilusão para a realidade; guia-me das trevas para a luz; conduz-me da morte para a imortalidade."
translations.ru: "Веди меня от иллюзии к реальности; веди меня от тьмы к свету; веди меня от смерти к бессмертию."
translations.sv: För mig från det falska till det sanna; för mig från mörkret till ljuset; för mig från döden till odödligheten.
translations.th: นำพานจากความไม่จริงสู่ความจริง นำพานจากความมืดสู่ความสว่าง นำพานจากความตายสู่ความเป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Beni, gerçek olmayan yerden gerçeğe; karanlıktan aydınlığa; ölümden ölümsüzlüğe doğru kıl.
translations.uk: Веди мене з неістинності в істину; веди мене з темряви у світло; веди мене з смерті в безсмертя.
translations.vi: Hãy dẫn dắt con từ ảo ảnh đến thực tại; hãy dẫn dắt con từ bóng tối đến ánh sáng; hãy dẫn dắt con từ sự chết đến sự bất tử.
translations.zh-cn: 从虚幻引导我到真实；从黑暗引导我到光明；从死亡引导我到永生。

mantras.name: Let the nourishing essence (or "milk") be present in the earth, in the plants, in the celestial regions, and in the atmosphere. May that nourishing essence be all around me.
mantras.english: Let the nourishing essence (or "milk") be present in the earth, in the plants, in the celestial regions, and in the atmosphere. May that nourishing essence be all around me.
mantras.original: ॐ पय : पृथिव्यां पय ओषधीषु पयो दिव्यन्तरिक्षे पयो धा : । पयस्वती : प्रदिश : सन्तु मह्यम् ॥
mantras.transliteration: `dhīraḥ sāram, pr̥thvī, oṣadhīni, dēvāni, mātr̥bhūmiṣu, syāṁ pr̥cchāmi. saḥ dhīraḥ sāram, mama antargāṭe, sarvatra syāt.`
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic ritual, this mantra invokes "pay:" (nourishing milk/essence) across earth, plants, sky & atmosphere—chanted during sacred milk-bath (dugdha snāna) offerings.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Vedic milk mantra (Payas) during ritual bathing invokes cosmic nourishment—grounding the practitioner in abundance, cultivating gratitude, and awakening a sense of sacred interconnection with earth, sky, and life itself.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, ritual, offering, nourishment, deity, purification, milk, honey, ghee, panchamrita, bathing

translations.es: Que la esencia nutritiva (o "leche") esté presente en la tierra, en las plantas, en las regiones celestiales y en la atmósfera. Que esa esencia nutritiva me rodee por completo.
translations.ar: ليكن جوهر التغذية (أو "الحليب") موجودًا في الأرض، وفي النباتات، وفي المناطق السماوية، وفي الغلاف الجوي. ليكن جوهر التغذية هذا حولي.
translations.bn: पृथ्वीতে, উদ্ভিজ্জন্তু, দেবলোকে এবং বায়ুমণ্ডলে, সেই পুষ্টিকর উপাদান বিদ্যমান থাকুক। সেই পুষ্টিকর উপাদান আমার চারপাশে থাকুক।
translations.de: Möge die nährende Essenz (oder der "Milch") in der Erde, in den Pflanzen, in den himmlischen Regionen und in der Atmosphäre vorhanden sein. Möge diese nährende Essenz überall um mich sein.
translations.en-us: May the vitalizing essence pervade the earth, the plants, the heavens, and the atmosphere. May this vitalizing essence be all around me.
translations.en-gb: May the life-sustaining essence permeate the earth, the plants, the heavens, and the atmosphere. May this life-sustaining essence be present all around me.
translations.fr-fr: Qu'essence nutritive (ou "lait") soit présente dans la terre, dans les plantes, dans les régions célestes et dans l'atmosphère. Que cette essence nutritive m'entoure.
translations.he: יְהִי הַמַּסְכֵּן בָּאָרֶץ, בַּצְּמָחִים, בַּמְּמַרִּים, וּבָאֲוִיר. יְהִי הַמַּסְכֵּן סְבִיבִי.
translations.hi: पृथ्वी में, पौधों में, स्वर्गीय क्षेत्रों में और वायुमंडल में, वह पोषणकारी तत्व (या "दूध") विद्यमान हो। वह पोषणकारी तत्व मेरे चारों ओर हो।
translations.id: Semoga sari kehidupan yang menyehatkan hadir di bumi, di tumbuhan, di alam semesta, dan di atmosfer. Semoga sari kehidupan itu ada di sekelilingku.
translations.it: Sii presente, o essenza nutritiva (o "latte"), nella terra, nelle piante, nei regni celesti e nell'atmosfera. Possa questa essenza nutritiva essere ovunque intorno a me.
translations.ja: 土地、植物、天界、そして大気において、滋養の霊気が満ち溢れますように。その滋養の霊気が、私を取り囲むように。
translations.ko: 대지의 모든 곳, 식물, 천상의 영역, 그리고 대기 속에서, 생명력을 주는 근원적인 힘이 깃들기를. 그 생명력의 근원이 저를 둘러싸기를.
translations.nl: Laat de voedende essentie (of "melk") aanwezig zijn in de aarde, in de planten, in de hemelse sferen en in de atmosfeer. Moge die voedende essentie om mij heen zijn.

mantras.name: Lokah Samastah Sukhino Bhavantu
mantras.english: May all beings everywhere be happy and free
mantras.transliteration: Lokah Samastah Sukhino Bhavantu
mantras.abstract:
Lokah Samastah Sukhino Bhavantu — May all beings in all worlds be happy and free — is an ancient Sanskrit prayer from the Yoga and Vedic traditions, widely used as a closing prayer at the end of yoga practice and as a mantra of universal compassion. It expresses the highest aspiration of the spiritual life: not merely personal liberation or happiness, but the wellbeing of all sentient beings without exception or exclusion.

The phrase 'lokah samastah' encompasses all of creation — 'loka' can mean realm, world, or dimension, and 'samastah' means all or every. The prayer is thus strikingly comprehensive: not only all beings on earth, not only all humans, but all beings in all realms and dimensions. This universality reflects the Sanskrit understanding that the scope of compassion must be as vast as the scope of suffering — which recognizes no boundary of species, planet, or dimension.

The word 'sukhino' (happy/at ease) derives from the same root as 'sukha' — a pleasant axle-hole (su-kha), meaning a wheel that turns smoothly. Sukha is thus not merely emotional pleasure but the deep ease of a life in which things move without obstruction, where resistance has been released and natural flourishing prevails. 'Bhavantu' (may they be) is an optative form expressing heartfelt wish rather than confident prediction.

In yoga practice, Lokah Samastah is traditionally recited three times as a dedication at the end of practice. This act of dedication — offering the merit of the practice for the benefit of all beings rather than keeping it for oneself — is considered a fundamental spiritual act that prevents the ego from monopolizing the fruits of practice. By dedicating their effort to all beings, the practitioner expresses their understanding that individual liberation is inseparable from universal liberation.

The prayer is also widely used in secular contexts as an expression of universal goodwill. Its simple, inclusive scope makes it accessible to practitioners of any background: whether understood as a prayer to a personal God, a dedication of karmic merit, or simply a statement of intention, it reliably opens the heart beyond the narrow concerns of personal welfare and orients consciousness toward the larger good. Regular practice of this prayer is reported to gradually but genuinely expand one's circle of concern beyond family and community to encompass all of life.

translations.en: May all beings everywhere be happy and free
translations.zh: 愿一切众生皆幸福自由
translations.es: Que todos los seres en todas partes sean felices y libres

mantras.name: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra
mantras.english: Great victory over death; liberate me from the bondage of mortality as a ripe fruit from its stem
mantras.original: ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम् उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय मामृतात्
mantras.transliteration: Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam, Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrityor Mukshiya Mamritat
mantras.abstract:
The Mahamrityunjaya Mantra, also called the Mritasanjivini Mantra or the Rudra Mantra, is one of the most potent and ancient Vedic hymns, appearing in the Rigveda (7.59.12) and the Yajurveda. It is attributed to the sage Markandeya, who according to legend received this mantra as a child and used it to overcome his destined early death, ultimately conquering Yama, the god of death, through the grace of Shiva.

The three eyes of Tryambaka represent the sun, the moon, and fire — or alternatively, the three states of consciousness: waking, dreaming, and deep sleep. The mantra praises Shiva as Sugandhim, the fragrant one whose divine fragrance pervades all of creation, and as Pushtivardhanam, the nourisher who sustains and increases the vitality of all beings.

The central prayer asks for liberation from the binding grip of death, compared poetically to a ripe cucumber or melon separating naturally from its vine. The image of the fruit and vine is deeply meaningful: just as a ripe fruit does not violently tear from its vine but detaches at the moment of perfect maturity, the mantra seeks a death that comes at the right time and brings spiritual liberation rather than continued rebirth.

Traditionally chanted 108 times during illness, crisis, or grief, the Mahamrityunjaya Mantra is used in Vedic funeral rites, healing ceremonies, and on the night of Shivaratri. It appears in the Shiva Purana as the supreme healer of all diseases — physical, mental, and spiritual. Modern practitioners use it as a meditation for confronting fear, releasing attachment, and reconnecting with the eternal dimension of consciousness that transcends birth and death.

translations.en: Om. We worship the three-eyed Lord Shiva who is fragrant and who nourishes all beings. May he liberate us from the bondage of death, as a ripe cucumber is severed from its vine, granting us immortality.
translations.zh: 嗡。我们崇拜三眼的湿婆神，他芬芳四溢，滋养一切众生。愿他将我们从死亡的束缚中解脱出来，如同成熟的黄瓜从藤蔓上被切断，赐予我们永恒。
translations.es: Om. Adoramos al Señor Shiva de tres ojos, que es fragante y que nutre a todos los seres. Que nos libere del cautiverio de la muerte, como un pepino maduro es cortado de su vid, otorgándonos la inmortalidad.

mantras.background:

  Grounding: Source: mantra entry — Rigveda origin, Tryambaka/Pushtivardhanam meanings, and the fruit-vine liberation metaphor are all explicitly stated.
mantras.benefits:
Traditionally chanted 108 times, this ancient Vedic hymn invokes Shiva to dissolve fear of death and release attachment — like a ripe fruit separating naturally from its vine — guiding practitioners toward inner liberation.
  Grounding: Source confirms 108 repetitions, fear-confronting purpose, fruit/vine metaphor for natural death, and healing/liberation focus in Vedic and Shiva Purana traditions.

translations.es:
La frase "Mantra for Repaying Parental Kindness" puede traducirse al español de varias maneras, dependiendo del énfasis que se quiera dar. Aquí hay algunas opciones:

*   **Opción 1 (Más literal):** "Mantra para corresponder a la bondad filial." Esta opción es la más directa y se centra en la idea de "corresponder" a la bondad recibida.

*   **Opción 2 (Énfasis en la gratitud):** "Mantra para expresar gratitud a los padres." Esta opción resalta la importancia de la gratitud como un medio para honrar a los padres.

*   **Opción 3 (Énfasis en el deber):** "Mantra para cumplir con el deber hacia los padres." Esta opción subraya la responsabilidad de corresponder a la bondad parental.

*   **Opción 4 (Más poética):** "Mantra para honrar la generosidad paterna." Esta opción utiliza un lenguaje más elevado y evoca una imagen de reverencia y respeto.

mantras.background: 真言 (Mantra/Zhēnyán): From Sanskrit *mantra*, meaning sacred hymns & spells in Vedic ritual. In Buddhism, it became "true speech of Buddhas" — recited to invoke wisdom & protection.
mantras.benefits: Mantra practice (真言) is linked to mental concentration (精神を統一), self-protection, and the awakening of enlightenment wisdom (悟りの智慧). mantras.tags: buddhist, hindu, vedic, tantric, shingon, dharani, ritual, prayer, protection, wisdom, esoteric, sacred

translations.es: "Mantra" puede traducirse como "canto sagrado", "invocación", "fórmula sagrada", o "oración".  Una traducción más descriptiva podría ser "instrumento de la mente" o "medio para la contemplación".  Dependiendo del contexto, también podría entenderse como "poder oculto" o "técnica para liberar la mente".
translations.ar: الترانيم.
translations.bn: মন্ত্র।
translations.de: Der Zauberspruch.
translations.en-us: A sacred utterance, incantation, or formula of words; a verse or hymn, especially one used in religious rituals; a charm or spell.
translations.en-gb: A sacred utterance; a formula of words; a charm; a spell; a means of attaining spiritual power or insight.
translations.fr-fr: Formule sacrée.
translations.he: תֶּמֶרָה.
translations.hi: मंत्र।
translations.id: Mantra.
translations.it: Mantras.
translations.ja: マントラ (mantora)
translations.ko: 주문 (jūmun) 또는 만트라 (mantra)
translations.nl: Mantras zijn in het Nederlands vaak moeilijk direct te vertalen, omdat de betekenis vaak meer ligt in de klank en de vibratie dan in een letterlijke vertaling. Echter, een poging om de *betekenis* weer te geven, zou zijn: "Een heilige formule of gezang". In sommige contexten kan het ook "een magische spreuk" betekenen.
translations.pl: Mantrę.
translations.pt-br: Mantras são fórmulas ou versos sagrados, geralmente em sânscrito, que são recitados repetidamente para fins espirituais, como meditação, devoção ou para alcançar um determinado estado de consciência.
translations.ru: Мантра.
translations.sv: Mantra: Besvärjelse, formel, kraftfullt uttryck.
translations.th: คาถา
translations.tr: Bu terimin doğrudan bir Türkçe çevirisi bulunmamaktadır. "Mantra" kelimesi, Hinduizm, Budizm ve Jainizm gibi dinlerde kullanılan, belirli heceleri, kelimeleri veya sesleri içeren kutsal bir formül veya ilahi olarak kabul edilir. Bu formüllerin tekrarı, meditasyon, dua ve ritüellerde önemlidir. Türkçe'de bu kavramı ifade etmek için, "kutsal söz", "ilahi formül", "ezber", "öğüt" veya "duanın tekrarı" gibi ifadeler kullanılabilir. Ancak, bu çeviriler "mantra" kelimesinin tüm anlamlarını ve derinliğini tam olarak yansıtmayabilir.
translations.uk: Мантра.
translations.vi: Châm chú.
translations.zh-cn: 咒语.

mantras.name: May He protect us all; May He nourish us all; May He give us strength to work together; May His glory be the source of our illumination, and may He remove all animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: May He protect us all; May He nourish us all; May He give us strength to work together; May His glory be the source of our illumination, and may He remove all animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.original: Om saha nav avatu | saha nau bhunaktu | saha viryam karavavahai | tejasvi navadhitam astu ma vidvishavahai | Om shanti shanti shanti
mantras.transliteration: `om. May he protect us all; May he nourish us all; May he give us strength to work together; May his glory be the source of our illumination, and may he remove all animosity among us. Om, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ.`
mantras.background: A Vedic peace invocation (Shanti mantra), Om closes with triple peace—body, mind, cosmos—rooted in Sanskrit, Hinduism's sacred tongue of illumination and unity.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this peace mantra cultivates unity and dissolves animosity, while Om's resonance harmonizes body and mind. It invites stillness, collective nourishment, and a transcendent awareness beyond the physical.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, protective, peace, devotional, prayer, unity, nourishment

translations.es: Que Él nos proteja a todos; que Él nos nutra a todos; que Él nos dé la fuerza para trabajar juntos; que Su gloria sea la fuente de nuestra iluminación, y que Él elimine toda hostilidad entre nosotros. Om, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ar: لِيَحْفَظْنَا جَمِيعًا، وَلِيَرْعَانَا جَمِيعًا، وَلِيَمْنَحَنَا القُوَّةَ لِنَعْمَلَ سُويًّا، وَلِيَكُونَ مَجْدُهُ مَصْدَرَ إِشْرَاقِنَا، وَلِيَزِيلَ كُلَّ شِقَاقٍ بَيْنَنَا. أَوْم، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ.
translations.bn: তিনি যেন আমাদের সকলকে রক্ষা করেন; তিনি যেন আমাদের সকলকে পুষ্ট করেন; তিনি যেন আমাদের একসঙ্গে কাজ করার শক্তি দেন; তাঁর মহিমা যেন আমাদের আলোকের উৎস হয়, এবং তিনি যেন আমাদের মধ্যে সমস্ত বিদ্বেষ দূর করেন। ওং, শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Möge Er uns alle beschützen; möge Er uns alle nähren; möge Er uns die Kraft geben, zusammenzuarbeiten; möge Seine Herrlichkeit die Quelle unserer Erleuchtung sein, und möge Er jegliche Feindseligkeit unter uns beseitigen. Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: May He protect all of us; May He nourish all of us; May He grant us the strength to work together harmoniously; May His glory be the source of our enlightenment, and may He dispel all animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
translations.en-gb: May He protect us all; May He nourish us all; May He grant us the strength to collaborate; May His glory be the wellspring of our enlightenment, and may He dispel all animosity amongst us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
translations.fr-fr: Puissance divine, protège-nous tous ; nourris-nous tous ; accorde-nous la force de travailler ensemble ; que ta gloire soit la source de notre illumination, et que tu élimines toute animosité parmi nous. Om, paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: יְהִי ה' מַגֵּן לָכֶם כֻּלָּם; יְהִי ה' מְאַמֵּץ לָכֶם כֻּלָּם; יְהִי ה' מַעֲנִיק לָכֶם כֹּחַ לְשִׁגְרָת עֲבוֹדָתִי יַחֵד; יְהִי הַתִּפְאֶרֶת שֶׁלּוֹ מַמְאִירָת לָכֶם כֻּלָּם, וְיַעֲבִיר מִכֶּם כָּל רִיב; אוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: "हे ईश्वर, कृपया हम सभी की रक्षा करें; कृपया हम सभी को पोषण दें; कृपया हमें एक साथ काम करने की शक्ति प्रदान करें; आपकी महिमा हमारी प्रेरणा का स्रोत हो, और कृपया हमारे बीच से सभी दुश्मनी दूर करें। ॐ, शांति, शांति, शांति।"
translations.id: Semoga Dia melindungi kita semua; Semoga Dia memberi kita semua asupan; Semoga Dia memberikan kita kekuatan untuk bekerja bersama; Semoga kemuliaan-Nya menjadi sumber pencerahan kita, dan semoga Dia menghilangkan semua permusuhan di antara kita. Om, shanti, shanti, shanti.
translations.it: Possa Egli proteggerci tutti; Possa Egli nutrirci tutti; Possa Egli darci la forza di lavorare insieme; Possa la Sua gloria essere fonte di illuminazione per noi, e possa Egli rimuovere ogni animosità tra noi. Om, pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: 神よ、私たちを守り給え。神よ、私たちを養い給え。神よ、私たちに協力する力を与え給え。神の栄光が私たちの啓蒙の源となり、神よ、私たちの中のすべての敵意を取り除き給え。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko:
다음은 주어진 산스크리트 문구의 의미를 살린 한국어 번역입니다.

"그분께서 우리 모두를 보호하시고, 우리 모두를 영양하시며, 우리 모두가 함께 일할 수 있는 힘을 주시고, 그분의 영광이 우리에게 깨달음을 주시며, 그분이 우리 사이의 모든 반목을 없애주시기를. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화."
translations.nl: Moge Hij ons allen beschermen; Moge Hij ons allen voeden; Moge Hij ons de kracht geven om samen te werken; Moge Zijn glorie de bron zijn van onze verlichting, en moge Hij alle vijandigheid onder ons wegnemen. Om, vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Niech On nas wszystkich chroni; Niech On nas wszystkich odżywia; Niech On da nam siłę do współpracy; Niech Jego chwała będzie źródłem naszego oświecenia, a niech On usunie wszelką wrogość między nami. Om, pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que Ele nos proteja a todos; Que Ele nos nutra a todos; Que Ele nos conceda a força para trabalharmos juntos; Que a Sua glória seja a fonte da nossa iluminação, e que Ele remova toda a inimizade entre nós. Om, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Да пребудет Он нашей защитой; Да питает Он нас всех; Да даст Он нам силы для совместной работы; Да станет Его слава источником нашего просветления, и да избавит Он нас от всякой вражды. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Må Han beskydda oss alla; Må Han nära oss alla; Må Han ge oss styrka att arbeta tillsammans; Må Hans härlighet vara källan till vår upplysning, och må Han avlägsna all fientlighet mellan oss. Om, frid, frid, frid.
translations.th: ขอพระองค์ทรงคุ้มครองพวกเราทุกคน; ขอพระองค์ทรงหล่อเลี้ยงพวกเราทุกคน; ขอพระองค์ประทานกำลังให้พวกเราทำงานร่วมกัน; ขอพระปรีชาของพระองค์เป็นแหล่งแห่งปัญญาของเรา และขอพระองค์ขจัดความขัดแย้งทั้งหมดที่มีอยู่ระหว่างพวกเรา. โอห์ม, สันติ, สันติ, สันติ.
translations.tr: O, tüm canlıları korusun; O, tüm canlıları beslesin; O, hepimizin birlikte çalışması için güç versin; O'nun ihtişamı, aydınlanmamızın kaynağı olsun ve O, aramızdaki tüm düşmanlığı ortadan kaldırsın. Om, huzur, huzur, huzur.
translations.uk: Нехай Він захистить нас усіх; Нехай Він нагодує нас усіх; Нехай Він дасть нам силу працювати разом; Нехай Його слава буде джерелом нашого просвітлення, і нехай Він усуне всю ворожнечу між нами. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Xin Ngài bảo vệ chúng con; Xin Ngài nuôi dưỡng chúng con; Xin Ngài ban cho chúng con sức mạnh để cùng nhau làm việc; Xin ánh sáng vinh quang của Ngài là nguồn chiếu sáng cho chúng con, và xin Ngài loại bỏ mọi sự thù hận giữa chúng con. ॐ, bình an, bình an, bình an.
translations.zh-cn: 愿他保护我们所有人；愿他滋养我们所有人；愿他赐予我们团结合作的力量；愿他的荣耀成为我们启迪的源泉，愿他消除我们之间的所有敌意。 ॐ，和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: May all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.english: May all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratī pārakāḥ duḥkha-muktāṃ bhavantu`
mantras.background: A timeless peace invocation echoing Om Shanti's vision — harmony across physical, divine, and inner realms, honoring the interconnectedness of all beings.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Ahimsa and universal interconnectedness, this mantra cultivates compassion and inner peace—dissolving personal suffering by expanding awareness beyond the self to embrace all beings.
mantras.tags: compassion, peace, universal, liberation, ahimsa, healing

translations.es: Que todos los seres estén libres del sufrimiento.
translations.ar: لِيَكُن كُلُّ الْكَيِّنَاتِ خَالِيَةً مِنَ الْبَأْسِ.
translations.bn: সব প্রাণী সুখী হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen frei von Leid sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May all sentient beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la souffrance.
translations.he: יהי כל היצורים חופשיים מכל צער.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी दुख से मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk bebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere essere libero dalla sofferenza.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 고통에서 벗어나기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres estejam livres do sofrimento.
translations.ru: Да пребудет всем существам освобождение от страданий.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser vara fria från lidande.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พ้นจากความทุกข์
translations.tr: Tüm varlıklar acıdan uzak olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть вільні від страждань.
translations.vi: Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đều giải thoát khỏi mọi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生离苦得乐。

mantras.name: May all beings be happy, may all beings be free from illness. May all beings see goodness, may no one suffer.
mantras.english: May all beings be happy, may all beings be free from illness. May all beings see goodness, may no one suffer.
mantras.original: सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः, सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः। सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु, मा कश्चिद् दुःखभाग्भवेत्
mantras.transliteration: `maye sarvabhūtā anandaṁ, maye sarvabhūtāṁ ārōgyam. maye sarvabhūtāṁ subhām, maye kadaci naparāṁ dukhaṁ.`
mantras.background: A Vedic Hindu mantra praying: "May all beings be happy, free from illness, see goodness, and suffer not." A universal blessing transcending self — pure compassion in Sanskrit verse.
mantras.benefits: Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah radiates universal compassion, dissolving ego-boundaries by extending goodwill beyond self. Rooted in Vedic tradition, it cultivates inner peace, reduces anxiety, and awakens a profound sense of interconnectedness with all life.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, prayer, devotional, compassion, healing, universal, protection, benevolence

translations.es: "Que todos los seres sean felices, que todos los seres estén libres de enfermedades. Que todos los seres perciban el bien, que nadie sufra."
translations.ar: لكي يكون كل كائن سعيدًا، ولكي يكون كل كائن معافى من المرض. لكي يرى الجميع الخير، ولكي لا يعاني أحد.
translations.bn: সকল প্রাণী সুখী হোক, সকল প্রাণী রোগমুক্ত হোক। সকল প্রাণী মঙ্গল দেখুক, যেন কেউ কষ্ট না পায়।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein, mögen alle Wesen frei von Krankheit sein. Mögen alle Wesen das Gute sehen, möge niemand leiden.
translations.en-us: May all beings experience happiness, may all beings be free from suffering and disease. May all beings perceive and realize goodness, may no one experience pain.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience happiness, may all beings be free from suffering. May all beings perceive goodness, may no one endure pain.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être heureux, puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la maladie. Puisse tous les êtres voir le bien, puisse personne ne souffrir.
translations.he: יְהִי שִׂמְחָה לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת, יְהִי רְפוּאָה לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת. יְהִי טוֹב לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת, וְאַף אֶחָד לֹא יִסְבֹּל.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों, सभी प्राणी रोगमुक्त हों। सभी प्राणी शुभ देखें, कोई भी न दुखे।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup berbahagia, semoga semua makhluk hidup terbebas dari penyakit. Semoga semua makhluk melihat kebaikan, semoga tidak ada seorang pun yang menderita.
translations.it: "Possano tutti gli esseri essere felici, possano tutti gli esseri essere liberi dalla sofferenza. Possano tutti gli esseri vedere il bene, e possa nessuno soffrire."
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものよ、幸福でありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものよ、病から解放されますように。すべての生きとし生けるものよ、善を見出しますように。すべての生きとし生けるものよ、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 질병에서 벗어나기를. 모든 존재들이 선을 보기를, 그 누구도 고통받지 않기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn, moge alle wezens vrij zijn van ziekte. Moge alle wezens goedheid zien, moge niemand lijden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe, niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od chorób. Niech wszystkie istoty doświadczą dobra, niech nikt nie cierpi.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres sejam felizes, que todos os seres estejam livres de doenças. Que todos vejam o bem, que ninguém sofra.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа будут счастливы, пусть все существа будут свободны от болезней. Пусть все видят добро, пусть никто не страдает.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser vara lyckliga, må alla varelser vara fria från sjukdom. Må alla varelser se det goda, må ingen lida.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ปราศจากโรค ขอให้สรรพสัตว์เห็นสิ่งดีงาม ขอให้ไม่มีผู้ใดต้องทนทุกข์
translations.tr: Bütün varlıklar mutlu olsun, bütün varlıklar hastalıklardan arınsın. Bütün varlıklar iyiliği görsün, kimse acı çekmesin.
translations.uk: Пусть все существа будут счастливы, пусть все существа будут свободны от болезней. Пусть все существа увидят добро, пусть никто не страдает.
translations.vi: Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đều hạnh phúc, giải trừ mọi bệnh tật. Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đều thấy điều thiện, không ai phải chịu khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得快乐，愿一切众生远离病痛。愿一切众生皆见善，愿无人受苦。

mantras.name: May all beings be happy.
mantras.english: May all beings be happy.
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvaiḥ praṇī pārayāṃtu`
mantras.background: From ancient Sanskrit, "Loka Samastha Sukhino Bhavantu" means: may all beings everywhere be happy and free. A timeless mantra connecting your actions to universal liberation.
mantras.benefits: "May all beings be happy" reflects the Metta tradition—cultivating universal loving-kindness. Practitioners report reduced stress, greater compassion, and inner peace, echoing the Shanti mantras' vision of harmony radiating outward to all existence.
mantras.tags: sanskrit, compassion, peace, happiness, loving-kindness, altruistic, liberation, universal

translations.es: "Que todos los seres sean felices."
translations.ar: لِيَكُنْ سَعَادَةٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات.
translations.bn: সকল প্রাণী সুখী হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings be blessed with happiness.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience happiness.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être heureux.
translations.he: יהי כל היצורים מאושרים.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup berbahagia.
translations.it: Possano tutti gli esseri essere felici.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸せでありますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres sejam felizes.
translations.ru: Да пребудет счастье для всех существ.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser vara lyckliga.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข
translations.tr: Tüm canlıların mutlu olması.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть щасливі.
translations.vi: Tất cả chúng sinh đều được hạnh phúc.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得快乐。

mantras.name: May all beings be happy; may all beings be free from illness.
mantras.english: May all beings be happy; may all beings be free from illness.
mantras.original: सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः ।
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvabhūtāni sukhaṃ santu; mayāṃ sarvabhūtāni rogāmuktāṃ santu.`
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic texts, Om is Hinduism's primordial sound — the vibrational source of all creation, meaning simply: the universe itself, breathing.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om shifts brainwaves into theta states linked to deep meditation, calms the autonomic nervous system, and—per ancient Vedic wisdom—connects the practitioner to the very vibration underlying all existence.
mantras.tags: hindu, mantra, well-being, healing, intention, peace, prayer, sound, affirmation, compassion, universal, happiness

translations.es: "Que todos los seres sean felices; que todos los seres estén libres de enfermedad."
translations.ar: لِيَكُنْ سُعَادَةٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات؛ وَلِيَكُنْ خَلَاصٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات مِنَ المَرَض.
translations.bn: সব প্রাণী সুখী হোক; সব প্রাণী রোগমুক্ত হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein; mögen alle Wesen frei von Krankheit sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings experience happiness; may all beings be free from suffering (or illness).
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience happiness; may all beings be free from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être heureux ; puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la maladie.
translations.he: יְהִי שִׂמְחָה לְכָל הִיּוֹת; יְהִי רְפוּאָה לְכָל הִיּוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों; सभी प्राणी रोग-मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup berbahagia; semoga semua makhluk hidup terbebas dari penyakit.
translations.it: "Possano tutti gli esseri essere felici; possano tutti gli esseri essere liberi dalla malattia."
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸せでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、病から解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 질병에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn; moge alle wezens vrij zijn van ziekte.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe; niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od choroby.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres sejam felizes; que todos os seres estejam livres de doenças.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа будут счастливы; пусть все существа будут свободны от болезней.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser vara lyckliga; må alla varelser vara fria från sjukdom.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข; ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ปราศจากโรคภัย
translations.tr: Tüm canlıların mutlu olsun; tüm canlıların hastalıklardan uzak olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай всі істоти будуть щасливими; нехай всі істоти будуть вільними від хвороб.
translations.vi: Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh được hạnh phúc; cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh được giải trừ bệnh tật.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得快乐；愿一切众生远离疾病。

mantras.name: May all beings be happy; may all beings be healthy; may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.english: May all beings be happy; may all beings be healthy; may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.original: Lokah Samastah Sukhino Bhavantu (लोकाः समस्ताः सुखिनो भवन्तु)
mantras.transliteration: "May sabhi jeev sukhī hūँ; may sabhi jeev swasth hūँ; may sabhi jeev dukkha se mukt hūँ."
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, "Om Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah" wishes well-being for all — literally: may all beings be happy, healthy, and free from suffering. A timeless universal prayer.
mantras.benefits:
Cultivates boundless compassion (karuṇā) and dissolves ego-boundaries. Rooted in the Hindu wish for universal well-being, this loving-kindness practice shifts the mind from self-focus to interconnectedness, fostering inner peace.
  Grounding: Sources cite Om Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah as "a universal mantra wishing well-being for all beings," aligning with the phrase's compassion-oriented intent.
mantras.tags: hindu, universal, compassion, peace, affirmation, well-being, healing

translations.es: Que todos los seres sean felices; que todos los seres sean saludables; que todos los seres estén libres de sufrimiento.
translations.ar: ليكن كل الكائنات سعيدة؛ ليكن كل الكائنات بصحة جيدة؛ ليكن كل الكائنات خالية من المعاناة.
translations.bn: সকল प्राणी সুখী হোক; সকল प्राणी সুস্থ থাকুক; সকল प्राणी দুঃখ থেকে মুক্ত হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein; mögen alle Wesen gesund sein; mögen alle Wesen frei von Leiden sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings experience happiness; may all beings experience health; may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience happiness; may all beings experience health; may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être heureux ; puisse tous les êtres être en bonne santé ; puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la souffrance.
translations.he: יְהִי שִׂמְחָה לְכָל הִיּוֹת; יְהִי בְּרִיאוּת לְכָל הִיּוֹת; יְהִי שִׁמְרוֹן מִסִּבְלָה לְכָל הִיּוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों; सभी प्राणी स्वस्थ हों; सभी प्राणी दुःख से मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup berbahagia; semoga semua makhluk hidup sehat; semoga semua makhluk hidup terbebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: Possa tutti gli esseri essere felici; possa tutti gli esseri essere in salute; possa tutti gli esseri essere liberi dalla sofferenza.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸せでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、健康でありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 건강하기를, 모든 존재들이 고통에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn; moge alle wezens gezond zijn; moge alle wezens vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe; niech wszystkie istoty będą zdrowe; niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres sejam felizes; que todos os seres sejam saudáveis; que todos os seres estejam livres do sofrimento.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа будут счастливы; пусть все существа будут здоровы; пусть все существа будут свободны от страданий.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser vara lyckliga; må alla varelser vara friska; må alla varelser vara fria från lidande.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีสุขภาพแข็งแรง ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พ้นจากความทุกข์
translations.tr: Bütün varlıklar mutlu olsun; bütün varlıklar sağlıklı olsun; bütün varlıklar acıdan uzak olsun.
translations.uk: Пусть все живые существа будут счастливы; пусть все живые существа будут здоровы; пусть все живые существа будут свободны от страданий.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được hạnh phúc; xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được khỏe mạnh; xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được giải thoát khỏi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得快乐；愿一切众生皆得健康；愿一切众生离苦得乐。

mantras.name: May all beings be happy; may all beings be healthy; may all beings find contentment; may all beings be free from fear.
mantras.english: May all beings be happy; may all beings be healthy; may all beings find contentment; may all beings be free from fear.
mantras.original: Om Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah (ॐ सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः)
mantras.transliteration: May sabhi jeev sukhī hōn; may sabhi jeev swāsthyapūrṇ hōn; may sabhi jeev santuṣṭ hōn; may sabhi jeev bheetī se mukt hōn.
mantras.background:
A Hindu universal mantra: "May all beings be happy, healthy, content, and free from fear." Rooted in the Vedic wish for collective well-being — Om Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah.
  Grounding: Source lists "Om Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah" as a Hindu universal mantra wishing well-being for all beings, matching the provided English phrase.
mantras.benefits: This universal prayer cultivates boundless compassion, dissolving the ego's boundaries as the practitioner extends goodwill to all life. Regular chanting is linked to reduced anxiety and heightened empathy.
mantras.tags: hindu, universal, compassion, affirmation, peace, healing, devotional, blessing

translations.es: Que todos los seres sean felices; que todos los seres sean saludables; que todos los seres encuentren satisfacción; que todos los seres estén libres de miedo.
translations.ar: لَيْكُنْ سُعْدُ كُلِّ كَائِنٍ؛ وَلْيَكُنْ صِحَّةُ كُلِّ كَائِنٍ؛ وَلْيَجِدْ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ رِضًى؛ وَلْيَكُنْ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ خَالِيًا مِنَ الْخَوْفِ.
translations.bn: সমস্ত প্রাণী সুখী হোক; সমস্ত প্রাণী সুস্থ থাকুক; সমস্ত প্রাণী পরিতৃপ্তি লাভ করুক; সমস্ত প্রাণী ভয় থেকে মুক্ত হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein; mögen alle Wesen gesund sein; mögen alle Wesen Zufriedenheit finden; mögen alle Wesen frei von Angst sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings experience happiness; may all beings experience good health; may all beings find satisfaction; may all beings be free from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience happiness; may all beings enjoy good health; may all beings find peace and satisfaction; may all beings be free from suffering and fear.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être heureux ; puisse tous les êtres être en bonne santé ; puisse tous les êtres trouver la satisfaction ; puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la peur.
translations.he: יְהִי שָׂלוֹם רַב לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת; יְהִי בְּרִיאוּת לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת; יְהִי שִׂמְחָה לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת; יְהִי שִׁמְמָה מִכָּל פַּחַד לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों; सभी प्राणी स्वस्थ हों; सभी प्राणी संतुष्ट हों; सभी प्राणी भय से मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup berbahagia; semoga semua makhluk hidup sehat; semoga semua makhluk hidup menemukan kedamaian; semoga semua makhluk hidup bebas dari rasa takut.
translations.it: Possa tutti gli esseri essere felici; possa tutti gli esseri essere in salute; possa tutti gli esseri trovare la serenità; possa tutti gli esseri essere liberi dalla paura.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸せでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、健康でありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、満足を得ますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、恐れから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 건강하기를, 모든 존재들이 만족을 얻기를, 모든 존재들이 두려움에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn; moge alle wezens gezond zijn; moge alle wezens innerlijke vrede vinden; moge alle wezens vrij zijn van angst.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe; niech wszystkie istoty będą zdrowe; niech wszystkie istoty znajdą zadowolenie; niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od strachu.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres sejam felizes; que todos os seres sejam saudáveis; que todos os seres encontrem contentamento; que todos os seres estejam livres do medo.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа будут счастливы; пусть все существа будут здоровы; пусть все существа обретут удовлетворение; пусть все существа будут свободны от страха.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser vara lyckliga; må alla varelser vara friska; må alla varelser finna stillhet; må alla varelser vara fria från rädsla.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีสุขภาพแข็งแรง ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พบความสงบสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ปราศจากความกลัว
translations.tr: Bütün varlıklar mutlu olsun; bütün varlıklar sağlıklı olsun; bütün varlıklar tatmin bulsun; bütün varlıklar korkudan uzak olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть щасливими; нехай усі живі істоти будуть здоровими; нехай усі живі істоти знайдуть спокій; нехай усі живі істоти будуть вільні від страху.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được hạnh phúc; xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được khỏe mạnh; xin cho tất cả chúng sinh tìm thấy sự an yên; xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được giải thoát khỏi sợ hãi.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得快乐；愿一切众生皆得健康；愿一切众生皆得满足；愿一切众生皆得远离恐惧。

mantras.name: May all beings be healthy; May all beings be peaceful; May all beings be fulfilled; May all beings experience auspiciousness.
mantras.english: May all beings be healthy; May all beings be peaceful; May all beings be fulfilled; May all beings experience auspiciousness.
mantras.original: sarvesham svastir bhavatu — sarvesham shantir bhavatu — sarvesham purnam bhavatu — sarvesham mangalam bhavatu
mantras.transliteration: `asyaḥ sarvatra bhūtāni niḥsvasthaṁ sukhaṁ labantu; asyaḥ sarvatra bhūtāni śāntim labantu; asyaḥ sarvatra bhūtāni puṇyaṁ labantu; asyaḥ sarvatra bhūtāni mangalam āśu।`
mantras.background: From Sanskrit tradition, this Shanti Mantra chants: "May all beings have well-being, peace, wholeness, and happiness" — a timeless call to universal harmony.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Sanskrit tradition, this mantra cultivates universal compassion and loving-kindness. Repeating it shifts focus outward, dissolving ego-centered anxiety and fostering inner peace, psychological well-being, and a profound sense of shared humanity.
mantras.tags: sanskrit, shanti, hindu, yoga, peace, chant, well-being, universal, compassion, affirmation

translations.es: Que todos los seres estén sanos; Que todos los seres estén en paz; Que todos los seres estén realizados; Que todos los seres experimenten la prosperidad.
translations.ar: لِيَصِحَّ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ؛ لِيَسْلَمَ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ؛ لِيَرْضَى كُلُّ كَائِنٍ؛ لِيَجِدَ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ الْخَيْرَ وَالسَّعَادَةَ.
translations.bn: সকল প্রাণী সুস্থ থাকুক; সকল প্রাণী শান্ত থাকুক; সকল প্রাণী পরিতৃপ্ত হোক; সকল প্রাণী মঙ্গল অনুভব করুক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen gesund sein; Mögen alle Wesen friedvoll sein; Mögen alle Wesen Erfüllung finden; Mögen alle Wesen Glück erfahren.
translations.en-us: May all beings be in good health; May all beings be at peace; May all beings find contentment; May all beings experience well-being and prosperity.
translations.en-gb: May all beings be in good health; May all beings find peace; May all beings experience contentment; May all beings be blessed with well-being.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être en bonne santé ; Puisse tous les êtres être en paix ; Puisse tous les êtres trouver l'épanouissement ; Puisse tous les êtres expérimenter l'auspice.
translations.he: יְהִי שָׁלוֹם לְכָל הַיְצוּרוֹת; יְהִי בְּרִיאוּת לְכָל הַיְצוּרוֹת; יְהִי שָׂבְעוּת לְכָל הַיְצוּרוֹת; יְהִי אוֹשֶׁר לְכָל הַיְצוּרוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी स्वस्थ हों; सभी प्राणी शांत हों; सभी प्राणी पूर्ण हों; सभी प्राणी शुभता का अनुभव करें।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup sehat; Semoga semua makhluk hidup damai; Semoga semua makhluk hidup terpenuhi; Semoga semua makhluk hidup mengalami kebahagiaan.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere essere in salute; possa ogni essere essere in pace; possa ogni essere essere appagato; possa ogni essere sperimentare l'auspicio.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるもの、健康であらん。すべての生きとし生けるもの、平和であらん。すべての生きとし生けるもの、充足であらん。すべての生きとし生けるもの、吉報を得ん。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 건강하게 되기를; 모든 존재들이 평화롭게 되기를; 모든 존재들이 충만하게 되기를; 모든 존재들이 행복을 누리기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens gezond zijn; Moge alle wezens vrede ervaren; Moge alle wezens vervuld zijn; Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą zdrowe; Niech wszystkie istoty będą w pokoju; Niech wszystkie istoty będą spełnione; Niech wszystkie istoty doświadczą szczęścia i dobrobytu.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres estejam saudáveis; Que todos os seres estejam em paz; Que todos os seres estejam realizados; Que todos os seres experimentem a prosperidade.
translations.ru: Да будут все существа здоровы; Да будет мир во всех существах; Да будет исполнена нужда каждого существа; Да испытают все существа благословение.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser vara friska; må alla varelser vara fridfulla; må alla varelser vara uppfyllda; må alla varelser uppleva välgång.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงมีสุขภาพแข็งแรง ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงมีความสงบสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงมีความสมบูรณ์ ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงประสบแต่ความสวัสดี
translations.tr:
May all beings be healthy: *Bütün varlıkların sağlığına olsun.*
May all beings be peaceful: *Bütün varlıkların huzuruyla olsun.*
May all beings be fulfilled: *Bütün varlıkların istekleri yerine olsun.*
May all beings experience auspiciousness: *Bütün varlıkların uğuruyla olsun.*
translations.uk: Пусть все существа будут здоровы; Пусть все существа будут в мире; Пусть все существа будут удовлетворены; Пусть все существа испытают благополучие.
translations.vi: "Nguyện cầu cho tất cả chúng sinh được khỏe mạnh; Nguyện cầu cho tất cả chúng sinh được an bình; Nguyện cầu cho tất cả chúng sinh được viên mãn; Nguyện cầu cho tất cả chúng sinh được hưởng những điều tốt lành."
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生健康；愿一切众生安宁；愿一切众生圆满；愿一切众生蒙受吉祥。

mantras.name: May all beings be peaceful, may all beings be healthy, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.english: May all beings be peaceful, may all beings be healthy, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.transliteration: "May sabhi jeev shanti se parpoorn ho, may sabhi jeev swasth rahe, may sabhi jeev dukha se mukt ho."
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist loving-kindness tradition, this Metta prayer reflects the mantra ideal: transforming human will toward universal compassion for all beings without exception.
mantras.benefits:
This compassion-based mantra cultivates metta (loving-kindness), dissolving boundaries between self and others. Regular practice is linked to reduced anxiety, expanded empathy, and a profound sense of interconnectedness rooted in Buddhist tradition.
  Grounding: Source links mantras to transformative spiritual power and compassion (karuṇā). Metta practice aligns with Buddhist mantra traditions described, fostering universal goodwill.
mantras.tags: buddhist, compassion, universal, healing, peace, liberation, affirmation, wellbeing

translations.es: Que todos los seres sean pacíficos, que todos los seres sean saludables, que todos los seres estén libres de sufrimiento.
translations.ar: لَيْكُنْ السَّلامُ عَلَى كُلِّ الكائنات، لَيْكُنْ الصِّحَّةُ عَلَى كُلِّ الكائنات، لَيْكُنْ الخَلاصُ مِنْ العَذابِ عَلَى كُلِّ الكائنات.
translations.bn: "सर्व प्राणी स्वस्थ हों, सर्व प्राणी निरोगी हों, सर्व प्राणी दुःख से मुक्त हों।"
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen friedlich sein, mögen alle Wesen gesund sein, mögen alle Wesen frei von Leid sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings be at peace, may all beings be in good health, may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May all beings find peace, may all beings experience good health, and may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puissiez tous les êtres être en paix, puissiez tous les êtres être en bonne santé, puissiez tous les êtres être libérés de la souffrance.
translations.he: יְהִי שָׁלוֹם לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת, יְהִי בְּרִיאוּת לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת, יְהִי שִׁכְלֵל מִכָל סוֹפֵר.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी शांत हों, सभी प्राणी स्वस्थ हों, सभी प्राणी दुःख से मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup memiliki kedamaian, semoga semua makhluk hidup sehat, semoga semua makhluk hidup terbebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: Possa tutti gli esseri essere in pace, possa tutti gli esseri essere in salute, possa tutti gli esseri essere liberi dalla sofferenza.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、平和でありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、健康でありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 평화롭기를, 모든 존재들이 건강하기를, 모든 존재들이 고통에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens vrede kennen, moge alle wezens gezond zijn, moge alle wezens vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą w pokoju, niech wszystkie istoty będą zdrowe, niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres sejam pacíficos, que todos os seres sejam saudáveis, que todos os seres estejam livres do sofrimento.
translations.ru: Пусть все живые существа будут в мире, пусть все живые существа будут здоровы, пусть все живые существа будут свободны от страданий.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser vara i frid, må alla varelser vara friska, må alla varelser vara fria från lidande.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีแต่ความสงบ, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีสุขภาพแข็งแรง, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พ้นจากความทุกข์ทั้งปวง
translations.tr: Bütün varlıklar huzur içinde olsun, bütün varlıklar sağlıklı olsun, bütün varlıklar acıdan kurtulsun.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть у мирі, нехай усі живі істоти будуть здорові, нехай усі живі істоти будуть вільні від страждань.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được an bình, xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được khỏe mạnh, xin cho tất cả chúng sinh được giải thoát khỏi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得安宁，愿一切众生皆得健康，愿一切众生远离痛苦。

mantras.name: May all beings be well, may all beings be happy, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.english: May all beings be well, may all beings be happy, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratī pātu, sarvaiḥ pratī sukhiṃ, sarvaiḥ pratī duḥkha-muktāṃ bhavantu`
mantras.background:
Rooted in Hindu & Buddhist Vedic tradition, this chant means "May all beings be happy and free." It embodies enlightened self-interest — we rise together.
  Grounding: Source links mantra to Vedas, Hindu/Buddhist tradition, translates it as universal happiness/freedom, and ties it to collective spiritual transformation.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this mantra cultivates compassion and dissolves ego boundaries, linking you to millions across time. It transforms self-interest into universal care — yoga's highest purpose.
mantras.tags: hindu, buddhist, vedic, chant, compassion, universal, liberation, empower, transformation, equality, affirmation, wellness

translations.es: "Que todos los seres estén en bienestar, que todos los seres estén felices, que todos los seres estén libres del sufrimiento."
translations.ar: لَيْكُنْ سَعَادَةٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات، وَلَيْكُنْ سَلَامٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات، وَلَيْكُنْ خَلَاصٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكائنات مِنْ أَيِّ شِدَّة.
translations.bn: সব সত্তা সুস্থ থাকুক, সব সত্তা সুখী হোক, সব সত্তা দুঃখ থেকে মুক্ত থাকুক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen im Wohl sein, mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein, mögen alle Wesen frei von Leid sein.
translations.en-us: May all beings experience well-being, may all beings experience happiness, may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.en-gb: May all sentient beings experience well-being, may all sentient beings experience happiness, may all sentient beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être bien, puisse tous les êtres être heureux, puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la souffrance.
translations.he: יְהִי שָׁלוֹם רַחֲמִים וְהַצָּלָה לְכָל הַיְצוּרוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों, सभी प्राणी आनंदित हों, सभी प्राणी दु:ख से मुक्त हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup sejahtera, semoga semua makhluk hidup bahagia, semoga semua makhluk hidup terbebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere essere nel benessere, possa ogni essere essere felice, possa ogni essere essere libero dalla sofferenza.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、安らかでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸せでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 기쁨을 얻기를, 모든 존재들이 고통에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren, moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn, moge alle wezens vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą w pokoju, niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe, niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres estejam bem, que todos os seres estejam felizes, que todos os seres estejam livres do sofrimento.
translations.ru: Да пребудет благо для всех существ, да будет счастье для всех существ, да будет избавление от страданий для всех существ.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser må väl, må alla varelser vara lyckliga, må alla varelser vara fria från lidande.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความสุข, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์มีความผาสุก, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พ้นจากความทุกข์
translations.tr: Tüm varlıkların iyiliğini, tüm varlıkların mutluluğunu, tüm varlıkların acıdan kurtulmasını diliyorum.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть у благополуччі, нехай усі живі істоти будуть щасливими, нехай усі живі істоти будуть вільними від страждань.
translations.vi: Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đều an lạc, cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đều hạnh phúc, cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đều giải thoát khỏi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生安乐，愿一切众生幸福，愿一切众生离苦得乐。

mantras.name: May all beings be well; May all beings be happy; May all beings be peaceful.
mantras.english: May all beings be well; May all beings be happy; May all beings be peaceful.
mantras.transliteration: `maye sarvāḥ pratī jīvaṃ sukhaṃ; maye sarvāḥ pratī jīvaṃ anandaḥ; maye sarvāḥ pratī jīvaṃ śāntiḥ.`
mantras.background:
From Sanskrit Buddhist/Hindu roots, this Metta (loving-kindness) mantra wishes well-being, happiness & peace to all beings — echoing the Shanti Mantra's "sarvesham svastir bhavatu."
  Grounding: Source links mantra to Hindu/Buddhist ritual, Sanskrit origin, and Shanti Mantra translation "May there be well-being/peace/happiness for all."
mantras.benefits: This compassion mantra echoes the Shanti Mantra's universal wish for well-being and peace for all beings. Regular recitation cultivates loving-kindness, inner stillness, and dissolves discord — awakening deep spiritual energy and connection.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, shanti, peace, well-being, happiness, wholeness, universal, affirmation, collective

translations.es: "Que todos los seres estén bien; que todos los seres sean felices; que todos los seres estén en paz."
translations.ar: لَيْكُنْ سَعَادَةٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكَائِنَاتِ؛ لَيْكُنْ سَلَامٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكَائِنَاتِ؛ لَيْكُنْ إِخْصَارٌ لِجَمِيعِ الْكَائِنَاتِ.
translations.bn: সব प्राणी মঙ্গল হোক; সব प्राणी সুখী হোক; সব प्राणी শান্ত হোক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen wohl sein; Mögen alle Wesen glücklich sein; Mögen alle Wesen Frieden erfahren.
translations.en-us: May all beings be free from suffering; May all beings experience joy; May all beings abide in peace.
translations.en-gb: May all beings experience well-being; May all beings experience happiness; May all beings experience peace.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres être bien; Puisse tous les êtres être heureux; Puisse tous les êtres être en paix.
translations.he: יְהִי שְׁלוֹם רַחֲמִים לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת; יְהִי שָׂשׂוֹן וְשִׂמְחָה לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת; יְהִי שַׁלְוָה וְהַרְפִּיָּה לְכָל הַיְּצוּרוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी सुखी हों; सभी प्राणी आनंदित हों; सभी प्राणी शांत हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hidup sejahtera; Semoga semua makhluk hidup berbahagia; Semoga semua makhluk hidup memiliki kedamaian.
translations.it: Possano tutti gli esseri essere nel benessere; Possano tutti gli esseri essere felici; Possano tutti gli esseri essere in pace.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものよ、安らかにありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものよ、幸せでありますように。すべての生きとし生けるものよ、平和でありますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복하기를, 모든 존재들이 평안하기를, 모든 존재들이 건강하기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren; Moge alle wezens gelukkig zijn; Moge alle wezens vrede kennen.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty będą w zdrowiu; Niech wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe; Niech wszystkie istoty znajdą pokój.
translations.pt-br: "Que todos os seres estejam bem; Que todos os seres estejam felizes; Que todos os seres estejam em paz."
translations.ru: Да пребудет благо для всех существ; Да будет счастье для всех существ; Да будет мир для всех существ.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser vara väl; Måtte alla varelser vara lyckliga; Måtte alla varelser vara fridfulla.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีความสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีความผาสุก ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีสันติสุข
translations.tr: Tüm varlıkların iyiliği; Tüm varlıkların mutluluğu; Tüm varlıkların huzuru olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти будуть у добробуті; Нехай усі живі істоти будуть щасливими; Нехай усі живі істоти будуть у мирі.
translations.vi: "Chúc tất cả chúng sinh được an lành; Chúc tất cả chúng sinh được hạnh phúc; Chúc tất cả chúng sinh được bình yên."
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆安乐；愿一切众生皆幸福；愿一切众生皆和平。

mantras.name: May all beings everywhere be happy and peaceful.
mantras.english: May all beings everywhere be happy and peaceful.
mantras.transliteration: `mayā sarvaiḥ pratīkṣāṇāṃ sukhaṃ śāntiḥ`
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist compassion tradition, this loving-kindness phrase echoes the spirit of Avalokiteshvara—wishing peace upon all beings, just as Om Mani Padme Hum invokes inner peace.
mantras.benefits: This universal peace mantra echoes the Shanti tradition—cultivating inner calm and compassion toward all. Like Om Mani Padme Hum, its repeated recitation with devotion may purify the mind and dissolve negativity, awakening boundless goodwill.
mantras.tags: I cannot provide tags grounded in the source material provided. The specific mantra phrase "May all beings everywhere be happy and peaceful" does not appear in or is not directly addressed by the source material. The sources discuss Om Shanti (peace mantras), Gayatri, Ganesh, Om Mani Padme Hum, and Om Tare Tuttare Ture Soha, but not this particular mantra phrase.

translations.es: Que todos los seres, en todas partes, sean felices y encuentren la paz.
translations.ar: لَيْسَعِدْ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ وَيَكُنْ سَالِمًا.
translations.bn: সব স্থানে, সমস্ত প্রাণী সুখী ও শান্তিতে থাকুক।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen, überall, glücklich und friedlich sein.
translations.en-us: May all living beings, in all places, experience happiness and peace.
translations.en-gb: May all sentient beings, in all places, experience happiness and peace.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres, partout, être heureux et en paix.
translations.he: יהי כל היצורים, בכל מקום, מאושרים ושלווים.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी, हर जगह, खुश और शांत हों।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk di seluruh tempat menjadi bahagia dan damai.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere, ovunque, essere felice e in pace.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、どこにいても、幸せで平和でありますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 어디에 있든 행복하고 평안하기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens, overal, gelukkig en vredig zijn.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty, wszędzie, będą szczęśliwe i spokojne.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres, em todos os lugares, estejam felizes e em paz.
translations.ru: Пусть все существа, везде, будут счастливы и пребывают в мире.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser, överallt, vara lyckliga och fridfulla.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงทุกแห่งหนมีความสุขและสงบ
translations.tr: Bütün varlıkların her yerde mutlu ve huzurlu olmasını dileyelim.
translations.uk: Нехай все существа, везде, будут счастливы и пребывают в мире.
translations.vi: Tất cả chúng sinh, ở khắp mọi nơi, hãy luôn hạnh phúc và an bình.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生，无论何处，皆得幸福与安宁。

mantras.name: May all beings experience well-being. May all beings experience peace. May all beings experience completeness. May all beings experience auspiciousness.
mantras.english: May all beings experience well-being. May all beings experience peace. May all beings experience completeness. May all beings experience auspiciousness.
mantras.original: sarvesham svastir bhavatu | sarvesham shantir bhavatu | sarvesham purnam bhavatu | sarvesham mangalam bhavatu
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratī pārakāṃ, śāntiṃ, pūrṇatāṃ, śubham`.
mantras.background: A Vedic Sanskrit mantra wishing all beings peace and well-being — chanting it, like Om, lifts practice "into a higher state of awareness."
mantras.benefits: Radiating compassion outward dissolves self-centered anxiety, cultivating what scholars call "sonic presence." Chanting this universal blessing aligns mind, body, and voice—awakening liberating awareness beyond the physical self.
mantras.tags: hindu, well-being, peace, auspiciousness, mantra, meditation, healing, positive, intention, invocation, completion, spiritual

translations.es: Que todos los seres experimenten bienestar. Que todos los seres experimenten paz. Que todos los seres experimenten plenitud. Que todos los seres experimenten prosperidad.
translations.ar: "ليشعر جميع الكائنات بالرفاهية. ليشعر جميع الكائنات بالسلام. ليشعر جميع الكائنات بالكمال. ليشعر جميع الكائنات بالخير والبركة."
translations.bn: সমস্ত प्राणियों को सुख আসুক। সমস্ত प्राणियों को শান্তি আসুক। সমস্ত प्राणियों को পূর্ণতা আসুক। সমস্ত प्राणियों को মঙ্গল আসুক।
translations.de: Es mögen alle Wesen Wohlbefinden erfahren. Es mögen alle Wesen Frieden erfahren. Es mögen alle Wesen Vollkommenheit erfahren. Es mögen alle Wesen Glück erfahren.
translations.en-us: May all sentient beings experience well-being. May all sentient beings experience peace. May all sentient beings experience wholeness. May all sentient beings experience auspiciousness.
translations.en-gb: May all sentient beings experience well-being. May all sentient beings experience peace. May all sentient beings experience wholeness. May all sentient beings experience prosperity.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres expérimenter le bien-être. Puisse tous les êtres expérimenter la paix. Puisse tous les êtres expérimenter la plénitude. Puisse tous les êtres expérimenter l'auspice.
translations.he: יְהִי שְׁלוֹם רַחֲמִים וְשִׂמְחָה לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת. יְהִי שָׁלוֹם לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת. יְהִי שְׁלֵמוּת לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת. יְהִי בְּרָכָה וְהִצְלָחָה לְכָל הִיּוֹנוֹת.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी कल्याण अनुभव करें। सभी प्राणी शांति अनुभव करें। सभी प्राणी पूर्णता अनुभव करें। सभी प्राणी शुभता अनुभव करें।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk merasakan kesejahteraan. Semoga semua makhluk merasakan kedamaian. Semoga semua makhluk merasakan keutuhan. Semoga semua makhluk merasakan kebahagiaan.
translations.it: "Possano tutti gli esseri sperimentare il benessere. Possano tutti gli esseri sperimentare la pace. Possano tutti gli esseri sperimentare la completezza. Possano tutti gli esseri sperimentare l'auspicio."
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、幸福を感じますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、平和を感じますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、完全さを感じますように。すべての生きとし生けるものが、吉報を迎えられますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복을 느끼기를. 모든 존재들이 평화를 느끼기를. 모든 존재들이 완전함을 느끼기를. 모든 존재들이 길함을 느끼기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren. Moge alle wezens vrede ervaren. Moge alle wezens volledigheid ervaren. Moge alle wezens voorspoed ervaren.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty doświadczają dobrobytu. Niech wszystkie istoty doświadczają pokoju. Niech wszystkie istoty doświadczają pełni. Niech wszystkie istoty doświadczają szczęścia.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres experimentem bem-estar. Que todos os seres experimentem paz. Que todos os seres experimentem plenitude. Que todos os seres experimentem prosperidade.
translations.ru: Да пребудет благополучие для всех существ. Да пребудет мир для всех существ. Да пребудет целостность для всех существ. Да пребудет благо для всех существ.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser uppleva välbefinnande. Måtte alla varelser uppleva frid. Måtte alla varelser uppleva fulländning. Måtte alla varelser uppleva lycka och välgång.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีแต่ความสุข ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีแต่ความสงบ ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีความสมบูรณ์ ขอให้สรรพสัตว์จงมีแต่ความสวัสดี
translations.tr: Tüm varlıkların iyilik, huzur, bütünlük ve esenlik duymasını dilerim.
translations.uk: Нехай усі живі істоти відчувають благополуччя. Нехай усі живі істоти відчувають мир. Нехай усі живі істоти відчувають цілісність. Нехай усі живі істоти відчувають благословення.
translations.vi: Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh được an lạc. Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh được an bình. Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh đạt được sự viên mãn. Cầu mong tất cả chúng sinh được may mắn và hạnh phúc.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆得安乐。愿一切众生皆得和平。愿一切众生皆得圆满。愿一切众生皆得吉祥。

mantras.name: May all beings see goodness.
mantras.english: May all beings see goodness.
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratījānaiḥ sukhaṃ paśyeta`
mantras.background: "May all beings see goodness" — a compassion wish whose literal meaning radiates universal goodwill. Its simplicity invites all traditions to pause, look outward, and cultivate a seeing heart.
mantras.benefits: Cultivating goodwill toward all beings fosters compassion, reduces self-centered thinking, and builds emotional resilience. Rooted in loving-kindness traditions, this intention-setting practice invites inner peace and connectedness.
mantras.tags: buddhism, compassion, loving-kindness, well-being, positive outlook, buddhist chant, mantra, intention, benefit, peace, mindfulness, merit

translations.es: Que todos los seres perciban el bien.
translations.ar: لِيَرَ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ خَيْرًا.
translations.bn: সব প্রাণী যেন মঙ্গল দেখে।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen das Gute erkennen.
translations.en-us: May all beings perceive goodness.
translations.en-gb: May all beings perceive goodness.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres voir le bien.
translations.he: יראה כל היצורים טוב.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणी शुभ को देखें।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk melihat kebaikan.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere percepire il bene.
translations.ja: 全ての生きとし生けるものたちが、善を認識しますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 선함을 보게 되기를.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens goedheid zien.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty widzą dobro.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres vejam o bem.
translations.ru: Да пребудет благо для всех существ.
translations.sv: Måtte alla varelser se det goda.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวงเห็นสิ่งดีงาม
translations.tr: Bütün varlıkların iyiliği görmesi dileği.
translations.uk: Нехай усі істоти бачать добро.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh thấy được điều thiện.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生皆见善。

mantras.name: May all beings see only auspiciousness.
mantras.english: May all beings see only auspiciousness.
mantras.transliteration: mayāṃ sarvaiḥ pratīkṣāṃ subhataṃ.
mantras.background: From the Taittiriya Upanishad, this Vedic peace prayer unites teacher and student: "May we be protected, nourished, and work together with vitality—OM, Peace, Peace, Peace!"
mantras.benefits: Chanting "May all beings see only auspiciousness" aligns with Shanti Mantra traditions, cultivating peace, unity, and expanded awareness. It calms the mind, removes obstacles, and unifies gross-to-subtle energies — inviting harmony between self, nature, and the divine.
mantras.tags: hindu, shanti mantra, vedic, japa, peace, protection, auspiciousness, teacher-student, learning, transformation, Upanishad, invocation

translations.es: "Que todos los seres solo perciban lo auspicioso."
translations.ar: لِيَرَ بَرِئَةُ الْكَوْنِ الْخَيْرَ وَالسَّعَادَةَ.
translations.bn: সব প্রাণী যেন কেবল শুভ কিছু দেখতে পায়।
translations.de: Mögen alle Wesen nur das Gute sehen.
translations.en-us: May all beings perceive only that which is conducive to well-being and prosperity.
translations.en-gb: May all beings perceive only auspiciousness.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse tous les êtres ne voir que des choses propices.
translations.he: יְהִי רְצוֹן שֶׁכָּל הִיּוֹת יִרְאוּ רַק אוֹשַׁר.
translations.hi: सभी प्राणियों को केवल शुभता का ही अनुभव हो।
translations.id: Semoga semua makhluk hanya melihat kebaikan dan keberuntungan.
translations.it: Possa ogni essere vedere solo ciò che è propizio.
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものが、ただ幸運なものを見るように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 오직 좋은 것만 보도록 하소서.
translations.nl: Moge alle wezens slechts voorspoed en geluk waarnemen.
translations.pl: Niech wszystkie istoty widzą tylko dobroć i pomyślność.
translations.pt-br: Que todos os seres vejam apenas o auspicioso.
translations.ru: Дабы все существа видели лишь благо.
translations.sv: Må alla varelser endast se lycka och välstånd.
translations.th: ขอให้สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวง ได้แต่พบเจอแต่สิ่งที่เป็นมงคล
translations.tr: Tüm canlıların yalnızca iyilik, bereket ve mutluluk görmesini dilerim.
translations.uk: Пусть все существа видят только благо.
translations.vi: Xin cho tất cả chúng sinh chỉ thấy những điều tốt đẹp và may mắn.
translations.zh-cn: 愿一切众生唯见吉祥。

mantras.name: May auspiciousness always be with the Brahmins.
mantras.english: May auspiciousness always be with the Brahmins.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ सर्वेषां ब्राह्मणাণাং शुभं भवतु।
mantras.background: A blessing rooted in Vedic tradition: "May auspiciousness always be with the Brahmins" — a mantra invoking divine favor upon sacred knowledge-keepers, hinting at ancient ritual lineage worth exploring.
mantras.benefits: Invoking blessings for Brahmins cultivates selfless goodwill, dissolving ego boundaries. Practitioners report inner calm, expanded compassion, and alignment with dharmic order — awakening a profound sense of universal interconnectedness.
mantras.tags: hindu, brahmin, auspiciousness, benediction, ritual, dharma, devotional, protection, reverence, vedic, samskrit, tradition

translations.es: Que la prosperidad y la bendición siempre acompañen a los Brahmanes.
translations.ar: لِيَكُنْ البِرْكَةُ مُعَامَلَةً لِلْبَرَاهْمِيِّين دَائِمًا.
translations.bn: ब्राह्मणগণের সঙ্গে সর্বদা শুভরা থাকুক।
translations.de: Möge der Segen stets bei den Brahmanen sein.
translations.en-us: May auspiciousness always accompany the Brahmins.
translations.en-gb: May auspiciousness ever attend the Brahmins.
translations.fr-fr: Que la prospérité et la bénédiction accompagnent toujours les Brahmanes.
translations.he: יְהִי שׁלוֹם וּבְרָכָה תָמִיד עִם הַכַּהֲנִים.
translations.hi: ब्राह्मणों के साथ हमेशा शुभता बनी रहे।
translations.id: Semoga kebaikan dan keberuntungan selalu menyertai para Brahmana.
translations.it: Possa la prosperità e la benedizione essere sempre con i Brahmins.
translations.ja: 賢人たちに、常に吉祥が伴いますように。
translations.ko: 브라흐만 계층에게 항상 좋은 일이 있기를 바랍니다. (Beorahaman gyejeung-eui sanghae joheun ili itgireul baramnida.)
translations.nl: Moge er altijd voorspoed zijn met de braminen.
translations.pl: Niech zawsze towarzyszy dobroć i błogosławieństwo braminom.
translations.pt-br: Que a bênção e a prosperidade estejam sempre com os Brâmanes.
translations.ru: Пусть благословение всегда будет с браминами.
translations.sv: Mått må det goda alltid vara hos brahminerna.
translations.th: ขอให้พรชัยมงคลจงสถิตอยู่กับชนชั้นพราหมณ์เสมอไป
translations.tr: Brahmin'ler üzerine her zaman uğur olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай благословення завжди будуть з брахманами.
translations.vi: Xin chúc cho các brahmin luôn được hưởng sự may mắn và điềm lành.
translations.zh-cn: 愿吉祥永伴婆罗门。

mantras.name: May auspiciousness be to the pure one, the embodiment of Dharma, the bestower of welfare and prosperity. May she, beloved of Ganesha, always be praised with auspicious words.
mantras.english: May auspiciousness be to the pure one, the embodiment of Dharma, the bestower of welfare and prosperity. May she, beloved of Ganesha, always be praised with auspicious words.
mantras.original: हृीँ स्वस्तिस्तु पाविनी साक्षात् धर्मकल्याण वृद्धिदा। विनायक प्रिया नित्यं तां च स्वस्तिं ब्रुवन्तुनः
mantras.transliteration: Śukham puroḍitāya, dharmātmanāya, jīvanakāya ca, śrīdatāya. Yaṁ Ganeśapriya, saḥ śubda-śubdhaiḥ śaśvatanam udīritaḥ syāt.
mantras.background: A Puranic tilak mantra invoking Swasti—pure embodiment of Dharma, prosperity's bestower, Ganesha's beloved—blessing devotees with auspicious words.
mantras.benefits: This mantra cultivates auspiciousness, moral clarity, and inner purity. Invoking Dharma's embodiment and Ganesha's beloved, it orients the mind toward righteous prosperity—bridging spiritual protection with psychological groundedness.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, prosperity, dharma, auspiciousness, devotional, protection, well-being, mantra, purification, gratitude, worship, mantra

translations.es: Que la bendición recaiga sobre la pura, la encarnación del Dharma, la que otorga bienestar y prosperidad. Que ella, amada por Ganesha, sea siempre alabada con palabras auspiciosas.
translations.ar: لِيَكُنِ النَّضَارَةُ لِلْمُتَطَهِّرَةِ، وَالَّتِي هِيَ تَجَسُّدُ لِـ "الدَّرْمَا" (Dharma)، وَالَّتِي تَمْنَحُ الرِّفَاهِيَةَ وَالازْدِهَارَ. لِيَكُنْ مَجْدُهَا مُسْتَمِرًّا بِأَلْفَاظٍ طَيِّبَةٍ، وَهِيَ المَحْبُوبَةُ لِـ "غَانِشَا" (Ganesha).
translations.bn: শুভকামনা خالص ব্যক্তির জন্য, ধর্ম체의 প্রতিমূর্তি, কল্যাণের এবং সমৃদ্ধির প্রদানকারী। গণেশের প্রিয় সেই দেবী, তাঁর সর্বদা শুভবাক্যে স্তুতি হোক।
translations.de: Möge der Reinheit, der Verkörperung des Dharma, die Wohlfahrt und den Wohlstand schenkende, allen Segen bringen. Möge diese, die Geliebte von Ganesha, stets mit wohlklingenden und segensreichen Worten gepriesen werden.
translations.en-us: May auspiciousness be with the virtuous one, the embodiment of Dharma, the bestower of well-being and prosperity. May she, who is beloved of Ganesha, always be praised with words of good omen.
translations.en-gb: May auspiciousness be with the virtuous one, the embodiment of Dharma, the bestower of well-being and prosperity. May she, beloved of Ganesha, always be praised with words of good omen.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse la bienveillance accompagner la pure, incarnation de la Dharma, dispensatrice de bien-être et de prospérité. Qu'elle, bien-aimée de Ganesha, soit toujours louée par des paroles favorables.
translations.he: יהי ברכה לטהורה, לגוף הדין, למעניקת רווחה ושגשוג. תתואר תמיד, האהובה על גנֵשׁ, במילים של ברכה.
translations.hi: वह शुद्ध, धर्म का साकार रूप, कल्याण और समृद्धि की प्रदाता, शुभ हों। गणेश की प्रिय, वह हमेशा शुभ शब्दों से पूजित हों।
translations.id: Semoga kebaikan menyertai Sang Suci, perwujudan Dharma, pemberi kesejahteraan dan kemakmuran. Semoga beliau, yang disayangi oleh Ganesha, senantiasa dipuji dengan kata-kata yang baik.
translations.it: Possa la beatitudine essere per la pura, l'incarnazione del Dharma, la dispensatrice di benessere e prosperità. Possa lei, amata da Ganesha, essere sempre lodata con parole augurali.
translations.ja: 願わくば、清浄なる者、法（ダルマ）の化身、幸福と繁栄をもたらす者に、吉 auspicity がありますように。ガネーシャを愛する彼女が、常に良い言葉で称賛されますように。
translations.ko: "정화된 존재이시며, 다르마의 화신이시며, 행복과 번영을 주시는 분께, 모든 길조가 있기를. 가네샤의 사랑을 받으시는 그분께서, 언제나 칭송받으시기를."
translations.nl: Moge de zegeningen neerdalen op de reine, de belichaming van Dharma, de schenker van welzijn en voorspoed. Moge zij, geliefd van Ganesha, altijd worden geprezen met gunstige woorden.
translations.pl: Niech błogosławieństwo spłynie na Czystą, Uosobienie Dharmy, źródło dobrobytu i pomyślności. Niech ta, ukochana przez Ganeszę, jest zawsze chwalona słowami pełnymi szczęścia i powodzenia.
translations.pt-br: Que a bênção se abata sobre a pura, a personificação da Lei, a que concede bem-estar e prosperidade. Que ela, amada por Ganesha, seja sempre louvada com palavras de auspícios.
