translations.ru: Да пребудет благословение с чистой, воплощающей Дхарму, дарующей благополучие и процветание. Да будет она, любимая Ганешей, всегда восхваляема благосклонными словами.
translations.sv: Må välsignelser omge den rena, den som är Dharmans förkroppsligande, den som ger välfärd och välstånd. Må hon, Ganeshas älskade, alltid bli lovprisad med välvilliga ord.
translations.th: ขอให้ความสวัสดีจงมีแก่ผู้บริสุทธิ์ ผู้ซึ่งเป็นดั่งตัวแทนแห่งธรรม ผู้ที่ประทานซึ่งความสุขและความเจริญ ขอให้พระองค์ ผู้เป็นที่รักของพระพิฆเนศ จงได้รับการสรรเสริญด้วยคำพูดอันเป็นมงคลเสมอไป
translations.tr: Saf, dharma'nın vücut bulduğu, refah ve bolluk bahşeden, arınmış kişiye bereket ve mutluluk getirsin. Ganesha'nın sevgili olan bu varlık, her zaman güzel ve anlamlı sözlerle övülsün.
translations.uk: Нехай благословенность будет с чистой, воплощающей Дхарму, дарующей благополучие и процветание. Пусть Она, любимая Ганешей, всегда славится благосклонными словами.
translations.vi: Xin chúc phúc cho người thuần khiết, hiện thân của Dharma (Đạo), Đấng ban tặng sự thịnh vượng và hưng thịnh. Xin Ngài, người được Ganesha yêu mến, luôn được ca ngợi bằng những lời tốt đẹp.
translations.zh-cn: 愿吉祥降临于纯洁者，正法之化身，福祉与繁荣的赐予者。愿甘尼沙所爱之人，常以吉祥之言赞颂。

mantras.name: May blessings be upon those rulers who protect the people, who act righteously and justly. May auspiciousness be ever present for the cows and the Brahmins. May all beings in the world be happy always.
mantras.english: May blessings be upon those rulers who protect the people, who act righteously and justly. May auspiciousness be ever present for the cows and the Brahmins. May all beings in the world be happy always.
mantras.original: svasti prajabhyah paripalayantam nyayena margena mahim mahishah | gobrahmanebhyah shubham astu nityam lokah samastah sukhino bhavantu
mantras.transliteration: `rāṣṭrāṇi, jānapadāni, janapada, praja, rājña, rājya, lokā, dharmi, satya, auspiciousness, go, brāhmaṇa, sukha, ananta`
mantras.background: A Sanskrit blessing from ancient India wishing joy for all beings—rulers, animals, and people alike—uniting sound, body, and mind in sacred practice.
mantras.benefits: This mantra cultivates compassion, justice, and universal goodwill. Chanting it aligns the mind with righteous leadership and peace for all beings, fostering inner harmony and an expansive, altruistic awareness beyond the self.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, devotion, auspiciousness, well-being, mantra, peace, dharma, blessing, brahmins, cows, affirmation, sound

translations.es: Que las bendiciones recaigan sobre aquellos gobernantes que protegen al pueblo, que actúan con rectitud y justicia. Que la prosperidad sea siempre la compañera de las vacas y los brahmanes. Que todos los seres del mundo sean siempre felices.
translations.ar: لِيَعُمَّ البَرَكَةُ عَلَى الْحُكَّامِ الَّذِينَ يَحْفَظُونَ النَّاسَ، وَيَعْمَلُونَ بِالِاسْتِقَامَةِ وَالْعَدْلِ. وَلِيَكُنْ الْخَيْرُ دَائِمًا مُحِيطًا بِالْأَبْقَارِ وَالْبَرَاهِمِيْن. وَلِيَكُنْ سُعْدٌ لِكُلِّ كَائِنٍ فِي الْعَالَمِ دَائِمًا.
translations.bn: "যাঁরা প্রজাদের রক্ষা করেন, যাঁরা ধার্মিক ও ন্যায়পরায়ণভাবে কাজ করেন, তাঁদের উপর আশীর্বাদ বর্ষিত হোক। গাভী এবং ব্রাহ্মণদের উপর সর্বদা শুভ প্রভাব থাকুক। বিশ্বের সকল प्राणी যেন সর্বদা সুখী থাকে।"
translations.de: Mögen Segnungen auf denen ruhen, die die Menschen beschützen, die gerecht und aufrichtig handeln. Möge immer Glück für die Kühe und die Brahmanen bestehen. Mögen alle Wesen in der Welt stets glücklich sein.
translations.en-us: May blessings be upon those rulers who protect the people, who act with righteousness and justice. May prosperity and well-being ever attend to the cows and the Brahmins. May all beings in the world experience happiness always.
translations.en-gb: May blessings be upon those rulers who protect the people and who act with righteousness and justice. May auspiciousness ever reside with the cows and the Brahmins. May all beings in the world experience happiness always.
translations.fr-fr: Que les bénédictions soient sur les dirigeants qui protègent le peuple, qui agissent avec droiture et justice. Que la prospérité soit toujours présente pour les vaches et les Brahmanes. Que tous les êtres du monde soient heureux à jamais.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁבְּרָכוֹת יִהְיוּ עַל הַמְמַלְכִים הַמְגִנִים עַל הָעָם, הַפּוֹעֲלִים בְּצֶדֶק וּבְמִשְׁפָּט. יְהִי שָׁלוֹם תָּמִיד לַבָּקָרוֹת ולַכֹּהֲנִים. יְהִי שִׂמְחָה תָּמִיד לְכָל הִיְּצוּרוֹת בָּעוֹלָם.
translations.hi: उन सभी शासकों पर blessings हों, जो लोगों की रक्षा करते हैं, जो धार्मिकता और न्याय के साथ कार्य करते हैं। गायों और ब्राह्मणों के लिए हमेशा शुभता बनी रहे। इस दुनिया के सभी प्राणी हमेशा खुश रहें।
translations.id: Semoga berkah senantiasa menyertai para pemimpin yang melindungi rakyat, yang bertindak adil dan bijaksana. Semoga kebaikan selalu hadir bagi sapi dan para brahmana. Semoga semua makhluk di dunia ini selalu berbahagia.
translations.it: "Che le benedizioni siano su coloro che governano, che proteggono il popolo, che agiscono con rettitudine e giustizia. Che l'auspicio sia sempre presente per le vacche e i Brahmine. Che tutti gli esseri del mondo siano sempre felici."
translations.ja: 国民を保護し、正しく公正に行動する指導者たちの上に、祝福がありますように。常に、牛とバラモン（神官）たちに、吉 auspicityがありますように。この世界に生きるすべての存在が、常に幸せでありますように。
translations.ko: 인민을 보호하고, 올바르고 정의롭게 행동하는 통치자들에게 축복이 있기를. 소와 브라만들에게는 언제나 길함이 있기를. 세상의 모든 존재들이 항상 행복하기를.
translations.nl: Moge zegeningen neerdalen op die heersers die het volk beschermen, die rechtvaardig en eerlijk handelen. Moge voorspoed altijd aanwezig zijn voor de koeien en de brahmanen (priesters/geleerden). Moge alle wezens in de wereld altijd gelukkig zijn.
translations.pl: Niech błogosławieństwa spłyną na tych władców, którzy chronią lud, którzy działają sprawiedliwie i uczciwie. Niech dobroć zawsze towarzyszy krowom i brahminom. Niech wszystkie istoty na świecie zawsze będą szczęśliwe.
translations.pt-br: Que as bênçãos recaiam sobre aqueles governantes que protegem o povo, que agem com retidão e justiça. Que a prosperidade esteja sempre presente para as vacas e os brâmanes. Que todos os seres do mundo sejam sempre felizes.
translations.ru: Пусть благословения будут на тех правителях, которые защищают народ, которые действуют справедливо и честно. Пусть благополучие всегда сопровождает коров и брахманов. Пусть все живые существа в мире будут счастливы всегда.
translations.sv: Må välsignelser vila över de härskare som skyddar folket, som agerar rättvist och rättfärdigt. Må allt gott omge korna och brahminerna. Må alla varelser i världen vara lyckliga alltid.
translations.th: ขออวยพรแด่ผู้ปกครองที่ปกป้องประชาชน, ผู้ที่ประพฤติตามความถูกต้องและยุติธรรม ขอให้ความสวัสดีจงมีแก่โคและพราหมณ์เสมอไป และขอให้สิ่งมีชีวิตทั้งปวงในโลกมีความสุขตลอดกาล
translations.tr:
İşte Sanskritçe cümlesinin Türkçe çevirisi:

"Halkı koruyan, doğru ve adaletli davranan yöneticilerin üzerine bereketi olsun. İneklerin ve Brahmanların her zaman uğurlu olması dileğiyle. Dünyadaki tüm canlıların sürekli olarak mutlu olması temennisiyle."
translations.uk: Нехай благословення будуть на тих правителів, які захищають народ, які діють праведно та справедливо. Нехай добробут завжди супроводжує корів та брахманів. Нехай усі істоти у світі будуть щасливими завжди.
translations.vi: Xin chúc phúc cho những vị vua, những người cai trị, những người bảo vệ dân chúng, những người hành động chính trực và công bằng. Xin sự hưng thịnh vĩnh cửu cho những con bò và các bậc thầy Brahman. Xin mọi sinh vật trên thế giới luôn được hạnh phúc.
translations.zh-cn: 愿所有保护人民、秉公行事的统治者蒙受祝福。愿护牛和婆罗门（知识分子）永远吉祥如意。愿世间所有众生永享幸福。

mantras.name: May our intellects be awakened/guided.
mantras.english: May our intellects be awakened/guided.
mantras.transliteration: `meyaṃ buddhiḥ jāgrataḥ/saṃyuktā bhavatu`
mantras.background: From ancient Sanskrit, "mantra" means "mind tool." This sacred phrase awakens intellect—rooted in Hindu/Vedic tradition, its sound vibration aligns mind with universal energy.
mantras.benefits: Awakening the intellect through mantra unlocks deeper awareness and clarity. Regular practice calms the mind, reduces stress, and sharpens concentration — bridging conscious thought with inner wisdom.
mantras.tags: sanskrit, om, ganesha, hindu, pranava, mantra, sound, vibration, awareness, meditation, deity, śhiva, sacred

translations.es: "Que nuestros entendimientos sean despertados/guiados."
translations.ar: لِنَجْزَعْ عُقُولَنَا وَنُرْشِدْهَا. (Linajzaʿ ʿuqūlanā wa nurshiduhā.)
translations.bn: আমাদের বুদ্ধিসম্পদ জাগ্রত হোক/ পরিচালিত হোক।
translations.de: Mögen unsere Intellekte geweckt/erleuchtet werden.
translations.en-us: May our intellects be awakened and guided.
translations.en-gb: May our intellects be awakened and guided.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse notre intelligence être éveillée/guidée.
translations.he: יְהִי בִינָתֵנוּ מְעוֹרֶרֶת/מוּנַחַת.
translations.hi: हमारी बुद्धि जागृत हो। या, हमारी बुद्धि को मार्गदर्शन मिले।
translations.id: Semoga akal budi kita terbangun/dipandu.
translations.it: Possano i nostri intelletti essere risvegliati/guidati.
translations.ja: 私たちの知性が目覚め、導かれるように。 (Watashi-tachi no chisei ga mezame, michibikarete.)
translations.ko: 우리의 지성이 깨어나/인도받기를.
translations.nl: Moge onze intellecten ontwaakt en geleid worden.
translations.pl: Niech nasze umysły zostaną obudzone/prowadzone.
translations.pt-br: Que nossos intelectos sejam despertados/iluminados.
translations.ru: Да просветлится и направляется наш разум.
translations.sv: Må våra intellekt vara uppvaknade/ledda.
translations.th: ขอให้ปัญญาของเราตื่นรู้/ได้รับการนำทาง
translations.tr: Zekâlarımız uyanıp aydınlanması/yönlendirilmesi dileğiyle.
translations.uk: Нехай наші інтелекти пробудяться/будуть спрямовані.
translations.vi: Xin cho trí tuệ của chúng ta được khai mở/dẫn lối.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我们的智慧被开启/引导。

mantras.name: May that (the) Brahman inspire (us).
mantras.english: May that (the) Brahman inspire (us).
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ brahmaṇo dīyate`
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, this mantra calls on Brahman—the ultimate reality—to inspire us. A timeless chant connecting practitioners to sacred universal energy.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Brahman-invoking mantra awakens inner inspiration and aligns the mind with universal consciousness. Regular practice deepens spiritual awareness, fosters clarity, and nurtures a transformative connection to ancient sacred energies.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, brahman, devotional, chanting, japa, inspiration, awareness, transformation

translations.es: Que Brahman nos inspire.
translations.ar: لِيُلْهِمْنَا البَرَهْمَن.
translations.bn: "ব্রহ্ম আমাদের অনুপ্রাণিত করুক।"
translations.de: Möge Brahman uns inspirieren.
translations.en-us: May Brahman inspire us.
translations.en-gb: May Brahman inspire us.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse Brahman nous inspirer.
translations.he: יְהִי בְּרָהְמָן מְעוֹרֵר בָּנוּ.
translations.hi: वह ब्रह्म हमें प्रेरित करे।
translations.id: Semoga Brahman menginspirasi kami.
translations.it: Possa il Brahman ispirarci.
translations.ja: Brahman が私たちに啓発を与え給え。
translations.ko: 브라흐만이 우리를 깨달음으로 인도하기를.
translations.nl: Moge Brahman ons inspireren.
translations.pl: Niech ten Brahman nam daje natchnienie.
translations.pt-br: Que Brahman nos inspire.
translations.ru: Да пребудет Брахман источником вдохновения для нас.
translations.sv: Må Brahman inspirera oss.
translations.th: ขอให้พรหมเป็นแรงบันดาลใจให้แก่เรา
translations.tr: Brahman, bize ilham versin.
translations.uk: Нехай Брахман надихає нас.
translations.vi: Xin Brahman ban cho chúng tôi nguồn cảm hứng.
translations.zh-cn: 愿那梵 (yuàn nà Fàn) 启迪 (qǐdí) 我们 (wǒmen)。

mantras.name: May that Rudra awaken (or impel, stimulate).
mantras.english: May that Rudra awaken (or impel, stimulate).
mantras.transliteration: `mayāṃ tad rudraḥ prajvalitaḥ/prajaḍitaḥ/udyojitaḥ`
mantras.background: A Vedic invocation meaning "May that Rudra awaken"—calling on Shiva's fierce form. Chanting connects practitioners to ancient, transformative divine energy.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Rudra—Shiva's fierce, awakening aspect—stirs deep inner transformation. Rooted in Vedic tradition, this chant is said to energize awareness and dissolve stagnation, connecting practitioners to ancient purifying forces that ignite spiritual growth.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, rudra, invocation, devotional, awakening, stimulation, chant

translations.es: "Que Rudra despierte (o impulse, estimule)."
translations.ar: لعل رودرا يستيقظ (أو يحفز، أو يوقظ).
translations.bn: "পুনর্ব্যক্ত হোক সেই রুদ্র, অথবা, সেই রুদ্রকে সক্রিয় বা উদ্দীপ্ত করা হোক।"
translations.de: Möge dieser Rudra erwachen (oder anregen, stimulieren).
translations.en-us: May Rudra awaken.
translations.en-gb: May that Rudra rouse.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse Rudra s'éveiller (ou être stimulé, incité).
translations.he: יְהִי רוּדְרָה מַעוֹרֵר (או מְדַלֵג, מְעוֹרֵר).
translations.hi: वह रुद्र जागृत हो (या प्रेरित हो, उत्तेजित हो)।
translations.id: Semoga Rudra itu membangkitkan (atau mendorong, merangsang).
translations.it: Possa Rudra risvegliarsi (o stimolare, incitare).
translations.ja: ருத்ரன் ப்ராபுதேதோऽस्तु। (Rudraṁ prābhutheto'stu.)
translations.ko: 그 루드라가 깨어나게 하소서. (Geu rudeura-ga kkae-eona-ge hasoseo.)
translations.nl: Moge die Rudra ontwaken (of aandrijven, stimuleren).
translations.pl: Niech ten Rudra obudzi się (lub pobudzi, stymuluje).
translations.pt-br: Que Rudra desperte (ou impulsione, estimule).
translations.ru: Пусть Рудра пробудится (или пробудит, побудит, стимулирует).
translations.sv: Må den Rudra väcka (eller driva, stimulera).
translations.th: ขอให้พระฤษีนั้นปลุกเร้า (หรือ กระตุ้น, เร้าใจ).
translations.tr: May Rudra uyansın (veya harekete geçsin, teşvik etsin).
translations.uk: Нехай Рудра пробудиться (або надихне, стимулює).
translations.vi: Xin cho Rudra thức tỉnh (hoặc thúc đẩy, kích thích).
translations.zh-cn: 愿 Rudra 觉醒 (Yuàn Rudra juéxǐng).

mantras.name: May the Devas (gods) grant us auspiciousness with their ears (through hearing).
mantras.english: May the Devas (gods) grant us auspiciousness with their ears (through hearing).
mantras.transliteration: `may devāḥ śrotraiḥ śubham dadātuḥ`
mantras.background: From the ancient Vedic "Bhadram Karne" hymn, this Sanskrit mantra invokes the gods during yagna (sacred fire ritual): "May we hear auspicious words with our ears." A timeless prayer for divine grace!
mantras.benefits: Practicing "Bhadram Karne" cultivates receptivity to auspiciousness through all senses, steadying body and mind. It invokes divine protection from Indra and Pusa, fostering inner stability, gratitude, and alignment with sacred purpose.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, devas, prayer, devotional, auspiciousness, peace, blessing, ritual, protection

translations.es: Que los Devas (dioses) nos concedan prosperidad y bendiciones a través de su escucha.
translations.ar: لِيَجْعَلْ الآلهةُ البركةَ لنا بأذانِها (عن طريقِ السَّمع).
translations.bn: দেবতারা যেন তাদের শ্রবণের মাধ্যমে আমাদের কল্যাণ প্রদান করেন।
translations.de: Mögen die Devas uns mit ihrem Gehör durch das Hören Glück und Segen bringen.
translations.en-us: May the Devas bestow auspiciousness upon us through their attention (by listening to our prayers/offerings).
translations.en-gb: May the deities bestow upon us auspiciousness through their attentive hearing.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse les Dieux nous accorder la prospérité par l'écoute.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁהָאֱלֹהִים יַעֲנִינֵנוּ בְשִׁמְעָם, וִיבֵרְכוּנוּ בְאוֹמֶן.
translations.hi: देवों की कृपा से, हम सभी को शुभता प्राप्त हो, और वे हमारे सुनने के माध्यम से हमें आशीर्वाद दें।
translations.id: Semoga para Dewa memberikan keberkahan kepada kami melalui kebaikan hati mereka (dengan mendengarkan permohonan kami).
translations.it: Possa la divinità concederci auspicio attraverso la loro udienza.
translations.ja:
神々（デヴァ）が、その耳を通して、私たちに吉 auspicity を与えてくださいますように。
(神々が、その耳を通して、私たちに幸運をもたらしてくださいますように。)
translations.ko: 신들이 그들의 귀로 우리에게 길조를 내려주시기를.
translations.nl: Moge de goden ons gunstige resultaten schenken door ons te horen.
translations.pl: Niech bogowie (Devowie) obdarzą nas szczęściem swoim słyszeniem (przez uszy).
translations.pt-br: Que os Devas nos concedam prosperidade e bênçãos através de sua atenção e escuta.
translations.ru: Пусть боги даруют нам благословение своим слухом (через восприятие).
translations.sv: Må gudarna (Devarna) ge oss lycka och välsignelse genom att lyssna till oss.
translations.th: ขอให้เทพเจ้าประทานความสวัสดีแก่เราผ่านทางการรับฟัง
translations.tr: Tanrıların (Deva) kulakları aracılığıyla, üzerimize iyilik ve bereket yağdırmasını dileriz.
translations.uk: Нехай Деви (боги) дарують нам благословення своїми вухами (через слухання).
translations.vi: Xin các vị thần ban cho chúng con sự may mắn và điềm lành bằng sự lắng nghe của họ.
translations.zh-cn: 愿诸神通过聆听，赐予我们吉祥。

mantras.name: May the blessed progeny of the Vratyas (a specific social group) flourish and progress. May the auspiciousness always be with the Brahmins. May the entire world be at peace and all beings be happy.
mantras.english: May the blessed progeny of the Vratyas (a specific social group) flourish and progress. May the auspiciousness always be with the Brahmins. May the entire world be at peace and all beings be happy.
mantras.original: свасти-праджа бхиах пари пала янтам нья-йена маргена махим-махишаха/го-браманебхьяха-шубхам асту нитьям локаа-самастаха сукхино-бхаванту
mantras.transliteration: May the blessed progeny of the Vratyas (a specific social group) flourish and progress. May the auspiciousness always be with the Brahmins. May the entire world be at peace and all beings be happy.
mantras.background: A Sanskrit mantra wishing flourishing for Vratyas, blessings for Brahmins, and peace for all beings — a layered invocation rooted in ancient Indian social and spiritual tradition.
mantras.benefits: This mantra cultivates universal compassion, peace, and communal harmony. Chanting it dissolves ego boundaries, fostering a sense of unity with all beings — a profound psychological shift toward empathy and collective well-being.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, blessing, prosperity, peace, welfare, auspiciousness, invocation, harmony, universal

translations.es: Que la descendencia bendita de los Vratya prospere y avance. Que la auspiciosidad siempre acompañe a los Brahmanes. Que el mundo entero sea pacífico y que todos los seres sean felices.
translations.ar: لِيَزْدَهِرْ نَسْلُ الفْرَاتِيَينِ وَيَتَمَادَى تَقَدُّمُهُمْ. لِيَعُمَّ البِرْكَةُ دَائِمًا الأَبْرَاهِمِيّينَ. وَلِيَعُمَّ السَّلامُ كُلَّ الأَرْضِ، وَلِيَجِدْ كُلُّ كَائِنٍ السَّعَادَةَ.
translations.bn: ওྃ। ওྃ বৃষ্যদের পবিত্র বংশধরের উন্নতি ও সমৃদ্ধি হোক। ব্রাহ্মণদের উপর সর্বদা শুভভাব বিরাজ করুক। সমগ্র পৃথিবী শান্তিতে ভরে উঠুক এবং সকল প্রাণী সুখী হোক।
translations.de: Möge das gesegnete Nachkommen der Vratyas gedeihen und Fortschritte machen. Möge die Segenswirkung stets bei den Brahmanen sein. Möge die ganze Welt Frieden erfahren und alle Lebewesen glücklich sein.
translations.en-us: May the blessed offspring of the Vratya community thrive and prosper. May auspiciousness always accompany the Brahmins. May the entire world experience peace, and may all beings be joyful.
translations.en-gb: May the blessed descendants of the Vratya community prosper and advance. May auspiciousness ever attend the Brahmins. May the entire world find peace, and may all beings experience happiness.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse la progéniture bénie des Vratyas s'épanouir et progresser. Que l'auspice soit toujours avec les Brahmins. Que le monde entier soit en paix et que tous les êtres soient heureux.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁהַצֵּאֵחַ הַמְבֻרָךְ שֶׁל הַוְרָטְיָה יִפְרֵחַ וְיַצְלִיחַ. יִהְיֶה בְּרָכָה תָּמִיד לַכַּהֲנִים. יִהְיֶה שָׁלוֹם עַל הָעוֹלָם וְכָל הַיְּצוּרִים יִהְיוּ מְשֻׂגְגִים.
translations.hi: व्रात्यों की पावन संतान का विकास और उन्नति हो। ब्राह्मणों पर हमेशा शुभता बनी रहे। संपूर्ण विश्व में शांति हो और सभी प्राणी सुखी हों।
translations.id: Semoga keturunan yang diberkati dari kelompok Vratya berkembang dan maju. Semoga kebaikan selalu menyertai para Brahmana. Semoga seluruh dunia damai dan semua makhluk berbahagia.
translations.it: "Possa la discendenza benedetta dei Vratya prosperare e progredire. Che l'auspicio sia sempre con i Brahmāni. Che il mondo intero sia in pace e che tutti gli esseri siano felici."
translations.ja: ヴラティヤの人々の祝福された子孫が繁栄し、発展することを祈ります。また、バラモン（高位の祭祀階級）には常に吉 auspicityが伴いますように。そして、世界全体が平和であり、すべての生き物が幸せであることを願います。
translations.ko: 브라트야 계열의 축복받은 자손들이 번성하고 발전하기를 기원합니다. 바라건대, 브라만 계층에게는 항상 길조가 함께 하기를. 그리고 온 세상이 평화롭고 모든 존재가 행복하기를 빕니다.
translations.nl: Moge de gezegende nakomelingen van de Vratya's bloeien en vooruitgang boeken. Moge de gunstige invloed altijd bij de Brahmanen zijn. Moge de hele wereld in vrede zijn en alle wezens gelukkig.
translations.pl: Niech potomstwo *Vratyjów* (*społeczności o określonym statusie*) kwitnie i się rozwija. Niech błogosławieństwo zawsze towarzyszy *Brahminom*. Niech cały świat będzie w pokoju, a wszystkie istoty będą szczęśliwe.
translations.pt-br: Que a descendência abençoada dos Vratyas prospere e avance. Que a auspiciosidade esteja sempre com os Brâmanes. Que o mundo inteiro seja em paz e que todos os seres sejam felizes.
translations.ru: Да преумножится и процветает благословенное потомство Вратйев. Да будет благословение всегда с брахманами. Да будет мир во всем мире, и да будет счастье всем существам.
translations.sv: Må de välsignade ättlingarna av Vratyarna (en specifik social grupp) frodas och utvecklas. Må det goda alltid omge brahmanerna. Må hela världen vara i fred och alla varelser vara lyckliga.
translations.th: ขอให้บุตรหลานของชนชั้นวรรทยะเจริญเติบโตและก้าวหน้า ขอให้พรและสิริมงคลจงสถิตอยู่กับชนชั้นพราหมณ์ ขอให้โลกทั้งผืนสงบสุข และสรรพสิ่งมีสุข
translations.tr: Vratya topluluğunun kutsal soyunun gelişip ilerlemesi dileğiyle. Brahmanların üzerine her zaman uğurlu havanın (bereketin) olsun. Tüm dünyanın huzur içinde olması ve tüm canlıların mutlu olması umulur.
translations.uk: Нехай потомство, яке народиться у роду Врат'я, процвітає та розвивається. Нехай благословення завжди будуть з брахманами. Нехай у всьому світі панує мир, і нехай всі істоти будуть щасливими.
translations.vi: Xin cho thế hệ ưu tú của dòng họ Vratya thịnh vượng và phát triển. Xin cho sự may mắn luôn đồng hành với các vị Brahmin. Xin cho toàn thế giới hòa bình và tất cả sinh vật được hạnh phúc.
translations.zh-cn: 愿伐陀人（一种特定的社会群体）的后裔繁荣昌盛，不断进步。 愿吉祥永远伴随着婆罗门。 愿整个世界和平，所有众生皆得快乐。

mantras.name: May the divine essence nourish my limbs.
mantras.english: May the divine essence nourish my limbs.
mantras.transliteration: `maya divya-sāraḥ mama aṅgān̐ pōṣatu`
mantras.background: From the Upanishads, this Vedic mantra "Apyayantu Mamangani" calls Brahman to nourish all senses—speech, sight, strength—awakening the Self. A timeless Hindu invocation!
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Apyayantu Mamangani" invokes wholeness—aligning body, breath, senses, and mind with Brahman. Practitioners seek vitality, sensory clarity, and unity with the Self, dissolving inner conflict through devotional surrender.
mantras.tags: vedic, upanishadic, hindu, vedanta, brahman, peace, nourishment, dharma, atman, self-knowledge, cosmic

translations.es: Que la esencia divina nutra mis miembros.
translations.ar: لِيَجْعَلِ الذُّرُو القَدِّسِيُّ مُرَقِّيًا لأَطْرَافِي.
translations.bn: "হে ঈশ্বর, তোমার পবিত্র সত্তা আমার শরীরকে পুষ্টি জোগাক।"
translations.de: Möge die göttliche Essenz meine Glieder nähren.
translations.en-us: May the divine energy sustain my body.
translations.en-gb: May the divine essence nourish my body.
translations.fr-fr: Puissance divine, nourris mes membres.
translations.he: יְהִי הֶחֶסֶד ה' מַעֲנִיק לְגַפַּי.
translations.hi: "देवत्व का सार मेरा शरीर पोषण करे।"
translations.id: Semoga esensi ketuhanan memelihara tubuhku.
translations.it: Possa l'essenza divina nutrire i miei membri.
translations.ja: 神聖な本質が、私の体を養いますように。(Shinsei na honshitsu ga, watashi no karada o yasumimasu you ni.)
translations.ko: 신성한 본질이 제 몸을 영양 공급하기를.
translations.nl: Moge de goddelijke essentie mijn lichaam voeden.
translations.pl: Niech boska esencja odżywia moje ciało.
translations.pt-br: Que a essência divina nutra meus membros.
translations.ru: Пусть божественная сущность питает мои члены.
translations.sv: Må det gudomliga essensen nära mina lemmar.
translations.th: ขอให้พลังศักดิ์สิทธิ์หล่อเลี้ยงร่างกายของข้า
translations.tr: İlahi özün, bedenimi beslemesi dileğiyle.
translations.uk: Нехай божественна сутність живить мої кінцівки.
translations.vi: Xin ánh sáng thiêng liêng nuôi dưỡng thân thể tôi.
translations.zh-cn: 愿神圣的精华滋养我的身体。

mantras.name: May the intellect be awakened.
mantras.english: May the intellect be awakened.
mantras.transliteration: may buddhiḥ jāgṛtā syāt.
mantras.background: "May the intellect be awakened" — a mantra whose very words invite transformation. Its literal call to awaken the mind sparks curiosity about the ancient traditions that valued intellect as sacred.
mantras.benefits: "May the intellect be awakened" is an invocatory phrase pointing toward mental clarity and inner discernment — qualities many traditions prize as gateways to deeper awareness and wise decision-making in daily life.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, mantra, awakening, wisdom, intellect, self-awareness, contemplation, jnana, dharma, consciousness, vedanta

translations.es: Que la inteligencia se despierte.
translations.ar: لِيَصْحُ العَقْل.
translations.bn: বুদ্ধির উন্মেষ হোক।
translations.de: Möge der Verstand erweckt werden.
translations.en-us: May the intellect be awakened.
translations.en-gb: May the intellect be awakened.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse l'intellect s'éveiller.
translations.he: יְהִי בִּנָּה מֵתִיקָה.
translations.hi: बुद्धि की ज्योति जागृत हो।
translations.id: Semoga kebijaksanaan terbangkitkan.
translations.it: Possa l'intelletto essere risvegliato.
translations.ja: 知性が目覚められますように。
translations.ko: 지혜가 깨어나기를.
translations.nl: Moge de intelligentie ontwaken.
translations.pl: Niech się przebudzi intelekt.
translations.pt-br: Que a inteligência seja despertada.
translations.ru: Пусть интеллект пробудится.
translations.sv: Må intellektet väckas.
translations.th: ขอให้ปัญญาจงตื่นขึ้น
translations.tr: Zihin uyanmış olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай інтелект буде пробуджений.
translations.vi: Xin cho trí tuệ được khai mở.
translations.zh-cn: 愿智慧被开启。

mantras.name: May the plants that produce honey be abundant, and may the sun be favorable. May the cows be sweet (or gentle/auspicious) to us.
mantras.english: May the plants that produce honey be abundant, and may the sun be favorable. May the cows be sweet (or gentle/auspicious) to us.
mantras.original: मधुमान्नो वनस्पतिर्मद्युमाँ २ अस्तु सूर्य : । माध्वीर्गावो भवन्तु नः ॥
mantras.transliteration: `meya madhu-janīni vṛkṣāḥ, sa eva sūryo'bhijñāya. sa eva goh śubhā bhavetu.`
mantras.background: From the Rigveda, used in sacred honey (madhu) bathing rituals: "May honey-plants flourish, the sun shine favorably, and cows be gentle to us" — a sweet invocation of cosmic abundance!
mantras.benefits: This Vedic honey-mantra invokes sweetness in nature and spirit alike—cultivating inner gentleness, abundance, and solar vitality. Practitioners seek harmony with natural forces, nurturing gratitude and calm.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, ritual, offering, ghee, honey, cow, abundance, auspicious, purification, deity, panchamrita

translations.es: "Que las plantas que producen miel sean abundantes, y que el sol sea propicio. Que las vacas sean dóciles (o amables/benéficas) para nosotros."
translations.ar: لِيَكُنْ نباتُ العَسَلِ مُزْدَهِرًا، وَلِيَكُنْ الشَّمْسُ مُحْسِنَةً. وَلِيَكُنْ البَقَرُ طَيِّبًا/لَطِيفًا/مُؤْمِنًا لَنَا.
translations.bn: मधुकৃৎ植物সমূहाना প্রাচুর্য होतु, এবং सूर्य अनुकूल होतु। গাভীর আমাদের প্রতি मधुर (অথবা শান্ত/শুভ) होतु।
translations.de: Mögen die Pflanzen, die Honig produzieren, reichlich sein, und möge die Sonne günstig sein. Mögen die Kühe uns wohlgesonnen, sanftmütig und segensbringend sein.
translations.en-us: May the plants that yield honey flourish abundantly, and may the sun be propitious. May the cows be benevolent and auspicious towards us.
translations.en-gb: May the plants that yield honey flourish abundantly, and may the sun be propitious. May the cows be gentle and benevolent towards us.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse l'abondance des plantes productrices de miel, et que le soleil soit clément. Puisse les vaches être bienveillantes envers nous.
translations.he: יְהִי שֶׁהַצְּמחים הַמְּיַצְּרים דְּבַש שְׁפָּעִים, וְיִהְיֶה הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ בְּטוֹב. יִהְיוּ הַבָּקָרות רַחוֹצִים לָנוּ.
translations.hi: शहद उत्पन्न करने वाले पौधे प्रचुर हों, और सूर्य अनुकूल हो। गायें हमारे लिए मधुर (या दयालु/शुभ) हों।
translations.id: Semoga tumbuhan penghasil madu berlimpah, dan semoga matahari bersinar dengan baik. Semoga sapi-sapi menjadi baik/lembut/menguntungkan bagi kita.
translations.it: Che le piante che producono miele siano abbondanti, e che il sole sia propizio. Che le vacche siano benevole nei nostri confronti.
translations.ja: 蜜を生成する植物が豊かに実り、太陽が恵み深いように。そして、牛たちが私たちに優しく、吉兆をもたらすように。
translations.ko: 꿀을 생산하는 식물들이 풍족하기를, 그리고 태양이 길하게 비추기를 바랍니다. 소들이 우리에게 친절하고 복을 가져다주기를 빕니다.
translations.nl: Moge de planten die honing produceren overvloedig zijn, en moge de zon gunstig zijn. Moge de koeien vriendelijk (of zachtaardig/gunstig) voor ons zijn.
translations.pl: Niech rośliny, które dają miód, będą obfite, a niech słońce będzie łaskawe. Niech krowy będą dla nas łagodne (lub korzystne/pomyślne).
translations.pt-br: Que as plantas que produzem mel sejam abundantes, e que o sol seja favorável. Que as vacas sejam gentis (ou amáveis/benéficas) para conosco.
translations.ru: Пусть растения, производящие мёд, будут обильными, и пусть солнце будет благосклонным. Пусть коровы будут добрыми (или ласковыми/благоприятными) к нам.
translations.sv: Må växterna som producerar honung vara rikliga, och må solen vara gynnsam. Må korna vara vänliga/goda/välsignande mot oss.
translations.th: ขอให้พืชที่ให้รวงผึ้งมีมากมาย และขอให้ดวงอาทิตย์เป็นมงคล ขอให้วัวเป็นมิตร/อ่อนโยน/เป็นสิริมงคลแก่เรา
translations.tr: Bal üreten bitkilerin bol olmasını ve güneşin de olumlu etkili olmasını dilerim. Umarım inekler bize karşı nazik ve bereketli olur.
translations.uk: Нехай рослини, що дають мед, будуть численними, а сонце – лагідним. Нехай корови будуть добрими до нас.
translations.vi: Xin cho những loài cây tạo ra mật ong được sinh sôi nảy nở, và xin ánh nắng mặt trời luôn tốt lành. Xin cho những con bò trở nên hiền lành và mang lại điều tốt đẹp cho chúng ta.
translations.zh-cn: 愿产蜜的植物繁盛，愿阳光和煦。愿牛对我们仁慈（或温顺/吉祥）。

mantras.name: May there be peace with the plants, may there be peace with the entire universe, may there be peace with the gods.
mantras.english: May there be peace with the plants, may there be peace with the entire universe, may there be peace with the gods.
mantras.transliteration: `Om śāntiḥ auṣadhān, śāntiḥ jagat, śāntiḥ devatān.`
mantras.background: From the Upanishads, this Vedic Shanti mantra invokes peace across sky, earth, water, plants, gods, and all existence — culminating in "Om Shantih Shantih Shantih."
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Vedic Shanti mantra cultivates inner stillness, dissolves anxiety, and expands awareness beyond the self—inviting harmony with nature, cosmos, and the divine. A profound call to universal peace.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, brahman, shanti, peace, upanishadic, affirmation, invocation, dharma, prosperity, self-realization

translations.es: Que haya paz con las plantas, que haya paz con todo el universo, que haya paz con los dioses.
translations.ar: لِيَكُنْ سَلامٌ مَعَ النَّبَاتَاتِ، وَلِيَكُنْ سَلامٌ مَعَ الْكَونَ بِأَكْمَلِهِ، وَلِيَكُنْ سَلامٌ مَعَ الآلِهَةِ.
translations.bn: উদ্ভিদের সাথে শান্তি থাকুক, সমগ্র বিশ্বের সাথে শান্তি থাকুক, দেব-দেবীর সাথে শান্তি থাকুক।
translations.de: Mögen Frieden mit den Pflanzen sein, möge Frieden mit dem gesamten Universum sein, möge Frieden mit den Göttern sein.
translations.en-us: May there be peace with the plants, may there be peace with the entire universe, may there be peace with the deities.
translations.en-gb: May there be peace with plants, may there be peace with the entire universe, and may there be peace with the deities.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse qu'il y ait paix avec les plantes, puisse qu'il y ait paix avec l'univers entier, puisse qu'il y ait paix avec les divinités.
translations.he: יהי שלום עם הצומח, יהי שלום עם כל היקום, יהי שלום עם האלים.
translations.hi: "सृष्टियों के साथ शांति हो, संपूर्ण ब्रह्मांड के साथ शांति हो, देवताओं के साथ शांति हो।"
translations.id: Semoga ada kedamaian dengan tumbuhan, semoga ada kedamaian dengan seluruh alam semesta, semoga ada kedamaian dengan para dewa.
translations.it: *Sia pace con le piante, sia pace con l'intero universo, sia pace con gli dei.*
translations.ja: 植物との平和、宇宙全体の平和、神々との平和がありますように。
translations.ko: 식물들과 평화가 있기를, 온 우주와 평화가 있기를, 신들과 평화가 있기를.
translations.nl: Moge er vrede zijn met de planten, moge er vrede zijn met het gehele universum, moge er vrede zijn met de goden.
translations.pl: Niech będzie pokój ze roślinami, niech będzie pokój z całym wszechświatem, niech będzie pokój z bogami.
translations.pt-br: Que haja paz com as plantas, que haja paz com todo o universo, que haja paz com os deuses.
translations.ru: Да будет мир с растениями, да будет мир со всей вселенной, да будет мир с богами.
translations.sv: Må det vara frid med växterna, må det vara frid med hela universum, må det vara frid med gudarna.
translations.th: ขอให้มีความสงบสุขกับพืช, ขอให้มีความสงบสุขกับจักรวาลทั้งหมด, ขอให้มีความสงบสุขกับเทพเจ้า
translations.tr: Bitkilerle barış olsun, tüm evrenle barış olsun, tanrılarla barış olsun.
translations.uk: Нехай буде мир з рослинами, нехай буде мир з усім Всесвітом, нехай буде мир з богами.
translations.vi: Xin có hòa bình với cây cỏ, xin có hòa bình với toàn vũ trụ, xin có hòa bình với các vị thần.
translations.zh-cn: 愿与植物和平共处，愿与整个宇宙和平共处，愿与众神和平共处。

mantras.name: May we be protected by the Divine; may the Divine nourish us; may we work together with energy and vitality; may our study be filled with enlightenment; may there be no animosity among us. Om Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.english: May we be protected by the Divine; may the Divine nourish us; may we work together with energy and vitality; may our study be filled with enlightenment; may there be no animosity among us. Om Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.original: Om Saha Navavatu Saha Nau Bhunaktu Saha Viryam Karavavahai Tejasvinavadhitamastu Ma Vidvishavahai Om Shanti Shanti Shantiḥ
mantras.transliteration: May we be protected by the Divine; may the Divine nourish us; may we work together with energy and vitality; may our study be filled with enlightenment; may there be no animosity among us. Om śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ.
mantras.background: A Vedic peace invocation rooted in ancient Hindu tradition, this mantra calls for divine protection, nourishment, unity, and enlightenment — closing with Om, the primordial sound of all existence.
mantras.benefits: This Vedic peace invocation cultivates unity, protection, and shared enlightenment. Closing with Om Shanti three times channels Om's documented capacity to calm the nervous system and shift brainwave activity toward deep meditative stillness.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, protection, peace, healing, prayer, enlightenment, harmony, energy, unity

translations.es: Que seamos protegidos por lo Divino; que lo Divino nos nutra; que trabajemos juntos con energía y vitalidad; que nuestro estudio se llene de iluminación; que no haya animosidad entre nosotros. Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ar: ليحمينّنا القدر، ويرعانا الإله، ولنعمل معًا بحيوية ونشاط، ولنملأ دراستنا بالإشراق والتنوير، ولنكن متآلفين ومتراحمين فيما بيننا. يا رب، سلام، سلام، سلام.
translations.bn: আমাদের ঈশ্বর রক্ষা করুন; ঈশ্বর আমাদের পুষ্ট করুন; আমরা যেন শক্তি ও উদ্দীপনার সাথে একসাথে কাজ করি; আমাদের অধ্যয়ন যেন জ্ঞানার্জনে পরিপূর্ণ হয়; আমাদের মধ্যে যেন কোনো বিদ্বেষ না থাকে। ওম শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Mögen wir durch die göttliche Kraft geschützt sein; möge das Göttliche uns nähren; mögen wir mit Energie und Vitalität zusammenarbeiten; möge unser Studium von Erleuchtung erfüllt sein; möge es keinen Zank unter uns geben. Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: May we be protected by the Divine; may the Divine nourish us; may we collaborate with vigor and vitality; may our learning be filled with enlightenment; may there be no animosity among us. Om Shanti, Shanti, Shanti.
translations.en-gb: May the Divine protect us; may the Divine nourish us; may we collaborate with vigour and vitality; may our learning be filled with enlightenment; may there be no discord among us. Om Shanti, Shanti, Shanti.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse le Divin nous protéger ; puisse le Divin nous nourrir ; puisse-nous travailler ensemble avec énergie et vitalité ; puisse notre étude être remplie d'illumination ; puisse-t-il n'y avoir aucune animosité parmi nous. Om, Paix, Paix, Paix.
translations.he: יְהִי רֹחְבֵנוּ מְגִנוּת אֱלוֹהִית; יְהִי רֹחְבֵנוּ מְאוֹרָה אֱלוֹהִית; נְפַעֵל יַחַד בְּעֹצְמָה וּבְחִיוּת; יִמָּלֵא הַלִמּוּד שֵׁלנוּ בְּהִתְגַלּוּת; וְיִהְיֶה שָׁלוֹם בֵּינוֹתֵנוּ. אום, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: "हे ईश्वर, हमारी रक्षा करें; हे ईश्वर, हमें पोषण दें; हम ऊर्जा और उत्साह के साथ मिलकर काम करें; हमारी शिक्षा ज्ञान से परिपूर्ण हो; हममें कोई द्वेष न हो। ॐ शांति, शांति, शांति।"
translations.id: Semoga kami dilindungi oleh Yang Maha Kuasa; semoga Yang Maha Kuasa memberi kami nutrisi; semoga kami bekerja bersama dengan energi dan vitalitas; semoga studi kami dipenuhi dengan pencerahan; semoga tidak ada permusuhan di antara kami. Om Shanti, Shanti, Shanti.
translations.it: Possano le forze divine proteggerci; possano le forze divine nutrirci; possiamo lavorare insieme con energia e vitalità; possa il nostro studio essere pieno di illuminazione; possa non esserci animosità tra noi. Om Shanti, Shanti, Shanti.
translations.ja: 私たちは神によって守られ、神によって養われ、活力とエネルギーをもって共に活動し、私たちの学びは啓発に満たされ、私たちの中でいかなる敵意も生まれないように。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 신께서 우리를 보호하시기를, 신께서 우리를 영양하시기를, 우리는 활력과 에너지로 함께 노력하기를, 우리의 학문이 깨달음으로 가득하기를, 우리 사이에 어떠한 적대감도 없기를. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Moge het Goddelijke ons beschermen; moge het Goddelijke ons voeden; moge we met energie en vitaliteit samenwerken; moge onze studie gevuld zijn met verlichting; moge er geen vijandigheid onder ons zijn. Om, Vrede, Vrede, Vrede.
translations.pl: Niechaj nas chroni Boskość; niechaj Boskość nas odżywia; niechaj działamy razem z energią i witalnością; niech nasze studia będą wypełnione oświeceniem; niech nie będzie między nami żadnej wrogości. Om. Pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que sejamos protegidos pelo Divino; que o Divino nos nutra; que possamos trabalhar juntos com energia e vitalidade; que nossos estudos sejam preenchidos com iluminação; que não haja animosidade entre nós. Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ru: Да пребудет с нами Божественная защита; да питает нас Божественная благодать; да трудимся мы вместе с энергией и жизненной силой; да будет наше учение наполнено просветлением; да не будет вражды между нами. Ом. Мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Må vi skyddas av det gudomliga; må det gudomliga nära oss; må vi arbeta tillsammans med energi och vitalitet; må vår studier fyllas av upplysning; må det inte finnas någon fientlighet bland oss. Om, Fred, Fred, Fred.
translations.th: ขอให้พระเป็นเจ้าคุ้มครองเรา ขอให้พระเป็นเจ้าประทานอาหารแก่เรา ขอให้เราทำงานร่วมกันด้วยพลังและความมีชีวิตชีวา ขอให้การศึกษาของเราเต็มไปด้วยปัญญา ขอให้ไม่มีความขัดแย้งใดๆ ระหว่างเรา ขอให้มีสันติสุข สันติสุข สันติสุข ขออัญเชิญพระ (Om).
translations.tr: İlahi tarafından korunulalım; İlahi bizi beslesin; enerji ve canlılıkla birlikte çalışalım; çalışmalarımız aydınlanmayla dolsun; aramıza hiç bir düşmanlık girmesin. Om, huzur, huzur, huzur.
translations.uk: Нехай Божество захищає нас; нехай Божество живить нас; нехай ми працюємо разом з енергією та життєвою силою; нехай наше навчання буде сповнене просвітлення; нехай між нами не буде ворожнечі. Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.vi: Xin cho chúng con được sự bảo vệ của Đấng thiêng liêng; xin cho Đấng thiêng liêng nuôi dưỡng chúng con; xin cho chúng con làm việc cùng nhau với sự năng lượng và sức sống; xin cho sự học tập của chúng con tràn đầy ánh sáng trí tuệ; xin đừng có bất hòa giữa chúng con. ॐ Hòa bình, Hòa bình, Hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: 愿神灵保佑我们；愿神灵滋养我们；愿我们充满活力地共同努力；愿我们的学习充满智慧；愿我们之间没有敌意。 ॐ (Om) 平安，平安，平安。

mantras.name: May we be protected by the Self (or Divine); may we be nourished by the Self; may we attain strength together; may our study be filled with prosperity; may there be no animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: May we be protected by the Self (or Divine); may we be nourished by the Self; may we attain strength together; may our study be filled with prosperity; may there be no animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.original: Om saha naa vavatu Saha nau bhunaktu Saha viiryam Karavaa vahai Tejas vinaa vadhiita mastu ma Vidvishaa vahaihi Om shnatih shantih shantihi
mantras.transliteration: `Om śāstraḥ svayaṃ-rūpeṇa rakṣantu; svayaṃ-rūpeṇa pūryantu; saha-balam labhantu; saha-vidyā śubha-bharaḥ syāṃ; naiva vighaṭaḥ syāt. Om, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ.`
mantras.background: From the Vedic tradition, this Sanskrit peace invocation calls for mutual protection, nourishment, and strength in study — closing with the triple Om Shanti, dissolving all discord.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Vedic peace mantra (Shanti Patha) fosters unity, mutual nourishment, and freedom from animosity. Its triple "Shanti" invocation addresses physical, mental, and spiritual peace — a complete holistic healing.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, ashtanga, brahman, invocation, protection, nourishment, strength, devotional, harmony, unity, peace

translations.es: "Que seamos protegidos por el Ser (o lo Divino); que seamos nutridos por el Ser; que alcancemos fuerza juntos; que nuestro estudio esté lleno de prosperidad; que no haya animosidad entre nosotros. Om, paz, paz, paz."
translations.ar: لِنَحْفَظْ بِرَحْمَةِ الذَّاتِ الإِلٰهِيَّةِ، وَلْنُغَذَّ بِرَعَايَتِهَا، وَلْنُقْوِي قُوَاتِنَا مَعًا، وَلْنَلْأَلْ سَعْيُنَا بِالرَّخَاءِ، وَلَا يَكُنْ بَيْنَنَا عَدَاوَةٌ. أَوْم، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ.
translations.bn: আমরা যেন আত্ম/ঐশ্বরিক সত্তার দ্বারা সুরক্ষিত থাকি; আমরা যেন আত্ম/ঐশ্বরিক সত্তার দ্বারা পুষ্ট হই; আমরা যেন একসাথে শক্তি অর্জন করি; আমাদের অধ্যয়ন যেন সমৃদ্ধিতে পরিপূর্ণ হয়; আমাদের মধ্যে যেন কোনো বিদ্বেষ না থাকে। ওম, শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Mögen wir vom Selbst (oder vom Göttlichen) beschützt werden; mögen wir vom Selbst ernährt werden; mögen wir gemeinsam Stärke erlangen; möge unser Lernen von Wohlstand erfüllt sein; möge es keinen Unmut unter uns geben. Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine); may we be nourished by the Self; may we attain strength together; may our learning be filled with prosperity; may there be no animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
translations.en-gb: May we be protected by the Divine; may we be sustained by the Divine; may we attain strength together; may our learning be filled with prosperity; may there be no animosity among us. Om, peace, peace, peace.
translations.fr-fr: Puissions-nous être protégés par le Soi (ou le Divin) ; puissions-nous être nourris par le Soi ; puissions-nous acquérir la force ensemble ; puissions-nous que nos études soient remplies de prospérité ; qu'il n'y ait aucune animosité parmi nous. Om, paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁנִּשְׁמָר עַל יְדֵי הַטוב; יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁנִּזּוֹן מֵהַטוב; יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁנִּרְכַּב כֹּחַ יַחַד; יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁהַלִּמּוּד שֶׁלָּנוּ יִמּוֹלֵא בִּשְׁגְׁשֻג; יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁלֹּא יִהְיֶה בִּינֵינוּ שום שנאה. אום, שלום, שלום, שלום.
translations.hi: "हे प्रभु/ईश्वर, कृपया हमें अपनी रक्षा में लें; हमें अपना पोषण प्रदान करें; हम सब मिलकर शक्ति प्राप्त करें; हमारी शिक्षा समृद्धि से परिपूर्ण हो; और हममें किसी भी प्रकार की शत्रुता न हो। ॐ, शांति, शांति, शांति।"
translations.id: Semoga kami dilindungi oleh Diri Ketuhanan; semoga kami diberi nutrisi oleh Diri Ketuhanan; semoga kami memperoleh kekuatan bersama; semoga studi kami dipenuhi dengan kemakmuran; semoga tidak ada permusuhan di antara kami. Om, shanti, shanti, shanti.
translations.it: Possano le nostre azioni essere protette dall'Essere Supremo; possano essere nutrite dalla Sua grazia; possiamo raggiungere la forza insieme; possa il nostro studio essere pieno di prosperità; possa non esserci animosità tra noi. Om, pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: 我々が自己（または神）によって守られ、自己によって養われ、共に力を得、我々の学習が繁栄に満たされ、我々の間にいかなる敵意もありませんように。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 우리는 자아(혹은 신성)에 의해 보호받기를, 자아에 의해 양육받기를, 함께 힘을 얻기를, 우리의 학문이 번영으로 가득하기를, 그리고 우리 사이에 어떠한 적대감도 없기를 바랍니다. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Moge het Zelf (of het Goddelijke) ons beschermen; moge het Zelf ons voeden; moge we samen kracht verwerven; moge onze studie rijk zijn; moge er geen vijandigheid onder ons zijn. Om, vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Niech nas chroni Jaźń (lub Boskość); niech Jaźń nas odżywia; niech osiągniemy siłę razem; niech nasza nauka będzie pełna dobrobytu; niech nie będzie między nami żadnej wrogości. Om, pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que sejamos protegidos pelo Ser (ou Divino); que sejamos nutridos pelo Ser; que alcancemos força juntos; que nossos estudos sejam preenchidos com prosperidade; que não haja inimizade entre nós. Om, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Да будем мы защищены Самим (Божественным началом); да будем мы питаемы Самим; да обретем мы силу вместе; да будет наше обучение наполнено процветанием; да не будет вражды между нами. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Må vi skyddas av det Högre (eller det Gudomliga); må vi näras av det Högre; må vi uppnå styrka tillsammans; må vår studier vara fyllda av välstånd; må det inte finnas någon fientlighet bland oss. Om, frid, frid, frid.
translations.th: ขอให้เราได้รับการปกป้องจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า; ขอให้เราได้รับการหล่อเลี้ยงจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า; ขอให้เรามีความเข้มแข็งร่วมกัน; ขอให้การศึกษาของเราเจริญรุ่งเรือง; ขอให้ไม่มีความขัดแย้งใด ๆ ระหว่างเรา. โอม, สันติ, สันติ, สันติ.
translations.tr: "Bizler, özümüzden/Tanrı'dan korunalım; özümüzden/Tanrı'dan beslenelim; birlikte güç kazanalım; çalışmalarımız bollukla dolu olsun; aramıza hiç kin girmesin. Om, huzur, huzur, huzur."
translations.uk: Нехай Само (або Божество) захищає нас; нехай Само нас живить; нехай ми здобудемо силу разом; нехай наші зусилля у навчанні будуть сповнені процвітання; нехай між нами не буде ворожнечі. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Xin chúng tôi được sự bảo vệ của Đấng tối cao; xin chúng tôi được nuôi dưỡng bởi Đấng tối cao; xin chúng tôi cùng nhau đạt được sức mạnh; xin việc học tập của chúng tôi tràn đầy sự thịnh vượng; xin không có sự thù địch giữa chúng tôi. ॐ, bình an, bình an, bình an.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我们由真我（或神圣）守护；愿我们由真我滋养；愿我们共同获得力量；愿我们的学习充满繁荣；愿我们之间没有敌意。 唵，和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine), may the Self nourish us, may the Self inspire us with strength.
mantras.english: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine), may the Self nourish us, may the Self inspire us with strength.
mantras.original:
Om saha nāvavatu
saha nau bhunaktu
saha vīryam karavāvahai…
mantras.transliteration: `mayā atmanā rakṣāmahe, mayā atmanā pōṣaṃa, mayā atmanā śaktim anleśuḥ.`
mantras.background:
From the Taittiriya Upanishad, this Vedic Shanti Mantra unites teacher & student: "May the Self protect, nourish, and strengthen us both." A timeless call for harmony.
  Grounding: Source cites this mantra as a Shanti Mantra from Taittiriya Upanishad, used for teacher-student harmony, ending with "Om shāntiḥ shāntiḥ shāntiḥ."
mantras.benefits: This Vedic Shanti mantra fosters unity, protection, and inner strength. Chanting it purifies mind and speech, aligns practitioners with cosmic vibrations, and cultivates mutual nourishment between teacher and student.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, devotional, prayer, protection, empowerment, nourishment, strength, harmony

translations.es: Que el Ser (o lo Divino) nos proteja, que el Ser nos nutra, que el Ser nos inspire con fuerza.
translations.ar: لِنَحْفَظْهُ الذَّاتُ، وَلْيَرْوِ الذَّاتُ نَفْسَنَا، وَلْيُلْهِمْنَا الذَّاتُ القُوَّةَ.
translations.bn: "हेishable আমাদের রক্ষা করুক,ishable আমাদের পুষ্টি জোগাক, এবংishable আমাদের শক্তি দিয়ে অনুপ্রাণিত করুক।"
translations.de: Mögen wir durch das Selbst (oder das Göttliche) geschützt sein, möge das Selbst uns nähren, möge das Selbst uns mit Kraft erfüllen.
translations.en-us: May the Self protect us, may the Self nourish us, may the Self bestow strength upon us.
translations.en-gb: May the Self protect us, may the Self nourish us, may the Self grant us strength.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse le Soi nous protéger, puisse le Soi nous nourrir, puisse le Soi nous inspirer la force.
translations.he: יְהִי הָאֵל מֵגֵנֵנוּ, יְהִי הָאֵל מְפַנֵּנוּ, יְהִי הָאֵל מַעֲשֵׂה לִבֵּנוּ בְּעוֹז.
translations.hi: "हे परमात्मा, आप हमारी रक्षा करें, आप हमें पोषण दें, और आप हमें शक्ति प्रदान करें।"
translations.id: Semoga Ātman melindungi kita, semoga Ātman memberi kita nutrisi, semoga Ātman menginspirasi kita dengan kekuatan.
translations.it: Possano le nostre azioni essere protette dall'Atman (o dal Divino), possa l'Atman nutrirci, possa l'Atman ispirarci con forza.
translations.ja: 我々が自己（または神）によって守られ、自己が我々を養い、自己が我々に力を与えますように。
translations.ko: 우리는 자아(혹은 신성)에 의해 보호받기를, 자아에 의해 양육받기를, 자아로부터 힘을 얻기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Moge het Zelf (of het Goddelijke) ons beschermen, moge het Zelf ons voeden, moge het Zelf ons met kracht inspireren.
translations.pl: Niech nas chroni Atman (lub Bóstwo), niech Atman nas odżywia, niech Atman napełnia nas siłą.
translations.pt-br: Que o Ser (ou o Divino) nos proteja, que o Ser nos nutra, que o Ser nos inspire com força.
translations.ru: Да пребудет с нами Истина (или Божественное Начало), да питает нас Истина, да дарует нам Истина силу.
translations.sv: Må vi skyddas av Självet (eller det gudomliga), må Självet nära oss, må Självet inspirera oss med styrka.
translations.th: ขอให้พระผู้เป็นเจ้าคุ้มครองเรา ขอให้พระผู้เป็นเจ้าประทานอาหารแก่เรา ขอให้พระผู้เป็นเจ้าประทานกำลังใจให้แก่เรา
translations.tr: "Bizim, Benliğin (veya İlahi Varlığın) korumasıyla, Benliğin bizi beslemesiyle, Benliğin bize güç vermesiyle."
translations.uk: Нехай Самобутність (або Божество) захищає нас, нехай Самобутність живить нас, нехай Самобутність надихає нас силою.
translations.vi: Xin nguyện được sự bảo vệ của Bản Thật (hoặc Đấng thiêng liêng), xin Bản Thật nuôi dưỡng chúng con, xin Bản Thật ban cho chúng con sức mạnh.
translations.zh-cn: 愿真我（或神圣）保护我们，愿真我滋养我们，愿真我赋予我们力量。

mantras.name: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with brilliance, may there be no animosity among us. Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.english: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with brilliance, may there be no animosity among us. Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.original: Om Saha Nāvavatu, Saha Nau Bhunaktu, Saha Vīryam Karavāvahai, Tejasvināvadhītamastu Mā Vidvishāvahai, Om Shāntiḥ Shāntiḥ Shāntiḥ
mantras.transliteration: `May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with brilliance, may there be no animosity among us. Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.`
mantras.background: A Vedic peace invocation from the Taittiriya Upanishad, calling for divine protection, shared wisdom, and harmony — sealed thrice with Om and Peace.
mantras.benefits: This ancient peace invocation cultivates unity, clarity, and inner protection. Its triple "Shanti" and closing Om calm the nervous system, dissolve animosity, and awaken collective brilliance — a timeless call toward shared harmony.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, blessing, protection, nourishment, harmony, peace, unity, divine, learning

translations.es: Que seamos protegidos por el Ser (o la Divinidad), que seamos nutridos por el Ser, que trabajemos juntos con energía, que nuestro estudio esté lleno de brillantez, que no haya animosidad entre nosotros. Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ar: لِنَحْفَظْ بِرَحْمَةِ الذَّاتِ، لِنُغَذَّ بِرَحْمَةِ الذَّاتِ، لِنَعْمَلْ سُويًّا بِطَاقَةٍ، لِيَكُنْ عِلْمُنَا مُشْرِقًا، وَلَا يَكُنْ بَيْنَنَا عَدَاء. ॐ، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ.
translations.bn: আমরা যেন আত্ম/ঐশ্বরিক সত্তার দ্বারা সুরক্ষিত হই, আমরা যেন আত্ম/ঐশ্বরিক সত্তার দ্বারা পুষ্ট হই, আমরা যেন শক্তি নিয়ে একত্রে কাজ করি, আমাদের অধ্যয়ন যেন প্রখর ঔজ্জ্বল্যে পরিপূর্ণ হয়, এবং আমাদের মধ্যে যেন কোনো বিদ্বেষ না থাকে। ওম, শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Mögen wir vom Selbst (oder vom Göttlichen) geschützt sein, mögen wir vom Selbst genährt werden, mögen wir mit Energie zusammenarbeiten, möge unser Lernen von Brillanz erfüllt sein, möge es keinen Zank unter uns geben. Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: May we be protected by the Self/Divine; may we be nourished by the Self/Divine; may we work together with vigor; may our learning be filled with brilliance; may there be no animosity among us. Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
translations.en-gb: May we be protected by the Self, may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with vigour, may our learning be filled with brilliance, and may there be no animosity amongst us. Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
translations.fr-fr: Que le Soi (ou le Divin) nous protège, que le Soi nous nourrisse, que nous travaillions ensemble avec énergie, que nos études soient remplies de lumière, et qu'il n'y ait aucune animosité parmi nous. Om, paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁנִּשְׁמָר עַל יְדֵי הַטוב, שֶׁנִּזּוֹן עַל יְדֵי הַטוב, שֶׁנְּפַעֵל יַחַד בְּאֶנֶרְגִיָּה, שֶׁהַלִּמּוּד שֶׁלָּנוּ יִמָּלֵא בְּזוֹהַר, וְשֶׁלֹּא יִהְיֶה בִּינֵינוּ שום שנאה. אום, שלום, שלום, שלום.
translations.hi: "हे परमात्मा, हम आपकी रक्षा में रहें, हम आपके द्वारा पोषित हों, हम ऊर्जा के साथ मिलकर काम करें, हमारी शिक्षा में प्रचुर ज्ञान हो, और हममें किसी भी प्रकार की शत्रुता न हो। ॐ, शांति, शांति, शांति।"
translations.id: Semoga kami dilindungi oleh Atman (atau Yang Maha Tinggi), semoga kami diberi nutrisi oleh Atman, semoga kami bekerja bersama dengan semangat, semoga studi kami dipenuhi dengan kecerdasan, semoga tidak ada permusuhan di antara kami. Om, Shanti, Shanti, Shanti.
translations.it: Possano le nostre azioni essere guidate dal Sé (o dal Divino), possano le nostre energie essere nutrite dal Sé, possiamo collaborare con vigore, possia il nostro studio essere illuminato dalla saggezza, e possa non esserci animosità tra noi. Om, Pace, Pace, Pace.
translations.ja: 我ら（は）、自己（または神）によって守られ、自己（または神）によって養われ、我ら（は）力を合わせて協力し、我ら（の）学びは輝きに満たされ、我ら（の間には）いかなる敵意もありませんように。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 자비가 우리를 보호하고, 자비가 우리를 양육하며, 우리가 함께 에너지를 발휘하고, 우리의 학문이 빛으로 가득 차기를, 그리고 우리 사이에 어떠한 적대감도 없기를. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Moge het Zelf (of het Goddelijke) ons beschermen, moge het Zelf ons voeden, moge we met energie samenwerken, moge ons studeren vervuld zijn van helderheid, moge er geen vijandigheid onder ons zijn. Om, Vrede, Vrede, Vrede.
translations.pl: Niech nas chroni Istota (lub Bóstwo), niech nas odżywia Istota, niech działamy wspólnie z energią, niech nasza nauka będzie pełna blasku, niech nie będzie między nami żadnej wrogości. Om, Pokój, Pokój, Pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que possamos ser protegidos pelo Ser (ou pelo Divino), que possamos ser nutridos pelo Ser, que possamos trabalhar juntos com energia, que nosso estudo seja repleto de brilho, que não haja animosidade entre nós. Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ru: Да будет защищенным нами Самость (или Божественное), да будет питаемым нами Самость, да будем мы работать вместе с энергией, да будет наше изучение наполнено сиянием, да не будет вражды среди нас. Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.sv: Må vi skyddas av det Högsta (eller det Gudomliga), må vi näras av det Högsta, må vi arbeta tillsammans med energi, må vår studier vara fyllda av klarhet, må det inte finnas någon fientlighet bland oss. Om, Fred, Fred, Fred.
translations.th: ขอให้เราได้รับการปกป้องจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า, ขอให้เราได้รับการหล่อเลี้ยงจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า, ขอให้เราทำงานร่วมกันด้วยพลัง, ขอให้การศึกษาของเราเต็มไปด้วยความสว่างไสว, ขอให้ไม่มีความขัดแย้งใดๆ ระหว่างเรา. โอม, สันติ, สันติ, สันติ.
translations.tr: "Benliğimiz (veya İlahi varlığımız) tarafından korunulalım, Benliğimiz tarafından beslenelim, enerjik bir şekilde birlikte çalışalım, çalışmalarımız parlaklıkla dolsun, aramıza hiçbir düşmanlık girmesin. Om, Selamet, Selamet, Selamet."
translations.uk: Нехай нас захищає Вище Я (або Божественне), нехай Вище Я нас живить, нехай ми працюємо разом з енергією, нехай наша праця буде сповнена сяйва, нехай між нами не буде ворожнечі. Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.vi: Xin nguyện được sự bảo vệ của Chân Thần, được sự nuôi dưỡng của Chân Thần, cùng nhau làm việc với tinh thần hăng say, học tập tràn đầy trí tuệ, và không có sự thù hận giữa chúng ta. ॐ, Hòa bình, Hòa bình, Hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我们由真我（或神圣）守护，愿我们由真我（或神圣）滋养，愿我们充满活力地共同努力，愿我们的学习充满智慧，愿我们之间没有敌意。 唵，和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine); may we be nourished by the Self; may we work together with energy; may our study be filled with brilliance; may there be no animosity among us; Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.english: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine); may we be nourished by the Self; may we work together with energy; may our study be filled with brilliance; may there be no animosity among us; Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.original: Om Saha Naavavatu | Saha Nau Bhunaktu | Saha Veeryam Karavaavahai | Tejasvi Navaditamastu- Maa Vidvishaavahai | Om Shaantih Shaantih Shaantih ||
mantras.transliteration: `Om may we be protected by the Self (or the Divine); may we be nourished by the Self; may we work together with energy; may our study be filled with brilliance; may there be no animosity among us; Oṃ, Śānti, Śānti, Śānti.`
mantras.background: From the Vedic tradition, this peace invocation asks the Divine to protect, nourish & unite us in brilliant study — closing with Om, Shanti×3.
mantras.benefits: This Vedic peace invocation fosters unity, mental clarity, and protection. Rooted in Upanishadic tradition, it dissolves animosity and cultivates collective brilliance—making it ideal for group study or communal spiritual practice.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, brahman, protective, blessing, peace, harmony, wisdom, nourishment, unity

translations.es: Que seamos protegidos por el Ser (o lo Divino); que seamos nutridos por el Ser; que trabajemos juntos con energía; que nuestro estudio esté lleno de brillantez; que no haya animosidad entre nosotros; Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ar: لِنَحْفَظْ بِرِعَايَةِ الذَّاتِ (أوِ الإِلهِيَّةِ)، وَلِنُغَذَّ بِرِعَايَةِ الذَّاتِ، وَلِنَعْمَلْ سُويًّا بِطَاقَةٍ، وَلِيَمْتَلَأْ عِلْمُنَا بِالْبِرَاقِ، وَلِيَعْمَلْ سَلاَمٌ بَيْنَنَا، ॐ، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ، سَلاَمٌ.
translations.bn: আমরা যেন আত্ম- Divine দ্বারা সুরক্ষিত থাকি; আমরা যেন আত্ম-Divine দ্বারা পুষ্ট হই; আমরা যেন শক্তি নিয়ে একত্রে কাজ করি; আমাদের অধ্যয়ন যেন brilliance-এ পরিপূর্ণ হয়; আমাদের মধ্যে যেন কোনো বিদ্বেষ না থাকে; ওম, শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Mögen wir vom Selbst (oder vom Göttlichen) geschützt sein; mögen wir vom Selbst genährt werden; mögen wir mit Energie zusammenarbeiten; möge unser Lernen von Brillanz erfüllt sein; möge es unter uns keinen Unmut geben; Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine); may we be sustained by the Self; may we work together with vigor; may our learning be filled with insight; may there be no animosity among us; Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
translations.en-gb: May we be sheltered by the Divine; may we be sustained by the Divine; may we collaborate with vigour; may our learning be illuminated with wisdom; may there be no discord amongst us; Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
translations.fr-fr: Puissions-nous être protégés par le Soi (ou le Divin) ; puissions-nous être nourris par le Soi ; puissions-nous travailler ensemble avec énergie ; que nos études soient remplies de clarté ; qu'il n'y ait aucune animosité parmi nous ; Om, Paix, Paix, Paix.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁנִּשְׁמָר עַל יְדֵי הַטוב; שֶׁנִּזּוֹן מִמָּקוֹר הַטוב; שֶׁנֵּלֶךְ יַחַד בְּכֹחַ; שֶׁהַלִּמּוּד שֶׁלָּנוּ יִמָּלֵא בִּזְהָר; שֶׁלֹא תִּהְיֶה בִּינֵינוּ שׂנָאָה; אוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: "हे स्वयं (या दिव्य शक्ति), हमारी रक्षा करें; हे स्वयं, हमें पोषण दें; हम ऊर्जा के साथ मिलकर काम करें; हमारी शिक्षा और अध्ययन ज्ञान और प्रतिभा से परिपूर्ण हो; हममें किसी भी प्रकार की शत्रुता न हो; ॐ, शांति, शांति, शांति।"
translations.id: Semoga kami dilindungi oleh Ketuhanan; semoga kami diberi nutrisi oleh Ketuhanan; semoga kami bekerja bersama dengan semangat; semoga studi kami dipenuhi dengan kecerdasan; semoga tidak ada permusuhan di antara kami; Om, Shanti, Shanti, Shanti.
translations.it: Possano le nostre azioni essere guidate e protette dal Sé (o dal Divino); possiamo essere nutriti dal Sé; possiamo lavorare insieme con energia e vitalità; che il nostro studio sia pieno di luce e comprensione; possa non esserci animosità tra noi; Om, Pace, Pace, Pace.
translations.ja: 我々は自己（または神）によって守られ、自己によって養われ、活力を持って共に活動し、我々の学びは輝きに満たされ、我々の間にいかなる敵意もありませんように。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko:
**Option 1 (More Literal):**

"우리가 자아(혹은 신성)에 의해 보호받기를, 자아에 의해 영양을 공급받기를, 우리가 함께 에너지를 모아 일하기를, 우리의 공부가 빛으로 가득하기를, 우리 사이에 어떠한 적대감도 없기를. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화."

**Option 2 (More Flowing/Culturally Adapted):**

"우리가 내면의 힘(혹은 신성)으로부터 보호와 영양을 받기를, 우리가 함께 힘을 합쳐 노력하기를, 우리의 학문이 밝음으로 빛나기를, 우리 사이에 어떠한 갈등도 없기를. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화."

**Explanation of Choices:**

*   **"Self" (अत्मन् / ātman or Divine):** I chose "자아 (ja-a)" which generally means "self" or "ego" in Korean, but in a spiritual context, it can represent the inner self or the divine essence. I also included "(혹은 신성)" which translates to "(or the Divine)" to offer clarity. The word "내면의 힘 (nae-myeon-ui him)" in Option 2 translates to "inner power" and can also be used to express the same concept, especially if the context emphasizes the inherent power within.
*   **"Protected" & "Nourished":** These are rendered as "보호받기를 (bo-ho-bat-gi-rul)" (to be protected) and "영양을 공급받기를 (yeong-yang-eul gong-gyeong-bat-gi-rul)" (to be nourished) respectively.  In Option 2, I combined them into "보호와 영양을 받기를 (bo-ho-wa yeong-yang-eul bat-gi-rul)" which means "to receive protection and nourishment".
*   **"Work together with energy":** This is translated as "함께 에너지를 모아 일하기를 (hamkke eneoji-reul mo-a il-ha-gi-rul)" (to work together, gathering energy) in Option 1.  Option 2 uses "함께 힘을 합쳐 노력하기를 (hamkke him-eul hap-chyeo noryeok-ha-gi-rul)" which means "to work together, combining our strength."
*   **"Study be filled with brilliance":** This is translated as "우리의 공부가 빛으로 가득하기를 (u-ri-ui gongbu-ga bit-eu-ro ga-deuk-ha-gi-rul)" (may our study be filled with light) in Option 1. Option 2 uses "우리의 학문이 밝음으로 빛나기를 (u-ri-ui hakmun-i balk-eum-eu-ro bit-na-gi-rul)" (may our scholarship shine with brightness).
*   **"No animosity":** This is translated as "어떠한 적대감도 없기를 (eot-eo-han jeok-dae-gam-do eop-gi-rul)" (may there be no animosity) in Option 1. Option 2 uses "어떠한 갈등도 없기를 (eot-eo-han galdeung-do eop-gi-rul)" (may there be no conflict), which is a slightly broader and perhaps more common way to express the sentiment in Korean.
*   **"Om, Peace, Peace, Peace":**  "옴 (Om)" is kept as is, as it's a universally recognized sound. "평화 (pyeong-hwa)" is used for "Peace".

**Grounding:**

The challenge was to balance literal accuracy with natural-sounding Korean. Option 1 is closer to a word-for-word translation, while Option 2 prioritizes a more fluid and culturally resonant expression. The choice between them depends on the desired emphasis: Option 1 for academic precision, and Option 2 for a more accessible and poetic rendition. I also considered the nuances of "Self" and offered alternative translations to capture the various interpretations. The choice of "갈등 (galdeung)" (conflict) in Option 2 is a slight deviation from the direct translation of "animosity" but is more common in everyday Korean and conveys a similar meaning within a spiritual context. Finally, I maintained the original structure of the mantra as closely as possible.
translations.nl: Moge het Zelf (of het Goddelijke) ons beschermen; moge het Zelf ons voeden; moge we met energie samenwerken; moge onze studie gevuld zijn met helderheid; moge er geen vijandigheid onder ons zijn; Om, Vrede, Vrede, Vrede.
translations.pl: Niech nas chroni Jaźń (lub Bóstwo); niech Jaźń nas odżywia; niech pracujemy razem z energią; niech nasze nauki będą wypełnione blaskiem; niech nie będzie między nami żadnej wrogości; Om, Pokój, Pokój, Pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que sejamos protegidos pelo Ser (ou pela Divindade); que sejamos nutridos pelo Ser; que trabalhemos juntos com energia; que nosso estudo seja repleto de brilhantismo; que não haja animosidade entre nós; Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ru: Да будем мы защищены Самим (или Божественным); да будем мы питаемы Самим; да будем мы работать вместе с энергией; да будет наше учение наполнено сиянием; да не будет вражды между нами; Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.sv: Må vi skyddas av det Högsta (eller det Gudomliga); må vi näras av det Högsta; må vi arbeta tillsammans med energi; må vår studier vara fyllda med klarhet; må det inte finnas någon fientlighet bland oss; Om, Fred, Fred, Fred.
translations.th: ขอให้เราได้รับการปกป้องจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า; ขอให้เราได้รับการหล่อเลี้ยงจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า; ขอให้เราทำงานร่วมกันด้วยพลัง; ขอให้การศึกษาของเราเต็มไปด้วยความสว่างไสว; ขอให้ไม่มีความขัดแย้งใดๆ ระหว่างเรา; โอม, สันติ, สันติ, สันติ
translations.tr: "Benliğimiz (veya İlahi varlığımız) tarafından korunulalım; Benliğimiz tarafından beslenelim; enerjik bir şekilde birlikte çalışalım; çalışmalarımız parlaklıkla dolsun; aramızda herhangi bir düşmanlık olmasın; Om, Şanti, Şanti, Şanti."
translations.uk: Нехай Само (або Божество) захищає нас; нехай Само (або Божество) годує нас; нехай ми працюємо разом з енергією; нехай наше навчання буде сповнене сяйва; нехай не буде ворожнечі між нами; Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.vi: Xin cho chúng tôi được bảo vệ bởi Bản Thật (hoặc Đấng Thiêng Liêng); xin cho chúng tôi được nuôi dưỡng bởi Bản Thật; xin chúng tôi hãy cùng nhau làm việc với sự nhiệt tình; xin cho sự học tập của chúng tôi tràn đầy trí tuệ; xin đừng có sự thù hận giữa chúng ta; ॐ, Hòa bình, Hòa bình, Hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我们由真我（或神圣）庇佑；愿我们由真我滋养；愿我们充满活力地共同努力；愿我们的学习充满智慧；愿我们之间没有敌意；唵，和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: May we be protected together, may we be nourished together, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with brilliance, may there be no animosity among us. May peace prevail.
mantras.english: May we be protected together, may we be nourished together, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with brilliance, may there be no animosity among us. May peace prevail.
mantras.original: Oṁ Sahanā vavatu sahanau bhunaktu sahavīryam karavāvahai tejasvi nāvadhītamastu Mā vidviṣāvahai Oṁ Shāntiḥ, Shāntiḥ, Shāntiḥ
mantras.transliteration: maye prahiṇo 'satiḥ, maye pōṣaṇe 'satiḥ, maye viryena sahāyataḥ, maye adhyāyanaṁ prabhāvatō bharaṁ, maye na kvaścid dveshaḥ syāt. śāntiḥ prajāyate.
mantras.background:
From ancient Vedic India, this Sanskrit Shanti (peace) mantra expresses communal harmony—protection, nourishment, shared energy, brilliant study, and peace among all.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Vedic mantras addressed daily life goals and peace; longer mantras carry spiritual meaning like "peace, love, knowledge" per the source text.
mantras.benefits:
This Shanti mantra fosters unity, shared nourishment, and collective harmony. Practicing it cultivates peace of mind, dissolves animosity, and channels focused mental energy—aligning with Vedic mantras' redemptive function of transforming human relationships.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Vedic mantras shifted from quotidian to redemptive goals, fostering spiritual connection and coping with human conditions; mantra recitation creates numinous emotive effects.
mantras.tags: protection, peace, collective, blessing, harmony, illumination, nourishment, collaborative

translations.es: "Que seamos protegidos juntos, que seamos nutridos juntos, que trabajemos juntos con energía, que nuestro estudio se llene de brillantez, que no haya animosidad entre nosotros. Que reine la paz."
translations.ar: لِنَحْفَظْ كُلُّنَا معًا، لِنُغَذَّى كُلُّنَا معًا، لِنَعْمَلْ معًا بِطاقةٍ، لِيَمْتَلِئْ عِلْمُنَا بِنورٍ، وَلِتَعْمَلْ الوئامُ بينَنا. وَلْيَسُدَّ السَّلامُ.
translations.bn: আমরা সকলে একত্রে সুরক্ষিত থাকি, আমরা সকলে একত্রে পুষ্ট হই, আমরা সকলে শক্তি নিয়ে একসাথে কাজ করি, আমাদের অধ্যয়ন brilliance-এ পরিপূর্ণ হোক, আমাদের মধ্যে কোনো শত্রুতা না থাকুক। শান্তি বিরাজ করুক।
translations.de: Mögen wir gemeinsam geschützt sein, mögen wir gemeinsam genährt werden, mögen wir mit Energie gemeinsam arbeiten, möge unser Lernen von Brillanz erfüllt sein, möge es keinen Hass unter uns geben. Möge Frieden herrschen.
translations.en-us: May we be protected together, may we be nourished together, may we work together with vigor, may our learning be filled with brilliance, may there be no animosity among us. May peace prevail.
translations.en-gb: May we be protected in unison, may we be nourished together, may we work collaboratively with vigour, may our studies be illuminated with brilliance, may there be no animosity amongst us. May peace prevail.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse-nous être protégés ensemble, puisse-nous être nourris ensemble, puisse-nous travailler ensemble avec énergie, puisse notre étude être remplie de clarté, puisse-t-il n'y avoir aucune animosité parmi nous. Que la paix règne.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹן שֶׁנְּהִי מְוַחֲרִים יַחְדָּ, שֶׁנְּהִי מְפֹרְסָמִים יַחְדָּ, שֶׁנְּעֱבֹד יַחְדָּ בְּאֶנֶרְגְיָה, שֶׁהַלִּמּוּד שֶׁלָּנוּ יִמָּלֵא בְּהִלְהוּת, שֶׁלֹּא תִּהְיֶה בִּינֵינוּ שִׂנְאָה. שָׁלוֹם יָמוּשׁ.
translations.hi: हम सब एक साथ सुरक्षित रहें, हम सब एक साथ पोषित हों, हम सब मिलकर ऊर्जा के साथ कार्य करें, हमारी शिक्षा ज्ञान से परिपूर्ण हो, हम सब के बीच कोई शत्रुता न हो। शांति बनी रहे।
translations.id: Semoga kita terlindungi bersama, semoga kita diberi nutrisi bersama, semoga kita bekerja bersama dengan semangat, semoga studi kita dipenuhi dengan kecerdasan, semoga tidak ada permusuhan di antara kita. Semoga kedamaian selalu ada.
translations.it: Possiamo essere protetti insieme, possiamo essere nutriti insieme, possiamo lavorare insieme con energia, che il nostro studio sia pieno di brillantezza, che non ci sia animosità tra noi. Che la pace prevalga.
translations.ja: 私たちは共に保護されますように、私たちは共に養われますように、私たちは共に活力を持って活動するように、私たちの学習は輝きに満たされますように、私たちの中でいかなる不和もありませんように。平和が訪れますように。
translations.ko: 함께 보호받기를, 함께 영양을 얻기를, 함께 에너지로 협력하기를, 우리의 학문이 빛으로 가득하기를, 우리 사이에 어떠한 적대감도 없기를. 평화가 깃들기를.
translations.nl: Moge wij elkaar beschermen, moge wij elkaar voeden, moge wij met energie samenwerken, moge onze studie vervuld zijn van helderheid, moge er geen vijandigheid onder ons zijn. Moge er vrede heersen.
translations.pl: Niechaj będziemy chronieni razem, niechaj będziemy odżywiani razem, niechaj pracujemy razem z energią, niech nasza nauka będzie wypełniona blaskiem, niech nie będzie między nami żadnej wrogości. Niech zapanuje pokój.
translations.pt-br: Que sejamos protegidos juntos, que sejamos nutridos juntos, que trabalhemos juntos com energia, que nosso estudo seja repleto de brilho, que não haja animosidade entre nós. Que a paz prevaleça.
translations.ru: Давайте будем защищены вместе, давайте будем питаемы вместе, давайте будем работать вместе с энергией, пусть наше обучение будет наполнено сиянием, пусть между нами не будет вражды. Пусть царит мир.
translations.sv: Må vi skyddas tillsammans, må vi näras tillsammans, må vi arbeta tillsammans med energi, må vår studier fyllas med klarhet, må det inte finnas någon fientlighet bland oss. Må frid råda.
translations.th: ขอให้พวกเราได้รับการปกป้องร่วมกัน ขอให้พวกเราได้รับการบำรุงร่วมกัน ขอให้พวกเราทำงานร่วมกันด้วยพลัง ขอให้การศึกษาของเราเต็มเปี่ยมไปด้วยความฉลาด ขอให้ไม่มีความขัดแย้งใดๆ ระหว่างพวกเรา ขอให้มีความสงบสุข
translations.tr: Birlikte korunalım, birlikte beslenelim, birlikte enerjiyle çalışalım, çalışmalarımız parlaklıkla dolsun, aramıza nifak girmesin. Huzur bulunsun.
translations.uk: Хай нас захищає спільний щит, хай нас живить спільна сила, хай ми працюємо разом з енергією, хай наші знання будуть сповнені сяйвом, хай не буде ворожнечі між нами. Хай панує мир.
translations.vi: Xin chúng tôi được bảo vệ cùng nhau, xin chúng tôi được nuôi dưỡng cùng nhau, xin chúng tôi cùng nhau làm việc với sự nhiệt tình, xin việc học tập của chúng tôi tràn đầy trí tuệ, xin không có sự thù địch giữa chúng tôi. Xin có hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我们同舟共济，彼此滋养；愿我们同心协力，充满活力；愿我们的学习充满智慧；愿我们之间没有敌意。 愿世界和平。

mantras.name: May we contemplate the divine effulgence, and may this inspire our comprehension.
mantras.english: May we contemplate the divine effulgence, and may this inspire our comprehension.
mantras.original: May we contemplate the radiance of that god, may this inspire our understanding
mantras.transliteration: `mayāḥ divyaṃ tejaso dhyātuṃ, yatā idaṃ navaṃ prajñāyate.`
mantras.background: Ancient Vedic Gayatri Mantra — spanning Earth, Heaven & beyond — invokes the sun's divine power to illuminate the mind. Repeat it and awaken.
mantras.benefits: The Gayatri Mantra channels solar divine power across earth, sky, and heaven. Repeated contemplation awakens inner comprehension, training the mind toward clarity and illumination — bridging the finite self with infinite cosmic awareness.
mantras.tags: affirmation, contemplative, collective, divine, illumination, wisdom, prayer, peace

translations.es: Que podamos contemplar la luz divina, y que esto inspire nuestra comprensión.
translations.ar: لعلنا نتأمل الإشراق الإلهي، ولعل هذا يلهم فهمنا.
translations.bn: "আমাদের দিব্য জ্যোতির contemplation (ধ্যান) হোক, এবং এই contemplation (ধ্যান) যেন আমাদের বোধগম্যতাকে অনুপ্রাণিত করে।"
translations.de: Mögen wir die göttliche Strahlkraft betrachten, und möge dies unser Verständnis erhellen.
translations.en-us: May we meditate upon the divine light, and may this inspire our understanding.
translations.en-gb: May we reflect upon the divine radiance, and may this inspire our understanding.
translations.fr-fr: Puissions-nous contempler l'effulgence divine, et puisse cela inspirer notre compréhension.
translations.he: יְהִי רָצוֹנֵנוּ לְהִתְבּוֹנֵן בְּהַאֲרָה הַשְּׁמַיִּמִית, וִיְהִי זֶה מַעוֹרֵר אֶת הֲבָנָתֵנוּ.
translations.hi: "हे प्रभु, हम दिव्य प्रकाश पर मनन करें, और यह मनन हमारी समझ को प्रेरित करे।"
translations.id: Semoga kita dapat merenungkan cahaya ilahi, dan semoga ini menginspirasi pemahaman kita.
translations.it: Possiamo contemplare la divina luce, e possa questa ispirare la nostra comprensione.
translations.ja: 我々が神聖な光を瞑想し、それが私たちの理解を深めることを願います。
translations.ko: 저희는 신성한 광채를 묵상하고, 그것이 우리의 이해를 고취하기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Moge wij de goddelijke straling overdenken, en moge dit onze begrip versterken.
translations.pl: Niech my kontemplujemy boską świetlistość, a niech to zainspiruje nasze zrozumienie.
translations.pt-br: Que possamos contemplar a luz divina, e que isso inspire nossa compreensão.
translations.ru: Пусть мы созерцаем божественное сияние, и пусть это вдохновит наше понимание.
translations.sv: Må vi betrakta den gudomliga strålglansen, och må detta inspirera vår förståelse.
translations.th: ขอให้เราใคร่ครวญถึงรัศมีอันศักดิ์สิทธิ์ และขอให้สิ่งนี้เป็นแรงบันดาลใจให้แก่ความเข้าใจของเรา
translations.tr: İlahi ışığı düşünelim ve bunun, anlayışımızı artırmasına izin verelim.
translations.uk: Нехай ми розмірковуємо над божественною сяйво, і нехай це надихне наше розуміння.
translations.vi: Xin chúng tôi được chiêm ngưỡng ánh sáng thiêng liêng, và xin ánh sáng đó truyền cảm hứng cho sự hiểu biết của chúng tôi.
translations.zh-cn: 愿我们沉思神圣的光辉，愿此光辉启迪我们的理解。

mantras.name: May well-being and prosperity protect all beings.
mantras.english: May well-being and prosperity protect all beings.
mantras.original: Svasthi Praja Bhyaha Pari Pala Yantam
mantras.transliteration: Īśvara eva sarvabhūtānāṃ śubham ca, śrīr ca rakṣantu.
mantras.background:
From the Taittiriya Upanishad, this Vedic peace prayer unites teacher & student: "May we be protected, nourished, and study with brilliance — Om, Peace, Peace, Peace."
  Grounding: Source states mantra is from Taittiriya Upanishad, chanted for harmony in learning; literal meaning drawn directly from provided translation.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Shanti Mantra calms the mind, removes obstacles, and fosters harmony between teacher and student. Its triple repetition of "Shanti" addresses peace on internal, environmental, and cosmic levels—unifying all energies through sacred sound.
mantras.tags: shanti, vedic, upanishadic, protection, peace, prosperity, universal, chanting, yoga, harmony, wellbeing

translations.es: "Que el bienestar y la prosperidad protejan a todos los seres."
translations.ar: لِيَجْدُ جميعُ الكائناتِ العافيةَ والرخاءَ.
translations.bn: সব জীবের মঙ্গল ও সমৃদ্ধি রক্ষিত হোক।
translations.de: Wohlsein und Segen beschützen alle Wesen.
translations.en-us: May well-being and prosperity be the protectors of all beings.
translations.en-gb: May well-being and prosperity safeguard all beings.
translations.fr-fr: Puisse le bien-être et la prospérité protéger tous les êtres.
translations.he: יְהִי שְׁלוֹם וּגְדֻלָּה מְגִנִּים עַל כָּל הִיּוֹת.
translations.hi: "सर्व प्राणियों को कल्याण और समृद्धि से रक्षा हो।"
translations.id: Semoga kesejahteraan dan kemakmuran melindungi semua makhluk.
translations.it: "Possano il benessere e la prosperità proteggere tutti gli esseri."
translations.ja: すべての生きとし生けるものに、幸福と繁栄が守られますように。
translations.ko: 모든 존재들이 행복과 번영을 누리도록 보호받기를.
translations.nl: Moge welzijn en voorspoed alle wezens beschermen.
translations.pl: Niech dobrobyt i pomyślność chronią wszystkie istoty.
translations.pt-br: Que o bem-estar e a prosperidade protejam todos os seres.
translations.ru: Да пребудет благополучие и процветание для всех существ.
translations.sv: Må välbefinnande och välstånd skydda alla varelser.
translations.th: ขอให้ความสุขและความเจริญจงปกป้องสรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวง
translations.tr: Tüm varlıkların esenliği ve refahı korunması dileğiyle.
translations.uk: Нехай добробут і процвітання оберігають усі живі істоти.
translations.vi: Xin chúc phúc và sự thịnh vượng bảo vệ tất cả chúng sinh.
translations.zh-cn: 愿所有众生，身心康泰，繁荣昌盛。

mantras.name: May you skillfully and diligently proceed. May you be free from obstacles. May you be praised and respected. May your path be smooth and stable. May you overcome all difficulties. May you find peace and tranquility. May your efforts be fruitful. May you achieve your goals. May your heart be filled with joy and compassion.
mantras.english: May you skillfully and diligently proceed. May you be free from obstacles. May you be praised and respected. May your path be smooth and stable. May you overcome all difficulties. May you find peace and tranquility. May your efforts be fruitful. May you achieve your goals. May your heart be filled with joy and compassion.
mantras.original: のうまく しっちりや ぢびきゃなん たたぎゃたなん あん びらじ びらじ まかしゃきゃら ばじり さたさた さらてい さらてい たらい たらい びだまに さんばんじゃに たらまちしった ぎりやたらん そわか
mantras.transliteration: 巧みに、そして勤勉に進んでください。障害から自由でありますように。称えられ、尊敬されますように。あなたの道が滑らかで安定しますように。すべての困難を克服できますように。平和と静寂を見つけられますように。あなたの努力が実を結びますように。目標を達成できますように。あなたの心が喜びと慈しみで満たされますように。
