mantras.background: From ancient Vedic texts, Om (ॐ) is Hinduism's primordial sound — the vibration underlying all creation, equated with Brahman, the absolute reality itself.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om aligns the practitioner with creation's primordial vibration, calming the nervous system and shifting brainwaves toward deep meditative theta states—a gateway to stillness, unity, and expanded consciousness.
mantras.tags: affirmation, compassion, peace, empowerment, prosperity, success, stability, joy, obstacles

translations.es: Que procedas con habilidad y diligencia. Que estés libre de obstáculos. Que seas elogiado y respetado. Que tu camino sea suave y estable. Que superes todas las dificultades. Que encuentres paz y tranquilidad. Que tus esfuerzos sean fructíferos. Que alcances tus metas. Que tu corazón se llene de alegría y compasión.
translations.ar: تمنّيت لك أن تتقدم بمهارة واجتهاد. أتمنى لك أن تكون خاليًا من العقبات. أتمنى أن تُمدح وتحظى بالاحترام. أتمنى لك طريقًا سلسًا ومستقرًا. أتمنى لك أن تتغلب على جميع الصعوبات. أتمنى لك أن تجد السلام والهدوء. أتمنى أن تكون جهودك مثمرة. أتمنى لك أن تحقق أهدافك. أتمنى أن يمتلئ قلبك بالفرح والرحمة.
translations.bn: আপনি দক্ষতা ও নিষ্ঠার সাথে কাজ করে যান। আপনি যেন কোনো বাধা ছাড়াই পথ চলেন। আপনি যেন প্রশংসা ও সম্মানের পাত্র হন। আপনার পথ যেন মসৃণ ও স্থিতিশীল হয়। আপনি যেন সকল কঠিন পরিস্থিতি অতিক্রম করতে পারেন। আপনি যেন শান্তি ও প্রশান্তি অনুভব করেন। আপনার প্রচেষ্টা যেন সফল হয়। আপনি যেন আপনার লক্ষ্য অর্জন করেন। আপনার হৃদয় যেন আনন্দ ও দয়ায় পরিপূর্ণ থাকে।
translations.de: Mögen Sie mit Geschicklichkeit und Sorgfalt vorgehen. Mögen Sie frei von Hindernissen sein. Mögen Sie gelobt und respektiert werden. Möge Ihr Weg glatt und stabil sein. Mögen Sie alle Schwierigkeiten überwinden. Mögen Sie Frieden und Gelassenheit finden. Mögen Ihre Bemühungen Früchte tragen. Mögen Sie Ihre Ziele erreichen. Möge Ihr Herz mit Freude und Mitgefühl erfüllt sein.
translations.en-us: May you proceed with skill and diligence. May you be free from obstacles. May you receive praise and respect. May your path be smooth and stable. May you overcome all difficulties. May you find peace and tranquility. May your efforts bear fruit. May you achieve your goals. May your heart be filled with joy and compassion.
translations.en-gb: May you proceed with skill and dedication. May you be free from hindrances. May you receive praise and respect. May your path be clear and secure. May you overcome all challenges. May you find serenity and peace. May your endeavours yield positive results. May you accomplish your aspirations. May your heart be filled with happiness and empathy.
translations.fr-fr: Que vous progressiez avec habileté et diligence. Que vous soyez libéré de tout obstacle. Que vous soyez loué et respecté. Que votre chemin soit serein et stable. Que vous surmontiez toutes les difficultés. Que vous trouviez la paix et la tranquillité. Que vos efforts soient couronnés de succès. Que vous atteigniez vos objectifs. Que votre cœur soit rempli de joie et de compassion.
translations.he: יִתָּחֵן לְךָ בְּחוּמָה וּבְנֶאֱמָנוּת. תִּהְיֶה חָפְשִׁי מִמַּכְשׁוֹלִים. יִתְרָם לְךָ וְיִכְבְּדוּ אוֹתָךְ. יִהְיֶה דַרְכְּךָ חֲלִיקָה וִיצִיבָה. תַּעֲבִיר כּל הַקְּשִׁימוּת. תִּמְצָא שָׁלוֹם וְהַנָּאָה. יִהְיוּ מַאֲמַצֶּיךָ מְצֻלָחִים. תַּגְשִׁימִי מְטָרוֹתֶיךָ. תִּמָּלֵא לִבְּךָ בְּשִׂמְחָה וּבְחֶמְלָה.
translations.hi: आप कुशलता और लगन से आगे बढ़ें। आप बाधाओं से मुक्त रहें। आप प्रशंसित और सम्मानित हों। आपका मार्ग सुगम और स्थिर रहे। आप सभी कठिनाइयों पर विजय प्राप्त करें। आपको शांति और संतोष मिले। आपके प्रयास सफल हों। आप अपने लक्ष्यों को प्राप्त करें। आपका हृदय आनंद और करुणा से भर जाए।
translations.id: Semoga Anda berhasil dan berdedikasi dalam setiap langkah. Semoga Anda terhindar dari segala rintangan. Semoga Anda mendapatkan pujian dan penghormatan. Semoga jalan Anda selalu lancar dan stabil. Semoga Anda mampu mengatasi semua kesulitan. Semoga Anda menemukan kedamaian dan ketenangan. Semoga usaha Anda membuahkan hasil. Semoga Anda mencapai tujuan Anda. Semoga hati Anda dipenuhi dengan kebahagiaan dan kasih sayang.
translations.it: Che tu possa procedere con abilità e dedizione. Che tu sia libero da ostacoli. Che tu possa essere lodato e rispettato. Che il tuo cammino sia liscio e stabile. Che tu possa superare tutte le difficoltà. Che tu possa trovare pace e tranquillità. Che i tuoi sforzi siano fecondi. Che tu possa raggiungere i tuoi obiettivi. Che il tuo cuore sia pieno di gioia e compassione.
translations.ja: 巧みに、そして真摯に事を進めてください。障害がありませんように。称賛と尊敬を浴びてください。あなたの道が円滑で安定するように。あらゆる困難を乗り越えてください。平安と静寂を見つけてください。あなたの努力が実を結ぶように。目標を達成できるように。あなたの心が喜びと慈悲で満たされますように。
translations.ko: 전문성과 성실함을 가지고 일을 진행하시길 바랍니다. 어려움 없이 순조롭게 진행되기를 기원합니다. 칭찬과 존경을 받으시기를 바랍니다. 길이 평탄하고 안정되기를 바랍니다. 모든 난관을 극복하시기를 바랍니다. 평화와 안녕을 찾으시기를 바랍니다. 노력하신 결과가 결실을 맺기를 바랍니다. 목표를 이루시기를 바랍니다. 마음이 기쁨과 자비로 가득하시기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Moge u met vaardigheid en toewijding verdergaan. Moge u vrij zijn van obstakels. Moge u geprezen en gerespecteerd worden. Moge uw pad soepel en stabiel zijn. Moge u alle moeilijkheden overwinnen. Moge u vrede en rust vinden. Moge uw inspanningen vruchtbaar zijn. Moge u uw doelen bereiken. Moge uw hart vervuld zijn van vreugde en compassie.
translations.pl: Niechaj Twoje działania będą przemyślane i sumienne. Niech nie spotkają Cię przeszkody. Niech zostaniesz doceniony i szanowany. Niech Twoja droga będzie gładka i stabilna. Niech pokonasz wszystkie trudności. Niech znajdziesz spokój i ukojenie. Niech Twoje wysiłki przyniosą owoce. Niech osiągniesz swoje cele. Niech Twoje serce będzie wypełnione radością i współczuciem.
translations.pt-br: Que você prossiga com habilidade e diligência. Que você esteja livre de obstáculos. Que você seja elogiado e respeitado. Que seu caminho seja tranquilo e estável. Que você supere todas as dificuldades. Que você encontre paz e tranquilidade. Que seus esforços sejam recompensados. Que você alcance seus objetivos. Que seu coração se encha de alegria e compaixão.
translations.ru: Пусть Вы будете действовать умело и усердно. Пусть Вас избегают препятствия. Пусть Вас хвалят и уважают. Пусть Ваш путь будет гладким и стабильным. Пусть Вы преодолеете все трудности. Пусть Вы обретете мир и спокойствие. Пусть Ваши усилия будут плодотворными. Пусть Вы достигнете своих целей. Пусть Ваше сердце будет наполнено радостью и состраданием.
translations.sv: Må du framskrida med skicklighet och flit. Må du vara fri från hinder. Må du bli berömd och respekterad. Må din väg vara smidig och stabil. Må du övervinna alla svårigheter. Må du finna frid och lugn. Må dina ansträngningar bära frukt. Må du uppnå dina mål. Må ditt hjärta fyllas med glädje och medkänsla.
translations.th: ขอให้ท่านดำเนินงานด้วยความชำนาญและตั้งใจ ขอให้ท่านปราศจากอุปสรรค ขอให้ท่านได้รับการยกย่องและเคารพ ขอให้เส้นทางของท่านราบรื่นและมั่นคง ขอให้ท่านก้าวข้ามอุปสรรคทั้งปวง ขอให้ท่านพบกับความสงบและความสุข ขอให้ความพยายามของท่านประสบผลสำเร็จ ขอให้ท่านบรรลุเป้าหมายที่ตั้งไว้ ขอให้จิตใจของท่านเต็มเปี่ยมไปด้วยความสุขและความเมตตา
translations.tr:
İşte çeviri:

"Becerikli ve özveriyle ilerlemenizi dilerim. Engellerden uzak olmanızı umuyorum. Övgü ve saygı görmenizi arzu ediyorum. Yolunuzun düzgün ve istikrarlı olmasını temenni ederim. Tüm zorlukların üstesinden gelmenizi dilerim. Huzur ve sükunet bulmanızı umuyorum. Çabalarınızın karşılığını almanızın dileğiyle. Hedeflerinize ulaşmanızı arzu ediyorum. Kalbinizin sevgi ve şefkatle dolu olmasını temenni ederim."
translations.uk: Бажаю, щоб ви вміло та старанно рухалися вперед. Бажаю, щоб ви були вільні від перешкод. Бажаю, щоб вас хвалили та поважали. Бажаю, щоб ваш шлях був легким і стабільним. Бажаю, щоб ви подолали всі труднощі. Бажаю, щоб ви знайшли спокій і гармонію. Бажаю, щоб ваші зусилля були плідними. Бажаю, щоб ви досягли своїх цілей. Бажаю, щоб ваше серце було наповнене радістю та співчуттям.
translations.vi: Xin chúc bạn luôn làm việc một cách khéo léo và tận tâm. Xin bạn được giải thoát khỏi mọi trở ngại. Xin bạn được mọi người khen ngợi và tôn trọng. Xin con đường phía trước của bạn luôn suôn sẻ và ổn định. Xin bạn vượt qua mọi khó khăn. Xin bạn tìm thấy sự bình an và tĩnh lặng. Xin những nỗ lực của bạn được đền đáp. Xin bạn đạt được mọi mục tiêu. Xin trái tim bạn luôn tràn đầy niềm vui và lòng trắc ẩn.
translations.zh-cn: 愿您精益求精，努力前行。 愿您远离一切障碍。 愿您受到赞誉和尊重。 愿您的道路平坦稳固。 愿您克服所有困难。 愿您获得平静与安宁。 愿您的努力取得丰硕成果。 愿您实现您的目标。 愿您的内心充满喜悦和慈悲。

mantras.name: Meditate upon Om as representing the Self.
mantras.english: Meditate upon Om as representing the Self.
mantras.original: Meditate on Om as the Self
mantras.transliteration: oṃ upāsya-adhigato 'ṃ Brahman.
mantras.background: From the ancient Katha Upanishad: "Meditate on Om as the Self." This primordial Vedic sound bridges finite and infinite — the vibrational root of all existence.
mantras.benefits: Om meditation bridges waking, dreaming & deep sleep states, cultivating direct Self-knowledge. Chanting its A-U-M sounds induces theta brainwaves & vagal stimulation, while Vedanta links it to liberation through pure consciousness.
mantras.tags: vedic, vedanta, upanishadic, brahman, consciousness, self-inquiry, dhyana, liberation, samadhi

translations.es: Medita sobre el sonido Om como una representación del Ser.
translations.ar: تَدَبَّر في "أوم" باعتباره تجسيدًا للذات.
translations.bn: ওঁ-কে নিজের স্বরূপের প্রতীক হিসেবে ধ্যান করুন।
translations.de: Meditiere über das "Om" als eine Repräsentation des Selbst.
translations.en-us: Meditate on the sound "Om" as a representation of the true Self.
translations.en-gb: Meditate on the sound 'Om' as a symbol of the Self.
translations.fr-fr: Méditez sur le son "Om" en le considérant comme une représentation du Soi.
translations.he: התמַהְמָה על "אום" כייצוג של העצמי.
translations.hi: ॐ को आत्मा का प्रतिनिधित्व करने वाले रूप में ध्यानावलोक करें।
translations.id: Meditasi-lah tentang "Om" sebagai representasi dari Diri.
translations.it: Meditate sull'Om, considerandolo come rappresentazione del Sé.
translations.ja: オームを、自己を象徴するものとして瞑想してください。
translations.ko: 옴(Om)을 자아(Self)를 상징하는 것으로 명상하십시오.
translations.nl: Mediteer op Om, als een representatie van het Zelf.
translations.pl: Medytuj nad Om, rozważając je jako reprezentację Atmana (Jaźni).
translations.pt-br: Medite sobre o "Om" como representação do Ser.
translations.ru: Сосредоточьтесь на Оме, представляя его как символ Атмана.
translations.sv: Meditera över Om som en representation av Självet.
translations.th: ทำสมาธิ โดยนึกถึง "Om" ว่าเป็นตัวแทนของ "อัตตา" (Ātman).
translations.tr: Om'u, Benliğin temsilcisi olarak düşünerek meditasyon yapın.
translations.uk: Медитуйте, представляючи Ом як символ Атмана.
translations.vi: Hãy thiền định về "Om" như một biểu tượng của Bản Thật.
translations.zh-cn: 冥想“Om”这个音节，将其视为代表着真我。

mantras.name: Not this, not this.
mantras.english: Not this, not this.
mantras.transliteration: nā idam, nā idam.
mantras.background: "Neti Neti" — Sanskrit for "Not this, not this" — a Vedic inquiry mantra inviting the seeker to transcend all definitions of self. A sacred tool for the mind.
mantras.benefits: "Not this, not this" invites a meditative release of all that you are not. Through rhythmic repetition, sources suggest mantras build spiritual energy and counter powerlessness — freeing you to discover your unique, beautiful self.
mantras.tags: not this, empowerment, hindu, chanting, vibration, affirmation, devotion, mantra, meditation, liberation, sanskrit, healing

translations.es: No esto, no esto.
translations.ar: ليس هذا، ليس هذا.
translations.bn: এটা নয়, এটা নয়।
translations.de: Nicht dies, nicht dies.
translations.en-us: Neither this, nor this.
translations.en-gb: Not this, not this.
translations.fr-fr: Ne ceci, ne cela.
translations.he: לא זה, לא זה.
translations.hi: यह नहीं, यह नहीं।
translations.id: Bukan ini, bukan ini.
translations.it: Non questo, non questo.
translations.ja: これは違う、これも違う。
translations.ko: 이것이 아니다, 이것도 아니다.
translations.nl: Niet dit, niet dit.
translations.pl: Nie to, nie to.
translations.pt-br: Não isto, não isto.
translations.ru: Не это, не это.
translations.sv: Inte detta, inte detta.
translations.th: ไม่สิ่งนี้ ไม่สิ่งนี้
translations.tr: Bu değil, bu da değil.
translations.uk: Не це, не це.
translations.vi: Không đây, không đây.
translations.zh-cn: 这不是，那也不是。

mantras.name: O Gobinda, O Gobinda, O Hari, O Hari.
mantras.english: O Gobinda, O Gobinda, O Hari, O Hari.
mantras.transliteration: o gobinda, o gobinda, o hari, o hari.
mantras.background: The phrase calls on "Gobinda" and "Hari," two divine names, through heartfelt repetition — hinting at a devotional calling tradition that invites the reader to explore further.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Gobinda and Hari—Krishna's names—cultivates bhakti (devotion), traditionally said to dissolve anxiety and ego. Vaishnava nama-kirtan is held to purify the mind and awaken heartfelt love for the divine.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, devotional, vaishnava, bhakti, invocation, repetition, praise

translations.es: Oh, Govinda, oh, Govinda, oh, Hari, oh, Hari.
translations.ar: يا غوبيندا، يا غوبيندا، يا هاري، يا هاري.
translations.bn: ও गोविन्दा, ও गोविन्दा, ও হরি, ও হরি।
translations.de: Oh, Govinda, oh, Govinda, oh, Hari, oh, Hari.
translations.en-us: O Govinda, O Govinda, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.en-gb: O Govinda, O Govinda, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Govinda, ô Govinda, ô Hari, ô Hari.
translations.he: הוֹ גוֹבינְדָה, הוֹ גוֹבינְדָה, הוֹ הַרִי, הוֹ הַרִי.
translations.hi: हे गोविन्द, हे गोविन्द, हे हरि, हे हरि।
translations.id: Ya Gobinda, Ya Gobinda, Ya Hari, Ya Hari.
translations.it: O Govinda, O Govinda, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.ja: オ・ゴビンダー、オ・ゴビンダー、オ・ハリー、オ・ハリー。 (O Gobindā, O Gobindā, O Hari, O Hari.)
translations.ko: 오 고빈다, 오 고빈다, 오 하리, 오 하리. (O Gobinda, O Gobinda, O Hari, O Hari.)
translations.nl: O Gobinda, O Gobinda, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.pl: O Gobindo, O Gobindo, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.pt-br: Ó Govinda, Ó Govinda, Ó Hari, Ó Hari.
translations.ru: О Гобинда, О Гобинда, О Хари, О Хари.
translations.sv: O Govinda, O Govinda, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.th: โอ โกบินทา, โอ โกบินทา, โอ หริ, โอ หริ.
translations.tr: Ey Govinda, Ey Govinda, Ey Hari, Ey Hari.
translations.uk: О, Говінда, О, Говінда, О, Харі, О, Харі.
translations.vi: ồ Govinda, ồ Govinda, ồ Hari, ồ Hari.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，戈宾达，噢，戈宾达，噢，哈里，噢，哈里。 (Ō, Gēbǐndá, ō, Gēbǐndá, ō, Hālǐ, ō, Hālǐ.)

mantras.name: O Goddess Saraswati, of immense power, with eyes like the lotus of knowledge, who embodies the universe, with your expansive gaze, please bestow knowledge upon me. Salutations to you.
mantras.english: O Goddess Saraswati, of immense power, with eyes like the lotus of knowledge, who embodies the universe, with your expansive gaze, please bestow knowledge upon me. Salutations to you.
mantras.original: সরস্বতী মহাভাগে বিদ্যে কমললোচনে।বিশ্বরূপে বিশালাক্ষি বিদ্যাংদেহি নমোহস্তুতে।
mantras.transliteration: ō devī sarasvatī, mahimātmikī, padmākṣī, jagat-mūrtir, tvat-prasādāt, jñānaṁ dehi me. namo namaste.
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, this Saraswati Pranam Mantra salutes the lotus-eyed goddess of all knowledge, asking her vast gaze to illuminate the devotee's mind with wisdom.
mantras.benefits: Reciting this Saraswati mantra is believed to purify the mind, sharpen memory, and cultivate inner stillness — transforming study into sacred devotion and awakening the light of wisdom within.
mantras.tags: hindu, saraswati, mantra, prayer, knowledge, focus, devotion, education, wisdom, india, ritual, scholastic

translations.es: Oh, Diosa Saraswati, de inmenso poder, con ojos como el loto del conocimiento, que encarnas el universo, con tu mirada expansiva, por favor, concédeme el conocimiento. Saludos a ti.
translations.ar: يا إلهيّة ساراسواتي، ذات القوة العظيمة، بعينين كزهرة اللوتس المعرفة، التي تجسد الكون، بنظرتك الواسعة، من فضلك امنحني العلم. سلام عليكِ.
translations.bn: ও দেবী सरस्वती, অসীম শক্তিসম্পন্ন, জ্ঞান-পুষ্পের মতো নয়নযুক্ত, যিনি মহাবিশ্বকে ধারণ করেন, আপনার বিস্তৃত দৃষ্টির মাধ্যমে, দয়া করে আমাকে জ্ঞান দিন। আপনার প্রতি প্রণাম।
translations.de: Göttin Saraswati, von unermesslicher Macht, mit Augen wie der Lotus des Wissens, die das Universum verkörpert, erwecke mit deinem weiten Blick in mir Erkenntnis. Sei gegrüßt.
translations.en-us: O Goddess Saraswati, possessing immense power, with eyes like the lotus of wisdom, who embodies the entire universe, please grant me knowledge with your all-encompassing vision. Salutations to you.
translations.en-gb: O Goddess Saraswati, of immense power, with eyes likened to the lotus of knowledge, who embodies the entirety of the universe, with your all-encompassing vision, please grant me knowledge. I offer my salutations to you.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Déesse Sarasvati, d'une puissance immense, dont les yeux sont comparés aux lotus de la connaissance, qui incarnez l'univers, par votre regard bienveillant, daignez m'accorder la connaissance. Salutations à vous.
translations.he: הוֹ, אלת סראסווטי, בעלת כוח עצום, עם עיניים דמויות לוטוס הידע, המגלמת את היקום כולו, במבטך הנדיב, אנא הטביעי בי ידיעה. ברכות לך.
translations.hi: हे देवी सरस्वती, जिसकी शक्ति असीम है, जिसकी आँखें ज्ञान के कमल के समान हैं, जो ब्रह्मांड का प्रतिनिधित्व करती हैं, अपनी व्यापक दृष्टि से, कृपया मुझ पर ज्ञान की वर्षा करें। आपको प्रणाम।
translations.id: Ya Devi Saraswati, yang memiliki kekuatan tak terhingga, dengan mata yang bagaikan bunga teratai kebijaksanaan, yang mewujudkan seluruh alam semesta, dengan pandanganmu yang luas, mohon anugerahkanlah pengetahuan kepadaku. Salam hormat untukmu.
translations.it: O Dea Sarasvati, di immensa potenza, con occhi simili al loto della conoscenza, che incarni l'universo, con il tuo sguardo ampio, per favore, concedimi la conoscenza. Saluti a te.
translations.ja: おお、力強い女神サラスワティよ。知識の蓮のような瞳を持つ方。宇宙を体現する方。あなたの広大な視線で、私に知識を授けてください。合掌いたします。
translations.ko: 옴, 위대한 힘을 지니신 사라스와티 여신이시여, 지혜의 연꽃과 같은 눈을 가지신 분이시며, 우주를 구현하신 분이시여, 당신의 숭고한 시선으로 저에게 지혜를 베풀어 주소서. 당신께 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: O Godin Saraswati, van immense macht, met ogen als de lotus van kennis, die de kosmos belichaamt, met uw allesomvattende blik, verleen mij kennis. Ik groet U.
translations.pl: O Boginiie Saraswati, o ogromnej mocy, o oczach jak lotos wiedzy, która uosabia wszechświat, Twoim szerokim spojrzeniem, obdarz mnie wiedzą. Pozdrawiam Cię.
translations.pt-br: Ó, Deusa Saraswati, de poder imenso, com olhos como a flor de lótus do conhecimento, que personifica o universo, com seu olhar abrangente, por favor, conceda-me conhecimento. Saudações a Vós.
translations.ru: О, Богиня Сарасвати, обладающая огромной силой, с глазами, подобными лотосу знания, воплощающая Вселенную, своим всеобъемлющим взглядом, ниспошли мне знание. Преклоняюсь перед Тобой.
translations.sv: O, gudinna Saraswati, av enorm makt, med ögon som lotusblomman av kunskap, som förkroppsligar universum, med din vidsträckta blick, be dig att skänka mig kunskap. Hälsningar till dig.
translations.th: ขอพระแม่สรัสวตี ผู้มีฤทธิ์อันยิ่งใหญ่, ผู้มีดวงตาประดุจดอกบัวแห่งปัญญา, ผู้ซึ่งเป็นตัวแทนแห่งจักรวาล, ด้วยพระเนตรอันกว้างไกล, ขอประทานปัญญาแก่ข้าพเจ้า. ข้าพเจ้าขอคารวะแด่พระองค์.
translations.tr: Ey tanrıça Saraswati, muazzam güce sahip olan, bilginin nilüferine benzeyen gözlere sahip, evreni somutlaştıran, engin bakışınla, lütfen bana bilgi bahşet. Sana saygılarımı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: О Богине Сарсваті, володарко величезної сили, з очима, подібними до лотоса знання, яка є втіленням Всесвіту, Твоїм всеосяжним поглядом, будь ласка, даруй мені знання. Вітаю Тебе.
translations.vi: ôi, Nữ thần Saraswati, người có sức mạnh vô cùng, với đôi mắt như đóa hoa sen của tri thức, người hiện thân của vũ trụ, xin hãy ban cho con trí tuệ bằng ánh nhìn bao la của Người. Kính chào Người.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，莎拉士瓦蒂女神，你拥有无与伦比的强大力量，你的眼睛如同智慧之莲，你所化身就是整个宇宙，请用你广阔的目光，赐予我智慧。我向你致敬。

mantras.name: O Goddess, who dwells in all beings...
mantras.english: O Goddess, who dwells in all beings...
mantras.transliteration: ō devī, yā sarvāṇi bhūtāni vāsatī...
mantras.background: From Devi Mahatmya, "Ya Devi Sarva Bhuteshu" salutes the Goddess dwelling in all beings as Shakti, wisdom, and mother — a living Shakta tradition of devotion.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Ya Devi Sarva Bhuteshu" awakens recognition of the Divine in all beings, cultivating deep compassion and self-confidence. Practitioners report inner peace, renewed energy, and spiritual clarity — a living doorway into Devi devotion.
mantras.tags: hindu, goddess, devi, shakti, devotional, stotra, mahatmya, wisdom, empower, energy, peace

translations.es: Oh, Diosa, que reside en todos los seres...
translations.ar: يا إلهة، الساكنة في جميع الكائنات...
translations.bn: ওহে দেবী, যিনি সকল প্রাণীর মধ্যে বিরাজ করেন...
translations.de: Oh Göttin, die in allen Wesen wohnt...
translations.en-us: O Goddess, who resides within all beings...
translations.en-gb: O Goddess, who resides within all beings...
translations.fr-fr: Ô Déesse, qui résides en tous les êtres...
translations.he: ה'אלָה, השוכנת בכל היצורים...
translations.hi: हे देवी, जो सभी प्राणियों में निवास करती हैं...
translations.id: Wahai Dewi, yang bersemayam di dalam semua makhluk...
translations.it: O Dea, che dimori in tutti gli esseri...
translations.ja: オー、万物に宿る女神よ。 (Ō, manabu mono ni sumaru deokami yo.)
translations.ko: 오 여신이시여, 모든 존재 안에 거하시는 분이시여... (O Yeosin-isyeo, modeun jonjae ane geosihaseun bun-isyeo...)
translations.nl: O Godin, die in alle wezens woont...
translations.pl: O Bogini, która mieszka we wszystkich istotach...
translations.pt-br: Ó Deusa, que reside em todos os seres...
translations.ru: О Богиня, обитающая во всех существах...
translations.sv: O gudinne, som bor i alla varelser...
translations.th: โอ, องค์พระแม่, ผู้ซึ่งสถิตอยู่ในสรรพสิ่ง...
translations.tr: Ey Tanrıça, her canlıda bulunan...
translations.uk: О Богині, яка мешкає в усіх істотах...
translations.vi: Nữ thần tôn kính, ngự trong mọi sinh vật...
translations.zh-cn: 噢，女神，你居住在一切众生之中...

mantras.name: O Goddess, who is the embodiment of all auspiciousness and the fulfiller of all desires, O refuge, O three-eyed Gauri, O Narayani, salutations to you.
mantras.english: O Goddess, who is the embodiment of all auspiciousness and the fulfiller of all desires, O refuge, O three-eyed Gauri, O Narayani, salutations to you.
mantras.original: Sarva Mangal Mangalye Shive Sarvartha Saadhike, Sharanye Tryambake Gouri Narayani Namostute
mantras.transliteration: ō devī, yā sarvasya śubhasya mūrtiḥ, sarvābhīṣṭapūrtī, ō saraṇa, ō tri-lokanāyakī gaūrī, ō narayānī, namoऽstu te.
mantras.background: A Sanskrit Hindu mantra saluting Narayani—three-eyed Gauri—as fulfiller of desires and divine refuge, channeling devotion through sacred, spiritually potent words.
mantras.benefits: Devoted chanting of this Narayani mantra is traditionally linked to auspiciousness, inner refuge, and fulfillment of desires — fostering deep devotion and concentrated meditation, as the sources affirm mantras powerfully affect the brain and spirit.
mantras.tags: hindu, goddess, gauri, narayani, devotion, prayer, auspiciousness, desire-fulfillment, protection, sanskrit, salutation

translations.es: Oh, Diosa, que eres la encarnación de toda la prosperidad y la cumplidora de todos los deseos, oh refugio, oh Gauri de los tres ojos, oh Narayani, te saludo.
translations.ar: يا إلهة، يا تجسيد لكل الخير والبركة، ويا مُحققَة لكل الأمنيات، يا ملجأ، يا غوري ذات العيون الثلاث، يا ناراياني، سلامٌ عليكِ.
translations.bn: ওহে দেবী, যিনি সকল শুভ্রতার воплощение এবং সকল ইচ্ছার পূর্ণতা প্রদানকারী, ওহে আশ্রয়, ওহে তিন-চোখের গৌরী, ওহে নারায়ণী, তোমাকে প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Göttin, die die Verkörperung aller Segnungen und die Erfüllerin aller Wünsche ist, du Zuflucht, du dreiaugige Gauri, du Narayani, ich verneige mich vor dir.
translations.en-us: O Goddess, who embodies all auspiciousness and fulfills all desires, O refuge, O three-eyed Gauri, O Narayani, I offer my salutations to you.
translations.en-gb: O Goddess, who embodies all that is fortunate and grants the fulfilment of all desires, O refuge, O three-eyed Gauri, O Narayani, salutations to you.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Déesse, qui êtes l'incarnation de toute la prospérité et le comblement de tous les désirs, ô refuge, ô Gauri aux trois yeux, ô Narayani, salutations à vous.
translations.he: הנה אלת, המגלמת את כל הטוב והברכה, ומקיימת את כל המשאלות, את, המקלט, או גאורי, בעלת שלושת העיניים, או נראיאני, ברכות לך.
translations.hi: हे देवी, जो सभी शुभ लक्षणों का मूर्त रूप हैं और सभी इच्छाओं की पूर्ति करती हैं, हे शरण, हे तीन नेत्रों वाली गौरी, हे नारायणी, आपको प्रणाम।
translations.id: Wahai Dewi, yang merupakan perwujudan dari segala kebaikan dan pemenuhan segala keinginan, Wahai tempat berlindung, Wahai Gauri bertiga mata, Wahai Narayani, hormat kami kepada-Mu.
translations.it: O Dea, che sei l'incarnazione di ogni benevolenza e la dispensatrice di ogni desiderio, o rifugio, o Gauri dagli occhi a tre, o Narayani, ti porgo i miei omaggi.
translations.ja: オ、女神よ、すべての吉祥の象徴であり、すべての願いを叶える方、我らの心のよりどころ、三眼のガウリよ、ナラヤニよ、あなたに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 오, 모든 길조의 화신이자 모든 소망을 이루어주시는 여신이시여, 오, 피난처이시며, 세 개의 눈을 가진 가우리시여, 오, 나라야니시여, 당신께 경배를 드립니다.
translations.nl: O Godin, die de belichaming is van alle voorspoed en de vervuller van alle verlangens, o toevlucht, o driogen Gauri, o Narayani, ik groet u.
translations.pl: O Bogini, która jest uosobieniem wszelkiej dobroci i spełnieniem wszystkich pragnień, oś O, Tyś, schronienie, o trójokiej Gauri, o Narayani, pozdrowienia dla Ciebie.
translations.pt-br: Ó Deusa, que és a personificação de toda a prosperidade e a realizadora de todos os desejos, ó refúgio, ó Gauri de três olhos, ó Narayani, saudações a ti.
translations.ru: О Богиня, воплощение всякой благодати и исполнительница всех желаний, о Прибежище, о трехглазая Гаури, о Нараяни, приветствия Тебе.
translations.sv: O Gudsöm, som är förkroppsligandet av all lycka och uppfyllandet av alla önskningar, o tillflykt, o Gauri med de tre ögonen, o Narayani, jag hälsar dig.
translations.th: ภัควดี, ผู้ซึ่งเป็นศูนย์รวมของความสวัสดีทั้งปวง และผู้ซึ่งสนองความปรารถนาทั้งมวล, พระแม่ผู้เป็นที่พึ่ง, พระแม่กาลีผู้มีสามดวงตา, พระแม่นารายณี, ข้าขอสักการะพระองค์
translations.tr: Ey Tanrıça, tüm iyiliklerin ve tüm arzuların gerçekleşmesinin vücut bulduğu, ey sığınak, ey üç gözlü Gauri, ey Narayani, sana saygılar.
translations.uk: О Богине, яка є втіленням усього благословення та здійснення всіх бажань, о Притулку, о Триглаза Гаурі, о Нараяні, шанування Тобі.
translations.vi: ôi, Nữ thần, người là hiện thân của mọi điều may mắn và là người thực hiện mọi ước nguyện, ôi là chốn nương tựa, ôi Gauri ba mắt, ôi Narayani, con kính chào Người.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，女神，您是所有吉祥的化身，是所有愿望的实现者，您是我们的庇护，是三目女神高丽（Gauri），是纳拉亚尼（Narayani），向您致敬。

mantras.name: O Goddess, who resides in the ocean and whose breasts are adorned like mountains, consort of Lord Vishnu, I bow to you. Please forgive me for touching your feet.
mantras.english: O Goddess, who resides in the ocean and whose breasts are adorned like mountains, consort of Lord Vishnu, I bow to you. Please forgive me for touching your feet.
mantras.original: Samudravasane Devi Parvatastanamandite, Vishnupatni Namastubhyam Padasparsham Kshamasva Me.
mantras.transliteration: ō devī, yā samudre niṣṭhā, yāsin udarāṃ pariśrāṇiṃ śailānāṃ yathā, viṣṇu-patiḥ saṁjñā, aham tūm namāmi. kṛpayā, mama pādu-sparśe kṣamā kara.
mantras.background: A Hindu morning mantra invoking Lakshmi, Vishnu's consort, asking forgiveness for touching her sacred form—the earth—blending devotion with daily awakening.
mantras.benefits: This mantra cultivates humility and gratitude, inviting prosperity and inner clarity. Practiced at dawn during Brahma Muhurta, it aligns mind with divine energy, fostering emotional balance and spiritual surrender to the divine.
mantras.tags: hindu, goddess, devotion, forgiveness, lakshmi, vishnu, gratitude, morning, mantra, purification, blessing, worship

translations.es: Oh, diosa que reside en el océano y cuyos senos son como montañas, consorte del Señor Vishnu, yo me inclino ante ti. Por favor, perdóname por haberte tocado los pies.
translations.ar: يا إلهة، المقيمة في المحيط وصدركِ مُزين كالجبال، زوجة الرب فيشنو، أتضرع إليكِ. أرجوكِ أن تسامحيني لمس قدميكِ.
translations.bn: ওহে দেবী, যিনি সমুদ্রের গভীরে বাস করেন এবং যার স্তন পর্বতশৃঙ্গের মতো, বিষ্ণুর সহধর্মিণী, আমি Вас प्रणाम। আমার Вам পায়ের কাছে স্পর্শ করার জন্য Вас ক্ষমা করুন।
translations.de: Göttin, die im Ozean wohnt und deren Brüste wie Berge geschmückt sind, Gemahlin des Herrn Vishnu, ich verneige mich vor dir. Bitte vergib mir, dass ich deine Füße berührt habe.
translations.en-us: O Goddess, who dwells in the ocean and whose breasts are shaped like mountains, consort of Lord Vishnu, I offer my salutations to you. Please forgive me for touching your feet.
translations.en-gb: O Goddess, who dwells within the ocean and whose breasts are shaped like mountains, consort of Lord Vishnu, I offer my reverence to you. Please forgive me for the act of touching your feet.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Déesse, qui résides dans l'océan et dont la poitrine est ornée comme des montagnes, épouse du Seigneur Vishnu, je vous salue. Veuillez me pardonner d'avoir touché vos pieds.
translations.he: הנה, את, אלת הים, שחזהייך מעוטרים כהרים, אשתו של אדון וישנו, אני משתחווה לך. אנא, סלחי לי על נגיעה ברגליך.
translations.hi: हे देवी, जो समुद्र में निवास करती हैं और जिनकी छाती पर्वत जैसी सुशोभित है, भगवान विष्णु की consort, मैं आपको प्रणाम करता हूँ। कृपया मुझे आपके चरणों को स्पर्श करने के लिए क्षमा करें।
translations.id: Ya Devi, yang berdiam di lautan dan yang dadanya berhiaskan bagaikan gunung, pasangan dari Dewa Vishnu, saya menyembah Anda. Mohon maafkan saya karena menyentuh kaki Anda.
translations.it: O Dea, che risiedi nell'oceano e i cui seni sono adornati come montagne, consorte del Signore Vishnu, io mi inchino a te. Ti prego di perdonarmi per aver toccato i tuoi piedi.
translations.ja: 海上に御座り、その胸が山のように美しい、ヴィシュヌ神の配偶者である女神よ。私はあなたに敬意を払い、あなたの足に触れてしまったことをお許しください。
translations.ko: 바다에 거주하시고, 가슴이 산처럼 아름다운 여신이시며, 비슈누 신의 배우자이신 당신께, 저는 경배합니다. 제 발에 닿은 것을 용서해 주십시오.
translations.nl: O Godin, die in de oceaan woont en wier borsten lijken op bergen, echtgenote van Heer Vishnu, ik buig voor U. Vergeef mij alstublieft dat ik uw voeten aanraak.
translations.pl: O Bogini, która mieszka w oceanie i której piersi są piękne jak góry, małżonka Pana Vishnu, ja się kłaniam. Proszę, przebacz mi dotknięcie Twoich stóp.
translations.pt-br: Ó Deusa, que reside no oceano e cujos seios são adornados como montanhas, consorte do Senhor Vishnu, eu me prostro diante de você. Por favor, perdoe-me por tocar em seus pés.
translations.ru: О, Богиня, обитающая в океане, чья грудь украшена подобно горам, супруга Господа Вишну, я склоняюсь перед Вами. Простите меня за то, что коснулся Ваших стоп.
translations.sv: O gudinne, som bor i havet och vars bröst pryds som berg, maka till Lord Vishnu, jag bugar mig för dig. Vänligen förlåt mig för att jag berört dina fötter.
translations.th: ข้าขอสาธุการแด่พระแม่, ผู้ทรงสถิตในมหาสมุทร, พระองค์ผู้มีพระอภาคสง่างามดุจภูเขา, พระชายาของพระวิษณุ, ข้าขอประนมก้มลงบูชา และขออภัยที่ได้สัมผัสพระบาทของพระองค์
translations.tr: Ey okyanuslarda yatan, göğüsleri dağlar gibi olan, Vishnu'nun eşi, sana saygı duyuyorum. Lütfen ayaklarına dokunduğum için beni affet.
translations.uk: О Богине, що мешкаєш в океані, чиї груди вкриті, як гори, супутнице Господа Вішну, я вклоняюся тобі. Пробач мені, будь ласка, за те, що торкнувся твоїх ніг.
translations.vi: ôi, Nữ thần, ngự trị trong đại dương, với vòng ngực vinh dự như những ngọn núi, là người bạn đời của Chúa Vishnu, con cúi đầu trước Người. Xin hãy tha thứ cho con vì đã chạm vào chân Người.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，女神，您居住在海洋中，胸部如山峦般丰腴，是毗湿奴的配偶，我向您致敬。请原谅我亲吻您的脚。

mantras.name: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare, O Rama, O Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare.
mantras.english: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare, O Rama, O Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare.
mantras.original: Hhare Krishna, Hhare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hhare Hare, Hhare Rama, Hhare Rama, Rama Rama, Hhare Hare
mantras.transliteration: ō kr̥ṣṇā, ō kr̥ṣṇā, kr̥ṣṇa kr̥ṣṇa, hare hare, ō rāma, ō rāma, rāma rāma, hare hare.
mantras.background:
The Maha Mantra—"Hare Krishna, Hare Rama"—rooted in ancient Vedic texts, invokes divine names to liberate souls from materialism and awaken inner spiritual ecstasy.
  Grounding: Source names it "Μάχα Μάντρα" = "great mantra," a polysyllabic mantra invoking deities, with power to free beings from materialistic tendencies and grant spiritual bliss.
mantras.benefits: The Maha Mantra ("Great Mantra") is said to liberate living beings from materialistic tendencies and grant inner ecstasy of spiritual life—a rare dual promise of freedom and bliss through rhythmic, repeated chanting.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, rama, vedic, devotional, chanting, bhakti, liberation, ecstasy, divine

mantras.name: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna Krishna, O Hare, O Hare, O Rama, O Rama, Rama Rama, O Hare.
mantras.english: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna Krishna, O Hare, O Hare, O Rama, O Rama, Rama Rama, O Hare.
mantras.original: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare, Hare Rama, Hare Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Rama
mantras.transliteration: oṃ kṛṣṇa, oṃ kṛṣṇa, kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa, oṃ hare, oṃ hare, oṃ rāma, oṃ rāma, rāma rāma, oṃ hare.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic texts (3000+ years), the Hare Krishna maha mantra means "Give me divine will." Chanting it connects you to Krishna's divine energy—a timeless call across centuries.
mantras.benefits: The Hare Krishna mantra invokes divine will ("dá-me a vontade divina"), connecting practitioners to Krishna and Rama energies. Chanting elevates consciousness beyond space/time, reduces anxiety, and boosts serotonin—uniting ancient Vedic wisdom with modern well-being.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, krishna, rama, yoga, devotional, chanting, concentration, peace, divine-will, consciousness

mantras.name: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna, Krishna, O Hare, O Hare.
mantras.english: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna, Krishna, O Hare, O Hare.
mantras.original: Hare Krishna Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna Hare Hare
mantras.transliteration: ᵒ ಞṛṣṇᵃ, ᵒ ಞṛṣṇᵃ, ಞṛṣṇᵃ, ಞṛṣṇᵃ, ᵒ ಞ Hare, ᵒ ಞ Hare.
mantras.background:
The Hare Krishna Maha Mantra, from Sanskrit Vaishnava tradition, calls to Krishna (Supreme God) and Hare (divine energy). Rooted in the Kalishantarana Upanishad, it purifies consciousness toward eternal bliss.
  Grounding: Sources cite Kalishantarana Upanishad as origin, describe Krishna as "suprema personalidad de Dios," and link chanting to "sat cit ananda"—eternality, knowledge, bliss.
mantras.benefits: The Hare Krishna Maha Mantra connects practitioners with Krishna, seeking divine protection and blessings. Its vibrations gradually purify the mind, restoring consciousness to sat-cit-ananda—eternal bliss and knowledge.
mantras.tags: krishna, hare, vaishnava, bhakti, japa, devotional, purification, protection, transcendental, liberation

mantras.english: O Krishna, O Krishna, Krishna, Krishna, O Hare, O Hare; O Rama, O Rama, Rama, Rama, O Hare, O Hare.

mantras.background:
A Sanskrit Hindu mantra from ISKCON/Hare Krishna tradition, chanting the names of Krishna & Rama for soul purification — a living practice uniting devotees worldwide across millennia.
  Grounding: Source states ISKCON followers recite it as sadhana; chanting Krishna/Rama names purifies the soul from material contamination per the Dutch mantra text.
mantras.benefits: Chanting the Hare Krishna mantra is said to purify the soul from material contamination and serves as a key sadhana (spiritual practice) in ISKCON. Its rhythmic repetition supports inner peace, mental focus, and devotional connection to the divine.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, rama, devotional, iskcon, sadhana, chant, invocation, repetition

mantras.name: O Krishna, O Krishna, destroy the cycle of birth and death.
mantras.english: O Krishna, O Krishna, destroy the cycle of birth and death.
mantras.transliteration: ō kr̥ṣṇa, ō kr̥ṣṇa, khānḍe janm mṛtyu ke chakra.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic India, this Hindu devotional mantra calls upon Krishna—a beloved deity—seeking liberation (moksha) from samsara, the cycle of rebirth, through sacred sound vibration.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Krishna to dissolve samsara, this mantra channels Bhakti devotion and one-pointed focus (dharana). Repetition (japa) is said to awaken prana, shift consciousness, and guide the mind from illusion toward liberation (moksha).
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, devotional, bhakti, liberation, moksha, divine, empower

translations.tr: Ey Krishna, Ey Krishna, doğum ve ölüm döngüsünü yok et.
translations.uk: О Кришно, О Кришно, зруйнуй коло смерті та переродження.
translations.vi: ôi Krishna, ôi Krishna, hãy phá vỡ vòng luẩn quẩn của sinh tử.
translations.zh-cn: 哦，奎师那，哦，奎师那，打破轮回之苦。

mantras.name: O Krishna, O Krishna, speak, my dear friend.
mantras.english: O Krishna, O Krishna, speak, my dear friend.
mantras.original: Hare Krishna Hare Krishna Bol Sajani
mantras.transliteration: ō kṛṣṇa, ō kṛṣṇa, bol, mere pyāre dost.
mantras.background: From Hindu devotional tradition, this joyful chant praises Krishna as Govinda (giver of pleasure) and Gopala (protector of cows), celebrating his divine love with Radha.
mantras.benefits: Calling upon Krishna as a dear friend cultivates intimacy with the divine, nurturing devotion, inner joy, and emotional surrender. Regular chanting deepens spiritual connection and promotes well-being, drawing the heart toward love and liberation.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, radha, devotional, vedic, prayer, chanting, liberation, grace, blessing, love

translations.es: Oh Krishna, oh Krishna, habla, mi querido amigo.
translations.ar: يا كريشنا، يا كريشنا، تكلم، يا صديقي العزيز.
translations.bn: ও কৃষ্ণ, ও কৃষ্ণ, কথা বলো, প্রিয় বন্ধু।
translations.de: O Krishna, o Krishna, sprich, mein lieber Freund.
translations.en-us: O Krishna, O Krishna, speak, my dear friend.
translations.en-gb: O Krishna, O Krishna, speak, my dear friend.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Krishna, ô Krishna, parle, mon cher ami.
translations.he: הו, קרישנה, הו, קרישנה, דבר, ידידי היקר.
translations.hi: हे कृष्ण, हे कृष्ण, कहो कुछ, मेरे प्रिय मित्र।
translations.id: Wahai Krishna, wahai Krishna, berbicaralah, sahabatku tersayang.
translations.it: O Krishna, O Krishna, parla, caro amico.
translations.ja: オ・クリシュナ、オ・クリシュナ、話してほしい、親愛なる友よ。
translations.ko: 오 크리슈나, 오 크리슈나, 말씀해 주세요, 나의 친구여.
translations.nl: O Krishna, o Krishna, spreek, mijn lieve vriend.
translations.pl: O Kryśno, O Kryśno, mów, mój drogi przyjacielu.
translations.pt-br: Ó Krishna, Ó Krishna, fale, meu querido amigo.
translations.ru: О Кришна, о Кришна, заговори, мой дорогой друг.
translations.sv: O Krishna, O Krishna, tala, min kära vän.
translations.th: โอ กฤษณะ, โอ กฤษณะ, โปรดตรัส, เพื่อนรักของฉัน
translations.tr: Ey Krishna, ey Krishna, konuş, sevgili dostum.
translations.uk: О Кришно, О Кришно, говори, мій дорогий друже.
translations.vi: Hỡi Krishna, hỡi Krishna, xin hãy nói, người bạn thân mến của con.
translations.zh-cn: 哦， கிருஷ்ணா，哦， கிருஷ்ணா，请说吧，我亲爱的朋友。

mantras.name: O Lord Brahma, O Lord Vishnu (Muralidhara), O resident of Tripura (the three worlds), O Sun, O Moon, O Earth, O Mercury (Budha), O Guru (teacher), O Venus (Shukra), O Saturn, O Rahu (the south node of the moon), O Ketu (the north node of the moon), all of you are my auspicious morning.
mantras.english: O Lord Brahma, O Lord Vishnu (Muralidhara), O resident of Tripura (the three worlds), O Sun, O Moon, O Earth, O Mercury (Budha), O Guru (teacher), O Venus (Shukra), O Saturn, O Rahu (the south node of the moon), O Ketu (the north node of the moon), all of you are my auspicious morning.
mantras.original: ॐ ब्रह्मा मुरारिस्त्रिपुरान्तकारी भानु: शशी भूमिसुतो बुधश्च। गुरुश्च शुक्र: शनिराहुकेतव: सर्वं मम सुप्रभातम्।
mantras.transliteration: ō, He Brahma, He Viṣṇu (Muralidhara), ō Tripurāvasī, ō Sūrya, ō Candra, ō Pṛthvī, ō Budha, ō Guru, ō Śukra, ō Śani, ō Rāhu, ō Ketu, sabhāḥ tum hāṁ mērāṃ śubh prātah.
mantras.background: A Hindu dawn invocation naming deities and planets as auspicious omens, chanted at Brahma Muhurta to align mind with divine cosmic energy.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this dawn invocation aligns mind with cosmic forces—planets, deities, and earth—cultivating auspiciousness, mental clarity, and a deep sense of sacred protection as each new day begins.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, morning, devotion, brahma, vishnu, blessing, protection, clarity, strength, awakening

translations.es: Oh, Señor Brahma, oh, Señor Vishnu (Muralidhara), oh, habitante de Tripura (los tres mundos), oh, Sol, oh, Luna, oh, Tierra, oh, Mercurio (Budha), oh, Guru (maestro), oh, Venus (Shukra), oh, Saturno, oh, Rahu (el nodo sur de la luna), oh, Ketu (el nodo norte de la luna), todos ustedes son mi auspiciosa mañana.
translations.ar: يا رب برهمَا، يا رب فيشنو (موراليدهارا)، يا ساكن ثلاثي لَوكا (العوالم الثلاث)، يا شمس، يا قمر، يا أرض، يا مِرْكُورِي (بودها)، يا مُعلِّم (غورو)، يا زهرة (شُكْرا)، يا زحل، يا راهو (العقدة الجنوبية للقمر)، يا كِتو (العقدة الشمالية للقمر)، جميعكم نور فجري المبارك.
translations.bn: হে ব্রহ্মদেব, হে বিষ্ণু (মuralidhara), হে ত্রিপুরাবাসী (তিনটি জগতের বাসিন্দা), হে সূর্য, হে চন্দ্র, হে পৃথিবী, হে বুধ (মঙ্গলের গ্রহ), হে গুরু (শিক্ষক), হে শুক্র (বৃহস্পতির গ্রহ), হে শনি, হে রাহু (চন্দ্রের দক্ষিণ নোড), হে কেতু (চন্দ্রের উত্তর নোড), আপনারা সকলে আমার জন্য কল্যাণকর প্রাতঃস্মরণীয়।
translations.de: Oh, Brahma, oh, Vishnu (Muralidhara), oh, Bewohner von Tripura (den drei Welten), oh, Sonne, oh, Mond, oh, Erde, oh, Merkur (Budha), oh, Lehrer (Guru), oh, Venus (Shukra), oh, Saturn, oh, Rahu (dem südlichen Mondknoten), oh, Ketu (dem nördlichen Mondknoten), alle seid ihr mein glückverheißender Morgen.
translations.en-us: O Lord Brahma, O Lord Vishnu (Muralidhara - the flute-bearer), O resident of the three worlds, O Sun, O Moon, O Earth, O Mercury (Budha), O Guru (teacher), O Venus (Shukra), O Saturn, O Rahu (the south node of the moon), O Ketu (the north node of the moon), all of you are my auspicious beginning of the day.
translations.en-gb: O Lord Brahma, O Lord Vishnu (Muralidhara – the flute-bearer), O you who reside in Tripura (the three worlds), O Sun, O Moon, O Earth, O Mercury (Budha), O Guru (teacher), O Venus (Shukra), O Saturn, O Rahu (the south node of the moon), O Ketu (the north node of the moon), all of you are my auspicious morning salutation.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Seigneur Brahmâ, Ô Seigneur Vishnu (Muralidhara), Ô Celui qui réside dans Tripura (les trois mondes), Ô Soleil, Ô Lune, Ô Terre, Ô Mercure (Budha), Ô Guru (enseignant), Ô Vénus (Shukra), Ô Saturne, Ô Rahu (le nœud sud de la Lune), Ô Ketu (le nœud nord de la Lune), tous vous êtes ma bonne augure matinale.
translations.he: ה', ברהמה, ה', וישנו (מֻרָלִידְהָרָה), ה', שוכני טריפורה (שלושת העולמות), ה', שמש, ה', ירח, ה', ארץ, ה', בודה (כוכב חמה), ה', גורו (מורה), ה', שוקרה (כוכב נוגה), ה', שבתאי, ה', רהו (צומת דרום הירח), ה', קֵטוּ (צומת צפון הירח), אתם כולם, ברכות הבוקר שלי.
translations.hi: हे भगवान ब्रह्मा, हे भगवान विष्णु (मुरलीधर), हे त्रि worlds के निवासी, हे सूर्य, हे चंद्रमा, हे पृथ्वी, हे बुध (बुध ग्रह), हे गुरु (शिक्षक), हे शुक्र (शुक्र ग्रह), हे शनि, हे राहू (चंद्रमा का दक्षिणी नोड), हे केतु (चंद्रमा का उत्तरी नोड), आप सभी मेरे लिए शुभ प्रभात हैं।
translations.id: "Ya Brahma, Ya Vishnu (Muralidhara), Ya penghuni Tripura (tiga dunia), Ya Matahari, Ya Bulan, Ya Bumi, Ya Budha (Merkurius), Ya Guru, Ya Shukra (Venus), Ya Sabtu, Ya Rahu (simpul selatan Bulan), Ya Ketu (simpul utara Bulan), semuanya adalah awal pagi yang baik bagiku."
translations.it: O Signore Brahmā, O Signore Viṣṇu (Muralidhara), O abitante di Tripura (i tre mondi), O Sole, O Luna, O Terra, O Mercurio (Budha), O Guru (insegnante), O Venere (Shukra), O Saturno, O Rāhu (il nodo lunare meridionale), O Ketu (il nodo lunare settentrionale), tutti voi siete la mia auspiciosa alba.
translations.ja: おお、ブラフマーよ、おお、ヴィシュヌよ（ムラリダラ）、おお、トリプーラ（三界）の住まいよ、おお、太陽よ、おお、月よ、おお、大地のよ、おお、ブダ（水星）よ、おお、グル（師）よ、おお、シュクラ（金星）よ、おお、シャニよ、おお、ラーフよ（月の南交点）、おお、ケトゥよ（月の北交点）、あなた方すべてが私の吉兆の朝です。
translations.ko: 브라흐마 신이시여, 비슈누 신이시여 (무랄리다라), 삼계의 주인이시여, 태양이시여, 달이시여, 대지가 되시여, 수성이시여 (부다), 스승이시여, 금성이시여 (슈크라), 토성이시여, 라후이시여 (달의 남쪽 지점), 케투이시여 (달의 북쪽 지점), 여러분 모두가 저의 길조로운 아침입니다.
translations.nl: O Heer Brahma, O Heer Vishnu (Muralidhara), O bewoner van Tripura (de drie werelden), O Zon, O Maan, O Aarde, O Mercurius (Budha), O Goeroe (leraar), O Venus (Shukra), O Saturnus, O Rahu (de zuidelijke maanopstand), O Ketu (de noordelijke maanopstand), jullie allen zijn mijn voorspoedige ochtend.
translations.pl: O Brahmo, o Vishnu (Muralidhara), o mieszkańcu Tripury (trzech światów), o Słońce, o Księżycu, o Ziemio, o Budho (Merkurzu), o Gurunanie (Nauczycielu), o Shukrze (Wenusie), o Saturnie, o Rahu (południowym węźle Księżyca), o Ketu (północnym węźle Księżyca), wszyscy Wy jesteście moim błogosławionym świtem.
translations.pt-br: Ó Senhor Brahma, Ó Senhor Vishnu (Muralidhara), Ó habitante de Tripura (os três mundos), Ó Sol, Ó Lua, Ó Terra, Ó Mercúrio (Budha), Ó Guru (professor), Ó Vênus (Shukra), Ó Saturno, Ó Rahu (o nó sul da Lua), Ó Ketu (o nó norte da Lua), todos vocês são minha auspiciosa manhã.
translations.ru: О, Господи Брахма, О, Господи Вишну (Муралидхара), О, обитатель Трилоки (трёх миров), О, Солнце, О, Луна, О, Земля, О, Меркурий (Будха), О, Гуру (учитель), О, Венера (Шукра), О, Сатурн, О, Раху (южный лунный узел), О, Кету (северный лунный узел), все вы – мое благословение в это утреннее время.
translations.sv: O, Brahma, o, Vishnu (Muralidhara), o, den som bor i Tripura (de tre världarna), o, Sol, o, Måne, o, Jord, o, Merkurius (Budha), o, Guru (lärare), o, Venus (Shukra), o, Saturnus, o, Rahu (månens södra nod), o, Ketu (månens norra nod), alla ni är min lyckosamma morgon.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหม, ขอพระวิษณู (ผู้ถือขลุ่ย), ขอทุกท่านที่สถิตในทริปุระ (โลกทั้งสาม), ขอพระอาทิตย์, ขอพระจันทร์, ขอโลก, ขอพุธ, ขอครู, ขอศุกร์, ขอเสาร์, ขอราหู, ขอเกตุ, ทุกท่านคือความสวัสดีในยามเช้าของข้า
translations.tr: Ey Brahma Tanrısı, Ey Vishnu (Muralidhara), Ey Tripura'nın (üç dünyanın) sakinleri, Ey Güneş, Ey Ay, Ey Dünya, Ey Merkür (Budha), Ey Guru (öğretmen), Ey Venüs (Şukra), Ey Satürn, Ey Rahu (ayın güney düğümü), Ey Ketu (ayın kuzey düğümü), hepiniz benim için uğurlu bir sabahı temsil ediyorsunuz.
translations.uk: О, Господи Брахма, О, Господи Вишну (Муралидхара), О, обитатель Трипуры (трех миров), О, Солнце, О, Луна, О, Земля, О, Меркурий (Будха), О, Гуру (учитель), О, Венера (Шукра), О, Сатурн, О, Раху (южный лунный узел), О, Кету (северный лунный узел), все вы — мое благословенное утро.
translations.vi: Ô Brahma tôn kính, Ô Vishnu tôn kính (Muralidhara), Ô ngài, cư dân của Tripura (ba thế giới), Ô Mặt Trời, Ô Mặt Trăng, Ô Trái Đất, Ô Sao Thủy (Budha), Ô Guru (người thầy), Ô Sao Kim (Shukra), Ô Sao Thổ, Ô Rahu (nút Nam của Mặt Trăng), Ô Ketu (nút Bắc của Mặt Trăng), tất cả các ngài đều là sự may mắn buổi sáng của con.
translations.zh-cn: 梵天啊，毗湿奴（芙罗拉，Muralidhara），三界之主，太阳啊，月亮啊，大地啊，水星（布达），导师啊，金星（修克拉），土星啊，拉胡（月亮南交点），克图（月亮北交点），诸位都是我吉祥的早晨。

mantras.name: O Lord Ganesha, with a curved trunk and a large body, possessing the brilliance of a million suns, please remove all obstacles from my path and bless me to succeed in all my endeavors, always.
mantras.english: O Lord Ganesha, with a curved trunk and a large body, possessing the brilliance of a million suns, please remove all obstacles from my path and bless me to succeed in all my endeavors, always.
mantras.original: Om Vakratunda Mahakaya Suryakoti Samaprabha, Nirvighnam Kuru Me Deva Sarvakaryeshu Sarvada.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, he gaṇeṣa, vrikodaraḥ, mahacakraḥ, sahasrachakradiśākāraḥ, sarvāvaraṇān nivāraya, sarvasiddhiṃ dehi, śubhamastu, tavā.
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, this Ganesha mantra invokes the elephant-headed remover of obstacles. Chanted at day's start, its literal plea—"curved trunk, sun-bright, clear my path"—opens every endeavor with divine grace.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Ganesha mantra at dawn is said to dissolve inner and outer obstacles, sharpen mental clarity, and awaken courage — inviting Ganesha's solar brilliance to illuminate every endeavor you undertake.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, devotional, removal, success, blessing, protection, morning

translations.es: Oh, Señor Ganesha, con tu trompa curva y tu cuerpo imponente, poseedor del resplandor de un millón de soles, por favor, elimina todos los obstáculos de mi camino y béndime para que tenga éxito en todos mis esfuerzos, siempre.
translations.ar: أيها الرب غانِشا، ذو الخرطوم المنحني والجسم الكبير، الذي يمتلك بريق مليون شمس، أزل كل العقبات من طريقي وباركني لتحقيق النجاح في جميع مساعي، دائمًا.
translations.bn: হে গণেশ দেব, তোমার বক্র শুঁড় এবং বিশাল শরীর আছে, তুমি লক্ষ সূর্যের আলোর মতো উজ্জ্বল, অনুগ্রহ করে আমার পথে আসা সমস্ত বাধা দূর করো এবং আমাকে সর্বদা আমার সকল কাজে সফল হতে আশীর্বাদ করো।
translations.de: Oh, Herr Ganesha, mit deinem gebogenen Rüssel und deinem großen Körper, der die Strahlkraft einer Million Sonnen besitzt, bitte entferne alle Hindernisse von meinem Weg und segne mich, damit ich in all meinen Unternehmungen erfolgreich bin, immer.
translations.en-us: O Lord Ganesha, with your characteristic curved trunk and expansive form, radiating the brilliance of a million suns, please remove all obstacles from my path and grant me success in all my undertakings, always.
translations.en-gb: O Lord Ganesha, with your characteristic curved trunk and ample form, radiating the brilliance of a million suns, please remove all obstacles from my path and bestow upon me the blessing of success in all my undertakings, always.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Seigneur Ganesha, au tronc courbé et au corps imposant, dont la splendeur égale celle d'un million de soleils, veuillez éliminer tous les obstacles de mon chemin et daignez me bénir pour que je réussisse dans toutes mes entreprises, à jamais.
translations.he: ה', גאנשה, בעל החדק המעוקל והגוף הגדול, הנוהר באור של מיליון שמשות, אנא הסר את כל המכשולים מדרכי ובְרֵך אותי להצליח בכל מעשי, תמיד.
translations.hi: हे भगवान गणेश, जिसकी सूंड घुमावदार है और शरीर विशाल है, जो एक करोड़ सूर्यों की आभा से युक्त है, कृपया मेरे मार्ग से सभी बाधाओं को दूर करें और मुझे हमेशा हर प्रयास में सफलता प्राप्त करने की कृपा करें।
translations.id: Ya Tuhan Ganesha, dengan belalai melengkung dan tubuh yang besar, yang memiliki kecemerlangan seperti sejuta matahari, mohon hilangkan semua rintangan dari jalanku dan berkati aku agar berhasil dalam semua usahaku, selalu.
translations.it: O Signore Ganesha, con il tuo proboscide curvo e il tuo corpo imponente, che possiedi la brillantezza di un milione di soli, ti prego di rimuovere tutti gli ostacoli dal mio cammino e di benedirmi affinché io possa avere successo in tutte le mie imprese, sempre.
translations.ja: オム、ガネーシャよ、曲がった鼻と大きな体を持つあなたよ。百万の太陽の輝きを持つあなたよ。どうか、私の行く手にあるすべての障害を取り除き、私にすべての努力において成功をもたらし、常に私を祝福してください。
translations.ko: 오, 가네샤 신이시여, 휘어진 코와 거대한 몸을 가지신 분이시며, 백만 개의 태양만큼이나 밝으신 분이시여. 제 길이의 모든 장애물을 제거하시고, 제가 하는 모든 일에서 성공할 수 있도록 축복해 주소서. 언제나.
translations.nl: O Heer Ganesha, met een gebogen slurf en een groot lichaam, bezield met de stralende helderheid van een miljoen zonnen, verweer alle obstakels van mijn pad en zegene mij om succes te behalen in al mijn ondernemingen, altijd.
translations.pl: O Panie Ganészo, o zakrzywionej trąbie i potężnej sylwetce, emanujący blaskiem miliona słońc, proszę, usuń wszystkie przeszkody z mojej drogi i błogosław mnie, abym odnosił sukces we wszystkich moich przedsięwzięciach, zawsze.
translations.pt-br: Ó Senhor Ganesha, com seu tronco curvo e corpo grande, possuidor do brilho de um milhão de sóis, por favor, remova todos os obstáculos do meu caminho e abençoe-me para que eu tenha sucesso em todas as minhas empreitadas, sempre.
translations.ru: О Господи Ганеша, с изогнутым хоботом и большим телом, обладающий сиянием миллиона солнц, пожалуйста, устрани все препятствия с моего пути и благослови меня на успех во всех моих начинаниях, всегда.
translations.sv: O, Herre Ganesha, med din böjda snabel och din stora kropp, som besitter en glans lika en miljon solar, vänligen avlägsna alla hinder från min väg och välsigna mig att lyckas i alla mina strävanden, alltid.
translations.th: ขอพระพิฆเนศผู้มีงวงช้างโค้งและพระวักกฬะอันใหญ่, ผู้ซึ่งมีรัศมีเจิดจ้าดุจดวงอาทิตย์นับล้านดวง, โปรดขจัดอุปสรรคทั้งหมดออกจากเส้นทางของข้า และประทานพรให้ข้าประสบความสำเร็จในทุกสิ่งที่ข้าตั้งใจ, ตลอดไป
translations.tr: Ey Ganesha Tanrısı, kıvrık hortumlu ve büyük vücutlu, milyon güneşlerin parlaklığına sahip olan, lütfen yolumdaki tüm engelleri kaldır ve tüm çabalarımda başarılı olmam için beni kutsayın, her zaman.
translations.uk: О Господи Ганешо, з вигнутим хоботом і великим тілом, що володієш сяйвом мільйона сонце, будь ласка, прибери всі перешкоди з мого шляху та благослови мене на успіх у всіх моїх починаннях, завжди.
translations.vi: ôi, Lãnh Chúa Ganesha, với cái vòi cong và thân hình vĩ đại, tỏa sáng như một triệu mặt trời, xin hãy loại bỏ tất cả những trở ngại trên con đường của con và ban cho con thành công trong mọi việc con làm, mãi mãi.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，毗湿奴神，你拥有弯曲的象鼻和巨大的身躯，你如百万太阳般光辉，请消除我前进道路上的所有障碍，并赐予我成功，永世。

mantras.name: O Lord who embodies the essence of the Vedas, I take refuge in Ganesha.
mantras.english: O Lord who embodies the essence of the Vedas, I take refuge in Ganesha.
mantras.transliteration: ō iraiva, veṭṭaiyin ulaginai uyirppatta vīṉai, gaṇēśaiyil uḷaṭṭukkoḷkkiṉ.
mantras.background: A devotional refuge mantra to Ganesha—Lord embodying Vedic essence. Surrendering to him connects practitioners to sacred knowledge and ancient wisdom traditions.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Ganesha mantra is said to awaken clarity, dissolve inner obstacles, and align the mind with sacred wisdom. Practitioners report deepened focus and calm—inviting both divine protection and the courage to begin new endeavors.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, devotion, vedic, refuge, invocation, divine, worship

translations.es: Oh, Señor que encarna la esencia de los Vedas, me refugio en Ganesha.
translations.ar: أيها الرب الذي يجسد جوهر الفيدا، ألجأ إلى غانيشا.
translations.bn: হে প্রভু, যিনি வேதங்களின் সারম essence ধারণ করেন, আমি গণেশের আশ্রয় গ্রহণ করছি।
translations.de: Oh, Herr, der die Essenz der Veden verkörpert, ich suche Zuflucht bei Ganesha.
translations.en-us: O Lord who embodies the essence of the Vedas, I seek refuge in Ganesha.
translations.en-gb: O Lord who embodies the very essence of the Vedas, I take refuge in Ganesha.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Seigneur qui incarne l'essence des Védas, je prends refuge en Ganesh.
translations.he: ה', אדון המגלם את מהות הווֵדות, אני מוצא מפלט בגנֵשה.
translations.hi: हे वेदों के सार को धारण करने वाले भगवान, मैं गणेश की शरण में आता हूँ।
translations.id: Ya Tuhan yang merangkum esensi dari Veda, aku berlindung pada Ganesha.
translations.it: O Signore che incarna l'essenza dei Veda, mi rifugio in Ganesha.
translations.ja: ヴェーダの真髄を体現されたおお神よ、私はガネーシャに帰依します。
translations.ko: 오, 베다의 정수를 구현하신 주님, 저는 가네샤께 귀의합니다. (옴, 베다의 본질을 담으신 주님, 저는 가네샤께 의지합니다.)
translations.nl: Heer, die de essentie van de Veda's belichaamt, ik zoek toevlucht bij Ganesha.
translations.pl: O Panu, który uosabia istotę Wed, szukam schronienia w Ganesha.
translations.pt-br: Ó Senhor que encarna a essência dos Vedas, eu busco refúgio em Ganesha.
translations.ru: О, Господь, воплощающий сущность Вед, я ищу убежища у Ганеши.
translations.sv: O, Herre som förkroppsligar Vedarnas essens, jag söker tillflykt hos Ganesha.
translations.th: ข้าขอพึ่งพาพระพิฆเนศ ผู้ซึ่งเป็นที่รวมแห่งสาระสำคัญของพระเวททั้งปวง
translations.tr: Ey Vedaların özünü somutlaştıran Rab, ben Ganesha'ya sığınıyorum.
translations.uk: О, Господи, який втілює сутність Вед, я шукаю притулку в Ганеші.
translations.vi: Lạy Chúa, Đấng hiện thân cho tinh hoa của các Veda, con xin nương tựa vào Ganesha.
translations.zh-cn: 伏 毗 陀 经 经 蕴 之 精 华 之 主, 我 寻求 伽 尼 萨 的 庇 护.

mantras.name: O Rama, O Rama, Rama, O Hari, O Hari.
mantras.english: O Rama, O Rama, Rama, O Hari, O Hari.
mantras.original: Hare Rama Hare Rama, Rama Rama Hare Hare
mantras.transliteration: ō Rāma, ō Rāma, Rāma, ō Hari, ō Hari.
mantras.background: The source material does not provide the origin, tradition, or literal meaning of this specific mantra — only general mantra meditation principles are described.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "O Rama, O Hari" invites deep inner stillness. With each repetition, the mind withdraws from noise, uncovering clarity, emotional stability, and a growing sense of unity with one's true self.
mantras.tags: rama, hari, japa, invocation, repetition, devotional, concentration, peace, stability, focus

translations.es: Oh Rama, oh Rama, Rama, oh Hari, oh Hari.
translations.ar: يا رام، يا رام، رام، يا هاري، يا هاري.
translations.bn: ও রাম, ও রাম, রাম, ও হরি, ও হরি।
translations.de: Oh Rama, oh Rama, Rama, oh Hari, oh Hari.
translations.en-us: O Rama, O Rama, Rama, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.en-gb: O Rama, O Rama, Rama, O Hari, O Hari.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Rama, Ô Rama, Rama, Ô Hari, Ô Hari.
translations.he: הֵי רָמָה, הֵי רָמָה, רָמָה, הֵי הַרִי, הֵי הַרִי.
translations.hi: हे राम, हे राम, राम, हे हरि, हे हरि।
translations.id: Wahai Rama, wahai Rama, Rama, wahai Hari, wahai Hari.
translations.it: O Rama, o Rama, Rama, o Hari, o Hari.
translations.ja: オ・ラーマ、オ・ラーマ、ラーマ、オ・ハリー、オ・ハリー。
translations.ko: 오 라마, 오 라마, 라마, 오 하리, 오 하리. (O Rama, O Rama, Rama, O Hari, O Hari.)
translations.nl: O Rama, o Rama, Rama, o Hari, o Hari.
translations.pl: O Ramie, o Ramie, Ramie, o Hari, o Hari.
translations.pt-br: Ó Rama, Ó Rama, Rama, Ó Hari, Ó Hari.
translations.ru: О Рама, о Рама, Рама, о Хари, о Хари.
translations.sv: O Rama, o Rama, Rama, o Hari, o Hari.
translations.th: โอ้ พระราม, โอ้ พระราม, พระราม, โอ้ พระหริ, โอ้ พระหริ.
translations.tr: Ey Rama, Ey Rama, Rama, Ey Hari, Ey Hari.
translations.uk: О Рама, О Рама, Рама, О Харі, О Харі.
translations.vi: Ô Rama, Ô Rama, Rama, Ô Hari, Ô Hari.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，罗摩，噢，罗摩，罗摩，噢，哈里，噢，哈里。 (Ō, Luómó, ō, Luómó, Luómó, ō, Hālǐ, ō, Hālǐ.)

mantras.name: O Victorious One, O Destroyer of the demon Mahisha, O Beautiful One with charming hips, O One residing on the mountain.
mantras.english: O Victorious One, O Destroyer of the demon Mahisha, O Beautiful One with charming hips, O One residing on the mountain.
mantras.original: Jaya Jaya He Mahishasura Mardhini Ramya Kapardini Shaila Suthe
mantras.transliteration: ō vijayī, ō mahiṣa-daṃṭaka, ō sundara-kadantu, ō giri-nivāsī.
mantras.background: From the Vedic tradition, this hymn honors Durga as Mahishasura's destroyer and Himalaya's daughter — a timeless chant awakening cosmic strength and divine joy.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Durga hymn invokes Mahishasura Mardini's victorious power, fostering inner strength, courage, and protection. Devotees seek liberation from inner "demons"—fear and ego—through focused, rhythmic repetition.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, durga, goddess, devotional, protection, liberation, mahishasura-mardini, strength, hymn

translations.es: Oh, vencedor; Oh, destructor del demonio Mahisha; Oh, hermoso ser de caderas encantadoras; Oh, aquel que reside en la montaña.
translations.ar: يا منتصر، يا قاهر شيطان ماهيشا، يا جميل ذو الأرداف الساحرة، يا ساكن الجبل.
translations.bn: হে বিজয়ী, হে মহিষাসুরকে ধ্বংসকারী, হে সুন্দর, মনোমুগ্ধকর নিতম্বযুক্ত, হে পর্বতের উপরে বাসকারী।
translations.de: Oh, Siegreicher, oh, Zerstörer des Dämonen Mahisha, oh, Schönheitswesen mit bezaubernden Hüften, oh, Du, der auf dem Berg wohnt.
translations.en-us: O Victorious One, O Destroyer of the demon Mahisha, O Beautiful One with graceful hips, O One who resides on the mountain.
translations.en-gb: O Victorious One, O Destroyer of the demon Mahisha, O Beautiful One with captivating hips, O One who dwells on the mountain.
translations.fr-fr: Ô victorieux, ô destructeur du démon Mahisha, ô magnifique, d'une beauté charmante, ô celui qui réside sur la montagne.
translations.he: הנה, המנצח, מחריב השד מהישה, היפה בעלת המותניים המרתקים, השוכן על ההר.
translations.hi: हे विजयी, हे महिषासुर का विनाशक, हे सुंदर, आकर्षक कूल्हों वाली, हे पर्वत पर विराजमान।
translations.id: Wahai Sang Penakluk, Wahai Penghancur iblis Mahisha, Wahai Yang Cantik dengan pinggul yang menawan, Wahai Yang berdiam di gunung.
translations.it: O Vittorioso, o Distruttore del demone Mahisha, o Bello con fianchi affascinanti, o Colui che risiede sulla montagna.
translations.ja: おお、勝利者よ。おお、魔王マヒシャを打ち倒した者よ。おお、魅惑的な腰を持つ美しい者よ。おお、山上に住まう者よ。
translations.ko: 승리자여, 마히샤 악마를 물리치신 분이시여, 매혹적인 자태를 지니신 아름다우신 분이시여, 산 위에 거하시는 분이시여.
translations.nl: O Zegevierende, O Vernieler van de demon Mahisha, O Schoonheid met betoverende heupen, O Zij die op de berg woont.
translations.pl: O Zwycięzco, o Niszczycielu demona Mahiszy, o Piękny z czarującymi biodrami, o Ten, który mieszka na górze.
translations.pt-br: Ó Vencedor, Ó Destruidor do demônio Mahiṣa, Ó Belo, com quadris encantadores, Ó Aquele que reside na montanha.
translations.ru: О Победоносный, о Разрушитель демона Махиши, о Прекрасный, с пленительными бедрами, о Ты, обитающий на горе.
translations.sv: O segerrike, O du som förstör demonen Mahisha, O vackra varelse med förtrollande former, O du som bor på berget.
translations.th: โอ้อัศวินผู้พิชิต, โอผู้ทำลายอสูรมาหิชา, โอผู้มีรูปร่างงดงามและสะโพกที่น่าหลงใหล, โอผู้ที่สถิตอยู่บนภูเขา
translations.tr: Ey Zafer Ganyan, Ey Mahişa şeytanını yok eden, Ey Büyülü kalçalarıyla güzel olan, Ey Dağın üzerinde bulunan.
translations.uk: О Переможцю, о Руйнівнику демона Махіша, о Прекрасному, з чарівними стегнами, о Тому, хто перебуває на горі.
translations.vi: "Hỡi Đấng Thắng Lợi, Hỡi Đấng Chinh Phục Quỷ Demon Mahisha, Hỡi Người Tươi Đẹp với vòng eo quyến rũ, Hỡi Đấng Ngự trên đỉnh núi."
translations.zh-cn: 战胜者啊，驱逐魔王玛希谢者啊，腰肢优美的女神啊，山顶的居者啊。

mantras.name: O beloved, speak the name of Radhe Radhe.
mantras.english: O beloved, speak the name of Radhe Radhe.
mantras.transliteration: ō, priye, vadati rādhē rādhē nāmaṁ.
mantras.background: From Hindu devotional tradition, this mantra calls beloved companions to chant Radha & Krishna's names, expressing divine love. A sacred song uniting souls in spiritual joy.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Radhe Radhe" cultivates devotional love (bhakti), deepens spiritual connection with the divine, and invites inner joy. It is said to offer blessings, divine protection, and liberation from karmic cycles.
mantras.tags: hindu, krishna, radha, devotional, devotion, liberation, divine, blessing, chanting, love

translations.es: Querido/a, pronuncia el nombre de Radhe Radhe.
translations.ar: يا حبيبي، اذكر اسم "راده راده".
translations.bn: হে প্রিয়জন, राधे राधे নামটি বলুন।
translations.de: Geliebte/r, sprich den Namen Radhe Radhe.
translations.en-us: O beloved, please utter the divine name "Radhe Radhe."
translations.en-gb: Oh beloved, please utter the name "Radhe Radhe".
translations.fr-fr: Ô bien-aimée, prononce le nom sacré de Radhe Radhe.
translations.he: הוּא, אוהבי, אמרי את השם "ראדה ראדה".
translations.hi: हे प्रिय, राधे-राधे नाम का उच्चारण करो।
translations.id: Wahai kekasih, sebutlah nama Radhe Radhe.
translations.it: Amato/a, pronuncia il nome Radhe Radhe.
translations.ja: 愛しい人よ、ラダ・ラダと唱えてください。
translations.ko: 오, 사랑하는 이여, 라데 라데라는 이름을 부르세요. (O, saranghaneun iyeo, Lade Lade-reun ireumeul bureseyo.)
translations.nl: Geliefde, spreek de naam Radhe Radhe uit.
translations.pl: O ukochana, powiedz imię Radhe Radhe.
translations.pt-br: Amado(a), pronuncie o nome "Radhe Radhe".
translations.ru: Возлюбленная, произнеси имя "Радхе Радхе".
translations.sv: Min älskade, säg namnet Radhe Radhe.
translations.th: โอ้ที่รัก, โปรดตรัสเรียกชื่อ "ราธะ ราธะ"
translations.tr: Ey sevgili, "Radhe Radhe" ismini söyle.
translations.uk: О кохана, промов ім'я Радхе Радхе.
translations.vi: Hỡi người yêu dấu, hãy thầm thì tên "Radhe Radhe".
translations.zh-cn: 亲爱的，请念诵“拉得·拉得”的名字。

mantras.name: O camphor, embodiment of brilliance, incarnation of compassion, essence of the family, serpent king's necklace, eternally springtime, residing in the lotus of my heart, along with Bhavaani, I bow to you, O camphor.
mantras.english: O camphor, embodiment of brilliance, incarnation of compassion, essence of the family, serpent king's necklace, eternally springtime, residing in the lotus of my heart, along with Bhavaani, I bow to you, O camphor.
mantras.original: కర్పూర్‌ గౌరం కరుణావతారం సంసారసారం భుజగేంద్రహారం సదావసంతం హృదయారవిందే భవం భవానీసహితం నమామి కర్పూరం
mantras.transliteration: oṃ kaṃphor, tejasya rūpa, karuṇāyāvatāra, kulasya māya, nāgādhipatihikā, śaśvataṃ vasantaṃ, padma-hṛdaye niṣṭhitaḥ, bhavānīm iva, te namaḥ, oṃ kaṃphor.
mantras.background: A Hindu Shaivite mantra praising Shiva as "camphor-white, compassionate, serpent-garlanded, ever-springlike," dwelling in the heart's lotus alongside Bhavaani (Parvati).
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Shiva mantra invokes purity (camphor-white clarity), compassion, and heart-centered stillness. Devotees believe it dissolves ego, awakens inner spring, and unites masculine-feminine energies (Shiva-Bhavani).
mantras.tags: hindu, shiva, mantra, devotion, compassion, family, springtime, lotus, bhavaani, worship, south indian, Telugu, prayer

translations.es: Oh, cámforo, encarnación de la brillantez, manifestación de la compasión, esencia de la familia, collar del rey serpiente, perpetuamente primavera, habitando en el loto de mi corazón, junto con Bhavani, me inclino ante ti, oh, cámforo.
translations.ar: يا كافور، تجسيد للبهجة، تجسيد للشفقة، جوهر الأسرة، قلادة ملك الأفاعي، الربيع الأبدي، المقيم في زهرة قلبي، مع بهافاني، أتضرع إليك يا كافور.
translations.bn: "হে কর্পূর, তুমি দিব্যতার প্রতিচ্ছবি, করুণার воплощение, পরিবারের सार, নাগরাজ মুকুটের অলঙ্কার, তুমি চিরকাল বসন্তকাল, আমার হৃদয়ের পদ্মায় তোমার নিবাস, দেবী ভবানীসহ, আমি তোমাকে প্রণাম জানাই, হে কর্পূর।"
translations.de: O Kamphor, du Verkörperung des Glanzes, Inkarnation der Barmherzigkeit, Wesen der Familie, Halskette des Königs der Schlangen, ewiger Frühling, du wohnst im Lotus meines Herzens. Zusammen mit Bhavaani verneige ich mich vor dir, o Kamphor.
translations.en-us: O Camphor, embodiment of radiance, incarnation of compassion, the very essence of the family, the necklace of the serpent king, eternally springtime, residing within the lotus of my heart, along with Bhavaani, I offer my salutations to you, O Camphor.
translations.en-gb: O Camphor, embodiment of brilliance, incarnation of compassion, essence of the family, like a necklace upon the serpent king, eternally spring-like, residing in the lotus of my heart, together with Bhavaani, I offer my obeisance to you, O Camphor.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Camphre, incarnation de la lumière, manifestation de la compassion, essence de la famille, collier du roi des serpents, éternel printemps, toi qui résides dans le lotus de mon cœur, ainsi que Bhavaani, je m'incline devant toi, ô Camphre.
translations.he: הנה קמופור, התגלמות הבהירות, התגלמות החמלה, מהות המשפחה, שרשרת מלך הנחשים, אביב נצחי, השוכן בלוטוס לבי, יחד עם בהבאני, אני משתחווה לך, הנה קמופור.
translations.hi: "हे कर्पूर, हे प्रतिभा का प्रतीक, करुणा का अवतार, परिवार का सार, नागराज की माला, हमेशा वसंतकाल, मेरे हृदय के पद्म में विराजमान, भवानी के साथ, मैं आपको नमन करता हूँ, हे कर्पूर।"
translations.id: Wahai kamper, perwujudan kecemerlangan, manifestasi kasih sayang, inti dari keluarga, kalung raja naga, musim semi abadi, yang bersemayam di dalam bunga hati saya, bersama dengan Bhavaani, saya menyembahmu, wahai kamper.
translations.it: O Camphor, incarnazione di splendore, manifestazione di compassione, essenza della famiglia, collana del re dei serpenti, eternamente primavera, che risiedi nel loto del mio cuore, insieme a Bhavani, mi prostro a te, o Camphor.
translations.ja: カンファーよ、輝きの化身、慈悲の顕現、家族の精髄、蛇王の首飾り、永遠の春、我が心の蓮華に宿る者、そして、bhavaani（破壊の女神）と共に、あなたに敬意を捧げます。
translations.ko: "오, 영험의 화신인 당신이여, 자비의 구현이시여, 가문의 정수이시며, 사다리왕의 목걸이시여, 영원한 봄과 같이 아름다우신 당신이여, 저의 마음 속 연꽃에 머무시며, 함께 계시는 Bhavaani (bhavaani) 여신과 함께, 당신께 경배합니다, 오, 영험이시여."
translations.nl: O kamfoer, belichaming van helderheid, manifestatie van mededogen, essentie van het gezin, de ketting van de slangkoning, altijd lente, verblijvend in de lotus van mijn hart, samen met Bhavaani, ik buig voor u, O kamfoer.
translations.pl: O kamforze, uosobieniu blasku, wcieleniu współczucia, istocie rodziny, naszyjniku króla węży, wiecznie wiosennym, zamieszkującym lotos mojego serca, wraz z Bhavaani, składam Ci hołd, o kamforze.
translations.pt-br: Ó cáfora, personificação da brilhantez, encarnação da compaixão, essência da família, colar do rei serpente, eternamente primavera, residindo no lótus do meu coração, junto com Bhavaani, eu me prostro a você, ó cáfora.
translations.ru: О камфорный, воплощение сияния, олицетворение сострадания, сущность семьи, ожерелье змеиного царя, вечно весенний, обитающий в лотосе моего сердца, вместе с Бхавани, я склоняюсь перед тобой, о камфорный.
translations.sv: O kamfor, du som är ljusets förkroppsligande, medkänsla personifierad, familjens väsen, ormens kungas halsband, en evig vår, du som vilar i mitt hjärtas lotusblomma, tillsammans med Bhavaani, jag böjer mig för dig, o kamfor.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแก่กำพู, โอรสแห่งความสว่างไสว, ร่างอวตารแห่งความเมตตา, สาระสำคัญของครอบครัว, สร้อยคอของกษัตริย์แห่งงู, ดั่งฤดูใบไม้ผลิชั่วนิรันดร์, สถิตอยู่ในบัวแห่งใจของข้า, พร้อมกับภาวันนี่, ข้าขอคารวะแด่ท่าน, โอรสแห่งกำพู
translations.tr: Ey kamfor, ihtişamın vücudu, şefkatin tezahürü, ailenin özü, yılan kralının boynuğuna takılan mücevher, her zaman bahar, kalbimdeki nilüferde bulunan, Bhavaani ile birlikte sana secde ediyorum, ey kamfor.
translations.uk: О камфорo, оплот сияния, воплощение сострадания, сущность семьи, ожерелье змеиного царя, вечная весна, обитающий в лотосе моего сердца, вместе с Бхаваани, я склоняюсь перед тобой, о камфорo.
translations.vi: Hương trầm, hiện thân của sự rực rỡ, hóa thân của lòng từ bi, tinh hoa của gia đình, chuỗi ngọc của vua rắn, vĩnh cửu như mùa xuân, ngự trong đóa sen của trái tim tôi, cùng với Bhavaani, tôi cúi lạy hương trầm.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，樟脑，你是光辉的化身，慈悲的体现，家庭的精髓，蛇王项链，你永远是春天的气息，你居住在我的心中莲花，与Bhavaani（博瓦尼）一同，我向你致敬，噢，樟脑。

mantras.name: O mountain, O beautiful one, O one who adorns the earth.
mantras.english: O mountain, O beautiful one, O one who adorns the earth.
mantras.transliteration: ō giri, o sundarī, o bhūmi-ālakara.
mantras.background:
From Hindu tradition, "Aigiri Nandini" honors Goddess Durga as daughter of the Himalayas — a powerful hymn blending nature, divinity, and cosmic joy. Chant it. Feel the mountains.
  Grounding: Source states "Ayi Giri Nandini" means "daughter of the mountain who brings joy to the earth," from a hymn to Durga as Mahishasura Mardini.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Aigiri Nandini invokes Durga's protective power, bringing peace, prosperity, and joy. Devotees seek strength, divine protection, and auspiciousness through her mountain-born energy.
mantras.tags: hindu, durga, mahishasura_mardini, devotion, blessing, protection, liberation, mantra, hymn, auspicious, joyful, divine

translations.es: Oh, montaña, oh, hermosa, oh, aquella que adorna la tierra.
translations.ar: يا جبل، يا جميل، يا زينة الأرض.
translations.bn: ও পর্বত, ও সুন্দর সত্তা, ও পৃথিবী-সুষম।
translations.de: O Berg, oh Schöne, oh du, die die Erde schmückst.
translations.en-us: O mountain, O beautiful being, O one who embellishes the earth.
translations.en-gb: O mountain, O beautiful being, O one who embellishes the earth.
translations.fr-fr: Ô montagne, ô beauté, ô celle qui embellit la terre.
translations.he: הֵא, הַר, הֵא, יְפֵה, הֵא, מְעַטֶרֶת אֶת הָאָרֶץ.
translations.hi: हे पर्वत, हे सुंदर, हे पृथ्वी को सुशोभित करने वाली।
translations.id: Wahai gunung, wahai yang indah, wahai yang menghiasi bumi.
translations.it: O monte, o bellezza, o tu che abbellisci la terra.
translations.ja: 山よ、おお美しい方、地上を飾る者よ。 (Yama yo, ō utsukushii kata, chijō o kazaru mono yo.)
translations.ko: 산아, 아름다운 존재여, 땅을 장식하는 존재여.
translations.nl: O berg, o schoonheid, o jij die de aarde siert.
translations.pl: O górze, o piękna, o ty, która zdobiasz ziemię.
translations.pt-br: Ó montanha, ó bela, ó que embeleza a terra.
translations.ru: О, гора, о, прекрасная, о, украшающая землю.
translations.sv: O berg, o vackra, o du som smyckar jorden.
translations.th: ข้าขอคารวะเทือกเขา, ผู้ที่งดงาม, ผู้ที่ประดับโลก.
translations.tr: Ey dağ, ey güzel olan, ey dünyayı süsleyen.
translations.uk: О, горо, о, прекрасна, о, ти, що прикрашаєш землю.
translations.vi: Hỡi ngọn núi, hỡi người xinh đẹp, hỡi người tô điểm cho vạn vật trên Trái Đất.
translations.zh-cn: 哦，山，你真美丽，你是大地上的点缀。

mantras.name: O radiant one, may this invigorating and divine bath be accepted by you.
mantras.english: O radiant one, may this invigorating and divine bath be accepted by you.
mantras.transliteration: o radiant one, may this invigorating and divine bath be accepted by you.
mantras.background: "O radiant one" — an invocation of a luminous deity — paired with offering a "divine bath," reveals a sacred ritual of purification and devotion, inviting the divine to receive and be refreshed.
mantras.benefits: This offering mantra invites reverence and purification — addressing a "radiant one" suggests cultivating inner luminosity. The ritual bath symbolizes spiritual cleansing, potentially fostering humility, devotion, and mindful surrender in the practitioner.
mantras.tags: hindu, bath, devotion, purification, divine, acceptance, ritual, offering, auspicious, shiva, mantra, prayer

translations.es: Oh radiante, que este baño vigorizante y divino sea aceptado por ti.
translations.ar: أيها الجلي، تقبل هذا الاستحمام المنشط والسامي.
translations.bn: ওহে তেজস্বী, এই সতেজ ও পবিত্র স্নান আপনার দ্বারা গৃহীত হোক।
translations.de: O strahlende(r) Göttin/Gott, möge dieses belebende und göttliche Bad von Dir angenommen werden.
translations.en-us: O luminous one, may this refreshing and sacred bath be pleasing to you.
translations.en-gb: O radiant one, may this refreshing and sacred bath be favourably received by you.
translations.fr-fr: Ô toi qui rayonnes, puisse ce bain vivifiant et divin être agréé par toi.
translations.he: הנהר, אל האור, יתקבל אמבטיה המרעננת והקדושה הזו על ידך.
translations.hi: हे तेजस्वी व्यक्ति, यह ताज़ा करने वाला और दिव्य स्नान आपके द्वारा स्वीकार किया जाए।
translations.id: Wahai yang bercahaya, semoga mandi yang menyegarkan dan suci ini diterima oleh Anda.
translations.it: O splendente, possa questo bagno rivitalizzante e divino essere accettato da te.
translations.ja: あらゆる輝きを持つあなたへ。この活力に満ちた神聖な沐浴が、あなたに受け入れられますように。
translations.ko: 빛나는 분이시여, 이 생명력을 불어넣고 신성한 목욕이 당신에게 받아들여지기를 바랍니다. (Bitnaneun bunisiyeo, i saengmyeongnyeogeul bureopinnogo sinsunghan mokyohi dangsin-eui gae deulyeojigireul baramnida.)
translations.nl: O stralende, moge dit verkwikkende en goddelijke ritueel van wassing door U aanvaard worden.
translations.pl: O promienna istoto, niech ta orzeźwiająca i boska kąpiel będzie przez Ciebie przyjęta.
translations.pt-br: Ó ser radiante, que este banho revigorante e divino seja aceito por vós.
translations.ru: О сияющий, пусть это освежающее и божественное омовение будет принято тобой.
translations.sv: O, strålande en, må detta uppfriskande och gudomliga bad vara dig behagligt.
translations.th: ขอความสว่างไสว, ขอให้การอาบน้ำอันชำระล้างและศักดิ์สิทธิ์นี้เป็นที่โปรดปรานของท่าน
translations.tr: Ey ışıldayan kişi, bu canlandırıcı ve ilahi banyonun senin tarafından kabul edilmesini dilerim.
translations.uk: О, світла/сяюча/яскрава (залежно від контексту та бажаного відтінку), нехай це живляче та священне обмивання буде прийняте Тобою.
translations.vi: Nữ thần rực rỡ, xin hãy chấp nhận sự thanh tẩy và ban phước thiêng liêng này.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，光辉照耀者，愿这充满活力和神圣的沐浴被您所接受。

mantras.name: O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires.
mantras.english: O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires.
mantras.transliteration: ऒ, विनाशक desires, ऒ, विनाशक desires, ऒ, विनाशक desires, ऒ, विनाशक desires.
mantras.background: From Sanskrit roots, "man" (mind) & "tra" (control), this ancient vibrational chant invites release of desires—a timeless Indic tradition resonating through Kirtan and Japa practice.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this mantra repeatedly (Japa) is said to dissolve ego-driven desires, calming the nervous system and stilling mental chatter — inviting deep inner stillness and spiritual liberation.
mantras.tags: hindu, destroyer, desire, hoosensitve, relaxation, japa, mantra, meditation, holistic, vibration, affirmation, spiritual

translations.es: Oh, Destructor de los deseos, oh, Destructor de los deseos, oh, Destructor de los deseos, oh, Destructor de los deseos.
translations.ar: يا مُحْطِمَ الرَّغَبَاتِ، يا مُحْطِمَ الرَّغَبَاتِ، يا مُحْطِمَ الرَّغَبَاتِ، يا مُحْطِمَ الرَّغَبَاتِ.
translations.bn: ও হে আকাঙ্ক্ষা-নাশক, ও হে আকাঙ্ক্ষা-নাশক, ও হে আকাঙ্ক্ষা-নাশক, ও হে আকাঙ্ক্ষা-নাশক।
translations.de: Oh, Vernichter der Begierden, oh, Vernichter der Begierden, oh, Vernichter der Begierden, oh, Vernichter der Begierden.
translations.en-us: O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires.
translations.en-gb: O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires, O, Destroyer of Desires.
translations.fr-fr: Ô Détruiteurl des Désirs, Ô Détruiteurl des Désirs, Ô Détruiteurl des Désirs, Ô Détruiteurl des Désirs.
translations.he: הוֹ, מַכְלִיד הַתַּשׁוּקוֹת, הוֹ, מַכְלִיד הַתַּשׁוּקוֹת, הוֹ, מַכְלִיד הַתַּשׁוּקוֹת, הוֹ, מַכְלִיד הַתַּשׁוּקוֹת.
translations.hi: हे अभिलाषा-नाशक, हे अभिलाषा-नाशक, हे अभिलाषा-नाशक, हे अभिलाषा-नाशक।
translations.id: Oh, Penghancur Keinginan, Oh, Penghancur Keinginan, Oh, Penghancur Keinginan, Oh, Penghancur Keinginan.
translations.it: O, distruttore dei desideri, o distruttore dei desideri, o distruttore dei desideri, o distruttore dei desideri.
translations.ja: オーム、欲望を滅ぼす者よ、オーム、欲望を滅ぼす者よ、オーム、欲望を滅ぼす者よ、オーム、欲望を滅ぼす者よ。 (Ōmu, yokubō o horobosu mono yo, Ōmu, yokubō o horobosu mono yo, Ōmu, yokubō o horobosu mono yo, Ōmu, yokubō o horobosu mono yo.)
translations.ko: 오, 욕망을 파괴하시는 분이시여, 오, 욕망을 파괴하시는 분이시여, 오, 욕망을 파괴하시는 분이시여, 오, 욕망을 파괴하시는 분이시여.
translations.nl: O, Vernietiger van Verlangens, O, Vernietiger van Verlangens, O, Vernietiger van Verlangens, O, Vernietiger van Verlangens.
translations.pl: O, Niszczycielu pragnień, o Niszczycielu pragnień, o Niszczycielu pragnień, o Niszczycielu pragnień.
translations.pt-br: Ó, Destruidor dos Desejos, Ó, Destruidor dos Desejos, Ó, Destruidor dos Desejos, Ó, Destruidor dos Desejos.
translations.ru: О, Разрушитель Желаний, О, Разрушитель Желаний, О, Разрушитель Желаний, О, Разрушитель Желаний.
translations.sv: O, du som förstör begär, o, du som förstör begär, o, du som förstör begär, o, du som förstör begär.
translations.th: โอ้, ผู้ทำลายความปรารถนา, โอ้, ผู้ทำลายความปรารถนา, โอ้, ผู้ทำลายความปรารถนา, โอ้, ผู้ทำลายความปรารถนา
translations.tr: Ey İsteklerin Yok Edicisi, Ey İsteklerin Yok Edicisi, Ey İsteklerin Yok Edicisi, Ey İsteklerin Yok Edicisi.
translations.uk: О, Руйнівнико бажань, О, Руйнівнико бажань, О, Руйнівнико бажань, О, Руйнівнико бажань.
translations.vi: Hỡi Đấng Chấm Dứt Mong Muốn, Hỡi Đấng Chấm Dứt Mong Muốn, Hỡi Đấng Chấm Dứt Mong Muốn, Hỡi Đấng Chấm Dứt Mong Muốn.
translations.zh-cn: 噢，欲望的毁灭者，噢，欲望的毁灭者，噢，欲望的毁灭者，噢，欲望的毁灭者。

mantras.name: OM, I bow to the Divine Mother, salutations.
mantras.english: OM, I bow to the Divine Mother, salutations.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, नमः देवी, नमस्कारः।
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic Hindu tradition, this mantra opens with Om — the primordial sound of all creation — then surrenders to the Divine Mother.
