translations.hi: "ओम" और "औम्" मूल रूप से एक ही मंत्र हैं, जो ब्रह्मांड की आदिम ध्वनि और परम वास्तविकता का प्रतिनिधित्व करते हैं। यद्यपि "औम्" ध्वनि का अधिक सटीक प्रतिनिधित्व है, जिसमें नासिका की गुंजन शामिल है, "ओम" का उपयोग अक्सर समानार्थक रूप से किया जाता है। इसलिए, एक उपयुक्त अनुवाद होगा: "ओम (औम्)," जो सर्वव्यापी और शाश्वत ब्रह्म को दर्शाता है।
translations.id: "Om" dan "Aum" pada dasarnya adalah mantra yang sama, yang mewakili suara primordial alam semesta dan realitas tertinggi. Meskipun "Aum" merupakan representasi yang lebih akurat dari suara tersebut, termasuk resonansi hidung, "Om" sering digunakan secara bergantian. Oleh karena itu, terjemahan yang sesuai adalah: "Om (Aum)," yang melambangkan Brahman yang meliputi segalanya dan abadi.
translations.it: "Om" e "Aum" sono essenzialmente la stessa mantra, che rappresenta il suono primordiale dell'universo e l'ultima realtà. Sebbene "Aum" sia una rappresentazione più precisa del suono, includendo la risonanza nasale, "Om" è spesso usato in modo intercambiabile. Pertanto, una traduzione appropriata potrebbe essere: "Om (Aum)", per indicare il Brahman onnicomprensivo ed eterno.
translations.ja: 「オーム（アウム）」は、宇宙の根源的な音であり、究極の現実を象徴する、基本的に同じマントラです。 「アウム」は、鼻腔の共鳴を含む、より正確な発音を表していますが、「オーム」はしばしばそれと置き換えて用いられます。 したがって、適切な訳としては、「オーム（アウム）」と表現し、これによって、包括的で永遠なブラフマン（梵）を示します。
translations.ko: "옴(옴)"은 우주의 근원적인 소리이자 궁극적인 실재를 상징하는, 기본적으로 동일한 만트라입니다. "옴(옴)"은 종종 "옴(옴)"과 혼용되어 사용되지만, "옴(옴)"은 그 소리의 정확성을 더 잘 나타내며, 특히 비음의 울림을 포함합니다. 따라서 적절한 번역은 "옴(옴)," 즉 모든 것을 포괄하며 영원한 브라흐만을 의미합니다.
translations.nl: "Om" en "Aum" zijn in wezen dezelfde mantra, die de oerklank van het universum en de ultieme realiteit vertegenwoordigen. Hoewel "Aum" een preciezere weergave is van het geluid, inclusief de nasaalresonantie, wordt "Om" vaak door elkaar gebruikt. Daarom zou een geschikte vertaling zijn: "Om (Aum)," wat de allesomvattende en eeuwige Brahman aanduidt.
translations.pl: "Om" i "Aum" to zasadniczo ten sam mantra, reprezentujący pierwotny dźwięk wszechświata i ostateczną rzeczywistość. Chociaż "Aum" jest dokładniejszym zapisem tego dźwięku, uwzględniającym nosowość, "Om" jest często używany zamiennie. Dlatego odpowiednie tłumaczenie to: "Om (Aum)", oznaczające wszechogarniające i wieczne Brahman.
translations.pt-br: "Om" e "Aum" são essencialmente o mesmo mantra, representando o som primordial do universo e a realidade última. Embora "Aum" seja uma representação mais precisa do som, incluindo a ressonância nasal, "Om" é frequentemente usado de forma intercambiável. Portanto, uma tradução adequada seria: "Om (Aum)", significando o Brahman onipresente e eterno.
translations.ru: "Ом" и "Аум" по сути являются одним и тем же мантрой, представляющей собой первозданный звук Вселенной и абсолютную реальность. Хотя "Аум" является более точным отображением звука, включая носовое созвучие, "Ом" часто используется как синоним. Таким образом, подходящим переводом будет: "Ом (Аум)", что означает всеобъемлющий и вечный Брахман.
translations.sv: "Om" och "Aum" är i grunden samma mantra, som representerar universums primära ljud och den ultimata verkligheten. Även om "Aum" är en mer exakt återgivning av ljudet, inklusive nasalresonansen, används "Om" ofta synonymt. Därför kan en lämplig översättning vara: "Om (Aum)", vilket uttrycker det allomfattande och eviga Brahman.
translations.th: "ออม" และ "อุม" เป็นคำที่ใช้แทนกันได้ ซึ่งมีความหมายเดียวกัน คือ มนต์ที่แสดงถึงเสียงกำเนิดของจักรวาล และความเป็นจริงสูงสุด แม้ว่า "อุม" จะเป็นการแสดงเสียงที่แม่นยำกว่า ซึ่งรวมถึงเสียงสระนาสิก แต่ "ออม" มักถูกใช้แทนได้ ดังนั้น คำแปลที่เหมาะสมคือ "ออม (อุม)" ซึ่งสื่อถึงพระพรหม (Brahman) ที่เป็นหนึ่งเดียวและเป็นนิรันดร์
translations.tr: "Om" ve "Aum", evrenin ilkel sesi ve nihai gerçekliği temsil eden temelde aynı mantradır. "Aum", burun rezonansını da içeren sesin daha kesin bir ifadesi olsa da, "Om" sıklıkla onun yerine kullanılır. Bu nedenle, uygun bir çeviri şu şekilde olacaktır: "Om (Aum)", bu, her şeyi kapsayan ve ebedi olan Brahman'ı ifade eder.
translations.uk: "Ом" і "Аум" – це по суті один і той же мантру, що представляє первісний звук Всесвіту та абсолютну реальність. Хоча "Аум" є більш точним відображенням звуку, включаючи носову резонанс, "Ом" часто використовується як взаємозамінний варіант. Тому, відповідний переклад буде: "Ом (Аум)", що означає всеосягий і вічний Брахман.
translations.vi: "Om" và "Aum" về cơ bản là một loại mantra, đại diện cho âm thanh nguyên thủy của vũ trụ và thực tại tối thượng. Mặc dù "Aum" là cách diễn tả chính xác hơn về âm thanh, bao gồm cả âm mũi, nhưng "Om" thường được sử dụng thay thế. Do đó, một bản dịch phù hợp có thể là: "Om (Aum)", biểu thị Brahman bao trùm và vĩnh cửu.
translations.zh-cn: “嗡”（Wēng）与“奥姆”（Àomǔ）本质上是同一个咒语，代表着宇宙的原始声音和终极实在。“奥姆”更精确地表示这种声音，包括鼻音共鸣，而“嗡”通常被用来指代它。因此，一个合适的翻译是：“嗡 (奥姆)”，意为包罗万象、永恒的梵。

mantras.name: Om, Ah, Hum.
mantras.english: Om, Ah, Hum.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ āḥ hum.
mantras.background: Om, Ah, Hum — a Buddhist mantra used for thousands of years to purify energy. Its sacred Sanskrit sounds resonate and vibrate, guiding the mind toward higher consciousness.
mantras.benefits: Om Ah Hum is said to purify the energy of one's space and deepen focus through its layered vibrations. Rooted in Buddhist and Hindu chanting, its three syllables resonate through body and mind, inviting stillness.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, yoga, pranava, sound, vibration, purification, focus, relaxation, healing

translations.es: Om, Ah, Hum.  "Om, Ah, Hum."
translations.ar: أوم، آه، هوم.
translations.bn: ওম, আহ, হম্।
translations.de: Om, Ah, Hum – Ein Ruf, ein Hauch, ein Flüstern.
translations.en-us: "Om, I am, He is."
translations.en-gb: "Om, Ah, Hum" represents a powerful mantra often associated with purification and transformation. "Om" is a primordial sound embodying the universe and ultimate reality. "Ah" signifies the purification of pride and ego, often linked to the throat chakra. "Hum" represents the purification of aggression and ignorance, associated with the heart chakra. A possible translation, therefore, is: "Through the primordial sound, purify ego and aggression."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, Ah, Hum.
translations.he: אָהוּם, אַה, הוּם.
translations.id: Om, Ah, Hum. (Diterjemahkan sebagai: "Om, Ah, Hum.")
translations.it: Om, Ah, Hum.
translations.ja: オーム、ア、フーム。
translations.ko: 옴, 아, 훔. (Om, a, hum.)
translations.nl: Om, Ah, Hum. Dit zijn klanken die vaak in spirituele praktijken worden gebruikt. Een mogelijke, betekenisvolle vertaling in het Nederlands zou zijn: "Om, ik adem in, ik adem uit." of "Om, ik roep de energie aan, ik laat de energie los."
translations.pl: Om, Ah, Hum - "Ohm, Ah, Hum".
translations.pt-br: Om, Ah, Hum.
translations.ru: Ом, А, Хум.
translations.sv: Om, Ah, Hum. – "Om, Ah, Hum." (eller, mer beskrivande: "Om, [ett uttryck för] 'ja', Hum.")
translations.th: ออม, อา, ฮัม.
translations.tr:
Om, Ah, Hum mantrasının anlamını yansıtan bir Türkçe çevirisi yapmak zordur, çünkü bu sözler belirli bir Hindu geleneğine ait ve doğrudan karşılıkları yoktur. Ancak, anlamlarına odaklanarak bir yaklaşım sunabiliriz:

"Om, Ah, Hum" genellikle şu anlamlara gelir:

*   **Om:** Evrenin, Brahman'ın veya mutlak gerçekliğin sesidir. Bu, kelimelerin ötesinde bir kavramdır.
*   **Ah:** Ben'in özünü, içsel benliği temsil eder.
*   **Hum:** Evrenin, tüm varoluşun özünü temsil eder.

Bu nedenle, bir çeviri şöyle olabilir:

"Om, içsel benliğin, tüm varoluşun sesidir."

Veya daha açıklayıcı bir şekilde:

"Om, evrenin başlangıçtaki titreşimidir; Ah, benim özüm; Hum, tüm varoluşun özüdür."
translations.uk: Ом, А, Хум.
translations.vi: ॐ, Âm, Hư.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，阿，吽。

mantras.name: Om, I am That.
mantras.english: Om, I am That.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, अहम् तत्.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, "Om" — the primordial sound of all creation — bridges the finite and infinite. Chant it, and touch the universe's very heartbeat.
mantras.benefits: Om anchors the mind in primordial stillness. Chanting its three sounds—A, U, M—maps waking, dream, and deep sleep states, while the silence after invites turiya. Research confirms theta-wave shifts and vagal calm.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, vedanta, yoga, brahman, advaita, self-realization, liberation, consciousness, unity, primordial, stillness

translations.es: Om, Yo Soy Eso.
translations.ar: أوم، أنا هو.
translations.bn: ওম, আমিই ও (অর্থাৎ, আমিই সেই)।
translations.de: Om, Ich bin Das.
translations.en-us: "Om, I am That."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I am That."
translations.fr-fr: Om, je suis Cela.
translations.he: אום, אני הוא.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं वह हूँ।
translations.id: Om, Aku adalah Itu.
translations.it: Om, io sono Ciò.
translations.ja: オーム、我はそれなり。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 그것이다. (Om, naneun geugeotida.)
translations.nl: Om, Ik ben Dat.
translations.pl: Om, Ja Jestem Tym.
translations.pt-br: Om, Eu Sou Aquilo.
translations.ru: Ом, Я есть То.
translations.sv: Om, jag är det.
translations.th: ออม, ข้าคือสิ่งนั้น.
translations.tr: Om, Ben O'yum.
translations.uk: Ом, Я – Це.
translations.vi: ॐ, Tôi là đó.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，我即是。

mantras.name: Om, I am That." or "Om, I am This.
mantras.english: Om, I am That." or "Om, I am This.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, अहम् तद् अस्मि। or ॐ, अहम् इदं अस्मि।
mantras.background:
From ancient Vedic roots, "Om So Hum" means "I am That" — identifying the self with all creation. A timeless Sanskrit key to unity consciousness.
  Grounding: Source states: "'So' means 'that' and 'hum' means 'I am'…translates to 'I am that'" and origins trace to ancient Hindu Vedic tradition.
mantras.benefits:
"Om So Hum" — "I am That" — unites self with universe. Rooted in Vedic tradition, it fosters deep unity consciousness. Science links mantra practice to reduced stress, theta brainwaves, and emotional healing.

  Grounding: Sources confirm Om So Hum means "I am that," identifying self with all creation; used for deep meditation and unity. Benefits supported by neurological and stress-reduction research cited in sources.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, vedanta, brahman, consciousness, unity, meditation, self-realization, peace, awakening

translations.es: "Om, Yo Soy Eso" o "Om, Yo Soy Esto".
translations.ar: "أوم، أنا هو." or "أوم، أنا هذا."
translations.bn: ওম, আমি সেটাই। অথবা, ওম, আমি এটাই।
translations.de: "Om, ich bin das." oder "Om, ich bin dies."
translations.en-us: "Om, I am That," or "Om, I am This."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I am That," or "Om, I am This."
translations.fr-fr: "Om, je suis Cela." ou "Om, je suis Ceci."
translations.he: אום, אני הוא." או "אום, אני זה."
translations.id: "Om, Aku adalah Itu." atau "Om, Aku adalah Ini."
translations.it: "Om, io sono Ciò." oppure "Om, io sono Quello."
translations.ja: オーム、私はそれなりである。 (Ōmu, watashi wa sore nari desu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 그것이다. (Om, naneun geugeotida.) or 옴, 나는 이것이다. (Om, naneun igeotida.)
translations.nl: "Om, ik ben Dat." of "Om, ik ben Dit."
translations.pl: Om, Ja Jestem Tym." or "Om, Ja Jestem Tą."
translations.pt-br: "Om, eu sou Isso." ou "Om, eu sou Aquilo."
translations.ru: Ом. Я есть Это.
translations.sv: Om, Jag är Det.
translations.th: "โอม, ข้าคือสิ่งนั้น" หรือ "โอม, ข้าคือสิ่งนี้"
translations.tr: "Om, Ben O'yum." veya "Om, Ben İşte Bu'yum."
translations.uk: Ом, Я є Те.
translations.vi: "Om, Ta là đó." hoặc "Om, Ta là đây."
translations.zh-cn: 唵，我即是。（或者：唵，我就是它。）

mantras.name: Om, I am the seed, hail, hum. Alternatively, Om, I am the essence, hail, hum.
mantras.english: Om, I am the seed, hail, hum. Alternatively, Om, I am the essence, hail, hum.
mantras.original: 唵ong 阿a弥mi栗li帝di吽hong发fa吒zha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, ahaṃ bījaḥ, praṇam, hum.  atha vā, ōṃ, ahaṃ sāraḥ, praṇam, hum.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic texts, Om is Hinduism's primordial sound — literally the universe's vibrational seed, spanning waking, dream, and transcendent states. Chant it and touch all of existence.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body & mind, linking waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into transcendent stillness. Research confirms theta brainwaves and vagal calm. Ancient Vedic wisdom calls it the universe's pulse—your own voice, the cosmos.
mantras.tags: hindu, primordial sound, meditation, vibration, healing, mantra, om, aum, pranava, vedanta, relaxation, sound healing

translations.es: Om, yo soy la semilla, saludo, hum. Alternativamente, Om, yo soy la esencia, saludo, hum.
translations.ar: "أوم، أنا البذرة، تحية، هوم." أو "أوم، أنا الجوهر، تحية، هوم."
translations.bn: ওম, আমি বীজ, ওহে, হম্। অথবা, ওম, আমি সার, ওহে, হম্।
translations.de: Om, ich bin der Same, Sei gegrüßt, Hum. Alternativ: Om, ich bin das Wesen, Sei gegrüßt, Hum.
translations.en-us: "Om, I am the origin/potential, salutations, hum." Alternatively, "Om, I am the essence, salutations, hum."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I am the source/potential, salutations, hum." Alternatively, "Om, I am the essence, salutations, hum."
translations.fr-fr: Om, je suis la graine, salutations, hum. Alternativement : Om, je suis l'essence, salutations, hum.
translations.he: אוֹם, אֲנִי הַזרע, הִתְגַּלּוּת, הוּם. לחלופין, אוֹם, אֲנִי הַמהות, הִתְגַּלּוּת, הוּם.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं बीज हूँ, वंदना, हूँ। या, ॐ, मैं सार हूँ, वंदना, हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya adalah benih, salam, hum. Atau, Om, saya adalah esensi, salam, hum.
translations.it: "Om, io sono il seme, saluto, Hum." oppure "Om, io sono l'essenza, saluto, Hum."
translations.ja: オーム、私は種子なり、讃えん、フーム。または、オーム、私は本質なり、讃えん、フーム。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 씨앗이다, 존경하여, 훔. 또는, 옴, 나는 본질이다, 존경하여, 훔.
translations.nl: "Om, ik ben de kiem, groet, hum." Of: "Om, ik ben de essentie, groet, hum."
translations.pl: Om, Ja jestem ziarnem, powitanie, Hum. Alternatywnie: Om, Ja jestem esencją, powitanie, Hum.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu sou a semente, salvação, hum. Alternativamente: Om, eu sou a essência, salvação, hum.
translations.ru: Ом, я есть семя, приветствую, Хум. Альтернативно: Ом, я есть сущность, приветствую, Хум.
translations.sv: Om, jag är fröet, lovprisning, hum. Alternativt: Om, jag är essensen, lovprisning, hum.
translations.th: โอ้ ม, ข้าคือต้นกำเนิด, ขอคารวะ, หึม. หรือ, โอ้ ม, ข้าคือแก่นแท้, ขอคารวะ, หึม.
translations.tr: Om, ben tohumum, selâm, hum. Alternatif olarak: Om, ben özüm, selâm, hum.
translations.uk: Ом, я є насінням, вітаю, хум. Або: Ом, я є суттю, вітаю, хум.
translations.vi: Ôm, tôi là hạt giống, chào, hừm. Hoặc, Ôm, tôi là bản chất, chào, hừm.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，我即是本源，敬颂，嗡。 或者： 唵，我即是精髓，敬颂，嗡。

mantras.name: Om, I am united with, it is absorbed.
mantras.english: Om, I am united with, it is absorbed.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, अहम् संयुतः, एतत् आसीकृतम्।
mantras.background: Om (ॐ) — Sanskrit's primordial sound from Vedic Hindu tradition. Its syllables A-U-M map waking, dream & deep sleep states, uniting all existence in one sacred vibration.
mantras.benefits: Om anchors the wandering mind, resonates through body & skull, and may shift brainwaves toward deep meditative theta states. Vedic tradition calls it the vibrational bridge between finite self and infinite Brahman.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pranava, chanting, vibration, relaxation, focus, consciousness, healing, brahman, peace, universal

translations.es: Om, yo estoy unido con, está absorbido.
translations.ar: أوم، أنا متحد مع، إنه ممتص.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি একীভূত হয়েছি, এটি শোষিত হয়েছে।
translations.de: Om, ich bin eins mit, es ist absorbiert.
translations.en-us: "Om, I am united with it, it is absorbed."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I am united with it; it is absorbed within me."
translations.fr-fr: Om, je suis uni(e) avec, cela est absorbé.
translations.he: אוֹם, אני מאוחד עם, זה נספג.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं एकीकृत हूँ, यह आत्मसात हो गया है।
translations.id: Om, saya bersatu dengan, ia diserap.
translations.it: Om, io sono unito, essa è assorbita.
translations.ja: オーム、私は一体化し、それは吸収される。 (Ōmu, watashi wa ichitai-ka shi, sore wa kyūsu sare ru.)
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 하나됨으로써, 그것은 흡수됩니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik ben verenigd met, het is opgenomen.
translations.pl: Om, Ja jestem zjednoczony z tym, to jest wchłonięte.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu estou unido com, está absorvido.
translations.ru: Ом, я объединен с этим, это поглощено.
translations.sv: Om, jag är förenad med, det absorberas.
translations.th: ขอให้ข้าพเจ้ารวมเป็นหนึ่งเดียวกับสิ่งนั้น, ขอให้สิ่งนั้นหลอมรวมเข้ากับข้าพเจ้า.
translations.tr: Om, ben birleştim, bu emildi.
translations.uk: Ом, я єдиний з, це поглинуто.
translations.vi: Om, tôi hòa nhập với, nó được dung hòa.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我与（它）合一，（它）被我吸收。

mantras.name: Om, I bow down to Narayana.
mantras.english: Om, I bow down to Narayana.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, namo narāyaṇāya.
mantras.background: From ancient Hindu tradition, 'Om Namo Narayanaya' means 'Om, salutations to Narayana/Vishnu' — a sacred Nama japa mantra inviting divine devotion.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Om Namo Narayanaya" blends Om's primordial resonance with devotional surrender, cultivating inner stillness, bhakti focus, and connection to divine preservation — a meditative doorway spanning Vedic japa tradition.
mantras.tags: hindu, narayana, vishnu, devotion, bhakti, vaishnava, prayer, japa, vedic, salutation

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante Narayana.
translations.ar: أوم، أتوجه بالخضوع إلى نارايانا.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি নারায়ণের কাছে নিজেকে সমর্পণ করছি।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor Narayana.
translations.en-us: "Om, I offer my reverence to Narayana."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to Narayana."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, je m'incline devant Narayana.
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה לנרַיָאנָה.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं नारायण को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Narayana.
translations.it: Om, mi prostro davanti a Narayana.
translations.ja: オーム、私はナラヤナに敬意を捧げます。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 나라야나께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik buig voor Narayana.
translations.pl: Om, ja się kłaniam Narayaniemu.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro diante de Narayana.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Нараяной.
translations.sv: Om, jag böjer mig i vördnad inför Narayana.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมนมัสการพระนารายณ์, โอม.
translations.tr: Om, Ben Narayana'ya saygı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся Нараяні.
translations.vi: Om, con cúi lạy Narayana.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向那拉亚纳（Narayana）致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to Durga.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to Durga.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, namo dūrgai.
mantras.background: From Vedic Hindu tradition, "Om Durgayai Namah" unites the primordial sound Om with a bow to Durga. Om — creation's vibrational seed — anchors this devotional salutation.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Om Durgayei Namaha" blends Om's primordial resonance with devotion to Durga, cultivating focus, inner strength, and calm. Traditional practice links it to removing obstacles and awakening courage.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, devotion, durga, goddess, prayer, healing, sound, consciousness

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante Durga.
translations.ar: أوم، أُسَلِّم لـ "دوْرْغَا".
translations.bn: ওম, আমি দুর্গার কাছে নমস্কার জানাই।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor Durga.
translations.en-us: "Om, I bow to Durga."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to Durga."
translations.fr-fr: "Om, je m'incline devant Durgā."
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה לדורגה.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं दुर्गा को प्रणाम करता/करती हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Durga.
translations.it: Om, mi prostro a Durgā.
translations.ja: オーム、私はデュルガーに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 두르가 여신께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik buig voor Durga.
translations.pl: Om, składam pokłon Durgi.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro diante de Durgā.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняю голову перед Дурга.
translations.sv: Om, jag böjer mig i vördnad inför Durga.
translations.th: ข้าขอรำลึกถึงและบูชาพระธวัช.
translations.tr: Om, Durga'ya saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся Дурзі.
translations.vi: Ôm, con kính cẩn dâng lời nguyện cầu lên Đức Durga.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向杜迦女神致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to Mahasarasvati.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to Mahasarasvati.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, aham praṇamo mahāsarasaṃvatin.
mantras.background:
"Om, I bow to Mahasarasvati" — a Hindu devotional mantra prefixing Om, the primordial Vedic sound, with reverence to a deity. Rooted in Sanskrit tantric tradition where mantras invoke divine power.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Om is the foundational Hindu pranava mantra, prefixed to all prayers; longer mantras name deities; tantric mantras invoke divine energy through sacred sound.
mantras.benefits: "Om Mahasarasvati Namah" blends Om—the primordial source of all existence—with devotional surrender, channeling focused intention toward wisdom and inner clarity through sacred sound.
mantras.tags: hindu, devotional, vedic, prayer, japa, universal

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante Mahasarasvati.
translations.ar: أوم، أُسَلِّمُ إلى ماهَشْوَارِي.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি মহাশ্বরূপতীর কাছে প্রণতি জানাই।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor Mahāsaradvatī.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, I bow to the Great Sarasvatī.
translations.en-gb: Om, I offer my reverence to Mahasarasvati.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, je m'incline devant Mahāsarasvatī.
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה למאחסרוותי.
translations.hi: मैं, ओम्, महासरस्वती को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Mahasarasvati.
translations.it: Om, io mi prostro davanti a Mahāsaradvatī.
translations.ja: オーム、私はマハサラスヴァティに礼拝します。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 마하사라스바티께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik buig voor Mahasarasvati.
translations.pl: Om, składam pokłon Mahaśaraswati.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro diante de Mahasarasvati.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Махасарасвати.
translations.sv: Om, jag böjer mig för Mahasarasvati.
translations.th: ข้าขอสักการะพระมหาศรศวตี ด้วยความเคารพ.
translations.tr: Om, Büyük Sarasvati'ye saygılarımla eğiliyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся перед Махасарасваті.
translations.vi: Ôm, con kính cúng Mahasarasvati.
translations.zh-cn: ōm, 我向伟大的 Sarasvatī 女神致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to Shiva.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to Shiva.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ नमः शिवाय।
mantras.background:
Om Namah Shivaya: a Shaivite Sanskrit mantra meaning "Om, I bow to Shiva." Rooted in Vedic-Tantric tradition, it unites the primordial sound Om with devotion to Shiva — the divine force of transformation.
  Grounding: Source names Om as pranava/source of all mantras; Tantric texts link Shiva to cosmic dissolution; mantra structure follows Sanskrit devotional form per source.
mantras.benefits: Om Namah Shivaya unites the primordial sound Om with devotion to Shiva—dissolution and transformation. Chanting it cultivates surrender, inner stillness, and connection to universal consciousness, inviting the practitioner toward spiritual liberation.
mantras.tags: hindu, shiva, om, devotional, vedic, tantric, liberation, healing, peace

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante Shiva.
translations.ar: أوم، أُسَلِّمُ لشيفا.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি শিবের প্রতি প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor Shiva.
translations.en-us: "Om, I offer my reverence to Shiva."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to Shiva."
translations.fr-fr: Om, je m'incline devant Shiva.
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה לשיבה.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं शिव को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Shiva.
translations.it: Om, mi prostro a Shiva.
translations.ja: オーム、私はシヴァ神に礼を捧げます。 (Ōmu, watashi wa Shiva-kami ni rei o hagema-masu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 저는 시바께 숭배합니다. (Om, jeoneun Sibakge sungba hamnida.)
translations.nl: Om, ik buig voor Shiva.
translations.pl: Om. Składam pokłon Śiwie.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro diante de Shiva.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Шивой.
translations.sv: Om, jag vördar Shiva.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาพระศิวะ, พร้อมด้วยความเคารพต่อ "อม"
translations.tr: Om, Shiva'ya saygı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся Шиві.
translations.vi: Ôm, con cúi lạy Shiva.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向湿婆（Shìbō）致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to the Divine." or "Om, I offer my salutations to the Blessed One.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to the Divine." or "Om, I offer my salutations to the Blessed One.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, नमः divine.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic texts, Om is Hinduism's primordial sound—the vibration behind all creation. Chanting A-U-M bridges waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into transcendent stillness.
mantras.benefits: Om's three syllables harmonize waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states. Research links its chanting to theta brainwaves and vagal stimulation — bridging ancient Vedic wisdom and modern neuroscience in one breath.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, brahman, pranava, creation, divine, chanting, healing, liberation, peace, primordial, yoga

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante lo Divino." or "Om, ofrezco mis reverencias al Ser Bendito."
translations.ar: "أوم، أتضرع إلى الخالق." or "أوم، أقدم تحياتي إلى المُبارك."
translations.bn: ওম, আমি সেই ঐশ্বরিক সত্তার কাছে প্রণতি জানাই।" অথবা, "ওম, আমি সেই ধন্য সত্তার উদ্দেশ্যে শ্রদ্ধা নিবেদন করি।"
translations.de: "Om, ich verneige mich vor dem Göttlichen." oder "Om, ich erichte meine Ehrfurcht an den Erhabenen."
translations.en-us: "Om, I offer my reverence to the Divine."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to the Divine." or "Om, I proffer my salutations to the Blessed One."
translations.fr-fr: "Om, je m'incline devant le Divin." ou "Om, je rends hommage au Bienheureux."
translations.he: אוֹם, אני משתחווה לאלוהי.
translations.hi: "ॐ, मैं दिव्य शक्ति को प्रणाम करता हूँ।" अथवा "ॐ, मैं पवित्र आत्मा को प्रणाम करता हूँ।"
translations.id: "Om, saya membungkuk di hadapan Yang Mahaagung." atau "Om, saya memberikan penghormatan kepada Yang Terberkati."
translations.it: Om, mi prostro al Divino. Oppure: Om, offro i miei saluti al Beato.
translations.ja: オーム、私は神に敬意を表します。(Ōmu, watashi wa kami ni keii o arawasimasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 저는 신성한 존재께 경배합니다. (Om, jeoneun sinsanghan jonjaege gyeongbaehapnida.)
translations.nl: "Om, ik buig voor het Goddelijke." of "Om, ik bied mijn eerbied aan de Verhevene."
translations.pl: Om, składam pokłon Boskości.
translations.pt-br: "Om, eu me prostro diante do Divino." ou "Om, eu ofereço minhas saudações ao Ser Abençoado."
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Божественным." или "Ом, я предлагаю свои приветствия Благословенному."
translations.sv: "Om, jag böjer mig i vördnad inför det gudomliga." or "Om, jag frambär mina vördnadsfulla hälsningar till den välsignade."
translations.th: ขอพระเป็นเจ้า, ข้าพเจ้าขอคารวะต่อสิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์.
translations.tr: "Om, İlahi'ye saygı sunuyorum." veya "Om, Mükemmel Varlığa saygı sunuyorum."
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся перед Божественним." або "Ом, я висловлюю шану Благословенному."
translations.vi: Om, con kính cúng dâng.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向神灵致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to the Kundalini.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to the Kundalini.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, aham kuṇḍalīnīm namāmi.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, "Om" is the primordial sound of all creation — the universe's first vibration, bridging waking, dreaming, and transcendent states.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om quiets the mind instantly. Vedic tradition calls it the universe's heartbeat — uniting waking, dreaming & deep sleep into one luminous awareness. Science confirms its calming, brain-wave-shifting power.
mantras.tags: hindu, kundalini, mantra, om, vibration, tantric, sound, meditation, awakening, shakti, cosmology, primordial

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante la Kundalini.
translations.ar: أوم، أتضرع إلى الكونداليني.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি কুন্ডलिनीকে প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor der Kundalini.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, I prostrate before the Kundalini.
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to the Kundalini."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, je m'incline devant la Kundalinî.
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה לכושלני.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं कुण्डलिनी को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Kundalini.
translations.it: Om, mi prostro al Kundalini.
translations.ja: オーム、私はクンダリニーに礼拝します。 (Ōmu, watashi wa Kundarini ni reibai shimasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 쿤달리니에게 경배합니다. (Om, naneun kundallin-iege gyeongbaehapnida.)
translations.nl: Om, ik buig voor de Kundalini.
translations.pl: Om, kłaniam się Kundalini.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro perante a Kundaliní.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Кундалини.
translations.sv: Om, jag böjer mig i vördnad inför Kundalini.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาพลังแห่งกุณฑาลินี.
translations.tr: Om, Kundalini'ye saygı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся Кундаліні.
translations.vi: Ôm, con cúi lạy Năng lượng Kundalini.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向库尔德纳里（Kundalini）敬礼。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to the one who removes obstacles.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to the one who removes obstacles.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, aham namaḥ, yasya nihāre vighnān.
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, this Sanskrit mantra salutes Ganesh, remover of obstacles. "Om Gam Ganapataye Namaha" — chant it when starting new projects!
mantras.benefits: Bowing to Ganesha, remover of obstacles, this mantra channels focus and courage to begin new endeavors. Practitioners report clarity, reduced anxiety, and renewed momentum when facing life's blockages.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesh, devotional, obstacles, prosperity, invocation, success, beginnings

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante aquel que elimina los obstáculos.
translations.ar: أوم، أُسَلِّمُ لِلَّذِي يُزِيلُ العَوَائِق.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি সেই সত্তার কাছে মাথা নত করি, যিনি সকল বাধা দূর করেন।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor dem, der Hindernisse beseitigt.
translations.en-us: "Om, I bow to the one who dispels obstacles."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to the one who dispels impediments."
translations.fr-fr: Om, je m'incline devant Celui qui ôte les obstacles.
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה למי שמסיר מכשולים.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं उस शक्ति को नमन करता हूँ जो बाधाओं को दूर करती है।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Yang Maha Menghilangkan Hambatan.
translations.it: Om, mi prostro a Colui che dissolve gli ostacoli.
translations.ja: ஓむ、私は障害を取り除く存在に敬意を捧げます。 (Om, watashi wa shōgai o toriokeru sonzai ni keii o sasemasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 저는 모든 장애를 제거하시는 분께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Om, Ik boog voor Hem die obstakels wegneemt.
translations.pl: Om, skłaniam się przed Tym, który usuwa przeszkody.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro perante aquele que remove os obstáculos.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Тем, кто устраняет препятствия.
translations.sv: Om, jag böjer mig för den som avlägsnar hinder.
translations.th: ขอพระนาม ॐ, ข้าพเจ้าขอรำลึกถึงพระผู้ซึ่งขจัดอุปสรรค.
translations.tr: Om, engelleri ortadan kaldıran kişiye saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся Тому, Хто усуває перешкоди.
translations.vi: Om, con kính cúng dâng Người, đấng phá tan mọi chướng ngại.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，我向消除障碍的那一位致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I bow to the sound-maker, the possessor of the sacred syllable, the one who has the power of transformation, the one who is full of energy, the one who is the essence of all things.
mantras.english: Om, I bow to the sound-maker, the possessor of the sacred syllable, the one who has the power of transformation, the one who is full of energy, the one who is the essence of all things.
mantras.original: 唵阿謨伽尾嚧左曩摩賀母捺囉麼抳鉢納麼入嚩攞鉢囉韈哆野吽
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, aham nāmācchakaḥ, pūrṇapadāṃśi, parivṛtta-śabdākaraḥ, mahātmā, udaraprabhavaḥ, sarvaṃsatvarūpaḥ.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic & Vajrayāna traditions, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation. Each syllable unlocks cosmic wisdom—transformation, pure energy, and universal essence.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om activates theta brainwaves and vagal nerve responses, inducing deep calm. Each syllable — A, U, M — maps to waking, dream, and deep sleep, guiding the mind toward turiya: pure, transcendent awareness beyond ordinary consciousness.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pranava, sound, devotional, chanting, healing, consciousness, peace, cosmic, transformative, brahman

translations.es: Om, me inclino ante el creador del sonido, el poseedor de la sílaba sagrada, aquel que tiene el poder de la transformación, el que está lleno de energía, el que es la esencia de todas las cosas.
translations.ar: أوم، أُسَلِّمُ إلى خالق الصوت، حاملُ المَقَامِ المُقدَّس، ذو القدرة على التحويل، المُمتلئ بالطاقة، جوهرُ كلِّ شيء.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি সেই সত্তাকে প্রণাম জানাই যিনি শব্দ উৎপাদক, যিনি পবিত্র সিলেবলের অধিকারী, যিনি রূপান্তরের শক্তি রাখেন, যিনি শক্তি সম্পদে পরিপূর্ণ, এবং যিনি সকল কিছুর সার।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor dem Klangschöpfer, dem Besitzer der heiligen Silbe, dem, der die Macht der Transformation besitzt, dem, der voller Energie ist, dem, der das Wesen aller Dinge ist.
translations.en-us: "Om. I bow to the one who creates sound, the possessor of the sacred syllable, the one who possesses the power of transformation, the one who is full of energy, the one who is the essence of all existence."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to the source of sound, the one who embodies the sacred syllable, the possessor of transformative power, the being overflowing with energy, the very essence of all existence."
translations.fr-fr: Om, je m'incline devant celui qui produit le son, le détenteur de la syllabe sacrée, celui qui possède le pouvoir de transformation, celui qui est plein d'énergie, celui qui est l'essence de toutes choses.
translations.he: אָה, אֲנִי מִתְכַחֵן לְתוֹצֵר הַצְּלִיל, לְתוֹבֵעַ הַהֵיחָל הַקּדוֹשׁ, לְמִי שֶׁיֵּשׁ כֹּחַ שֶׁל הֶפְכָּה, לְמִי שֶׁמָלֵא אֶנֶרְגְיָה, לְמִי שֶׁהוּא מַהֲלוּת הַכֹּל.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं उस ध्वनि-उत्पादक को प्रणाम करता हूँ, जो पवित्र शब्दांश का स्वामी है, जिसके पास परिवर्तन की शक्ति है, जो ऊर्जा से भरपूर है, और जो सभी वस्तुओं का सार है।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Sang Pencipta Suara, Pemilik suku kata suci, Yang memiliki kekuatan transformasi, Yang penuh dengan energi, Yang merupakan esensi dari segala sesuatu.
translations.it: Om, mi prostro al creatore del suono, al possessore della sacra sillaba, a colui che ha il potere di trasformazione, a colui che è pieno di energia, a colui che è l'essenza di tutte le cose.
translations.ja: オーム。私は、音を生み出す者、聖なる音節を持つ者、変容の力を有する者、エネルギーに満ちた者、そして万物の本質である者に、敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴(Om), 저는 소리를 내는 분께, 신성한 음절을 소유하신 분께, 변화를 일으키는 힘을 가진 분께, 모든 에너지의 근원인 분께, 그리고 모든 것의 본질이신 분께 경배합니다.
translations.nl: Om, Ik buig voor de schepper van geluid, de bezitter van de heilige lettergreep, degene die de kracht van transformatie bezit, degene die vol energie is, degene die de essentie van alle dingen is.
translations.pl: Om, Skłaniam się przed Tym, który jest źródłem dźwięku, posiadaczem świętej sylaby, Tym, który ma moc transformacji, Tym, który jest pełen energii, Tym, który jest esencją wszystkiego.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro perante aquele que é o criador do som, o detentor da sílaba sagrada, aquele que possui o poder de transformação, aquele que está repleto de energia, aquele que é a essência de todas as coisas.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Тоттем, Создателем звука, Обладателем священного слога, Тем, кто обладает силой преобразования, Тем, кто полон энергии, Тем, кто есть сущность всего сущего.
translations.sv: Om, jag böjer mig för den som skapar ljud, den som besitter det heliga stavelset, den som har förmågan att transformera, den som är full av energi, den som är essensen av allt.
translations.th: ขอพระนาม ออม ข้าพเจ้าขอคารวะแด่ผู้สร้างเสียง ผู้ซึ่งครอบครองพระพยัญชนะศักดิ์สิทธิ์ ผู้ซึ่งมีพลังในการเปลี่ยนแปลง ผู้ซึ่งเปี่ยมด้วยพลัง ผู้ซึ่งเป็นแก่นสารของสรรพสิ่ง
translations.tr: Om, ses yaratan, kutsal heceli, dönüştürücü güce sahip, enerji dolu olan, her şeyin özü olan varlığa saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я склоняю голову перед Тим, хто создает звук, Хто обладает священным словом, Хто обладает силой трансформации, Хто полон энергии, Хто є суттю всього.
translations.vi: Ôm, con cúi lạy đấng tạo ra âm thanh, đấng nắm giữ âm tiết thiêng liêng, đấng có khả năng biến đổi, đấng tràn đầy năng lượng, đấng là bản chất của mọi sự vật.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向创造声音的存在致敬，向拥有神圣音节的存在致敬，向拥有转化力量的存在致敬，向充满能量的存在致敬，向万物之精的存在致敬。

mantras.name: Om, I surrender to the one who removes all sorrows, Ganesha.
mantras.english: Om, I surrender to the one who removes all sorrows, Ganesha.
mantras.transliteration: ௐ, நான் அனைத்து துயரங்களையும் நீக்குபவருக்கு, கணேஷாவிற்கு, என்னை அர்ப்பணிக்கிறேன்.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, "Om" is the primordial sound of all creation — chanted before every mantra, it vibrates through body and cosmos alike.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om activates deep meditative theta brainwaves and stimulates the vagal nerve, shifting consciousness toward stillness. As the universe's primordial vibration, it bridges waking, dreaming, and transcendent states — a gateway to profound inner peace.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, ganesha, devotional, healing, stillness, pranava, relaxation, universal

translations.es: Om, me entrego a aquel que disipa todas las tristezas, Ganesha.
translations.ar: أوم، أتوسل إلى ذلك الكائن الذي يزيل كل الأحزان، غانيشا.
translations.bn: ওম, আমি সেই সত্ত্বাকে সমর্পণ করি যিনি সকল দুঃখ দূর করেন, গণেশ।
translations.de: Om, ich ergebe mich demjenigen, der alle Leiden wegnimmt, Ganesha.
translations.en-us: Om, I surrender to Ganesha, the one who dispels all sorrows.
translations.en-gb: Om, I surrender to Ganesha, the one who dispels all sorrows.
translations.fr-fr: Om, je me soumets à Celui qui dissipe toutes les peines, Ganesha.
translations.he: אוֹם, אני נכנע לאל המוציא את כל הייאוש, גנֵשה.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं उस एक को समर्पित हूँ जो सभी दुखों को दूर करता है, गणेश।
translations.id: Om, aku menyerahkan diri kepada-Nya, Sang Pencabut Segala Kesedihan, Ganesha.
translations.it: Om, mi arrendo a colui che dissolve tutte le sofferenze, Ganesha.
translations.ja: オーム、私は全ての苦しみを取り除くガネーシャ神に身を委ねます。
translations.ko: 옴, 모든 고통을 없애시는 가네샤께 저 자신을 바칩니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik geef mezelf over aan Diegene die alle verdriet wegneemt, Ganesha.
translations.pl: Om. Ja składam się w ofierze temu, który usuwa całe cierpienie, Ganeszowi.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me entrego àquele que remove todas as tristezas, Ganesha.
translations.ru: Ом. Я предаюсь Тому, кто устраняет все печали, Ганеше.
translations.sv: Om, jag överlämnar mig till den som tar bort all sorg, Ganesha.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาและสละตัวตนแด่พระพิฆเนศ ผู้ขจัดความทุกข์ทั้งมวล
translations.tr: Om, tüm acıları gideren, Ganesha'ya teslim olurum.
translations.uk: Ом, я предаюсь Тому, Кто устраняет все печали, Ганешу.
translations.vi: Om, tôi xin phó mặc mình cho Đấng xua tan mọi khổ đau, Ganesha.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向消除一切痛苦的盖尼萨神献身。

mantras.name: Om, I take refuge in the divine presence that pervades everything. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
mantras.english: Om, I take refuge in the divine presence that pervades everything. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
mantras.original: ஓம் எங்கும் நிறைந்த இறைவனே சரணம் சரணம் சரணம் கணேசா
mantras.transliteration: ௐ, நான் எல்லாவற்றிலும் வியாபித்திருக்கும் தெய்வீக பிரசன்னத்தில் சரணடைகிறேன். கணேசா, கணேசா, கணேசா.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om is the primordial sound of all creation — chanted before every prayer, it bridges the finite and the infinite.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om stills the mind by resonating through body and skull, shifting brainwaves toward deep meditative theta states. It bridges waking, dreaming, and transcendence — unlocking stillness at the heart of existence.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, devotion, mantra, prayer, presence, refuge, ganesh, sound, vibration, meditation, divine

translations.es: Om, busco refugio en la presencia divina que impregna todo. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.ar: "أوم، ألجأ إلى الحضور الإلهي الذي يتخلل كل شيء. غانشا، غانشا، غانشا."
translations.bn: ওম, আমি সেই ঐশ্বরিক সত্তায় আশ্রয় গ্রহণ করি যা সবকিছুতে বিরাজমান। গণেশ, গণেশ, গণেশ।
translations.de: Om, ich suche Zuflucht in der göttlichen Gegenwart, die alles durchdringt. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.en-us: Om, I seek refuge in the divine presence that permeates all things. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.en-gb: Om, I seek refuge in the divine presence that permeates all things. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.fr-fr: Om, je me réfugie dans la présence divine qui imprègne tout. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.he: אום, אני מוצא מפלט בנוכחות האלוהית השורה על הכל. גנשה, גנשה, גנשה.
translations.hi:
ॐ, मैं उस दिव्य उपस्थिति में शरण लेता हूँ जो सब कुछ में व्याप्त है। गणेश, गणेश, गणेश।

ग्राउंडिंग:
*   "Om" remains "Om" as it is a sacred sound transcending direct translation.
*   "I take refuge" is translated as "मैं शरण लेता हूँ" (Main sharan leta hoon), which conveys the sense of seeking protection and solace.
*   "Divine presence" is translated as "दिव्य उपस्थिति" (Divya upasthiti), accurately representing the concept of a divine presence.
*   "That pervades everything" is translated as "जो सब कुछ में व्याप्त है" (Jo sab kuch mein vyapt hai), emphasizing the all-encompassing nature of the divine presence.
*   "Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha" remains "गणेश, गणेश, गणेश" (Ganesh, Ganesh, Ganesh) as it is the direct invocation of the deity's name. I have prioritized conveying the meaning and intent of the Tamil phrase in a natural-sounding Hindi translation.
translations.id: Om, saya berlindung pada kehadiran Ilahi yang meliputi segala sesuatu. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.it: Om, mi rifugio nella presenza divina che permea ogni cosa. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.ja: オーム。私は、あらゆるものに遍在する神聖な存在に保護を求めます。ガネーシャ、ガネーシャ、ガネーシャ。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 모든 것에 내재된 신성한 존재 안에서 피난처를 찾습니다. 가네샤, 가네샤, 가네샤.
translations.nl: Om, ik zoek toevlucht bij de goddelijke aanwezigheid die alles doordringt. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.pl: Om. Chronię się w obecności boskiej, która przenika wszystko. Ganészo, Ganészo, Ganészo.
translations.pt-br: Om, busco refúgio na presença divina que permeia tudo. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.ru: Ом. Я ищу убежище в божественном присутствии, которое пронизывает всё сущее. Ганеша, Ганеша, Ганеша.
translations.sv: Om, jag söker skydd i den gudomliga närvaron som genomsyrar allt. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.th: ข้าพเจ้าขอพึ่งพาในพระธรรมคำสอนที่แผ่ซึมอยู่ในทุกสิ่ง. กเนศ, กเนศ, กเนศ.
translations.tr: Om, her şeye nüfuz eden ilahi varlığa sığınıyorum. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.uk:
ஓம், நான் எல்லாவற்றையும் व्याप्तிருக்கும் தெய்வீக பிரசன்னத்தில் சரணடைகிறேன். கணேஷா, கணேஷா, கணேஷா.

**Український переклад:** Ом, я шукаю притулку в божественній присутності, яка пронизує все. Ганеша, Ганеша, Ганеша.
translations.vi: Ôm, tôi tìm nơi nương tựa trong sự hiện diện thiêng liêng bao trùm mọi vật. Ganesha, Ganesha, Ganesha.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，我寻求庇护于遍存于万物的神圣存在。  Ganesh, Ganesh, Ganesh。

mantras.name: Om, Mother, massage.
mantras.english: Om, Mother, massage.
mantras.transliteration: 옴, 어머니, 마사지.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation — the universe's very vibration, bridging waking life, dreams, and transcendence.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body & mind, bridging waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into transcendent stillness. Research confirms theta-wave shifts; Vedic tradition calls it the universe's vibrational root — one syllable, infinite depth.
mantras.tags: hindu, primordial sound, meditation, vibration, healing, sound healing, mantra, om, relaxation, autonomic nervous system, universal, vedic

translations.es: Om, Madre, masaje.
translations.ar: يا أم، يا والدة، تدليك.
translations.bn: ওম, মা, ম্যাসাজ।
translations.de: Om, Mutter, Massage.
translations.en-us: Om, Mother, massage.
translations.en-gb: Om, Mother, massage.
translations.fr-fr: Om, Mère, massage.
translations.he: הוֹם, אם, עיסוי.
translations.hi: ॐ, माँ, मालिश।
translations.id: Om, Ibu, pijat.
translations.it: Om, Madre, massaggio.
translations.ja: オーム、母、マッサージ。
translations.ko: 옴, 어머니, 마사지.
translations.nl: Om, Moeder, massage.
translations.pl: Om, Matko, masaż.
translations.pt-br: Om, Mãe, massagem.
translations.ru: Ом, Мать, массаж.
translations.sv: Om, mamma, massage.
translations.th: ออม, แม่, นวด
translations.tr: Om, Anne, masaj.
translations.uk: Ом, Мати, масаж.
translations.vi: Om, Mẹ, xoa bóp.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，母亲，按摩。

mantras.name: Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.english: Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
mantras.original: OM SHANTI SHANTI SHANTI ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्ति
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ.
mantras.background:
Rooted in Hindu/Vedic tradition, "Om Shanti Shanti Shanti" pairs the primordial sound Om with Shanti (peace), invoking harmony for all beings across body, mind, and spirit.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Om is the primordial universe-sound; Shanti means peace; the mantra invokes peace for all beings in Hindu/Buddhist devotional and yoga contexts.
mantras.benefits:
Om Shanti Shanti Shanti invokes universal peace—for self, community, and all beings. Rooted in Hindu and Buddhist tradition, it cultivates inner stillness, reduces stress, and elevates consciousness through sacred vibration.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Om Shanti Shanti Shanti invokes peace for all beings, used in Hindu/Buddhist ceremonies and yoga, with vibrations reducing stress and elevating awareness.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, yoga, shanti, peace, healing, harmony, compassion

translations.es: Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ar: "أوم، سلام، سلام، سلام."
translations.bn: ॐ, शान्ति, शान्ति, शान्ति।
translations.de: Om, Friede, Friede, Friede.
translations.en-us: "Om, Peace, Peace, Peace."
translations.en-gb: Om, Peace, Peace, Peace.
translations.fr-fr: Om, Paix, Paix, Paix.
translations.he: אוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.id: Om, Damai, Damai, Damai.
translations.it: Om, Pace, Pace, Pace.
translations.ja: オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Om, Vrede, Vrede, Vrede.
translations.pl: Om, Pokój, Pokój, Pokój.
translations.pt-br: Om, Paz, Paz, Paz.
translations.ru: Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.sv: Om, Fred, Fred, Fred.
translations.th: ออม, สันติ, สันติ, สันติ
translations.tr: Om, Huzur, Huzur, Huzur.
translations.uk: Ом, Мир, Мир, Мир.
translations.vi: ॐ, Hòa bình, Hòa bình, Hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，祈愿和平，祈愿和平，祈愿和平。

mantras.name: Om, Salutations to Hayagriva, Accomplished!
mantras.english: Om, Salutations to Hayagriva, Accomplished!
mantras.transliteration: ॐ སེམས་དཔའ་ཧྱ་གྲུ་བདག་ཆེན་པོ།
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic tradition, "Om"—the primordial cosmic sound—opens this mantra invoking Hayagriva, promising obstacles cleared and wisdom awakened.
mantras.benefits: Clears obstacles, awakens inner wisdom, and channels compassionate power. Practitioners report progress, abundance, and sublime realizations — a transformative blend of Om's primordial stillness and Hayagriva's enlightened force.
mantras.tags: om, hayagriva, devotional, vedic, clearing, progress, abundance, creativity, compassion, wisdom, realization

translations.es: Om, Saludos a Hayagriva, ¡Realizado! / Om, Saludos a Hayagriva, ¡Logrado!
translations.ar:
ཨོཾ་ཨཱཿཧཱ་ཡ་གྲིབ་བཀྲ་ཤིས་། བཀྲ་ཤིས་བདེ་ལེགས།

"أوم، تحية لهياغريف، التام! السلام والبركات."
translations.bn: ওম, হেয়াগ্রিভার প্রতি প্রণতি, যিনি совершен!
translations.de: Om, Salutationen an Hayagriva, den Vollendeten!
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to Hayagriva, the accomplished one!
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Hayagriva, the accomplished one!
translations.fr-fr: Om, Salutations à Hayagriva, Accomplissement parfait !
translations.he: אום, ברכות להאגיריבה, השלם!
translations.hi: ॐ, हे हयग्रीव, आपको प्रणाम, आप महान हैं!
translations.id: Om, Salam untuk Hayagriva, yang Sempurna!
translations.it: Om, Salve, Hayagriva, colui che ha raggiunto la perfezione!
translations.ja: オーム、成就したハヤグリヴァ神への敬意。
translations.ko: 옴, 현명한 하야그리바께 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om, Groet aan Hayagriva, de Volmaakte!
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla Hayagriwy, Oświecony!
translations.pt-br: Om, Salvação a Hayagriva, o Realizado!
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Хайагриве, Совершенному!
translations.sv: Om, Hälsningar till Hayagriva, den fulländade!
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่พระไหยกริวา ผู้บรรลุคุณธรรม
translations.tr: Om, Hayagriva'ya saygı duruşum, Mükemmel!
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю Хаяґріва, Досягнутого!
translations.vi: Om, Kính chào Hayagriva, Đấng Giác Ngộ!
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向成就圆满的护法海格里瓦合十致敬！

mantras.name: Om, Tat, Sat.
mantras.english: Om, Tat, Sat.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ तत् सत्
mantras.background: "Om Tat Sat" — a classical Hindu mantra from ancient Vedic tradition. "Om" is the primordial cosmic sound; "Tat" means "That" (the absolute); "Sat" means "Truth/Reality."
mantras.benefits: Om Tat Sat — "The Absolute Truth" — anchors the mind in cosmic reality, offering psychological stability in crisis and deepening spiritual self-awareness through sustained repetition (japa).
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, chanting, stability, peace, healing, focus, truth, cosmic, liberation

translations.es: Om, Así es, Es la verdad.
translations.ar: "أوم، هذا، هو الحقيقة".
translations.bn: ওম, তৎ, সত্ত্ব।
translations.de: Om, Dies, Das, Dies.
translations.en-us: Om, That, Truth.
translations.en-gb: Om, That, Truth.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, Ceci est, Cela est, Il est.
translations.he: אוֹם, אֶת-הַמָּהוּת, הַמֶּאֱמֶת.
translations.hi: ॐ, तत्, सत्यम्।
translations.id: Om, Ini, Itu, Kena.
translations.it: Om, Ciò, Quello.
translations.ja: オーム、タット、サット。
translations.ko: 옴 (Om), 이것 (이것), 참됨 (진실).
translations.nl: Om, Dit, Is.
translations.pl: Om, To, To.
translations.pt-br: Om, Isso (ou Aquilo), Verdade.
translations.ru: Ом, То, Это.
translations.sv: Om, Det, Sanningen.
translations.th: ออม, นั่นคือ, ความจริง.
translations.tr: Om, O, Gerçek, Olan.
translations.uk: Ом, Те, Це.
translations.vi:
ॐ, "Om," là biểu tượng của Brahman, của thực tại tối thượng. "Tat" có nghĩa là "thực tại," "sự thật," "điều hiện hữu." "Sat" cũng có nghĩa là "thực tại," "chân lý," "tốt lành," nhưng nhấn mạnh khía cạnh thiêng liêng và vĩnh cửu.

Dịch sát nghĩa: "ॐ, Thực tại, Chân lý."
translations.zh-cn: 唵，实，存在。

mantras.name: Om, That, Truth.
mantras.english: Om, That, Truth.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, tat, satyaṃ.
mantras.background:
From ancient Sanskrit, "Om Tat Sat" means "Om, That, Truth" — a Vedic invocation of absolute reality, connecting the primordial sound to the eternal truth of existence.
  Grounding: Source lists "Om Tat Sat" as Hindu Sanskrit mantra meaning "Om, that is the truth," linking it to Vedic tradition of sacred sound and absolute reality.
mantras.benefits:
Om Tat Sat connects the practitioner to ultimate truth (Sat) and the absolute (Tat), anchoring the mind beyond illusion. Rooted in Vedic tradition, it cultivates clarity, authenticity, and a profound sense of alignment with cosmic reality.
  Grounding: Source lists Om Tat Sat as meaning "That is truth," connecting to truth's energy. Vedic tradition links Om to Brahman/absolute reality per the existing Om entry.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, truth, sanskrit, transcendental, affirmation, consciousness, focus, brahman, meditation

translations.es: Om, Eso, Verdad.
translations.ar: "أوم، ذلك، الحق."
translations.bn: ওম, সেই, সত্য।
translations.de: Om, Das, Wahrheit.
translations.en-us: Oṁ, That is Truth.
translations.en-gb: "Om, That is Truth."
translations.fr-fr: Om, Ceci est la Vérité.
translations.he: אוֹם, זה, האמת.
translations.hi: ॐ, वह, सत्य।
translations.id: Om, Itulah, Kebenaran.
translations.it: Om, Ciò, Verità.
translations.ja: オーム、それ（は）、真理。
translations.ko: 옴, 그것은, 진리입니다.
translations.nl: Om, Dat, Waarheid.
translations.pl: Om, To, Prawda.
translations.pt-br: Om, Aquilo, Verdade.
translations.ru: Ом, Это, Истина.
translations.sv: Om, Det, Sanningen.
translations.th: ออม, นั่น, สัจจะ.
translations.tr: Om, O, Hakikat.
translations.uk: Ом, Це, Істина.
translations.vi: ॐ, Điều đó, Chân lý.
translations.zh-cn: 唵， 那个， 真理。

mantras.name: Om, Truth is the essential nature of being." or "Om, I affirm the truth of my essence.
mantras.english: Om, Truth is the essential nature of being." or "Om, I affirm the truth of my essence.
mantras.transliteration: `oṃ, satyaṃ satvasya sāttvam asti.` or `oṃ, satyaṃ mama sattvasya sāttvaṃ.`
mantras.background: From Vedic tradition, "Sat Nam" means "Truth is my identity." Rooted in Kundalini yoga, this Sanskrit affirmation connects practitioners to their essential, timeless self.
mantras.benefits: Om anchors the mind in primordial stillness. Its A-U-M vibrations resonate through body and skull, calming the nervous system. Research links it to theta brainwaves and vagal stimulation — a bridge to turiya, pure awareness.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, primordial, affirmation, truth, chanting, healing, consciousness, brahman, empower, sound

translations.es: Om, la Verdad es la esencia fundamental del ser." o "Om, afirmo la verdad de mi propia esencia."
translations.ar: "أوم، إنّ الحق هو الجوهر الأساسي للوجود." أو "أوم، أنا أُقرُّ بحقيقة وجودي."
translations.bn: ওম, সত্যই সত্তার মূল প্রকৃতি।" অথবা, "ওম, আমি আমার সত্তার সত্যকে স্বীকার করছি।"
translations.de: "Om, die Wahrheit ist das Wesen des Seins." oder "Om, ich bekräftige die Wahrheit meines Wesens."
translations.en-us: "Om, Truth is the fundamental reality of existence," or "Om, I affirm the truth of my inherent nature."
translations.en-gb: "Om, Truth is the fundamental reality of existence," or "Om, I affirm the truth of my essential self."
translations.fr-fr: Om, La vérité est la nature essentielle de l'être. Ou : Om, j'affirme la vérité de mon essence.
translations.he: אום, האמת היא המהות המהותית של הקיום. או: אום, אני מכריז על אמיתות מהותי.
translations.hi: ॐ, सत्य ही अस्तित्व का सार है।" अथवा "ॐ, मैं अपने अस्तित्व की सत्यता की घोषणा करता हूँ।"
translations.id: Om, Kebenaran adalah hakikat dasar keberadaan. atau, Om, Saya menegaskan kebenaran dari hakikat diri saya.
translations.it: "Om, la Verità è la natura essenziale dell'essere." oppure "Om, affermo la verità della mia essenza."
translations.ja: オーム、真理は存在の本質です。(Ōmu, shinri wa sonzai no honshitsu desu.) または、オーム、私は私の本質としての真理を確認します。(Ōmu, watashi wa watashi no honshitsu to shite no shinri o kakunin shimasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, "진리는 존재의 본질이다." 또는 "옴, 나는 나의 본질의 진실을 확인합니다."
translations.nl: "Om, de waarheid is de wezenlijke aard van het zijn," of "Om, ik bevestig de waarheid van mijn essentie."
translations.pl: Om. Prawda jest esencją istnienia. Albo: Om. Potwierdzam prawdę mojego istnienia.
translations.pt-br: "Om, a Verdade é a natureza essencial do ser" ou "Om, eu afirmo a verdade da minha essência."
translations.ru: Ом, Истина – это сущностная природа бытия." или "Ом, Я утверждаю истинность своей сущности."
translations.sv: Om, Sanningen är den väsentliga naturen av varandet." eller "Om, Jag bekräftar sanningen om mitt väsen.
translations.th: โอ้ ม, สัจจะคือธรรมชาติที่แท้จริงของการมีอยู่ หรือ โอ้ ม, ข้าพเจ้ายืนยันถึงความจริงแห่งแก่นแท้ของข้าพเจ้า
translations.tr: "Om, Gerçek, varoluşun özüdür." veya "Om, özümün doğruluğunu onaylıyorum."
translations.uk: Ом, Істина є суттю буття." або "Ом, Я підтверджую істинність своєї сутності."
translations.vi: "Om, Chân lý là bản chất cốt lõi của sự tồn tại." hoặc "Om, Tôi khẳng định sự thật của bản thể của mình."
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，真理是存在的本质。“或者“ॐ，我肯定我自身存在的真理。”

mantras.name: Om, bind, relax, and liberate; proceed, proceed; hail.
mantras.english: Om, bind, relax, and liberate; proceed, proceed; hail.
mantras.original: 唵ong 缚wa日ri啰la达da磨mo 悉xī驮tuo缚wa 施shī迦jia啰la 娑suo诃he
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, लिन्, विश्राम, और मुक्ति; अग्रे, अग्रे; स्तुति।
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic India, Om (ॐ) is Hinduism's primordial sound — the vibration underlying all creation, equated with Brahman, the absolute reality itself.
mantras.benefits: Om's three syllables unite waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states, while its resonance calms the nervous system and shifts brainwaves toward deep meditation — a single sound holding all of existence.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, brahman, pranava, chanting, primordial, creation, liberation, consciousness, relaxation, healing, unity

translations.es: Om, une, relaja y libera; avanza, avanza; saludo.
translations.ar: أوم، اربط، استرخِ، وتحرر؛ تقدم، تقدم؛ تحية.
translations.bn: ॐ, बांधो, शिথিল করো, এবং मुक्त করো; এগিয়ে যাও, এগিয়ে যাও;Hail.
translations.de: Om, verbinde, entspanne und befreie; schreite voran, schreite voran; lobe.
translations.en-us: "Om, bind (or restrain), relax, and liberate; proceed, proceed; hail."
translations.en-gb: "Om, bind (or restrain), relax, and liberate; proceed, proceed; hail."
translations.fr-fr: Om, liez, détendez-vous, et libérez-vous ; avancez, avancez ; salut.
translations.he: הוֹם, קשֵׁר, הִרְפֵּי, וְשַׁבֵּר; הָלִיךְ, הָלִיךְ; בְּרָכָה.
translations.hi: ॐ, बांधो, शिथिल करो, और मुक्त करो; आगे बढ़ो, आगे बढ़ो; जय हो।
translations.id: Om, ikat, rileks, dan bebaskan; teruslah, teruslah; salam.
translations.it: Om, lega, rilassa e libera; procedi, procedi; saluto.
translations.ja: オーム、束縛を解き、心を落ち着かせ、解放しなさい。進み続け、進み続け。讃えよ。
translations.ko: 옴, 결합하고, 이완하며, 해방하십시오. 나아가십시오, 나아가십시오. 찬미합니다.
translations.nl: Om, bind, ontspan en bevrijd; ga verder, ga verder; groet.
translations.pl: Om, zwiąż, rozluźnij i wyzwól; ruszaj, ruszaj; witaj.
translations.pt-br: ॐ, amarre, relaxe, e liberte; avance, avance; saude.
translations.ru: Ом, свяжи, расслабь и освободи; двигайся вперед, двигайся вперед; привет.
translations.sv: Om, binda, slappna av och befria; fortsätt, fortsätt; hälsning.
translations.th: ขอให้จิตใจผูกพัน สบาย สงบ และเป็นอิสระ; จงก้าวไปข้างหน้า; ขอคารวะ.
translations.tr: Om, bağla, gevşe, ve özgürleştir; ilerle, ilerle; selam.
translations.uk: Ом, свяжи, расслабь и освободи; иди вперед, иди вперед; приветствую.
translations.vi: "Ôm, kết nối, thư giãn và giải phóng; tiến lên, tiến lên; chào."
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，束缚，放松，解脱；前进，前进；赞颂。

mantras.name: Om, completeness. Completeness is this. From completeness, completeness is derived. Having taken completeness from completeness, completeness alone remains. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: Om, completeness. Completeness is this. From completeness, completeness is derived. Having taken completeness from completeness, completeness alone remains. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.original: Oṃ purṇamadaḥ purṇamidam purṇāt purṇamudaçyate purṇasya purṇamādāya purṇamevāvaşişyate oṃ şāntiḥ şāntiḥ şāntiḥ
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, pūrṇatā. pūrṇatā idaṃ asti. pūrṇatvāt pūrṇatvam avatiṣṭhate. pūrṇatvād pūrṇatvam adattam, pūrṇatā eva śiṣyate. ōṃ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ.
mantras.background: From the Vedic Hindu tradition, the Purnam Mantra reveals: completeness births completeness — subtract it, and completeness still remains. A paradox that invites deep contemplation.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om daily cultivates stillness and unity consciousness. The Mandukya Upanishad reveals it encompasses all states of being. Research confirms theta brainwave shifts, while the Purnam Mantra reminds us: from wholeness, only wholeness remains.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, upanishad, brahman, completeness, non-duality, peace, unity, vedanta, liberation

translations.es: Om, plenitud. La plenitud es esto. De la plenitud, se deriva la plenitud. Al extraer plenitud de la plenitud, solo permanece la plenitud. Om, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ar: أوم، الكمال. الكمال هو هذا. من الكمال، يُستمد الكمال. بعد استخلاص الكمال من الكمال، يبقى الكمال وحده. أوم، سلام، سلام، سلام.
translations.bn: ॐ, पूर्णতা। এইই পূর্ণতা। পূর্ণতা থেকে পূর্ণতা উদ্ভূত। পূর্ণতা থেকে পূর্ণতা গ্রহণ করে, কেবল পূর্ণতা অবশিষ্ট থাকে। ॐ, শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Om, die Vollständigkeit. Dies ist die Vollständigkeit. Aus der Vollständigkeit wird Vollständigkeit abgeleitet. Nachdem die Vollständigkeit aus der Vollständigkeit entnommen wurde, bleibt nur die reine Vollständigkeit. Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: "Om, totality. This is totality. From totality, totality arises. Having taken totality from totality, only totality remains. Om, peace, peace, peace."
translations.en-gb: "Om, representing wholeness. Wholeness is this reality. From wholeness, wholeness arises. Having derived wholeness from wholeness, only wholeness remains. Om, peace, peace, peace."
translations.fr-fr: Om, plénitude. La plénitude est ceci. De la plénitude, la plénitude dérive. Ayant puisé la plénitude dans la plénitude, seule la plénitude demeure. Om, paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: אוֹם, שלמות. השלמות היא זה. מהשלמות, שלמות נובעת. לאחר שלקחנו שלמות מהשלמות, נותרת שלמות בלבד. אוֹם, שלום, שלום, שלום.
translations.hi: ॐ, पूर्णता। पूर्णता ही यह है। पूर्णता से पूर्णता उत्पन्न होती है। पूर्णता से पूर्णता लेकर, केवल पूर्णता ही शेष रहती है। ॐ, शांति, शांति, शांति।
translations.id: Om, keutuhan. Keutuhan adalah ini. Dari keutuhan, keutuhan berasal. Setelah mengambil keutuhan dari keutuhan, hanya keutuhan yang tersisa. Om, kedamaian, kedamaian, kedamaian.
translations.it: Om, pienezza. La pienezza è questo. Dalla pienezza, la pienezza deriva. Avendo tratto la pienezza dalla pienezza, rimane solo la pienezza. Om, pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: オーム、完全性。これこそが完全である。完全性から、完全性が生まれる。完全性から完全性を取り除くと、ただ完全が残る。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 옴, 완전함. 완전함이 이것이다. 완전함에서 완전함이 비롯된다. 완전함에서 완전함을 취함으로써, 오직 완전함만이 남는다. 옴, 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Om, volheid. Volheid is dit. Uit volheid ontstaat volheid. Nadat volheid is afgeleid van volheid, blijft enkel volheid over. Om, vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Om, całość. Całość jest tym. Z całości wyprowadza się całość. Pobrawszy całość z całości, pozostaje sama całość. Om, pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: Om, a totalidade. A totalidade é isto. Da totalidade, a totalidade se origina. Tendo obtido a totalidade da totalidade, apenas a totalidade permanece. Om, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Ом, полнота. Полнота есть это. Из полноты происходит полнота. Взяв полноту из полноты, остаётся лишь полнота. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Om, fulländning. Fulländning är detta. Från fulländning utgår fulländning. När fulländningen har tagits från fulländningen, kvarstår endast fulländningen. Om, frid, frid, frid.
translations.th: โอ้ห์, ความสมบูรณ์. ความสมบูรณ์คือสิ่งนี้. จากความสมบูรณ์, ความสมบูรณ์ได้เกิดขึ้น. เมื่อได้รับความสมบูรณ์จากความสมบูรณ์, ความสมบูรณ์เพียงอย่างเดียวที่ยังคงอยู่. โอ้ห์, สันติสุข, สันติสุข, สันติสุข.
translations.tr: Om, bütünlük. Bütünlük budur. Bütünlükten bütünlük türetilir. Bütünlüğü bütünlükten alarak, yalnızca bütünlük kalır. Om, huzur, huzur, huzur.
translations.uk: Ом, полнота. Повнота є цим. З повноти виникає повнота. Війшовши в повноту з повноти, залишається лише повнота. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Ôm, sự hoàn thiện. Sự hoàn thiện là đây. Từ sự hoàn thiện, sự hoàn thiện được sinh ra. Sau khi lấy sự hoàn thiện từ sự hoàn thiện, chỉ còn lại sự hoàn thiện thuần khiết. Ôm, bình an, bình an, bình an.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，圆满。圆满即是如此。从圆满中，圆满产生。从圆满中获得圆满后，只有圆满本身存在。ॐ，和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: Om, crosser of the ocean, crosser of the ocean.
mantras.english: Om, crosser of the ocean, crosser of the ocean.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, trasṭar of the ocean, trasṭar of the ocean.
mantras.background: Om (ॐ), from the Vedic Hindu tradition, is the primordial sound of all existence — its three letters A-U-M represent waking, dreaming, and deep sleep, with sacred silence beyond.
mantras.benefits: Om, the universe's primordial vibration, is said to unite the practitioner with all existence. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward theta states, calming the nervous system — a bridge between the finite self and infinite reality.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pranava, mantra, primordial, liberation, peace, unity, transcendence, healing, chanting

translations.es: Om, aquel que cruza el océano, aquel que cruza el océano.
translations.ar: أوم، معبر البحار، معبر البحار.
translations.bn: ওম, যিনি সমুদ্র অতিক্রম করেন, যিনি সমুদ্র অতিক্রম করেন।
translations.de: Om, der Ozeanüberquerer, der Ozeanüberquerer.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, one who crosses the ocean, one who crosses the ocean.
translations.en-gb: Om, one who overcomes the ocean of suffering, one who overcomes the ocean of suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Om, celui qui traverse l'océan, celui qui traverse l'océan.
translations.he: אוֹם, חוצה הים, חוצה הים.
translations.hi: ॐ, सागर को पार करने वाला, सागर को पार करने वाला।
translations.id: Om, penyeberang lautan, penyeberang lautan.
translations.it: Om, colui che varca l'oceano, colui che varca l'oceano.
translations.ja: オーム、大洋を越える者、大洋を越える者。
translations.ko: 옴, 바다를 건너는 자, 바다를 건너는 자.
translations.nl: Om, oversteekster van de oceaan, oversteekster van de oceaan.
translations.pl: Om, ten, który przekracza ocean, ten, który przekracza ocean.
translations.pt-br: Om, aquele que atravessa o oceano, aquele que atravessa o oceano.
translations.ru: Ом, пересекающий океан, пересекающий океан.
translations.sv: Om, den som övervinner oceanen, den som övervinner oceanen.
translations.th: ออม, ผู้ข้ามมหาสมุทร, ผู้ข้ามมหาสมุทร
translations.tr: Om, okyanusları aşan, okyanusları aşan.
translations.uk: Ом, перепливник океану, перепливник океану.
translations.vi: Om, người vượt qua biển cả, người vượt qua biển cả.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，渡海者，渡海者。

mantras.name: Om, hail to the essence (or vibration) of Su-lu, hail to the essence of Bo-la, hail to the essence of Su-lu, hail to the essence of Bo-la, hail to Su-ha.
mantras.english: Om, hail to the essence (or vibration) of Su-lu, hail to the essence of Bo-la, hail to the essence of Su-lu, hail to the essence of Bo-la, hail to Su-ha.
mantras.original: 唵ong 苏su嚧lu苏sū嚧lu钵bo啰la苏sū嚧lu钵bo啰la苏sū嚧lu也ye 梭suo哈ha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, praṇam svāṁ śaktiṃ su-lu, praṇam svāṁ śaktiṃ bo-la, praṇam svāṁ śaktiṃ su-lu, praṇam svāṁ śaktiṃ bo-la, praṇam su-ha.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic-Buddhist tradition, this dharani opens with Om—"the vibrational substrate of all existence" (Mandukya Upanishad)—then invokes sacred essences, closing with Svaha, the universal offering-seal heard across dozens of mantras in this very collection.
mantras.benefits: Practitioners of this mantra tradition report purification of negative karma and healing of disease. Its repetitive invocations ending in svaha ("so be it") cultivate focused awareness, while oral tradition promises liberation from suffering and rebirth in pure realms.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, bo-la, su-ha, mantra, chanting, purification, liberation, buddhist, vedic, sound, meditation

translations.es: Om, saludo a la esencia (o vibración) de Su-lu, saludo a la esencia de Bo-la, saludo a la esencia de Su-lu, saludo a la esencia de Bo-la, saludo a Su-ha.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لجوه Essence) من "سو-لو"، تحية لجوه Essence) من "بو-لا"، تحية لجوه Essence) من "سو-لو"، تحية لجوه Essence) من "بو-لا"، تحية لـ "سو-ها".
translations.bn: ॐ, सु-लु के सार को प्रणाम, बो-ला के सार को प्रणाम, सु-लु के सार को प्रणाम, बो-ला के सार को प्रणाम, सु-हा को प्रणाम।
translations.de: Om, Lob sei der Essenz (oder Vibration) von Su-lu, Lob sei der Essenz von Bo-la, Lob sei der Essenz von Su-lu, Lob sei der Essenz von Bo-la, Lob sei Su-ha.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to the essence of Su-lu, salutations to the essence of Bo-la, salutations to the essence of Su-lu, salutations to the essence of Bo-la, salutations to Su-ha.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the essence of Su-lu, salutations to the essence of Bo-la, salutations to the essence of Su-lu, salutations to the essence of Bo-la, salutations to Su-ha.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à l'essence de Su-lu, salutations à l'essence de Bo-la, salutations à l'essence de Su-lu, salutations à l'essence de Bo-la, salutations à Su-ha.
translations.he: אָום, שְׁלום למהות של סוּ-לוּ, שְׁלום למהות של בּוֹ-לָה, שְׁלום למהות של סוּ-לוּ, שְׁלום למהות של בּוֹ-לָה, שְׁלום ל-סוּ-הָ.
translations.hi: ॐ, सु-लु के सार को प्रणाम, बो-ला के सार को प्रणाम, सु-लु के सार को प्रणाम, बो-ला के सार को प्रणाम, सु-हा को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada esensi (atau getaran) Su-lu, salam kepada esensi Bo-la, salam kepada esensi Su-lu, salam kepada esensi Bo-la, salam kepada Su-ha.
translations.it: Om, saluto all'essenza di Su-lu, saluto all'essenza di Bo-la, saluto all'essenza di Su-lu, saluto all'essenza di Bo-la, saluto a Su-ha.
translations.ja: オーム、スールゥの本質（または波動）に礼賛を、ボールァの本質に礼賛を、スールゥの本質に礼賛を、ボールァの本質に礼賛を、スウハに礼賛を。
translations.ko: 옴, 수루의 본질(혹은 진동)에게 숭배를, 보라의 본질에게 숭배를, 수루의 본질에게 숭배를, 보라의 본질에게 숭배를, 수하에게 숭배를.
translations.nl: Om, ik groet de essentie (of vibratie) van Su-lu, ik groet de essentie van Bo-la, ik groet de essentie van Su-lu, ik groet de essentie van Bo-la, ik groet Su-ha.
translations.pl: Om, powitania esencji Su-lu, powitania esencji Bo-la, powitania esencji Su-lu, powitania esencji Bo-la, powitania Su-ha.
translations.pt-br: Om, saúdo a essência (ou vibração) de Su-lu, saúdo a essência de Bo-la, saúdo a essência de Su-lu, saúdo a essência de Bo-la, saúdo a Su-ha.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствие сущности Су-лу, приветствие сущности Бо-ла, приветствие сущности Су-лу, приветствие сущности Бо-ла, приветствие Су-ха.
translations.sv: Om, lov till essensen (eller vibrationen) av Su-lu, lov till essensen av Bo-la, lov till essensen av Su-lu, lov till essensen av Bo-la, lov till Su-ha.
translations.th: โอม, ข้าขอสดุดีแก่นสาร (หรือการสั่นสะเทือน) ของสุ-ลู, ข้าขอสดุดีแก่นสารของโบ-ลา, ข้าขอสดุดีแก่นสารของสุ-ลู, ข้าขอสดุดีแก่นสารของโบ-ลา, ข้าขอสดุดีแก่สุ-หา
translations.tr: Om, Su-lu'nun özüne/titreşimine selâm, Bo-la'nın özüne/titreşimine selâm, Su-lu'nun özüne/titreşimine selâm, Bo-la'nın özüne/titreşimine selâm, Su-ha'ya selâm.
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю суттю Су-лу, вітаю суттю Бо-ла, вітаю суттю Су-лу, вітаю суттю Бо-ла, вітаю Су-ха.
translations.vi: Om, kính chào bản chất (hoặc sự rung động) của Su-lu, kính chào bản chất của Bo-la, kính chào bản chất của Su-lu, kính chào bản chất của Bo-la, kính chào Su-ha.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡， 赞颂苏鲁的精髓（或震动），赞颂博拉的精髓，赞颂苏鲁的精髓，赞颂博拉的精髓，赞颂苏哈。

mantras.name: Om, hail to the perfection of wisdom.
mantras.english: Om, hail to the perfection of wisdom.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, praṇam ātmane jñāna-siddhi.
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist Prajnaparamita tradition, this mantra opens with Om—the primordial Vedic sound—saluting wisdom's perfection, the very heart of enlightenment.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om anchors the mind through resonance shown to shift brainwaves toward theta states (deep meditation). Pairing it with "perfection of wisdom" invites the practitioner to dissolve ego-driven thought — where science meets ancient insight.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, mantra, vedanta, sound, meditation, healing, divine, vibration, consciousness, samsara, buddhist

translations.es: Om, saludo a la perfección de la sabiduría.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لتمام الحكمة."
translations.bn: ওম, হে প্রজ্ঞা ও পরিপূর্ণতার প্রতীক, তোমাকে বন্দনা।
translations.de: Om, Lob sei der Vollkommenheit der Weisheit.
translations.en-us: Hail to the ultimate perfection of wisdom.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the perfect embodiment of wisdom.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à la perfection de la sagesse.
translations.he: ॐ, הללוּ למוּשלְמוּת החוכמה.
translations.hi: ॐ, ज्ञान की पूर्णता को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, salam bagi kesempurnaan kebijaksanaan.
translations.it: Om, saluto alla perfezione della saggezza.
translations.ja: オーム、至高の知恵への賛美。 (Ōmu, shiteki no chie e no sanbi.)
translations.ko: 옴, 지혜의 완전함에 경배합니다. (Om, jīhye-ui wanjeonham-e gyeongbaehapnida.)
translations.nl: Om, lof aan de volmaaktheid van wijsheid.
translations.pl: Om, powitanie doskonałości mądrości.
translations.pt-br: Om, saúdo a perfeição da sabedoria.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствую совершенство мудрости.
translations.sv: Om, lovprisning till visdomens fullkomlighet.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชรุ่งเรือง, ข้าพเจ้าขอสักการะแด่ความสมบูรณ์อันสูงสุดแห่งปัญญา.
translations.tr: Om, bilgelik mükemmelliğine selâm.
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю досконалість мудрості.
translations.vi: Om, tôi kính chào sự hoàn thiện của trí tuệ.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向智慧的完美致敬。

mantras.name: Om, hail to the sun, hail to the fire, hail to the earth.
mantras.english: Om, hail to the sun, hail to the fire, hail to the earth.
mantras.original: Om Ah Ra Pa Ca Na Dhi
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, hiraṇyāyāṁ jyotāya, agnāya, pr̥thivīyai namaḥ.
mantras.background: From Vedic Hindu tradition, Om—the primordial sound of all creation—opens this solar-earth salutation, uniting cosmos, fire, and ground in one breath.
mantras.benefits:
Om resonates through body and mind, linking waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward meditative theta rhythms, while tradition calls it the vibrational root of all existence.
  Grounding: Mandukya Upanishad's three states + turiya; NBRC brainwave research; Pranava as universal vibration — all sourced from provided entry.
mantras.tags: hindu, sun, fire, earth, shakti, mantra, compassion, abundance, enlightenment, healing, universal, vibration

translations.es: Om, saludo al sol, saludo al fuego, saludo a la tierra.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية للشمس، تحية للنار، تحية للأرض."
translations.bn: ওম, ও সূর্যকে নমস্কার, ও আগুনের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধা, ও পৃথিবীর প্রতি প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, Lobpreisung der Sonne, Lobpreisung des Feuers, Lobpreisung der Erde.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the sun, salutations to the fire, salutations to the earth."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to the sun, salutations to the fire, salutations to the earth."
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations au soleil, salutations au feu, salutations à la terre.
translations.he: אָה, הִתְגַּעֲרוּת לַשֶּׁמֶשׁ, הִתְגַּעֲרוּת לָאֵשׁ, הִתְגַּעֲרוּת לָאָרֶץ.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे सूर्य को प्रणाम, हे अग्नि को प्रणाम, हे पृथ्वी को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Matahari, salam kepada Api, salam kepada Bumi.
translations.it: Om, saluto al sole, saluto al fuoco, saluto alla terra.
translations.ja: オーム、太陽に礼、炎に礼、大地に礼。
translations.ko: 오옴, 태양에게 경의를, 불에게 경의를, 대지에 경의를.
translations.nl: Om, ik groet de zon, ik groet het vuur, ik groet de aarde.
translations.pl: Om, chwała Słońcu, chwała ogniowi, chwała Ziemi.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudação ao sol, saudação ao fogo, saudação à terra.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствую Солнце, приветствую Огонь, приветствую Землю.
translations.sv: Om, lov till solen, lov till elden, lov till jorden.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาแดด, ขอความเมตตาแด่ไฟ, ขอความเมตตาแด่โลก.
translations.tr: Om, güne selam, ateşe selam, dünyaya selam.
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю сонце, вітаю вогонь, вітаю землю.
translations.vi: Om, Khen ngợi mặt trời, Khen ngợi lửa, Khen ngợi đất.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ， 敬礼太阳，敬礼火焰，敬礼大地。

mantras.name: Om, hail to the sun; hail to the vital force; hail to the splendor; hail to the victory; hail to the perfection.
mantras.english: Om, hail to the sun; hail to the vital force; hail to the splendor; hail to the victory; hail to the perfection.
mantras.original: Om Ah Ra Pa Cha Na Dhi
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, hail to the sun; hail to the vital force; hail to the splendor; hail to the victory; hail to the perfection.
mantras.background: From Vedic tradition, this mantra opens with Om—the primordial sound of all creation—then salutes the sun's lifeforce, splendor, and perfection.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this solar mantra harnesses Om's scientifically documented theta-wave response while invoking vitality, splendor, and inner victory — merging ancient sun-worship with measurable neurological calm and spiritual awakening.
mantras.tags: hindu, sun, vitality, perfection, mantra, sound, healing, vibration, divine, affirmation, cosmic, primordial

translations.es: Om, saludo al sol; saludo a la fuerza vital; saludo al esplendor; saludo a la victoria; saludo a la perfección.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية للشمس؛ تحية للقوة الحيوية؛ تحية للبهجة؛ تحية للنصر؛ تحية للكمال."
translations.bn: ওম, ও সূর্যকে নমস্কার; ও жизненной энергии (প্রাণশক্তির) নমস্কার; ও ঐশ্বর্যকে নমস্কার; ও বিজয়ের নমস্কার; ও পরিপূর্ণতাকে নমস্কার।
translations.de: Om, Lobpreisung der Sonne; Lobpreisung der Lebenskraft; Lobpreisung des Glanzes; Lobpreisung des Sieges; Lobpreisung der Vollkommenheit.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to the sun; salutations to the life force; salutations to the splendor; salutations to the triumph; salutations to the perfection.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the sun; salutations to the life force; salutations to the radiance; salutations to the triumph; salutations to the completeness.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, hail to the sun; hail to the vital force; hail to the splendor; hail to the victory; hail to the perfection.
translations.he: אָם, הִתְרַחֲמִי בּוֹרֵא הַשֶׁמֶשׁ; הִתְרַחֲמִי עַל הַכֹּחַ הַחַי; הִתְרַחֲמִי עַל הַתִּפְאֶרֶת; הִתְרַחֲמִי עַל הַנִּצְחוֹן; הִתְרַחֲמִי עַל הַשְׁלְמֻתוּת.
translations.hi: ॐ, वंदना: सूर्य को; वंदना: प्राण को; वंदना: तेजो को; वंदना: विजय को; वंदना: पूर्णता को।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Matahari; salam kepada energi kehidupan; salam kepada keagungan; salam kepada kemenangan; salam kepada kesempurnaan.
translations.it: Om, saluto al sole; saluto alla forza vitale; saluto alla magnificenza; saluto alla vittoria; saluto alla perfezione.
translations.ja: オーム。太陽に礼。生命力に礼。輝きに礼。勝利に礼。完全性に礼。
translations.ko: 오옴, 태양에게 경의를; 생명력에게 경의를; 광채에게 경의를; 승리에게 경의를; 완전함에게 경의를.
translations.nl: Om, lof aan de zon; lof aan de levenskracht; lof aan de pracht; lof aan de overwinning; lof aan de volmaaktheid.
translations.pl: Om, powitania Słońcu; powitania życiowej energii; powitania blasku; powitania zwycięstwa; powitania doskonałości.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudação ao sol; saudação à força vital; saudação à beleza; saudação à vitória; saudação à perfeição.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствие Солнцу; приветствие жизненной силе; приветствие великолепию; приветствие победе; приветствие совершенству.
translations.sv: Om, lovprisning till solen; lovprisning till livskraften; lovprisning till prakten; lovprisning till segern; lovprisning till fulländningen.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาแด่ดวงอาทิตย์; ขอความเมตตาแด่พลังชีวิต; ขอความเมตตาแด่ความรุ่งโรจน์; ขอความเมตตาแด่ชัยชนะ; ขอความเมตตาแด่ความสมบูรณ์แบบ.
translations.tr: Om, Güneş'e selam; Hayat enerjisine selam; Parlaklığa selam; Zafer'e selam; Mükemmellik'e selam.
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю сонце; вітаю життєву силу; вітаю велич; вітаю перемогу; вітаю досконалість.
translations.vi: Om, Kính chào mặt trời; Kính chào nguồn sống; Kính chào sự rực rỡ; Kính chào chiến thắng; Kính chào sự hoàn hảo.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，敬颂太阳；敬颂生命力；敬颂光辉；敬颂胜利；敬颂完美。

mantras.name: Om, hail to the syllable Ga, hail to the syllable Be, hail to the syllable La, hail to the syllable Sa, hail to the syllable Ma, hail to the syllable Ha.
mantras.english: Om, hail to the syllable Ga, hail to the syllable Be, hail to the syllable La, hail to the syllable Sa, hail to the syllable Ma, hail to the syllable Ha.
mantras.original: 唵ong 嘎ga贝bei啰la 萨sa嘛ma哈ha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, hail to the syllable ga, hail to the syllable be, hail to the syllable la, hail to the syllable sa, hail to the syllable ma, hail to the syllable ha.
mantras.background: From Chinese Vajrayāna Buddhism, this mantra—invoking sacred seed syllables with "hail" (Soha)—is recited to compassionately liberate accidentally trampled insects or consumed animals, transferring merit to beings across all realms.
