mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist compassion practice, this mantra is chanted to liberate beings harmed unknowingly—insects, animals consumed. It cultivates mindfulness, reduces karmic guilt, and awakens deep interconnectedness, drawing practitioners into a living ethic of mercy.
mantras.tags: hindu, ga, be, la, sa, ma, ha, mantra, invocation, healing, protection, tibetan, buddhist

translations.es: Om, saludo al sonido Ga, saludo al sonido Be, saludo al sonido La, saludo al sonido Sa, saludo al sonido Ma, saludo al sonido Ha.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لِمُقْطَع "جا"، تحية لِمُقْطَع "بي"، تحية لِمُقْطَع "لا"، تحية لِمُقْطَع "سا"، تحية لِمُقْطَع "ما"، تحية لِمُقْطَع "ها".
translations.bn: ॐ, 'गा' अक्षराGreetings to the syllable Ga, hail to the syllable Be, hail to the syllable La, hail to the syllable Sa, hail to the syllable Ma, hail to the syllable Ha.
translations.de: Om, Lob sei dem Silben-Laut Ga, Lob sei dem Silben-Laut Be, Lob sei dem Silben-Laut La, Lob sei dem Silben-Laut Sa, Lob sei dem Silben-Laut Ma, Lob sei dem Silben-Laut Ha.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, salutations to the syllable Ga, salutations to the syllable Be, salutations to the syllable La, salutations to the syllable Sa, salutations to the syllable Ma, salutations to the syllable Ha.
translations.en-gb: Hail to the syllable Ga, hail to the syllable Be, hail to the syllable La, hail to the syllable Sa, hail to the syllable Ma, hail to the syllable Ha. I salute the sound of Ga, I salute the sound of Be, I salute the sound of La, I salute the sound of Sa, I salute the sound of Ma, I salute the sound of Ha.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations au son Ga, salutations au son Be, salutations au son La, salutations au son Sa, salutations au son Ma, salutations au son Ha.
translations.he: אום, שבח להברה גַה, שבח להברה בֵה, שבח להברה לַה, שבח להברה סַה, שבח להברה מַה, שבח להברה הַה.
translations.hi: ॐ, 'गा' अक्षर को प्रणाम, 'बे' अक्षर को प्रणाम, 'ला' अक्षर को प्रणाम, 'सा' अक्षर को प्रणाम, 'मा' अक्षर को प्रणाम, 'हा' अक्षर को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada suku kata Ga, salam kepada suku kata Be, salam kepada suku kata La, salam kepada suku kata Sa, salam kepada suku kata Ma, salam kepada suku kata Ha.
translations.it: Om, saluto alla sillaba Ga, saluto alla sillaba Be, saluto alla sillaba La, saluto alla sillaba Sa, saluto alla sillaba Ma, saluto alla sillaba Ha.
translations.ja: オーム、ガの音に礼、ベの音に礼、ラ（またはレ）の音に礼、サの音に礼、マの音に礼、ハの音に礼。
translations.ko: 옴, 가의 음절에 경의를, 베의 음절에 경의를, 라의 음절에 경의를, 사의 음절에 경의를, 마의 음절에 경의를, 하의 음절에 경의를.
translations.nl: Om, lof aan de letter Ga, lof aan de letter Be, lof aan de letter La, lof aan de letter Sa, lof aan de letter Ma, lof aan de letter Ha.
translations.pl: Om, niech będzie uwielbienie dla sylaby Ga, niech będzie uwielbienie dla sylaby Be, niech będzie uwielbienie dla sylaby La, niech będzie uwielbienie dla sylaby Sa, niech będzie uwielbienie dla sylaby Ma, niech będzie uwielbienie dla sylaby Ha.
translations.pt-br: Om, saúdo à sílaba Ga, saúdo à sílaba Be, saúdo à sílaba La, saúdo à sílaba Sa, saúdo à sílaba Ma, saúdo à sílaba Ha.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствую слог Га, приветствую слог Бе, приветствую слог Ла, приветствую слог Са, приветствую слог Ма, приветствую слог Ха.
translations.sv: Om, vördnad för stavelsen Ga, vördnad för stavelsen Be, vördnad för stavelsen La, vördnad för stavelsen Sa, vördnad för stavelsen Ma, vördnad för stavelsen Ha.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาแก่พยางค์ "Ga," ขอความเมตตาแก่พยางค์ "Be," ขอความเมตตาแก่พยางค์ "La," ขอความเมตตาแก่พยางค์ "Sa," ขอความเมตตาแก่พยางค์ "Ma," ขอความเมตตาแก่พยางค์ "Ha."
translations.tr: Om, Ga hecesine selam, Be hecesine selam, La hecesine selam, Sa hecesine selam, Ma hecesine selam, Ha hecesine selam.
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю звук Га, вітаю звук Бе, вітаю звук Ла, вітаю звук Са, вітаю звук Ма, вітаю звук Ха.
translations.vi: Om, kính chào âm tiết Ga, kính chào âm tiết Be, kính chào âm tiết La, kính chào âm tiết Sa, kính chào âm tiết Ma, kính chào âm tiết Ha.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，敬颂“Ga”音，敬颂“Be”音，敬颂“La”音，敬颂“Sa”音，敬颂“Ma”音，敬颂“Ha”音。

mantras.name: Om, let [it] be sustained, hail.
mantras.english: Om, let [it] be sustained, hail.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, raṁtaḥ, svāgataḥ.
mantras.background:
From ancient Vedic India, "Om" — the primordial sound of Brahman — opens all Hindu prayer. Its syllables A-U-M map waking, dream, and deep sleep states, bridging finite and infinite.
  Grounding: Sources: Mandukya Upanishad ref in existing entry; "Om is the pranava mantra, source of all mantras" and "first manifestation of Brahman" from mantra Wikipedia source.
mantras.benefits:
Om's sustained resonance calms the nervous system, bridges waking and transcendent states, and connects the practitioner to Brahman—the universal ground of being—making it the foundational sound of all Hindu prayer and meditation.
  Grounding: Sources cite Mandukya Upanishad's four-state framework, Om as pranava/Brahman, brain-wave research, vagal stimulation from the nasal hum, and its role prefixing all Hindu prayers.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, brahman, pranava, japa, bijamantra, consciousness, healing, creation, chanting, primordial

translations.es: Om, que se mantenga, saludo.
translations.ar: يا رب، ليكن مستدامًا، تحية.
translations.bn: ওম, যেন এটি টিকে থাকে, ওহে।
translations.de: Om, möge es erhalten bleiben, Lob sei.
translations.en-us: "Om, may it be sustained, salutations."
translations.en-gb: Om, may it be sustained, salutations.
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse-t-elle être maintenue, louange.
translations.he: אוֹם, יְהִי שִׁמְרוּנִי, הִתְגַּל!
translations.hi: ॐ, "सustain" (टिकना, टहना) के अर्थ में "स्थिर रहे", "संवर्धित हो", "संरक्षित रहे" या "अटल रहे" और "आओ, (यह) प्रशंसित हो"।
translations.id: Om, semoga [hal itu] tetap lestari, salam.
translations.it: Om, possa essere sostenuto, saluto.
translations.ja: オーム、恒続あれ、讃えん。 (Ōmu, kōzoku are, san'en.)
translations.ko: 옴, 유지되기를, 존경합니다. (Om, 유지되기를, 존경합니다.)
translations.nl: Om, moge het standvastig zijn, wees gegroet.
translations.pl: Om, niech będzie utrwalone, niech będzie uwielbione.
translations.pt-br: Om, que [ele/ela/isso] seja sustentado, seja louvado.
translations.ru: Ом, да будет сохранено, приветствую.
translations.sv: Om, må det bestå, lovprisning.
translations.th: ขอให้ดำรงอยู่ สุขสันต์
translations.tr: Om, bunun devam etmesini sağla, selametle.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай буде збережено, вітаю.
translations.vi: Om, xin hãy được duy trì, chào.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，愿其保持，敬颂。

mantras.name: Om, let us attain concentration, control, and knowledge.
mantras.english: Om, let us attain concentration, control, and knowledge.
mantras.original: Om A Ra Pa Ca Na Dhih
mantras.transliteration: oṃ, dhiyo dhiṣṇāh, damah, sarvasya prajñā.
mantras.background:
From the ancient Vedic tradition, this Sanskrit prayer seeks concentration, self-control & knowledge — timeless tools the sages themselves used to unlock inner wisdom.
  Grounding: Sources confirm mantras originated with Indian sages, Sanskrit roots mean "mind tool," and Vedic chants seek wisdom/clarity per Gayatri mantra descriptions.
mantras.benefits:
Chanting Om cultivates deep stillness and inner unity. Rooted in Vedic tradition, it represents all states of consciousness. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward meditative theta states, while its vibrations soothe the nervous system.
  Grounding: Source notes Om spans waking/dream/deep sleep states (Mandukya Upanishad), and cites National Brain Research Centre findings on theta waves and vagal nerve stimulation.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, concentration, focus, knowledge, wisdom, control, clarity, mantra, chanting

translations.es: Om, que alcancemos la concentración, el control y el conocimiento.
translations.ar: "أوم، لِنَحْصُلْ على التركيز، والسيطرة، والمعرفة."
translations.bn: ওম, আমাদের মনোযোগ, নিয়ন্ত্রণ এবং জ্ঞান লাভ করতে সাহায্য করো।
translations.de: Om, mögen wir Konzentration, Selbstbeherrschung und Wissen erlangen.
translations.en-us: Om, may we attain concentration, self-control, and wisdom.
translations.en-gb: "Om, may we attain concentration, self-control, and wisdom."
translations.fr-fr: Om, puissions-nous atteindre la concentration, la maîtrise de soi et la connaissance.
translations.he: אום, יאפשר לנו להשיג ריכוז, שליטה וידע.
translations.hi: ॐ, हमें एकाग्रता, नियंत्रण और ज्ञान प्राप्त हों।
translations.id: Om, semoga kita mencapai konsentrasi, pengendalian diri, dan kebijaksanaan.
translations.it: Om, auspichiamo di raggiungere la concentrazione, il controllo e la conoscenza.
translations.ja: オーム、我々が集中、制御、そして知識を得ることを願います。 (Ōmu, wareware ga shūchū, seigyo, soshite chishiki o eru koto o negai masu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 우리로 하여금 집중, 통제, 그리고 지혜를 얻게 해주소서.
translations.nl: Om, moge wij concentratie, beheersing en kennis verwerven.
translations.pl: Oṁ, abyśmy osiągnęli koncentrację, kontrolę i wiedzę.
translations.pt-br: "Om, que possamos alcançar a concentração, o autocontrole e o conhecimento."
translations.ru: Ом, дабы мы достигли сосредоточенности, самообладания и знания.
translations.sv: Om, må vi uppnå koncentration, behärskning och kunskap.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาให้เราบรรลุถึงสมาธิ, การควบคุมตน, และปัญญา
translations.tr: "Om, konsantrasyon, kontrol ve bilgiye ulaşalım."
translations.uk: Ом, щоб ми досягли зосередженості, контролю та знання.
translations.vi: Om, xin cho chúng ta đạt được sự tập trung, sự kiểm soát và sự hiểu biết.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，愿我们获得专注、控制和智慧。

mantras.name: Om, let us contemplate the Lord of the Yakshas (Kubera). Let us meditate on him. May Kubera bestow his blessings upon us.
mantras.english: Om, let us contemplate the Lord of the Yakshas (Kubera). Let us meditate on him. May Kubera bestow his blessings upon us.
mantras.original:
ஓம் யட்சராஜாய வித் மஹே
வைச்ரவணாய தீ மஹி
தந்நோ குபேரஹ ப்ரசோதயாத்
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, yadṛcchā yakṣarājāya kuberāya dhyātuḥ. tam eva dhyātuḥ. kubero yasya anugrahaḥ syāt.
mantras.background:
A Gayatri-form mantra from Hindu tradition, invoking Kubera—Lord of Yakshas and god of wealth. "Vidmahe" (contemplate), "Dhimahi" (meditate), "Prachodayat" (illuminate us).
  Grounding: Tamil source lists "குபேரன் காயத்ரி மந்திரம்" (Kubera Gayatri Mantra), naming Yaksha-raja & Vaishravana—confirming deity, structure, and tradition.
mantras.benefits: Kubera Gayatri mantra invites divine abundance through devotional focus. Practitioners traditionally cultivate generosity, inner wealth, and gratitude, shifting the mind from scarcity to sufficiency through meditative repetition.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, kubera, gayatri, devotion, blessing, yaksha

translations.es: Om, consideremos al Señor de los Yakshas (Kubera). Meditemos en él. Que Kubera nos conceda sus bendiciones.
translations.ar: "أوم، لنردد التأمل في ربّ الياشاس (كوبيرا). لنتأمل فيه. ليكن كوبيرا مصدرًا للبركات علينا."
translations.bn: ওম, আমরা যেন ইয়াক্শা-পতি (কুবের) দেবকে ধ্যান করি। আমরা যেন তাঁর উপর ধ্যান করি। কুবের যেন আমাদের উপর তাঁর আশীর্বাদ বর্ষণ করেন।
translations.de: Om, lasst uns über den Herrn der Yakshas (Kubera) nachdenken. Lasst uns ihn meditieren. Möge Kubera uns seinen Segen schenken.
translations.en-us: "Om. Let us contemplate the Lord of the Yakshas, Kubera. Let us meditate on him. May Kubera bestow his blessings upon us."
translations.en-gb: "Om. Let us reflect upon the Lord of the Yakshas, Kubera. Let us meditate on him. May Kubera grant us his blessings."
translations.fr-fr: Om, méditons sur le Seigneur des Yakshas (Kubera). Concentrons-nous sur lui. Que Kubera daigne nous accorder ses bénédictions.
translations.he: אום, נתפלל ונרהיב בהרהורים על אדון הYakshas (קוברה). נמקד את מודעותנו בו. ייתן קוברה את ברכותיו עלינו.
translations.hi: ॐ, आइए हम यक्षों के स्वामी, कुबेर का चिंतन करें। आइए हम उनका ध्यान करें। कुबेर, आप हम पर अपनी कृपा करें।
translations.id: Om, marilah kita merenungkan tentang Penguasa Yaksha (Kubera). Marilah kita bermeditasi tentang dirinya. Semoga Kubera melimpahkan berkat-Nya kepada kita.
translations.it: Om, contempliamo il Signore dei Yaksha, Kubera. Meditiamo su di lui. Possa Kubera concederci le sue benedizioni.
translations.ja: オーム、我々はヤクシャの主、クベーラを瞑想しよう。我々は彼を念じよう。クベーラが我々に祝福を与えてくださるように。
translations.ko: 옴. 야크샤의 주인인 쿠베라를 묵상합시다. 그를 명상합시다. 쿠베라께서 우리에게 복을 내려주시기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Om, laten wij de Heer van de Yaksha's (Kubera) overdenken. Laten wij mediteren over Hem. Moge Kubera ons Zijn zegeningen schenken.
translations.pl: Om, rozważmy Pana Yakshów (Kubera). Medytujmy nad Nim. Niech Kubera obdarzy nas swoim błogosławieństwem.
translations.pt-br: Om, contemplemos o Senhor dos Yakshas (Kubera). Meditemos sobre ele. Que Kubera nos conceda suas bênçãos.
translations.ru: Ом. Давайте размышлять о Господе Якшей (Кубере). Давайте созерцать его. Да благословит нас Кубера.
translations.sv: Om, låt oss betrakta Yaksharnas Herre (Kubera). Låt oss meditera över honom. Må Kubera välsigna oss.
translations.th: ขอเชิญทุกท่านร่วมทำสมาธิและบูชาพระกุเวร ซึ่งเป็นเทพแห่งยักษ์ ขอให้พระองค์ประทานพรและความเมตตาแก่เรา
translations.tr: Om, Yakşaların Efendisi (Kübera) hakkında düşünelim. Ona meditasyon yapalım. Kübera'nın bereketini üzerimize yağdırmasını dileyelim.
translations.uk: Ом, дозвольте нам розмірковувати про Володаря Якшів (Куберу). Дозвольте нам медитувати на нього. Нехай Кубера обдарує нас своїм благословенням.
translations.vi: Om. Xin chúng ta hãy suy niệm về Bhagava (Chúa) của các Yaksha (Kubera). Xin chúng ta hãy thiền định về Ngài. Mong Kubera ban phước lành cho chúng ta.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，让我们默想 Yaksha 族的领袖 (Kubera)。让我们冥想他。愿 Kubera 降临恩赐于我们。

mantras.name: Om, let us meditate on the glorious name of the All-Giving Mother Earth; may she inspire our intellect.
mantras.english: Om, let us meditate on the glorious name of the All-Giving Mother Earth; may she inspire our intellect.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, letaḥ syāmaḥ dhyātuṃ śrīyaṃ namaḥ sarvadaṁ dātṛīm matṛīm bhūmiṃ; mayiḥ pratibuddhiṃ jagatī.
mantras.background: Om — the primordial Vedic sound, vibration of all creation. From Sanskrit tradition, it unites waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states, bridging finite and infinite.
mantras.benefits:
Om, the primordial sound, unifies waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states (Mandukya Upanishad). Its chanting shifts brainwaves toward deep meditation, stimulates the vagus nerve, and opens consciousness to stillness and transcendence.
  Grounding: Sources cite Mandukya Upanishad's four-state model, NBRC brain-wave research, vagal nerve stimulation from nasal hum, and practitioners' universal reports of consciousness shifts.
mantras.tags: hindu, all-giving mother earth, meditation, intellect, primordial sound, vedic, unity, healing, mantra, om, divine, mantra, vibration

translations.es: Om, meditemos en el glorioso nombre de la Madre Tierra, que nos da todo; que ella inspire nuestra inteligencia.
translations.ar: ॐ، لنردد بتأمل اسم الأم العظيمة المنّانة، الأرض؛ لتلهم عقولنا.
translations.bn: ওম, আমরা যেন সর্ব-দাতা মা ভূমি দেবীর মহিমা স্তুত করি; তিনি যেন আমাদের বুদ্ধিকে অনুপ্রাণিত করেন।
translations.de: Om, lasst uns über den erhabenen Namen der allgebenden Mutter Erde meditieren; möge sie unseren Verstand erhellen.
translations.en-us: "Om, let us meditate on the glorious name of the bountiful Mother Earth; may she inspire our intellect."
translations.en-gb: "Om, let us meditate on the revered name of the All-Bounteous Mother Earth; may she inspire our understanding."
translations.fr-fr: Om, méditons sur le nom glorieux de la Mère Terre, qui donne à tous ; qu'elle inspire notre intelligence.
translations.he: אום, נתמקד בשם המהולל של האם האדמה הנדיבה; תשרה עלינו השראה בחוכמה.
translations.hi: ॐ, आइए हम सर्व-दाता, माँ पृथ्वी के पावन नाम पर ध्यान करें; वह हमारी बुद्धि को प्रेरित करे।
translations.id: Om, marilah kita merenungkan nama agung Ibu Pertiwi yang Maha Pemberi; semoga Ia menginspirasi akal budi kita.
translations.it: Om, meditemo sul nome glorioso della Madre Terra, che dona ogni cosa; possa essa ispirare la nostra intelligenza.
translations.ja: オーム、我々は、全てを与える母なる大地の輝かしい名前を瞑想し、彼女が我々の知性を鼓舞するように。
translations.ko: 오옴, 만물을 베푸는 어머니 대지의 영화로운 이름을 묵상하며, 그녀가 우리 지성을 깨우게 하소서.
translations.nl: Om, laten wij mediteren op de verheven naam van de allesgevende Moeder Aarde; moge zij onze intelligentie inspireren.
translations.pl: Om, medytujmy nad chwalebnym imieniem Matki Ziemi, która obdarza wszystkim; niech Ona zainspiruje nasz intelekt.
translations.pt-br: Om, meditemos na gloriosa manifestação do nome da Mãe Terra, que nos concede tudo; que ela inspire nossa inteligência.
translations.ru: Ом, да будем мы сосредоточены на славном имени Вседающей Матери-Земли; да вдохновит она наш разум.
translations.sv: Om, låt oss meditera över det härliga namnet på den Allomfattande Moder Jord; må hon inspirera vårt intellekt.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตา, ขอให้เราใคร่ครวญถึงพระนามอันยิ่งใหญ่ของพระแม่ธรณีผู้เปี่ยมด้วยความอุดมสมบูรณ์; ขอพระองค์จงเป็นแรงบันดาลใจให้แก่ปัญญาของเรา
translations.tr: Om, Bütün Veren Ana Dünya'nın yüce adını üzerinde düşünelim; o, zihnimizi aydınlatsın.
translations.uk: Ом, дозвольте нам розмірковувати про славне ім'я Всещедрої Матері-Землі; нехай вона надихне наш розум.
translations.vi: Om, xin chúng ta thiền định về danh hiệu cao quý của Mẹ Trái Đất, Đấng ban tặng mọi thứ; xin Ngài truyền cảm hứng cho trí tuệ của chúng ta.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，让我们默想给予一切的母亲地球的荣耀之名；愿她启发我们的智慧。

mantras.name: Om, let us meditate on the glory of the divine, and may the divine illuminate our intellect.
mantras.english: Om, let us meditate on the glory of the divine, and may the divine illuminate our intellect.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, letaḥ syāma, dīvarāya mahimātmātmāni dhyātuḥ, prayeṇa dīvarāyaṃ buddhiṃ prabhājatu.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic texts, Om (ॐ) is Hinduism's primordial sound — the vibration of all creation. Its three letters (A-U-M) map waking, dream, and deep sleep states.
mantras.benefits: The Gayatri Mantra awakens divine intellect and inner light. Rooted in the Rigveda, it channels positive energy and sharpens focus. Japa practice calms the heart and stills the mind, drawing the practitioner toward luminous awareness.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pranava, prayer, devotional, healing, illumination, consciousness, peace, liberation

translations.es: Om, meditemos en la gloria de lo divino, y que lo divino ilumine nuestra inteligencia.
translations.ar: "أوم، لنتأمل في مجد الإله، وليُضيء الإله عقولنا."
translations.bn: ওম, আমরা যেন ঐশ্বরিক মহিমার উপর ধ্যান করি, এবং ঐশ্বরিক শক্তি যেন আমাদের বুদ্ধিকে আলোকিত করে।
translations.de: Om, mögen wir über die Herrlichkeit des Göttlichen meditieren, und möge das Göttliche unseren Verstand erleuchten.
translations.en-us: Om, may we meditate on the divine's glory, and may the divine enlighten our understanding.
translations.en-gb: "Om, let us meditate on the divine glory, and may the divine illuminate our understanding."
translations.fr-fr: Om, méditons sur la gloire du divin, et que le divin illumine notre intellect.
translations.he: ॐ, נתפלל להרהור על הוד ה' ותהא ה' מאירה את השכל שלנו.
translations.hi: ॐ, आइए हम ईश्वरीय महिमा पर ध्यान करें, और ईश्वर हमारी बुद्धि को प्रकाशित करें।
translations.id: Om, marilah kita merenungkan keagungan Yang Ilahi, dan semoga Yang Ilahi menerangi akal budi kita.
translations.it: Om, meditemos sulla gloria del divino, e possa il divino illuminare la nostra intelletto.
translations.ja: オーム、神聖なるものの栄光について瞑想しましょう。そして、神聖なるものが私たちの知性を照らしますように。
translations.ko: 옴, 우리는 신성한 영광에 대해 묵상하고, 신성이 우리의 지성을 밝히기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Om, laten wij mediteren over de glorie van het goddelijke, en moge het goddelijke onze intelligentie verlichten.
translations.pl: Om, pozwolmy nam rozważać chwałę boskości, a niech boskość oświetli nasz intelekt.
translations.pt-br: Óm, meditemos na glória do divino, e que o divino ilumine nossa inteligência.
translations.ru: Ом, да будем мы сосредоточены на славе божественного, и да озарит божественный наш разум.
translations.sv: Om, låt oss meditera över det gudomliga, och må det gudomliga upplysa vårt intellekt.
translations.th: ขอเชิญทุกท่านจดจ่อในการใคร่ครวญถึงพระบารมีอันยิ่งใหญ่ของสิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์ และขอให้สิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์นั้นส่องสว่างปัญญาของเรา
translations.tr: Om, ilahi ihtişam üzerine düşünelim ve ilahi, zihnimizi aydınlatsın.
translations.uk: Ом, дозволь нам розмірковувати про велич божественного, і нехай божественне просвітлить наш розум.
translations.vi: Om, xin chúng ta hãy thiền định về sự vinh quang của Đấng thiêng liêng, và xin Đấng thiêng liêng soi sáng trí tuệ của chúng ta.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，让我们冥想神圣的光辉，愿神圣之光照亮我们的智慧。

mantras.name: Om, may I be free from attachment.
mantras.english: Om, may I be free from attachment.
mantras.original: Om kho won duai hua chai
mantras.transliteration: ॐ อะมุง ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าหลุดพ้นจากความยึดติด
mantras.background: From Vedic India, Om (ॐ) is Hinduism's primordial sound — the vibrational source of all creation, equated with Brahman, the absolute reality itself.
mantras.benefits: Om stills the mind by anchoring awareness in pure vibration. Vedic tradition links it to Brahman — ultimate reality. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward theta, inviting deep calm and an openness beyond ordinary thought.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, pranava, meditation, consciousness, healing, transcendent, sound, primordial, brahman, yoga

translations.es: Om, que yo pueda liberarme del apego.
translations.ar: "أوم، ليتحرر قلبي من التعلق."
translations.bn: ওম, আমি যেন সকল আসক্তি থেকে মুক্ত হই।
translations.de: Om, möge ich frei von Anhaftung sein.
translations.en-us: Om, may I be liberated from attachment.
translations.en-gb: Om, may I be liberated from attachment.
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse-je être libéré de tout attachement.
translations.he: הוּם, יען נא, שחרר אותי מכל קשר.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं सभी आसक्तियों से मुक्त होऊँ।
translations.id: Om, semoga saya terbebas dari keterikatan.
translations.it: Om, possa io essere libero dagli attaccamenti.
translations.ja: オーム、私を執着から解放してください。
translations.ko: 옴, 제가 모든 집착에서 벗어나기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Om, mog ik vrij zijn van gehechtheid.
translations.pl: Om, niechaj będę wolny od przywiązań.
translations.pt-br: Om, que eu possa ser livre de apegos.
translations.ru: Ом, да освобожу я себя от привязанностей.
translations.sv: Om, må jag vara fri från begär och anknytning.
translations.th: ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าหลุดพ้นจากความผูกพันทั้งปวง
translations.tr: "Om, herkesten ve her şeyden uzak, özgür olmak istiyorum."
translations.uk: Ом, хай я буду вільний від прив'язаностей.
translations.vi: Om, xin cho con được giải thoát khỏi mọi sự chấp trước.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，愿我从一切执着中解脱。

mantras.name: Om, may [it/this] be born, may [it/this] be born, may [it/this] be born, hail.
mantras.english: Om, may [it/this] be born, may [it/this] be born, may [it/this] be born, hail.
mantras.original: oṃ saṃ jaṃ jaṃ saḥ svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, जनयतु, जनयतु, जनयतु, वंद.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic India, this mantra opens with Om—the primordial sound of all existence—and invokes birth thrice, ritually calling forth creation. "Hail" seals the sacred offering.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om awakens creation within—its resonance calms the nervous system, shifts brainwaves toward deep meditative states, and connects the practitioner to the primordial vibration underlying all existence.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, primordial, mantra, sound, meditation, tibetan, buddhist, deity, affirmation, healing, cosmic, spiritual

translations.es: Om, que nazca, que nazca, que nazca, ¡salud!
translations.ar: "أوم، ليكن، ليكن، ليكن، تحية."
translations.bn: ওম, হে ওম, জন্ম হোক, জন্ম হোক, জন্ম হোক, জয়।
translations.de: Om, möge es entstehen, möge es entstehen, möge es entstehen, sei gegrüßt.
translations.en-us: "Om, may it be born, may it be born, may it be born, hail."
translations.en-gb: "Om, may it arise, may it arise, may it arise, hail."
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse-t-il naître, puisse-t-il naître, puisse-t-il naître, louange.
translations.he: אוֹם, יולד, יולד, יולד, הוו.
translations.hi: ॐ, उत्पन्न हो, उत्पन्न हो, उत्पन्न हो, शुभ हो।
translations.id: Om, semoga [ia/ini] terlahir, semoga [ia/ini] terlahir, semoga [ia/ini] terlahir, selamat datang.
translations.it: Om, possa nascere, possa nascere, possa nascere, saluto.
translations.ja: オーム、生じますように、生じますように、生じますように、出現し、栄えなさい。
translations.ko: 옴, (그것이) 나기를 원하오, (그것이) 나기를 원하오, (그것이) 나기를 원하오, 찬미합니다.
translations.nl: Om, moge het ontstaan, moge het ontstaan, moge het ontstaan, wees gegroet.
translations.pl: Om, niech się narodzi, niech się narodzi, niech się narodzi, niech będzie powitany.
translations.pt-br: ॐ, que [isto/isso] nasça, que [isto/isso] nasça, que [isto/isso] nasça, seja louvado.
translations.ru: Ом, да пребудет [оно/это], да пребудет [оно/это], да пребудет [оно/это], привет.
translations.sv: Om, må det uppstå, må det uppstå, må det uppstå, var hälsning.
translations.th: ขอให้บังเกิด, ขอให้บังเกิด, ขอให้บังเกิด, จงเจริญ
translations.tr: Om, doğsun, doğsun, doğsun, selametle.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай народжується, нехай народжується, нехай народжується, вітаю.
translations.vi: Om, xin [nó/nó đây] hãy sinh ra, xin [nó/nó đây] hãy sinh ra, xin [nó/nó đây] hãy sinh ra, chào mừng.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，愿其诞生，愿其诞生，愿其诞生，敬礼。

mantras.name: Om, may all beings be friendly, may all beings be compassionate, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.english: Om, may all beings be friendly, may all beings be compassionate, may all beings be free from suffering.
mantras.original: ओम् मैत्री मैत्रय महा करणा ये मैत्रीमंत्र
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, mayāt sarvabhūtāni, mayāt sarvabhūtāni karuṇāvadhaṃ, mayāt sarvabhūtāni duḥkhāt prapadyante.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic India, this mantra blends Om—the primordial sound of all creation—with a metta (loving-kindness) wish for all beings' freedom from suffering.
mantras.benefits:
Rooted in Vedic tradition, this compassion mantra cultivates metta—loving-kindness toward all beings. Japa practice focuses the mind, potentially awakening kundalini and harmonizing inner states, transforming the practitioner's consciousness.
  Grounding: Source links mantra japa to deep concentration, kundalini awakening, chakra stimulation, and liberation (moksha) via sustained repetition in Hindu tradition.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, om, compassion, universal, peace, affirmation, loving-kindness, healing

translations.es: Om, que todos los seres sean amables, que todos los seres sean compasivos, que todos los seres estén libres de sufrimiento.
translations.ar: "أوم، ليكن كل الكائنات ودودة، وليكن كل الكائنات متعاطفة، وليكن كل الكائنات خالية من المعاناة."
translations.bn: ওম, সকল প্রাণী বন্ধুত্বপূর্ণ হোক, সকল প্রাণী সহানুভূতিশীল হোক, সকল প্রাণী দুঃখ থেকে মুক্ত হোক।
translations.de: Om, mögen alle Wesen freundlich sein, mögen alle Wesen Mitgefühl empfinden, mögen alle Wesen frei von Leid sein.
translations.en-us: Om, may all beings be at peace, may all beings be filled with loving-kindness, may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.en-gb: Om, may all beings be amicable, may all beings be filled with compassion, may all beings be liberated from suffering.
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse tous les êtres être amicaux, puisse tous les êtres être compatissants, puisse tous les êtres être libérés de la souffrance.
translations.he: אום, יאמרו כל היצורים בחברות, ירחמו כל היצורים, יהיו כל היצורים חופשיים מכל סבל.
translations.hi: ॐ, तथा समस्त प्राणियों में मैत्री हो, तथा समस्त प्राणियों में करुणा हो, तथा समस्त प्राणियों से दुःख दूर हो।
translations.id: Om, semoga semua makhluk menjadi bersahabat, semoga semua makhluk merasakan welas asih, semoga semua makhluk terbebas dari penderitaan.
translations.it: Om, auspico che tutti gli esseri siano amichevoli, auspico che tutti gli esseri siano compassionevoli, auspico che tutti gli esseri siano liberi dalla sofferenza.
translations.ja: オーム、すべての生きとし生けるものが友愛に満たされますように、すべての生きとし生けるものが慈悲に包まれますように、すべての生きとし生けるものが苦しみから解放されますように。
translations.ko: 오옴, 모든 존재들이 서로에게 친절하기를, 모든 존재들이 서로를 연민하기를, 모든 존재들이 고통에서 벗어나기를.
translations.nl: Om, moge alle wezens vriendelijk zijn, moge alle wezens compassie hebben, moge alle wezens vrij zijn van lijden.
translations.pl: Om, niech wszystkie istoty będą życzliwe, niech wszystkie istoty będą współczujące, niech wszystkie istoty będą wolne od cierpienia.
translations.pt-br: Om, que todos os seres sejam amigáveis, que todos os seres sejam compassivos, que todos os seres estejam livres do sofrimento.
translations.ru: Ом, да пребудет дружелюбие со всеми существами, да пребудет сострадание со всеми существами, да будут все существа свободны от страданий.
translations.sv: Om, må alla varelser vara vänliga, må alla varelser vara medkännande, må alla varelser vara fria från lidande.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจงมีแก่สรรพสัตว์, ขอความกรุณาจงมีแก่สรรพสัตว์, ขอให้สรรพสัตว์พ้นจากความทุกข์
translations.tr: Om, bütün varlıkların dostça olması, bütün varlıkların şefkatli olması, bütün varlıkların acıdan uzak olması.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай всі істоти будуть дружні, нехай всі істоти будуть сповнені співчуття, нехай всі істоти будуть вільні від страждань.
translations.vi: Om, nguyện cầu tất cả chúng sinh đều hòa thuận, tất cả chúng sinh đều tràn đầy lòng thương, tất cả chúng sinh đều giải thoát khỏi khổ đau.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，愿一切众生皆友善，愿一切众生皆充满慈悲，愿一切众生皆远离痛苦。

mantras.name: Om, may the radiant light of consciousness illuminate.
mantras.english: Om, may the radiant light of consciousness illuminate.
mantras.original: 嗡ong 乏fa及ji喇la 达da尔er嘛˙ma 赫he利li
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, mayi prajñāvalayaḥ prakāśate.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation. The Mandukya Upanishad reveals it holds all existence within three letters — and sacred silence.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body and mind, uniting waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward meditative theta states, while tradition calls it the bridge between finite and infinite.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, brahman, pranava, yoga, consciousness, healing, liberation, vedanta, sound, chanting

translations.es: Om, que la luz radiante de la consciencia ilumine.
translations.ar: أوم، يا نور الوعي، أشرق وأضيء.
translations.bn: ওম, চেতনা নামক উজ্জ্বল আলো যেন আমাদের আলোকিত করে।
translations.de: Om, möge das strahlende Licht des Bewusstseins erleuchten.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, may the brilliant light of consciousness illuminate.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, may the brilliant light of consciousness enlighten.
translations.fr-fr: Om, que la lumière rayonnante de la conscience illumine.
translations.he: אָום, יְהִי אוֹר הַהַשְרָה הַמְאִיר.
translations.hi: ॐ, चेतना की दिव्य ज्योति से प्रकाशित हों।
translations.id: Om, semoga cahaya kesadaran yang bercahaya menerangi.
translations.it: Om, possa la luce radiosa della coscienza illuminare.
translations.ja: オーム、意識の光輝が、照らし出しますように。
translations.ko: 옴, 의식의 빛나는 광채가 깨달음을 주기를.
translations.nl: Om, moge het stralende licht van bewustzijn verhelderen.
translations.pl: Om, niech emanujący blask świadomości rozświetli.
translations.pt-br: Om, que a luz radiante da consciência ilumine.
translations.ru: Ом, да будет сияющий свет сознания освещать.
translations.sv: Om, må det strålande ljuset av medvetandet upplysa.
translations.th: ขอให้แสงสว่างแห่งจิตสำนึกส่องนำทาง.
translations.tr: Om, bilincin parlak ışığı bizi aydınlatsın.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай сяючий світ свідомості освітлює.
translations.vi: Om, xin ánh sáng rực rỡ của ý thức chiếu sáng.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，愿意识的光芒照耀。

mantras.name: Om, may the sound reach, may the sound spread, may the sound resonate. Mother, the true cause, may it be like this.
mantras.english: Om, may the sound reach, may the sound spread, may the sound resonate. Mother, the true cause, may it be like this.
mantras.original: 嗡ong 达da咧lie 都dū达da咧lie 都dū咧lie 玛ma玛ma阿a 优uer布bu涅nie嘉jia那na 布bu真zhen因yīn 咕gū如ru 梭suo哈ha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, may the sound reach, may the sound spread, may the sound resonate. Mother, the true cause, may it be like this.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic tradition, Om is creation's primordial vibration. This mantra calls sound to spread and resonate, honoring the Divine Mother as the ultimate cause.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om stills the mind through deep resonance—research links it to theta brainwaves and vagal calm. Its vibrational spread, from belly to skull, mirrors the mantra's prayer: may sound reach, resonate, and awaken the root of all.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, mantra, resonance, meditation, sound, vibration, healing, consciousness, divine, primordial, stillness

translations.es: Om, que el sonido alcance, que el sonido se extienda, que el sonido resuene. Madre, la verdadera causa, que así sea.
translations.ar: "أوم، ليكن الصوت مُتَّصِلاً، ليكن الصوت مُنتَشِراً، ليكن الصوت مُتردِّداً. يا أمّ، يا السبب الحقيقي، ليكن الأمر هكذا."
translations.bn: ওম, হে ধ্বনি, তুমি প্রবাহিত হও, তুমি বিস্তারিত হও, তুমি অনুরণিত হও। মা, তুমিই প্রকৃত কারণ, যেন এটি এমন হয়।
translations.de: Om, möge der Klang erreichen, möge der Klang sich ausbreiten, möge der Klang widerhallen. Mutter, die wahre Ursache, so möge es sein.
translations.en-us: Om, may this sound permeate, may this sound expand, may this sound reverberate. Mother, the ultimate source, may it be so.
translations.en-gb: Om, may this sound reach, may this sound spread, may this sound resonate. Mother, the ultimate origin, may it be so.
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse le son atteindre, puisse le son se répandre, puisse le son résonner. Mère, cause véritable, qu'il en soit ainsi.
translations.he: אוֹם, ייתן הצליל להגיע, ייתן הצליל להתפשט, ייתן הצליל להדהד. אם, המקור האמיתי, כך יהי.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे ध्वनि, कृपया पहुँचो, कृपया फैल, कृपया गुंजित हो। माता, परम कारण, ऐसा ही हो।
translations.id: Om, semoga suara ini menjangkau, semoga suara ini menyebar, semoga suara ini beresonansi. Ibu, sumber kebenaran, semoga demikianlah adanya.
translations.it: Om, possa questo suono giungere, possa questo suono diffondersi, possa questo suono risuonare. Madre, vera causa, così sia.
translations.ja: オーム、その音 (om, sono oto) が届きますように、広まりますように、響き渡りますように。母なる源 (haha naru gensen), 真実の原因 (shinjitsu no gen'in), それがそうであらんことを。
translations.ko: 옴, 소리가 닿기를, 소리가 퍼지기를, 소리가 울려 퍼지기를. 어머니, 진정한 근원, 그러하기를.
translations.nl: Om, moge het geluid bereiken, moge het geluid zich verspreiden, moge het geluid resoneren. Moeder, de ware oorzaak, moge het zo zijn.
translations.pl: Om, niech ten dźwięk dosięgnie, niech ten dźwięk się rozprzestrzeni, niech ten dźwięk rezonuje. Matko, prawdziwe źródło, niech tak się stanie.
translations.pt-br: Om, que o som alcance, que o som se espalhe, que o som ressoe. Mãe, a verdadeira causa, que assim seja.
translations.ru: Ом, да пребудет звук, да распространится звук, да резонирует звук. Мать, истинный источник, да будет так.
translations.sv: Om, må ljudet nå, må ljudet spridas, må ljudet resonera. Moder, den sanna orsaken, må det vara så.
translations.th: ขอให้เสียงนี้แผ่ขยาย, ขอให้เสียงนี้ก้องกังวาน, ขอให้เสียงนี้สั่นสะท้อน. มารดา, ต้นกำเนิดที่แท้จริง, ขอให้เป็นเช่นนี้.
translations.tr: Om, sesin ulaşsın, sesin yayılsin, sesin yankılansın. Anne, gerçek sebep, böyle olsun.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай звук досягне, нехай звук пошириться, нехай звук резонує. Матінко, істинна причина, нехай буде так.
translations.vi: Om, xin âm thanh này lan tỏa, xin âm thanh này lan rộng, xin âm thanh này vang vọng. Mẹ, nguồn gốc chân thật, xin cho nó như vậy.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，愿此音传达，愿此音传播，愿此音共鸣。 母亲，真正的因，愿如此。

mantras.name: Om, may we be protected by the Self (or Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with prosperity, may there be no animosity. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: Om, may we be protected by the Self (or Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with prosperity, may there be no animosity. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.original: Om saha nav avatu saha nau bhunaktu saha viryam karavavahai tejasvi navadhitam astu ma vidvishavahai Om shanti shanti shanti
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, may we be protected by the Self (or Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we work together with energy, may our study be filled with prosperity, may there be no animosity. Om, peace, peace, peace.
mantras.background:
From ancient Upanishads, this Vedic chant calls teacher and student to learn together in harmony: "May we be protected, nourished, energized — Om, peace!"
  Grounding: Source names it "A song from Upanishads," recited at start of shared study/ventures. Translation confirms protection, nourishment, vigor, and peace themes.
mantras.benefits:
A Upanishadic invocation of unity, this mantra cultivates mutual protection, nourishment, and harmony. Chanted before shared study or ventures, it dissolves discord and invites collective vitality — a living bridge between seekers.
  Grounding: Source identifies it as recited before joint study/ventures, promoting protection, nourishment, vigor, and freedom from discord (Upanishads entry).
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, upanishad, collective, protection, nourishment, illumination, peace, harmony, study, unity, invocation

translations.es: Óm, que seamos protegidos por el Ser (o lo Divino), que seamos nutridos por el Ser, que trabajemos juntos con energía, que nuestro estudio se llene de prosperidad, que no haya enemistad. Óm, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ar: "أوم، لِنَحْظَ بِحِمَايَةِ الذَّاتِ (أو الإِلَهِيَّة)، لِنَكُنْ مُرْتَقِينَ بِرِعَايَةِ الذَّاتِ، لِنَعْمَلْ سُويًّا بِطَاقَةٍ، لِيَمْتَلَئْ عِلْمُنَا بِالرَّخَاء، لِيَكُنْ لَا يُوجَدُ عَدَاء. أوم، سَلامٌ، سَلامٌ، سَلامٌ."
translations.bn: ওঁ, পরমাত্মা/ Divine, আমাদের রক্ষা করুন, পরমাত্মা আমাদের পুষ্টি দিন, আমরা শক্তি নিয়ে একসঙ্গে কাজ করি, আমাদের অধ্যয়ন সমৃদ্ধ হোক, এবং কোনো বিদ্বেষ থাকুক না। ওঁ, শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Om, mögen wir durch das Selbst (oder das Göttliche) geschützt sein, mögen wir durch das Selbst genährt werden, mögen wir mit Energie zusammenarbeiten, möge unser Lernen mit Wohlstand erfüllt sein, mögen wir frei von Feindseligkeit sein. Om, Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: "Om. May we be protected by the Self (or the Divine). May we be nourished by the Self. May we strive together with vigor. May our learning be filled with prosperity. May there be no animosity. Om. Peace, peace, peace."
translations.en-gb: Om, may we be protected by the Self (or Divine), may we be nourished by the Self, may we strive together with vigour, may our learning be filled with prosperity, may there be no ill will. Om, peace, peace, peace.
translations.fr-fr: Om, puisse le Soi (ou le Divin) nous protéger, puisse le Soi nous nourrir, puisse nous travailler ensemble avec énergie, puisse notre étude être remplie de prospérité, et qu'il n'y ait aucune animosité. Om, paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: הום, יגן עלינו העצמיות (או האלוהות), יזין אותנו העצמיות, נעבוד יחד באנרגיה, לימודינו יהיו מלאים בשגשוג, שלא תהיה שנאה. הום, שלום, שלום, שלום.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे स्वयं (या परमात्मा), हम आपकी रक्षा में हों, हम आपके द्वारा पोषित हों, हम ऊर्जा के साथ मिलकर कार्य करें, हमारी शिक्षा समृद्धि से परिपूर्ण हो, और हमारे बीच कोई द्वेष न हो। ॐ, शांति, शांति, शांति।
translations.id: Om, semoga kami dilindungi oleh Diri (atau Ketuhanan), semoga kami diberi nutrisi oleh Diri, semoga kami bekerja bersama dengan semangat, semoga studi kami dipenuhi dengan kemakmuran, semoga tidak ada permusuhan. Om, shanti, shanti, shanti.
translations.it: Om, possiamo essere protetti dal Sé (o dal Divino), possiamo essere nutriti dal Sé, possiamo lavorare insieme con energia, possa il nostro studio essere pieno di prosperità, possa non esserci ostilità. Om, pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: オーム。我々が自己（または神）によって守られ、自己によって養われ、互いに力を合わせて活動し、学びが繁栄に満たされ、いかなる不和も起こりませんように。オーム、平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 오옴, 우리는 자아(혹은 신성)에 의해 보호받기를, 우리는 자아에 의해 양육받기를, 우리는 함께 에너지를 모아 일하기를, 우리의 학문은 번영으로 가득하기를, 그리고 어떠한 적대감도 없기를 바랍니다. 오옴, 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Om, moge het Zelf (of het Goddelijke) ons beschermen, moge het Zelf ons voeden, moge we met energie samenwerken, moge onze studie vol voorspoed zijn, moge er geen vijandigheid zijn. Om, vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Om, niech nas chroni Jaźń (lub Boskość), niech nas karmi Jaźń, niech działamy wspólnie z energią, niech nasza nauka będzie pełna pomyślności, niech nie będzie żadnej wrogości. Om, pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: ॐ, que sejamos protegidos pelo Ser (ou Divino), que sejamos nutridos pelo Ser, que trabalhemos juntos com energia, que nosso estudo seja preenchido com prosperidade, que não haja inimizade. ॐ, paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Ом, да пребудет над нами Защита Высшего (или Божественного), да будет Забота Высшего для нас, да будем мы действовать сообща, с энергией, да будет наше обучение наполнено процветанием, да не будет вражды. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Om, må vi skyddas av Självet (eller det gudomliga), må vi näras av Självet, må vi arbeta tillsammans med kraft, må vår studier vara fyllda av välstånd, må det inte finnas någon fientlighet. Om, frid, frid, frid.
translations.th: ขอความคุ้มครองจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า/จิตวิญญาณ, ขอให้ได้รับการบำรุงจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า/จิตวิญญาณ, ขอให้เราทำงานร่วมกันด้วยพลัง, ขอให้การศึกษาของเราเจริญรุ่งเรือง, ขออย่ามีความขัดแย้งใดๆ ทั้งสิ้น. โอ๊ม, สันติ, สันติ, สันติ.
translations.tr: Om, bizler, Öz'den (veya Tanrı'dan) korunalım, Öz'den beslenelim, enerjik bir şekilde birlikte çalışalım, çalışmalarımız bereketle dolsun, aramızda herhangi bir düşmanlık olmasın. Om, huzur, huzur, huzur.
translations.uk: Ом, да захистить нас Сутність (або Божество), да нагодує нас Сутність, да будемо ми працювати разом з енергією, да буде наша праця наповнена процвітанням, да не буде ворожнечі. Ом, мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Ôm, xin sự Thiện (hoặc Đấng thiêng liêng) bảo vệ chúng con, xin sự Thiện nuôi dưỡng chúng con, xin chúng con hợp tác với năng lượng, xin sự học tập của chúng con tràn đầy sự thịnh vượng, xin không có sự thù địch. Ôm, bình an, bình an, bình an.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，愿我们得到真我的庇护，愿我们得到真我的滋养，愿我们充满活力地共同努力，愿我们的学习充满繁荣，愿没有敌意。 唵，和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: Om, praise the eloquent, compassionate, and supreme being, the sustainer of humanity.
mantras.english: Om, praise the eloquent, compassionate, and supreme being, the sustainer of humanity.
mantras.original: 唵ong 班ban札zha 薩sa哇wa 萨sa玛ma 呀ya 玛ma奴nu 巴ba拉la呀ya
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, āre ṛtaṃ, mahā-daśā, karuṇā-mayaṃ, paramaṃ puruṣaṃ, manuṣya-rakṣakaṃ.
mantras.background: Rooted in Buddhist Sanskrit, this mantra praises Avalokitesvara—Guanyin—the "eloquent, compassionate" Bodhisattva. The source's Ganlu mantra names this supreme being Maha Karunika: humanity's great compassionate sustainer.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om anchors the practitioner in stillness—brain research confirms theta-wave shifts during its resonance. Invoking the compassionate sustainer cultivates empathy and inner refuge, drawing the heart toward openness and service to all beings.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, upanishadic, brahman, pranava, sound, resonance, prayer, consciousness, healing, unity

translations.es: Om, alaba al Ser elocuente, compasivo y supremo, sustentador de la humanidad.
translations.ar: "أوم، الحمد للوجود اللامحدود، المتكلم البليغ، ذي الرحمة، والأسمى، حافظ البشرية."
translations.bn: ওম, সেই বাগ্মী, দয়ালু এবং সর্বোচ্চ সত্তাকে স্তুতি করি, যিনি মানবজাতির ধারক ও রক্ষক।
translations.de: Om, preiset das redensfähige, gütige und höchste Wesen, den Erhalter der Menschheit.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, we praise the eloquent, compassionate, and supreme being, the sustainer of humanity.
translations.en-gb: Om, we praise the articulate, compassionate, and supreme being, the sustainer of humankind.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, louange à l'Être éloquent, compatissant et suprême, soutien de l'humanité.
translations.he: אָה, בְּרַךְ אֶת הַיְּכוּל, הָרַחוּם, וְהַנַעֲלֶה, מַחְזֵק הָאָדָם.
translations.hi: ॐ, वह वक्ता, दयालु और सर्वोच्च अस्तित्व की स्तुति करो, जो मानवता को धारण करता है।
translations.id: Om, sembahlah Sang Pencipta yang fasih berbicara, penuh kasih sayang, dan tertinggi, yang menopang kehidupan manusia.
translations.it: Om, loda l'essere eloquente, compassionevole e supremo, il sostenitore dell'umanità.
translations.ja: オーム、雄弁で、慈悲深く、至高の存在を讃えます。それは、人類を支える者です。
translations.ko: 옴, 웅변적이고, 자비로우며, 궁극적인 존재, 즉 인류의 유지자이신 그분을 찬미합니다. (Om, 찬미합니다. 그분은 웅변적이고, 자비로우며, 궁극적인 존재이며, 인류의 유지자입니다.)
translations.nl: Om, prijs de welsprekende, medelevende en opperste Wezen, de Onderhouder van de mensheid.
translations.pl: Om, chwalmy Wyższego, mądrego, współczującego i najwyższe Bycie, podtrzymujące ludzkość.
translations.pt-br: "Om, louvando o ser eloquente, compassivo e supremo, que sustenta a humanidade."
translations.ru: Ом, восславим красноречивое, сострадательное и высшее существо, поддерживающее человечество.
translations.sv: Om, pris den talefulla, medkännande och högsta varelsen, den som upprätthåller mänskligheten.
translations.th: ขอพระองค์, จงสรรเสริญถึงผู้มีวจนะอันไพเราะ, ผู้เปี่ยมด้วยความเมตตา, และเป็นพระผู้สูงสุด, ผู้ทรงดำรงไว้ซึ่งมนุษยชาติ
translations.tr: Om, "Sevgili ve şefkatli yüce varlığa, insanlığın destekçisine övgüler olsun."
translations.uk: Ом, проспівай хвалу красномовній, співчутливій та найвищій Істоті, Тій, що підтримує людство.
translations.vi: Om, hãy ca ngợi Đấng Tối Cao, Đấng hùng biện, nhân hậu và tối thượng, Đấng duy trì nhân loại.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，赞美那至高、仁慈、博学的存在，他是人类的守护者。

mantras.name: Om, praising the letter Ba, the sound Na, the sound Ha, the sound A; praising the letter Ta, the sound Wa, the sound Ga, the sound La, the sound Na; Om, praising the sound Pe.
mantras.english: Om, praising the letter Ba, the sound Na, the sound Ha, the sound A; praising the letter Ta, the sound Wa, the sound Ga, the sound La, the sound Na; Om, praising the sound Pe.
mantras.original: 唵ong 班ban札zha 巴ba那na 哈ha呀ya 卓zhuo哇wa噶ga朗lang札zha 吽hong呸pei
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, praiśing the letter ba, the sound na, the sound ha, the sound a; praising the letter ta, the sound wa, the sound ga, the sound la, the sound na; ōṃ, praising the sound pe.
mantras.background: A Buddhist dharani, this mantra opens and closes with Om—the primordial sound—while reverently "praising" individual sacred syllables. Each sound is treated as a living object of devotion, reflecting the dharani tradition's belief that syllables themselves carry cosmic protective power.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in Buddhist dharani tradition, this mantra's rhythmic syllabic praise cultivates compassionate awareness and dissolves karmic obstacles. Like Om's documented brainwave shifts, sustained recitation draws the mind inward, while its invocatory structure mirrors the Great Compassion Mantra's protective and purifying function.
mantras.tags: om, vedic, hindu, brahman, sound, primordial, universal, vibration, sacred

translations.es: Om, alabando la letra Ba, el sonido Na, el sonido Ha, el sonido A; alabando la letra Ta, el sonido Wa, el sonido Ga, el sonido La, el sonido Na; Om, alabando el sonido Pe.
translations.ar: "أوم، مديحاً للحرف "با"، للصوت "نا"، للصوت "ها"، للصوت "أ"; مديحاً للحرف "تا"، للصوت "وا"، للصوت "غا"، للصوت "لا"، للصوت "نا"; أوم، مديحاً للصوت "بي".
translations.bn:
ॐ, बा अक्षर की स्तुति, ना ध्वनि की स्तुति, हा ध्वनि की स्तुति, अ ध्वनि की स्तुति; ता अक्षर की स्तुति, वा ध्वनि की स्तुति, गा ध्वनि की स्तुति, ला ध्वनि की स्तुति, ना ध्वनि की स्तुति; ॐ, पे ध्वनि की स्तुति।

अनुवाद: ওম, 'বা' অক্ষরটির স্তুতি, 'না' ধ্বনির স্তুতি, 'হা' ধ্বনির স্তুতি, 'আ' ধ্বনির স্তুতি; 'তা' অক্ষরটির স্তুতি, 'ওয়া' ধ্বনির স্তুতি, 'গা' ধ্বনির স্তুতি, 'লা' ধ্বনির স্তুতি, 'না' ধ্বনির স্তুতি; ওম, 'পে' ধ্বনির স্তুতি।
translations.de: Om, das den Buchstaben Ba, den Laut Na, den Laut Ha, den Laut A preist; das den Buchstaben Ta, den Laut Wa, den Laut Ga, den Laut La, den Laut Na preist; Om, das den Laut Pe preist.
translations.en-us: "Om, offering praise to the letter 'Ba', the sound 'Na', the sound 'Ha', the sound 'A'; offering praise to the letter 'Ta', the sound 'Wa', the sound 'Ga', the sound 'La', the sound 'Na'; Om, offering praise to the sound 'Pe'."
translations.en-gb: Om, offering praise to the letter 'Ba', the sound 'Na', the sound 'Ha', and the sound 'A'; offering praise to the letter 'Ta', the sound 'Wa', the sound 'Ga', the sound 'La', and the sound 'Na'; Om, offering praise to the sound 'Pe'.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, louant la lettre Ba, le son Na, le son Ha, le son A; louant la lettre Ta, le son Wa, le son Ga, le son La, le son Na; Ôm, louant le son Pe.
translations.he: אוֹם, משבח את האות ב', את הצליל נ', את הצליל ה', את הצליל א'; משבח את האות ת', את הצליל ו', את הצליל ג', את הצליל ל', את הצליל נ'; אוֹם, משבח את הצליל פ.
translations.hi: ॐ, 'बा' अक्षर की, 'ना' ध्वनि की, 'हा' ध्वनि की, 'आ' ध्वनि की स्तुति; 'ता' अक्षर की, 'वा' ध्वनि की, 'गा' ध्वनि की, 'ला' ध्वनि की, 'ना' ध्वनि की स्तुति; ॐ, 'पे' ध्वनि की स्तुति।
translations.id: Om, memuji huruf Ba, bunyi Na, bunyi Ha, bunyi A; memuji huruf Ta, bunyi Wa, bunyi Ga, bunyi La, bunyi Na; Om, memuji bunyi Pe.
translations.it: Om, lodando la lettera Ba, il suono Na, il suono Ha, il suono A; lodando la lettera Ta, il suono Wa, il suono Ga, il suono La, il suono Na; Om, lodando il suono Pe.
translations.ja: オーム、バの字、ナの音、ハの音、アの音を讃え、タの字、ワの音、ガの音、ラの音、ナの音を讃え、オーム、ペの音を讃えます。
translations.ko: 옴, '바'라는 자음, '나'라는 소리, '하'라는 소리, '아'라는 소리를 찬양하며; '타'라는 자음, '와'라는 소리, '가'라는 소리, '라'라는 소리, '나'라는 소리를 찬양하며; 옴, '파'라는 소리를 찬양합니다.
translations.nl: Om, lof voor de letter Ba, het geluid Na, het geluid Ha, het geluid A; lof voor de letter Ta, het geluid Wa, het geluid Ga, het geluid La, het geluid Na; Om, lof voor het geluid Pe.
translations.pl: Om, wychwalając literę Ba, dźwięk Na, dźwięk Ha, dźwięk A; wychwalając literę Ta, dźwięk Wa, dźwięk Ga, dźwięk La, dźwięk Na; Om, wychwalając dźwięk Pe.
translations.pt-br: Om, louvando a letra Ba, o som Na, o som Ha, o som A; louvando a letra Ta, o som Wa, o som Ga, o som La, o som Na; Om, louvando o som Pe.
translations.ru: Ом, восхваляя букву "Ба", звук "На", звук "Ха", звук "А"; восхваляя букву "Та", звук "Ва", звук "Га", звук "Ла", звук "На"; Ом, восхваляя звук "Пе".
translations.sv: Om, lovprisande bokstaven Ba, ljudet Na, ljudet Ha, ljudet A; lovprisande bokstaven Ta, ljudet Wa, ljudet Ga, ljudet La, ljudet Na; Om, lovprisande ljudet Pe.
translations.th: ขอพระนาม ॐ, ถวายความเคารพแก่ตัวอักษร บ, เสียง นะ, เสียง หะ, เสียง อา; ถวายความเคารพแก่ตัวอักษร ท, เสียง วะ, เสียง กะ, เสียง ละ, เสียง นะ; ขอพระนาม ॐ, ถวายความเคารพแก่เสียง เพ.
translations.tr: Om, "Ba" harfini, "Na" sesini, "Ha" sesini, "A" sesini övgüyle anıyorum; "Ta" harfini, "Wa" sesini, "Ga" sesini, "La" sesini, "Na" sesini övgüyle anıyorum; Om, "Pe" sesini övgüyle anıyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, восхваляя букву "Ба", звук "На", звук "Ха", звук "А"; восхваляя букву "Та", звук "Ва", звук "Га", звук "Ла", звук "На"; Ом, восхваляя звук "Пе".
translations.vi: Ôm, tôn vinh âm tiết "Ba", âm thanh "Na", âm thanh "Ha", âm thanh "A"; tôn vinh âm tiết "Ta", âm thanh "Wa", âm thanh "Ga", âm thanh "La", âm thanh "Na"; Ôm, tôn vinh âm thanh "Pe".
translations.zh-cn: 唵，赞美字母“吧”（ba），音“那”（na），音“哈”（ha），音“阿”（a）；赞美字母“他”（ta），音“哇”（wa），音“嘎”（ga），音“啦”（la），音“拿”（na）；唵，赞美音“婆”（pe）。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to A (the primordial energy), to Hrim (the sound of creation), to Srim (the embodiment of prosperity and beauty), and to Klym (the power to manifest desires).
mantras.english: Om, salutations to A (the primordial energy), to Hrim (the sound of creation), to Srim (the embodiment of prosperity and beauty), and to Klym (the power to manifest desires).
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, salaṃ namaḥ a-kāyai, hriṃ-śabdāya, śri-mūrtaye, klyama-śaktaye.
mantras.background:
From Hindu Tantric tradition, this mantra combines bija (seed) syllables: Om (primordial sound), Hrim (creation), Srim (prosperity), Klym (manifesting desires) — pure sonic power.
  Grounding: Sources confirm bija mantras derive from deity names with supernatural powers (Buhnemann), transmitted guru-to-disciple. Om is the foundational pranava mantra prefixed to Hindu prayers.
mantras.benefits:
This mantra weaves together four bija (seed) syllables—Om, Hrim, Srim, Klim—each a sonic deity-form in Tantric tradition, believed to align the practitioner with creation, prosperity, and manifestation.
  Grounding: Sources confirm bija mantras are deity-forms in sonic form (Tantric tradition), with supernatural powers transmitted through initiation, functioning as spiritual instruments of mind.
mantras.tags: hindu, tantric, bija mantra, invocation, shakti, creation, manifestation, prosperity, power

translations.es: Om, saludo a A (la energía primordial), a Hrim (el sonido de la creación), a Śrī (la encarnación de la prosperidad y la belleza) y a Klym (el poder para manifestar los deseos).
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لـ (الاسم الذي يمثل الطاقة البدائية)، و لـ (الاسم الذي يمثل صوت الخلق)، و لـ (الاسم الذي يمثل تجسيد الرخاء والجمال)، و لـ (الاسم الذي يمثل القدرة على تحقيق الأمنيات)."
translations.bn: ওঁ, ওম্, আদি শক্তি 'এ' (A)-কে, সৃষ্টি ধ্বনি 'হ্রিম' (Hrim)-কে, সমৃদ্ধি ও সৌন্দর্যের প্রতিমূর্তি 'শ্রী' (Shrim)-কে, এবং আকাঙ্ক্ষা পূরণের শক্তি 'ক্লিম' (Klim)-কে প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, Seid gegrüßt, A (die Urkraft), Hrim (der Schalls der Schöpfung), Srim (die Verkörperung von Wohlstand und Schönheit) und Klym (die Kraft, Wünsche zu manifestieren).
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to A, the primordial energy; to Hrim, the sound of creation; to Srim, the embodiment of prosperity and beauty; and to Klym, the power to manifest desires."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to the primordial energy, to the creative sound, to the embodiment of prosperity and beauty, and to the power of manifestation."
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à A, l'énergie primordiale; à Hrim, le son de la création; à Srim, l'incarnation de la prospérité et de la beauté; et à Klym, la puissance de la manifestation des désirs.
translations.he: אום, שבח לא', לאנרגיה הראשונית, להרים (לצליל הבריאה), לסרים (לגילום השפע והיופי), ולכי למ (לכוח להגשים משאלות).
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं 'अ' (प्रारंभिक ऊर्जा) को प्रणाम करता हूँ, 'ह्रीं' (सृजन की ध्वनि) को प्रणाम करता हूँ, 'श्रीयं' (समृद्धि और सौंदर्य का प्रतीक) को प्रणाम करता हूँ, और 'क्लीं' (इच्छाओं को प्रकट करने की शक्ति) को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada A (energi primordial), kepada Hrim (suara penciptaan), kepada Srim (perwujudan kemakmuran dan keindahan), dan kepada Klym (kekuatan untuk mewujudkan keinginan).
translations.it: Om, saluto a A (l'energia primordiale), a Hrim (il suono della creazione), a Srim (l'incarnazione della prosperità e della bellezza) e a Klym (il potere di manifestare i desideri).
translations.ja: オーム、私は、(A)最初のエネルギー、(Hrim)創造の音、(Srim)繁栄と美の象徴、そして(Klym)願望を実現する力、これらすべてに敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴, 원시적 에너지인 'A'에게, 창조의 소리인 'Hrim'에게, 번영과 아름다움의 화신인 'Srim'에게, 그리고 소망을 실현시키는 힘인 'Klym'에게 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan A (de oerenergie), aan Hrim (het klank van de schepping), aan Srim (de belichaming van voorspoed en schoonheid), en aan Klym (de kracht om verlangens te manifesteren).
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla A (pierwotnej energii), dla Hrim (dźwięku stworzenia), dla Srim (uosobienia dobrobytu i piękna) oraz dla Klym (mocy manifestowania pragnień).
translations.pt-br: Om, reverência a A (a energia primordial), a Hrim (o som da criação), a Srim (a personificação da prosperidade e beleza) e a Klym (o poder de manifestar desejos).
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия А (первичной энергии), Хриму (звуку творения), Шри (воплощению процветания и красоты) и Клим (силе реализации желаний).
translations.sv: Om, vördnad till A (den primära energin), till Hrim (skapelsens ljud), till Srim (inkarnationen av välstånd och skönhet) och till Klym (kraften att manifestera önskningar).
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจาก ॐ (อม), แด่พลังงานอันเป็นบ่อเกิด, แด่เสียงแห่งการสร้างสรรค์ (หริม), แด่ผู้ซึ่งเป็นที่รวมของความมั่งคั่งและความงาม (ศรีม), และแด่พลังในการทำให้ความปรารถนาเป็นจริง (คลิม).
translations.tr: Om, A'ya (ilkel enerji), Hrim'e (yaratılışın sesi), Srim'e (bereket ve güzelliğin tezahürü) ve Klym'e (istekleri gerçekleştirme gücü) saygılar.
translations.uk: Ом, вітання А (первісна енергія), Хрім (звук творіння), Срім (втілення процвітання та краси) та Клім (сила здійснення бажань).
translations.vi: Om, kính chào A (năng lượng nguyên thủy), Hrim (âm thanh của sự sáng tạo), Srim (hình mẫu của sự thịnh vượng và vẻ đẹp), và Klym (sức mạnh để hiện thực hóa ước muốn).
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，我向“阿”（原始能量）、“赫林”（创造之声）、“斯林”（繁荣与美丽之化身）以及“克林”（实现愿望的力量）致敬。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to Dhum, the one who sustains (or embodies) Rahu.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to Dhum, the one who sustains (or embodies) Rahu.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, salutation to dhuṃ, the one who sustains (or embodies) rāhu.
mantras.background: From Hindu Sanskrit tradition, "Om Dhum Ram Rahave Namah" salutes Rahu, the shadow planet. Chanting connects devotees to cosmic planetary forces through sacred Vedic sound.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om Dhum Ram Rahave Namah is said to pacify Rahu's chaotic influence—easing anxiety, confusion, and karmic turbulence—inviting clarity and protection into one's inner world.
mantras.tags: hindu, rahu, devotion, planetary, jyotish, salutation

translations.es: Om, saludo a Dhum, aquel que sustenta o encarna a Rahu.
translations.ar: ॐ، التحية لـ "دْهُم"، الذي يحافظ على "راهو" أو يمثلها.
translations.bn: ওম, ধুমকে প্রণাম, যিনি রাহু embody করেন বা যার মধ্যে রাহু বিরাজমান।
translations.de: Om, Salutationen dem Dhum, demjenigen, der Rahu nährt oder verkörpert.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to Dhum, the one who embodies or sustains Rahu.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Dhum, the one who embodies or sustains Rahu.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à Dhum, celui qui soutient ou incarne Rahu.
translations.he: אום, ברכה לדוּם, זה הראוהו.
translations.hi: ॐ, धूम को नमस्कार, जो राहु को धारण करने वाला है।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Dhum, entitas yang menopang atau mewujudkan Rahu.
translations.it: Om, saluto a Dhum, colui che sostiene o incarna Rahu.
translations.ja: オーム、ドゥーム（またはラーフを支え、あるいは具現化する者）へ、敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴. 둠(Dhum)에게, 라후를 유지하거나 구현하는 존재에게 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan Dhum, die Rahu draagt of belichaamt.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia Dhumowi, temu, który podtrzymuje lub jest uosobieniem Rahu.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações a Dhum, aquele que sustenta ou incorpora Rahu.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Дхуму, Тому, кто поддерживает (или воплощает) Раху.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till Dhum, den som upprätthåller eller förkroppsligar Rahu.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาแด่ ธรรมะ (หรือ ดุมะ), ผู้ซึ่งเป็นที่พึ่ง (หรือ เป็นตัวแทน) ของราหู
translations.tr: Om, Dhum'a selamlar, Rahu'yu besleyen (veya bünyesinde barındıran) varlığa.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия Дхуму, Тому, хто підтримує (або є втіленням) Раху.
translations.vi: Om, lời chào kính dâng Dhum, vị thần bao trùm và nuôi dưỡng Rahu.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向杜姆（Dhum）致敬，他是拉胡（Rahu）的化身/承载者。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to Great Cosmic Energy, I am That.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to Great Cosmic Energy, I am That.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, saṁskṛte namo 'stu mahāyaṃaśaktaye, aham tad asti.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation — chanted before every prayer, it bridges the finite and the infinite.
mantras.benefits: Om's sustained resonance calms the nervous system, shifts brainwaves toward meditative theta states, and connects the practitioner to the vibrational source of all existence — making it the ideal gateway into any spiritual practice.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pranava, brahman, chanting, cosmic, consciousness, healing, relaxation, vibration, shiva, transcendent

translations.es: Om, saludo a la Gran Energía Cósmica, Yo Soy Eso.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لقوة كونية عظيمة، أنا هو."
translations.bn: ওম, মহাবিশ্বের মহান শক্তির প্রতি প্রণতি, আমিই সেই।
translations.de: Om, Salutation an die große kosmische Energie, ich bin das.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to the supreme cosmic energy; I am that very essence.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the Supreme Cosmic Energy; I am that very essence.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à la Grande Énergie Cosmique, je suis Cela.
translations.he: אָהוֹם, שְׁלָמוּת לְכֹחַ קוֹסְמִי עֶלְיוֹן, אֲנִי הוּא.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे महान ब्रह्मांडीय ऊर्जा, मैं वही हूँ।
translations.id: Om, salam bagi Energi Kosmik Agung, Aku adalah Itu.
translations.it: Om, saluto all'immenso potere cosmico, io sono Ciò.
translations.ja: オーム。宇宙の偉大なエネルギーに礼。我はそれなりである。 (Ōmu. Uchū no dai na enerugī ni rei. Ware wa sore nari.)
translations.ko: 옴, 위대한 우주 에너지에게 경의를 표합니다. 나는 그것입니다. (Om, 위대한 우주 에너지에게 경의를 표합니다. 나는 그것입니다.)
translations.nl: Om, groet de Grote Kosmische Energie, Ik ben Dat.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia Wielkiej Kosmicznej Energii, Ja Jestem Tym.
translations.pt-br: Om, reverência à Grande Energia Cósmica, Eu Sou Aquilo.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Великой Космической Энергии, Я есть То.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till den stora kosmiska energin, jag är det.
translations.th: "โอม, ข้าขอคารวะต่อพลังจักรวาลอันยิ่งใหญ่, ข้าคือสิ่งนั้น."
translations.tr: Om, Büyük Kozmik Enerji'ye selamlar, Ben O'yum.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствую Великую Космическую Энергию, Я есть То.
translations.vi: Om, Kính chào Năng lượng Vũ trụ Vĩ đại, Ta là đó.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向伟大的宇宙能量致敬，我即是它。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to Hari, Om.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to Hari, Om.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, salutations to Hari, ōṃ.
mantras.background: Om (ॐ), from Vedic Hindu tradition, is the primordial sound of all creation. The Mandukya Upanishad reveals its three letters span all states of consciousness — waking, dream, and deep sleep — with sacred silence beyond.
mantras.benefits:
Om anchors the mind in the present, uniting waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into one awareness. Research links its chanting to theta brainwaves and vagal stimulation — stillness you can literally feel resonate through your body.
  Grounding: Mandukya Upanishad (three states + turiya), NBRC brain wave research, and vagal nerve stimulation from the 'm' hum are all cited in the source.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, hari, devotional, primordial, healing, sound, transcendence

translations.es: Om, saludo a Hari, Om.
translations.ar: "أوم، التحية لـ "هاري"، أوم."
translations.bn: ওম, হরিকে প্রণাম, ওম।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung für Hari, Om.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to Hari, Om.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Hari, Om.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à Hari, Om.
translations.he: הוֹם, שבח להארי, הוֹם.
translations.hi: ॐ, हरि को प्रणाम, ॐ।
translations.id: Om, salam bagi Hari, Om.
translations.it: Om, saluto a Hari, Om.
translations.ja: オーム、ハリーに敬意を表します、オーム。
translations.ko: 옴, 하리에게 경의를 표합니다, 옴.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan Hari, Om.
translations.pl: Om, powitania dla Hari, Om.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudação a Hari, Om.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Хари, Ом.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till Hari, Om.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชแก่พระวิษณุ, โอรัม.
translations.tr: Om, Hari'ye saygı, Om.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия Хари, Ом.
translations.vi: Om, lời tôn kính dâng lên Hari, Om.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向 Hari 敬礼，嗡。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, salutations to hriṃ, salutations to kliṃ.
mantras.background: From Hindu Vedic tradition, this mantra combines Om (primordial sound of all existence) with Hrim and Klim — potent Bija "seed" syllables whose power lies in pure vibrational energy, not literal words.
mantras.benefits: Om anchors the mind in primordial stillness, while Hrim and Klim — potent bija (seed) syllables — work through pure vibrational energy to activate inner forces and awaken deeper consciousness. A practice that opens invisible doors.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, shakti, tantric, bija, chakra, devotional, energy, prayer

translations.es: Om, saludo a Hrim, saludo a Klim.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لـ "حريم"، تحية لـ "كليم"."
translations.bn: ওঁ,HRIM মন্ত্রের প্রতি প্রণতি, ক্লিêm মন্ত্রের প্রতি প্রণতি।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung für Hrim, Verehrung für Klim.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à Hrim, salutations à Klim.
translations.he: הוֹם, שבח להרים, שבח לקלים.
translations.hi: ॐ, ह्रीं को नमस्कार, क्लीम को नमस्कार।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Hrim, salam kepada Klim.
translations.it: Om, saluto a Hrim, saluto a Klim.
translations.ja: オーム、HRIM（ヒニム）へ礼拝、KLIM（クリム）へ礼拝。
translations.ko: 옴, 프리 힌드라에게 경의를, 클림에게 경의를. (Om, gyeongui-reul peuri hindeura-ege, gyeongui-reul klimeu-ege.)
translations.nl: Om, eer aan Hrim, eer aan Klim.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia Hrim, pozdrowienia Klim.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações a Hrim, saudações a Klim.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Хриму, приветствия Клим.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till Hrim, hälsningar till Klim.
translations.th: อ้อม, ข้าขอคารวะแด่ หริม, ข้าขอคารวะแด่ คลิม
translations.tr: Om, Hrim'e saygı, Klim'e saygı.
translations.uk: Ом, вітання Хріму, вітання Кліму.
translations.vi: Om, lời tôn kính dâng lên Hrim, lời tôn kính dâng lên Klim.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向“HRIM”致敬，向“KLIM”致敬。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to Shri, Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim, salutations to Shri, salutations to Klim, and may the one named "Vitteshvaraya" manifest.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to Shri, Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim, salutations to Shri, salutations to Klim, and may the one named "Vitteshvaraya" manifest.
mantras.original: Ом шрим ом хрим шрим хрим клим шрим клим виттэсварая намаха
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, saṁdhyāya śrī, ōṃ, saṁdhyāya hriṃ, saṁdhyāya hriṃ, saṁdhyāya kliṃ, saṁdhyāya śrī, saṁdhyāya kliṃ, atha viṭṭeśvarāyaḥ prakaṭaṃ.
mantras.background:
From the Vedic tradition, this Sanskrit mantra invokes Shri (abundance), Hrim (divine power), Klim (attraction), and Vitteshvaraya (lord of wealth) — a luminous gateway to prosperity.
  Grounding: Source lists mantra in Indian Vedas section; phrase components (Shri/Hrim/Klim/Vitteshvaraya) match the transliterated Russian text "Om shrim om hrim shrim hrim klim shrim klim vitteshvaraya namaha"
mantras.benefits: Chanting this mantra—weaving Shrīm, Hrīm, Klīm, and Vitteshvaraya—is said to harmonize prosperity, divine energy, and desire, inviting abundance while steadying the mind through rhythmic repetition.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, vitteshvaraya, devotional, focus, peace, liberation, chanting

translations.es: Om, saludo a Shri, Om, saludo a Hrim, saludo a Hrim, saludo a Klim, saludo a Shri, saludo a Klim, y que se manifieste aquel al que se llama "Vitteshvaraya".
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لـ "شري"، أوم، تحية لـ "هريم"، تحية لـ "هريم"، تحية لـ "كليم"، تحية لـ "شري"، تحية لـ "كليم"، و ليكن "فيتيشفارايا" ظاهرًا/موجودًا."
translations.bn: ॐ, श्री को प्रणाम, ॐ,HRIM को प्रणाम,HRIM को प्रणाम,क्लीम को प्रणाम,श्री को प्रणाम,क्लीम को प्रणाम,और "विट्टेश्वराय" नामक সত্তা যেন প্রকাশিত হন।
translations.de: Om, Salutationen an Shri, Om, Salutationen an Hrim, Salutationen an Hrim, Salutationen an Klim, Salutationen an Shri, Salutationen an Klim, und möge derjenige, der den Namen "Vitteshvaraya" trägt, sich manifestieren.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to Shri, Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim, salutations to Shri, salutations to Klim, and may the one named 'Vitteshvaraya' manifest."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to Shri, Om, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Hrim, salutations to Klim, salutations to Shri, salutations to Klim, and may the one named 'Vitteshvaraya' manifest."
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à Shri, Om, salutations à Hrim, salutations à Hrim, salutations à Klim, salutations à Shri, salutations à Klim, et puisse celui qui est nommé "Vitteshvaraya" se manifester.
translations.he: אום, שבח לשרי, אום, שבח להרים, שבח להרים, שבח לקלים, שבח לשרי, שבח לקלים, ויאיר מי שנקרא "ויטששווערייה".
translations.hi: ॐ, श्री को नमस्कार, ॐ, ह्रीं को नमस्कार, ह्रीं को नमस्कार, क्लीम को नमस्कार, श्री को नमस्कार, क्लीम को नमस्कार, और "विट्टेश्वराय" नामक उस शक्ति का प्रकटीकरण हो।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Shri, Om, salam kepada Hrim, salam kepada Hrim, salam kepada Klim, salam kepada Shri, salam kepada Klim, dan semoga yang bernama "Vitteshvaraya" termanifestasi.
translations.it: Om, saluto a Shri, Om, saluto a Hrim, saluto a Hrim, saluto a Klim, saluto a Shri, saluto a Klim, e possa manifestarsi colui che è chiamato "Vitteshvaraya".
translations.ja: オーム、シリー（Sri）へのお祈り、オーム、フリーム（Hrim）へのお祈り、フリームへのお祈り、クリーム（Klim）へのお祈り、シリーへのお祈り、クリームへのお祈り、そして「ヴィッテシュヴァラヤ」と名付けられた存在の顕現を願います。
translations.ko: 옴, 스리에게 경의를 표합니다. 옴, 흐림에게 경의를 표합니다. 흐림에게 경의를 표합니다. 클림에게 경의를 표합니다. 스리에게 경의를 표합니다. 클림에게 경의를 표합니다. 그리고 "빗테쉬바라야"로 불리는 존재가 현현되기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Om, gebeden aan Shri, Om, gebeden aan Hrim, gebeden aan Hrim, gebeden aan Klim, gebeden aan Shri, gebeden aan Klim, en moge degenen die "Vitteshvaraya" wordt genoemd, zich manifesteren.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla Shri, Om, pozdrowienia dla Hrim, pozdrowienia dla Hrim, pozdrowienia dla Klim, pozdrowienia dla Shri, pozdrowienia dla Klim, i niech objawi się ten, którego imię brzmi "Vitteshvaraya".
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações a Shri, Om, saudações a Hrim, saudações a Hrim, saudações a Klim, saudações a Shri, saudações a Klim, e que aquele que é chamado "Vitteshvaraya" se manifeste.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Шри, Ом, приветствия Хрим, приветствия Хрим, приветствия Клим, приветствия Шри, приветствия Клим, и да проявится тот, кто носит имя "Виттешвара".
translations.sv: Om, vördnad till Shri, Om, vördnad till Hrim, vördnad till Hrim, vördnad till Klim, vördnad till Shri, vördnad till Klim, och må den som är kallad "Vitteshvaraya" manifesteras.
translations.th: ขออัญเชิญพระนาม "โอรัม," ถวายความเคารพแด่ "ศรี," ขออัญเชิญพระนาม "โอรัม," ถวายความเคารพแด่ "หริม," ถวายความเคารพแด่ "หริม," ถวายความเคารพแด่ "คลิม," ถวายความเคารพแด่ "ศรี," และถวายความเคารพแด่ "คลิม," ขอให้ผู้ซึ่งมีพระนามว่า "วิทเทศวรยา" ประจักษ์ปรากฏ.
translations.tr: Om, Shri'ye saygı, Om, Hrim'e saygı, Hrim'e saygı, Klim'e saygı, Shri'ye saygı, Klim'e saygı ve "Vitteshvaraya" olarak adlandırılan varlığın tezahür etmesi.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствую Шри, Ом, приветствую Хрим, приветствую Хрим, приветствую Клим, приветствую Шри, приветствую Клим, и да проявится тот, кто носит имя "Виттэшвара".
translations.vi: Om, tôi cúi chào Shri; Om, tôi cúi chào Hrim; tôi cúi chào Hrim, tôi cúi chào Klim, tôi cúi chào Shri, tôi cúi chào Klim, và xin cho vị được gọi là "Vitteshvaraya" hiển hiện.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向“Shri”致敬；ॐ，向“Hrim”致敬；向“Hrim”致敬；向“Klim”致敬；向“Shri”致敬；向“Klim”致敬；愿名为“Vitteshvaraya”的存在显现。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the Goddess of Speech (Vāgdevī), I bow.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the Goddess of Speech (Vāgdevī), I bow.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, śrī vāgdevyai namo namaḥ, namaste.
mantras.background:
From Vedic India, "Om Vāgdevī Namaḥ" salutes the Goddess of Speech. Om — the primordial sound of all creation — opens this invocation, rooting it in Hindu devotional tradition.
  Grounding: Source links Om to Vedic/Hindu tradition as primordial sound (Brahman), and lists "Om Vageshvari" as a mantra honoring the deity of speech/wisdom.
mantras.benefits:
Invoking Vāgdevī awakens clarity of speech and wisdom. Rooted in Vedic sound tradition, where mantras carry inherent divine power, this practice may cultivate articulate thought and spiritual attunement through sacred vibration.
  Grounding: Source links mantras to divine speech power and transformative vibration; Om as foundation connects Vāgdevī invocation to primordial sound traditions.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, goddess, vāgdevī, devotion, speech, wisdom, salutation

translations.es: Om, saludo a la Diosa de la Palabra (Vāgdevī), me inclino.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لـ "فاجديفي"، إلهة الكلام. أتضرع."
translations.bn: ওম, বাক্যের দেবী (ভা Deviationgadevi)-কে নমস্কার, আমি অভিবাদন জানাই।
translations.de: Om, der Göttin der Rede (Vāgdevī) sei Lob, ich verneige mich.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the Goddess Vācī, I offer my obeisance."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to the Goddess of Speech, I prostrate."
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations à la déesse de la parole (Vāgdevī), je m'incline.
translations.he: הוֹם, ברכה לאלה הדיבור (וַאגְדֵוִי), אני משתחווה.
translations.hi: ॐ, वाणी की देवी को नमस्कार, मैं प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Dewi Pertiwi, sumber segala ucapan, saya bersujud.
translations.it: Om, saluto alla Dea della Parola (Vāgdevī), mi prostro.
translations.ja: オーム、言葉の女神（ヴァーグデーヴィー）へ、私は礼します。
translations.ko: 옴, 말씀의 여신께 경배를 올립니다. 저는 숭배합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik groet de Godin van de Spraak (Vāgdevī), ik buig.
translations.pl: Om, Bogini Mowy, składam Ci pokłon, ja się kłaniam.
translations.pt-br: Om, saúdo a Deusa da Fala (Vāgdevī), eu me prostro.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствую Богиню Речи (Вагдеви), я склоняюсь.
translations.sv: Om, Jag hälsar Vāgdevī, talets gudinna, och jag bugar mig.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจากพระแม่วักเทวี ผู้เป็นเทพีแห่งวจนะ ข้าพเจ้าขอคารวะ
translations.tr: Om, Konuşma Tanrıçası'na (Vāgdevī) saygılarını sunuyorum, ben eğiliyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствие Богине Речи (Вагдевi), я склоняю голову.
translations.vi: "Om, tôi kính chào Nữ thần Vâgdevī, tôi cúi lạy."
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向语女神（Vāgdevī）致敬，我向她鞠躬。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the Sahasrara.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the Sahasrara.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, namas te sahasrāra.
mantras.background: From Hindu chakra tradition, "Om Sahasrara" invokes the crown chakra. Om—the primordial sound of all existence—meets Sahasrara, the seat of pure consciousness and transcendence.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Om Sahasrara activates the crown chakra, bridging individual consciousness with universal awareness. Like Om—the primordial sound—it invites deep stillness, openness, and a felt sense of unity with all existence.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, yoga, chakra, sahasrara, sound, consciousness, crown

translations.es: Om, saludo a la Sahasrara.
translations.ar: ॐ، التحية إلى الساحسرا.
translations.bn: ওম, সহস্রার চক্রের উদ্দেশ্যে প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung für das Sahasrara.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the Sahasrara."
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to the Sahasrara.
translations.fr-fr: Om, salutations au chakra Sahasrara.
translations.he: ॐ, ברכה לסהסרארה.
translations.hi: ॐ, सहस्त्रार चक्र को प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Sahasrara.
translations.it: Om, saluto al Sahasrara.
translations.ja: オーム、サハスラーラへの敬意を表します。 (Ōmu, Sahasrara e no keii o arawashimasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 사하스라라 차크라에 경의를 표합니다. (Om, 경의를 표합니다, 사하스라라 차크라.)
translations.nl: Om, groet aan de Sahasrara.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla Sahasrara.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações ao Sahasrara.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия сахасраре.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till Sahasrara.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชแก่จักระที่เจ็ด
translations.tr: Om, Sahasrara çakrasına saygı.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствую Сахасрару.
translations.vi: Om, tôi kính chào Sahasrara.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向刹那那（Sahasrara）致敬。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the divine Mahalakshmi, through the power of Hreem, Shreem, and Kleem. I bow to her.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the divine Mahalakshmi, through the power of Hreem, Shreem, and Kleem. I bow to her.
mantras.original: Om Hreem Shreem Kleem Mahalakshmiyei Namaha
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, नमः दैवाय महालक्ष्म्यै, ह्रीं, श्रीं, क्लीं इत्युपशब्दानां शक्त्या। अहं तं नमाम।
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, this mantra combines Bija sounds Hreem, Shreem & Kleem to invoke Mahalakshmi — the goddess of abundance. Each seed syllable carries direct vibrational power beyond words.
mantras.benefits: Hreem, Shreem & Kleem are Bija (seed) mantras activating divine feminine energy. Shreem draws abundance, Kleem magnetizes desire, Hreem awakens cosmic power — together invoking Mahalakshmi's grace for prosperity and transformation.
mantras.tags: hindu, mahalakshmi, bija, shakti, devotional, invocation, chakra, energy, healing, focus

translations.es: Om, saludo a la divina Mahalakshmi, a través del poder de los sonidos 'Hreem', 'Shreem' y 'Kleem'. Me inclino ante ella.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية للربة ماهالاكشمي المقدسة، من خلال قوة التراويح "هريم" و "شريم" و "كليم". أُسَلِّمُ لها."
translations.bn: ॐ, हे दिव्य महालक्ष्मी की वंदना, 'হ্রীম', 'শ্রীম' এবং 'ক্লীম' মন্ত্রের শক্তি के माध्यम से। मैं आपका प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.de: Om, Salutationen an die göttliche Mahalakshmi, durch die Kraft der Silben Hreem, Shreem und Kleem. Ich verneige mich vor ihr.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the divine Mahalakshmi, invoking her through the potency of the sacred syllables Hreem, Shreem, and Kleem. I offer my reverence to her."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to the divine Goddess Mahalakshmi, invoking her power through the bija mantras Hreem, Shreem, and Kleem. I offer my reverence to her."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations à la déesse Mahalakshmi, par la puissance des syllabes Hreem, Shreem et Kleem. Je m'incline devant elle.
translations.he: הוֹם, ברכה למחלכמי האלוהית, באמצעות הכוח של הריים, שריים וקלים. אני משתחווה אליה.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं दिव्य महालक्ष्मी को प्रणाम करता हूँ, 'ह्रीं', 'श्रीयं' और 'क्लीं' की शक्ति के माध्यम से। मैं उनके चरणों में नमन करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Dewi Mahalakshmi yang ilahi, melalui kekuatan mantra Hreem, Shreem, dan Kleem. Saya bersujud di hadapannya.
translations.it: Om, saluto alla divina Mahalakshmi, attraverso la potenza di Hreem, Shreem e Kleem. Mi prostro davanti a lei.
translations.ja: オーム、至高の女神マハラクシュミに、 hreem, shreem, kleem の力によって礼を捧げます。私は彼女に敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴(Om)을 통해, 강력한 '흐림(Hreem)', '쉬림(Shreem)', 그리고 '클림(Kleem)'의 힘으로, 신성한 마할락슈미 여신께 경의를 표합니다. 저는 그녀께 헌신합니다.
translations.nl: Om, Ik groet de goddelijke Mahalakshmi, door de kracht van de mantra's Hreem, Shreem en Kleem. Ik buig voor haar.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla boskiej Mahalakshmi, dzięki mocy mantr Hreem, Shreem i Kleem. Skłaniam się przed Nią.
translations.pt-br: Om, saúdo a divina Mahalaksmi, através do poder de Hreem, Shreem e Kleem. Eu me prostro a ela.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия божественной Махалакшми, благодаря силе мантр Хрим, Шрим и Клим. Я склоняюсь перед ней.
translations.sv: Om, vördnad till den gudomliga Mahalakshmi, genom kraften av Hreem, Shreem och Kleem. Jag böjer mig inför henne.
translations.th: ข้าขอรำลึกถึงพระแม่มหาลักษณ์ ผู้เป็นเทพีแห่งความมั่งคั่งและความอุดมสมบูรณ์ ด้วยพลังแห่งพระพยัญชนะ "หรีม", "ศรีม" และ "คลิม" ข้าขอสาธุการแด่พระองค์
translations.tr: Om, kutsal Mahalakshmi'ye saygılarını sunuyorum, Hreem, Shreem ve Kleem'in gücüyle. Ben O'na secde ediyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия божественной Махалакшми, посредством силы мантр Хрим, Шрим и Клим. Я склоняю голову перед ней.
translations.vi: Ôm, tôi kính chào vị thần Mahalakshmi thiêng liêng, thông qua sức mạnh của âm Hreem, Shreem và Kleem. Tôi cúi đầu lạy Ngài.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向伟大的吉祥女神玛哈拉克希米，通过 hreem、shreem 和 kleem 的力量，我向她致敬。

mantras.name: Om, salutations to the fierce and wrathful mother, Chamunda Matangi, svaha.
mantras.english: Om, salutations to the fierce and wrathful mother, Chamunda Matangi, svaha.
mantras.original: oṃ huru huru caṇḍāli mātangi svāhā
