translations.ja: オーム。地、大気、天。輝けるサヴィトル（太陽）の、その本質を、我々は瞑想します。その本質が、我々の知性を啓発しますように。
translations.ko: 옴. 땅, 대기, 그리고 천상. 빛나는 수리야(태양)의 본질을 우리는 묵상합니다. 그 본질이 우리의 지성을 깨우기를 바랍니다.
translations.nl: Om. O Aarde, O atmosfeer, O hemel. Die essentie van de stralende Savitur (de Zon), die overpeinzen wij. Moge die essentie onze intelligentie inspireren.
translations.pl: Om. Ziemio, atmosfera, niebo. Tę esencję, emanującą od świetlistego Savitru (Słońca), rozważamy. Niech ta esencja zainspiruje nasz intelekt.
translations.pt-br: Om. Terra, atmosfera, céus. Aquela (essência) do resplandecente Savitur (Sol), contemplamos. Que aquela (essência) inspire nosso intelecto.
translations.ru: Ом. Земля, атмосфера, небеса. Мы размышляем о той сущности, которая является сияющим Савитро́м (Солнцем). Пусть эта сущность вдохновит наш разум.
translations.sv: Om. Jord, atmosfär, himmel. Vi kontemplerar den (essensen) av den strålande Savitur (Solen). Må denna (essens) inspirera vårt intellekt.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมทรงนำทาง, ข้าพเจ้าใคร่ครวญถึงสรรพสิ่ง ทั้งพื้นดิน, วงโคจร, และสรวงสวรรค์. ขอให้แก่นแท้แห่งรัศมีของพระอาทิตย์ (ซาวิตร) เป็นแรงบันดาลใจแก่ปัญญาของเรา.
translations.tr: Om. Dünya, atmosfer ve gök. Işıldayan Savitur'un (Güneş) özünü düşünüyoruz. Bu öz, zihnimizi aydınlatsın.
translations.uk: Ом. Земля, атмосфера, небо. Ми розмірковуємо про ту (істинну) сутність сяючого Савітра (Сонця). Нехай ця (істинна) сутність надихне наш розум.
translations.vi: Om. Chúng tôi chiêm nghiệm bản chất rực rỡ của Savitur (Mặt Trời), vốn là tinh hoa của đất, bầu khí quyển và thiên không. Xin cho bản chất đó soi sáng trí tuệ của chúng tôi.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。 普天之下，大地、大气、天界。 我们默想那光辉的“萨维特尔”（太阳）的精髓。 愿那精髓启迪我们的智慧。

mantras.name: Om. Om. Om.
mantras.english: Om. Om. Om.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ ॐ ॐ
mantras.background:
Om (ॐ) — born in the Vedic tradition of India, it is Hinduism's "Pranava": the primordial vibration, the first utterance of Brahman, source of all mantras and all creation.
  Grounding: Sources state Om is the "Pranava Mantra," origin in Vedic India, equated with Brahman, and called the source of all mantras (both Gujarati & abstract texts).
mantras.benefits: Om is called the Pranava — the primordial vibration of all existence. Chanting it unites waking, dreaming, and deep sleep into transcendent stillness. Research confirms measurable brainwave shifts, vagal stimulation, and deep calm.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, upanishad, vedanta, brahman, pranava, yoga, healing, consciousness, vibration

translations.es: Om. Om. Om.
translations.ar: "أوم. أوم. أوم."
translations.bn: ওম। ওম। ওম।
translations.de: Om. Om. Om.
translations.en-us: Om. Om. Om.
translations.en-gb: Om. Om. Om.
translations.fr-fr: Om. Om. Om.

translations.sv: Om. Om. Om.

translations.tr: Om. Om. Om.
translations.uk: Ом. Ом. Ом.
translations.vi: ॐ. ॐ. ॐ.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。ॐ。ॐ。

mantras.name: Om. Peace be, peace be, peace be.
mantras.english: Om. Peace be, peace be, peace be.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, "Om. Peace be, peace be, peace be." channels the primordial sound Om—the vibrational source of all creation—paired with a threefold invocation of Shanti (peace), a classic Hindu closing prayer form.
mantras.benefits: Om stills the mind instantly. Its three syllables map waking, dreaming, and deep sleep states (Mandukya Upanishad). Research confirms theta brainwaves and vagal activation. The silence after each chant is where transformation lives.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, peace, brahman, pranava, sound, healing, relaxation, consciousness, unity, primordial

translations.es: Om. Paz sea, paz sea, paz sea.
translations.ar: "أوم. سلام، سلام، سلام."
translations.bn: ॐ। শান্তি থাকুক, শান্তি থাকুক, শান্তি থাকুক।
translations.de: Om. Sei der Frieden, sei der Frieden, sei der Frieden.
translations.en-us: Om. May there be peace, may there be peace, may there be peace.
translations.en-gb: Om. May there be peace, may there be peace, may there be peace.
translations.fr-fr: Om. Paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.id: Om. Semoga damai, semoga damai, semoga damai.
translations.it: Om. Pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: オーム。平和が訪れん。平和が訪れん。平和が訪れん。
translations.ko: 오옴. 평화가 있기를, 평화가 있기를, 평화가 있기를.
translations.nl: Om. Vrede zij, vrede zij, vrede zij.
translations.pl: Om. Niech będzie pokój, niech będzie pokój, niech będzie pokój.
translations.pt-br: Om. Paz seja, paz seja, paz seja.
translations.ru: Ом. Мир вам, мир вам, мир вам.
translations.sv: Om. Fred vare, fred vare, fred vare.
translations.th: ขอให้มีสันติสุข, ขอให้มีสันติสุข, ขอให้มีสันติสุข.
translations.tr: Om. Barış olsun, barış olsun, barış olsun.
translations.uk: Ом. Мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Om. Xin có bình an, xin có bình an, xin có bình an.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。愿一切皆安宁。

mantras.name: Om. Peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: Om. Peace, peace, peace.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ. śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ.
mantras.background:
From ancient Upanishads, this Sanskrit mantra — "Om, peace, peace, peace" — closes sacred Vedic prayers, invoking peace within, in nature, and in divine forces.
  Grounding: Sources cite Om śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ as drawn from Upanishads, meaning peace on 3 levels: internal, environmental, and divine/fate-driven.
mantras.benefits:
Chanting "Om śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ" calms the mind, removes obstacles, and invokes peace on three levels: inner, environmental, and divine — drawing the practitioner into sacred stillness.
  Grounding: Sources describe śāntiḥ threefold as internal, natural, and cosmic peace, with Om unblocking throat chakra and inducing meditative calm per Upanishadic tradition.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, yoga, pranava, primordial, peace, healing, chakra, sound, brahman, universal, creation

translations.es: Om. Paz, paz, paz.
translations.ar: "أوم. سلام، سلام، سلام."
translations.de: Om. Friede, Friede, Friede.
translations.en-us: Om. Peace, peace, peace.
translations.en-gb: Om. Peace, peace, peace.
translations.fr-fr: Om. Paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: אָהוּם. שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.id: Om. Damai, damai, damai.
translations.it: Om. Pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: オーム。平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 옴. 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Om. Vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Om. Pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: Om. Paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Ом. Мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Om. Fred, fred, fred.
translations.th: ขอให้มีสันติสุข, ขอให้มีสันติสุข, ขอให้มีสันติสุข.
translations.tr: Om. Huzur, huzur, huzur.
translations.uk: Ом. Мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: ॐ. Hòa bình, hòa bình, hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。 愿诸方皆得安宁，愿诸方皆得安宁，愿诸方皆得安宁。

mantras.name: On the heavens, a gentle breath; a sweet awakening.
mantras.english: On the heavens, a gentle breath; a sweet awakening.
mantras.original: おん そらそばていえい そわか
mantras.transliteration: Ten ni, yasashī ibuki; amai sametoki.
mantras.background: The source only provides the translated phrase: "On the heavens, a gentle breath; a sweet awakening." No origin, tradition, or additional meaning is documented here.
mantras.benefits: The provided source material contains only the mantra phrase itself and offers no traditional, historical, or research-based information about associated spiritual or psychological benefits.
mantras.tags: hindu, breathwork, awakening, pranayama, shiva, devotional, mantra, yoga, stillness, serenity, consciousness, vibration

translations.es: En lo alto del cielo, una brisa suave; un despertar dulce.
translations.ar: في السماء، نسمة رقيقة؛ استيقاظ حلو.
translations.bn: আকাশে, এক মৃদু শ্বাস; এক মিষ্টি জাগরণ।
translations.de: Am Himmel, ein sanfter Hauch; ein süßes Erwachen.
translations.en-us: Upon the heavens, a gentle breath; a sweet awakening.
translations.en-gb: Upon the heavens, a gentle breeze; a sweet and peaceful awakening.
translations.fr-fr: Dans le ciel, une douce brise; un réveil délicat.
translations.he: בשמיים, נשימה רכה; התעוררות מתוקה. (Beshamaim, neshima rakha; hit'orirut metukah.)
translations.hi: स्वर्ग में, एक मधुर अनुभूति; एक सुखद जागरण।
translations.id: Di langit, hembusan lembut; sebuah kebangkitan yang indah.
translations.it: Sul cielo, un respiro delicato; un risveglio dolce.
translations.ja: 天上に、穏やかな息吹が；甘やかな目覚め。
translations.ko: 하늘에서 내려오는 부드러운 숨결, 달콤한 깨어남.
translations.nl: Op de hemel, een zachte ademhaling; een zoete ontwaking.
translations.pl: Na niebiosach, delikatny oddech; słodkie przebudzenie.
translations.pt-br: No céu, uma brisa suave; um despertar doce.
translations.ru: На небесах - нежный вздох; сладкое пробуждение.
translations.sv: På himlen, en mild andedräkt; en ljuvlig uppvaknande.
translations.th: ท้องฟ้าเบื้องบน, ลมหายใจแผ่วเบา; การตื่นขึ้นอย่างอ่อนโยน
translations.tr: Gökyüzünde, hafif bir nefes; tatlı bir uyanış.
translations.uk: На небесах – ніжний подих; солодке пробудження.
translations.vi: Trên bầu trời, một hơi thở nhẹ nhàng; một sự thức giấc ngọt ngào.
translations.zh-cn: 天空之上，轻柔的气息；甜蜜的觉醒。

mantras.name: One day at a time.
mantras.english: One day at a time.
mantras.transliteration: Um dia de cada vez.
mantras.background: "One day at a time" echoes the ancient Vedic tradition of mantras as mind-anchors. Its literal meaning: focus only on today. Repeat it rhythmically to stay present and calm.
mantras.benefits: Repeating "One day at a time" as a mantra anchors the mind to the present, countering anxiety about the future. Science confirms mantra practice releases endorphins, lowers blood pressure, and builds mental calm.
mantras.tags: affirmation, focus, peace, present, breathing, rhythm, mental-clarity, calming, healing

translations.es: Un día a la vez.
translations.ar: يومًا بعد يوم.
translations.bn: প্রতিদিন একটু একটু করে।
translations.de: Ein Tag nach dem anderen.
translations.en-us: One day at a time.
translations.en-gb: One day at a time.
translations.fr-fr: Un jour à la fois.
translations.he: יום אחרי יום.
translations.hi: एक दिन एक दिन।
translations.id: Satu hari, selangkah demi selangkah.
translations.it: Un giorno alla volta.
translations.ja: 一日一日を大切に。
translations.ko: 하루에 한 걸음씩.
translations.nl: Eén dag tegelijk.
translations.pl: Jeden dzień po drugim.
translations.pt-br: Um dia de cada vez.
translations.ru: По одному дню.
translations.sv: En dag i taget.
translations.th: ค่อย ๆ เป็น ค่อย ๆ ไป.
translations.tr: Bir gün bir gün.
translations.uk: По одному дню.
translations.vi: Một ngày một bước.
translations.zh-cn: 一天一天地走下去。

mantras.name: Original Power, Original Power, Original Power, Salutations to You.
mantras.english: Original Power, Original Power, Original Power, Salutations to You.
mantras.original: Adi Shakti, Adi Shakti, Adi Shakti, Namo Namo
mantras.transliteration:
Original Power, Original Power, Original Power, Salutations to You.  
Original Power:  मूल शक्ति, मूल शक्ति, मूल शक्ति
Salutations to You:  आपको प्रणाम।
Romanisation: Mūl śakti, mūl śakti, mūl śakti; Āpako praṇām.
mantras.background: From ancient Sanskrit — "Adi Shakti, Adi Shakti, Adi Shakti, Namo Namo" — meaning "Original Power, Salutations." A vibration passed through centuries of intuitive tradition.
mantras.benefits: "Adi Shakti" invokes primordial creative power. Chanting it may cultivate inner strength and calm the nervous system through focused vibration and intention, drawing the mind toward stillness.
mantras.tags: hindu, affirmation, devotional, repetition, focus, peace, empower, intention

translations.es: Poder Original, Poder Original, Poder Original, Saludos a Ti.
translations.ar: تحية لك، أيها الأصل، أيها الأصل، أيها الأصل.
translations.bn: আদি শক্তি, আদি শক্তি, আদি शक्ति, आपको प्रणाम।
translations.de: "Ursprüngliche Kraft, ursprüngliche Kraft, ursprüngliche Kraft, wir grüßen Dich."
translations.en-us: "Original Power, Original Power, Original Power, Salutations to You."
translations.en-gb: Original Power, Original Power, Original Power, Salutations to You.
translations.fr-fr: "Puissance originelle, Puissance originelle, Puissance originelle, Salutations à Vous."
translations.he: מקור הכוח, מקור הכוח, מקור הכוח, ברכות לך.
translations.hi: "मूल शक्ति, मूल शक्ति, मूल शक्ति, आपको प्रणाम।"
translations.id: Kekuatan Asli, Kekuatan Asli, Kekuatan Asli, Salam untuk Anda.
translations.it: Potere primordiale, potere primordiale, potere primordiale, a te siano i nostri omaggi.
translations.ja: 元初の力、元初の力、元初の力、あなたに敬意を表します。 (Genzu no chikara, genzu no chikara, genzu no chikara, anata ni keii o taisamasu.)
translations.ko: 원시의 힘, 원시의 힘, 원시의 힘, 당신에게 경의를 표합니다. (Wonshi-ui him, wonshi-ui him, wonshi-ui him, dangsine gyeong-ui-reul pyohapnida.)
translations.nl: Oorspronkelijke kracht, oorspronkelijke kracht, oorspronkelijke kracht, groet aan U.
translations.pl: "Początkowa Moc, Początkowa Moc, Początkowa Moc, pozdrowienia dla Ciebie."
translations.pt-br: Saudações a Você, Poder Original, Poder Original, Poder Original.
translations.ru: Изначальная Сила, Изначальная Сила, Изначальная Сила, приветствия Тебе.
translations.sv: Ursprunglig kraft, ursprunglig kraft, ursprunglig kraft, hälsningar till dig.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่พระผู้มีอำนาจดั้งเดิม, พระผู้มีอำนาจดั้งเดิม, พระผู้มีอำนาจดั้งเดิม
translations.tr: Orijinal Güç, Orijinal Güç, Orijinal Güç, Size Saygı.
translations.uk: "Первісна Сило, Первісна Сило, Первісна Сило, вітаю Тебе."
translations.vi: Kính chào Đức Vô Tận, Kính chào Đức Vô Tận, Kính chào Đức Vô Tận.
translations.zh-cn: 原始力量，原始力量，原始力量，向您致敬。

mantras.name: Oṁ, I surrender to the Divine.
mantras.english: Oṁ, I surrender to the Divine.
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ, ahaṁ śaraṇaṁ gacchāmi divine.
mantras.background: Rooted in Sanskrit's oldest Vedic hymns, "Oṁ" is Hinduism's sacred seed-syllable — the primal sound. "I surrender to the Divine" echoes the devotional heart of mantra practice.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Oṁ, I surrender to the Divine" binds the mind to sacred vibration (Shabda), shielding it from negative thoughts. Surrender cultivates humility and inner peace, guiding the practitioner toward spiritual transformation.
mantras.tags: om, hindu, devotional, transformation, prayer, divine, refuge, energy

translations.es: Om, me entrego a lo Divino.
translations.ar: أوم، أتخلى وأسليم نفسي إلى الذات الإلهية.
translations.bn: ওং, আমি ঐশ্বর্যের কাছে নিজেকে সমর্পণ করছি।
translations.de: Om, ich ergebe mich dem Göttlichen.
translations.en-us: "Om, I surrender myself to the Divine."
translations.en-gb: "Om, I surrender myself to the Divine."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, je me soumets au Divin.
translations.he: אום, אני נוכח/ת לפני האלוהי.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं स्वयं को परमात्मा को समर्पित करता/करती हूँ।
translations.id: ॐ, Saya berserah diri kepada Yang Maha Kuasa.
translations.it: Ōṁ, mi arrendo al Divino.
translations.ja: オーム、私は神に身を委ねます。 (Ōmu, watashi wa kami ni mi o komisemasu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 저는 신성한 존재께 제 자신을 헌신합니다.
translations.nl: Om, ik geef mij over aan het Goddelijke.
translations.pl: Oṁ, oddaję się w ręce Boskości.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me entrego ao Divino.
translations.ru: Ом, я предаюсь Божеству.
translations.sv: Om, jag överlämnar mig till det gudomliga.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาและสละตัวให้แก่พระผู้เป็นเจ้า.
translations.tr: "Om, İlahi'ye teslim oluyorum."
translations.uk: Ом, я віддаюся Божеству.
translations.vi: ॐ, Tôi xin dâng mình cho Đấng thiêng liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向神性臣服。

mantras.name: Oṁ, may auspiciousness prevail for all beings; may one who protects (them) be present.
mantras.english: Oṁ, may auspiciousness prevail for all beings; may one who protects (them) be present.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, may auspiciousness prevail for all beings; may one who protects (them) be present.
mantras.background: From ancient Sanskrit, this Hindu chant calls for auspiciousness and protection for all beings. Chanted in cycles, it uplifts energetic vibration across millennia of living tradition.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this mantra cultivates universal compassion and inner security. Its call for protection and prosperity expands awareness beyond the self, fostering peace, social harmony, and trust in divine order — a millennia-proven uplift.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, protection, prosperity, affirmation, governance, peace

translations.es: ॐ, que la prosperidad y la bendición prevalezcan para todos los seres; que esté presente aquel que los protege.
translations.ar: ॐ، ليكن الخير والبركة حاضرة لجميع الكائنات؛ وليكن الحامي حاضرًا.
translations.bn: ॐ, समस्त प्राणियों के लिए शुभ हो; जो उनका रक्षक है, वह उपस्थित हो।
translations.de: Om, möge für alle Wesen Wohlstand und Segen gelten; möge ein Beschützer (ihnen) gegenwärtig sein.
translations.en-us: "Om, may auspiciousness prevail for all beings; may the protector be present."
translations.en-gb: Om, may all beings experience well-being; may a protector be present.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, puisse la prospérité s'étendre à tous les êtres ; puisse celui qui les protège être présent.
translations.he: אוֹם, יאיר אושר לכל היצורים; יימצא מי שמגן עליהם.
translations.hi: ॐ, सभी प्राणियों के लिए शुभता का विस्तार हो; जो उनकी रक्षा करता है, उसका वास हो।
translations.id: ॐ, semoga kebaikan dan kemakmuran meliputi semua makhluk; semoga hadir entitas yang melindungi (mereka).
translations.it: Oṁ, possa la prosperità manifestarsi per tutti gli esseri; possa essere presente colui che li protegge.
translations.ja: オーム、全ての存在にとって、吉が訪れますように。そして、それを守護する者が現れますように。
translations.ko: 옴, 모든 존재에게 복이 있기를; 그들을 보호하는 존재가 있기를.
translations.nl: Ōm, moge voorspoed heersen voor alle wezens; moge er iemand (zijn/waren) die hen beschermt.
translations.pl: Oṁ, niech dobrobyt i pomyślność ogarniają wszystkie istoty; niech będzie obecny ten, który je chroni.
translations.pt-br: ॐ, que a prosperidade reine para todos os seres; que aquele que os protege esteja presente.
translations.ru: Ом, да пребудет благополучие для всех существ; да будет присутствовать тот, кто защищает (их).
translations.sv: ॐ, må välsignelse råda för alla varelser; må den som skyddar (dem) vara närvarande.
translations.th: ขอความสวัสดีและความเจริญจงมีแก่สรรพสัตว์ทั้งปวง; ขอให้ผู้ผู้ปกป้องคุ้มครอง (พวกเขาทั้งหมด) ทรงปรากฏ.
translations.tr: Ōm, tüm canlılar için iyilik ve bereket hüküm sürsün; onları koruyan bir varlığın hazır olsun.
translations.uk: Ом, нехай процвітає благо для всіх істот; нехай буде присутній той, хто їх захищає.
translations.vi: Ôm, xin sự cát tường lan tỏa đến mọi sinh vật; xin có sự bảo vệ cho tất cả.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，愿吉祥降临于一切众生；愿守护者（们）在场。

mantras.name: Oṁ, we contemplate the unique and divine Mother.
mantras.english: Oṁ, we contemplate the unique and divine Mother.
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ, nāṉkāl uṉaṭṭu uṟuvāṅku aṉaiva mātariṉ.
mantras.background: Rooted in devotion, this mantra opens with Oṁ—the primordial sound—then turns inward to contemplate the singular, divine Mother. A timeless call to sacred feminine presence.
mantras.benefits: Contemplating the divine Mother through Oṁ invites practitioners to connect with nurturing, creative energy. The meditative focus on a universal feminine principle may cultivate compassion, inner stillness, and a sense of belonging to something greater than oneself.
mantras.tags: hindu, shaktism, devotion, motherhood, divine feminine, mantra, tantric, visualization, empowerment, bliss, sacred sound, womb

translations.es: Om, contemplamos a la Madre única y divina.
translations.ar: نحن نتأمل الأم الفريدة والإلهية.
translations.bn: ওঁ, আমরা সেই অদ্বিতীয় এবং দিব্য মাতৃকে ধ্যান করি।
translations.de: Om, wir betrachten die einzigartige und göttliche Mutter.
translations.en-us: We meditate on the unique and divine Mother.
translations.en-gb: With reverence, we reflect upon the singular and divine Mother.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, nous contemplons la Mère unique et divine.
translations.he: אום, אנו מתבוננים באם האלוהית והייחודית.
translations.hi: ॐ, हम अद्वितीय और दिव्य माता को चिंतन करते हैं।
translations.id: Om, kami merenungkan Ibu yang unik dan ilahi.
translations.it: Oṁ, contempliamo la Madre unica e divina.
translations.ja: オーム、我々は唯一無二の、神聖な母を瞑想します。 (Ōmu, wareware wa yuiichinaino, shinsei na haha o meisō shimasu.)
translations.ko: 옴(Om), 우리는 유일하고 신성한 어머니를 묵상합니다. (Om, urineu yuin하고 sinsung한 eomeoni-reul muksanghamnida.)
translations.nl: We overpeinzen de unieke en goddelijke Moeder, in de Om.
translations.pl: Oṁ, rozważamy Jedyną i Boską Matkę.
translations.pt-br: Óṁ, contemplamos a Mãe única e divina.
translations.ru: Ом, мы созерцаем Единственную и Божественную Матерь.
translations.sv: Vi mediterar över den unika och gudomliga Moder.
translations.th: เราใคร่ครวญถึงพระแม่ที่เปี่ยมด้วยพระคุณและเป็นเอกลักษณ์
translations.tr: Om, eşsiz ve ilahi Ana'yı düşünmekteyiz.
translations.uk: Ом, ми розмірковуємо про унікальну та божественну Матір.
translations.vi: 옴, chúng tôi chiêm nghiệm về Mẹ, Đấng tối cao và thiêng liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 我们默念，祈祷至高无上的、神圣的母亲。

mantras.name: Oṁ. From the sweet wind, the sweet syllables flow; the sweet herbs are filled with fragrance.
mantras.english: Oṁ. From the sweet wind, the sweet syllables flow; the sweet herbs are filled with fragrance.
mantras.original: ॐ मधुवाता ऋतायते मधुक्षरन्ति सिन्घव : । माध्वीर्न : सन्त्वोषधी : ।
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ. mṛdu-vāyāḥ, mṛdu-akṣarāḥ pratipadyante; mṛdu-auṣadhīni sparśanāguṇaiḥ pūrṇāni bhavanti.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om is the primordial sound of all creation — A, U, M uniting waking, dream, and sleep states into one transcendent vibration.
mantras.benefits: Om aligns body, mind & cosmos—its A-U-M vibrations shift brainwaves toward deep meditation (theta), stimulate the vagus nerve, and open a doorway to turiya: the transcendent silence beneath all experience.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, brahman, pranava, sound, chanting, healing, consciousness, philosophy, peace

translations.es: Om. Del viento suave, fluyen las sílabas dulces; las hierbas aromáticas están llenas de fragancia.
translations.ar: من النسيم العليل، تتدفق المقاطع اللطيفة؛ والأعشاب العطرية تفيض بالعبير.
translations.bn: ওঁ। मधुर বাতাস থেকে, মধুর শব্দধারা প্রবাহিত হয়; সুগন্ধি গুল্মে সুবাস ভরাট।
translations.de: Om. Aus dem sanften Wind strömen süße Silben; die süßen Kräuter sind erfüllt von Duft.
translations.en-us: From the gentle breeze, the melodious sounds emanate; the fragrant herbs are imbued with sweetness.
translations.en-gb: From the gentle breeze, the melodious sounds emanate; the fragrant herbs are imbued with fragrance.
translations.fr-fr: Om. Du souffle suave, les syllabes mélodieuses s'élèvent ; les herbes aromatiques sont emplies de fragrance.
translations.he: אום. מהרוח הענוגה, זורחים ההברות המתוקות; העשבים הטובים ניחוחם ממלא.
translations.hi: ॐ। मधुर वायु से, मधुर ध्वनियाँ प्रवाहित होती हैं; मधुर जड़ी-बूटियाँ सुगंध से परिपूर्ण हैं।
translations.id: ॐ. Dari angin yang lembut, meluncurlah suku kata-kata yang indah; tumbuhan-tumbuhan harum dipenuhi dengan aroma.
translations.it: Ōṁ. Dal vento soave, fluiscono le dolci sillabe; le aromatiche erbe sono permeate di fragranza.
translations.ja: オーム。甘い風から、甘い音色が流れ、甘い香草は芳香に満ちている。
translations.ko: 옴. 부드러운 바람에서, 아름다운 음절들이 흘러나오고, 달콤한 풀들은 향기로 가득 차 있습니다.
translations.nl: Om. Uit de zachte wind vloeien de zoete klanken; de zoete kruiden zijn doordrenkt van geur.
translations.pl: ॐ. Z delikatnego wiatru płyną słodkie dźwięki; słodkie zioła nasycone są wonią.
translations.pt-br: Do vento suave, emanam os sons doces; as ervas aromáticas estão impregnadas de fragrância.
translations.ru: Ом. Из ласкового ветра исходят нежные звуки; сладкие травы наполнены ароматом.
translations.sv: Om. Från den milda vinden flödar de vackra ljuden; de ljuva örterna fylls av doft.
translations.th: โอ้ ม. จากสายลมอันแสนหวาน, พยางค์อันไพเราะหลั่งไหล; สมุนไพรหอมอบอวลไปด้วยกลิ่นหอม
translations.tr: Ōṁ. Tatlı rüzgardan, tatlı sesler doğar; tatlı otlar, mislerle doludur.
translations.uk: Оṁ. З лагідного вітру ллються ніжні звуки; солодкі трави наповнені ароматом.
translations.vi: ॐ. Từ làn gió dịu dàng, những âm thanh thánh thiện lan tỏa; những loại thảo dược thơm ngát tràn ngập hương thơm.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。 甜美的气息带来甘甜的音节；芬芳的草木充满香气。

mantras.name: Oṁ. Let us contemplate the Earth (Bhur), the atmosphere (Bhuvah), and the heavens (Svah).
mantras.english: Oṁ. Let us contemplate the Earth (Bhur), the atmosphere (Bhuvah), and the heavens (Svah).
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ. bhuḥ, bhuvāḥ, svaḥ.
mantras.background: From the ancient Rig Veda, the Gayatri Mantra salutes the divine Sun (Savitri): "Earth, Atmosphere, Heavens" — a luminous call awakening wisdom across millennia of yoga tradition.
mantras.benefits: Ignites inner light and wisdom; guards the mind from reactive patterns. Called "mother of all Vedic mantras," it awakens clarity so that—as tradition holds—knowing it, all else becomes known.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, savitri, devotional, wisdom, illumination, knowledge, awakening, light, protection

translations.es: Ōṁ. Contemplemos la Tierra (Bhur), la atmósfera (Bhuvah) y el cielo (Svah).
translations.ar: ஓம். دعونا نتأمل الأرض (بُه)، والغلاف الجوي (بُهف)، والسماء (سفاه).
translations.bn: ওঁ। আসুন আমরা পৃথিবী (ভূ), বায়ুমণ্ডল (ভূবহ) এবং আকাশ (স্বহ) নিয়ে চিন্তা করি।
translations.de: Oṁ. Lasst uns über die Erde (Bhur), die Atmosphäre (Bhuvah) und den Himmel (Svah) nachdenken.
translations.en-us: "Om. Let us contemplate the Earth (Bhur), the atmosphere (Bhuvah), and the heavens (Svah)."
translations.en-gb: Oṁ. Let us contemplate the Earth, the atmosphere, and the heavens.
translations.fr-fr: Om. Contemplons la Terre (Bhur), l'atmosphère (Bhuvah) et le ciel (Svah).
translations.he: בואו נרהיב מחשבה על האדמה (בְּהוּ), האוויר (בּוּוָה), והשמיים (סְוָה).
translations.hi: ॐ। आइए हम पृथ्वी (भूमि), वायुमंडल (अंतरिक्ष), और आकाश (स्वर्ग) का चिंतन करें।
translations.id: Om. Mari kita merenungkan Bumi (Bhur), atmosfer (Bhuvah), dan langit (Svah).
translations.it: Oṁ. Contempliamo la Terra (Bhur), l'atmosfera (Bhuvah) e il cielo (Svah).
translations.ja: オーム。我々は、大地（ブル）、大気（ブヴァ）、そして天（スヴァ）について瞑想しましょう。
translations.ko: 옴. 우리는 대지(Bhur), 대기(Bhuvah), 그리고 천상(Svah)을 묵상합시다.
translations.nl: Om. Laten wij mediteren over de aarde (Bhur), de atmosfeer (Bhuvah) en de hemel (Svah).
translations.pl: Om. Rozważmy Ziemię (Bhuru), atmosferę (Bhuvah) i niebo (Svah).
translations.pt-br: Om. Contemplemos a Terra (Bhur), a atmosfera (Bhuvah) e os céus (Svah).
translations.ru: Оṁ. Давайте сосредоточимся на созерцании Земли (Бху), атмосферы (Бува) и небес (Сва).
translations.sv: Oṁ. Låt oss meditera över jorden (Bhur), atmosfären (Bhuvah) och himlen (Svah).
translations.th: ขอเชิญทุกท่านร่วมใคร่ครวญถึงโลก (ภุว) ชั้นบรรยากาศ (ภวัส) และชั้นฟ้า (สวัส)
translations.tr: Oṁ. Toprağı (Bhur), atmosferi (Bhuvah) ve gökyüzünü (Svah) düşünelim.
translations.uk: Ом. Замилуймося Землею (Бхур), атмосферою (Бувах) та небесами (Сва).
translations.vi: ॐ. Hãy cùng chiêm nghiệm về Trái Đất (Bhur), bầu khí quyển (Bhuvah) và bầu trời (Svah).
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。让我们默想大地（Bhur），大气（Bhuvah），和天空（Svah）。

mantras.name: Oṁ. Salutations to Sarasvatī.
mantras.english: Oṁ. Salutations to Sarasvatī.
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ. namo dēvī sarasvatī.
mantras.background: A Hindu invocation to Sarasvatī—goddess of knowledge and arts—"Oṁ, salutations to Sarasvatī" unlocks wisdom, memory, and creativity through devoted daily chanting.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Oṁ Aim Saraswatyai Namaḥ" awakens creativity, sharpens memory, and dissolves speech blocks. Students and artists turn to Sarasvatī for wisdom's spark — a living tradition linking devotion to the flowering of mind.
mantras.tags: hindu, saraswati, knowledge, wisdom, learning, devotional, concentration, memory, creativity, arts, speech

translations.es: Om. Saludos a Sarasvatī.
translations.ar: "أوم. تحية لِساراسواتي."
translations.bn: ওঁ। सरस्वতী দেবীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।
translations.de: Om. Ich vernehme Sarasvatī.
translations.en-us: Oṁ. Salutations to Sarasvatī.
translations.en-gb: Om. Salutations to Sarasvatī.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm. Salutations à Sarasvatī.
translations.he: אום. ברכות לסַרַסְוַטִי.
translations.hi: ॐ। सरस्वती को नमस्कार।
translations.id: Om. Salam untuk Dewi Saraswati.
translations.it: Om. Salve a Sarasvatī.
translations.ja: オーム。サラスヴァティー女神に敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴. 샤라스와티 여신께 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om. Groet aan Sarasvatī.
translations.pl: Om. Pozdrowienia dla Saraswatī.
translations.pt-br: Om. Salvemos a divindade Sarasvatī.
translations.ru: Ом. Приветствия Сарасвати.
translations.sv: Om. Hälsningar till Sarasvatī.
translations.th: กราบพระแม่สรัสวตี
translations.tr: Ōm. Sarasvatī'ye saygı.
translations.uk: Ом. Вітаю Сарсваті.
translations.vi: Om. Kính chào vị thần Sarasvatī.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。向湿润女神（Sarasvatī）致敬。

mantras.name: Oṁ. The white, spotted, swift-moving horses, the steeds of Indra, come. May the fragrant one turn their faces towards us, may they increase our life. The milk that arises is sweet, sour, and moon-like in its radiance.
mantras.english: Oṁ. The white, spotted, swift-moving horses, the steeds of Indra, come. May the fragrant one turn their faces towards us, may they increase our life. The milk that arises is sweet, sour, and moon-like in its radiance.
mantras.original: ॐ दधिक्राव्णो अकारिषं जिष्णोरश्वस्य वाजिन : । सुरभि नो मुखा करत्प्र ण आयू षि तारिषत् । पयसस्तु समुद्भूतं मधुराम्लं शशिप्रभम् ।
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ. śuddha, pīṇḍita, madhyantī, indra-rathāni agacchante. mayi sugandhī, tān pratimukham kṛṇāt, jīvanam vṛddhamākarot. dughdham eva madhu, amla, cāndrama-prabhāvalam.
mantras.background: From the Rigveda, this Dadhikravan mantra invokes Indra's divine horse during sacred dahi-snana (curd-bathing) rituals. It praises life-giving milk — sweet, sour, moon-radiant — beckoning longevity through ancient Vedic worship.
mantras.benefits: This Dadhikravan mantra, chanted during sacred dairy rituals, invokes Indra's divine horse for purification of speech and longevity. Its petition for fragrance and extended life reveals a tradition linking ritual nourishment to inner vitality.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, indra, invocation, prosperity, longevity, blessing, abundance, fertility

translations.es: ॐ. Los caballos blancos, moteados y veloces, los corceles de Indra, se acercan. Que el ser fragante dirija sus rostros hacia nosotros, que ellos aumenten nuestra vida. La leche que emana es dulce, agria y resplandeciente como la luna.
translations.ar: ॐ. إنّ الخيول البيضاء، والمنقّطة، والسابعة، وهي مركبات إندرا، قادمة. فليوجه الكائن المعطر وجوهها نحونا، وليزددوا في حياتنا. إنّ الحليب المتولد حلو، وحامض، ولامع كالقمر.
translations.bn: ॐ। श्वेतवर्ण, धब्बेदार, দ্রুতগামী, ইন্দ্রের ঘোড়া, তারা আসছে। সুগন্ধী সত্তা, অনুগ্রহ করে তাদের মুখ আমাদের দিকে ঘুরিয়ে দিন, তারা আমাদের জীবন বৃদ্ধি করুক। যে দুধ উৎপন্ন হয়, তা মিষ্টি, টক এবং চাঁদের মতো আলো ছড়ায়।
translations.de: Om. Die weißen, gefleckten, schnellbeweglichen Pferde, die Rosse des Indra, kommen. Möge der wohlriechende (Gott) ihre Gesichter uns zuwenden, mögen sie unser Leben mehren. Die daraus entstehende Milch ist süß, sauer und mondähnlich in ihrer Strahlkraft.
translations.en-us: Oṁ. The white, speckled, swift horses, the steeds of Indra, arrive. May the fragrant one turn their faces towards us, may they grant us longevity. The resulting essence is sweet, sour, and possesses a radiance like the moon.
translations.en-gb: Oṁ. The white, speckled, swift horses, the steeds of Indra, approach. May the fragrant one turn their faces towards us, and may they increase our lifespan. The resulting offering is sweet, tart, and radiant, like the moon.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm. Les chevaux blancs, tachetés, rapides, les montures d'Indra, arrivent. Que celui qui est parfumé tourne leurs visages vers nous, qu'ils augmentent notre vie. Le lait qui en découle est doux, acide et d'une blancheur lunaire.
translations.he: אום. הסוסים הלבנים, המנוקדים, המהירים, אשר הם רכבי אינדרה, באים. ייתכן שהמובשם יפנה פניו אלינו, ושיגדילו את חיינו. החלב הנוצר הוא מתוק, חמוץ, ובעל הילה כמו הירח.
translations.hi: ॐ। श्वेत, धब्बेदार, तीव्र गति वाले, इंद्र के घोड़े आ रहे हैं। वह सुगन्धित शक्ति हमारे ओर अपना ध्यान केंद्रित करे, और हमारे जीवन को बढ़ाए। जो दूध उत्पन्न होता है, वह मधुर, खट्टा और चंद्रमा के समान तेजस्वी है।
translations.id: ॐ. Kuda-kuda putih, berbelang, yang bergerak cepat, kendaraan Dewa Indra, datang. Semoga makhluk yang harum itu menghadapkan wajahnya kepada kami, semoga mereka menambah umur kami. Susu yang dihasilkan terasa manis, asam, dan bercahaya seperti bulan.
translations.it: Ōṁ. I cavalli bianchi, maculati e veloci, i destrieri di Indra, giungono. Possa il profumato volgere i loro musi verso di noi, e possano essi accrescere la nostra vita. Il latte che emana è dolce, aspro e luminoso come la luna.
translations.ja: オーム。白く、斑点があり、素早く動くインドラ神の白馬たちが現れます。その香り高いものが、その顔を我々の方へ向け、我々の寿命を豊かにしてください。そこから湧き出る乳は、甘く、酸っぱく、そして月のように輝いています。
translations.ko: 옴. 흰색이며 반점이 있는, 빠르게 움직이는 인도의 전차를 끄는 말들이 온다. 향기로운 존재께서 그들이 우리를 향해 돌아서게 해 주시길, 그리고 그들이 우리의 삶을 풍요롭게 해 주시길. 그들이 일으키는 젖은 달빛처럼 빛나며, 달콤하고 시다.
translations.nl: ॐ. De witte, gevlekte, snel bewegende paarden, de wagens van Indra, komen. Moge de geurige entiteit hun gezichten naar ons wenden, moge zij ons leven verlengen. De melk die ontstaat is zoet, zuur en straalt als de maan.
translations.pl: ॐ. Białego umaszczenia, plamiste, szybko poruszające się konie, rumaki Indry, nadchodzą. Niech ten pachnący byt zwróci ich oblicza w naszą stronę, niech wydłużą nasze życie. Mleko, które powstaje, jest słodkie, kwaśne i o blasku przypominającym księżyc.
translations.pt-br: ॐ. Os cavalos brancos, manchados, velozes, os corcéis de Indra, chegam. Que o fragrante se volte para nós, que eles aumentem nossa vida. O leite que emana é doce, azedo e lunar em seu brilho.
translations.ru: Ом. Белые, пятнистые, стремительные кони, кони Индры, приближаются. Пусть благоуханный (или: "благословенный") обратит свои лица к нам, пусть они увеличат нашу жизнь. Молоко, которое возникает, сладко, кисло и лучисто.
translations.sv: ॐ. De vita, fläckiga, snabba hästarna, Indras vagnar, kommer. Må den väldoftande (varelsen) vända sina ansikten mot oss, må de öka vår livslängd. Mjölken som uppstår är söt, sur och månskenslik i sin glans.
translations.th: โอ้ห์ม. ม้าขาวที่มีลาย จุด มีความเร็ว วิ่งรวดเร็ว ม้าของพระอินทร์ มาถึง. ขอให้สิ่งที่มีกลิ่นหอมนั้นหันหน้ามาทางเรา ขอให้พวกมันเพิ่มพูนชีวิตของเรา. นมที่เกิดขึ้นนั้น หวาน เปรี้ยว และเปล่งประกายคล้ายดวงจันทร์.
translations.tr: Oṁ. Beyaz, benekli, hızlı koşan, İndra'nın atları geliyor. Kokulu olan, yüzlerini bize çevirsin, ömrümüzü artırsın. Ortaya çıkan süt, tatlı, ekşi ve ay ışığı gibi parlaktır.
translations.uk: Ом. Білі, плямисті, швидкі коні, колісниці Індри, приходять. Нехай цей ароматний бог поверне їхні обличчя до нас, нехай вони збільшать наше життя. Молоко, що виникає, є солодким, кислим і має місячне сяйво.
translations.vi: Ôm. Những con ngựa trắng, điểm, nhanh nhẹn, là những chiến xa của Indra, đang đến. Xin hãy để những sinh vật thơm ngát này quay mặt về phía chúng ta, và xin hãy để chúng tăng cường sự sống của chúng ta. Sữa được tạo ra có vị ngọt, chua và tỏa sáng như mặt trăng.
translations.zh-cn: 唵。洁白的、带有斑点的、行动迅速的骏马，那是帝释的坐骑，正在到来。愿那散发芬芳的存在，转过身面向我们，愿它们增进我们的生命。从中产生的乳汁，是甜的、酸的，并且如同月亮般闪耀。

mantras.name: Oṁ. To Aim, to Hrim, to Klim, to Chamunda, salutations.
mantras.english: Oṁ. To Aim, to Hrim, to Klim, to Chamunda, salutations.
mantras.original: Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundaye Viche Namaha
mantras.transliteration: ओं। ऐं, ह्रीं, क्लीं, चामुण्डाय, नमः।
mantras.background: A Shakti mantra from Hindu tradition, "Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundaye Viche Namaha" invokes Chamunda — fierce goddess of protection and transformation. Its bija seeds Aim, Hrim, Klim pulse with raw divine energy.
mantras.benefits: Practicing Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundaye Viche Namaha is said to invoke protection, transformation, and destruction of negative energies, drawing on Shakti traditions of divine feminine power.
mantras.tags: hindu, shakti, bija, chamunda, protection, transformation, tantric, kundalini

translations.es: Om. A Aim, a Hrim, a Klim, a Chamunda, saludos.
translations.ar: "أوم. أتقدم بتبجيل إلى "أيم"، و "حريم"، و "كليم"، و "تشاموندا". السلام عليك. "
translations.bn: ॐ। ওঁ,HRIM,ক্লিম,চামুণ্ডাকে,নমস্কার।
translations.de: Om. Dem Ziel, dem Hrim, dem Klim, der Chamunda, Seid geehrt.
translations.en-us: "Oṁ. To Aim, to Hrim, to Klim, to Chamunda, I offer my salutations."
translations.en-gb: "Om. To Aim (the sacred syllable), to Hrim (the sacred syllable), to Klim (the sacred syllable), to Chamunda (the fierce goddess), I offer my salutations."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm. À Aim, à Hrim, à Klim, à Chamunda, salutations.
translations.he: אָהַם. לְמַטָּרָה, לְהֲרִים, לְקְלִים, לְצַמֻּנְדָה, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: ॐ। ऊँ को, हमें (aim) को,HRIM को,क्लीम को,चामुंडा को, प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om. Kepada Aim, kepada Hrim, kepada Klim, kepada Chamunda, saya menyampaikan penghormatan.
translations.it: Oṁ. A Te, a Hrim, a Klim, a Chamunda, omaggio.
translations.ja: オーム。私（は）、アイム（に）、フリーム（に）、クリム（に）、そしてチャムンダ（へ）、礼。
translations.ko: 옴. 옴(Om)께, 흐림(Hrim)께, 클림(Klim)께, 참문다(Chamunda)께, 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om. Aan Aim, aan Hrim, aan Klim, aan Chamunda, mijn respect.
translations.pl: Om. Świńcie dla Aim, dla Hrim, dla Klim, dla Chamundy, pozdrowienia.
translations.pt-br: Om. Que eu me una ao propósito, ao poder, à força vital e à Chamunda, oferecendo minhas reverências.
translations.ru: Ом. Айму, Хриму, Климу, Чамундэ, уважения.
translations.sv: Om. Jag böjer mig för Aim, för Hrim, för Klim, för Chamunda.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาแด่ ॐ (Om), ขอความเมตตาแด่ Aim, ขอความเมตตาแด่ Hrim, ขอความเมตตาแด่ Klim, ขอความเมตตาแด่ Chamunda.
translations.tr: Ōm. Hedefe, Hrim'e, Klim'e, Chamunda'ya, saygılar.
translations.uk: Ом. Чамүнде, я приношу поклоны, звертаючись до Айм, до Хрім, до Клім.
translations.vi: Om. Kính chào Âm thanh, Kính chào mục tiêu, Kính chào sự rung động, Kính chào sự kết nối, Kính chào Chamunda.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。 献给目标（Aim），献给黑种子（Hrim），献给光芒（Klim），献给荼摩罗女（Chamunda），我敬礼。

mantras.name: Oṁ. To the power that dissolves, to the power that destroys.
mantras.english: Oṁ. To the power that dissolves, to the power that destroys.
mantras.transliteration: ओं. तस्यै शक्तयोरिति, विलयं च, विनाशं च।
mantras.background:
From Hindu tantric roots, Oṁ opens this invocation to dissolution and destruction—cosmic forces that, in Tantric thought, are sacred powers of transformation and renewal.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Om as pranava mantra prefixed to Hindu prayers; tantric traditions identify mantras as deity-powers (sakti); destruction/dissolution reflect Shaiva cosmology per the sources.
mantras.benefits:
Invoking dissolution & destruction, this mantra aligns the practitioner with transformative cosmic forces. Scholars note mantras can shift focus from daily anxieties to transcendent liberation, fostering psychological release and spiritual renewal.
  Grounding: Sources describe mantras evolving from quotidian goals to redemptive ones—escape from rebirth cycles, forgiveness of karma—supporting dissolution/transformation themes.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, vedic, tantric, shiva, mantra, japa, invocation, deity, spiritual, sound, divine, liberation

translations.es: Om. A la potencia que disuelve, a la potencia que destruye.
translations.ar: "أوم. إلى القوة التي تحلل، وإلى القوة التي تدمر."
translations.bn: ওং। সেই শক্তিকে, যা বিলুপ্ত করে, সেই শক্তিকে, যা ধ্বংস করে।
translations.de: Om. Der der auflöst, der der zerstört.
translations.en-us: Oṁ. To the power that dissolves, to the power that destroys.
translations.en-gb: Oṁ. To the power that dissolves, to the power that destroys.
translations.fr-fr: À ॐ. À la puissance qui dissout, à la puissance qui détruit.
translations.he: אום. אל הכוח הממיס, אל הכוח המכלה.
translations.hi: ॐ। उस शक्ति को समर्पित, जो विसर्जित करता है, उस शक्ति को समर्पित, जो नाश करता है।
translations.id: ॐ. Kepada kekuatan yang melarutkan, kepada kekuatan yang menghancurkan.
translations.it: Oṁ. Alla potenza che dissolve, alla potenza che distrugge.
translations.ja: オーム。溶解する力へ、破壊する力へ。 (Ōmu. Yōkai suru chikara e, hakai suru chikara e.)
translations.ko: 옴. 파괴하는 힘, 소멸하는 힘에게. (Om. 파괴하는 힘, 소멸하는 힘에게.)
translations.nl: Om. Aan de kracht die oplost, aan de kracht die vernietigt.
translations.pl: Oṁ. Do mocy, która rozpuszcza, do mocy, która niszczy.
translations.pt-br: "Om. À potência que dissolve, à potência que destrói."
translations.ru: Ом. Силе, которая растворяет, силе, которая разрушает.
translations.sv: Oṁ. Till den kraft som löser upp, till den kraft som förstör.
translations.th: ออม ขออุทิศแด่พลังแห่งการสลาย ขออุทิศแด่พลังแห่งการทำลาย
translations.tr: Ōm. Yok edici güce, yok oluş gücüne.
translations.uk: Ом. Тій Силі, що розчиняє, Тій Силі, що руйнує.
translations.vi: Om. Xin kính dâng năng lượng phá tan, năng lượng hủy diệt.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。 献给那具有溶解之力的力量，献给那具有毁灭之力的力量。

mantras.name: Oṃ, I am the Divine Light.
mantras.english: Oṃ, I am the Divine Light.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, अहम् दैविकी प्रकाशः अस्मि।
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedic Hindu tradition, "Oṃ" (a-u-m) is Sanskrit's oldest mantra, meaning Divine resonance — awakening the practitioner to their own sacred light within.
mantras.benefits: Repeating "Oṃ, I am the Divine Light" unites the primordial sound Oṃ—present since the Yajurveda—with affirming one's divine nature, gradually calming the mind and awakening inner luminosity.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, liberation, affirmation, divine, meditation, focus, healing

translations.es: ॐ, Yo soy la Luz Divina.
translations.ar: "أوم، أنا النور الإلهي."
translations.bn: ওম, আমিই সেই ঐশ্বরিক আলো।
translations.de: Om, ich bin das göttliche Licht.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, I am the Divine Light.
translations.en-gb: "Om, I am the Divine Light."
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ, je suis la lumière divine.
translations.he: אָום, אֲנִי אוֹר אֵלִי.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं दिव्य ज्योति हूँ।
translations.id: ॐ, Aku adalah Cahaya Ilahi.
translations.it: Oṃ, io sono la Luce Divina.
translations.ja: オーム、私は神聖な光です。 (Ōmu, watashi wa shinsei na hikari desu.)
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 신성한 빛입니다. (Om, naneun sinseonghan bicheumnida.)
translations.nl: Om, Ik ben het goddelijke licht.
translations.pl: Oṁ, Ja jestem Światłem Boskim.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu sou a Luz Divina.
translations.ru: Ом, Я есть Божественный Свет.
translations.sv: Oṃ, jag är det gudomliga ljuset.
translations.th: โอรัม, ข้าคือดวงประภากรศักดิ์สิทธิ์
translations.tr: Om, Ben İlahi Işık'ım.
translations.uk: Ом, Я є Божественним Світлом.
translations.vi: ॐ, Tôi là Ánh Sáng thiêng liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我即是神圣之光。

mantras.name: Oṃ, I bow to the one who is non-dual.
mantras.english: Oṃ, I bow to the one who is non-dual.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, नमः सः शान्तिः ।
mantras.background: "Oṃ, I bow to the one who is non-dual" — a salutation to boundless unity. This mantra invites practitioners into a tradition of dissolving separation, bowing to oneness itself.
mantras.benefits: Bowing to the non-dual invites dissolution of the ego's sense of separation. Practitioners report deepened stillness, reduced inner conflict, and a quiet recognition that self and world are one — a gateway into Advaita's timeless mystery.
mantras.tags: hindu, advaita, vedantic, devotional, om, philosophy, non-dualism, vedic

translations.es: Óm, me inclino ante Aquel que es indiviso.
translations.ar: "أوم، أُسَلِّم إلى ذلك الكائن الواحد الذي هو ليس متحدًا."
translations.bn: ওঁ, আমি সেই সত্তার কাছে প্রণতি জানাই যিনি অদ্বৈত।
translations.de: Om, ich verneige mich vor dem, der nicht-dual ist.
translations.en-us: Om, I offer my obeisance to the one who is without duality.
translations.en-gb: "Om, I offer my reverence to the one who is without duality."
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant Celui qui est non-duale.
translations.he: אום, אני משתחווה למי שאינו כפול.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं उस एकत्व के स्रोत को प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Om, saya bersujud kepada Yang Esa yang tidak terbagi.
translations.it: Oṃ, mi prostro al principio unico e indivisibile.
translations.ja: オーム、私は二元性のない存在に礼を捧げます。
translations.ko: 옴, 저는 이원성이 없는 존재께 경배합니다. (Om, jeoneun iwonseongi eomneun jonjaege gyeongbaehapnida.)
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de Ene die niet-dualistisch is.
translations.pl: Om, składam pokłon temu, który jest niejednoczny.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me prostro perante aquele que é não-dual.
translations.ru: Ом, я склоняюсь перед Тем, Кто есть Единое, неделимое.
translations.sv: Oṃ, jag böjer mig för den som är icke-dual.
translations.th: ข้าขอสักการะแด่ผู้ซึ่งเป็นหนึ่งเดียว, มิได้มีสอง.
translations.tr: Om, ikili olmayan varlığa saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Ом, я вклоняюся Тому, Хто є недвоїстим.
translations.vi: Ôm, con cúi lạy đấng không hai.
translations.zh-cn: ōṃ, 我向非二元的存在致敬。

mantras.name: Oṃ, I surrender to the very essence of Vedanta, O Ganapati.
mantras.english: Oṃ, I surrender to the very essence of Vedanta, O Ganapati.
mantras.transliteration: ōṀ, iṅku eṉaṅku vīṭaṅkā, vēdānta-nin pōttu, oṅkaṇēśvarā.
mantras.background: Rooted in Vedanta philosophy & devoted to Ganapati, this mantra blends surrender ("I surrender") with sacred knowledge, inviting practitioners into one of Hinduism's most profound traditions.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this mantra blends surrender (praṇipāta) with Ganapati's obstacle-removing power and Vedānta's non-dual wisdom—cultivating humility, mental clarity, and inner resilience.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedanta, ganapati, om, devotional, philosophy, surrender, affirmation

translations.es: Om, me entrego a la esencia misma del Vedanta, oh Ganapati.
translations.ar: أوم، أتأمل في جوهر الفيدا، أيها غاناباتيا.
translations.bn: ওঁ, আমি ভেদাস্তের পরম সত্তাকে সমর্পণ করি, হে গণপতি।
translations.de: Om, ich ergebe mich dem tiefsten Wesen des Vedanta, oh Ganesha.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, I surrender myself to the very essence of Vedanta, O Ganapati.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, I surrender myself to the very essence of Vedanta, O Ganapati.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, je me voue à l'essence même de la philosophie Vedanta, ô Ganapati.
translations.he: אוֹם, אני נכנע למהות הוויתה, הו גאנפטי.
translations.hi: ॐ, मैं वेदान्त के परम सार को समर्पित हूँ, हे गजानन।
translations.id: Om, saya berserah diri kepada esensi utama Vedanta, wahai Ganapati.
translations.it: Oṃ, mi arrendo all'essenza stessa del Vedanta, o Ganapati.
translations.ja: オーム、私はヴェーダーンタの根本原理に身を委ねます。ガネーシャよ。
translations.ko: 옴, 나는 베단타의 근본적인 본질에 헌신합니다. 오, 가나파티여.
translations.nl: Om, ik geef mij over aan de essentie van de Vedanta, o Ganapati.
translations.pl: Oṁ, oddaję się esencji samego Wedanty, o Ganapathe.
translations.pt-br: Om, eu me rendo à própria essência do Vedanta, ó Ganapati.
translations.ru: Ом, я предаюсь самой сущности Веданты, о Ганапати.
translations.sv: Om, jag överlämnar mig till själva essensen av Vedanta, o Ganapati.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาแด่แก่นแท้แห่งปรัชญาเวทัญตะ, โอ้พระคันธารา.
translations.tr: Om, Vedanta'nın özüne sığınıyorum, Ganesha'ya.
translations.uk: Ом, я предаюся самой сущности Веданты, о Ганапати.
translations.vi: Ôm, tôi xin dâng mình cho bản chất cốt lõi của triết học Vedanta, hỡi Ganapati.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，我向吠檀多哲学的根本本质献身，哦，甘尼沙。

mantras.name: Oṃ, Kṛīm, Kṛīm, Kṛīm, Halīm, Hrīm, Khaṃ, "explode," Kṛīm, Kṛīm, Kṛīm, "burst.
mantras.english: Oṃ, Kṛīm, Kṛīm, Kṛīm, Halīm, Hrīm, Khaṃ, "explode," Kṛīm, Kṛīm, Kṛīm, "burst.
mantras.original: ॐ क्रीं क्रीं क्रीं हलीं ह्रीं खं स्फोटय क्रीं क्रीं क्रीं फट ||
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, kṛīm, kṛīm, kṛīm, halīm, hrīm, kham, "explode", kṛīm, kṛīm, kṛīm, "burst".
mantras.background: The source material does not provide the origin, tradition, or literal meaning of this specific mantra, so those details cannot be responsibly stated.
mantras.benefits: This powerful mantra, rich with seed syllables (bījas), is believed to sharpen concentration, remove negative forces, and awaken latent inner powers — drawing the practitioner toward extraordinary spiritual transformation.
mantras.tags: hindu, sanskrit, shakti, tantric, power, transformation, empower, purification, activation

translations.es: Om, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, "explotar", Krim, Krim, Krim, "estallar".
translations.ar: "أوم، كريم، كريم، كريم، حليم، هريم، خام، 'انفجار'، كريم، كريم، كريم، 'انفجار'."
translations.bn: ॐ, ক্রীম, ক্রীম, ক্রীম, হলুদ, হ্রীম, খাম্, "বিস্ফোরণ", ক্রীম, ক্রীম, ক্রীম, "ফাটল"।
translations.de: Ōm, Krīm, Krīm, Krīm, Halīm, Hrīm, Khaṃ, "explodieren," Krīm, Krīm, Krīm, "bersten."
translations.en-us: "Om, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, [command to] explode, Krim, Krim, Krim, [command to] burst."
translations.en-gb: "Om, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, 'explode,' Krim, Krim, Krim, 'burst.'"
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, "exploser", Krim, Krim, Krim, "éclater".
translations.he: אום, קרים, קרים, קרים, חלים, הרים, חם, "פיצוץ", קרים, קרים, קרים, "התפרצות".
translations.id: ॐ, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, "meledak," Krim, Krim, Krim, "pecah."
translations.it: Oṃ, Kriim, Kriim, Kriim, Halim, Hriim, Kham, "esplodi", Kriim, Kriim, Kriim, "scoppia".
translations.ja: オーム、クリーム、クリーム、クリーム、ハリーム、フリーム、カム、(爆発)、クリーム、クリーム、クリーム。
translations.ko: 옴, 크림, 크림, 크림, 할림, 프리, 캄, "폭발하다", 크림, 크림, 크림, "터지다".
translations.nl: Oṃ, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, "explosie," Krim, Krim, Krim, "uitbarsting."
translations.pl: Oṁ, Krīm, Krīm, Krīm, Halīm, Hrīm, Khaṃ, "wybuch", Krīm, Krīm, Krīm, "rozpryskiwać się".
translations.pt-br: Oṃ, Krim, Krim, Krim, Halim, Hrim, Kham, "explodir", Krim, Krim, Krim, "estourar".
translations.ru: Ом, Крийм, Крийм, Крийм, Халим, Хрим, Хам, "взорваться", Крийм, Крийм, Крийм, "разрушить".
translations.sv: Oṃ, Krīm, Krīm, Krīm, Halīm, Hrīm, Khaṃ, "explodera", Krīm, Krīm, Krīm, "brista".
translations.th: โอม, กรีม, กรีม, กรีม, หลิม, หรีม, ขัม, "ระเบิด," กรีม, กรีม, กรีม, "แตก."
translations.tr: Om, "Krim" (bir tür kutsal ses), "Krim" (aynı anlamda), "Krim" (aynı anlamda), "Halim" (yumuşak, nazik, hoşgörülü olan), "Hrim" (bir başka kutsal ses), "Kham" (boşluk, açıklık), "patlamak", "Krim" (bir tür kutsal ses), "Krim" (aynı anlamda), "Krim" (aynı anlamda).
translations.uk: Ом, Крім, Крім, Крім, Халім, Хрім, Хам, "вибух", Крім, Крім, Крім, "вирватися".
translations.vi: ॐ, "Kṛīm", "Kṛīm", "Kṛīm", "Halīm", "Hrīm", "Khaṃ", "nổ tung", "Kṛīm", "Kṛīm", "Kṛīm".
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，克里姆，克里姆，克里姆，哈里姆，赫里姆，堪，"爆炸"，克里姆，克里姆，克里姆，"爆发"。

mantras.name: Oṃ, lead me away from unreality and towards reality.
mantras.english: Oṃ, lead me away from unreality and towards reality.
mantras.original: Om, Keep me not (mā) in unreality (asato) but make me go (gamaya) towards the Reality (sad)
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, iva me ānaya adṛśyatā-bhūmiṃ, yathā satya-bhūmiṃ.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all existence — the vibration underlying creation itself, bridging the finite and the infinite.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body and mind alike — Vedic tradition calls it the universe's vibrational root, while modern research links its chanting to theta brainwaves and vagal calm. One syllable. Infinite depth.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, yoga, vedanta, brahman, pranava, sound, liberation, consciousness, reality

translations.es: Om, líbrame de la irrealidad y guíame hacia la realidad.
translations.ar: يا أوم، قُدْني بعيدًا عن الوهمِ، وقرِّبْني من الحقيقة.
translations.bn: ওঁ, আমাকে ভ্রম থেকে দূরে এবং সত্যের দিকে পরিচালিত করো।
translations.de: Om, führe mich von der Unrealität weg und hin zur Realität.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, lead me away from illusion and towards truth.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, guide me away from illusion and towards truth.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, éloigne-moi de l'illusion et guide-moi vers la réalité.
translations.he: הָאוֹם, הובל אותי מעבר למה שאינו אמיתי, ולעבר האמת.
translations.hi: ॐ, हे, मुझे असत्य से दूर ले जाओ और सत्य की ओर।
translations.id: Oṃ, tuntunlah aku menjauh dari ketidaksebenaran dan menuju kebenaran.
translations.it: Ōṃ, conduci il mio spirito lontano dall'illusione e verso la realtà.
translations.ja: オーム、私を非実から、そして実相へと導き給え。 (Om, watashi o higen kara, soshite jissō e to michibiki tamai.)
translations.ko: 옴, 저를 환영에서 벗어나 진실로 이끌어 주소서.
translations.nl: Oṃ, leid mij weg van het onwerkelijke en naar het werkelijke.
translations.pl: Oṁ, przeprowadź mnie z kłamstwa w prawdę.
translations.pt-br: Om, afaste-me da irrealidade e conduza-me à realidade.
translations.ru: Ом, освободи меня от иллюзии и направь к реальности.
translations.sv: Oṃ, led mig bort från illusion och mot verkligheten.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจากพระผู้เป็นเจ้า นำพาข้าพเจ้าให้พ้นจากความไม่เป็นจริง และนำไปสู่ความจริง
translations.tr: Ōm, beni sahtelikten uzaklaştır ve gerçekliğe doğru yönlendir.
translations.uk: Ом, відведи мене від нереальності та спрямуй до реальності.
translations.vi: Om, xin dẫn lối tôi thoát khỏi sự vô minh và hướng tới chân lý.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，引领我远离虚幻，走向真实。

mantras.name: Oṃ, may you be at the proper time/moment." or "Oṃ, may you be in the right time.
mantras.english: Oṃ, may you be at the proper time/moment." or "Oṃ, may you be in the right time.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, may you be at the proper time/moment." or "Oṃ, may you be in the right time.  ॐ, may you be at the proper time/moment." or "Oṃ, may you be in the right time.
mantras.background: From Vedic Hindu tradition, "Om" (ॐ) is the primordial sound — the vibrational substrate of all existence, meaning "the universe's first sound," bridging finite and infinite.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body and mind, inducing deep stillness. Research shows it shifts brainwaves toward meditative theta states. Traditionally, it bridges waking, dreaming, and transcendent consciousness — the entire arc of existence in one sacred breath.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, om, pranava, bijamantra, japa, affirmation, blessing, sacred-sound, prayer

translations.es: Ōṃ, que estés en el momento oportuno." or "Ōṃ, que estés en el tiempo correcto."
translations.ar: "أوم، ليكن وجودك في الوقت المناسب."
translations.bn: ওঁ, আপনি সঠিক সময়ে/মুহূর্তে বিরাজ করুন।" অথবা, "ওঁ, আপনি সঠিক সময়ে থাকুন।"
translations.de: Ōṃ, mögest du zur rechten Zeit sein.
translations.en-us: "Om, may you be present at the auspicious and appropriate time."
translations.en-gb: "Om, may you be present at the auspicious time."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, puisse-tu être au moment opportun.
translations.he: אום, יהי אתה בזמן המתאים.
translations.hi: ॐ, "हे, तुम्हारा सही समय/क्षण हो।" या "हे, तुम उचित समय में हो।"
translations.id: ॐ, semoga Anda berada pada waktu yang tepat.
translations.it: Ōṃ, possa tu essere nel momento opportuno.
translations.ja: オーム、その時が適切に訪れますように。(Ōmu, sono toki ga tekisetsu ni otoimasu yō ni.)
translations.ko: 옴, (당신이) 적절한 시기에 있기를. 또는 옴, (당신이) 올바른 시기에 있기를.
translations.nl: "Oṃ, moge u in het juiste moment/tijdstip verkeren."
translations.pl: ॐ, niech będzieś we właściwym czasie.
translations.pt-br: "Om, que você esteja no momento oportuno." ou "Om, que você esteja no tempo certo."
translations.ru: Ом, да пребудешь ты в надлежащее время.
translations.sv: ॐ, må du vara vid rätt tidpunkt.
translations.th: ขอออม ขอให้ท่านอยู่ในช่วงเวลาที่เหมาะสม
translations.tr: "Om, doğru zamanda/anda olman dileğim." veya "Om, doğru zamanda bulunman dileğim."
translations.uk: Ом, нехай будеш у потрібний час.
translations.vi: Ôm, xin Ngài hãy hiện diện vào đúng thời điểm.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，愿您处于恰当的时机。

mantras.name: Oṃ, salutations to Jayantī, the auspicious one; salutations to Mangalā, the benevolent one; salutations to Kālī, the time-bound one; salutations to Pātratī, the one who grants blessings; salutations to Kapalīnī, the one who wears a skull; salutations to Durgā, the one who is difficult to overcome; salutations to Kṣamā, the one who forgives; salutations to Śivatrā, the one who embodies the essence of Shiva; Svāhā, Svadhā, salutations to you.
mantras.english: Oṃ, salutations to Jayantī, the auspicious one; salutations to Mangalā, the benevolent one; salutations to Kālī, the time-bound one; salutations to Pātratī, the one who grants blessings; salutations to Kapalīnī, the one who wears a skull; salutations to Durgā, the one who is difficult to overcome; salutations to Kṣamā, the one who forgives; salutations to Śivatrā, the one who embodies the essence of Shiva; Svāhā, Svadhā, salutations to you.
mantras.original: ஓம் ஜெயந்தி மங்கள காளி பத்ர காளி கபாலினி துர்கா க்ஷமா சிவதாத்ரி ஸ்வாஹா ஸ்வதா நமோஸ்துதே
mantras.transliteration: ऒṃ, salutations to Jayantī, the auspicious one; salutations to Mangalā, the benevolent one; salutations to Kālī, the time-bound one; salutations to Pātratī, the one who grants blessings; salutations to Kapalīnī, the one who wears a skull; salutations to Durgā, the one who is difficult to overcome; salutations to Kṣamā, the one who forgives; salutations to Śivatrā, the one who embodies the essence of Shiva; Svāhā, Svadhā, salutations to you.
mantras.background: From Hindu tradition, this mantra salutes Kālī, Durgā & divine feminine forms. Chanted 9–108x at dawn with mālā beads, it transforms body, mind & life.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Kālī, Durgā, and seven fierce-yet-compassionate goddesses, this mantra cultivates inner strength, forgiveness, and surrender. Practitioners chant it 9–108 times at dawn for transformation of body, mind, and life.
mantras.tags: hindu, kali, durga, goddess, shakti, devotional, tantric, protection, invocation, fierce

translations.es: Om, saludo a Jayantī, la auspiciosa; saludo a Mangalā, la benévola; saludo a Kālī, la que está sujeta al tiempo; saludo a Pātratī, la que otorga bendiciones; saludo a Kapalīnī, la que lleva un cráneo; saludo a Durgā, la que es difícil de superar; saludo a Kṣamā, la que perdona; saludo a Śivatrā, la que encarna la esencia de Shiva. Svāhā, Svadhā, saludo a ustedes.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لجاياتي، الطيبة؛ تحية لم Angela، الرحيمة؛ تحية لكالي، التي تحدها الأزمنة؛ تحية لـ "باتراتي"، التي تمنح البركات؛ تحية لـ "كاباليني"، التي ترتدي جمجمة؛ تحية لـ "دورغا"، التي يصعب التغلب عليها؛ تحية لـ "كساما"، التي تغفر؛ تحية لـ "شيفاترا"، التي تجسد جوهر شيفا. سفاها، سفاذا، تحية لكِ."
translations.bn: ॐ, जयন্তী দেবীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি শুভ; মঙ্গলার প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি মঙ্গলময়ী; কালীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি কালের অধীন; পাত্রতীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি আশীর্বাদ দেন;kapalীনীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি খুলোর অলঙ্কার ধারণ করেন; দুর্গার প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি অতিক্রম করা কঠিন; ক্ষমা দেবীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি ক্ষমাশীল; শিবতরাই প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, যিনি শিবের সার embody করেন; স্বাহা, স্বধা, তোমাদের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।
translations.de: Om, Grüße an Jayantī, die Günstige; Grüße an Mangalā, die Wohlwollende; Grüße an Kālī, die an die Zeit gebundene; Grüße an Pātratī, die, die Segen gewährt; Grüße an Kapalīnī, die eine Schädel trägt; Grüße an Durgā, die, die schwer zu bezwingen ist; Grüße an Kṣamā, die, die vergibt; Grüße an Śivatrā, die die Essenz von Shiva verkörpert; Svāhā, Svadhā, Grüße an euch.
translations.en-us: Om, salutations to Jayanti, the one who increases auspiciousness; salutations to Mangala, the fortunate one; salutations to Kali, the one bound by time; salutations to Patrati, the one who bestows blessings; salutations to Kapalini, the one who wears a skull; salutations to Durga, the one who is difficult to conquer; salutations to Kshama, the one who bestows forgiveness; salutations to Shivatra, the embodiment of the essence of Shiva; Svaha, Svadha, salutations to you.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Jayantī, the one of auspicious qualities; salutations to Mangalā, the one who brings good fortune; salutations to Kālī, the one who is bound by time; salutations to Pātratī, the one who bestows blessings; salutations to Kapalīnī, the one who adorns herself with a skull; salutations to Durgā, the one who is difficult to surpass; salutations to Kṣamā, the one who offers forgiveness; salutations to Śivatrā, the embodiment of Shiva's essence. Svāhā, Svadhā, salutations to you.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations à Jayantī, la propice ; salutations à Mangalā, la bienveillante ; salutations à Kālī, celle qui est soumise au temps ; salutations à Pātratī, celle qui accorde les bénédictions ; salutations à Kapalīnī, celle qui porte un crâne ; salutations à Durgā, celle qui est difficile à vaincre ; salutations à Kṣamā, celle qui pardonne ; salutations à Śivatrā, celle qui incarne l'essence de Shiva. Svāhā, Svadhā, salutations à vous.
translations.he: ॐ, ברכות ג'יאנטי, זו המביאה מזל; ברכות למנגלה, זו הטובה; ברכות לקאלי, זו הכפופה לזמן; ברכות לפטראטי, זו המעניקה ברכות; ברכות לקפליני, זו העונדת גולגולת; ברכות לדורגה, זו הקשה לניצחון; ברכות לקשמה, זו הסולחת; ברכות לשיווטרה, זו המגלמת את מהותו של שיווה; סוואה, סוודה, ברכות לך.
translations.hi: ॐ, जयंती को नमस्कार, जो शुभ हैं; मंगला को नमस्कार, जो कृपालु हैं; काली को नमस्कार, जो समयबद्ध हैं; पात्राती को नमस्कार, जो आशीर्वाद प्रदान करती हैं; कपलिनी को नमस्कार, जो खोपड़ी पहनती हैं; दुर्गा को नमस्कार, जिसे जीतना कठिन है; क्षमा को नमस्कार, जो क्षमा करती हैं; शिवतरा को नमस्कार, जो शिव के सार को धारण करती हैं। स्वाहा, स्वधा, आपको नमस्कार।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Jayantī, yang membawa keberuntungan; salam kepada Mangalā, yang penuh welas asih; salam kepada Kālī, yang terikat waktu; salam kepada Pātratī, yang memberikan berkat; salam kepada Kapalīnī, yang mengenakan tengkorak; salam kepada Durgā, yang sulit ditaklukkan; salam kepada Kṣamā, yang memberikan pengampunan; salam kepada Śivatrā, yang merupakan perwujudan Shiva; Svāhā, Svadhā, salam untukmu.
translations.it: Oṃ, saluto a Jayantī, la propizia; saluto a Mangalā, la benevola; saluto a Kālī, colei che è legata al tempo; saluto a Pātratī, colei che concede benedizioni; saluto a Kapalīnī, colei che indossa un teschio; saluto a Durgā, colei che è difficile da superare; saluto a Kṣamā, colei che perdona; saluto a Śivatrā, colei che incarna l'essenza di Shiva. Svāhā, Svadhā, vi saluto.
translations.ja: オーム、ジャヤンティー、吉祥なるものへ、礼；マンガーラー、慈悲深きものへ、礼；カーリー、時をも支配する者へ、礼；パートラティー、祝福を与える者へ、礼；カパリニー、髑髏を身にまとう者へ、礼；ドゥルガー、打ち破ることが困難な者へ、礼；クシャマー、許しを与える者へ、礼；シヴァートラー、シヴァの精髄を体現する者へ、礼。スヴァハー、スワダー、あなたに礼。
translations.ko: 옴, 훌륭하고 길조를 가져다주는 자이얀티에게 경의를 표합니다. 자비로운 만갈라에게 경의를 표합니다. 시간을 초월하는 칼리에게 경의를 표합니다. 축복을 내리는 파트라티에게 경의를 표합니다. 해골을 걸친 카팔리니에게 경의를 표합니다. 극복하기 어려운 두르가에게 경의를 표합니다. 용서하는 샴아에게 경의를 표합니다. 시바의 본질을 구현하는 시바트라에게 경의를 표합니다. 스바하, 스바다, 당신에게 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om, groeten aan Jayantī, de gunstige; groeten aan Mangalā, de welwillende; groeten aan Kālī, degenen die gebonden is aan de tijd; groeten aan Pātratī, degene die zegeningen schenkt; groeten aan Kapalīnī, degene die een schedel draagt; groeten aan Durgā, degene die moeilijk te overwinnen is; groeten aan Kṣamā, degene die vergeeft; groeten aan Śivatrā, degene die de essentie van Shiva belichaamt. Svāhā, Svadhā, groeten aan u.
translations.pl: Om, pokłony Jayantī, tej, która przynosi szczęście; pokłony Mangalā, tej, która jest dobrodajna; pokłony Kālī, tej, której imię odnosi się do czasu; pokłony Pātratī, tej, która obdarza błogosławieństwami; pokłony Kapalīnī, tej, która nosi czaszkę; pokłony Durgā, tej, której trudno pokonać; pokłony Kṣamā, tej, która wybacza; pokłony Śivatrā, tej, która uosabia esencję Śiwy; Svāhā, Svadhā, niechaj wasze błogosławieństwa spływają na nas.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações a Jayantī, a auspiciosa; saudações a Mangalā, a benévola; saudações a Kālī, a que está sujeita ao tempo; saudações a Pātratī, a que concede bênçãos; saudações a Kapalīnī, a que veste um crânio; saudações a Durgā, a que é difícil de superar; saudações a Kṣamā, a que perdoa; saudações a Śivatrā, a que encarna a essência de Shiva. Svāhā, Svadhā, saudações a vós.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Джайнти, благословенной; приветствия Мангале, благожелательной; приветствия Кали, связанной со временем; приветствия Патрати, дарующей благословения; приветствия Капалини, носящей череп; приветствия Дурга, которую трудно преодолеть; приветствия Кшаме, прощающей; приветствия Шиватре, воплощающей сущность Шивы. Сваха, Свадха, приветствия вам.
translations.sv: Oṃ, vördnad till Jayantī, den gynnsamma; vördnad till Mangalā, den välvilliga; vördnad till Kālī, den som är bunden av tiden; vördnad till Pātratī, den som skänker välsignelser; vördnad till Kapalīnī, den som bär en skalle; vördnad till Durgā, den som är svår att övervinna; vördnad till Kṣamā, den som förlåter; vördnad till Śivatrā, den som förkroppsligar essensen av Shiva. Svāhā, Svadhā, vördnad till er.
translations.th: ขออัญเชิญพระนาม: โอรัม, ข้าขอคารวะแก่ จายันตี ผู้เป็นมงคล; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ มังฆลา ผู้เปี่ยมด้วยความเมตตา; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ กาลี ผู้เป็นตัวแทนแห่งกาล; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ ปาตารตี ผู้ประทานพร; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ กาปาลินี ผู้สวมศีรษะ; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ ทุรฆา ผู้ยากแก่การเอาชนะ; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ กษมา ผู้ทรงไว้ซึ่งการให้อภัย; ข้าขอคารวะแก่ ชีวะตรา ผู้เป็นดั่งสารัตถะแห่งพระศิวะ; สวาหะ, สวัสดิ, ข้าขอคารวะแด่ท่าน.
translations.tr: Ōm, Jayantī'ye, uğurlu olana saygılar; Mangalā'ya, iyiliksever olana saygılar; Kālī'ye, zamana bağlı olana saygılar; Pātratī'ye, bereketi bahşeden olana saygılar; Kapalīnī'ye, kafatası takan olana saygılar; Durgā'ya, üstesinden gelinmesi zor olana saygılar; Kṣamā'ya, affeden olana saygılar; Śivatrā'ya, Shiva'nın özünü temsil eden olana saygılar. Svāhā, Svadhā, size saygılar.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия Джайнти, благословенной; приветствия Мангале, благожелательной; приветствия Кали, связанной со временем; приветствия Патрати, дарующей благословения; приветствия Капалини, носящей череп; приветствия Дурга, которую трудно преодолеть; приветствия Кшаме, прощающей; приветствия Шиватре, воплощающей сущность Шивы. Сваха, Свадха, приветствия вам.
translations.vi: Ôm, kính chào Jayantī, người mang lại điềm lành; kính chào Mangalā, người ban sự an lành; kính chào Kālī, người gắn liền với thời gian; kính chào Pātratī, người ban phước lành; kính chào Kapalīnī, người đội khăn thây; kính chào Durgā, người khó bị khuất phục; kính chào Kṣamā, người ban sự khoan dung; kính chào Śivatrā, người là hiện thân của Shiva; Svāhā, Svadhā, kính chào Ngài.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向吉祥女神 Jayantī 敬礼；向慈惠女神 Mangalā 敬礼；向时间女神 Kālī 敬礼；向赐福女神 Pātratī 敬礼；向佩戴骷髅的 Kapalīnī 女神敬礼；向难以征服的 Durgā 女神敬礼；向宽恕女神 Kṣamā 敬礼；向 Shiva 女神（Shivatrā， Shiva 的化身）敬礼。Svāhā，Svadhā，向你们敬礼。

mantras.name: Oṃ, salutations to Lord Ganesha. May the supreme being, with his divine grace, break the chains of debt and negativity. Hūṃ, salutations. Phăt.
mantras.english: Oṃ, salutations to Lord Ganesha. May the supreme being, with his divine grace, break the chains of debt and negativity. Hūṃ, salutations. Phăt.
mantras.original: ॐ ಗಣೇಶ ಋಣಂ ಛಿಂಧಿ ವರೇಣ್ಯಂ ಹುಂ ನಮಃ ಫಟ್॥
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, नमः शिवाय। देवेभ्यः, सः कृपायुः, ऋणानां च नकारात्मकतानि त्वादिभ्रंशतु। हूँ, नमः। फट्।
mantras.background: From Hindu Tantric tradition, this Ganesha mantra calls Oṃ, names Ganesha, commands debt-cutting (Ṛṇaṃ Chindhi), invokes Hūṃ, and strikes with Phaṭ — a powerful Vedic seed-sound formula.
mantras.benefits: This Gaṇeśa Ṛṇa Mukti mantra is traditionally linked to liberation from debt and negativity. Its disciplined Wednesday practice with a turmeric mala cultivates focus, surrender, and gradual relief from life's burdens—drawing practitioners into Ganesha's transformative grace.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, tantric, devotional, mantra, prosperity, liberation, protection, abundance, empower

translations.es: Om, saludo al Señor Ganesha. Que la divinidad suprema, con su gracia divina, rompa las cadenas de la deuda y la negatividad. Hūṃ, saludo. Phăt.
translations.ar: "أوم، تحية لرب جانيشا. يا الكائن الأعلى، بفضله الإلهي، يكسر قيود الديون والسلبية. هوم، تحية. فات."
translations.bn: ॐ, गणेश দেবতাকে प्रणाम। परमेश्वर, তাঁর ঐশ্বরিক কৃপায়, ঋণের বন্ধন এবং নেতিবাচকতা দূর করুন। হূྃ, प्रणाम। ফট।
translations.de: Om, Gebete dem Herrn Ganesha. Möge das höchste Wesen, mit seiner göttlichen Gnade, die Ketten der Schulden und Negativität zerbrechen. Hūṃ, Gebete. Phăt.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to Lord Ganesha. May the supreme being, through his divine grace, remove the bonds of debt and negativity. Hum, salutations. Phat."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to Lord Ganesha. May the supreme being, through his divine grace, remove the bonds of debt and negativity. Hum, salutations. Phat."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations au Seigneur Ganesha. Que l'être suprême, par sa grâce divine, brise les chaînes de la dette et de la négativité. Hūṃ, salutations. Phăt.
translations.he: אום, ברכות לאדון גנשה. ייתן האל העליון, בחסדו האלוהי, לשבור את כבלי החוב והשליליות. הום, ברכות. פאת.
translations.hi: ॐ, भगवान गणेश को प्रणाम। परमेश्वर, अपनी दिव्य कृपा से, ऋणात्मकता और नकारात्मकता की जंजीरों को तोड़ें। हूँम्, प्रणाम। फट्।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Dewa Ganesha. Semoga Sang Pencipta, dengan kemurahan-Nya, menghancurkan belenggu hutang dan energi negatif. Huum, salam. Phaat.
translations.it: Ōṃ, saluto al Signore Ganesha. Che l'essere supremo, con la sua divina grazia, spezzi le catene del debito e della negatività. Hūṃ, saluto. Phăt.
translations.ja: オーム、ガネーシャ神への礼賛。至高の存在が、その神聖な恩寵によって、借金と否定的な感情の束縛を断ち切られますように。フーム、礼賛。ファット。
translations.ko: 옴, 가네샤 신에게 경의를 표합니다. 자비로운 분께서, 신성한 은총으로 빚과 부정적인 에너지의 속박을 끊어주시기를 바랍니다. 훔, 경의를 표합니다. फट.
translations.nl: Om, groet aan Heer Ganesha. Moge de opperwezen, met zijn goddelijke genade, de ketenen van schulden en negativiteit verbreken. Hūṃ, groet. Phăt.
translations.pl: Oṁ, pozdrowienia dla Pana Ganeśa. Niech Najwyższe Bycie, swoją boską łaską, przełamie kajdany długu i negatywności. Hūṃ, pozdrowienia. Phăt.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações a Lord Ganesha. Que a divindade suprema, com sua graça divina, rompa as correntes da dívida e da negatividade. Hūṃ, saudações. Phăt.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Господу Ганеше. Да пребудет высшее существо, своим божественным благословением, разрушить оковы долгов и негатива. Хум, приветствия. Фа́т.
translations.sv: Om, vördnad till Lord Ganesha. Måtte den högsta varelsen, med sin gudomliga nåd, bryta bojorna av skuld och negativitet. Hūṃ, vördnad. Phăt.
translations.th: ขอพระนาม ॐ (Om), ข้าพเจ้าขอรำลึกถึงพระพิฆเนศผู้เป็นเทพเจ้า. ขอพระองค์ผู้ทรงฤทัยอันยิ่งใหญ่, ด้วยพระเมตตาอันศักดิ์สิทธิ์, จงทำลายพันธนาการแห่งหนี้สินและความทุกข์โศก. ขอพระนาม ॐ (Om), ข้าพเจ้าขอรำลึก. (Phăt).
translations.tr: Om, Ganesha Tanrısına saygılar. Yüce varlık, ilahi lütfuyla, borçların ve olumsuzlukların prangalarını kırmayı dileriz. Hūṃ, saygılar. Phăt.
translations.uk: Ом, вітання Господу Ганеші. Нехай Найвища Істота, Своєю божественною милістю, розірве ланцюги боргу та негативу. Хум, вітання. Фат.
translations.vi: Om, kính chào Đức Chúa Ganesha. Xin Ngài, với sự ân huệ thiêng liêng của mình, phá bỏ xiềng xích của nợ nần và những điều tiêu cực. Hūṃ, kính chào. Phăt.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向甘尼萨尊者致敬。愿至尊之神，以其神圣的恩典，消除债务和负面的束缚。 吽，致敬。 फट。

mantras.name: Oṃ, salutations to the immortal life force.
mantras.english: Oṃ, salutations to the immortal life force.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, saṁskāraḥ anantamṛtyu-jīvane.
mantras.background: From Tibetan Vajrayana, this Sanskrit mantra invokes Amitayus—Buddha of limitless life—saluting the immortal life force across generations of practice.
mantras.benefits:
Oṃ amaraṇi jīvantaye svāhā salutes limitless life, linking practitioner to immortal vitality. Rooted in Tibetan Buddhist tradition, its repetition cultivates presence and transcendence of fear.
  Grounding: Source identifies this as the mantra of Buddha Amitayus, associated with limitless life; mantra practice broadly linked to transcendence and meditative depth per sources.
mantras.tags: om, hindu, vedic, devotional, longevity, japa, prana, liberation, healing, divine

translations.es: Om, saludo a la fuerza vital inmortal.
translations.ar: أوم، تحية لقوة الحياة الأبدية.
translations.bn: ওঁ, অমর জীবনশক্তির প্রতি প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, Grüße an die unsterbliche Lebenskraft.
translations.en-us: "Om, salutations to the eternal vital energy."
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to the eternal vital energy."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations à la force vitale immortelle.
translations.he: ॐ, ברכות לכוח החיים הנצחי.
translations.hi: ॐ, नमन अमर प्राण शक्ति को।
translations.id: Om, salam untuk energi kehidupan abadi.
translations.it: Om, saluto alla forza vitale immortale.
translations.ja: オーム、不滅の生命力へ礼。
translations.ko: 옴, 불멸의 생명력에 경의를 표합니다. (Om, gyeong-eui-reul bulmyeol-ui saengmyeongryeoge gyeong-ui-reul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl: Om, groet aan de onsterfelijke levenskracht.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia dla nieśmiertelnej siły życiowej.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações à força vital eterna.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия бессмертной жизненной силе.
translations.sv: Om, hälsningar till den odödliga livskraften.
translations.th: กราบรุ่งโรจน์แด่ปราณชีวิตที่เป็นอมตะ
translations.tr: Om, ölümsüz yaşam enerjisine saygılar.
translations.uk: Ом, вітаю безсмертну життєву силу.
translations.vi: Om, kính chào nguồn sống bất diệt.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向永恒的生命力量致敬。

mantras.name: Oṃ, salutations to Śrī, to the one who embodies beauty and auspiciousness, to the one residing in the lotus, Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, be gracious, be gracious; Oṃ, salutations to Mahālakṣmī.
mantras.english: Oṃ, salutations to Śrī, to the one who embodies beauty and auspiciousness, to the one residing in the lotus, Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, be gracious, be gracious; Oṃ, salutations to Mahālakṣmī.
mantras.original: oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ kamale kamalālaye prasīda prasīda; oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ mahālakṣmayai namaḥ
mantras.transliteration: ओं, सलutations to Śrī, to the one who embodies beauty and auspiciousness, to the one residing in the lotus, Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, be gracious, be gracious; ओं, salutations to Mahālakṣmī.
mantras.background:
A Sanskrit Hindu mantra to Lakṣmī, goddess of beauty & fortune. Rooted in bhakti devotion, it invokes her lotus grace: "Oṃ, salutations to great Mahālakṣmī!"
  Grounding: Source confirms Lakshmi mantra origin, Sanskrit roots, bhakti tradition, and the literal translation matching the provided mantra phrase.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Lakshmi mantra cultivates devotion, inner abundance, and auspiciousness. Its repetitive invocation of beauty and grace is thought to orient the mind toward gratitude and prosperity, deepening one's personal bond with the divine.
mantras.tags: hindu, lakshmi, devotional, prayer, grace, auspiciousness, bhakti, invocation

translations.es: Om, saludo a Śrī, a la que encarna la belleza y la prosperidad, a la que reside en el loto. Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, sé compasiva, sé compasiva. Om, saludo a Mahālakṣmī.
translations.ar: ॐ، تحية لـ "شري"، الجليلة التي تجسد الجمال والخير، والتي تسكن في اللوتس. يا "كامالا"، يا "كامالا-لالايه"، كوني رحيمة، كوني رحيمة. ॐ، تحية لـ "ماهالَكشمي".
translations.bn: ॐ, श्री-কে प्रणाम, যিনি সৌন্দর্য ও শুভ্রতার воплощение, যিনি পদ্মের মধ্যে বাস করেন, কমল, কমল-লালয়ে, দয়া করুন, দয়া করুন; ॐ, মহালক্ষ্মী-কে प्रणाम।
translations.de: Om, Verehrung für Śrī, diejenige, die Schönheit und Glück verkörpert, die in der Lotusblume wohnt. Kamala, Kamala-lalaye (eine Anredeform, die Zärtlichkeit und Hingabe ausdrückt), sei gnädig, sei gnädig. Om, Verehrung für Mahālakṣmī.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, salutations to Śrī, the embodiment of beauty and auspiciousness, the one residing in the lotus, Kamala. O Kamala-lalaye, be gracious, be gracious. Oṃ, salutations to Mahālakṣmī.
translations.en-gb: Om, salutations to Śrī, to the one who embodies beauty and auspiciousness, to the one who resides in the lotus, Kamala. Kamala-lalaye, be gracious, be gracious. Om, salutations to Mahālakṣmī.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations à Śrī, à Celle qui incarne la beauté et l'auspice, à Celle qui réside dans le lotus, Kamala. Kamala-lalaye, sois bienveillante, sois bienveillante. Ôm, salutations à Mahālakṣmī.
translations.he: אום, שבחים לשריי, לזו המגלמת יופי ומזל, זו השוכנת בתוך הפרח, קמאלה, קמאלה-ללייה, היה רחום, היה רחום; אום, שבחים למאהאלקשמי.
translations.hi: ॐ, श्री को नमस्कार, जो सौंदर्य और शुभता का प्रतीक है, जो कमल में विराजमान है, कमला, कमला-लालये, कृपया करें, कृपया करें; ॐ, महालक्ष्मी को नमस्कार।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Sri, kepada Yang Maha Indah dan Pembawa Keberuntungan, yang bersemayam di dalam bunga teratai. Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, limpahkanlah rahmat-Mu, limpahkanlah rahmat-Mu; Om, salam kepada Mahālakṣmī.
translations.it: Om, saluto a Śrī, a colui che incarna la bellezza e l'auspicio, a colui che risiede nel loto. Kamala, o कमल-लले (Kamala-lalaye), sii benigna, sii benigna. Om, saluto a Mahālakṣmī.
translations.ja: オーム、美と吉祥を体現し、蓮華に宿るシリーへ、そしてカーマラー、カーマラー・ララヤへ、恵みを賜れ、恵みを賜れ。オーム、マハーラクシュミーへ礼拝します。
translations.ko: 옴, 아름다움과 행복을 구현하시는 프리(Śrī)께, 연꽃 속에 거하시는 분께 경의를 표합니다. 카말라(Kamala), 카말라-랄라야(Kamala-lalaye), 자비로우시길, 자비로우시길; 옴, 마하락슈미(Mahālakṣmī)께 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Om, gebeden aan Śrī, aan Hem/Haar die de belichaming is van schoonheid en voorspoed, aan Hem/Haar die in de lotus woont. Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, wees genadig, wees genadig. Om, gebeden aan Mahālakṣmī.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia Śri, tej, która uosabia piękno i dobroć, tej, która mieszka w lotosie, Kamal, Kamalalaye, bądź łaskawa, bądź łaskawa; Om, pozdrowienia Mahalakshmi.
translations.pt-br: Om, saudações a Śrī, àquela que personifica a beleza e a prosperidade, à que reside no lótus, Kamala. Kamala-lalaye, seja graciosa, seja graciosa. Om, saudações a Mahālakṣmī.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствия Шри, воплощению красоты и благословения, обитательнице лотоса. Камала, Камала-ла́йе, будь милостива, будь милостива. Ом, приветствия Махалакшми.
translations.sv: Om, vördnad för Shri, den som förkroppsligar skönhet och välvilja, den som bor i lotusblomman. Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, var nådig, var nådig. Om, vördnad för Mahālakṣmī.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาแด่พระศรี ที่ซึ่งเป็นตัวแทนแห่งความงามและความเป็นมงคล ผู้ซึ่งสถิตอยู่ในบัว, กามะลา, กามะลา-ลาเย, ขอความกรุณา, ขอความกรุณา; ขอความเมตตาแด่พระมหาลักษมี
translations.tr: Ōm, Shri'ye selam olsun, güzelliği ve uğuru temsil edene, lotus çiçeğinde bulunan olana. Kamala, Kamala-lalaye, lütuf göster, lütuf göster; Ōm, Mahālakṣmī'ye selam olsun.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствия Шри, воплощению красоты и благословения, обитательнице лотоса. Камала, Камала-ла́йе, будь милостива, будь милостива. Ом, приветствия Махалакшми.
translations.vi: Ôm, lời tôn kính dâng lên Śrī, Người hiện thân của vẻ đẹp và sự may mắn, Người ngự trong đóa sen, Kamala, Lời cầu xin Kamala-lalaya, xin Người ban phước, xin Người ban phước; Ôm, lời tôn kính dâng lên Mahālakṣmī.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，向吉祥之母（Śrī）致敬，她是美丽和吉祥的化身，居住在莲花之中。卡玛拉（Kamala），卡玛拉-拉亚耶（Kamala-lalaye），请您赐予恩典，请您赐予恩典。嗡，向伟大的吉祥女神（Mahālakṣmī）致敬。

mantras.name: Oṃ, salutations to Śukra.
mantras.english: Oṃ, salutations to Śukra.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, saṁskāraḥ śukrāya.
mantras.background: "Oṃ" — the sacred universal sound — opens this salutation to Śukra, literally meaning "Oṃ, salutations to Śukra." This concise invocation draws the devoted seeker into direct address.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Śukra—the Venus deity of Vedic tradition—this mantra is said to awaken beauty, love, and creative abundance. Practitioners seek harmony in relationships and refined aesthetic sensibility through devoted recitation.
mantras.tags: hindu, sukra, devotional, invocation, vedic, salutation

translations.es: Om, saludo a Śukra.
translations.ar: "أوم، التحية لـ "شُكْرا".
translations.bn: ওঁ, শুক্র গ্রহের প্রতি প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, ich vernehme Śukra mit Respekt.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, salutations to Śukra.
translations.en-gb: "Om, salutations to Shukra."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, salutations à Śukra.
translations.he: אום, ברכות לשוקרה.
translations.hi: ॐ, शुक्र देव को नमस्कार।
translations.id: Om, salam kepada Śukra.
translations.it: Oṃ, saluto a Śukra.
translations.ja: オーム、シュクラ神への礼賛。
translations.ko: 옴, 슈크라에게 경의를 표합니다. (Om, Shukra에게 경의를 표합니다.)
translations.nl: Om, ik groet Śukra.
translations.pl: Oṁ, pozdrowienia dla Shukry.
translations.pt-br: Om, saúdo a Śukra.
translations.ru: Ом, приветствую Шукра.
