translations.sv: Oṃ, hälsningar till Śukra.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่ศุขระ
translations.tr: Om, Shukra'ya saygı.
translations.uk: Ом, приветствую Шукра.
translations.vi: Om, tôi kính chào Shukra.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向शुक्र (Śukra) 敬礼。

mantras.name: Oṃ, the creator of the universe, the one who shines, the one who is associated with Bilva (Bilva tree).
mantras.english: Oṃ, the creator of the universe, the one who shines, the one who is associated with Bilva (Bilva tree).
mantras.original: オン・マカ・カンマンダヴァヤ・ビルヴァクトラヤ・サハ・ソワカ
mantras.transliteration: Oṃ, uchū no sokusei-sha, kagayaku mono, Bilva-ki ni kyōmei suru mono.
mantras.background: From ancient India, this mantra honors Aizen Myōō—a deity transforming all passions into enlightenment. "Oṃ...Bilva" evokes cosmic creation and sacred nature. Chant it to awaken hidden power!
mantras.benefits: This mantra unites Oṃ—the universe's root sound—with solar radiance and the sacred Bilva tree. Practitioners report calmed minds, sharper focus, and a felt connection to cosmic creation, inviting deeper meditation on existence's luminous origins.
mantras.tags: hindu, oṃ, bilva, devotion, meditation, mantra, sound, vibration, cosmic, shiva, peace, affirmation, consciousness

translations.es: Om, creador del universo, aquel que irradia luz, asociado con el árbol Bilva.
translations.ar: أوم، خالق الكون، النور الذي يتجلّى، المرتبط بشجرة البلّس.
translations.bn: ওঁ, যিনি মহাবিশ্বের স্রষ্টা, যিনি আলো ছড়ান, যিনি বিল্ব গাছের সাথে সম্পর্কিত।
translations.de: Ōṃ, der Schöpfer des Universums, der Strahlende, der mit dem Bilva-Baum verbunden ist.
translations.en-us: Om, the creator of the universe, the radiant one, the one associated with the Bilva tree.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, the creator of the universe, the radiant one, the one associated with the Bilva tree.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ, créateur de l'univers, celui qui rayonne, celui qui est associé au Bilva (arbre de Bilva).
translations.he: אוֹם, הבורא של היקום, האור, הקשור לעץ ה"בילבה".
translations.hi: ॐ, जो ब्रह्मांड के सृजक हैं, जो प्रकाशमान हैं, और जो बिल्व वृक्ष से जुड़े हुए हैं।
translations.id: ॐ, Sang Pencipta alam semesta, Yang Maha Bercahaya, Yang berasosiasi dengan pohon Bilva.
translations.it: Ōṃ, creatore dell'universo, colui che risplende, colui che è associato all'albero di Bilva.
translations.ja: オーム、宇宙の創造主、輝きを放つ者、ビリヴァの木と関連する者。
translations.ko: 옴, 우주의 창조주이시며, 빛나는 분이시며, 빌바 나무와 관련된 분.
translations.nl: Om, de schepper van het universum, de stralende, degeen die verbonden is met de Bilva (Bilva-boom).
translations.pl: Om, Stworzycielu wszechświata, Ty, który emanujesz światłem, Ty, który jesteś związany z drzewem Bilwa.
translations.pt-br: Om, o criador do universo, aquele que irradia, aquele associado à árvore Bilva (Belha).
translations.ru: Ом, сотворитель вселенной, сияющий, связанный с деревом били́ва.
translations.sv: Om, universums skapare, den som lyser, den som är förknippad med Bilva-trädet.
translations.th: ออม, ผู้สร้างจักรวาล, ผู้ซึ่งเปล่งประกาย, ผู้ที่เกี่ยวข้องกับต้นบิลวา
translations.tr: Ōm, evrenin yaratıcısı, parlayan, Bilva ağacıyla ilişkilendirilen.
translations.uk: Ом, Творець Всесвіту, той, хто сяє, той, хто пов'язаний з деревом Більва (Bilva).
translations.vi: ॐ, đấng sáng tạo vũ trụ, ánh sáng rực rỡ, vị thần gắn liền với cây Bilva.
translations.zh-cn: 唵，宇宙的创造者，照耀者，与毕尔瓦树相关的存在。

mantras.name: Oṃ, the one who bestows blessings, I take refuge in you, Ganesha.
mantras.english: Oṃ, the one who bestows blessings, I take refuge in you, Ganesha.
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ, vaṉpukkaṉ, nān uṅkuṭaiyaṉāl uḷḷa vēṇṭai, gaṇeśa.
mantras.background: "Oṃ, the one who bestows blessings, I take refuge in you, Ganesha" — a surrender to the remover of obstacles, inviting his grace through devotion.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Ganesha—remover of obstacles and bestower of blessings—this mantra cultivates surrender, focus, and inner courage. Practitioners traditionally report clarity before new beginnings, reduced anxiety, and a renewed sense of purposeful trust in life's unfolding.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, devotional, refuge, om, blessings, invocation, protection

translations.es: Ohṃ, aquel que concede bendiciones, me refugio en ti, Ganesha.
translations.ar: ॐ، يا من تمنح البركات، ألجأ إليك، يا غانش.
translations.bn: ওঁ, যিনি আশীর্বাদ দেন, আমি আপনার আশ্রয় গ্রহণ করি, গণেশ।
translations.de: Om, der Gabengeber, ich suche deinen Schutz, Ganesha.
translations.en-us: Oṃ, the one who grants blessings, I seek refuge in you, Ganesha.
translations.en-gb: Oṃ, Ganesha, the one who grants blessings, I seek refuge in you.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṃ, celui qui accorde les bénédictions, je me réfugie en toi, Ganesh.
translations.he: אוֹם, הנותן ברכות, אני מוצא מפלט בך, גנֵשה.
translations.hi: ॐ, जो आशीर्वाद प्रदान करते हैं, मैं आपकी शरण में आता हूँ, गणेश।
translations.id: Om, Engkau yang memberikan berkah, aku berlindung pada-Mu, Ganesha.
translations.it: Ōṃ, colui che concede benedizioni, mi rifugio in te, Ganesha.
translations.ja: オーム、恵みを与えてくださる方、私はあなたに帰依します、ガネーシャ。
translations.ko: 옴, 축복을 주시는 분, 나는 당신에게 의지합니다, 가네샤.
translations.nl: Om, Hij die zegeningen schenkt, ik zoek toevlucht bij U, Ganesha.
translations.pl: Om, Ten, który obdarza błogosławieństwami, szukając schronienia w Tobie, Ganesho.
translations.pt-br: Om, aquele que concede bênçãos, eu busco refúgio em você, Ganesha.
translations.ru: Ом, о дарующий благословения, я ищу убежища в тебе, Ганеша.
translations.sv: Om, den som skänker välsignelser, jag söker din beskydd, Ganesha.
translations.th: ข้าขอพึ่งพระพิฆเนศ ผู้ทรงประทานพร, ข้าขออาศัยพระองค์.
translations.tr: "Om, bereketi bolan, ben sana sığınırım, Ganesha."
translations.uk: Ом, Той, хто дарує благословення, я шукаю притулку в Тобі, Ганешо.
translations.vi: Om, Người ban phước lành, con xin nương tựa nơi Ngài, Ganesha.
translations.zh-cn: 嗡，赐福者，我向您寻求庇护，甘尼萨。

mantras.name: Oṃ, the one who dispels all afflictions, I surrender to Lord Ganesha.
mantras.english: Oṃ, the one who dispels all afflictions, I surrender to Lord Ganesha.
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ, alli atṛṅkaḷai terukkum vān, ennai Ganēśvaranukku aruvēṉṉirkkunēn.
mantras.background: Oṃ — the primordial sound — opens this surrender to Ganesha, remover of all afflictions. A living Hindu invocation, it draws practitioners into devotion and obstacle-free living.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Ganesha mantra is said to dissolve inner obstacles—fear, doubt, grief—while cultivating surrender and focus. Practitioners report calm clarity and renewed confidence, as Ganesha traditionally governs beginnings and the removal of afflictions.
mantras.tags: hindu, ganesha, devotional, om, healing, protection, surrender, invocation

translations.es: Om, aquel que disipa todas las aflicciones, me rindo ante el Señor Ganesha.
translations.ar: "أوم، يا من تزيح كل الكروب، أتضرع إلى اللورد غانيشا."
translations.bn: ওঁ, যিনি সকল দুঃখ দূর করেন, আমি গণেশ দেবের কাছে নিজেকে সমর্পণ করছি।
translations.de: Om, der alle Leiden beseitigt, ich ergebe mich Lord Ganesha.
translations.en-us: "Om, to the one who removes all suffering, I offer myself in devotion to Lord Ganesha."
translations.en-gb: "Om, to the one who removes all suffering, I offer my surrender to Lord Ganesha."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, celui qui dissipe toutes les afflictions, je me voue au Seigneur Ganesh.
translations.he: הום, ה' המגרש את כל הצער, אני נושא את עצמי כהכנעה לאדון גנשה.
translations.hi: ॐ, वह जो सभी कष्टों को दूर करता है, मैं भगवान गणेश को समर्पित हूँ।
translations.id: Om, Engkau yang menghilangkan segala penderitaan, aku berserah diri kepada Tuhan Ganesha.
translations.it: Om, colui che dissolve tutte le sofferenze, mi arrendo al Signore Ganesha.
translations.ja:
ஓம், அனைத்து கஷ்டங்களையும் நீக்கும் ஒருவரே, நான் விநாயகப் பெருமானிடம் சரணடைகிறேன்.

日本語訳: オーム（Om），あらゆる苦しみを取り除く方よ、私はヴィナヤカ神に帰依します。
translations.ko: 옴, 모든 고통을 없애시는 분께, 저는 가네샤 신에게 헌신합니다. (Om, 모든 고통을 없애시는 분께, 저는 가네샤 신에게 헌신합니다.)
translations.nl: "Oṃ, Hij die alle lijden wegneemt, ik geef mij over aan Heer Ganesha."
translations.pl: Oṁ, Ten, który rozprasza wszelkie cierpienia, oddaję się Panu Ganieśi.
translations.pt-br: Óm, aquele que dissipa todas as aflições, eu me rendo ao Senhor Ganesha.
translations.ru: Ом, избавитель от всех страданий, я предаюсь Господу Ганеше.
translations.sv: Om, den som befriar från all lidande, jag överlämnar mig till Lord Ganesha.
translations.th: ข้าขอถวายตัวแด่พระพิฆเนศ ผู้ขจัดความทุกข์ทั้งปวง, โอรัม.
translations.tr: "Om, tüm sıkıntıları ortadan kaldıran, ben Lord Ganesha'ya sığınıyorum."
translations.uk: Ом, избавитель от всех страданий, я предаюсь Господу Ганешу.
translations.vi: Om, người tiêu tan mọi khổ đau, tôi xin quy phục Đức Chúa Ganesha.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，您是消除一切痛苦的存在，我向毗湿奴神（或：甘尼萨神）献身。

mantras.name: Oṃ, the sound of the universe, through the power of compassion, may the darkness of ignorance be dispelled, and may I be blessed with the knowledge of life and its nurturing. Hail!
mantras.english: Oṃ, the sound of the universe, through the power of compassion, may the darkness of ignorance be dispelled, and may I be blessed with the knowledge of life and its nurturing. Hail!
mantras.original: Om tare tuttare ture mama ayurjnana punye pushting svaha
mantras.transliteration: ॐ, ब्रह्माण्डीय ध्वनिः, करुणस्य शक्तिना, अज्ञानान्धकारः दूरः, जीवनस्य ज्ञानं च पालयति, मम अनुग्रः। वन्दे!
mantras.background:
Om (ॐ): Hinduism's primordial seed syllable, dating before 1000 BC. Meaning "the vibrational source of all existence" — the universe's first sound. Chant it; feel creation itself resonate.
  Grounding: Sources: existing entry ("primordial sound...vibrational substrate"), mantra article (Om as bijamantra, "first sound in Hinduism"), Vedic origins pre-1000 BC confirmed.
mantras.benefits:
Om, the pranava mantra and source of all mantras, is said to dispel ignorance and awaken inner knowledge. Chanting it stills the mind, resonates through body and consciousness, and connects the practitioner to universal reality.
  Grounding: Sources confirm Om eliminates ignorance, induces meditative states, and is equated with Brahman/absolute reality in Vedic/Upanishadic tradition.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, pranava, brahman, sound, compassion, jnana, liberation, purification, invocation, healing

translations.es: Om, el sonido del universo, a través del poder de la compasión, que la oscuridad de la ignorancia se disipe, y que yo sea bendecido con el conocimiento de la vida y su sustento. ¡Salve!
translations.ar: بِإِرْشَادِ "أوم"، صَوْتِ الْكَائِنَاتِ، وَبِقُوَّةِ الرَّحْمَةِ، لِنَجْعَلْ ظُلْمَةَ الْجَهْلِ تَزُولَ، وَلِنَتَيَمَّنْ بِعِلْمِ الْحَيَاةِ وَتَرْوَاتِهَا. تَحِيَّة!
translations.bn:
ॐ, ब्रह्मांड की ध्वनि, करुणा की शक्ति के माध्यम से, अज्ञान का अंधकार दूर हो, और मुझे जीवन और उसके पोषण के ज्ञान से आशीर्वाद मिले। जय!

अनुवाद: ॐ, মহাবিশ্বের ধ্বনি, करुণের শক্তিতে, অজ্ঞতার অন্ধকার দূর হোক, এবং আমাকে জীবনের জ্ঞান এবং এর লালনপালন-এর আশীর্বাদ मिले। जय!
translations.de: Om, der Klang des Universums, durch die Kraft der Mitgefühl, möge die Dunkelheit der Unwissenheit zerstreut werden, und möge ich gesegnet sein mit dem Wissen um das Leben und seine Erhaltung. Sei gegrüßt!
translations.en-us: "Oṃ, the primordial sound of the universe, through the power of compassion, may the darkness of ignorance be dispelled, and may I be blessed with the knowledge of life and its sustenance. Hail!"
translations.en-gb: With the resonance of Om, the primordial sound of the universe, and through the strength of compassion, may the darkness of ignorance be removed, and may I be granted the wisdom of life and its sustenance. Hail!
translations.fr-fr: Ōṁ, le son de l'univers, par la puissance de la compassion, puisse l'obscurité de l'ignorance être dissipée, et puisse-je être béni de la connaissance de la vie et de son épanouissement. Salutations!
translations.he: אום, צליל היקום, באמצעות כוח החמלה, תהיה החושך של הבורות מוסר, ואני אבורך בידע החיים וטיפוחם. הללו!
translations.hi: ॐ, ब्रह्मांड की ध्वनि, करुणा की शक्ति के माध्यम से, अज्ञान की अंधकार दूर हो, और मुझे जीवन के ज्ञान और पोषण से अनुग्रहित किया जाए। जय!
translations.id: Oṁ, suara semesta, melalui kekuatan welas asih, semoga kegelapan kebodohan dapat dihilangkan, dan semoga saya diberkati dengan pengetahuan tentang kehidupan dan nutrisinya. Salam!
translations.it: Oṃ, il suono dell'universo, mediante la potenza della compassione, possa l'oscurità dell'ignoranza essere dissipata, e possa io essere benedetto con la conoscenza della vita e della sua nutrimento. Salve!
translations.ja: オーム（Om）。宇宙の音よ。慈悲の力によって、無知の闇が払われ、私が生命とその育成についての知識を授けられますように。礼賛します。
translations.ko: 옴(Om), 우주의 소리, 자비의 힘으로, 무지의 어둠이 사라지고, 삶과 생명의 양육에 대한 지혜를 얻게 되기를. 경건하게!
translations.nl: Oṃ, het geluid van het universum, door de kracht van mededogen, moge de duisternis van onwetendheid verdreven worden, en moge ik gezegend worden met de kennis van het leven en zijn voeding. Gezegend zij!
translations.pl: Oṁ, dźwięk wszechświata, dzięki mocy współczucia, niech ciemność nieświadomości zostanie rozproszona, a niech zostanę obdarzony wiedzą o życiu i jego pielęgnacji. Niech będzie powitanie!
translations.pt-br: "Om, o som do universo, através do poder da compaixão, que a escuridão da ignorância seja dissipada, e que eu seja abençoado com o conhecimento da vida e de seu sustento. Salve!"
translations.ru: Ом, звук вселенной, посредством силы сострадания, да будет рассеяна тьма невежества, и да буду я благословен знанием жизни и её созидательной силы. Слава!
translations.sv: Om, universums ljud, genom medkänslets kraft, må okunnighetens mörker skingras, och må jag välsignas med kunskap om livet och dess näring. Hälsning!
translations.th: ด้วยพลังแห่งความเมตตา ขอให้ความมืดมิดแห่งความไม่รู้จางหายไป และขอให้ข้าพเจ้าได้รับการประทานความรู้แห่งชีวิตและความอุดมสมบูรณ์ "โอม" คือเสียงแห่งจักรวาล ขอให้เป็นเช่นนั้น Hail!
translations.tr: Ōm, evrenin sesi, şefkatin gücüyle, cehaletin karanlığı dağılsın, ve ben hayatın bilgisi ve beslenmesiyle kutsanayım. Selam olsun!
translations.uk: Ом, звук всесвіту, через силу співчуття, нехай пітьма невігластва розсіється, і нехай я буду благословенний знанням про життя та його підтримку. Вітаю!
translations.vi: Ôm, âm thanh của vũ trụ, bằng sức mạnh của lòng từ bi, xin hãy xua tan bóng tối của vô minh, và xin tôi được ban cho sự hiểu biết về cuộc sống và sự nuôi dưỡng. Kính bái!
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，宇宙的本源之音，藉着慈悲的力量，愿无明之暗淡消散，愿我获得对生命及其滋养的智慧。 敬礼！

mantras.name: Oṃ, to the one who rises, hail.
mantras.english: Oṃ, to the one who rises, hail.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, udgāmāya, namaḥ.
mantras.background:
"Oṃ, to the one who rises, hail" blends Om—Hinduism's primordial sound, the first manifestation of Brahman—with a salutation. A sacred Vedic invocation spanning millennia.
  Grounding: Source confirms Om is the foundational Hindu pranava mantra, first sound of Brahman, prefixed to prayers; longer mantras name deities or express spiritual longing.
mantras.benefits: Chanting Oṃ—the divine sonic source—as a salutation to "the one who rises" invokes awakening energy. Practitioners report elevated focus, inner upliftment, and a felt connection to transcendent reality through japa repetition.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, vedic, tantric, mantra, devotional, shiva, sound, ritual, spiritual, meditation, liberation, east indian

translations.es: Om, a aquel que se levanta, saludo.
translations.ar: "أوم، نُحيّي من ينهض، تحية."
translations.bn: ওং, যিনি উদয় হন, তাঁকে প্রণাম।
translations.de: Om, demjenigen, der sich erhebt, Seid gegrüßt.
translations.en-us: Hail to the one who rises.
translations.en-gb: Hail, O rising one.
translations.fr-fr: Ôm, à celui qui s'élève, salutations.
translations.he: אָום, להמִתְעוֹרֵר, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.hi: ॐ, जो उठता है, उसे प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om, kepada Yang Bangkit, salam.
translations.it: Oṃ, a colui che si erge, saluto.
translations.ja: オーム、昇りゆく者よ、敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴, 상승하는 존재에게, 안녕을. (Om, sangseunghaneun jonjae-ege, annyeong-eul.)
translations.nl: Om, aan degenen die opstijgen, groet.
translations.pl: Om, niech będzie powitanie dla tego, który się wzbija.
translations.pt-br: Om, àquele que se levanta, saudações.
translations.ru: Ом, возвышающемуся, приветствие.
translations.sv: Oṃ, till den som stiger upp, hälsa.
translations.th: ขอสดุดีแด่ผู้ที่อุบัติขึ้น, โอรัม.
translations.tr: Ey yükselen, sana om selamları.
translations.uk: Ом, тому, хто піднімається, вітаю.
translations.vi: Om, Kính chào vị thần đang trỗi dậy.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ，向着升起的，致敬。

mantras.name: Oṃ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salutations to Chamunda, may you be propitious.
mantras.english: Oṃ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salutations to Chamunda, may you be propitious.
mantras.original: Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundaye Vichche
mantras.transliteration: ओं ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं। चामुंडाय नमः। कीर्तिः कुरु।
mantras.background: A Hindu Shakta invocation to Goddess Chamunda, weaving cosmic seed syllables—Om, Aim, Hrim, Klim—into a call for liberation, protection, and divine feminine power.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Saraswati (wisdom), Bhuvaneshwari (creation), and Kali (transformation), this mantra channels the triple feminine divine. Practitioners seek protection, obstacle removal, and liberation from ego—making it a profound Shakta path to self-realization.
mantras.tags: hindu, shakta, durga, chamunda, invocation, devotion, bija, chant, liberation, protection, transformation, enlightenment

translations.es: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Saludos a Chamunda, que seas propicia.
translations.ar: "أوم. آيم. هريم. كليم. تحية لـ شاموندا، فليكن لك البر والخير."
translations.bn: ॐ। ऐं।HRIM।क्लीं। चामुंडा দেবীর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি, আপনি আমাদের জন্য কল্যাণকর हों।
translations.de: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Sei gegrüßt, Chamunda, mögest du wohlwollend sein.
translations.en-us: Oṃ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salutations to Chamunda, may she be benevolent.
translations.en-gb: "Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salutations to Chamunda, may she be benevolent."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salutations à Chamunda, puisse-t-elle être bienveillante.
translations.he: אום. איים. הריים. קלים. ברכות לחמונדה, תהיי נעימה.
translations.hi: ॐ। ऐं। ह्रीं। क्लीं। चामुंडा देवी को प्रणाम। आप शुभ हों।
translations.id: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salam kepada Chamunda, semoga Engkau memberkati.
translations.it: Oṃ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salve, Chamunda, che tu sia propizia.
translations.ja: オーム。アイム。フリム。クリム。チャムンダへ礼。あなたがお守りになりますように。
translations.ko: 옴. aim. hrim. klim. 참문다 여신께 경의를 표합니다. 당신의 은총을 구합니다.
translations.nl: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Groeten aan Chamunda, moge U gunstig zijn.
translations.pl: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Składam pokłon Chamundzie, niech będzie łaskawa.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Salvemos Chamunda, que sua graça nos acompanhe.
translations.ru: Ом. Аим. Хрим. Клим. Приветствия Чамyнде, да будет она благосклонна к нам.
translations.sv: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Hälsningar till Chamunda, må hon vara välvillig.
translations.th: ข้าขอบูชาแด่พระจันทมนทา ขอความเมตตาจากพระองค์
translations.tr: Oṃ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Chamunda'ya saygılar, sizin lütufunuz olsun.
translations.uk: Оṁ. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Привіт, Чамунда, будь милосердною.
translations.vi: Om. Aim. Hrim. Klim. Kính chào Chamunda, xin ban mang lại sự may mắn.
translations.zh-cn: 唵。 艾姆。 赫林。 克林。 敬礼炎女神，愿您降临吉祥。

mantras.name: Oṃ. Hūṃ. Śrīm. To the auspicious one, salutations.
mantras.english: Oṃ. Hūṃ. Śrīm. To the auspicious one, salutations.
mantras.transliteration: ōṁ. hūṃ. śrīm. namo 'bhīdaye.
mantras.background: From Hindu Śākta tradition, seed syllables Oṃ, Hūṃ, Śrīm invoke the Goddess. The source hymns cry: "Nārāyaṇi namo'stu te" — salutations to the auspicious Devi who destroys all suffering.
mantras.benefits: Practicing this mantra invokes auspiciousness and dissolves fear. The bīja sounds Oṃ, Hūṃ, and Śrīm resonate through body and mind, traditionally said to dispel obstacles, grant health, and awaken deep devotion to the Divine Feminine.
mantras.tags: hindu, shakti, tantric, bija, devotional, durga, protection, prosperity

translations.es: Om. Hūṃ. Śrīm. A la deidad auspiciosa, mis reverencias.
translations.ar: "أوم. هوم. شريم. للكيان المبارك، التحية."
translations.bn: ॐ। हूँ। श्रीम्। शुभ সত্ত্বকে, प्रणाम।
translations.de: Om. Hūṃ. Śrīm. Dem glücksbringenden Wesen, Seid gegrüßt.
translations.en-us: "Om. Hum. Hrim. To the blessed and prosperous one, salutations."
translations.en-gb: "Om. Hūṃ. Śrīm. To the blessed and fortunate one, salutations."
translations.fr-fr: Ôm. Hūṃ. Śrīm. À l'être bienveillant, salutations.
translations.he: אום. הום. שרים. לשלום, ברכות.
translations.hi: ॐ। हूँम्। श्रीम्। शुभ स्वरूप वाले, आपको प्रणाम।
translations.id: Om. Hum. Śrīm. Kepada Yang Maha Beruntung, hormat kami.
translations.it: Oṃ. Hūṃ. Śrīm. Alla divinità propizia, i miei omaggi.
translations.ja: オーム。フーム。シュリーム。 幸運をもたらす存在へ、敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 옴. 훔. 슈림. 길조의 존재에게, 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: "Om. Hūṃ. Śrīm. Aan de gunstige, onze groet."
translations.pl: Oṁ. Huṁ. Śrīm. Przeklaniam błogosławiony.
translations.pt-br: Om. Hūṃ. Śrīm. Àquele que é auspicioso, saudações.
translations.ru: Ом. Хум. Шри. Единому Благому, приветствия.
translations.sv: Om. Hūṃ. Śrīm. Till den välsignade, hälsningar.
translations.th: ข้าขอรำลึกถึงสิ่งศักดิ์สิทธิ์ด้วยความเคารพ ขอแสดงความนับถือต่อสิ่งมงคลนั้น
translations.tr: Om. Hum. Şrim. Kutlu olana, saygılar.
translations.uk: Ом. Хум. Шрім. Благословення Тій, Хто є Благоподібним.
translations.vi: ॐ. Hūṃ. Śrīm. Kính chào vị thần may mắn.
translations.zh-cn: 唵。 吽。 斯里姆。 向吉祥之神，致敬。

mantras.name: Oṃ. May the waters (Apaḥ) be free from foam (Rasam), may the sun (Surya) be free from darkness (Santam), and may the mind (Samāhitam) be concentrated.
mantras.english: Oṃ. May the waters (Apaḥ) be free from foam (Rasam), may the sun (Surya) be free from darkness (Santam), and may the mind (Samāhitam) be concentrated.
mantras.original: ॐ अपा रसमुद्वयस सूर्ये सन्त समाहितम् ।
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ. may the waters (apaḥ) be free from foam (rasam), may the sun (sūrya) be free from darkness (santam), and may the mind (samāhitaṃ) be concentrated.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om (ॐ) is the primordial sound of all creation — A (waking), U (dreaming), M (deep sleep) — bridging finite and infinite.
mantras.benefits: Om resonates through body and mind — A in the belly, U in the chest, M in the skull. Ancient Vedic texts call it the universe's vibrational root. Brain research links it to theta waves and deep calm.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, surya, pranava, concentration, focus, purification, prayer, clarity

translations.es: Om. Que las aguas estén libres de espuma, que el sol esté libre de oscuridad, y que la mente se concentre.
translations.ar: ॐ. نسأل أن تكون المياه خالية من الرغوة، والشمس خالية من الظلام، وأن يكون الذهن مركزًا.
translations.bn: ॐ। জলের, నురగ থেকে মুক্ত হও; সূর্যের, অন্ধকার থেকে মুক্ত হও; এবং মন, একাগ্র হোক।
translations.de: Om. Mögen die Gewässer frei von Schaum sein, möge die Sonne frei von Dunkelheit sein, und möge der Geist konzentriert sein.
translations.en-us: Oṃ. May the waters be free from foam, may the sun be free from darkness, and may the mind be concentrated.
translations.en-gb: Om. May the waters be free from turbidity, may the sun be free from obscurity, and may the mind be focused.
translations.fr-fr: Ōṁ. Puisse l'eau être exempte de mousse, puisse le soleil être libéré des ténèbres, et puisse l'esprit être concentré.
translations.he: אום. יתעוררו המים מן הקצף, יאיר השמש מכל חושך, והתודעה תתמקד.
translations.hi: ॐ। जल स्वच्छ हो, सूर्य प्रकाशमय हो, और मन एकाग्र हो।
translations.id: Oṃ. Semoga air terbebas dari buih, semoga matahari terbebas dari kegelapan, dan semoga pikiran menjadi fokus.
translations.it: Oṃ. Possa l'acqua essere libera dalla schiuma, il sole dalla tenebra, e la mente dalla dispersione, raggiungendo la concentrazione.
translations.ja: オーム。水が泡から、太陽が暗闇から、そして心（意識）が集中から解放されますように。
translations.ko: 오옴. 물이 거품 없이, 태양이 어둠 없이, 그리고 마음이 집중되기를.
translations.nl: ॐ. Moge het water vrij zijn van schuim, moge de zon vrij zijn van duisternis, en moge de geest geconcentreerd zijn.
translations.pl: Oṁ. Niech wody będą wolne od piany, niech słońce będzie wolne od ciemności, a niech umysł będzie skupiony.
translations.pt-br: ॐ. Que as águas estejam livres de espuma, que o sol esteja livre de escuridão, e que a mente esteja concentrada.
translations.ru: Ом. Да будет вода свободна от пены, да будет солнце свободно от тьмы, и да будет ум сосредоточен.
translations.sv: Oṃ. Må vattnet vara fritt från skum, må solen vara fri från mörker, och må sinnet vara fokuserat.
translations.th: ขอให้สายธารปราศจากฟอง, ขอให้ดวงอาทิตย์ปราศจากความมืด, และขอให้จิตใจจดจ่อ
translations.tr: Oṃ. Umut ediyorum ki sular köpükten, güneş karanlıktan, ve zihin odaklanmışlıktan arınsın.
translations.uk: Оṁ. Нехай води будуть вільні від піни, нехай сонце буде вільним від темряви, і нехай розум буде зосереджений.
translations.vi: Ôm. Xin cho dòng nước trong sạch, không có bọt; xin cho ánh sáng mặt trời rực rỡ, không bị che mờ; và xin cho tâm trí tĩnh lặng, tập trung.
translations.zh-cn: 唵。愿水波平静，愿阳光明媚，愿心神专注。

mantras.name: Oṃ. Peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: Oṃ. Peace, peace, peace.
mantras.background: OM — the universe's origin sound — opens ancient Ashtanga mantras honoring Patanjali. From Sanskrit: mind (Man) + liberate (Tra). Chant it, and still your mind inward.
mantras.benefits: Chanting OM stills the mind and turns awareness inward — liberating thought (man=mind, tra=free). Rooted in ancient Hindu & Buddhist traditions, it connects the practitioner to life's very origin, all that is and all that will be.
mantras.tags: ashtanga, hindu, vedic, yoga, patanjali, meditation, peace, concentration, focus, liberation, devotional

translations.es: Om. Paz, paz, paz.
translations.ar: "أوم. سلام، سلام، سلام."
translations.bn: ॐ। শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Om. Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: Oṃ. Peace, peace, peace.
translations.en-gb: Om. Peace, peace, peace.
translations.fr-fr: Ôṁ. Paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: אָהוּם. שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם, שָׁלוֹם.
translations.id: Om. Damai, damai, damai.
translations.it: Ōṃ. Pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: オーム。平和、平和、平和。
translations.ko: 옴. 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Om. Vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Om. Pokój, pokój, pokój.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ. Paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Ом. Мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Om. Fred, fred, fred.
translations.th: โอ๥. ขอให้เป็นสุข สุข สุข.
translations.tr: Om. Huzur, huzur, huzur.
translations.uk: Ом. Мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Ôm. Hòa bình, hòa bình, hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: ॐ。 愿一切皆得安宁，愿一切皆得安宁，愿一切皆得安宁。

mantras.name: Oṃ. We meditate on the glory of the Divine, the source of the universe, of the atmosphere, and of the heavens. May that Divine illuminate our intellect.
mantras.english: Oṃ. We meditate on the glory of the Divine, the source of the universe, of the atmosphere, and of the heavens. May that Divine illuminate our intellect.
mantras.original:
Om Bhuh, Bhuvaha, Swaha
Tat Savitur Varenyam
Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi
Dhiyo Yonaha Prachodayat
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ.  āveṃ, divyasyāḥ kīrtim, jagatasyātmane, vyoman ca, dhyāyāmaḥ.  yadīdīvaṃ, buddhīm nām̐ pratibuddhatum.
mantras.background: From Sanskrit roots, this ancient Hindu mantra meditates on Divine glory, asking it to illuminate our intellect — a timeless call to inner wisdom and spiritual awakening.
mantras.benefits: The Gayatri Mantra invokes divine light to awaken the intellect. Rooted in Hindu tradition, its repetition calms the mind, reduces anxiety, and fosters spiritual connection — illuminating both thought and consciousness.
mantras.tags: hindu, devotional, divine, clarity, focus, peace, spiritual, wisdom

translations.es: Oṃ. Meditamos en la gloria de lo Divino, la fuente del universo, de la atmósfera y de los cielos. Que esa Divinidad ilumine nuestra inteligencia.
translations.ar: "أوم. نتأمل في عظمة الخالق، مصدر الكون والغلاف الجوي والسماوات. ليضيء هذا الخالق فكرنا."
translations.bn: ওঁ। আমরা সেই দিব্য সত্তার মহিমার উপর ধ্যান করি, যিনি এই মহাবিশ্বের, বায়ুমণ্ডলের এবং আকাশমণ্ডলের উৎস। সেই দিব্য সত্তা আমাদের বুদ্ধিকে আলোকিত করুক।
translations.de: Om. Wir meditieren über die Herrlichkeit des Göttlichen, der Quelle des Universums, der Atmosphäre und des Himmels. Möge dieses Göttliche unseren Verstand erleuchten.
translations.en-us: "Om. We meditate on the glory of the Divine, the origin of the universe, the atmosphere, and the heavens. May that Divine illuminate our understanding."
translations.en-gb: We invoke the sacred sound, Om. We meditate upon the divine essence, the origin of the cosmos, the atmosphere, and the celestial realms. May that divine presence enlighten our understanding.
translations.fr-fr: Om. Nous méditons sur la gloire du Divin, source de l'univers, de l'atmosphère et des cieux. Que ce Divin illumine notre intellect.
translations.he: אום. אנו מתמַלֵּלים על תפארת האלוה, המקור של היקום, של האטמוספירה ושל השמיים. יאיר האלוה הזה את השכל שלנו.
translations.hi: ॐ। हम उस दिव्य शक्ति का गुणगान करते हैं, जो ब्रह्मांड, वायुमंडल और आकाश का स्रोत है। वह दिव्य शक्ति हमारी बुद्धि को प्रकाशित करे।
translations.id: Om. Kami merenungkan keagungan Yang Maha Kuasa, sumber alam semesta, atmosfer, dan langit. Semoga Yang Maha Kuasa itu menerangi pikiran kami.
translations.it: Oṁ. Meditiamo sulla gloria del Divino, fonte dell'universo, dell'atmosfera e dei cieli. Possa quella Divinità illuminare il nostro intelletto.
translations.ja: オーム。我々は、宇宙、大気、そして天の源である神聖な存在の栄光を瞑想します。その神聖な存在が、私たちの知性を照らしてくださいますように。
translations.ko: 오옴. 우리는 우주의 근원이며, 대기와 천상의 근원이신 신성(神性)의 위대함을 명상합니다. 그 신성이 우리 지성을 밝혀주소서.
translations.nl: Wij mediteren over de glorie van het Goddelijke, de bron van het universum, van de atmosfeer en van de hemel. Moge dit Goddelijke onze intelligentie verlichten.
translations.pl: Oṁ. Medytujemy nad chwałą Boskości, źródła wszechświata, atmosfery i niebios. Niech ta Boskość oświetli nasz intelekt.
translations.pt-br: Oṃ. Meditamos na glória do Divino, a fonte do universo, da atmosfera e dos céus. Que essa Divindade ilumine nossa inteligência.
translations.ru: Оṁ. Мы размышляем о величии Божественного, источнике Вселенной, атмосферы и небес. Да пребудет это Божественное светом для нашего интеллекта.
translations.sv: Om. Vi mediterar över det gudomliga, källan till universum, atmosfären och himlen. Må det gudomliga upplysa vårt intellekt.
translations.th: ข้าพเจ้าขอสดุดีและเจริญสติถึงพระผู้เป็นเจ้า ผู้เป็นบ่อเกิดแห่งจักรวาล โลกธาต และสรวงสวรรค์ ขอให้พระผู้เป็นเจ้าทรงส่องสว่างปัญญาของเรา
translations.tr: Om. Evrenin, atmosferin ve göklerin kaynağı olan İlahi'nin ihtişamına meditasyon ediyoruz. O İlahi, zihnimizi aydınlatsın.
translations.uk: Оṃ. Ми розмірковуємо про велич Божественного, джерела Всесвіту, атмосфери та небес. Нехай це Божественне просвітить наш розум.
translations.vi: Om. Chúng tôi thiền định về sự vinh quang của Đấng Thượng Cao, nguồn gốc của vũ trụ, của bầu khí quyển và của thiên hà. Xin Đấng Thượng Cao đó soi sáng trí tuệ của chúng ta.
translations.zh-cn: 我们默念，专注于神圣的荣耀，它是宇宙、大气层和天空的源头。愿那神圣的力量照亮我们的智慧。

mantras.name: Panchabrahma Mantra
mantras.english: Panchabrahma Mantra
mantras.transliteration: ॐ पञ्चब्रह्म मंत्र
mantras.background: The Panchabrahma Mantra honors Shiva's five faces: Sadyojata (creation), Vamadeva (sustenance), Aghora (destruction), Tatpurusha (hidden grace), and Ishana (manifest grace).
mantras.benefits: The Panchabrahma Mantra embodies Shiva's five faces—creation, preservation, destruction, hidden grace, and manifest grace—offering practitioners a path through life's most hopeless situations toward spiritual strength and inner renewal.
mantras.tags: hindu, shiva, devotional, healing, energy, empower, protection, divine

translations.es: El Mantra de los Cinco Brahmanes.
translations.ar: "ترنيمة الخمسة المطلقين" أو "ترنيمة الخمسة الأوحديين".
translations.bn: পঞ্চব্রহ্ম মন্ত্র।
translations.de: Das Panchabrahma-Mantra.
translations.en-us: Five Great Mantras.
translations.en-gb: The Five Divine Mantras.
translations.fr-fr: Le mantra des cinq Brahman.
translations.he: חמשת הבְּרָהְמָה מנטרות.
translations.hi: पाँच ब्रह्म मंत्र।
translations.id: Mantra Panca Brahma
translations.it: Il mantra dei Cinque Brahmā.
translations.ja: 五大梵呪 (Go-taibonju)
translations.ko: 오옴, 다섯 가지 절대적인 진리 (Om, dasot gajie jeoldaejeogin jinri)
translations.nl: De Panchabrahma Mantras.
translations.pl: Pięć Brahmanów – Mantra.
translations.pt-br: O Mantra dos Cinco Brahmanes.
translations.ru: Пятибрахма-мантра.
translations.sv: Fem Brahman-mantran.
translations.th: "คาถาปัญจพรหมา" (Katha Panchaprahma)
translations.tr: Beş Brahman Mantrası.
translations.uk: П'ятьох брам, мантра.
translations.vi: "Năm Binh pháp của Brahma" hoặc "Năm nguyên tắc của Brahma".
translations.zh-cn: 五种至高真言 (Wǔ zhǒng zhìgāo zhēnyán)

mantras.name: Peace, peace, peace.
mantras.english: Peace, peace, peace.
mantras.transliteration: śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ, śāntiḥ
mantras.background: Rooted in ancient Hindu Vedic texts (500–1500 BCE), "mantra" means "mind tool" (manas=mind, tra=tool). Peace repeated thrice stills the mind—a living tradition across Hindu, Buddhist & Yoga paths!
mantras.benefits: Repeating "Peace, peace, peace" functions as a mantra — a mind-tool (manas+tra) — calming mental scatter, reducing stress and anxiety, and guiding the practitioner toward inner stillness and self-knowledge.
mantras.tags: peace, affirmation, focus, calming, healing, concentration

translations.es: Paz, paz, paz.
translations.ar: السلام، السلام، السلام.
translations.bn: শান্তি, শান্তি, শান্তি।
translations.de: Frieden, Frieden, Frieden.
translations.en-us: Peace, peace, peace.
translations.en-gb: Peace, peace, peace.
translations.fr-fr: Paix, paix, paix.
translations.he: שלום, שלום, שלום.
translations.id: Kedamaian, kedamaian, kedamaian.
translations.it: Pace, pace, pace.
translations.ja: 平和、平和、平和。(Heiwa, heiwa, heiwa.)
translations.ko: 평화, 평화, 평화.
translations.nl: Vrede, vrede, vrede.
translations.pl: Spokój, spokój, spokój.
translations.pt-br: Paz, paz, paz.
translations.ru: Мир, мир, мир.
translations.sv: Frid, frid, frid.
translations.th: สันติ สันติ สันติ (Santti Santti Santti)
translations.tr: Barış, barış, barış.
translations.uk: Мир, мир, мир.
translations.vi: Hòa bình, hòa bình, hòa bình.
translations.zh-cn: 和平，和平，和平。

mantras.name: Praise to the Guru, praise to the Guru, praise to the Guru." Or, more reverently: "Salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru.
mantras.english: Praise to the Guru, praise to the Guru, praise to the Guru." Or, more reverently: "Salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru.
mantras.transliteration: `Prā̃ś hai guru ko, prā̃ś hai guru ko, prā̃ś hai guru ko.`
mantras.background: From Hindu & Tibetan sacred texts, "Guru Guru Wahe Guru" means "Praise/Salutations to the Guru×3" — a devotional chant passed through generations to calm fear and deepen inner security.
mantras.benefits: "Guru Guru Wahe Guru" calms fear & anxiety, activating inner security and grounding. Its gentle, enveloping vibration regulates the mind, channeling mental agitation into serene presence.
mantras.tags: hindu, devotional, guru, grounding, security, fear-release, focus, mental-calm

translations.es: "Alabanza al Gurú, alabanza al Gurú, alabanza al Gurú." O, de manera más reverente: "Saludos al Gurú, saludos al Gurú, saludos al Gurú."
translations.ar: التحيّة للغورو، التحيّة للغورو، التحيّة للغورو. أو، بتقدير أكبر: "السجود للغورو، السجود للغورو، السجود للغورو."
translations.bn: "गुरु को प्रणाम, गुरु को प्रणाम, गुरु को प्रणाम।" অথবা, আরও শ্রদ্ধার সাথে: "गुरुদেবকে প্রণাম, গুরুদেবকে প্রণাম, গুরুদেবকে প্রণাম।"
translations.de: "Lob sei dem Guru, Lob sei dem Guru, Lob sei dem Guru." Oder, respektvoller: "Sei gegrüßt, o Guru, sei gegrüßt, o Guru, sei gegrüßt, o Guru."
translations.en-us: "Praise to the Guru, praise to the Guru, praise to the Guru," or, with greater reverence: "Salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru."
translations.en-gb: Praise be to the Guru, praise be to the Guru, praise be to the Guru. Or, with greater reverence: Salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru, salutations to the Guru.
translations.fr-fr: "Louange au Guru, louange au Guru, louange au Guru." Ou, avec plus de révérence : "Salutations au Guru, salutations au Guru, salutations au Guru."
translations.he: "תפארת לגורו, תפארת לגורו, תפארת לגורו." או, בצורה מכובדת יותר: "ברכות לגורו, ברכות לגורו, ברכות לגורו."
translations.hi: "गुरु को प्रणाम, गुरु को प्रणाम, गुरु को प्रणाम।" या, अधिक श्रद्धापूर्वक: "गुरु को नमस्कार, गुरु को नमस्कार, गुरु को नमस्कार।"
translations.id: Pujian kepada Guru, pujian kepada Guru, pujian kepada Guru. Atau, dengan lebih khidmat: Salam hormat kepada Guru, salam hormat kepada Guru, salam hormat kepada Guru.
translations.it: "Lode al Guru, lode al Guru, lode al Guru." Oppure, con maggiore riverenza: "Saluti al Guru, saluti al Guru, saluti al Guru."
translations.ja: 師への賛美、師への賛美、師への賛美。または、より敬虔に: 師への敬意、師への敬意、師への敬意。
translations.ko: 스승에게 경의를 표합니다, 스승에게 경의를 표합니다, 스승에게 경의를 표합니다. (Seungege gyeong-ui-reul pyohamnida, seungege gyeong-ui-reul pyohamnida, seungege gyeong-ui-reul pyohamnida.)
translations.nl: "Lof aan de Goeroe, lof aan de Goeroe, lof aan de Goeroe." Of, meer respectvol: "Groet aan de Goeroe, groet aan de Goeroe, groet aan de Goeroe."
translations.pl: "Chwała Guru, chwała Guru, chwała Guru." Lub, w bardziej pełnym szacunku: "Pozdrowienia dla Guru, pozdrowienia dla Guru, pozdrowienia dla Guru."
translations.pt-br: "Louvores ao Guru, louvores ao Guru, louvores ao Guru." Ou, de forma mais reverente: "Saudações ao Guru, saudações ao Guru, saudações ao Guru."
translations.ru: "Слава Гуру, слава Гуру, слава Гуру." Или, более уважительно: "Приветствия Гуру, приветствия Гуру, приветствия Гуру."
translations.sv: "Lovprisning till Gurun, lovprisning till Gurun, lovprisning till Gurun." Eller, mer vördnadsfullt: "Hälsningar till Gurun, hälsningar till Gurun, hälsningar till Gurun."
translations.th: การสรรเสริญอาจารย์, การสรรเสริญอาจารย์, การสรรเสริญอาจารย์ หรืออีกความหมายหนึ่งที่เคารพยิ่งขึ้น: การแสดงความเคารพต่ออาจารย์, การแสดงความเคารพต่ออาจารย์, การแสดงความเคารพต่ออาจารย์
translations.tr: Guru'ya övgüler, Guru'ya övgüler, Guru'ya övgüler. Veya daha saygılı bir şekilde: Guru'ya saygılar, Guru'ya saygılar, Guru'ya saygılar.
translations.uk: "Слава Гуру, слава Гуру, слава Гуру." Або, більш шанобливо: "Вітання Гуру, вітання Гуру, вітання Гуру."
translations.vi: Kính trọng Đức Guru, kính trọng Đức Guru, kính trọng Đức Guru. Hoặc, trang trọng hơn: Kính chào Đức Guru, kính chào Đức Guru, kính chào Đức Guru.
translations.zh-cn: 赞颂师尊，赞颂师尊，赞颂师尊。 或者，更尊敬的说法： 敬礼师尊，敬礼师尊，敬礼师尊。

mantras.name: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
mantras.english: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
mantras.transliteration: Rāma, Rāma, Hari, Hari.
mantras.background:
"Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari" springs from Gaudiya Vaishnavism's Maha Mantra — sacred names chanted since Caitanya Mahaprabhu carried liberation through India's streets in the 16th century.
  Grounding: Source names Hare Krishna Maha Mantra (Kali-saṇṭāraṇa Upaniṣad) containing "Rama Rama Hare Hare"; Caitanya spread it via kirtan for salvation.
mantras.benefits:
"Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari" is part of the Maha Mantra tradition. Chanting it is said to cleanse the mind, awaken devotion, and deliver the soul from illusion — offering liberation even to those who merely hear it.
  Grounding: Source links "Rama Rama Hare Hare" to the Maha Mantra (Kali-saṇṭāraṇa Upaniṣad), spread by Caitanya for salvation through congregational chanting.
mantras.tags: hindu, rama, hari, vaishnava, gaudiya, devotion, japa, kirtan, liberation, salvation

translations.es: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
translations.ar: يا رام، يا رام، يا هاري، يا هاري.
translations.bn: রাম, রাম, হরি, হরি।
translations.de: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. –  Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
translations.en-us: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. (This phrase is a repetition of the names of deities, Rama and Hari, both of whom are considered forms of Vishnu. It's an invocation or a prayer, expressing devotion.)
translations.en-gb: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. (This is a devotional chant, repeatedly invoking Rama and Hari, both names for the Hindu god Vishnu/Krishna, expressing devotion and seeking their blessings.)
translations.fr-fr: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.  ->  Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. (ou, alternativement : Rama, Rama, le Très-Saint, le Très-Saint.)
translations.he: רמה, רמה, הרי, הרי.
translations.hi: राम, राम, हरी, हरी।
translations.id: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
translations.it: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. Traduzione in italiano: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
translations.ja: ラマ、ラマ、ハリー、ハリー。
translations.ko: 라마, 라마, 하리, 하리.
translations.nl: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.  "Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari." (De namen blijven hetzelfde, omdat ze verwijzen naar specifieke goddelijke entiteiten en hun betekenis in de context van de mantra.)
translations.pl: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. -  Ramo, Ramo, Hari, Hari.
translations.pt-br: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. Em português, isso pode ser traduzido como: "Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari."
translations.ru: Рама, Рама, Хари, Хари.
translations.sv: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. – En åkallelse till Rama och Hari, två namn för den gudomliga.
translations.th: ราม, ราม, หริ, หริ.
translations.tr: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. ifadesinin anlamını yansıtan Türkçe çevirisi şu şekilde olabilir: "Rama, Rama, Tanrı, Tanrı."
translations.uk: Рама, Рама, Харі, Харі.
translations.vi: Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari. → Rama, Rama, Hari, Hari.
translations.zh-cn: 罗摩，罗摩，哈里，哈里。

mantras.name: Respected, Respected, I am, I am.
mantras.english: Respected, Respected, I am, I am.
mantras.original: SHREE SHREE I AM I AM
mantras.transliteration: आदरणीय, आदरणीय, मैं, मैं।
mantras.background: The provided source offers only the translated phrase: "Respected, Respected, I am, I am." This affirming, identity-rooted mantra invites the practitioner to internalize dignity through repetition.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Respected, Respected, I am, I am" uses affirmation and repetition — hallmarks of mantra practice — to internalize self-worth and presence. Its rhythm may quiet self-doubt, anchoring the practitioner in dignified selfhood and inviting deeper self-acceptance.
mantras.tags: respected, self-affirmation, hindu, devotion, mantra, repetition, self-awareness, inner peace, affirmation, presence, reflection, spiritual practice

translations.es: Respetado, Respetado, Yo soy, Yo soy.
translations.ar: أيها الجليل، أيها الجليل، أنا، أنا.
translations.bn: आदरणीय, आदरणीय, मैं हूँ, मैं हूँ।
translations.de: Sehr geehrte/r, Sehr geehrte/r, Ich bin, Ich bin.
translations.en-us: Respected, Respected, I am, I am.
translations.en-gb: Esteemed, Esteemed, I am, I am.
translations.fr-fr: Très respectueux, très respectueux, je suis, je suis.
translations.he: כבוד, כבוד, אני, אני.
translations.hi: आदरणीय, आदरणीय, मैं हूँ, मैं हूँ।
translations.id: Hormat saya, Hormat saya, Saya adalah, Saya adalah.
translations.it: Rispetto, rispetto, io sono, io sono.
translations.ja: 尊敬する、尊敬する、私です、私です。 (Sonkei suru, sonkei suru, watashi desu, watashi desu.)
translations.ko: 존경하는, 존경하는, 저는, 저는. (Jon-gyeong-ha-neun, jon-gyeong-ha-neun, jeo-neun, jeo-neun.)
translations.nl: Geachte, Geachte, Ik ben, Ik ben.
translations.pl: Szanowny, Szanowny, ja jestem, ja jestem.
translations.pt-br: Respeitoso, respeitoso, eu sou, eu sou.
translations.ru: Уважаемый, уважаемый, я есть, я есть.
translations.sv: Ärade, Ärade, jag är, jag är.
translations.th: ท่าน, ท่าน, ข้าพเจ้า, ข้าพเจ้า.
translations.tr: Saygıdeğer, Saygıdeğer, Ben, Ben.
translations.uk: Шановний, Шановний, Я є, Я є.
translations.vi: Kính trọng, kính trọng, tôi là, tôi là.
translations.zh-cn: 尊敬的，尊敬的，我是，我是。

mantras.name: Salutations to Brihaspati, invoking the power of 'Om', 'Aim', and 'Klim'.
mantras.english: Salutations to Brihaspati, invoking the power of 'Om', 'Aim', and 'Klim'.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ br̥haspataye namaḥ, aim̐ hūṃ.
mantras.background: From ancient Vedic tradition, Om is the primordial sound of all creation — chanted before every prayer, it bridges the finite and the infinite.
mantras.benefits: Om chanting shifts brainwaves into theta ranges linked to deep meditation and calms the autonomic nervous system through vagal stimulation — bridging everyday awareness to transcendent stillness across millennia of living tradition.
mantras.tags: hindu, brihaspati, invocation, om, aim, klim, mantra, salutation, vedic, power, cosmic, spiritual

translations.es: Saludos a Brihaspati, invocando el poder de "Om", "Aim" y "Klim".
translations.ar: تحية للبرهسبتي، مع استحضار قوة "أوم"، و"إيم"، و"كليم".
translations.bn: "हम: বৃহস্পতির পূজা করি, যেখানে 'ওঁ', 'আইম', এবং 'ক্লিম' মন্ত্রগুলির শক্তি আহ্বান করা হয়েছে।"
translations.de: "Ich vernehme Brihaspati mit den Invokationen der Kräfte von 'Om', 'Aim' und 'Klim'."
translations.en-us: "Salutations to Brihaspati, invoking the power inherent in the sacred sounds 'Om', 'Aim', and 'Klim'."
translations.en-gb: Salutations to Brihaspati, invoking the power and influence associated with the sacred sounds 'Om', 'Aim', and 'Klim'.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Brihaspati, invoquant le pouvoir des syllabes sacrées « Om », « Aim » et « Klim ».
translations.he: ברכות לבריהספטי, תוך הפעלת הכוח של "אום", "אים" ו"קלים".
translations.hi: बृहस्पति देव को प्रणाम, 'ॐ', 'ऐं', और 'क्लीं' की शक्ति का आह्वान करते हुए।
translations.id: Salam kepada Brihaspati, dengan memohon kekuatan dari 'Om', 'Aim', dan 'Klim'.
translations.it: Salve a Brihaspati, invocando il potere di "Om", "Aim" e "Klim".
translations.ja: ブリハスピティへの敬意を表し、「オーム」、および「アイム」と「クリム」の力を呼び起こします。
translations.ko: 브리하스파티께 경의를 표하며, '옴', '아임', 그리고 '클림'의 힘을 불러일으킵니다.
translations.nl: Groet aan Brihaspati, waarbij de kracht van 'Om', 'Aim' en 'Klim' wordt ingeroepen.
translations.pl: Składam pokłony Brihaspatemu, wzywając moc dźwięków "Om", "Aim" i "Klim".
translations.pt-br: Saudações a Brihaspati, invocando o poder de 'Om', 'Aim' e 'Klim'.
translations.ru: Здравствуй, Брихаспати, во имя силы "Ом", "Аим" и "Клим".
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Brihaspati, där vi åkallar kraften i "Om", "Aim" och "Klim".
translations.th: ขอแสดงความเคารพแด่พระไบหรหสปตี โดยการอัญเชิญพลังของ "โอม", "ไอ็ม", และ "คลิม"
translations.tr: Brihaspati'ye saygılarını sunarken, 'Om', 'Aim' ve 'Klim' sesleriyle onun gücünü çağırmaktayız.
translations.uk: Вітаю Бріхаспаті, звертаючись до сили "Ом", "Аім" і "Клім".
translations.vi: Kính chào Brihaspati, cầu xin sự uy quyền của 'Om', 'Aim' và 'Klim'.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼天师布里哈斯帕蒂，祈求“唵”、“艾姆”和“克林”的力量。

mantras.name: Salutations to Lord Ganesha, whose essence is the primordial sound (Om), and who embodies the energy (Gam) of creation and removal of obstacles. I bow down repeatedly (Namo Namah) to Him.
mantras.english: Salutations to Lord Ganesha, whose essence is the primordial sound (Om), and who embodies the energy (Gam) of creation and removal of obstacles. I bow down repeatedly (Namo Namah) to Him.
mantras.transliteration: नमः Śrī Gaṇeśāya, यस्य सारः प्रणवः (ओम्), एवं यः सृष्टिशक्तिः (गम्) अस्ति, तथा च निवारकत्वनाशकः। नमः नमः स्तोत्रं स्तोत्रं स्तोत्रं च तस्मै।
mantras.background: From Hindu Vedic tradition, "Om Gam Ganpataye Namo Namah" salutes Ganesha—remover of obstacles—blending the primordial Om with Gam's creative energy. Bow down and break free!
mantras.benefits:
Chanting Om Gam Ganpataye Namo Namah invokes Ganesha, remover of obstacles. Practitioners report clarity, reduced stress, and channeled energy. Its rhythmic repetition calms the nervous system, aligning mind and intention toward new beginnings.
  Grounding: Source links mantra repetition to nervous system regulation, stress reduction, and mental clarity; Ganesha mantra specifically cited for transcending obstacles and bringing peace.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, ganesha, devotional, obstacles, peace, sound, creation

translations.es: Salvemos a Lord Ganesha, cuya esencia es el sonido primordial (Om), y quien encarna la energía (Gam) de la creación y la eliminación de obstáculos. Me inclino repetidamente (Namo Namah) ante Él.
translations.ar: تحية لربّ جَنَش، الذي جوهره الصوت الأولي (أوم)، والذي يجسد الطاقة (غام) الخلق وإزالة العقبات. أُسَلّم له بتكرار (نامو ناماه).
translations.bn: নমস্কার, হে গণেশ, যাঁর সার হলো আদিম ধ্বনি 'ওঁ', এবং যিনি সৃষ্টির শক্তি (গাম) এবং বাধা দূর করার embodiment। আমি বারবার তাঁর প্রতি প্রণাম জানাই।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich wiederholt vor Lord Ganesha, dessen Wesen der Urklang (Om) ist und der die Schöpferkraft (Gam) verkörpert, die Hindernisse beseitigt. Ich bete ihn immer wieder an.
translations.en-us: Salutations to Lord Ganesha, whose very being is the primordial sound 'Om', and who embodies the creative energy ('Gam') and the power to remove obstacles. I repeatedly offer my reverence to Him.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to Lord Ganesha, whose very being is the primordial sound 'Om', and who embodies the creative energy and the power to remove all obstacles. I offer repeated obeisance to Him.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Lord Ganesha, dont l'essence est le son primordial (Om), et qui incarne l'énergie (Gam) de la création et du dépassement des obstacles. Je m'incline humblement et à plusieurs reprises (Namo Namah) devant Lui.
translations.he: ברכות לאל גנש, אשר מהותו היא הצליל הקדמוני (אום), ושהוא מגלם את האנרגיה (גאם) של הבריאה והסרת מכשולים. אני משתחווה שוב ושוב (נָמוֹ נָמָה) אליו.
translations.hi: "सलाम भगवान गणेश को, जिनका सार आदिम ध्वनि 'ओम' है, और जो सृजन की ऊर्जा ('गम') और बाधाओं को दूर करने का प्रतीक हैं। मैं बार-बार उन्हें प्रणाम करता हूँ।"
translations.id: Salam kepada Lord Ganesha, yang esensinya adalah suara primordial (Om), dan yang mewujudkan energi (Gam) dari penciptaan dan penghilangan rintangan. Saya bersujud berulang kali (Namo Namah) kepada-Nya.
translations.it: Salve a Lord Ganesha, la cui essenza è il suono primordiale (Om), e che incarna l'energia (Gam) della creazione e della rimozione degli ostacoli. Mi prostro ripetutamente (Namo Namah) a Lui.
translations.ja: 象頭神（ガネーシャ）への敬意。その本質は、始まりの音である「オーム」であり、創造と障害の除去のエネルギー（ガム）を体現する神。我は、繰り返しその神に頭を下げます（ナモ・ナマ）。
translations.ko: 원시의 소리(옴)의 본질을 지니고, 창조와 장애물 제거의 에너지(감)를 구현하신 가네샤 신에게 경의를 표합니다. 저는 그분께 끊임없이 숭배의 마음을 바칩니다 (남오 남아).
translations.nl: Ik buig neder voor Heer Ganesha, wiens essentie de oerklank 'Om' is, en die de energie van creatie en het wegnemen van obstakels belichaamt. Ik herhaal mijn eerbiedige groet (Namo Namah) aan Hem.
translations.pl: Składam hołd Panu Ganieśsze, którego esencją jest pierwotny dźwięk (Om), a który uosabia energię (Gam) kreacji i usuwania przeszkód. Powtarzając ukłony, oddaję Mu cześć (Namo Namah).
translations.pt-br: Saúdo Lord Ganesha, cuja essência é o som primordial (Om), e que personifica a energia (Gam) da criação e da remoção de obstáculos. Prostro-me repetidamente (Namo Namah) diante Dele.
translations.ru: Приветствия Господу Ганешу, чья сущность – извечный звук (Ом), и который воплощает энергию (Гам) созидания и устранения препятствий. Я повторяю поклонение Ему (Нама Нама).
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Lord Ganesha, vars väsen är det primära ljudet (Om), och som förkroppsligar skapelsens (Gam) energi och förmågan att avlägsna hinder. Jag böjer mig om och om igen (Namo Namah) inför Honom.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชแก่พระพิฆเนศ ผู้ซึ่งเป็นตัวแทนของเสียงเริ่มต้นอันศักดิ์สิทธิ์ (Om) และเป็นศูนย์รวมแห่งพลัง (Gam) แห่งการสร้างสรรค์และการขจัดอุปสรรค ข้าขอน้อมก้มลงบูชาพระองค์อย่างซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า (Namo Namah).
translations.tr: İlahi Ganesha'ya selamlar; O'nun özü, evrenin başlangıçtaki sesi olan "Om" iken, yaratılışın ve engellerin ortadan kaldırılmasının enerjisini ("Gam") bünyesinde barındırmaktadır. Ben, O'na saygılarımla tekrar tekrar eğiliyorum (Namo Namah).
translations.uk: Вітаю Господа Ганешу, чия сутність – первісний звук (Ом), і який втілює енергію (Гам) творіння та усунення перешкод. Я з глибокою повагою (Намо Намах) вклоняюся Йому.
translations.vi: Kính chào Thần Ganesha, Đấng có bản chất là Âm thanh nguyên thủy (Om), và là hiện thân của Năng lượng (Gam) tạo nên và phá bỏ mọi rào cản. Tôi cung kính lặp lại lời nguyện (Namo Namah) để tôn vinh Ngài.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼象头神甘尼萨，他是原始之声（Om）的化身，也是创造和消除障碍的能量（Gam）的象征。我一遍又一遍地向他致敬（Namo Namah）。

mantras.name: Salutations to Om, may I go forth, may I cross over, may I penetrate, may I fully merge with enlightenment; I realize.
mantras.english: Salutations to Om, may I go forth, may I cross over, may I penetrate, may I fully merge with enlightenment; I realize.
mantras.original: tédžata óm gaté gaté parágaté parásamgaté bódhi sóha
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ, mayā gantum, mayā praveṣṭum, mayā uparujīrṇam, mayā bodhe samāveṣṭum; ahaṃ jānāmi.
mantras.background: From Buddhist Vajrayana tradition, this mantra means "Salutations to Om, may I go forth... fully merge with enlightenment." It echoes the Prajnaparamita path to liberation (moksha).
mantras.benefits:
Chanting Om stills the mind through resonant vibration, inducing theta brainwaves linked to deep meditation. Its three syllables guide awareness through waking, dreaming, and deep sleep toward turiya—pure consciousness itself.
  Grounding: Source cites NBRC research on theta waves, Mandukya Upanishad's four-state framework, and Om's role as bridge between finite and infinite.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, om, brahman, liberation, enlightenment, devotional, union, realization

translations.es: Saludos a Om. Que yo avance, que yo cruce, que yo penetre, que yo me fusione completamente con la iluminación; yo comprendo.
translations.ar: "تحية لـ "أوم"، فليتقدم لي، فلتعبرني، فلتنثر فيَّ، فلتندمج روحي بالكامل مع التنوير؛ إني أدرك."
translations.bn: ওম্-এর প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি। আমি অগ্রসর হই, আমি পার হই, আমি প্রবেশ করি, আমি সম্পূর্ণরূপে দিব্য জ্ঞান/মুক্তি/illuminated state-এর সাথে একাত্ম হই; আমি উপলব্ধি করি।
translations.de: Om, dem ich meine Verehrung entgegenbringe, möge ich voranschreiten, möge ich überwinden, möge ich durchdringen, möge ich vollständig mit der Erleuchtung verschmelzen; ich erkenne.
translations.en-us: Salutations to Om, may I proceed, may I overcome, may I penetrate, may I fully unite with enlightenment; I understand.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to Om, may I proceed, may I overcome, may I penetrate, may I fully merge with enlightenment; I understand.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Om. Puisse-je avancer, puisse-je traverser, puisse-je pénétrer, puisse-je me fondre pleinement dans l'illumination ; je réalise.
translations.he: שלום ל"אוֹם", ייתן לי להתקדם, ייתן לי לחצות, ייתן לי לחדור, ייתן לי להתמזג לגמרי עם הארה; אני מבין.
translations.hi: "ॐ को प्रणाम, मैं आगे बढ़ूँ, मैं पार करूँ, मैं प्रवेश करूँ, मैं पूर्ण रूप से ज्ञानोदय में विलीन हो जाऊँ; मैं समझता हूँ।"
translations.id: Salam kepada Om, semoga saya melangkah maju, semoga saya melintasi, semoga saya menembus, semoga saya sepenuhnya menyatu dengan pencerahan; saya menyadari.
translations.it: Salve a Om, possa io avanzare, possa io superare, possa io penetrare, possa io unirmi completamente all'illuminazione; io realizzo.
translations.ja: オーム（Om）へ礼拝します。私が行き、私が乗り越え、私が貫き、私が完全に悟りへと合一します。私は悟ります。
translations.ko: 옴께 경의를 표합니다. 제가 나아가기를, 제가 건너가기를, 제가 꿰뚫기를, 제가 완전히 깨달음과 하나 되기를 바랍니다. 저는 깨닫습니다.
translations.nl: Groet aan Om, moge ik voorwaarts gaan, moge ik oversteken, moge ik doordringen, moge ik volledig samensmelten met verlichting; ik realiseer het.
translations.pl: Om, pozdrowienia. Niech pójdę naprzód, niech przekroczę, niech przeniknę, niech całkowicie się złączę z oświeceniem; Ja rozumiem.
translations.pt-br: Saúdo a Om, que eu avance, que eu atravesse, que eu penetre, que eu me una completamente com a iluminação; eu compreendo.
translations.ru: Приветствия Ом, дабы я мог продвинуться, преодолеть, проникнуть и полностью слиться с просветлением; я осознаю.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Om, må jag fortsätta, må jag övervinna, må jag tränga igenom, må jag fullständigt förenas med upplysning; jag inser.
translations.th: ขอความเมตตาจากพระอม, ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าก้าวไปข้างหน้า, ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าข้ามผ่านอุปสรรค, ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าเข้าถึง, ขอให้ข้าพเจ้าหลอมรวมอย่างสมบูรณ์กับปัญญาญาณ; ข้าพเจ้าตระหนัก.
translations.tr: Om'a saygılarını sunarım, ilerlememi, geçmemi, nüfuz etmemi ve aydınlanmayla tamamen bütünleşmemi dilerim; ben farkındayım.
translations.uk: З повагою до Ом, нехай я рухаюся вперед, нехай я перетинаю перешкоди, нехай я проникаю, нехай я повністю зливаюсь з просвітленням; я усвідомлюю.
translations.vi: Kính chào Âm, xin cho con tiến lên, xin cho con vượt qua, xin cho con thâm nhập, xin cho con hòa nhập hoàn toàn với sự giác ngộ; con nhận ra.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂奥姆之名，愿我前行，愿我渡越，愿我穿透，愿我完全融入觉悟；我领悟。

mantras.name: Salutations to Shiva, the divine lingam.
mantras.english: Salutations to Shiva, the divine lingam.
mantras.transliteration: ॐ नमः शिवाय, दिव्य लिंगम।
mantras.background: "Salutations to Shiva, the divine lingam" — a sacred invocation honoring Shiva's symbolic form, calling practitioners into deep devotional reverence.
mantras.benefits: Devotion to Shiva's lingam symbolizes cosmic creation and dissolution. Practitioners report inner stillness and ego transcendence — Shiva embodies the eternal witness within, drawing seekers toward self-realization and fearlessness.
mantras.tags: shiva, devotional, divine, lingam, worship, invocation, hindu, mantra

translations.es: Saludos a Shiva, el divino lingam.
translations.ar: التحية لـ "شيفا"، الرمز الإلهي.
translations.bn:
शिवा, दिव्य लिंगम को प्रणाम।

बांग्ला अनुवाद: শিব, সেই পবিত্র লিঙ্গমের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।
translations.de: Grüße an Shiva, das göttliche Lingam.
translations.en-us: Salutations to Shiva, the divine symbolic representation.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to Shiva, the divine phallus (or symbolic representation of the divine).
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Shiva, le divin lingam.
translations.he: ברכות לשיווה, הלינגאם האלוהי.
translations.hi: नमस्कार शिव भगवान को, दिव्य लिंगम को।
translations.id: Salam kepada Shiva, lingam yang suci.
translations.it: Saluti a Shiva, il sacro lingam divino.
translations.ja: シヴァ神、神聖なリンガへの敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 시바 신에게, 신성한 링감(lingam)에게 경의를 표합니다. (Shiba shindege, shinseonghan linggame ge gyeong-ui-reul byeo-hamnida.)
translations.nl: Groet aan Shiva, het goddelijke lingam.
translations.pl: Pozdrowienia dla Shivy, boskiego lingamu.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a Shiva, o divino lingam.
translations.ru: Приветствия Шиве, божественному лингаму.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Shiva, den gudomliga lingamen.
translations.th: คำบูชาแด่พระศิวะ เทพเจ้าแห่งพระศิวลึงค์อันศักดิ์สิทธิ์
translations.tr: Shiva'ya saygı, ilahi lingama.
translations.uk: Вітання Шиві, божественному лінгаму.
translations.vi: Kính chào Shiva, biểu tượng thiêng liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼湿婆神，这位神圣的象征。

mantras.name: Salutations to Shiva, the embodiment of consciousness, knowledge, and bliss. I bow to that very being, again and again.
mantras.english: Salutations to Shiva, the embodiment of consciousness, knowledge, and bliss. I bow to that very being, again and again.
mantras.original: ॐ नमो शिवाय गुरवे सच्चिदानन्द मूर्तये नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ śivaāya namaḥ, jñāna-ānanda-swarūpaaya, saṃskṛte. punarapi punarāṃ namaste.
mantras.background: A Sanskrit Vedic invocation to Shiva as Guru—embodiment of existence, consciousness & bliss. Bow thrice with devotion, seeking liberation through sacred sound.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Shiva mantra invokes consciousness, wisdom & bliss (Satchidananda). Devotees seek Shiva's guidance for self-realization, inner peace, and liberation—bowing repeatedly to deepen surrender and spiritual transformation.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, shiva, devotional, consciousness, knowledge, bliss, liberation, guidance, peace

translations.es: Saludos a Shiva, la encarnación de la conciencia, el conocimiento y la dicha. Me inclino ante esa misma entidad, una y otra vez.
translations.ar: تحية لـ "شيفا"، تجسيد الوعي والمعرفة والسعادة. أتوجه باحترام إلى هذا الكائن، مرارًا وتكرارًا.
translations.bn: நமস্তে শিবāya, চৈতন্তस्य, জ্ঞানস্য, आनন্তস্য मूर्तయే। স:", স:", পুনঃ পুনঃ অভিবাদনং।
translations.de: "Ich vernehme Shiva, die Verkörperung des Bewusstseins, des Wissens und des Glücks. Ich verbeuge mich vor diesem Wesen, immer wieder."
translations.en-us: Salutations to Shiva, the embodiment of consciousness, knowledge, and bliss. I offer my repeated and profound reverence to that very essence.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to Shiva, the embodiment of consciousness, knowledge, and bliss. I offer my reverence to that very being, repeatedly.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Shiva, incarnation de la conscience, de la connaissance et du bonheur. Je m'incline devant cette même entité, encore et encore.
translations.he: מברכים את שיווה, ההתגלמות של התודעה, הידע והאושר. אני משתחווה לאותו יש, שוב ושוב.
translations.hi: नमस्ते शिव को, जो चेतना, ज्ञान और आनंद का प्रतिरूप हैं। मैं उस परम सत्ता को बार-बार प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Salam kepada Shiva, perwujudan kesadaran, pengetahuan, dan kebahagiaan. Saya bersujud kepada entitas tersebut, berulang kali.
translations.it: Salve a Shiva, incarnazione di coscienza, conoscenza e beatitudine. Mi prostro davanti a quella stessa entità, ripetutamente.
translations.ja: シヴァ神に敬意を表します。シヴァ神は、意識、知識、そして至福の化身です。私は、その神に、繰り返し、深くお参りします。
translations.ko: 옴, 의식, 지혜, 그리고 행복의 화신인 시바에게 경배를 올립니다. 저는 그 존재께, 끊임없이, 숭배의 마음을 표합니다.
translations.nl: Groet aan Shiva, de belichaming van bewustzijn, kennis en zaligheid. Ik buig voor dat wezen, steeds weer.
translations.pl: Składam hołd Shivie, uosobieniu świadomości, wiedzy i błogości. Kłaniam się temu istnemu, raz po raz.
translations.pt-br: Saúdo Shiva, a personificação da consciência, do conhecimento e da bem-aventurança. Reverencio essa divindade, repetidamente.
translations.ru: Приветствия Шиве, воплощению сознания, знания и блаженства. Я склоняюсь перед этой сущностью, снова и снова.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Shiva, medvetandets, kunskapens och lyckans förkroppsligande. Jag böjer mig inför detta väsen, om och om igen.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชแก่พระศิวะ ผู้ซึ่งเป็นตัวแทนแห่งสติปัญญา ความรู้ และความสุข ข้าพเจ้าขอถวายบังคมแด่พระองค์ ผู้ซึ่งเป็นสิ่งนั้น ซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า
translations.tr: Şiva'ya selamlar, bilinç, bilgi ve mutluluğun somutlaşmış hali. O yüce varlığa, tekrar tekrar saygılarımı sunuyorum.
translations.uk: Приветствия Шиве, воплощению сознания, знания и блаженства. Я склоняюсь перед этим существом, снова и снова.
translations.vi: Kính chào Shiva, hiện thân của ý thức, tri thức và niềm vui. Tôi cúi đầu trước chính Ngài, một lần nữa và một lần nữa.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂湿婆，他是意识、知识和至乐的化身。我向这位伟大的存在致敬，一次又一次。

mantras.name: Salutations to the Unconquered.
mantras.english: Salutations to the Unconquered.
mantras.transliteration: namo jayaḥ.
mantras.background: From India, 5,000+ years ago, this mantra salutes the Unconquered — an ancient chant to align your inner nature with undefeatable strength through sacred sound.
mantras.benefits: Chanting "Salutations to the Unconquered" tunes your inner nature to resilience and undefeated strength. Like all mantras, its sound activates a specific quality within, calming the mind while elevating consciousness toward its source.
mantras.tags: indian, devotional, chant, affirmation, divine, sound

translations.es: Saludos al Inconquistable.
translations.ar: تحية لمن لا يُقهر.
translations.bn: "अজেयগণের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।"
translations.de: Grüße dem Unbezwingbaren.
translations.en-us: Salutations to the One Who Remains Unconquered.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to the one who is undefeated.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à l'Invaincu.
translations.he: ברכות לבלתי כנועים.
translations.hi: "अजय" शब्द का उपयोग करके: "अजय को नमस्कार।" या "अजिताभवन को प्रणाम।"
translations.id: Salam bagi yang Tak Terkalahkan.
translations.it: Saluti all'Inconquistabile.
translations.ja: 屈強なる者への敬意 (Kutsukyō naru mono e no keii).
translations.ko: 불굴의 존재에게 경의를 표합니다.
translations.nl: Groet aan de Onoverwinnelijke.
translations.pl: Pozdrowienia dla Niezwyciężonego.
translations.pt-br: Saudações ao Invencível.
translations.ru: Приветствие Непобедимому.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den Oövervinnelige.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่ผู้ที่ไม่อาจเอาชนะได้
translations.tr: Zaferden Dönmeyenlere Selamlar.
translations.uk: Вітання Непохитним.
translations.vi: Kính chào vị Vô Địch.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼不屈者。

mantras.name: Salutations to the one who dwells in the ether; Om, venerable Kāmārī, essence, hail.
mantras.english: Salutations to the one who dwells in the ether; Om, venerable Kāmārī, essence, hail.
mantras.original: namo ākāśagarbhāya oṃ ārya kāmāri mauli svāhā
mantras.transliteration: ॐ। वायुपुत्रे नमः। ओम्, वन्दे, कामरी, सार, वः।
mantras.background: A Vedic Shaiva mantra honoring Shiva—Kāmārī, "foe of desire"—dwelling in the ether. Rooted in tantric Om tradition, it calls the seeker toward liberation through sacred sound.
mantras.benefits: Invoking Kāmārī — Shiva as destroyer of desire — alongside Om may cultivate inner stillness, dissolving ego-driven passions and awakening the meditative theta-state linked to deep spiritual clarity.
mantras.tags: hindu, om, devotional, invocation, deity, meditation, praise, salutation, prayer

translations.es: Saludos al que reside en el éter; Om, venerable Kāmārī, esencia, saludo.
translations.ar: التحيّة لمن يسكن الأثير؛ ॐ، يا كاماريّ الجليلة، يا جوهر، تحية.
translations.bn: আকাশলোকে বিরাজমান সত্তাকে প্রণাম। ওম, হে মহান কামারী, তুমিই সার, তোমাকেHail।
translations.de: "Grüße demjenigen, der im Äther wohnt; Om, verehrte Kāmārī, Wesen, Sei gegrüßt."
translations.en-us: Salutations to the one who resides in the celestial realm; Om, revered Kāmārī, essence, hail.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to the one who resides in the celestial sphere; Om, revered Kāmārī, essence, salutations.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à celui qui réside dans l'éther ; Om, vénérable Kāmārī, essence, salut.
translations.he: שלום למי שמתגורר באתר; אום, קמרי הנכבד, מהות, ברכה.
translations.hi: आकाश में विराजमान उस व्यक्ति को प्रणाम; ॐ, पूज्य कामारी, सार, नमस्कार।
translations.id: Salam untuk Yang Maha Esa yang bersemayam di ruang hampa; Om, Kāmārī yang terhormat, esensi, salam.
translations.it: Salve a colui che risiede nell'etere; Om, venerabile Kāmārī, essenza, saluto.
translations.ja: 空中に宿る者への敬意を表し、オーム、尊ばしきカーマリーよ、本質、讃美します。
translations.ko: 공간에 머무시는 분께 경의를 표합니다. 옴, 존경하는 카마리여, 본질이시여, 축복을.
translations.nl: Groet aan Hem die in de hemel woont; Om, eerbiedwaardige Kāmārī, essentie, begroeting.
translations.pl: Składam hołd temu, który mieszka w eterze; Om, czcigodna Kāmārī, esencjo, witaj.
translations.pt-br: Saudações àquele que habita o éter; Om, venerável Kāmārī, essência, saudação.
translations.ru: Здравствуй, обитатель эфира; Ом, почтенная Камари, сущность, привет.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den som bor i rymden; Om, vördade Kāmārī, essens, hälsa.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่ผู้ที่สถิตอยู่ในอากาศธาตุ; โอม, ข้าแต่ กมารี ผู้เป็นที่เคารพ, สาระสำคัญ, ขอคารวะ
translations.tr: Ethereal boşlukta yaşayan varlığa selamlar; Om, saygıdeğer Kāmārī, öz, selâm.
translations.uk: Вітаю того, хто живе в ефірі; Ом, шановна Камарі, сутність, вітаю.
translations.vi: Kính chào vị thần ngự trong vũ trụ; Om, tôn kính Kāmārī, bản chất, chào.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂居住在虚空中的者； ॐ，尊敬的卡玛丽，精华，致敬。

mantras.name: Salutations to the one who shines (the Sun).
mantras.english: Salutations to the one who shines (the Sun).
mantras.transliteration: `salutation to the one who shines (the Sun)`
mantras.background: A solar salutation mantra meaning "Salutations to the one who shines" — invoking the Sun's radiant power, drawing practitioners into ancient light-worship traditions.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this solar salutation mantra is linked to cultivating inner radiance, clarity of mind, and vitality. Traditions associate sun-honoring mantras with awakening confidence, dispelling mental fog, and energizing the practitioner's spirit.
mantras.tags: hindu, sun, solar, devotion, warmth, illumination, prosperity, vitality, mantra, vedic, ritual, healing

translations.es: Saludos al que brilla (el Sol).
translations.ar: تحية لمن يبزغ (الشمس).
translations.bn: नमस्कार সেই সত্তাকে, যিনি আলো ছড়ান (সূর্য)।
translations.de: "Grüße dem, der leuchtet (der Sonne)."
translations.en-us: Greetings to the one who shines.
translations.en-gb: Salutations to the one who radiates light.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à celui qui rayonne (le Soleil).
translations.he: "שלום לזה המאיר (השמש)."
translations.hi: नमस्कार उस प्रकाशमान व्यक्ति को।
translations.id: Salam kepada Sang Surya, sumber cahaya.
translations.it: Salve a colui che irradia luce (il Sole).
translations.ja:
太陽神への敬意を表す言葉として、以下のような訳が考えられます。

「太陽の光輝に敬意を表します。」 (Taiyō no kōki ni keii o arawashimasu.)

あるいは、より詩的な表現として、

「輝く太陽への礼賛。」 (Kagayaku taiyō e no reisan.)
translations.ko: 빛나는 존재에게 경배를. (Bitnaneun jonjaege gyeongbaereul.)
translations.nl: Groet aan Hem die schijnt (de Zon).
translations.pl: "Pozdrowienia temu, który rozświetla (Słońce)."
translations.pt-br: Saudações àquele que irradia (o Sol).
translations.ru: Здравствуй, сияющий (Солнце).
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den som lyser (solen).
translations.th: ขอคารวะแด่ผู้ซึ่งเปล่งประกาย (ดวงอาทิตย์)
translations.tr: Güneş'e selam olsun, parlayan zata saygı.
translations.uk: Вітання Тій Істоті, Яка сяє (Сонцю).
translations.vi: Kính chào vị thần tỏa sáng (Mặt Trời).
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼那闪耀之物 (Jìnglǐ nà shǎnyào zhī wù).

mantras.name: Salutations to the one who shines, the radiant one, the embodiment of light.
mantras.english: Salutations to the one who shines, the radiant one, the embodiment of light.
mantras.transliteration: `namo 'sti divākaraḥ, prabhākaraḥ, jyotirūpāya.`
mantras.background: The Gayatri Mantra — one of Sanskrit's oldest — invokes the Sun's radiant light, uniting all creation. Rooted in Hinduism, even Buddha knew it. Chant it to transcend suffering and awaken inner brilliance!
mantras.benefits: Evoking solar light, this mantra unites all creation beyond form. Chanting it is said to invoke radiance, overcome suffering, and awaken inner clarity—drawing you into one of Sanskrit's oldest living spiritual traditions.
mantras.tags: hindu, vedic, gayatri, divine, devotional, light, healing, ritual, unity

translations.es: Saludos a aquel que brilla, a la radiante esencia, a la encarnación de la luz.
translations.ar: "تحية لمن يبدوج، المتوهج، تجسيد النور."
translations.bn: "যে আলো ছড়ায়, যে উজ্জ্বল, যে আলোর প্রতিচ্ছবি, তার প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।"
translations.de: "Seid gegrüßt, du strahlende, leuchtende Gestalt, du Verkörperung des Lichts."
translations.en-us: Salutations to the one who shines, the radiant one, the embodiment of light.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to the one who illuminates, the resplendent being, the very embodiment of light.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Celui qui rayonne, à l'Être resplendissant, à l'incarnation de la lumière.
translations.he: שלום לזה המאיר, לזוהר, לגילום האור.
translations.hi: नमस्कार उस प्रदीप्त व्यक्ति को, जो प्रकाशमान है, जो प्रकाश का अवतार है।
translations.id: Salam untuk Yang Maha Bercahaya, Yang Radiasi, Perwujudan Cahaya.
translations.it: Salve a colui che risplende, la presenza luminosa, l'incarnazione della luce.
translations.ja: 光り輝く者、輝ける者、光の化身であるあなたへ、敬意を表します。
translations.ko: 빛나는 분께, 찬란한 분께, 빛의 화신이신 분께 경배를 드립니다.
translations.nl: Groet aan Hem die schijnt, de stralende, de belichaming van licht.
translations.pl: Składam hołd temu, który świeci, temu, który jest emanacją blasku, uosobieniu światła.
translations.pt-br: Saudações àquele que brilha, ao radiante, à encarnação da luz.
translations.ru: Приветствие Тому, Кто сияет, Свету, Воплощению Света.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den som lyser, den strålande, inkarnationen av ljus.
translations.th: ขอแสดงความเคารพแด่ผู้ซึ่งเปล่งประกาย, ผู้ส่องสว่าง, ผู้เป็นดั่งตัวแทนแห่งแสงสว่าง
translations.tr: Işığın kaynağına, parlak olana, ışığın somut örneğine saygılar.
translations.uk: Вітання Тій Істоті, яка сяє, Якій випромінює світло, Яка є втіленням світла.
translations.vi: Kính chào vị ấy, đấng tỏa sáng, nguồn sáng rực rỡ, hiện thân của ánh sáng.
translations.zh-cn: 敬颂那光辉照耀者，那闪耀之体，光明的化身。

mantras.name: Salutations to the remover of obstacles, Ganapati.
mantras.english: Salutations to the remover of obstacles, Ganapati.
mantras.transliteration: `namo vighneṣṭāpakarāya, gaṇapataye.`
mantras.background: Rooted in devotion, this mantra salutes Ganapati—the remover of obstacles—inviting practitioners to clear their path through sacred sound and surrender.
mantras.benefits: Chanting this Ganesha mantra is said to clear inner blockages—fear, doubt, inertia—inviting focus and new beginnings. Devotees report calm confidence before challenges, making it a timeless tool for transitions.
mantras.tags: ganapati, hindu, devotional, invocation, salutation, obstacle-removal

translations.es: Saludos a Ganapati, el que elimina los obstáculos.
translations.ar: تحية لمن يزيل العقبات، غاناباتي.
translations.bn: " obstructions দূরকারী গণেশের প্রতি শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি।"
translations.de: Grüße dem Hindernisbeseitiger, Ganapati.
translations.en-us: Greetings to Ganapati, the one who removes obstacles.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to Ganapati, the one who removes obstacles.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Ganapati, celui qui élimine les obstacles.
translations.he: ברכות למי שמסיר מכשולים, גאנפטי.
translations.hi: नमस्कार, विघ्नहर्ता गणेश।
translations.id: Salam hormat kepada Penghancur Rintangan, Ganapati.
translations.it: Salve, o Ganapati, colui che rimuove gli ostacoli.
translations.ja: ガネーシャ神よ、障害を取り除く者よ、我に祝福を。
translations.ko: 옴, 모든 장애를 제거하시는 가나파티 신께 경의를 표합니다. (Om, 경의를 표합니다. 모든 장애를 제거하시는 가나파티 신께.)
translations.nl: Groet aan Ganapati, de verwijderaar van obstakels.
translations.pl: Powitania dla tego, który usuwa przeszkody, Ganapati.
translations.pt-br: Saudações ao removedor de obstáculos, Ganapati.
translations.ru: Приветствия Ганапати, устранителю препятствий.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till Ganapati, som tar bort hinder.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชแก่พระพิฆเนศ ผู้ขจัดอุปสรรค
translations.tr: Engellerin kaldırıcısı, Ganapati'ye saygılar.
translations.uk: Вітаю, Господи Ганешо, руйнівнику перешкод.
translations.vi: Kính chào Ganesha, Đấng phá tan mọi chướng ngại.
translations.zh-cn: 梵语： 瞻礼于破除障碍者，伽尼沙。 简体中文翻译： 敬礼消除障碍的伽尼沙神。

mantras.name: Salutations to the remover of obstacles, Ganapati. I bow to you again and again.
mantras.english: Salutations to the remover of obstacles, Ganapati. I bow to you again and again.
mantras.transliteration: ōṃ gaṇeśāya namaḥ |  sakalāḍiṣṭa-nivārakāya |  saṃkarṣṇe, punarapi saṃkarṣṇe ||
mantras.background:
From ancient Vedic tradition, "Om Gan Ganapataye Namo Namah" literally means "Salutations to Ganapati, remover of obstacles." Chanted first before any endeavor, it invokes wisdom and clears your path.
  Grounding: Source states Ganesha is "remover of obstacles," "Namo Namah" means reverence/surrender, and chanting first ensures "a smooth journey ahead."
mantras.benefits: Chanting the Ganapati Mantra cultivates humility, devotion, and focus. It is said to invoke divine grace, clear mental obstacles, and prepare the practitioner for success in any endeavor — making it the ideal starting point for spiritual practice.
mantras.tags: vedic, hindu, ganesha, devotional, invocation, obstacles, success, prosperity, protection, wisdom, liberation

translations.es: Saludos a Ganapati, el que elimina los obstáculos. Me inclino ante ti una y otra vez.
translations.ar: تحية لمن يزيل العقبات، غانapati. أُسَلِّمُ إليك مراراً وتكراراً.
translations.bn: " obstructions-এর দূরকারী, গণেশকে প্রণাম। আমি বার বার আপনার প্রতি প্রণতি জানাই।"
translations.de: "Ich vernehme den Hindernisbeseitiger, Ganapati. Ich verbeuge mich vor Dir immer wieder."
translations.en-us: Salutations to Ganapati, the remover of obstacles. I offer my repeated obeisance to you.
translations.en-gb: Greetings to Ganapati, the remover of obstacles. I offer my repeated obeisance to you.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations à Ganapati, celui qui élimine les obstacles. Je vous salue humblement, encore et encore.
translations.he: שלום למי שמסיר מכשולים, גאנפטי. אני משתחווה לך שוב ושוב.
translations.hi: नमस्कार, विघ्नहर्ता, गजानन। मैं बार-बार आपको प्रणाम करता हूँ।
translations.id: Salam untuk Sang Pembuang Hambatan, Ganapati. Saya bersujud kepada-Mu berulang kali.
translations.it: Salve, o Ganapati, colui che rimuove gli ostacoli. Mi prostro di fronte a te, ripetutamente.
translations.ja: 障害を取り除くガネーシャ神への敬意を表します。私はあなたに、繰り返しお参りします。
translations.ko: 옴, 가네샤 신에게 경배를 표합니다. 그는 모든 장애물을 제거하는 분입니다. 저는 당신께 다시, 다시 경배를 올립니다.
translations.nl: Ik groet Ganesha, de verjager van obstakels. Ik buig voor u, keer op keer.
translations.pl: Składam pokłon Gajanapati, Ten, który usuwa przeszkody. Kłaniam się Tobie raz po raz.
translations.pt-br: Saudações a Ganesha, o que remove os obstáculos. Eu me prostro diante de você, repetidamente.
translations.ru: Приветствия Ганапати, устранителю препятствий. Я снова и снова склоняюсь перед тобой.
translations.sv: Hälsningar till den som tar bort hinder, Ganapati. Jag böjer mig inför dig om och om igen.
translations.th: ขอพระพรหมมหาราชรวบรวมสรรพสิ่ง นมัสการพระพิฆเนศ ผู้ขจัดอุปสรรค ข้าพเจ้าขอถวายความเคารพแด่พระองค์อีกครั้งเทอญ
translations.tr: Engellerin yok edicisi, Ganapati'ya saygılar. Size tekrar tekrar saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Вітаю Вас, Господи Ганешо, Який усуває перешкоди. Я знову і знову низько Вам поклоняюся.
translations.vi: Kính chào Bhagava, đấng phá tan mọi trở ngại, Ganapati. Con cúi lạy Người một lần nữa, và mãi mãi.
translations.zh-cn: 敬礼消除障碍的甘尼沙神。我再次向您致敬。

mantras.name: So Hum
mantras.english: I am That; I am the universal consciousness
mantras.transliteration: So Hum
mantras.abstract:
So Hum (also written Soham) is one of the most profound and intimate mantras of the Upanishadic and Yogic traditions. It is derived from the Sanskrit sentence Sa aham, meaning He am I or I am That, where That refers to the ultimate reality, Brahman. The mantra appears in the Isha Upanishad and the Hamsa Upanishad as a natural mantra synchronized with the breath.

The unique power of So Hum lies in its identification with the breath itself. In yogic physiology, the inhalation naturally produces the sound So, and the exhalation naturally produces the sound Hum. This means that every living being, simply by breathing, is unconsciously repeating So Hum approximately 21,600 times per day. The practice involves bringing conscious awareness to this unconscious affirmation.

In the tradition of Advaita Vedanta, So Hum is understood as a Mahavakya — a great saying that encapsulates the entire non-dual teaching. The individual self (Atman) is not separate from or subordinate to the universal consciousness (Brahman); they are one and the same reality. The repeated contemplation of So Hum is a direct practice of dissolving that illusion by returning again and again to the truth of unity.

In Kriya Yoga and Kashmir Shaivism, So Hum is associated with the Hamsa, the divine swan of Hindu mythology. The mantra is used in Pranayama practices, Trataka, and deep meditation as a vehicle for Pratyahara (withdrawal of the senses) and Samadhi (absorption in the self). Its simplicity and intimate correspondence with the natural breath make it accessible to practitioners at all levels.

translations.en: I am That. With every inhalation I affirm my identity with the universal self, and with every exhalation I release the illusion of separateness.
translations.zh: 我即那个。每次吸气时，我肯定自己与宇宙自我的同一性，每次呼气时，我释放分离的幻觉。
translations.es: Yo soy Eso. Con cada inhalación afirmo mi identidad con el ser universal, y con cada exhalación libero la ilusión de separación.

mantras.name: Tat Tvam Asi
mantras.english: That thou art; you are the ultimate reality
mantras.transliteration: Tat Tvam Asi
mantras.abstract:
