translations.bn: আমি কুণ্ডलिनीকে প্রণাম জানাই, সেই ঐশ্বরিক শক্তি, সেই ঐশ্বরিক শক্তি।
translations.de: Ich verneige mich vor der Kundalini, der göttlichen Kraft, der göttlichen Kraft.
translations.en-us: I prostrate before Kundalini, the Divine Power, the Divine Power.
translations.en-gb: I prostrate before Kundalini, the Divine Power, the Divine Power.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'incline devant la Kundalini, la Puissance Divine, la Puissance Divine.
translations.he: אני משתחווה לקונדליני, לכוח האלוהי, לכוח האלוהי.
translations.hi: मैं कुण्डलिनी को प्रणाम करता हूँ, जो दिव्य शक्ति है, जो दिव्य शक्ति है।
translations.id: Saya membungkuk kepada Kundalini, Kekuatan Ilahi, Kekuatan Ilahi.
translations.it: Mi prostro alla Kundalini, al Potere Divino, al Potere Divino.
translations.ja: 私は、クンダリニー、神聖な力、神聖な力に礼を行います。
translations.ko: 저는 쿤달리니, 신성한 힘, 신성한 힘께 경배합니다. (Jeoneun kundallini, sinsanghan him, sinsanghan himkke gyeongbaehapnida.)
translations.nl: Ik buig voor de Kundalini, de goddelijke energie, de goddelijke energie.
translations.pl: Skłaniam się przed Kundalini, Boską Mocą, Boską Mocą.
translations.pt-br: "Eu me prostro diante da Kundalini, do Poder Divino, do Poder Divino."
translations.ru: Я склоняюсь перед Кундалини, Божественной Силой, Божественной Силой.
translations.sv: Jag böjer mig för Kundalini, den gudomliga kraften, den gudomliga kraften.
translations.th: ข้าขอน้อมนมัสการแก่พลังคุนดาลินี พลังศักดิ์สิทธิ์อันสูงสุด
translations.tr: Kundalini'ye, İlahi Güce, İlahi Güce saygı duyuyorum.
translations.uk: Я вклоняюся Кундаліні, Божественній Силі, Божественній Силі.
translations.vi: Tôi cúi lạy Kundalini, Nguồn Sức Mạnh Thiêng Liêng, Nguồn Sức Mạnh Thiêng Liêng.
translations.zh-cn: 我向库达लिनी，这股神圣的力量，致敬。

mantras.name: I breathe and I let go.
mantras.english: I breathe and I let go.
mantras.original: Je respire et je lâche prise
mantras.transliteration: Je respire et je lâche prise.
mantras.background: A personal mantra in your native tongue—like "I breathe and I let go"—carries no ancient script, yet channels the Sanskrit tradition of "mantra" as a "mind tool" to anchor and calm.
mantras.benefits: "I breathe and I let go" anchors the restless mind, easing stress and distraction. Repeating it builds calm, clarity, and inner alignment—no expertise needed. A simple yet powerful personal mantra for modern seekers.
mantras.tags: affirmation, breathing, peace, focus, grounding, calming, clarity, intention

translations.es: Respiro y me libero.
translations.ar: أتنفس وأترك الأمر.
translations.bn: আমি শ্বাস নেই এবং আমি ছেড়ে দেই।
translations.de: Ich atme ein und ich lasse los.
translations.en-us: I breathe and I release.
translations.en-gb: I breathe and I release.
translations.fr-fr: Je respire et je lâche prise.
translations.he: אני נושם ומשחרר.
translations.hi: मैं सांस लेता हूँ और मैं त्याग देता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya bernapas dan saya melepaskan.
translations.it: Respiro e lascio andare.
translations.ja: 私は呼吸をし、そして手放します。 (Watashi wa kokyū o shi, soshite tebanashimasu.)
translations.ko: 숨 쉬고 놓아줍니다.
translations.nl: Ik adem en ik laat los.
translations.pl: Oddycham i pozwalam odejść.
translations.pt-br: Eu respiro e eu me liberto.
translations.ru: Я дышу и отпускаю.
translations.sv: Jag andas och jag släpper taget.
translations.th: ฉันหายใจและฉันปล่อยวาง.
translations.tr: Nefes alıyorum ve bırakıyorum.
translations.uk: Я дихаю і відпускаю.
translations.vi: Tôi hít thở và tôi buông bỏ.
translations.zh-cn: 我呼吸，我放下。

mantras.name: I breathe in peace, I exhale love.
mantras.english: I breathe in peace, I exhale love.
mantras.transliteration: Respiro paz, exhalo amor.
mantras.background: A modern Spanish-language mantra, "Respiro paz, exhalo amor" blends breath and intention—echoing ancient SO HUM breath-sync traditions. Simple, yet vibrationally alive.
mantras.benefits: Syncing breath with peace & love mirrors SO HUM's rhythm. This mantra calms the nervous system, reduces anxiety, and opens the heart—inviting unity between self and cosmos through ancient vibrational practice.
mantras.tags: affirmation, personal, contemporary, breath, peace, love, calming, clarity

translations.es: Inhalo paz, exhalo amor.
translations.ar: أتنفس السلام، وأُخرج الحب.
translations.bn: আমি শান্তি শ্বাসствую, আমি ভালোবাসা ত্যাগ করি।
translations.de: Ich atme Frieden ein, ich atme Liebe aus.
translations.en-us: I inhale peace, I exhale love.
translations.en-gb: I inhale peace, I exhale love.
translations.fr-fr: Je respire la paix, j'expire l'amour.
translations.he: אני שואף שלווה, אני מוציא אהבה. (Ani sho'ef shilva, ani motzi ahavah.)
translations.hi: मैं शांति से सांस अंदर लेता हूँ, और प्रेम से बाहर निकालता हूँ।
translations.id: Aku menarik napas kedamaian, aku menghembuskan cinta.
translations.it: Inspiro pace, espiro amore.
translations.ja: 吸い込むときには安らぎを感じ、吐き出すときには愛を分かち合う。
translations.ko: 평화를 마시고, 사랑을 내뱉습니다.
translations.nl: Ik adem vrede in, ik adem liefde uit.
translations.pl: Wciągam pokój, wydycham miłość.
translations.pt-br: Respiro a paz, exalo o amor.
translations.ru: Я вдыхаю покой, я выдыхаю любовь.
translations.sv: Jag andas in frid, jag andas ut kärlek.
translations.th: ฉันหายใจเข้าด้วยความสงบ, ฉันหายใจออกด้วยความรัก.
translations.tr: Nefes alırken huzur, nefes verirken sevgi.
translations.uk: Я вдихаю спокій, я видихаю любов.
translations.vi: Tôi hít vào sự bình yên, tôi thở ra tình yêu.
translations.zh-cn: 我吸入平静，我呼出爱。

mantras.name: I choose to see the good in every situation.
mantras.english: I choose to see the good in every situation.
mantras.original: Elijo ver lo bueno en cada situación.
mantras.transliteration: yo elijo ver lo bueno en cada situación.
mantras.background: Rooted in gratitude practice, "Elijo ver lo bueno" literally means choosing goodness in every moment—a daily mantra tradition that cultivates optimism, joy, and emotional wellbeing.
mantras.benefits: Cultivates gratitude & optimism, reduces stress, and builds resilience. Daily repetition anchors the mind during tension, fosters self-acceptance, and deepens emotional well-being—transforming perspective one breath at a time.
mantras.tags: affirmation, gratitude, optimism, resilience, empower, well-being, mindfulness, joy

translations.es: Elijo ver lo bueno en cada situación.
translations.ar: أختار أن أرى الخير في كل موقف.
translations.bn: আমি সবসময় যেকোনো পরিস্থিতিতে ভালো কিছু খুঁজে বের করার চেষ্টা করি।
translations.de: Ich entscheide mich, das Gute in jeder Situation zu sehen.
translations.en-us: I choose to focus on the positive aspects of every situation.
translations.en-gb: I choose to focus on the positive aspects of every situation.
translations.fr-fr: Je choisis de voir le positif dans chaque situation.
translations.he: אני בוחר לראות את הטוב בכל מצב.
translations.hi: मैं हर परिस्थिति में अच्छाई देखने का चुनाव करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya memilih untuk melihat sisi baik dari setiap situasi.
translations.it: Scelgo di vedere il lato positivo in ogni situazione.
translations.ja: 私は、どんな状況においても良い面を見ようと心がけます。
translations.ko: 저는 모든 상황에서 긍정적인 면을 보려고 노력합니다.
translations.nl: Ik kies ervoor om het goede in elke situatie te zien.
translations.pl: Wybieram dostrzegać dobro w każdej sytuacji.
translations.pt-br: Escolho ver o lado bom em cada situação.
translations.ru: Я выбираю видеть хорошее в любой ситуации.
translations.sv: Jag väljer att se det goda i varje situation.
translations.th: ฉันเลือกที่จะมองเห็นด้านดีในทุกสถานการณ์
translations.tr: Her durumda iyiyi görmeyi seçiyorum.
translations.uk: Я вирішую бачити позитивне в кожній ситуації.
translations.vi: Tôi chọn cách nhìn thấy những điều tốt đẹp trong mọi tình huống.
translations.zh-cn: 我选择在任何情况下都看到光明的一面。

mantras.name: I exist in this present moment.
mantras.english: I exist in this present moment.
mantras.transliteration: I egzist in dhis prezənt momənt.
mantras.tags: present moment, mindfulness, self-awareness, intention, grounding, awareness, stillness, reflection, inner peace, acceptance, calm, breathwork

translations.es: Yo existo en este momento presente.
translations.ar: أنا موجود في اللحظة الحاضرة.
translations.bn: আমি এই বর্তমান মুহূর্তে আছি।
translations.de: Ich existiere in diesem gegenwärtigen Moment.
translations.en-us: I am present in this moment.
translations.en-gb: I am present in this moment.
translations.fr-fr: J'existe pleinement dans cet instant présent.
translations.he: אני קיים ברגע הזה.
translations.hi: मैं इस वर्तमान क्षण में विद्यमान हूँ।
translations.id: Saya hadir dalam momen sekarang ini.
translations.it: Esisto in questo momento presente.
translations.ja: 現在のこの瞬間に、私は存在しています。
translations.ko: 저는 현재 이 순간에 존재합니다.
translations.nl: Ik ben aanwezig in dit huidige moment.
translations.pl: Istnieję w tej chwili obecnej.
translations.pt-br: Eu existo neste momento presente.
translations.ru: Я существую в этом настоящем моменте.
translations.sv: Jag existerar i detta nuvarande ögonblick.
translations.th: ดิฉัน/ผม มีอยู่ ณ ขณะนี้
translations.tr: Şu anda varım.
translations.uk: Я існую в цій поточному моменті.
translations.vi: Tôi hiện hữu trong khoảnh khắc hiện tại này.
translations.zh-cn: 我存在于此时此刻。

mantras.name: I feel beautiful, I am beautiful.
mantras.english: I feel beautiful, I am beautiful.
mantras.original: I feel beautiful, I am beautiful
mantras.transliteration: aɪ fiːl ˈbjuːtɪfəl, aɪ ˈæm ˈbjuːtɪfəl.
mantras.background: "I feel beautiful, I am beautiful" is a modern positive-thinking mantra—an affirmation designed to build confidence through daily repetition, inviting self-acceptance and inner transformation.
mantras.benefits: "I feel beautiful, I am beautiful" is a self-affirmation mantra that builds confidence and combats negative self-perception. Repeated daily, it rewires thought patterns, replacing doubt with self-worth and inner grace.
mantras.tags: affirmation, positive thinking, confidence, i am, empower, beauty, self-worth, self-perception

translations.es: Me siento hermosa, soy hermosa.
translations.ar: أشعر بالجمال، وأنا جميلة.
translations.bn: আমি সুন্দর অনুভব করছি, আমি সুন্দর।
translations.de: Ich fühle mich wunderschön, ich bin wunderschön.
translations.en-us: I feel beautiful; I am beautiful.
translations.en-gb: I feel beautiful; I am beautiful.
translations.fr-fr: Je me sens belle, je suis belle.
translations.he: אני מרגישה יפה, אני יפה.
translations.hi: मैं सुंदर महसूस करती हूँ, मैं सुंदर हूँ।
translations.id: Saya merasa cantik, saya adalah cantik.
translations.it: Mi sento bella, sono bella.
translations.ja: 私は美しいと感じています。私は美しいです。
translations.ko: 저는 아름답다고 느낍니다, 저는 아름답습니다.
translations.nl: Ik voel me mooi, ik ben mooi.
translations.pl: Czuję się piękna, jestem piękna.
translations.pt-br: Sinto-me linda, sou linda.
translations.ru: Я чувствую себя красивой, я красивая.
translations.sv: Jag känner mig vacker, jag är vacker.
translations.th: ฉันรู้สึกสวยงาม, ฉันเป็นคนสวยงาม
translations.tr: Kendimi güzel hissediyorum, ben güzelim.
translations.uk: Я відчуваю себе прекрасно, я прекрасна.
translations.vi: Tôi cảm thấy mình xinh đẹp, tôi là một người xinh đẹp.
translations.zh-cn: 我感到自己很美丽，我就是美丽的。

mantras.name: I govern my thoughts and shape my reality.
mantras.english: I govern my thoughts and shape my reality.
mantras.original: I control my thoughts and create my reality
mantras.transliteration: I govern my thoughts and shape my reality.
mantras.benefits: Practicing "I govern my thoughts and shape my reality" cultivates mental discipline and self-authorship. Research links this mindset to resilience, reduced helplessness, and empowered goal-pursuit — transforming how challenges are perceived.
mantras.tags: affirmation, growth, empowerment, mindset, focus, resilience, agency, development

translations.es: Gobierno mis pensamientos y doy forma a mi realidad.
translations.ar: أُحكِّمُ سيطرتي على أفكاري وأُشكّلُ واقعي.
translations.bn: আমি আমার চিন্তাভাবনাকে নিয়ন্ত্রণ করি এবং আমার বাস্তবতাকে রূপ দিই।
translations.de: Ich lenke meine Gedanken und gestalte meine Wirklichkeit.
translations.en-us: I control my thoughts and create my reality.
translations.en-gb: I control my thoughts and influence the world around me.
translations.fr-fr: Je contrôle mes pensées et je façonne ma réalité.
translations.he: אני שולט במחשבותיי ומעצב את המציאות שלי.
translations.hi: मैं अपने विचारों को नियंत्रित करता हूँ और अपनी वास्तविकता को आकार देता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya mengendalikan pikiran saya dan membentuk realitas saya.
translations.it: Io governo i miei pensieri e plasmo la mia realtà.
translations.ja: 私は自分の思考をコントロールし、自分の現実を形作ります。
translations.ko: 저는 제 생각을 통제하고, 제 현실을 만들어갑니다.
translations.nl: Ik beheer mijn gedachten en vorm mijn realiteit.
translations.pl: Kontroluję swoje myśli i kształtuję swoją rzeczywistość.
translations.pt-br: Eu governo meus pensamentos e moldo a minha realidade.
translations.ru: Я управляю своими мыслями и формирую свою реальность.
translations.sv: Jag styr mina tankar och formar min verklighet.
translations.th: ดิฉันควบคุมความคิดของตนเอง และสร้างสรรค์ความเป็นจริงของชีวิต
translations.tr: Düşüncelerimi kontrol eder ve gerçekliğimi şekillendiririm.
translations.uk: Я керую своїми думками та формую свою реальність.
translations.vi: Tôi kiểm soát suy nghĩ của mình và định hình thực tại của mình.
translations.zh-cn: 我掌控我的思想，塑造我的现实。

mantras.name: I inhale peace and I exhale stress.
mantras.english: I inhale peace and I exhale stress.
mantras.original: I breathe in peace and exhale stress
mantras.transliteration: I inhale peace and I exhale stress.
mantras.background: "I inhale peace and I exhale stress" is a modern affirmation-style mantra. Its literal meaning is its full message — breathe in calm, release tension. Simple, yet profound.
mantras.benefits: Breath-focused affirmations like this tap into pranayama-rooted mindfulness, linking conscious breathing with mental reframing. Practicing it may reduce cortisol, anchor awareness, and cultivate inner calm through intentional breathwork.
mantras.tags: mindfulness, self-compassion, breathwork, stress reduction, positive affirmation, contemporary, secular, wellbeing, intention setting, self-regulation, personal growth, embodiment

translations.es: Inhalo paz y exhalo estrés.
translations.ar: أتنفس السلام، وأزفر التوتر.
translations.bn: আমি শান্তি শ্বাসствую এবং চাপ ত্যাগ করি।
translations.de: Ich atme Frieden ein und ich atme Stress aus.
translations.en-us: I breathe in peace and I breathe out stress.
translations.en-gb: I breathe in peace and I breathe out stress.
translations.fr-fr: J'inspire la paix et j'expire le stress.
translations.he: אני שואף שלווה ומוציא מתח.
translations.hi: मैं शांति को अंदर खींचता हूँ और तनाव को बाहर छोड़ता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menarik napas kedamaian dan menghembuskan ketegangan.
translations.it: Inspiro la pace ed espiro lo stress.
translations.ja: 私は安らぎを吸い込み、ストレスを吐き出す。
translations.ko: 저는 평화를 들이마시고, 스트레스를 내뿜습니다.
translations.nl: Ik adem vrede in en ik adem stress uit.
translations.pl: Wciągam pokój, a wydycham stres.
translations.pt-br: Eu inspiro paz e expiro estresse.
translations.ru: Я вдыхаю спокойствие, а выдыхаю напряжение.
translations.sv: Jag andas in lugn och jag andas ut stress.
translations.th: ฉันสูดหายใจเพื่อรับความสงบ และปล่อยลมหายใจเพื่อขับความเครียดออกไป
translations.tr: Ben huzuru içine alıyorum ve stresi dışarı veriyorum.
translations.uk: Я вдихаю спокій, а видихаю стрес.
translations.vi: Tôi hít vào sự bình yên, và thở ra sự căng thẳng.
translations.zh-cn: 我吸入平静，呼出压力。

mantras.name: I love myself, I believe in myself, I give myself support.
mantras.english: I love myself, I believe in myself, I give myself support.
mantras.original: Ich liebe mich, ich glaub an mich, ich gebe mir selbst halt
mantras.transliteration: Ich liebe mich, ich glaube an mich, ich gebe mir Unterstützung.
mantras.background: From modern German mantra meditation, "Ich liebe mich, ich glaub an mich, ich gebe mir selbst halt" means "I love myself, I believe in myself, I give myself support" — a powerful self-affirmation tool rooted in the Sanskrit concept of mantra as a "Werkzeug des Denkens" (tool of thinking), repeated silently to rewire thought patterns.
mantras.benefits: This self-affirmation mantra anchors the mind in self-worth and inner support. Repeated meditation on it reshapes negative thought spirals into empowering beliefs, cultivating resilience and emotional stability—a "tool of the mind" rooted in Sanskrit mantra tradition.
mantras.tags: mantra meditation, affirmation, self-belief, positive thinking, mental wellness, german, modern, spiritual practice, personal development, mindset, self-support, cognitive restructuring

translations.es: Me amo, creo en mí misma, me doy apoyo.
translations.ar: أحب نفسي، وأؤمن بنفسي، وأدعم نفسي.
translations.bn: আমি নিজেকে ভালোবাসি, আমি নিজের উপর বিশ্বাস রাখি, আমি নিজেকে সমর্থন করি।
translations.de: Ich liebe mich selbst, ich glaube an mich selbst, ich unterstütze mich selbst.
translations.en-us: I love myself, I believe in myself, I support myself.
translations.en-gb: I love myself, I believe in myself, I offer myself support.
translations.fr-fr: J'aime moi-même, j'ai confiance en moi, je me soutiens.
translations.he: אני אוהבת את עצמי, אני מאמינה בעצמי, אני נותנת לעצמי תמיכה.
translations.hi: मैं खुद को प्यार करता हूँ, मैं खुद पर विश्वास करता हूँ, मैं खुद को सहारा देता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya mencintai diri saya, saya percaya pada diri saya, saya memberikan dukungan kepada diri saya.
translations.it: Amo me stesso/a, credo in me stesso/a, mi do supporto.
translations.ja: 私は自分を愛し、自分を信じ、自分を支えています。
translations.ko: 저는 스스로를 사랑합니다. 저는 스스로를 믿습니다. 저는 스스로에게 힘을 줍니다.
translations.nl: Ik hou van mezelf, ik geloof in mezelf, ik geef mezelf steun.
translations.pl: Kocham siebie, wierzę w siebie, otulam siebie troską.
translations.pt-br: Eu me amo, eu acredito em mim mesmo, eu me apoio.
translations.ru: Я люблю себя, я верю в себя, я поддерживаю себя.
translations.sv: Jag älskar mig själv, jag tror på mig själv, jag ger mig själv stöd.
translations.th: ฉันรักตัวเอง ฉันเชื่อมั่นในตัวเอง และฉันให้กำลังใจตัวเอง
translations.tr: Kendimi seviyorum, kendime inanıyorum, kendime destek oluyorum.
translations.uk: Я люблю себе, я вірю в себе, я підтримую себе.
translations.vi: Tôi yêu bản thân, tôi tin vào bản thân, tôi tự hỗ trợ mình.
translations.zh-cn: 我爱我自己，我信任我自己，我支持我自己。

mantras.name: I love myself, I love myself, I love myself.
mantras.english: I love myself, I love myself, I love myself.
mantras.original: Love, love, love I love myself
mantras.transliteration: Ai lʌv maɪˈsɛlf, Ai lʌv maɪˈsɛlf, Ai lʌv maɪˈsɛlf.
mantras.background: A modern self-love mantra, chanted aloud or silently. Rooted in Western meditation, it echoes love-focused traditions—vibration and repetition awaken soul energy.
mantras.benefits: Repeating "I love myself" as a mantra channels loving energy inward, filling the soul with self-worth. Vibrations from chanting awaken deep energies, offering an immediate energy boost even after just one session.
mantras.tags: affirmation, self-love, healing, chanting, empower, energy, vibration

translations.es: Me amo, me amo, me amo.
translations.ar: أنا أحب نفسي، أنا أحب نفسي، أنا أحب نفسي.
translations.bn: আমি নিজেকে ভালোবাসি, আমি নিজেকে ভালোবাসি, আমি নিজেকে ভালোবাসি।
translations.de: Ich liebe mich selbst, ich liebe mich selbst, ich liebe mich selbst.
translations.en-us: I love myself, I love myself, I love myself.
translations.en-gb: I love myself, I love myself, I love myself.
translations.fr-fr: Je m'aime, je m'aime, je m'aime.
translations.he: אני אוהב את עצמי, אני אוהב את עצמי, אני אוהב את עצמי.
translations.hi: मैं खुद को प्यार करता हूँ, मैं खुद को प्यार करता हूँ, मैं खुद को प्यार करता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya mencintai diri saya, saya mencintai diri saya, saya mencintai diri saya.
translations.it: Amo me stesso/a, amo me stesso/a, amo me stesso/a.
translations.ja: 私は自分を愛しています。私は自分を愛しています。私は自分を愛しています。
translations.ko: 저는 스스로를 사랑합니다. 저는 스스로를 사랑합니다. 저는 스스로를 사랑합니다.
translations.nl: Ik hou van mezelf, ik hou van mezelf, ik hou van mezelf.
translations.pl: Kocham siebie, kocham siebie, kocham siebie.
translations.pt-br: Eu me amo, eu me amo, eu me amo.
translations.ru: Я люблю себя, я люблю себя, я люблю себя.
translations.sv: Jag älskar mig själv, jag älskar mig själv, jag älskar mig själv.
translations.th: ฉันรักตัวเอง, ฉันรักตัวเอง, ฉันรักตัวเอง.
translations.tr: Ben kendimi seviyorum, ben kendimi seviyorum, ben kendimi seviyorum.
translations.uk: Я люблю себе, я люблю себе, я люблю себе.
translations.vi: Tôi yêu bản thân mình, tôi yêu bản thân mình, tôi yêu bản thân mình.
translations.zh-cn: 我爱我自己，我爱我自己，我爱我自己。

mantras.name: I walk, I breathe, and I live with calmness.
mantras.english: I walk, I breathe, and I live with calmness.
mantras.original: caminho, respiro e vivo com calma
mantras.transliteration: Ando, respiro e vivo com calma.
mantras.background: A personal mantra for tranquility, "I walk, I breathe, and I live with calmness" invites mindful presence. Simple yet powerful, it echoes the timeless tradition of aligning words with inner intention.
mantras.benefits: "I walk, I breathe, I live with calmness" is a personal mantra for tranquility. Repeating it consistently anchors intention, aligns inner energy, and—over 40+ days—can cultivate lasting peace and mindful presence.
mantras.tags: affirmation, personal, tranquility, calmness, peace, positive

translations.es: Camino, respiro y vivo con serenidad.
translations.ar: أمشي، أتنفّس، وأعيش بسلام.
translations.bn: আমি হাঁটি, আমি শ্বাস নেই, এবং আমি শান্তভাবে জীবনযাপন করি।
translations.de: Ich gehe, ich atme und ich lebe in Gelassenheit.
translations.en-us: I walk, I breathe, and I live with serenity.
translations.en-gb: I walk, I breathe, and I live with serenity.
translations.fr-fr: Je marche, je respire et je vis avec sérénité.
translations.he: אני הולך, אני נושם, ואני חי בשלווה.
translations.hi: मैं चलता हूँ, मैं सांस लेता हूँ, और मैं शांति के साथ जीता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya berjalan, saya bernapas, dan saya hidup dengan ketenangan.
translations.it: Cammino, respiro e vivo con serenità.
translations.ja: 私は歩き、呼吸し、そして穏やかに生きます。
translations.ko: 저는 걷고, 숨쉬고, 평온함 속에서 살아갑니다.
translations.nl: Ik loop, ik adem, en ik leef in rust.
translations.pl: Idę, oddycham i żyję w spokoju.
translations.pt-br: Eu caminho, eu respiro e eu vivo com serenidade.
translations.ru: Я иду, я дышу и я живу в спокойствии.
translations.sv: Jag går, jag andas, och jag lever i stillhet.
translations.th: ฉันเดิน ฉันหายใจ และฉันใช้ชีวิตด้วยความสงบ
translations.tr: Yürüyorum, nefes alıyorum ve dinginlikle yaşıyorum.
translations.uk: Я йду, я дихаю, і я живу спокійно.
translations.vi: Tôi bước đi, tôi hít thở, và tôi sống với sự bình yên.
translations.zh-cn: 我行走，我呼吸，我平静地生活。

mantras.name: In each and every day, I am improving and progressing.
mantras.english: In each and every day, I am improving and progressing.
mantras.original: Every day in every way I’m getting better and better.
mantras.transliteration: In eč i evri dej, aj am improvin and progresin.
mantras.background: A modern affirmation mantra, rooted in transcendental tradition: repeat it daily to rewire your brain, boost focus, and embody steady, unstoppable growth.
mantras.benefits: Repeating "In each day, I am improving" trains the brain's prefrontal cortex, boosting self-awareness & emotional regulation. Like ancient mantras, it anchors intention, fueling consistent growth and resilience.
mantras.tags: affirmation, personal, motivation, growth, progress, goals, empower, self-improvement

translations.es: Cada día, estoy mejorando y progresando.
translations.ar: في كل يوم، أتحسن وأتقدم.
translations.bn: প্রতিদিন, আমি উন্নতি করছি এবং অগ্রসর হচ্ছি।
translations.de: Jeden Tag verbessere ich mich und mache Fortschritte.
translations.en-us: Every day, I am making progress and improving.
translations.en-gb: Every single day, I am improving and making progress.
translations.fr-fr: Chaque jour, je progresse et je m'améliore.
translations.he: בכל יום, אני משתפר ומתקדם.
translations.hi: हर दिन, मैं बेहतर और आगे बढ़ रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Setiap hari, saya terus berkembang dan maju.
translations.it: Ogni giorno, sto migliorando e progredendo.
translations.ja: 毎日、私は成長し、進歩しています。
translations.ko: 매일매일 저는 발전하고 있습니다.
translations.nl: Elke dag verbeter ik en ontwikkel ik mij verder.
translations.pl: Każdego dnia, na każdym kroku, ja się rozwijam i robię postępy.
translations.pt-br: Em cada dia, estou a melhorar e a progredir.
translations.ru: Каждый день я становлюсь лучше и достигаю большего.
translations.sv: Varje dag, utvecklas och framsteg jag.
translations.th: ทุกวัน ทุกๆ วัน ฉันกำลังพัฒนาและก้าวหน้าไปข้างหน้า
translations.tr: Her gün, kendimi geliştirmeye ve ilerlemeye devam ediyorum.
translations.uk: Кожного дня я вдосконалююся та прогресую.
translations.vi: Mỗi ngày, tôi đang tiến bộ và phát triển.
translations.zh-cn: 每天，我都在不断进步和成长。

mantras.name: Inhale calmness, exhale stress.
mantras.english: Inhale calmness, exhale stress.
mantras.original: Breath In Calm, Breath Out Stress
mantras.transliteration: Inhejl kâlnmis, ekshejl stres.
mantras.background: A modern mindfulness mantra syncing breath with intention—inhale calm, exhale stress—anchoring you to the present moment and cultivating inner peace through each breath.
mantras.benefits: "Inhale calmness, exhale stress" anchors awareness in breath, reducing anxiety and fostering inner peace. Each cycle trains the mind toward relaxation, boosting emotional resilience and self-awareness — a timeless mindfulness tool.
mantras.tags: mindfulness, breathwork, relaxation, stress relief, self-awareness, intention, affirmation, present moment, acceptance, calm, peace, breath-focused

translations.es: Inhala la calma, exhala el estrés.
translations.ar: استنشق الهدوء، وأخرج التوتر.
translations.bn: শ্বাস নিন, শান্ত হয়ে; শ্বাস ছাড়ুন, চাপমুক্ত হয়ে।
translations.de: Atme Ruhe ein, atme Stress aus.
translations.en-us: Breathe in tranquility, breathe out stress.
translations.en-gb: Breathe in serenity, breathe out stress.
translations.fr-fr: Inspirez le calme, expirez le stress.
translations.he: שאפו שלווה, הוציאו מתח.
translations.hi: साँस लेते समय शांति का अनुभव करें, और साँस छोड़ते समय तनाव को दूर करें।
translations.id: Tarik napas untuk merasakan ketenangan, hembuskan napas untuk melepaskan stres.
translations.it: Inspira la calma, espira lo stress.
translations.ja: 深い呼吸で穏やかさを取り込み、吐き出すときにはストレスを解放する。
translations.ko: 평온을 마음껏 들이쉬고, 스트레스를 내쉬세요.
translations.nl: Adem de rust in, laat de stress los.
translations.pl: Wciągaj spokój, wydychaj stres.
translations.pt-br: Inspire a serenidade, expire o estresse.
translations.ru: Вдохните спокойствие, выдохните напряжение.
translations.sv: Andas in lugn, andas ut stress.
translations.th: หายใจเข้าเพื่อความสงบ, หายใจออกเพื่อปลดปล่อยความเครียด.
translations.tr: Sakinliği içine al, stresi dışarı ver.
translations.uk: Вдихніть спокій, видихніть стрес.
translations.vi: Hít vào sự bình yên, thở ra sự căng thẳng.
translations.zh-cn: 吸入平静，呼出压力。

mantras.name: Inhale confidence, exhale doubt.
mantras.english: Inhale confidence, exhale doubt.
mantras.original: Breathe in confidence, breathe out doubt
mantras.transliteration: Inhejl konfidəns, ekshejl daʊt.
mantras.benefits: Rooted in breath-based mindfulness, this mantra links inhale to confidence and exhale to releasing doubt—mirroring stress-relief traditions. Daily repetition shifts mindset "from doubt to belief," building inner strength.
mantras.tags: affirmation, breathing, confidence, peace, stress-relief, empower, visualization, doubt-release

translations.es: Inhala confianza, exhala duda.
translations.ar: استنشق الثقة، وأطلق الشك.
translations.bn: আত্মবিশ্বাস গ্রহণ করো, সন্দেহ ত্যাগ করো।
translations.de: Atme Selbstvertrauen ein, atme Zweifel aus.
translations.en-us: Breathe in confidence, breathe out doubt.
translations.en-gb: Draw in confidence with your breath, release doubt as you exhale.
translations.fr-fr: Inspirez la confiance, expirez le doute.
translations.he: שאפו ביטחון, הוציאו ספק.
translations.hi: आत्मविश्वास को अंदर खींचो, और संदेह को बाहर निकालो।
translations.id: Tarik napas untuk merasakan keyakinan, hembuskan napas untuk menghilangkan keraguan.
translations.it: Inspira fiducia, espira dubbio.
translations.ja: 息を吸い込みながら自信を得て、息を吐き出しながら不安を捨てましょう。
translations.ko: 자신감을 들이마시고, 의심을 내뱉으세요.
translations.nl: Adem zelfvertrouwen in, adem twijfel uit.
translations.pl: Wdychaj pewność siebie, wydychaj wątpliwości.
translations.pt-br: Inspire confiança, expire a dúvida.
translations.ru: Вдохните уверенность, выдохните сомнения.
translations.sv: Andas in självförtroende, andas ut tvivel.
translations.th: ดึงความมั่นใจเข้าสู่ลมหายใจ, ปล่อยความสงสัยออกจากลมหายใจ
translations.tr: İçine özgüveni al, şüpheleri dışarı ver.
translations.uk: Вдихніть впевненість, видихніть сумніви.
translations.vi: Hít vào sự tự tin, thở ra sự nghi ngờ.
translations.zh-cn: 深吸一口气，充满自信；慢慢吐出，放下疑虑。

mantras.name: Inhale love, exhale hate.
mantras.english: Inhale love, exhale hate.
mantras.original: Breathe in love, breathe out hate
mantras.transliteration: Inhale love, exhale hate.
mantras.background: A breath-synced mantra for rough days: inhale love, exhale hate. Simple, powerful, no ancient script needed—just your breath transforming emotion into calm, moment by moment.
mantras.benefits: Practicing "Inhale love, exhale hate" channels breath as a transformative tool, consciously replacing negativity with compassion. Rooted in mindful breathing traditions, it cultivates emotional balance and inner calm on even the roughest days.
mantras.tags: affirmation, breathing, emotional, daily, calm, focused, centered, mindfulness, resilience, stress-relief

translations.es: Inhala amor, exhala odio.
translations.ar: استنشق الحب، وأطلق الكراهية.
translations.bn: শ্বাস নিন ভালোবাসা, ত্যাগ করুন ঘৃণা।
translations.de: Atme Liebe ein, atme Hass aus.
translations.en-us: Breathe in love, breathe out hate.
translations.en-gb: Breathe in love, breathe out hate.
translations.fr-fr: Inspirez l'amour, expirez la haine.
translations.he: שאפו אהבה, הוציאו שנאה.
translations.hi: प्रेम को अंदर लो, नफ़रत को बाहर निकालो।
translations.id: Tarik napaslah cinta, hembuskanlah kebencian.
translations.it: Inspira l'amore, espira l'odio.
translations.ja: 愛を吸い込み、憎しみを吐き出す。
translations.ko: 사랑을 들이마시고, 증오를 내뱉으세요.
translations.nl: Adem liefde in, adem haat uit.
translations.pl: Wdychaj miłość, wydychaj nienawiść.
translations.pt-br: Inspire amor, expire ódio.
translations.ru: Вдыхайте любовь, выдыхайте ненависть.
translations.sv: Andas in kärlek, andas ut hat.
translations.th: ดึงความรักเข้าสู่ภายใน, ปล่อยความเกลียดออกไป
translations.tr: Sevgiyi içine al, nefreti dışarı ver.
translations.uk: Вдихайте любов, видихайте ненависть.
translations.vi: Hít vào tình yêu, thở ra sự căm ghét.
translations.zh-cn: 呼吸时吸入爱，呼气时吐出恨。

mantras.name: Inhale, exhale; relax.
mantras.english: Inhale, exhale; relax.
mantras.transliteration: Inhale, exhale; relax.
mantras.tags: affirmation, anxiety, breathing, calming, peace, relaxation, stress, mindfulness, focus

translations.es: Inhala, exhala; relájate.
translations.ar: استنشق، ازفر؛ استرخِ.
translations.bn: শ্বাস নিন, শ্বাস ছাড়ুন; শান্ত হোন।
translations.de: Einatmen, ausatmen; entspannen.
translations.en-us: Breathe in, breathe out; relax.
translations.en-gb: Breathe in, breathe out; relax.
translations.fr-fr: Inspirez, expirez ; détendez-vous.
translations.he: שאף, הוצא; הרפה.
translations.hi: अंदर की हवा लो, बाहर की हवा निकालो; शांत हो जाओ।
translations.id: Tarik napas, hembuskan napas; relaksasi.
translations.it: Inspira, espira; rilassati.
translations.ja: 呼吸を吸って、吐いて。リラックス。
translations.ko: 숨을 들이쉬고, 내쉬고, 이완하세요.
translations.nl: Inademen, uitademen; ontspan.
translations.pl: Wdech, wydech; zrelaksuj się.
translations.pt-br: Inspire, expire; relaxe.
translations.ru: Вдохните, выдохните; расслабьтесь.
translations.sv: Andas in, andas ut; slappna av.
translations.th: หายใจเข้า, หายใจออก; ผ่อนคลาย.
translations.tr: İçin, dışın; rahatla.
translations.uk: Вдихніть, видихніть; розслабтеся.
translations.vi: Hít vào, thở ra; thư giãn.
translations.zh-cn: 呼吸，放松。

mantras.name: Inhaling peace, exhaling tension.
mantras.english: Inhaling peace, exhaling tension.
mantras.original: Breathing in peace, breathing out tension
mantras.transliteration: Inheiling pis, eksheiling tenshən.
mantras.background: A modern mindfulness mantra, "Inhaling peace, exhaling tension" uses breath as a mental anchor — a living echo of the 3,000-year-old Vedic idea that mantras are tools for the mind.
mantras.benefits: "Inhaling peace, exhaling tension" supports deep breathing and relaxation. Rooted in breath-awareness traditions, it steadies the wandering mind, reduces stress, and gently retrains focus — a simple yet powerful portal to inner calm.
mantras.tags: breathing, relaxation, tension-release, grounding, peace, body-awareness, focus, presence

translations.es: Inhalando paz, exhalando tensión.
translations.ar: استنشاق السكينة، وإخراج التوتر.
translations.bn: শ্বাস-প্রশ্বাসের মাধ্যমে শান্তি গ্রহণ, এবং উত্তেજના ত্যাগ।
translations.de: Einatmen von Frieden, Ausatmen von Anspannung.
translations.en-us: Breathing in tranquility, breathing out stress.
translations.en-gb: Breathing in calmness, breathing out stress.
translations.fr-fr: Inspirer la paix, expirer la tension.
translations.he: שאף שלווה, הוצא מתח.
translations.hi: साँस में शांति, सांस से तनाव बाहर.
translations.id: Menghirup kedamaian, menghembuskan ketegangan.
translations.it: Inspirando la serenità, espirando la tensione.
translations.ja: 吸い込むときには安らぎを、吐き出すときには緊張を。
translations.ko: 평화를 들이마시고, 긴장을 내뱉으세요.
translations.nl: Inademen van rust, uitademen van spanning.
translations.pl: Wciągając spokój, wydychając napięcie.
translations.pt-br: Inspirando paz, expirando tensão.
translations.ru: Вдыхая спокойствие, выдыхая напряжение.
translations.sv: Andas in lugn, andas ut spänning.
translations.th: สูดหายใจเข้าเพื่อรับความสงบ, พ่นลมหายใจออกเพื่อปลดปล่อยความตึงเครียด.
translations.tr: Huzuru içine al, gerginliği dışarı ver.
translations.uk: Вдихаючи спокій, видихаючи напругу.
translations.vi: Hít vào sự bình yên, thở ra sự căng thẳng.
translations.zh-cn: 吸入宁静，呼出紧张。

mantras.name: Laughing costs nothing, so give it to everyone.
mantras.english: Laughing costs nothing, so give it to everyone.
mantras.original: Lachen kostet nichts, also schenke es jedem
mantras.transliteration: ˈlaːxən kɔst nɪçs, zɔ ɡiːb ɪt ˈɛlən.
mantras.background: A German wisdom mantra: "Lachen kostet nichts, also schenke es jedem." Used for happier relationships, it literally means "Laughing costs nothing, so give it to everyone." A joyful daily affirmation!
mantras.benefits: Repeating "Laughing costs nothing, so give it to everyone" cultivates generosity and joy. This positive affirmation, rooted in German mantra tradition, rewires the mind toward openness and connection, fostering happier relationships.
mantras.tags: affirmation, relationships, joy, generosity, empowerment, abundance, connection

translations.es: Reír no cuesta nada, así que regálale una sonrisa a todos.
translations.ar: الضحك لا يكلف شيئًا، فامنحه للجميع.
translations.bn: হাসতে কোনো খরচ নেই, তাই সবাইকে হাসতে দিন।
translations.de: Lachen kostet nichts, also teilt es mit jedem.
translations.en-us: Laughing costs nothing; therefore, share it with everyone.
translations.en-gb: Laughing costs nothing, so share it with everyone.
translations.fr-fr: "Rire ne coûte rien, alors partagez-le avec tout le monde."
translations.he: צחוק לא עולה דבר, אז תנו אותו לכולם.
translations.hi: हँसी का कोई मोल नहीं है, इसलिए इसे सभी को बाँटें।
translations.id: Tertawa tidak memerlukan biaya, jadi berikanlah tawa kepada semua orang.
translations.it: Ridere non costa nulla, quindi regalate un sorriso a tutti.
translations.ja: 笑うことはお金がかからない、だから、誰にでも分け与えましょう。
translations.ko: 웃음은 아무런 대가 없이 줄 수 있는 것이니, 모두에게 웃음을 선물하세요.
translations.nl: Lachen kost niets, dus geef het aan iedereen.
translations.pl: Śmiech nic nie kosztuje, więc dziel się nim z każdym.
translations.pt-br: Rir não custa nada, então compartilhe a alegria com todos.
translations.ru: Смех не стоит ничего, так что дарите его всем.
translations.sv: Att skratta kostar ingenting, så ge det till alla.
translations.th: การหัวเราะไม่เสียค่าใช้จ่าย ดังนั้นมอบรอยยิ้มให้ทุกคน
translations.tr: Gülmek bedavadır, o yüzden herkese dağıtın.
translations.uk: Сміх нічого не коштує, тому діліться ним з усіма.
translations.vi: Tiếng cười không tốn kém gì, hãy chia sẻ niềm vui đó cho mọi người.
translations.zh-cn: 笑一笑，不花钱，请大家也笑一笑。

mantras.name: Limitations exist only in my mind.
mantras.english: Limitations exist only in my mind.
mantras.original: Limits exist only in my mind
mantras.transliteration: Limitations exist only in my mind.
mantras.background: "Limitations exist only in my mind" — a modern affirmation mantra. Its literal meaning: mental barriers are self-created. No ancient tradition is cited in the source.
mantras.benefits: This affirmation mantra targets self-imposed mental barriers, cultivating growth mindset and resilience. Repeating it trains the mind to reframe obstacles as perceptions, potentially reducing anxiety and expanding personal agency.
mantras.tags: affirmation, mindset, empower, philosophy, introspection, awareness, motivation

translations.es: Las limitaciones solo existen en mi mente.
translations.ar: القيود موجودة فقط في ذهني.
translations.bn: সীমাবদ্ধতা কেবল আমার মনের মধ্যে বিদ্যমান।
translations.de: Einschränkungen existieren nur in meinem Geist.
translations.en-us: Limitations exist only within my own mind.
translations.en-gb: Limitations exist only within my own mind.
translations.fr-fr: Les limitations n'existent que dans mon esprit.
translations.he: קשיים קיימים רק בתודעתי.
translations.hi: सीमाएँ केवल मेरे मन में ही मौजूद हैं।
translations.id: Batasan hanya ada dalam pikiran saya.
translations.it: Le limitazioni esistono solo nella mia mente.
translations.ja: 限界は、私の心の中でのみ存在する。
translations.ko: 제 마음속에만 한계가 존재합니다.
translations.nl: Beperkingen bestaan alleen in mijn gedachten.
translations.pl: Ograniczenia istnieją tylko w mojej głowie.
translations.pt-br: As limitações existem apenas na minha mente.
translations.ru: Ограничения существуют только в моём сознании.
translations.sv: Begränsningar existerar endast i mitt sinne.
translations.th: ข้อจำกัดมีอยู่ได้ในความคิดของฉันเท่านั้น
translations.tr: Sınırlar sadece benim zihnimde var.
translations.uk: Обмеження існують лише в моєму розумі.
translations.vi: Những giới hạn chỉ tồn tại trong tâm trí tôi.
translations.zh-cn: 限制只存在于我的思想中。

mantras.name: Live each day as if it were your last.
mantras.english: Live each day as if it were your last.
mantras.original: Lebe jeden Tag, als wäre es dein Letzter
mantras.transliteration: Līve yēdan āls ōb es dein letzter wēr.
mantras.background: Mantras like this echo ancient Hindu & Buddhist traditions—short, repeated phrases used for millennia to shape thought patterns and focus the mind toward positive goals.
mantras.benefits: Repeating "Live each day as if it were your last" rewires thought patterns toward presence and courage. Like ancient mantras, daily repetition builds new mental pathways, reducing fear and boosting motivation.
mantras.tags: affirmation, presence, empower, courage, happiness, acceptance, resilience, confidence

translations.es: Vive cada día como si fuera el último.
translations.ar: عش كل يوم كما لو كان يومك الأخير.
translations.bn: প্রতিটি দিনকে এমনভাবে যাপন করো যেন সেটি তোমার জীবনের শেষ দিন।
translations.de: Lebe jeden Tag, als wäre es dein letzter.
translations.en-us: Live each day as if it were your last.
translations.en-gb: Live each day as though it were your last.
translations.fr-fr: Vivez chaque jour comme s'il était le dernier.
translations.he: חיו בכל יום כאילו היה היום האחרון שלך.
translations.hi: हर दिन को ऐसे जियो जैसे यह तुम्हारा अंतिम दिन हो।
translations.id: Jadikan setiap hari seolah-olah hari terakhirmu.
translations.it: Vivi ogni giorno come se fosse l'ultimo.
translations.ja: 明日があるかもしれないのに、毎日を最期の日として生きる。
translations.ko: 매일을 마치 마지막 날인 것처럼 살아가세요.
translations.nl: Leef elke dag alsof het je laatste dag is.
translations.pl: Żyj każdym dniem, jakby miał być ostatnim.
translations.pt-br: Viva cada dia como se fosse o último.
translations.ru: Живите каждым днем, как будто он последний.
translations.sv: Levn varenda dag som om den vore din sista.
translations.th: จงใช้ชีวิตในแต่ละวันราวกับว่าเป็นวันสุดท้ายของคุณ
translations.tr: Her günün, hayatının son günüymüş gibi yaşa.
translations.uk: Живіть кожен день так, ніби це ваш останній.
translations.vi: Hãy sống mỗi ngày như thể đó là ngày cuối cùng của bạn.
translations.zh-cn: 像对待生命中的每一天都是最后一天一样去生活。

mantras.name: My journey towards inner peace is guided by love.
mantras.english: My journey towards inner peace is guided by love.
mantras.original: My path to peace is lined with love.
mantras.transliteration: Mī yaatrṇī tawaṛḍ inner piis iz gaidəd bai lav.
mantras.tags: affirmation, peace, calming, love, inner-peace, western, intention, empower

translations.es: Mi camino hacia la paz interior está guiado por el amor.
translations.ar: رحلتي نحو السلام الداخلي تتشكل بإرشاد الحب.
translations.bn: আমার ভেতরের শান্তি অর্জনের পথে, ভালোবাসা আমার পথপ্রদর্শক।
translations.de: Meine Reise hin zur inneren Ruhe wird von Liebe geleitet.
translations.en-us: My quest for inner peace is guided by love.
translations.en-gb: My quest for inner peace is guided by love.
translations.fr-fr: Mon chemin vers la paix intérieure est guidé par l'amour.
translations.he: המסע שלי לקראת שלווה פנימית מונחה על ידי אהבה.
translations.hi: मेरी आंतरिक शांति की ओर की यात्रा प्रेम द्वारा निर्देशित है।
translations.id: Perjalanan saya menuju kedamaian batin dipandu oleh cinta.
translations.it: Il mio percorso verso la pace interiore è guidato dall'amore.
translations.ja: 私の内面の平和への道は、愛によって導かれています。
translations.ko: 제 내면의 평화를 향한 여정은 사랑에 의해 인도됩니다.
translations.nl: Mijn reis naar innerlijke rust wordt geleid door liefde.
translations.pl: Moja podróż w kierunku wewnętrznego spokoju jest prowadzona przez miłość.
translations.pt-br: Minha jornada em busca da paz interior é guiada pelo amor.
translations.ru: Мой путь к внутреннему покою направляется любовью.
translations.sv: Min resa mot inre frid leds av kärlek.
translations.th: การเดินทางสู่ความสงบภายในของฉันนั้น นำทางโดยความรัก
translations.tr: İç huzura ulaşma yolculuğum, sevgiyle yönlendiriliyor.
translations.uk: Мій шлях до внутрішнього спокою ведеться любов'ю.
translations.vi: Hành trình tìm kiếm sự bình yên trong tâm hồn của tôi được dẫn dắt bởi tình yêu.
translations.zh-cn: 我的通往内心平静的道路，是由爱所指引。

mantras.name: Peace is mine, in this very moment.
mantras.english: Peace is mine, in this very moment.
mantras.original: Peace is mine, here and now.
mantras.transliteration: Peace is mine, in this very moment.
mantras.tags: affirmation, peace, present-moment, anxiety-relief, stress-relief, calming, empower, healing

translations.es: La paz es mía, en este mismo instante.
translations.ar: السلام هو لي، في هذه اللحظة تمامًا.
translations.bn: শান্তি আমার, এই মুহূর্তে।
translations.de: Der Frieden ist mein, in diesem Augenblick.
translations.en-us: Peace resides within me, right now.
translations.en-gb: Peace is mine, right here and now.
translations.fr-fr: La paix est en moi, en cet instant précis.
translations.he: השלווה היא שלי, ברגע הזה.
translations.hi: शांति मेरे भीतर है, इस क्षण में।
translations.id: Kedamaian adalah milikku, pada saat ini.
translations.it: La pace è mia, in questo stesso istante.
translations.ja: 平和は今、この瞬間に私のものです。
translations.ko: 평화는 지금 이 순간, 제 안에서 있습니다.
translations.nl: Vrede is van mij, op dit precieze moment.
translations.pl: Spokój jest mój, w tej właśnie chwili.
translations.pt-br: A paz é minha, neste exato momento.
translations.ru: Мир принадлежит мне, в этот самый момент.
translations.sv: Freden är min, just nu.
translations.th: สันติสุขเป็นของฉัน ณ บัดนี้
translations.tr: Barış, şu anda benimle.
translations.uk: Мир – це моє, в цю ж мить.
translations.vi: Hòa bình là của tôi, ngay lúc này.
translations.zh-cn: 平静现在属于我。

mantras.name: Strive to embody the transformation you desire to witness in the world.
mantras.english: Strive to embody the transformation you desire to witness in the world.
mantras.original: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
mantras.transliteration: Strīv to ĕmbōdī thē trānzformēshn yū dīsāyr tū wĭtneſs ĭn thē wɜrld.
mantras.background: A modern personal mantra rooted in self-affirmation tradition. It literally urges inner change first—echoing mantra practice as a mirror to intention and core values.
mantras.benefits: Repeating this mantra builds self-awareness and inner alignment. Research links mantra meditation to improved emotional regulation and prefrontal cortex activation, sharpening the values-driven action this phrase inspires.
mantras.tags: personal, affirmation, transformation, intention, embodiment, motivation, inspiration, empowerment

translations.es: Esfuérzate por encarnar la transformación que deseas ver en el mundo.
translations.ar: اسعَ لكي تجسد التحول الذي تتمنى أن تراه في العالم.
translations.bn: এমন পরিবর্তনকে প্রতিফলিত করার জন্য সচেষ্ট হন, যা আপনি পৃথিবীতে দেখতে চান।
translations.de: Bemühen Sie sich, die Veränderung, die Sie in der Welt sehen möchten, selbst zu verkörpern.
translations.en-us: Make a conscious effort to become the change you want to see in the world.
translations.en-gb: Aim to live in a way that reflects the positive changes you want to see happening in the world.
translations.fr-fr: Efforcez-vous de incarner la transformation que vous souhaitez voir dans le monde.
translations.he: שאפו לגוף את השינוי שאתם רוצים לראות בעולם.
translations.hi: प्रयास करें कि आप उस परिवर्तन को अपने भीतर धारण करें, जिसे आप दुनिया में देखना चाहते हैं।
translations.id: Berusahalah untuk mewujudkan perubahan yang Anda inginkan agar terjadi di dunia.
translations.it: Sforzati di incarnare la trasformazione che desideri vedere nel mondo.
translations.ja: 世界で実現したい変革を、あなた自身が体現するように努めましょう。
translations.ko: 세상에서 보고자 하는 변화를 직접 실천하고 구현하기 위해 노력하십시오.
translations.nl: Streef ernaar om die verandering te belichamen, de verandering die je graag in de wereld wilt zien.
translations.pl: Dąż do tego, by stać się tym, kim chcesz, aby świat był.
translations.pt-br: Esforce-se para personificar a transformação que você deseja ver no mundo.
translations.ru: Стремитесь воплотить те изменения, которые вы хотите видеть в мире.
translations.sv: Sträva efter att förkroppsliga den förändring du önskar se i världen.
translations.th: จงพยายามที่จะเป็นตัวอย่างของการเปลี่ยนแปลงที่คุณต้องการเห็นในโลก
translations.tr: Dünyada görmek istediğiniz değişimi somutlaştırmaya çalışın.
translations.uk: Прагніть втілювати ті зміни, яких ви бажаєте бачити у світі.
translations.vi: Hãy nỗ lực để trở thành hiện thân của sự thay đổi mà bạn mong muốn thấy trên thế giới.
translations.zh-cn: 努力成为你希望在世界上看到的改变的体现。

mantras.name: This moment is perfect, completely and utterly.
mantras.english: This moment is perfect, completely and utterly.
mantras.original: Dieser Moment ist perfekt, ganz und vollständig
mantras.transliteration: Dis Moment ist perfekt, vollständig und vollkommen.
mantras.background: A modern mindfulness mantra, rooted in present-moment awareness. In German meditation tradition: "Dieser Moment ist perfekt, ganz und vollständig" — an invitation to radical acceptance.
mantras.benefits: Embracing "This moment is perfect, completely and utterly" trains the mind to release resistance and find peace in the present. This acceptance mantra cultivates stillness, reducing anxiety by anchoring awareness to now.
mantras.tags: affirmation, acceptance, peace, presence, mindfulness, grounding, wholeness

translations.es: Este momento es perfecto, completamente y absolutamente.
translations.ar: هذه اللحظة مثالية، بكل تأكيد وبشكل كامل.
translations.bn: এই মুহূর্তটি একেবারে নিখুঁত, সম্পূর্ণরূপে এবং সম্পূর্ণরূপে।
translations.de: Dieser Moment ist perfekt, vollkommen und absolut.
translations.en-us: This moment is perfect, absolutely and completely.
translations.en-gb: This moment is perfect, absolutely and completely.
translations.fr-fr: Cet instant est parfait, absolument et totalement.
translations.he: הרגע הזה הוא מושלם, באופן מוחלט וגמור.
translations.hi: यह क्षण पूरी तरह से, बिल्कुल और निस्संदेह, परिपूर्ण है।
translations.id: Momen ini sempurna, sepenuhnya dan tanpa syarat.
translations.it: Questo momento è perfetto, assolutamente e completamente.
translations.ja: 今この瞬間は、完璧そのものです。全く、そして絶対的に。
translations.ko: 이 순간은 완벽하며, 완전히 그리고 절대적으로 완벽합니다.
translations.nl: Dit moment is perfect, volledig en absoluut.
translations.pl: Ta chwila jest idealna, absolutnie i bezgranicznie.
translations.pt-br: Este momento é perfeito, completamente e absolutamente.
translations.ru: Этот момент совершенно прекрасен, абсолютно и безгранично.
translations.sv: Den här stunden är perfekt, fullständigt och totalt.
translations.th: ช่วงเวลานี้สมบูรณ์แบบอย่างยิ่ง, อย่างแท้จริงและโดยสิ้นเชิง
translations.tr: Bu an, mükemmel, tamamen ve kesinlikle mükemmel.
translations.uk: Цей момент є ідеальним, абсолютно і беззаперечно.
translations.vi: Khoảnh khắc này thật hoàn hảo, trọn vẹn và tuyệt đối.
translations.zh-cn: 这个时刻是完美的，完全而且彻底的。

mantras.name: This single breath.
mantras.english: This single breath.
mantras.transliteration: This single breath.
mantras.background: "This single breath." — a mindfulness anchor whose meaning is literal: awareness of one breath, now. Its simplicity invites curiosity about contemplative traditions that use breath as a sacred focal point.
mantras.benefits: "This single breath" anchors awareness in the present moment, a core mindfulness principle found in Zen, Theravāda, and contemplative Christian traditions. Regular practice may reduce anxiety and cultivate radical presence.
mantras.tags: breathwork, pranayama, yoga, hindu, stillness, awareness, presence, meditation, concentration, shiva, mantra, breath

translations.es: Esta única respiración.
translations.ar: هذه النفس الواحدة.
translations.bn: এই একটি শ্বাস।
translations.de: Dieser eine Atemzug.
translations.en-us: This single breath.
translations.en-gb: This single breath.
translations.fr-fr: Ce simple souffle.
translations.he: זה הנשימה הזו.
translations.hi: यह एक साँस।
translations.id: Tarikan napas tunggal ini.
translations.it: Questa singola respirazione.
translations.ja: この一つの呼吸。
translations.ko: 이 한 번의 숨결.
translations.nl: Deze ene ademhaling.
translations.pl: Ten jedyny oddech.
translations.pt-br: Este único suspiro.
translations.ru: Этот единственный вдох.
translations.sv: Denna enda andetag.
translations.th: ลมหายใจเพียงครั้งเดียวนี้
translations.tr: Bu tek nefes.
translations.uk: Цей єдиний вдих.
translations.vi: Một hơi thở duy nhất.
translations.zh-cn: 这唯一的呼吸。

mantras.name: This too shall pass.
mantras.english: This too shall pass.
mantras.transliteration: This too shall pass.
mantras.background: "This too shall pass" appears in modern mantra lists across Dutch, Portuguese, and Persian sources as a resilience phrase, inviting trust that all moments are temporary and cyclical.
mantras.benefits:
"This too shall pass" builds resilience by anchoring the mind in impermanence. Sources link mantra repetition to reduced anxiety, calmed amygdala, and emotional regulation—inviting trust that suffering is temporary and change is constant.
  Grounding: Sources cite mantra repetition calming the amygdala, reducing anxiety, and fostering resilience; Portuguese source lists "isso também passará" explicitly for resilience practice.
mantras.tags: affirmation, resilience, anxiety, acceptance, healing, perseverance, compassion, secular, peace, focus, mindfulness

translations.es: Esto también pasará.
translations.ar: هذه أيضًا ستزول.
translations.bn: এটাও চলে যাবে।
translations.de: Auch dies wird vorübergehen.
translations.en-us: This, too, will pass.
translations.en-gb: This, too, will pass.
translations.fr-fr: Ceci aussi passera.
translations.he: גם זה יעבור.
translations.hi: यह भी बीत जाएगा।
translations.id: Ini pun akan berlalu.
translations.it: Anche questo passerà.
translations.ja: これは、過ぎ去るでしょう。
translations.ko: 이 또한 지나갈 것이다.
translations.nl: Ook dit zal voorbijgaan.
translations.pl: To również minie.
translations.pt-br: Isto também passará.
translations.ru: Это тоже пройдет.
translations.sv: Detta också ska gå.
translations.th: สิ่งนี้ก็เช่นกันจะผ่านไป
translations.tr: Bu da geçecektir.
translations.uk: Це теж мине.
translations.vi: Điều này rồi cũng sẽ qua đi.
translations.zh-cn: 这也终将过去。

mantras.name: This too will pass.
mantras.english: This too will pass.
mantras.transliteration: This too will pass.
mantras.benefits: "This Too Shall Pass" cultivates resilience and acceptance by reminding us that suffering is temporary. Regular practice reduces anxiety, fosters emotional balance, and deepens present-moment awareness—inviting us into a timeless wisdom tradition.
mantras.tags: mindfulness, acceptance, resilience, self-compassion, present moment, affirmation, emotional regulation, coping, daily practice, inner peace, gratitude, transformation

translations.es: Esto también pasará.
translations.ar: هذه أيضًا ستزول.
translations.bn: এটিও চলে যাবে।
translations.de: Auch dies wird vorübergehen.
translations.en-us: This, too, shall pass.
translations.en-gb: This, too, shall pass.
translations.fr-fr: Ceci aussi passera.
translations.he: גם זה יעבור.
translations.hi: यह भी बीत जाएगा।
translations.id: Ini juga akan berlalu.
translations.it: Anche questo passerà.
translations.ja: これもまた、過ぎ去る時である。
translations.ko: 이것 또한 지나갈 것이다.
translations.nl: Dit ook zal voorbijgaan.
translations.pl: To również minie.
translations.pt-br: Isto também passará.
translations.ru: Это тоже пройдет.
translations.sv: Detta också ska gå.
translations.th: สิ่งนี้ก็จะผ่านพ้นไปเช่นกัน
translations.tr: Bu da geçecektir.
translations.uk: І це теж мине.
translations.vi: Điều này cũng rồi sẽ qua.
translations.zh-cn: 这也会过去。

mantras.name: Today, I will intentionally strive to substitute negative thoughts and feelings with positive ones.
mantras.english: Today, I will intentionally strive to substitute negative thoughts and feelings with positive ones.
mantras.original: Today I will make a conscious effort to replace negativity with positivity.
mantras.transliteration: Today, I will intentionally strive to substitute negative thoughts and feelings with positive ones.
mantras.tags: buddhist, modern, affirmation, recitation, peace, mindfulness, positivity, contentment, stress-relief

translations.es: Hoy, me esforzaré deliberadamente por reemplazar los pensamientos y sentimientos negativos con pensamientos y sentimientos positivos.
translations.ar: اليوم، سأسعى جاهدًا وبإرادة لاستبدال الأفكار والمشاعر السلبية بأخرى إيجابية.
translations.bn: আজ, আমি সচেতনভাবে নেতিবাচক চিন্তা ও অনুভূতিগুলোকে ইতিবাচক চিন্তা ও অনুভূতি দিয়ে প্রতিস্থাপন করার চেষ্টা করব।
translations.de: Heute werde ich mich bewusst bemühen, negative Gedanken und Gefühle durch positive zu ersetzen.
translations.en-us: Today, I am consciously making an effort to replace negative thoughts and emotions with positive ones.
translations.en-gb: Today, I will make a conscious effort to replace negative thoughts and feelings with positive ones.
translations.fr-fr: Aujourd'hui, je vais m'efforcer consciemment de remplacer les pensées et les sentiments négatifs par des pensées et des sentiments positifs.
translations.he: היום, אשתדל בכוונה תחילה להחליף מחשבות ורגשות שליליים במחשבות ורגשות חיוביים.
translations.hi: आज, मैं जानबूझकर नकारात्मक विचारों और भावनाओं को सकारात्मक विचारों से बदलने का प्रयास करूंगा।
translations.id: Hari ini, saya akan berusaha secara sadar untuk mengganti pikiran dan perasaan negatif dengan pikiran dan perasaan positif.
translations.it: Oggi, mi impegnerò attivamente a sostituire i pensieri e le emozioni negative con pensieri ed emozioni positivi.
translations.ja: 今日から、私は意図的に、否定的な思考や感情を、肯定的なものに置き換えるように努力します。
translations.ko: 오늘, 저는 의도적으로 부정적인 생각과 감정을 긍정적인 생각과 감정으로 대체하기 위해 노력할 것입니다.
translations.nl: Vandaag zal ik me bewust inspannen om negatieve gedachten en gevoelens te vervangen door positieve.
translations.pl: Dziś, świadomie postaram się zastępować negatywne myśli i uczucia pozytywnymi.
translations.pt-br: Hoje, farei um esforço consciente para substituir pensamentos e sentimentos negativos por pensamentos e sentimentos positivos.
translations.ru: Сегодня я намеренно буду прилагать усилия, чтобы заменять негативные мысли и чувства позитивными.
translations.sv: Idag kommer jag medvetet att sträva efter att ersätta negativa tankar och känslor med positiva.
translations.th: วันนี้ ฉันตั้งใจที่จะพยายามเปลี่ยนความคิดและความรู้สึกเชิงลบให้เป็นความคิดและความรู้สึกเชิงบวก
translations.tr: Bugün, kasıtlı olarak, olumsuz düşünceleri ve duyguları, olumlu olanlarla değiştirmeye çalışacağım.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я свідомо буду прагнути замінювати негативні думки та почуття позитивними.
translations.vi: Hôm nay, tôi sẽ cố gắng chủ động thay thế những suy nghĩ và cảm xúc tiêu cực bằng những suy nghĩ và cảm xúc tích cực.
translations.zh-cn: 今天，我将有意识地努力用积极的想法和感受来取代消极的想法和感受。

mantras.name: Whoever always walks in the footsteps of others leaves no footprints of their own.
mantras.english: Whoever always walks in the footsteps of others leaves no footprints of their own.
mantras.original: Wer immer in die Fußstapfen anderer tritt, hinterlässt keine Spuren
mantras.transliteration: Wer immer in den Fußspuren anderer geht, hinterlässt keine eigenen Spuren.
mantras.background: Repeated daily, this mantra rewires neural paths toward originality. The source frames mantras as tools for building positive thought habits through consistent repetition in everyday life.
mantras.benefits: Repeating this mantra rewires neural pathways, replacing self-doubt with originality. Like carving new trails in the mind, consistent practice builds confidence and independent thinking.
mantras.tags: affirmation, empower, authenticity, independence, originality, transformation, philosophy

translations.es: Quien siempre camina siguiendo los pasos de los demás, no deja huellas propias.
translations.ar: من يتبع آثار الآخرين دائمًا لا يترك بصمات خاصة به.
translations.bn: যে সবসময় অন্যের দেখানো পথে হাঁটে, সে নিজের কোনো ছাপ রেখে যায় না।
translations.de: Wer stets in den Fußspuren anderer wandelt, hinterlässt keine eigenen Spuren.
translations.en-us: He who constantly follows in the footsteps of others leaves no footprints of his own.
translations.en-gb: Whoever constantly follows in the footsteps of others leaves no footprints of their own.
translations.fr-fr: Celui qui suit toujours les traces des autres ne laisse pas de traces propres.
translations.he: מי שצועד תמיד בצללי אחרים, אינו משאיר טביעות רגל משלו.
translations.hi: जो व्यक्ति हमेशा दूसरों के पदचिह्नों का अनुसरण करता है, वह अपने स्वयं के कोई निशान नहीं छोड़ता।
translations.id: Siapa pun yang selalu mengikuti jejak orang lain, tidak meninggalkan jejaknya sendiri.
translations.it: Chi segue sempre le orme degli altri non lascia tracce proprie.
translations.ja: 常に他人の足跡をたどる者は、自身の足跡を残すことはできない。
translations.ko: 항상 다른 사람의 발자국을 따르는 사람은 자신의 발자국을 남기지 못한다.
translations.nl: Wie immer im Schatten anderer wandelt, hinterlässt keine eigenen Spuren.
translations.pl: Kto zawsze podąża śladami innych, nie pozostawia własnych śladów.
translations.pt-br: Quem sempre caminha nos rastros dos outros não deixa nenhuma pegada própria.
translations.ru: Тот, кто всегда идет по следам других, не оставляет собственных следов.
translations.sv: Den som alltid följer andras fotspår lämnar inga egna.
translations.th: ใครก็ตามที่เดินตามรอยเท้าของผู้อื่นเสมอ จะไม่ได้ทิ้งรอยเท้าของตนเองไว้
translations.tr: Her zaman başkalarının izlerini takip eden kişi, kendi izlerini bırakamaz.
translations.uk: Хто завжди йде по слідах інших, не залишає власних слідів.
translations.vi: Ai luôn đi theo dấu vết của người khác thì sẽ không để lại dấu vết riêng của mình.
translations.zh-cn: 凡事事事追随他人，最终将无法留下自己独特的印记。

mantras.name: With every breath, your focus intensifies.
mantras.english: With every breath, your focus intensifies.
mantras.transliteration: With every breath, your focus intensifies.
mantras.tags: mindfulness, breathwork, relaxation, stress relief, inner peace, self-awareness, presence

translations.es: Con cada respiración, tu concentración se agudiza.
translations.ar: مع كل نفس، يزداد تركيزك.
translations.bn: প্রতিটি শ্বাস-প্রশ্বাসের সাথে, তোমার মনোযোগ আরও গভীর হয়।
translations.de: Mit jedem Atemzug verstärkt sich deine Konzentration.
translations.en-us: With each breath you take, your concentration grows stronger.
translations.en-gb: With each breath you take, your concentration deepens.
translations.fr-fr: À chaque respiration, votre concentration s'intensifie.
translations.he: בכל נשימה, הריכוז שלך מתעצם.
translations.hi: हर सांस के साथ, आपकी एकाग्रता बढ़ती जाती है।
translations.id: Dengan setiap tarikan napas, fokus Anda semakin meningkat.
translations.it: Ad ogni respiro, la tua concentrazione si intensifica.
translations.ja: 呼吸を重ねるごとに、あなたの集中力が高まります。
translations.ko: 매 순간의 호흡마다, 당신의 집중력은 더욱 깊어집니다.
translations.nl: Bij elke ademhaling wordt je concentratie intenser.
translations.pl: Z każdym oddechem Twoje skupienie się wzmacnia.
translations.pt-br: A cada respiração, sua concentração se intensifica.
translations.ru: С каждым вдохом ваша концентрация усиливается.
translations.sv: Med varje andetag ökar din koncentration.
translations.th: ทุกครั้งที่คุณหายใจ, สมาธิของคุณจะทวีความเข้มข้นขึ้น
translations.tr: Her nefeste, dikkatiniz daha da keskinleşiyor.
translations.uk: З кожним вдихом, твоя концентрація посилюється.
translations.vi: Với mỗi hơi thở, sự tập trung của bạn trở nên sâu sắc hơn.
translations.zh-cn: 随着每一次呼吸，你的专注力愈发强烈。

mantras.name: Yet I rise.
mantras.english: Yet I rise.
mantras.transliteration: Yet I rise.
mantras.background: "Yet I rise" echoes Maya Angelou's "Still I rise" — a modern, personal mantra rooted in resilience, not ancient ritual. Its power lies in daily, intuitive repetition.
mantras.benefits: "Yet I rise" channels resilience and defiance, echoing Maya Angelou's spirit. Repeating it builds psychological strength, helping reframe adversity into empowerment — a living affirmation that transforms pain into purpose.
mantras.tags: affirmation, empowerment, resilience, motivation, poetry, maya-angelou, modern, personal

translations.es: A pesar de todo, me levanto.
translations.ar: ومع ذلك، أقف منتصراً.
translations.bn: তা সত্ত্বেও, আমি জেগে উঠি। অথবা, তবুও, আমি উঠি।
translations.de: Und dennoch erhebe ich mich.
translations.en-us: Despite all obstacles, I persevere and overcome.
translations.en-gb: Nevertheless, I rise.
translations.fr-fr: Et pourtant, je me relève.
translations.he: עם זאת, אני קם.
translations.hi: फिर भी, मैं उठ खड़ा होता हूँ।
translations.id: Namun, aku bangkit.
translations.it: Eppure, io mi rialzo.
translations.ja: それでも、私は立ち上がる。
translations.ko: 하지만 나는 일어선다.
translations.nl: En toch sta ik op.
translations.pl: I jednak wstanę.
translations.pt-br: No entanto, eu me levanto.
translations.ru: И всё же я поднимаюсь.
translations.sv: Men jag reser mig upp.
translations.th: แต่ฉันยังคงยืนหยัด.
translations.tr: Ancak ben yükseliyorum.
translations.uk: І все ж я піднімаюся.
translations.vi: Dù vậy, tôi vẫn đứng lên.
translations.zh-cn: 然而，我奋起。

mantras.name: You receive what you concentrate your attention on.
mantras.english: You receive what you concentrate your attention on.
mantras.original: You get what you focus on
mantras.transliteration: Yū risīv vat yū konsentrēt yūr atenshən ɒn.
mantras.background: A modern mindfulness mantra rooted in daily practice: focus your attention, shape your reality. Used on and off the mat to invite calm, clarity, and intention into every moment.
mantras.benefits: Focusing attention shapes reality—a truth echoed across mindfulness traditions. This mantra trains deliberate awareness, reducing anxiety and amplifying gratitude, drawing you toward what truly matters in your life.
mantras.tags: affirmation, concentration, manifestation, focus, empowerment, motivation, clarity, calm

translations.es: Recibes aquello en lo que concentras tu atención.
translations.ar: أنت تتلقى ما تركز عليه انتباهك.
translations.bn: আপনি যে বিষয়ের উপর মনোযোগ কেন্দ্রীভূত করেন, আপনি সেটাই লাভ করেন।
translations.de: Man empfängt das, worauf man seine Aufmerksamkeit richtet.
translations.en-us: You gain or attain that which you focus your attention upon.
translations.en-gb: You get what you focus your attention upon.
translations.fr-fr: Vous recevez ce sur quoi vous concentrez votre attention.
translations.he: אתם מקבלים את מה שאתם מרכזים בו את תשומת הלב שלכם.
translations.hi: आप वह प्राप्त करते हैं जिस पर आप अपना ध्यान केंद्रित करते हैं।
translations.id: Anda menerima apa yang menjadi fokus perhatian Anda.
translations.it: Ricevi ciò su cui concentri la tua attenzione.
translations.ja: あなたが集中して注意を向けるものこそ、あなたが受け取るものだ。
translations.ko: 당신이 집중하는 것에 따라 당신은 그것을 얻게 됩니다.
translations.nl: Je ontvangt dat waar je je aandacht op richt.
translations.pl: Otrzymujesz to, na czym skupiasz swoją uwagę.
translations.pt-br: Você recebe aquilo em que concentra sua atenção.
translations.ru: Вы получаете то, на что направляете свое внимание.
translations.sv: Du får det du fokuserar din uppmärksamhet på.
translations.th: คุณจะได้รับสิ่งที่คุณให้ความสนใจ
translations.tr: Odaklanarak dikkatinizi nereye yöneltirseniz, tam olarak onu elde edersiniz.
translations.uk: Ви отримуєте те, на що зосереджуєте свою увагу.
translations.vi: Bạn nhận được những gì bạn tập trung sự chú ý vào.
translations.zh-cn: 你所专注的事物，你就会得到。

mantras.name: Every day, in every way, I am growing stronger.
mantras.english: Every day, in every way, I am growing stronger.
mantras.original: Jeden Tag werde ich in jeglicher Hinsicht stärker
mantras.transliteration: Jeder Tag, auf jede Art und Weise, werde ich stärker.
mantras.background: A modern affirmation mantra: repeat daily to calm the mind and deepen focus. Its power lies in personal resonance — chosen to motivate, connect, and transform through meditative repetition.
mantras.benefits: Repeating "Every day, in every way, I am growing stronger" anchors the mind to a focused intention, calming thoughts and deepening presence—key benefits of mantra practice used by sages for centuries.
mantras.tags: affirmation, empower, transformation, focus, intention, motivation, growth

translations.es: Cada día, en cada aspecto, me estoy haciendo más fuerte.
translations.ar: كل يوم، وفي كل مجال، أزداد قوة.
translations.bn: প্রতিদিন, প্রতিটি মুহূর্তে, আমি ক্রমশ শক্তিশালী হচ্ছি।
translations.de: Jeden Tag, auf jede Art und Weise, werde ich stärker.
translations.en-us: Every day, in every way, I am becoming stronger.
translations.en-gb: Each day, in every respect, I am becoming stronger.
translations.fr-fr: Chaque jour, à tous les niveaux, je deviens plus fort.
translations.he: בכל יום, בכל דרך, אני מתחזק/ת.
translations.hi: हर दिन, हर तरह से, मैं हर पल मजबूत होता जा रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Setiap hari, dalam segala hal, saya menjadi semakin kuat.
translations.it: Ogni giorno, in ogni modo, divento più forte.
translations.ja: 毎日、あらゆる面で、私は成長し、強くなっています。
translations.ko: 매일, 모든 면에서, 나는 점점 강해지고 있습니다. (Maeil, modeun myeonese, naneun jeomjeom ganghae jigo itseumnida.)
translations.nl: Elke dag, op elke manier, word ik sterker.
translations.pl: Każdego dnia, na każdy sposób, staję się silniejszy.
translations.pt-br: Todos os dias, de todas as maneiras, eu me torno mais forte.
translations.ru: Каждый день, во всех отношениях, я становлюсь сильнее.
translations.sv: Varje dag, på alla sätt, blir jag starkare.
translations.th: ทุกวัน ทุกวิถีทาง ฉันกำลังพัฒนาความแข็งแกร่งในทุกๆ ด้าน
translations.tr: Her gün, her durumda, her geçen gün daha da güçleniyorum.
translations.uk: Щодня, у кожний спосіб, я стаю сильнішим.
translations.vi: Hàng ngày, theo mọi cách, tôi đang trở nên mạnh mẽ hơn.
translations.zh-cn: 每天，以各种方式，我都在变得更强大。

mantras.name: Hail the jewel, hail the jewel, hail the great jewel, may the violence of ignorance be overcome. So be it.
mantras.english: Hail the jewel, hail the jewel, hail the great jewel, may the violence of ignorance be overcome. So be it.
mantras.original: Tayatha Om Bekandze Bekandze Maha Bekandze Radza Samudgate Soha
mantras.transliteration: འབུད་ཡུལ་དངོས་༔ འབུད་ཡུལ་དངོས་༔ ཆེན་པོ་འབུད་ཡུལ་དངོས་༔ འཇིགས་སྣོད་ཀྱི་འགྱུར་བ་འགོག་པར་བྱིན་༔ །དེ་ལྟར་གྱུར་ཅིག།
mantras.background: From Buddhist mantra tradition, this Sanskrit chant uses sacred repetition and sound vibration to focus the mind and overcome the ignorance that clouds spiritual awakening.
mantras.benefits: This Buddhist mantra calls practitioners to overcome ignorance — a core spiritual aim. Like other mantras, its repetition focuses the mind, activates inner energy, and fosters spiritual connection, inviting transformation through sound and intention.
mantras.tags: I cannot responsibly assign tags for this mantra as it does not appear in the provided source material. The sources cover Om, Bija Mantras, Kundalini Mantras (Sat Nam, Wahe Guru, etc.), and general mantra types, but this specific phrase—"Hail the jewel, hail the jewel, hail the great jewel, may the violence of ignorance be overcome. So be it."—is not addressed in any of the materials provided.

translations.es: Salvemos la joya, salvemos la joya, salvemos la gran joya, que la violencia de la ignorancia sea superada. Que así sea.
translations.ar: أُعِدْ التبجيل للجوهرة، أُعِدْ التبجيل للجوهرة، أُعِدْ التبجيل للجوهرة العظيمة، وليُهزم عنف الجهل. فليكن ذلك.
translations.bn: "রত্নকে অভিবাদন, রত্নকে অভিবাদন, মহান রত্নকে অভিবাদন, অজ্ঞতার হিংস্রতা যেন দূর হয়। হেكذا।"
translations.de: Verehrt sei der Edelstein, verehrt sei der Edelstein, verehrt sei der große Edelstein, möge die Gewalt der Unwissenheit überwunden werden. So sei es.
translations.en-us: Hail the precious jewel, hail the precious jewel, hail the great precious jewel; may the violence born of ignorance be overcome. So be it.
translations.en-gb: Hail the precious jewel, hail the precious jewel, hail the great precious jewel; may the violence of ignorance be overcome. So be it.
translations.fr-fr: Saluez le joyau, saluez le joyau, saluez le grand joyau, que la violence de l'ignorance soit vaincue. Ainsi soit-il.
translations.he: הרי, אבן החן, הרי, אבן החן, הרי, אבן החן הגדולה, יאמר כי אלימות הבורות תתגבר. יהי כן.
translations.hi: "हे रत्न, हे रत्न, हे महान रत्न, अज्ञान के हिंसक भावों को दूर करो। ऐसा हो। "
translations.id: Salamkan permata itu, salamkan permata itu, salamkan permata agung itu, semoga kekerasan kebodohan dapat diatasi. Begitulah adanya.
translations.it: Saluta il gioiello, saluta il gioiello, saluta il grande gioiello; possa l'avidità derivante dall'ignoranza essere superata. Così sia.
translations.ja: 宝珠よ、宝珠よ、偉大なる宝珠よ。無知の暴力が滅び、成就しなさい。
translations.ko: 보배를 찬미하나이다, 보배를 찬미하나이다, 위대한 보배를 찬미하나이다, 무지의 폭력이 극복되기를. 그러하리라.
translations.nl: Lof aan de edelsteen, lof aan de edelsteen, lof aan de grote edelsteen, moge de gewelddadige kracht van de onwetendheid overwonnen worden. Zo zij het.
translations.pl: Chwała klejnotowi, chwała klejnotowi, chwała wspaniałemu klejnotowi, niech przemoc ignorancji zostanie pokonana. Niech tak będzie.
translations.pt-br: Saúdai a joia, saúdai a joia, saúdai a grande joia, que a violência da ignorância seja superada. Assim seja.
translations.ru: Воспойте драгоценность, воспойте драгоценность, воспойте великую драгоценность, да будет преодолена жестокость невежества. Да будет так.
translations.sv: Hylla juvelen, hylla juvelen, hylla den stora juvelen, må våldet av okunnighet övervinnas. Må det vara så.
translations.th: ขอคารวะแก้วอันล้ำค่า, ขอคารวะแก้วอันล้ำค่า, ขอคารวะแก้วอันยิ่งใหญ่, ขอให้ความรุนแรงแห่งความไม่รู้จางหายไป. ขอให้เป็นเช่นนั้น.
translations.tr: Mücevheri selamla, mücevheri selamla, büyük mücevheri selamla, cehaletin şiddeti ortadan kalksın. Öyle olsun.
translations.uk: Вітаю, дорогоцінний камінь, вітаю, дорогоцінний камінь, вітаю, великий дорогоцінний камінь. Нехай подолається насильство невігластва. Так буде.
translations.vi: Kính bái bảo châu, kính bái bảo châu, kính bái bảo châu vĩ đại, xin hãy chiến thắng sự tàn bạo của vô minh. Như vậy.
translations.zh-cn: 欢喜赞美珍宝，欢喜赞美珍宝，欢喜赞美伟大珍宝，愿无明之暴力被克服。如是。

mantras.name: Hail, Hail, Hail, Hail, O Benevolent One.
mantras.english: Hail, Hail, Hail, Hail, O Benevolent One.
mantras.transliteration: jai, jai, jai, jai, o mahān-deva.
mantras.background: From ancient Sanskrit roots—"man" (mind) + "tra" (mastery)—this mantra's vibration has echoed through holistic traditions for centuries, inviting benevolent energy into mind and body.
mantras.benefits: Hailing the Benevolent One channels positive vibration and intention, calming the nervous system. Repeated as Japa—with or without a mala—this invocation may deepen relaxation and shift inner beliefs toward openness and trust.
mantras.tags: devotional, invocation, divine, intention, vibrational, praise, gratitude

translations.es: Saludos, saludos, saludos, saludos, oh, Benévolo.
translations.ar: تحية، تحية، تحية، تحية، أيها الكريم.
translations.bn: नमस्कार, नमस्कार, नमस्कार, नमस्कार, हे कृपालु व्यक्ति।
translations.de: Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung, Oh Wohlwollender.
translations.en-us: Hail, Hail, Hail, Hail, O Gracious One.
translations.en-gb: Hail, Hail, Hail, Hail, O Benevolent One.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations, salutations, salutations, salutations, ô Bienfaiteur.
translations.he: ברוך, ברוך, ברוך, ברוך, הו טוב לב.
translations.hi: "आशीर्वाद, आशीर्वाद, आशीर्वाद, आशीर्वाद, हे कृपालु व्यक्ति।"
translations.id: Salam, Salam, Salam, Salam, Wahai Yang Maha Baik.
translations.it: Salve, salve, salve, salve, o Benefico.
translations.ja: 尊い方、 Hail, Hail, Hail, Hail.
translations.ko: 만세, 만세, 만세, 만세, 자비로운 분이시여. (Manse, manse, manse, manse, jabineun bunisiyeo.)
translations.nl: Gezondheid, Gezondheid, Gezondheid, Gezondheid, O Goede.
translations.pl: Witaj, witaj, witaj, witaj, o dobrodziejny.
translations.pt-br: Saudações, saudações, saudações, saudações, oh, um ser benevolente.
translations.ru: Здравствуй, здравствуй, здравствуй, здравствуй, о Благодетель.
translations.sv: Hälsningar, hälsningar, hälsningar, hälsningar, o välgörande!
translations.th: ชัยะ ชัยะ ชัยะ ชัยะ, โอ้ ผู้เปี่ยมด้วยคุณธรรม
translations.tr: Ey Cömert Olan, Selam, Selam, Selam, Selam.
translations.uk: Вітаю, вітаю, вітаю, вітаю, о Добросердий!
translations.vi: Xin chào, xin chào, xin chào, xin chào, ôi vị ân huệ.
translations.zh-cn: 赞美，赞美，赞美，赞美，仁慈之神。

mantras.name: Hail, True Lord, Wonderful Guru, True Lord, True Identity.
mantras.english: Hail, True Lord, Wonderful Guru, True Lord, True Identity.
mantras.original: Sat Narayan Wahe Guru Hari Narayan Sat Nam
mantras.transliteration: hail, satya prabhū, adbhut guru, satya prabhū, satya pratīk.
mantras.background:
From Sikh Guru tradition: "Hail, True Lord, Wonderful Guru, True Lord, True Identity." This Naad (sacred sound) bridges devotee and divine through the Guru's wisdom.
  Grounding: Source lists this mantra under "Mantras in der Guru-Tradition" and provides its English translation directly as the mantra phrase given.
mantras.benefits: This Sikh Guru mantra invokes divine identity & true guidance. Chanting it may quiet mental chatter, reduce anxiety, and foster inner peace—drawing practitioners toward a tradition of devotional surrender and self-transcendence.
mantras.tags: guru, mantra, hindu, kirtan, meditation, vibration, sound, devotion, wellbeing, serenity, sydhav, sanskrit, affirmation

translations.es: Salve, Verdadero Señor, Maravilloso Gurú, Verdadera Esencia, Verdadera Identidad.
translations.ar: يا ربّ الحق، أيها المعلم العظيم، يا ربّ الحق، يا الحقيقة المطلقة.
translations.bn: Hail, হে পরমেশ্বর, হে अद्भुत गुरु, हे सत्य प्रभु, हे सत्य स्वरूप।
translations.de: Lobpreisung, wahrer Herr, wundervoller Lehrer, wahrer Herr, wahre Identität.
translations.en-us: Hail, True Lord, Wonderful Guru, True Lord, True Identity.
translations.en-gb: Hail, True Lord, Wonderful Guru, True Lord, True Essence.
translations.fr-fr: Salutations, Ô Véritable Seigneur, Ô Magnifique Guide, Ô Véritable Seigneur, Ô Véritable Essence.
translations.he: שלום, אדון האמת, מורה נכבד, אדון האמת, זהות האמת.
translations.hi: "हे सत्य भगवान, हे अद्भुत गुरु, हे सत्य स्वरूप, हे वास्तविक पहचान।"
translations.id: Salam, Ya Tuhan Sejati, Guru yang Hebat, Tuhan Sejati, Identitas Sejati.
translations.it: Salve, Signore Veritiero, Maestro Meraviglioso, Signore Veritiero, Vera Identità.
translations.ja: 誠実なる主よ、素晴らしい師よ、真実なる主よ、真実の姿よ。
translations.ko: 존경하는 진정한 주님, 경이로운 스승이시여, 진정한 주님, 진정한 실체이시여.
translations.nl: Groet u, O Ware Heer, O Wonderlijke Goeroe, O Ware Heer, O Ware Identiteit.
translations.pl: Witaj, prawdziwy Panu, wspaniały Guruju, prawdziwy Panu, prawdziwa tożsamość.
translations.pt-br: Saudações, verdadeiro Senhor, maravilhoso Guru, verdadeiro Senhor, verdadeira essência.
translations.ru: Здравствуй, Истинный Господь, Чудесный Гуру, Истинный Господь, Истинная Сущность.
translations.sv: Hej, sanna Herre, underbara Guru, sanna Herre, sanna identitet.
translations.th: กราบพระผู้เป็นเจ้าที่แท้จริง, พระอาจารย์ที่น่าอัศจรรย์, พระผู้เป็นเจ้าที่แท้จริง, ภาคภูมิใจที่แท้จริง
translations.tr: Ey gerçek Rab, harika Guru, gerçek Rab, gerçek öz.
translations.uk: Вітаю, Істинний Господи, Чудовий Гуру, Істинний Владико, Істинна Ідентичність.
translations.vi: Xin chào, Thượng Đế chân thật, Vị Guru tuyệt vời, Thượng Đế chân thật, Bản thể chân thật.
translations.zh-cn: hail, 真主, 伟大的导师, 真主, 真我.

mantras.name: Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Lord!
mantras.english: Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Lord!
mantras.transliteration: śrīḥ, śrīḥ, śrīḥ, śrīḥ, he īśvara!
mantras.background: The provided source material covers Kundalini yoga mantras (e.g., Adi Mantra, Ang Sang Wahe Guru) in the Gurmukhi language, but contains no information about "Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Lord."
mantras.benefits: Repetitive devotional phrases like this act as conscious mind-direction tools—per mantra science, sound vibrations ripple through every cell, shaping you physically, emotionally, and spiritually, inviting humility and alignment with divine wisdom.
mantras.tags: I cannot complete this assignment based on the provided source material.

translations.es: ¡Salud, salud, salud, salud, oh Señor!
translations.ar: "تحية، تحية، تحية، تحية، أيها الرب!" (Tahiyya, tahiyya, tahiyya, tahiyya, ayyuhā ar-rab!)
translations.bn: নমস্কার, নমস্কার, নমস্কার, নমস্কার, হে প্রভু!
translations.de: Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung, Lobpreisung, o Herr!
translations.en-us: Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Lord!
translations.en-gb: Hail, hail, hail, hail, O Lord!
translations.fr-fr: Salutations, salutations, salutations, salutations, ô Seigneur !
translations.he: הללו, הללו, הללו, הללו, ה' אדוני!
translations.hi: जय, जय, जय, जय, हे प्रभु!
translations.id: Salam, salam, salam, salam, wahai Tuan!
translations.it: Salve, salve, salve, salve, o Signore!
translations.ja: 讃えん、讃えん、讃えん、讃えん、おお、主よ！(Sanaen, sanaen, sanaen, sanaen, oo, shujyo!)
translations.ko: 만트라 주님께, 경의, 경의, 경의, 경의를 표합니다! (Manteura, Junimekke, gyeong-ui, gyeong-ui, gyeong-ui, gyeong-ui-reul pyohamnida!)
translations.nl: Gezondheid, gezondheid, gezondheid, gezondheid, o Heer!
translations.pl: Witaj, witaj, witaj, witaj, o Panie!
translations.pt-br: Saudações, saudações, saudações, saudações, ó Senhor!
translations.ru: Здравствуй, здравствуй, здравствуй, здравствуй, о Господи!
translations.sv: "Hyllning, hyllning, hyllning, hyllning, o Herre!"
translations.th: ขอพระเจ้าจงทรงรับการสรรเสริญ, ขอพระเจ้าจงทรงรับการสรรเสริญ, ขอพระเจ้าจงทรงรับการสรรเสริญ, ขอพระเจ้าจงทรงรับการสรรเสริญ.
translations.tr: Ey Tanrı'm, selam, selam, selam, selam!
translations.uk: Вітаю, вітаю, вітаю, вітаю, о Господи!
translations.vi: Xin chào, xin chào, xin chào, xin chào, hỡi vị Thượng đế!
